translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu lɛɛ mʋ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Kɔɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ gyii.

english_verse: After Jesus and his disciples reached Jerusalem, he went into the temple and began chasing out everyone who was selling and buying. He turned over the tables of the moneychangers and the benches of those who were selling doves.
translation_verse: Ba maa fʋʋ Gyerusalem mʋ, Yesu kpee kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ obu mʋ tɔ naa, nɩɩ o piili ɛɛ gya atɔ afɛpʋ yɛ asɔɔpʋ. Nɩɩ o biliŋaa‐biliŋaa afulee akyarɩpʋ iteeburu yɛ awura‐lɔpɔ afɛpʋ ngya taŋa‐taŋa.

english_verse: Jesus would not let anyone carry things through the temple.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ o tii ɔkpa fɛɛ ɔkʋ ɔ man bɩla taa kʋtɔ kʋ bɔla kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ mʋ opula.

english_verse: Whenever you stand up to pray, you must forgive what others have done to you. Then your Father in heaven will forgive your sins. A Question about Jesus' Authority (Matthew
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fan kan fan man taa fanɛ tɔɔmaa ana alibi kɛɛ bamʋ mʋ, fanɛ‐Sɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ sʋsʋ mʋ gbaa mɛɛ yɛ ɔ taa fanɛ lɛɛ kɛɛ fanɛ.” Yesu ɔlʋn Asɩn (Matiwu

english_verse: Jesus and his disciples returned to Jerusalem. And as he was walking through the temple, the chief priests, the nation's leaders, and the teachers of the Law of Moses came over to him.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba bɩla bwii naa fʋʋ Gyerusalem. Tʋtɔ mʋ, Yesu maa naa kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ aseepu bɩlɩsa, yɛ nbara akaapʋpʋ, yɛ abɩlɩsa ba ba mʋ asɛ.

english_verse: Jesus answered, “I have just one question to ask you. If you answer it, I will tell you where I got the right to do these things.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu lɛɛ bamʋ kɔnɔ yɛ, “N biti n taasɛ fanɛ asɩn, nɩɩ fan kan lɛɛ kɔnɔ kyɛɛkyɛɛ sa mɛ bɩrɛ, n biti n tɔwɛ fanɛ ɔlʋn kʋlʋn mʋ nɩɩ n sʋ n waa ɩnɩmʋ kpini.

english_verse: Who gave John the right to baptize? Was it God in heaven or merely some human being?”
translation_verse: Gyɔn kekyugyee mʋ, ɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ abɛɛ nyɩmɩsa asɛ?”

english_verse: They thought it over and said to each other, “We can't say that God gave John this right. Jesus will ask us why we didn't believe John.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba yii kasɛ bee gyii abaa ɩmɔɔrɛ yɛ, “Nɩɩ an kan lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, ‘Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ mʋ’ ee biti ɔ taasɛ anɛ yɛ, ‘Mɩnɛ ɩ waa sʋ nɩɩ a man kɔɔlɛ Gyɔn gyii?’

english_verse: and told Jesus, “We don't know.” Jesus replied, “Then I won't tell you who gave me the right to do what I do.”
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ ba sii lɛɛ Yesu kɔnɔ nɩn yɛ, “A man nyi.” Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Kanɩn bɩrɛ, ngbaa mɛ, n mɛɛ yɛ n tɔwɛ fanɛ ɔlʋn kʋlʋn mʋ nɩɩ n sʋ n waa ɩnɩmʋ kpini.”

english_verse: It is also true that we must love God with all our heart, mind, and strength, and that we must love others as much as we love ourselves. These commandments are more important than all the sacrifices and offerings that we could possibly make.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan ɔ taa mʋ kɔkɔlɔ yɛ mʋ nfɛɛrɛ yɛ mʋ ɔlʋn nyɛ kebiti sa Ɩbwaarɛ, nɩɩ o biti mʋ‐bɩrɩsa fɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ mʋ, ɩ bʋrɔn ɩ kyɔ fɛɛ ɔ maa waa saraga yɛ kakɛɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus asked, “What do you think the owner of the vineyard will do? He will come and kill those renters and let someone else have his vineyard.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu taasɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Ɩnɩmʋ falɛ kudubi mʋ, mɩnɛ nɩɩ kadɔɔ wuya mʋ ii biti ɔ waa?” Nɩɩ ba yɛ, “Ee biti ɔ ba mɔɔ paa agyipu mʋ kpini, kɛ ɔ taa kadɔɔ mʋ waa paa agyipu pʋpwɛ abaa tɔ.”

english_verse: Teacher, Moses wrote that if a married man dies and has no children, his brother should marry the widow. Their first son would then be thought of as the son of the dead brother.
translation_verse: “Ɔkaapʋpʋ, Mosesi kyʋrɔɔ nbara ɩnɩmʋ sa anɛ yɛ, nɩɩ ɔnyɩn kan wu yɛgɛ mʋ‐ka, nɩɩ maa mʋ ba man kʋʋgɛ nbii mʋ, mu‐supu ɩ taalɛ taa okulapu‐kyɩɩ maŋa kili kɛ ba kʋʋgɛ nbii sa olewupu mʋ.

english_verse: When it was harvest time, he sent a servant to get his share of the grapes.
translation_verse: Kɩtɩŋɛ saŋa maa fʋʋ mʋ, nɩɩ o sun mʋ kɩyaafɔlɛ kʋ paa agyipu mʋ asɛ, kɛ ɔ naa kɔɔlɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ mʋ bɩya mʋ.

english_verse: The renters grabbed the servant, beat him up, and sent him away without a thing.
translation_verse: Amaa paa agyipu mʋ ba kɩtaa mʋ kɩyaafɔlɛ mʋ, dayɩ mʋ bwiiyaa mʋ abaakpan.

english_verse: Then the man sent another servant, and they killed him. He kept sending servant after servant. They beat some of them and killed some.
translation_verse: Kadɔɔ wuya mʋ bɩla sun ɔkʋ, nɩɩ paa agyipu mʋ ba dayɩ mʋ mɔɔ. Ɔ bɩla sun gaalaagaa, nɩɩ ba dayɩ akʋ, nɩɩ ba mɔɔ akʋ mɔɔ.

english_verse: The owner had a son he loved very much. Finally, he sent his son to the renters because he thought they would respect him.
translation_verse: “Ɔkʋlʋn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ dan san kɛ o sun mʋ ɩ gyɛ mu‐bii mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kebiti sa. Laalaalʋwɛ mʋ o sun mʋ nɩɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, ‘Ɔ maa gyɛ mi‐bii gbaa‐gbaa falɛ bɩrɛ, bee biti ba taa bɛɛrɛɛ sa mʋ.’

english_verse: But they said to themselves, “Someday he will own this vineyard. Let's kill him! That way we can have it all for ourselves.”
translation_verse: “Amaa paa agyipu mʋ ba tɔwɛ abaa nɩn yɛ, ‘Ɔnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ kapatɩyɛ ogyipu mʋ. Fan ba kɛ a mɔɔ mʋ, kɛ kapatɩyɛ mʋ ki biliŋi anɛ lɛɛ!’

english_verse: So they grabbed the owner's son, killed him, and threw his body out of the vineyard.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ ba kɩtaa mu‐bii mʋ, nɩɩ ba mɔɔ, lɛɛ mʋ lɩɩ kadɔɔ mʋ tɔ.”

english_verse: This is something the Lord has done, and it is amazing to us.’ ”
translation_verse: Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ ɩ waa ɩnɩmʋ, nɩɩ i kyinkyin anɛ.’ ”

english_verse: The leaders knew that Jesus was really talking about them, and they wanted to arrest him. But because they were afraid of the crowd, they let him alone and left. Paying Taxes (Matthew
translation_verse: Gyiwu abɩlɩsa mʋ ba paa Yesu kɩkɩta, kpalɩ fɛɛ ba bɩɩ yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ Yesu bɔ kanɩn kɩŋasan maŋa. Amaa ba sɩlɛ sakyɔ mʋ, ɩmʋ sʋ ba yɛgɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ kyʋn. Lenpoo kɩka asɩn (Matiwu

english_verse: You surely know about people being raised to life. You know that in the story about Moses and the burning bush, God said, “I am the God worshiped by Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob.”
translation_verse: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ, lɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ bee biti ba kyiŋi lɩɩ lewu tɔ mʋ, fan man pɩɩ kalɛ Mosesi ɔwʋlɛ tɔ lɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ o wu fʋlɔn maa dɛɛ apʋnfa mʋ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, ‘Mɛ ɩ gyɛ Abraham Ɩbwaarɛ, Isaki maa Gyekobu Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ!’

english_verse: The Pharisees got together with Herod's followers. Then they sent some men to trick Jesus into saying something wrong.
translation_verse: Farasii abi yɛ owura Herodi asa akʋ ba ba Yesu asɛ ba sʋʋ mʋ ɔdʋʋ lɩɩ mʋ asɩn tɔwɛsa sʋ.

english_verse: They went to him and said, “Teacher, we know that you are honest. You treat everyone with the same respect, no matter who they are. And you teach the truth about what God wants people to do. Tell us, should we pay taxes to the Emperor or not?”
translation_verse: Ba ba mʋ asɛ ba tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Ɔkaapʋpʋ, an nyi fʋ maa gyɛ kesintin ogyipu, nɩɩ fʋ mɛɛ tʋwɛ lɩɩ nfɛɛrɛ mʋ nɩɩ asa bɛɛ fɛ, nɩɩ fʋ mɛɛ kɩɩ nyɩmɩsa kɩkparɛ sʋ, amaa fɩɩ kaapʋ asa Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn bɔla kesintin ɔkpa sʋ. An biti a nu lɩɩ fʋ asɛ yɛ, ɩ dɛ ɔkpa fɛɛ a ka lenpoo sa Roma abi Owura lala Kasaro?

english_verse: They brought him a silver coin, and he asked, “Whose picture and name are on it?” “The Emperor's,” they answered.
translation_verse: Ba maa sa mʋ kefulee nɩɩ ɔ kɩɩ mʋ, ɔ taasɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Anɩmʋ foto yɛ kɩtɩɩ ɩ gyan kefulee mʋ sʋ falɛ?” Nɩɩ ba yɛ, “Owura lala Kasaro lɛɛ.”

english_verse: Then Jesus told them, “Give the Emperor what belongs to him and give God what belongs to God.” The men were amazed at Jesus. Life in the Future World (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ Yesu yɛ, “To! Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ Kasaro lɛɛ mʋ, fan ka sa mʋ, nɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mɔɔ lɛɛ mʋ, fan taa sa mʋ.” Nɩɩ Yesu asɩn a waa bamʋ kanankʋ. Kekili yɛ kekyiŋi lɩɩ lewu tɔ asɩn (Matiwu

english_verse: He isn't the God of the dead, but of the living. You Sadducees are all wrong. The Most Important Commandment (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɔ gyɛ asa kɩɩsa Ɩbwaarɛ nɩn, man gyɛ alewupu lɛɛ. Fan fɔyɩ kesintin sʋ!” Nbara mʋ tɔ kɩlala (Matiwu

english_verse: But they cheat widows out of their homes and pray long prayers just to show off. They will be punished most of all. A Widow's Offering (Luke
translation_verse: Bɛɛ naa bee puni akulapu‐kyɩɩ bee gyii bamʋ atɔ, yɛgɛ bɛɛ yɩlɛ asa tɔ bɛɛ kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ bʋnswɩɩsa. Bee biti ba nyɛ kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ gaa ɩ kyɔ asa kpini!” Okulapu‐kyɩɩ saraga (Luka

english_verse: The Sadducees did not believe that people would rise to life after death. So some of them came to Jesus and said:
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ nɩɩ Sadusi abi mʋ nɩɩ ba yɛ kelewu kyiŋi man bʋ tɔ mʋ, ba ba Yesu asɛ ba tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ,

english_verse: Jesus answered: You are completely wrong! You don't know what the Scriptures teach. And you don't know anything about the power of God.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu lɛɛ bamʋ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Man gyɛ fan maa man nyi abwaarɛsɩn abɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔlʋn mʋ sʋ nɩɩ fan fɔyɩ falɛ?

english_verse: When Jesus saw that the man had given a sensible answer, he told him, “You are not far from God's kingdom.” After this, no one dared ask Jesus any more questions. About David's Son (Matthew
translation_verse: Yesu maa wu fɛɛ ɔnyɩn mʋ lɛɛ kɔnɔ kanyaasɩn tɔ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Fʋ man bʋ kata yɛ sʋsʋ Ɩbwaarɛ kuwura‐gyii mʋ.” Ɩnɩmʋ kamaa mʋ, ɔkʋ man bɩla nyɛ kɔkɔlɔ taasɛ Yesu asɩn kʋ. Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ mʋ asɩn (Matiwu

english_verse: One of the teachers of the Law of Moses came up while Jesus and the Sadducees were arguing. When he heard Jesus give a good answer, he asked him, “What is the most important commandment?”
translation_verse: Nbara ɔkaapʋpʋ kʋ bʋ tʋtɔ nɩɩ o nu ɩmɔɔrɛ mʋ nɩɩ bee gyii. O wu fɛɛ Yesu lɛɛ Sadusi abi mʋ kɔnɔ danbɩrasa. Ɩmʋ sʋ ɔ ba mʋ asɛ ba taasɛ mʋ yɛ, “Nbara mʋ kpini tɔ mʋ, kɩmɔɔ kɩ gyɛ kɩkparɛ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “The most important one says: ‘People of Israel, you have only one Lord and God.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Nbara mʋ tɔ kɩkparɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ kɩnɩmʋ mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, Oo! Ɩsɩrayɩ nu! Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ anɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ ɩ gyɛ ɔkʋlʋn nɩn.

english_verse: You must love him with all your heart, soul, mind, and strength.’
translation_verse: Taa fʋ kɔkɔlɔ yɛ fʋ kala yɛ fʋ nfɛɛrɛ yɛ fʋ ɔlʋn kpini nyɛ kebiti sa fʋ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: The second most important commandment says: ‘Love others as much as you love yourself.’ No other commandment is more important than these.”
translation_verse: Kɩnyɔsapʋ mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, ‘Biti fʋ bɩrɩsa fɛɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ!’ Nbara kʋ n man bɩla ɔ bʋ tɔ nɩɩ ɩ kyɔ ɩnɩmʋ.”

english_verse: Jesus was sitting in the temple near the offering box and watching people put in their gifts. He noticed that many rich people were giving a lot of money.
translation_verse: Kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ mʋ, Yesu kyɩna yɛgɛ mu ansi ɩɩ kɩɩ afulee kɩdakaa katɩnɛ, nɩɩ ɛɛ kɩɩ asa ba maa sʋ afulee bɛɛ waa tɔ. Afulee wuya ana gaalaagaa ba waa afulee gaa.

english_verse: Everyone else gave what they didn't need. But she is very poor and gave everything she had. Now she doesn't have a cent to live on.
translation_verse: lɩɩ fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba waa gaa‐gaa mʋ, ba gyii san ɩkʋ yɩla bamʋ ibu to nɩn, amaa okulapu‐kyɩɩ tiripu nɩmʋ bɩrɛ, mu afulee kpini mʋ nɩɩ ɔ dan ɔ sʋ mu obu to mʋ kpini‐kpini nɩɩ ɔ taa ba waa tɔ falɛ.”

english_verse: As Jesus was teaching in the temple, he said, “How can the teachers of the Law of Moses say the Messiah will come from the family of King David?
translation_verse: Yesu maa kaapʋ kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ taasɛ yɛ, “Nɛnɛ sʋ nɩɩ nbara akaapʋpʋ mʋ bɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ Krisito mʋ ii biti ɔ lɩɩ Dawidi kanaana tɔ?

english_verse: If David called the Messiah his Lord, how can the Messiah be his son?” The large crowd enjoyed listening to Jesus teach. Jesus Condemns the Pharisees and the Teachers of the Law of Moses (Matthew
translation_verse: Dawidi gbaa‐gbaa ɩ tɩɩ mʋ ‘Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ.’ Ɩmʋ sʋ, nɛnɛ sʋ nɩɩ Krisito mʋ ii biti ɔ lɩɩ Dawidi kanaana tɔ?” Nɩɩ sakyɔ damantɛ mʋ kpini ba nu Yesu asɛ yɛ kinsigyi. Yesu da mu abuupu amu tɔ lɩɩ nbara akaapʋpʋ sʋ (Matiwu

english_verse: As Jesus was teaching, he said: Guard against the teachers of the Law of Moses! They love to walk around in long robes and be greeted in the market.
translation_verse: Yesu maa san ɛɛ kaapʋ bamʋ mʋ, ɔ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Fan baa fan da nbara akaapʋpʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba bun bamʋ ɩbalɩmasʋ ba naa bee biti afwaala yɛ bɛɛrɛɛ agya tɔ mʋ sʋ,

english_verse: They like the front seats in the synagogues and the best seats at banquets.
translation_verse: yɛgɛ bɛɛ kɩɩ bɛɛ lɛɛ ɩkyɩnakpa kparɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ ɔgyaŋɛkpa yɛ kensi‐gyii ipula mʋ.

english_verse: Finally, a poor widow came up and put in two coins worth only a few pennies.
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ nɩɩ okulapu‐kyɩɩ tiripu kʋ taa nderebi anyɔ ba waa tɔ.

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples to gather around him. Then he said: I tell you that this poor widow has put in more than all the others.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ mʋ abɩɩlapʋ ba sarɛ tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “N tɔwɛ fanɛ kesintin fɛɛ, okulapu‐kyɩɩ tiripu nɩmʋ waa afulee kɩdakaa mʋ tɔ ɔ kyɔ asa mʋ kpini,

english_verse: As Jesus was leaving the temple, one of his disciples said to him, “Teacher, look at these beautiful stones and wonderful buildings!”
translation_verse: Yesu maa dan ɛɛ lɩɩ Kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ mʋ, nɩɩ mʋ ɔbɩɩlapʋ kʋ tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Ɔkaapʋpʋ! Kɩɩ abuu danbɩrasa yɛ ibu bʋrɔnsa mʋ nɩɩ ba pɔyɩ falɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Do you see these huge buildings? They will certainly be torn down! Not one stone will be left in place.” Warning about Trouble (Matthew
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu lɛɛ mʋ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Yɛ fu wu ibu kparɛ‐kparɛ maŋa? Kibuu kʋlʋn gbaa kɩ mɛɛ yɛ ki sii kɩ gyan kʋkʋ sʋ yɛ be mee nin kɩmʋ tʋʋ.” Yesu tɔwɛ mʋ abɩɩlapʋ yɛ bee biti ba gyii awʋrʋfɔ gaalaagaa (Matiwu

english_verse: Jesus answered: Watch out and don't let anyone fool you!
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu piili ɛɛ tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Fan baa fan da sʋ, kɛ fan man yɛgɛ ɔkʋ ɔ pɩna fanɛ.

english_verse: Many will come and claim to be me. They will use my name and fool many people.
translation_verse: Asa gaalaagaa bee biti ba ba mɛ kɩtɩɩ tɔ ba tɔwɛ yɛ, ‘Mɛ, ɩ gyɛ Krisito mʋ!’ kɛ ba pɩna asa gaalaagaa.

english_verse: Later, as Jesus was sitting on the Mount of Olives across from the temple, Peter, James, John, and Andrew came to him in private.
translation_verse: Yesu maa tɛ Olifu kɩbɩɩ‐bi mʋ sʋ yɛgɛ mu ansi ɩɩ kɩɩ Kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ mʋ, Pita yɛ Gyemisi yɛ Gyɔn yɛ Andiruwu ba ba mʋ asɛ.

english_verse: Someday you will see that “Horrible Thing” where it should not be. Everyone who reads this must try to understand! If you are living in Judea at that time, run to the mountains.
translation_verse: “Kanɩn saŋa maŋa mʋ, nɩɩ fan kan wu ɔdaatapʋ libi‐libi mʋ maa yɩlɛ katɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ ikisii yɛ kɩsɩkpa sa Ɩbwaarɛ fɛɛ maa yɩlɛ tʋtɔ mʋ, saŋa maŋa mʋ, bamʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ Gyudeya mʋ, ba sɩlɛ kpee abɩɩ tɔ.

english_verse: When you hear about wars and threats of wars, don't be afraid. These things will have to happen first, but that isn't the end.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fan kan nu anaa sʋ yɛ anaa asɩn mʋ, fan man yɛgɛ fanɛ nkɔlɔ ɩ ŋmaa fanɛ. Ɩ dagaa ɩnɩmʋ ɩ maa ba kanɩn, amaa ɩ mɛɛ kaapʋ fɛɛ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ tee tiri tɔ nɩn.

english_verse: This will be the worst time of suffering since God created the world, and nothing this terrible will ever happen again.
translation_verse: Kanɩn saŋa maŋa ii biti ɩ baa i libi ɩ kyɔ awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ dulinyaa wʋla wu lɩɩ koo saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tʋʋ dulinyaa ba fʋʋ ndaga saŋa nɩmʋ ii sʋ ii kpee.

english_verse: They asked, “When will these things happen? What will be the sign that they are about to take place?”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba taasɛ mʋ yɛ, “Saŋa mɔɔ nɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ ii biti ɩ ba? Mɩnɛ sɩnkaala ii biti ɩ waa kaapʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ ii biti ɩ ba?”

english_verse: Nations and kingdoms will go to war against each other. There will be earthquakes in many places, and people will starve to death. But this is just the beginning of troubles.
translation_verse: Ɔsʋwʋlɛ ii biti ɔ kɔ yɛ ɔsʋwʋlɛ, kɛ kuwura‐gyii ɔ kɔ yɛ kuwura‐gyii. Kasɛ kii biti ki gyingyen katɩn kʋmaa nɩmʋ, kɛ akʋn a tɩyɛ. Kanɩn asɩn nɩmʋ kpini i du nɩn fɛɛ ɔkyɩɩ keduŋidi gyankpaasa.

english_verse: Be on your guard! You will be taken to courts and beaten with whips in their synagogues. And because of me, you will have to stand before rulers and kings to tell about your faith.
translation_verse: “Fan baa fan da sʋ. Bee biti ba kɩtaa fanɛ kpee asɩn ogyikpa, kɛ ba dayɩ fanɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ ɔgyaŋɛkpa. Lɩɩ mɛ sʋ bee biti ba tɩɩ fanɛ alʋnpʋ yɛ awura ansi tɔ, kɛ fan nyɛ ɔkpa tɔwɛ bamʋ mɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ.

english_verse: But before the end comes, the good news must be preached to all nations.
translation_verse: Amaa pɔyɩ kɛ laalaalʋwɛ ɔ ba mʋ, ɩ dagaa fɛɛ ba tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ sa asa yiri kʋmaa nɩmʋ.

english_verse: When you are arrested, don't worry about what you will say. You will be given the right words when the time comes. But you will not really be the ones speaking. Your words will come from the Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba kan kɩtaa fanɛ kpee asɩn ogyikpa mʋ, fan man yɛgɛ ɩ tɔɔrɔɔ fanɛ lɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ fen biti fan naa tɔwɛ mʋ sʋ. Saŋa mʋ kan fʋʋ mʋ, fan tɔwɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa waa fanɛ nnɔ tɔ mʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ man gyɛ fanɛ ɩɩ tɔwɛ, amaa Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ ɩɩ tɔwɛ.

english_verse: Brothers and sisters will betray each other and have each other put to death. Parents will betray their own children, and children will turn against their parents and have them killed.
translation_verse: “Osupu ii biti ɔ ba lɛɛ ɔdaa sa kɛ ba mɔɔ mʋ, kɛ ɔsɛ gbaa ɔ lɛɛ mu‐bii sa. Nɩɩ nbii bee biti ba kʋsʋ yɩlɛ bamʋ akʋʋgɛpʋ sʋ kɛ ba yɛgɛ ba mɔɔ bamʋ.

english_verse: Everyone will hate you because of me. But if you keep on being faithful right to the end, you will be saved. The Horrible Thing (Matthew
translation_verse: “Ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ii biti o kisi fanɛ lɩɩ mɛ sʋ. Amaa ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɩtaa tɔ kenken naa fʋʋ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ, ii biti ɔ nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ mʋ. Ɔdaatapʋ Libi‐libi mʋ (Matiwu

english_verse: If you are on the roof of your house, don't go inside to get anything.
translation_verse: Ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ obu to mʋ, ɔ man bɩla bwii loo obu to ɔ naa taa mʋ atɔ kɛ ɔ sɩlɛ.

english_verse: If the Lord doesn't make the time shorter, no one will be left alive. But because of his chosen and special ones, he will make the time shorter.
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ man dɩn kɔɔgɛ kanɩn awʋrʋfɔ nkɛ mʋ sʋ nɩn, naafɔɔ ɔkʋ mɛɛ yɛ ɔ nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ. Amaa lɩɩ mʋ asa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ mʋ sʋ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔgɛ kanɩn nkɛ maŋa sʋ.

english_verse: If you are out in the field, don't go back for your coat.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ ndɔɔ tɔ mʋ, ɔ man bɩla bwii mʋ kɩkpaara sʋ naa taa mʋ atɔ bunsa.

english_verse: It will be an awful time for women who are expecting babies or nursing young children.
translation_verse: Kanɩn nkɛ maŋa tɔ mʋ, ɩ mɛɛ yɛ ɩ baa ɩ bʋrɔn sa akyɩɩ ɩtɔ wuya ana, yɛ akyɩɩ atalapʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ nbii wuribi abaa tɔ mʋ!

english_verse: Pray that it won't happen in winter.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ kɛ kanɩn asɩn nɩmʋ a man ba kɩkyɛ saŋa.

english_verse: False messiahs and false prophets will come and work miracles and signs. They will even try to fool God's chosen ones.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ antɩŋɛsa Krisito ana yɛ antɩŋɛsa atɔwɛpʋ bee biti ba ba. Bee biti ba ba waa asɩn kyinkyinsa yɛ adangana pɩna asa. Naafɔɔ nɩɩ ɩ nyɛ waa nɩn, bɛɛ pɩna asa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mʋ.

english_verse: But be on your guard! That's why I am telling you these things now. When the Son of Man Appears (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan baa fan da sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ n wʋla tɔwɛ fanɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa pɔyɩ kanɩn nkɛ maŋa ɩ fʋʋ. Daadimaadi Obii‐nyɩnsa mʋ kɩba (Matiwu

english_verse: The sky and the earth will not last forever, but my words will. No One Knows the Day or Time (Matthew
translation_verse: Sʋsʋ yɛ kasɛ kpini ii biti ɔ kyʋn, amaa mɛ atɔwɛsa bɩrɛ ɩ mɛɛ yɛ ɩ kyʋn kakaakʋ. I tiri fɛɛ nyɩmɩsa ɔ baa ɔ da sʋ (Matiwu

english_verse: The stars will fall, and the powers in the sky will be shaken.”
translation_verse: Akyikpebi gbaa ii biti ɩ tɩyɛ lɩɩ sʋsʋ ba kasɛ, nɩɩ sʋsʋ ɔlʋn atɔ kpini ii biti i gyingyen.’

english_verse: Learn a lesson from a fig tree. When its branches sprout and start putting out leaves, you know summer is near.
translation_verse: “Fan yɛgɛ iyu afatɛɛ kɩpɔrɔgɛ ɩ waa asɩn baalasa sa fanɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ fan kan wu iyu ɩ maa pɔrɔgɛ mʋ, fan bɩɩ fɛɛ kɩkyɛ ki tee tiri tɔ.

english_verse: Then the Son of Man will be seen coming in the clouds with great power and glory.
translation_verse: “Kɛ asa kpini ba wu mɛ, Daadimaadi Obii‐nyɩnsa mʋ n maa lɩɩ abwaarɛ‐wʋlɛ tɔ n ba yɛ ɔlʋn yɛ bɛɛrɛɛ sʋ.

english_verse: He will send his angels to gather his chosen ones from all over the earth. A Lesson from a Fig Tree (Matthew
translation_verse: Kɛ n sun sʋsʋ nbɔɔ dulinyaa tɔ katɩn kʋmaa, kyɔwɛ kɩlɩɩ yɛ kyɔwɛ kɩtɩyɛ, adii yɛ akpɩlɩgɛ, kɛ ba natɛ kʋʋla Ɩbwaarɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ lɩɩ dulinyaa tɔ kpini. Iyu kɩpɔrɔgɛ sɩnkaala (Matiwu

english_verse: No one knows the day or the time. The angels in heaven don't know, and the Son himself doesn't know. Only the Father knows.
translation_verse: “Ɔkʋ man bʋ tɔ o nyi kanɩn kakɛ abɛɛ saŋa. Sʋsʋ nbɔɔ yɛ mɛ, Obii mʋ gbaa a mee nyi, amɔɔ Ɔsɛ mʋ nkʋn i nyi.

english_verse: So be alert! You don't know when the master of the house will come back. It could be in the evening or at midnight or before dawn or in the morning.
translation_verse: “Ɩmʋ sʋ fan baa fan da sʋ, kpalɩ fɛɛ fen mee nyi saŋa mʋ nɩɩ mɛ, fanɛ kɩkpaara wuya mʋ n biti n ba. N taalɛ n ba fɛɛ kalaatɩpwɛ abɛɛ kiyiridi nsana abɛɛ kɩbwayɩkɛ abɛɛ nyenyenfuu.

english_verse: So watch out and be ready! You don't know when the time will come.
translation_verse: Fan kɩɩ danbɩrasa yɛgɛ fan da sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fen mee nyi saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n biti n ba.

english_verse: You can be sure that some of the people of this generation will still be alive when all this happens.
translation_verse: N tɔwɛ fanɛ kesintin fɛɛ atɔ nɩmʋ kpini ii biti ɩ waa pɔyɩ, kɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba san ba tɛ nkpa tɔ falɛ kpini ba wu.

english_verse: But if he comes suddenly, don't let him find you asleep.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n kan ba purigi fanɛ mʋ, n man ba tu fanɛ fan maa dɛ nsɩɩrɛ.

english_verse: It is like what happens when a man goes away for a while and places his servants in charge of everything. He tells each of them what to do, and he orders the guard to keep alert.
translation_verse: Ii biti ɩ waa nɩn fɛɛ nyɩmɩsa maa kpee ɔkpa kata, kɛ ɔ taa kʋtɔ kʋmaa waa mʋ ayaafɔlɛ abaa tɔ, nɩɩ ɔ sa ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ mu kusun sunsa. Nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ kebunɔ ɔkɩɩsʋpʋ yɛ ɔ baa ɔ da sʋ.

english_verse: I tell everyone just what I have told you. Be alert!
translation_verse: Asɩn mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ fanɛ falɛ, n tɔwɛ n sa ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ yɛ, ‘Ba fʋ da sʋ!’ ”

english_verse: They were saying, “We must not do it during the festival, because the people will riot.” At Bethany (Matthew
translation_verse: Nɩɩ bɛɛ yɛ, “Fan man yɛgɛ a waa kanɩn saŋa nɩmʋ tɔ, akʋtɔ akʋ bee biti bɛɛ waa ɩlawʋ.” Ɔkyɩɩ kʋ kyɛɛgɛ tuulaale wʋrɩgɛ Yesu sʋ (Matiwu

english_verse: Judas walked right up to Jesus and said, “Teacher!” Then Judas kissed him,
translation_verse: Gyudasi maa dan fʋʋ Yesu asɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ yɛ, “Ɔkaapʋpʋ!” Nɩɩ o baari mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Jesus was led off to the high priest. Then the chief priests, the nation's leaders, and the teachers of the Law of Moses all met together.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba taa Yesu kpee oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ kɩkpaara sʋ. Tʋtɔ nɩɩ aseepu bɩlɩsa yɛ kadɛ abɩlɩsa yɛ nbara akaapʋpʋ mʋ kpini ba sarɛ.

english_verse: She has done all she could by pouring perfume on my body to prepare it for burial.
translation_verse: Ɔkyɩɩ nɩmʋ waa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ taalɛ nɩn. Ɔ kyɛɛgɛ tuulaale nɩmʋ wʋrɩgɛ mɛ sʋ, ɔ gyankpaa ɛɛ sʋswa mɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ sa mi kepula kakɛ nɩn.

english_verse: You may be sure that wherever the good news is told all over the world, people will remember what she has done. And they will tell others. Judas and the Chief Priests (Matthew
translation_verse: N tɔwɛ fanɛ nɩmʋ, dulinyaa tɔ katɩn kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ bee biti ba tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ, bee biti ba tɔwɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa falɛ taa nyiŋi mʋ.” Gyudasi lɛɛ Yesu sa Gyiwu abɩlɩsa (Matiwu

english_verse: The two disciples went into the city and found everything just as Jesus had told them. So they prepared the Passover meal.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ mʋ abɩɩlapʋ mʋ ba kpee kadɛ lala mʋ tɔ naa wu kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ bamʋ mʋ. Nɩɩ ba waa kanyaŋɛ nbunɔ agyitɔ mʋ.

english_verse: Judas Iscariot was one of the twelve disciples. He went to the chief priests and offered to help them arrest Jesus.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu abɩɩlapʋ mʋ tɔ ɔkʋ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ mʋ yɛ Gyudasi Isikariyoti kpee Ɩbwaarɛ aseepu bɩlɩsa mʋ asɛ, kɛ ɔ lɛɛ Yesu sa bamʋ.

english_verse: The Son of Man will die, just as the Scriptures say. But it is going to be terrible for the one who betrays me. That man would be better off if he had never been born.” The Lord's Supper (Matthew
translation_verse: Mɛ, Daadimaadi Obii‐nyɩnsa n biti n wu fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba wʋla kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ mʋ. Amaa ɔmʋ nɩɩ ee biti ɔ lɛɛ mɛ sa mʋ, mʋ laakʋ. Naafɔɔ ba daa ba man kʋʋgɛ mʋ gbaa mʋ, ɩ bɔ.” Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Kalaatɩpwɛɛ sʋ Agyitɔ (Matiwu

english_verse: Jesus picked up a cup of wine and gave thanks to God. He gave it to his disciples, and they all drank some.
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ nɩɩ Yesu taa kɔɔpʋ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ taa afwaala sa mʋ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ. Nɩɩ ɔ taa sa bamʋ kpini yɛ ba nuu.

english_verse: Jesus replied, “This very night before a rooster crows twice, you will say three times that you don't know me.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ Pita yɛ, “N tɔwɛ fʋ kɛ fu nu yɛ, ndaga, pɔyɩ kɛ kyaasɛ ɔ bʋn ɩlɩɩ ɩnyɔ mʋ, fii biti fʋ kyɛɛ ɩlɩɩ ɩsa yɛ fu mee nyi mɛ.”

english_verse: But Peter was so sure of himself that he said, “Even if I have to die with you, I will never say I don't know you!” All the others said the same thing. Jesus Prays (Matthew
translation_verse: Amaa Pita payɩ ansi yɛ, “Halɩɩ ɩ gyɛ yɛ n maa fʋ an biti a wu gbaa mʋ, n mɛɛ yɛ n tɔwɛ yɛ n man nyi fʋ.” Kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ abɩɩlapʋ abanban mʋ kpini ba tɔwɛ. Yesu kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ Gesemani (Matiwu

english_verse: told them, “I am so sad that I feel as if I am dying. Stay here and keep awake with me.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Mɛ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ ɩ dɩyɛ mɛ lewu‐lewu. Fan sii nfɩɩ yɛgɛ fan da sʋ!”

english_verse: Jesus walked on a little way. Then he knelt down on the ground and prayed, “Father, if it is possible, don't let this happen to me! Father, you can do anything. Don't make me suffer by drinking from this cup. But do what you want, and not what I want.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Nsɛ, kʋtɔ kʋmaa kɩ man bʋlʋn fʋ asɛ. Kɔɔlɛ kanɩn awʋrʋfɔ nɩmʋ lɩɩ mɛ sʋ. Amaa man gyɛ mɛ kɔkɔlɔ biti, amaa fʋ yɛgɛ fʋ kɔkɔlɔ biti kɩ waa.”

english_verse: Stay awake and pray that you won't be tested. You want to do what is right, but you are weak.”
translation_verse: Fan baa fan da sʋ, fan kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ, kɛ fan man tɩyɛ kʋtʋʋ tɔ kɩɩ tɔ. Kpalɩ fɛɛ fanɛ n‐yaayu bɩrɛ ii biti ɩ waa kʋ tɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋrɔn, amaa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mɔɔ ɩ pɔɔ.”

english_verse: But after I am raised to life, I will go ahead of you to Galilee.”
translation_verse: Yesu kyaga sʋ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Amaa mi kelewu kyiŋi kamaa mʋ, n biti n gyankpaa fanɛ kpee Galile.”

english_verse: Peter spoke up, “Even if all the others reject you, I never will!”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Pita lɛɛ Yesu kɔnɔ ɛɛ, “Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ sɩlɛ yɛgɛ fʋ gbaa, mɛɛ mɛ n man yɛ n sɩlɛ yɛgɛ fʋ!”

english_verse: and the men grabbed Jesus and arrested him.
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ nɩɩ ba kɩtaa Yesu ba sʋ mʋ tɔ kinkin.

english_verse: Jesus went back and prayed the same prayer.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu bɩla bwii kpee ɛɛ kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ kʋkʋlʋn maŋa.

english_verse: Jesus went with his disciples to a place called Gethsemane, and he told them, “Sit here while I pray.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu maa mʋ abɩɩlapʋ mʋ ba kpee katɩn mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ yɛ Gesemani, nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Fan kyɩna nfɩɩ kɛ n kpee naa kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus took along Peter, James, and John. He was sad and troubled and
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu taa Pita yɛ Gyemisi yɛ Gyɔn buu mʋ n‐yɩɩ. Tʋtɔ nɩɩ Yesu kɔkɔlɔ nyita mʋ, nɩɩ mʋ n‐yɩɩ gbaa ɩ yɔɔ mʋ.

english_verse: When Jesus came back and found the disciples sleeping, he said to Simon Peter, “Are you asleep? Can't you stay awake for just one hour?
translation_verse: Yesu maa bwii kpee mʋ abɩɩlapʋ asɛ mʋ, ɔ naa tu ba maa dɛ nsɩɩrɛ. Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ Pita yɛ, “Simon, fʋ dɛ nɩn? Amɔɔ fan mɛɛ bɩla taalɛ kyɩna kerefi kʋlʋn yɛgɛ fan man dɛ?

english_verse: But when he returned to the disciples, he found them sleeping again. They simply could not keep their eyes open, and they did not know what to say.
translation_verse: Maa bɩla bwii ba mʋ, o wu ba maa dɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ nsɩɩrɛ ɩɩ sʋ bamʋ. Nɩɩ ba man bɩla be nyi kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba tɔwɛ.

english_verse: When Jesus returned to the disciples the third time, he said, “Are you still sleeping and resting? Enough of this! The time has come for the Son of Man to be handed over to sinners.
translation_verse: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Yesu naa bwii ba kili sasapʋ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ taasɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Fan san fan dɛ fɛn fʋʋtɛ nɩn? Fan kɩɩ! Saŋa mʋ fʋʋ fɛɛ ba taa mɛ, Daadimaadi Obii‐nyɩnsa mʋ waa alibi awaapʋ abaa tɔ.

english_verse: Get up! Let's go. The one who will betray me is already here.” Jesus Is Arrested (Matthew
translation_verse: Fan kɩɩ, ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ lɛɛ mɛ ɛɛ sa mʋ ndee. Fan kʋsʋ kɛ a kpee.” Ba kɩtaa Yesu (Matiwu

english_verse: Someone standing there pulled out a sword. He struck the servant of the high priest and cut off his ear.
translation_verse: Amaa bamʋ nɩɩ ba yɩlɛ tʋtɔ mʋ, ɔkʋ lɛɛ mu sakunde ŋɛ Ɩbwaarɛ oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ kɩnyɛ kʋsʋ tɩn.

english_verse: Jesus was still speaking, when Judas the betrayer came up. He was one of the twelve disciples, and a mob of men armed with swords and clubs were with him. They had been sent by the chief priests, the nation's leaders, and the teachers of the Law of Moses.
translation_verse: Yesu maa dan san ɛɛ tɔwɛ mʋ, opula tɔ nɩɩ Gyudasi, abɩɩlapʋ kudu anyɔ mʋ tɔ ɔkʋ, ba fʋʋ tʋtɔ yɛ sakyɔ damantɛ kʋ. Ba sʋ isakunde yɛ agulungu. Ɩbwaarɛ aseepu bɩlɩsa yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nbara akaapʋpʋ yɛ kadɛ mʋ abɩlɩsa i sun bamʋ.

english_verse: Judas had told them ahead of time, “Arrest the man I greet with a kiss. Tie him up tight and lead him away.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Gyudasi mʋ nɩɩ ee biti ɔ lɛɛ Yesu sa mʋ, wʋla kaapʋ asa sɩnkaala kʋ tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Ɔmʋ nɩɩ n naa baari mʋ tɔ mʋ, mʋ nɩmʋ. Fan kɩtaa mʋ kɛ fan kun mʋ taa natɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus said to the mob, “Why do you come with swords and clubs to arrest me like a criminal?
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Amɔɔ isakunde yɛ ngulungun nɩɩ fɛn taa ba kɛ fan ba kɩtaa mɛ, fɛɛ n maa gyɛ kumu tɔ ɔlʋn oyu?

english_verse: Day after day I was with you and taught in the temple, and you didn't arrest me. But what the Scriptures say must come true.”
translation_verse: Kakɛ kʋmaa, n maa fanɛ nɩn kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ yɛgɛ n kaapʋ, nkɛɛ fan man kɩtaa mɛ. Amaa ɩ dagaa ɩnɩmʋ ɩ waa kanɩn, kɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ mʋ, ɩ ba tɔ.”

english_verse: All of Jesus' disciples ran off and left him.
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ nɩɩ mʋ abɩɩlapʋ mʋ kpini ba yɛgɛ mʋ sɩlɛ kyʋn.

english_verse: One of them was a young man who was wearing only a linen cloth. And when the men grabbed him,
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kɩyaafɔlɛ kʋ mʋ nɩɩ o bun kɩkalala nkʋn mʋ o buu Yesu, nɩɩ ba paa yɛ ba kɩtaa mʋ.

english_verse: he left the cloth behind and ran away naked. Jesus Is Questioned by the Council (Matthew
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔ sɩlɛ kibulunkpan yɛgɛ mʋ kɩkalala mʋ. Ba Kpiya Yesu Asɩn Ogyikpa (Matiwu

english_verse: Finally, some men stood up and lied about him. They said,
translation_verse: Nɩɩ anyɩn akʋ ba kʋsʋ yɩlɛ tɩn antɩŋɛsa gyaga Yesu sʋ yɛ,

english_verse: Peter replied, “That isn't true! I don't know what you're talking about. I don't have any idea what you mean.” He went out to the gate, and a rooster crowed.
translation_verse: Amaa Pita kyɛɛ nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ yɛ, “N man nyi mʋ, nɩɩ n man nyi asɩn mʋ nɩɩ fɩɩ tɔwɛ falɛ kasɛ.” Nɩɩ Pita lɩɩ ba lenbu.

english_verse: Peter had followed at a distance, and when he reached the courtyard of the high priest's house, he sat down with the guards to warm himself beside a fire.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Pita buu Yesu kɩyaa‐kɩyaa naa loo oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ kɩkpaara sʋ asɩn ogyikpa tʋtɔ. Nɩɩ o sii kyɩna kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ akɩɩsʋpʋ mʋ asɛ ɛɛ wʋlɛ fʋlɔn.

english_verse: The chief priests and the whole council tried to find someone to accuse Jesus of a crime, so they could put him to death. But they could not find anyone to accuse him.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ aseepu bɩlɩsa mʋ yɛ kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ abɩlɩsa mʋ kpini ba biti asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ba tɩn gyaga Yesu sʋ, kɛ ba nyɛ mɔɔ mʋ. Amaa ba kpɩnɛ, ba man nyɛ.

english_verse: At once the high priest ripped his robe apart and shouted, “Why do we need more witnesses?
translation_verse: Nɩɩ oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ mʋ kyatɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa ɩkaalɛ, nɩɩ ɔ yɛ, “Ɩnɩmʋ bɩrɛ, an man bɩla an biti ɔkʋ ɔ ba tɔwɛ anɛ asɩn pwɩɩsa kʋ lɩɩ mʋ sʋ.”

english_verse: This time Peter began to curse and swear, “I don't even know the man you're talking about!”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Pita piili ɛɛ tɔwɛ nnɔ ɛɛ gyaga mʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ, nɩɩ ɔ bɔ ntan tɔwɛ yɛ, “Ɔnyɩn mʋ nɩɩ fɛn tɔwɛ mʋ asɩn falɛ gbaa, n man nyi mʋ.”

english_verse: “We heard him say he would tear down this temple that we built. He also claimed that in three days he would build another one without any help.”
translation_verse: “An nu maa tɔwɛ yɛ, ‘N biti n boyi kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ mʋ nɩɩ asa ba pɔyɩ mʋ, kɛ nkɛ nsa kamaa mʋ, n biti n pɔyɩ kɩpʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ man gyɛ asa ba pɔyɩ kɩmʋ.’ ”

english_verse: But even then they did not agree on what they said.
translation_verse: Nkɛɛ bamʋ gbaa‐gbaa bamʋ nnɔ ɩ kwɩɩ yɛ abaa.

english_verse: The high priest stood up in the council and asked Jesus, “Why don't you say something in your own defense? Don't you hear the charges they are making against you?”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ mʋ kʋsʋ yɩlɛ bamʋ kpini ansi tɔ, taasɛ Yesu yɛ, “Amɔɔ fʋ man sʋ kɔnɔ fʋ lɛɛ lɩɩ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ bɛɛ pwɩɩ fʋ falɛ?”

english_verse: But Jesus kept quiet and did not say a word. The high priest asked him another question, “Are you the Messiah, the Son of the glorious God?”
translation_verse: Amaa Yesu laatɔ ɔ man bugi mʋ kɔnɔ. Nɩɩ oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ mʋ bɩla bwii taasɛ Yesu yɛ, “Fʋ ɩ gyɛ Krisito, Ɔmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ wʋla lɛɛ mʋ? Fʋ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ anɛ ayenbi ɩ gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ mʋ Mu‐Bii?”

english_verse: You heard him claim to be God! What is your decision?” They all agreed he should be put to death.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Fan nu yɛ fanɛ asʋ. Ɔ tɔwɛ nbusaa asɩn yii Ɩbwaarɛ. Kanɩn sʋ fan yɛ a waa mʋ nɛnɛ?” Bamʋ kpini ba tɔwɛ yɛ, “O gyii kʋpwɛ, nɩɩ ɩ dagaa maa wu.”

english_verse: Some of the people started spitting on Jesus. They blindfolded him, hit him with their fists, and said, “Tell us who hit you!” Then the guards took charge of Jesus and beat him. Peter Says He Doesn't Know Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Nɩɩ asa mʋ akʋ ba tʋʋ nkyɔlɛ bee bun Yesu, nɩɩ ba bun mu ansi yɛgɛ akʋ mɔɔ bɛɛ da mʋ, nɩɩ ba taasɛ mʋ yɛ ɔ bɩɩ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ da mʋ? Nɩɩ kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ akɩɩsʋpʋ mʋ ba taa mʋ lɩɩ bɛɛ kpa mʋ ɩtan. Pita kyɛɛ yɛ ɔ man nyi Yesu (Matiwu

english_verse: The servant girl saw Peter again and said to the people standing there, “This man is one of them!”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kɩnyɛ kyɩɩsa mʋ bɩla wu Pita tʋtɔ. Nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba yɩla tʋtɔ mʋ yɛ, “Ɔnɩmʋ gbaa tii bamʋ sʋ.”

english_verse: While Peter was still in the courtyard, a servant girl of the high priest came up
translation_verse: Pita maa dan san ɔ bʋ tʋtɔ mʋ, nɩɩ aseepu ɔbɩlɩsa kɩnyɛ kyɩɩsa kʋ ba tʋtɔ.

english_verse: and saw Peter warming himself by the fire. She stared at him and said, “You were with Jesus from Nazareth!”
translation_verse: Maa wu Pita maa san ɛɛ wʋlɛ fʋlɔn mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ kɩɩ mʋ surum. Nɩɩ ɔ taasɛ Pita yɛ, “Yɛ ngbaa fʋ fu buu Yesu mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Kanasareti‐nyɩn mʋ nɩn?”

english_verse: “No, I'm not!” Peter replied. A little while later some of the people said to Peter, “You certainly are one of them. You're a Galilean!”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Pita bɩla kyɛɛ. Kamaa tɔ mʋ, bamʋ nɩɩ ba yɩlɛ tʋtɔ mʋ ba tɔwɛ Pita yɛ, “Kesintin tɔ mʋ, fʋ gyɛ bamʋ tɔ ɔkʋ nɩn. Kpalɩ fɛɛ ngbaa fʋ, fʋ lɩɩ Galile nɩn!”

english_verse: At once the rooster crowed a second time. Then Peter remembered that Jesus had told him, “Before a rooster crows twice, you will say three times that you don't know me.” So Peter started crying.
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ nɩɩ kyaasɛ bʋn kɩnyɔsapʋ. Nɩɩ Pita nyiŋi asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Yesu wʋla tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Pɔyɩ kɛ kyaasɛ ɔ bʋn ɩlɩɩ ɩnyɔ mʋ, fii biti fʋ kyɛɛ ɩlɩɩ ɩsa yɛ fʋ man nyi mɛ” mʋ. Nɩɩ Pita tɩyɛ kusu sʋ ɛɛ sawʋ.

english_verse: Early the next morning the chief priests, the nation's leaders, and the teachers of the Law of Moses met together with the whole Jewish council. They tied up Jesus and led him off to Pilate.
translation_verse: Lɩɩkaakɛ nyenyenfuu, nɩɩ aseepu bɩlɩsa yɛ Gyiwu abɩlɩsa yɛ nbara akaapʋpʋ yɛ kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ abɩlɩsa mʋ kpini, ba gyaŋɛ nɩɩ ba taa nfɛɛrɛ kʋlʋn. Nɩɩ ba ŋmina Yesu nɩɩ ba taa mʋ kyʋn naa sa Paleti mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Roma obii, nɩɩ ɛɛ kɩɩ Ɩsɩrayɩ ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ mʋ.

english_verse: But the chief priests told the crowd to ask Pilate to free Barabbas.
translation_verse: Amaa aseepu bɩlɩsa mʋ ba fun waa asa mʋ yɛ ba kʋlɛ Paleti kɛ ɔ yɛgɛ Barabasi sa bamʋ, man gyɛ Yesu.

english_verse: Pilate asked, “But what crime has he done?” “Nail him to a cross!” they yelled even louder.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Paleti taasɛ yɛ, “Nɩɩ mɩnɛ kilibi nɩɩ ɔ dan waa nɩn?” Nɩɩ ba kuusi kenken tii sʋ yɛ, ba da mʋ oyu laasa sʋ.

english_verse: But Jesus did not answer, and Pilate was amazed. The Death Sentence (Matthew
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu kina kɩlɛɛ kɔnɔ. Nɩɩ ɩ waa Paleti kanankʋ. Ba bun Yesu lewu kʋpwɛ (Matiwu

english_verse: They made fun of Jesus and shouted, “Hey, you king of the Jews!”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba piili bɛɛ fwaala mʋ bɛɛ tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Gyiwu abi owura mʋ, nyɛ nkpa bʋnswɩɩsa.”

english_verse: Then Pilate questioned him again, “Don't you have anything to say? Don't you hear what crimes they say you have done?”
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ ɔbɩlɩsa Paleti bɩla taasɛ Yesu yɛ, “Fʋ mɛɛ yɛ fʋ lɛɛ kɔnɔ? Nɩɩ asɩn damantɛ mʋ nɩɩ ba pwɩɩ fʋ lɩɩ ɩmʋ sʋ falɛ fa?”

english_verse: Pilate wanted to please the crowd, so he set Barabbas free. Then he ordered his soldiers to beat Jesus with a whip and nail him to a cross. Soldiers Make Fun of Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Paleti mɔɔ bwii ee biti ɔ waa asa mʋ kɔkɔlɔ biti sʋ, nɩɩ o tigi Barabasi sa bamʋ. Nɩɩ ɔ yɛgɛ nɩɩ ba taa tɩŋɛ Yesu, nɩɩ ɔ taa mʋ waa bamʋ abaa tɔ yɛ ba naa da mʋ mata oyu laasa sʋ. Anaakɔpʋ ba waa Yesu ahin‐sɩn (Matiwu

english_verse: On it was a sign that told why he was nailed there. It read, “This is the King of the Jews.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ba taa bun Yesu kʋpwɛ mʋ taa da mata mu amu sʋ yɛ, “ƆNƖMƲ Ɩ GYƐ GYIWU ABI OWURA MƲ.”

english_verse: They yelled, “Nail him to a cross!”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba kuusi yɛ, “Da mʋ oyu laasa sʋ mɔɔ mʋ.”

english_verse: It was about nine o'clock in the morning when they nailed him to the cross.
translation_verse: Nyenyenfuu, ɩ waa fɛɛ kerefi akpanɔ saŋa, nɩɩ ba da Yesu mata oyu laasa mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: A Roman army officer was standing in front of Jesus. When the officer saw how Jesus died, he said, “This man really was the Son of God!”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ anaakɔpʋ ɔbɩlɩsa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ yɩlɛ tʋtɔ mʋ wu kanan mʋ nɩɩ Yesu sawʋ nɩɩ o wu mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Kesintin, ɔnyɩn nɩmʋ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii nɩn.”

english_verse: The soldiers led Jesus inside the courtyard of the fortress and called together the rest of the troops.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ anaakɔpʋ mʋ ba taa Yesu naa loo Ɔbɩlɩsa Paleti lenbu tɔ. Nɩɩ ba tɩɩ bamʋ tɔɔmaa ana asansa.

english_verse: And at that time there was a prisoner named Barabbas. He and some others had been arrested for murder during a riot.
translation_verse: Kanɩn saŋa maŋa tɔ mʋ, ba tii ɔnyɩn kʋ obu, bɛɛ tɩɩ mʋ yɛ Barabasi. O tii bamʋ nɩɩ ba man biti kɩbanɛ nɩɩ ba kɔ keluu mɔɔ nyɩmɩsa mʋ sʋ nɩn.

english_verse: The crowd now came and asked Pilate to set a prisoner free, just as he usually did.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ asa mʋ ba ba Paleti asɛ, ba tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, ɔ waa sa bamʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ wʋla ɛɛ waa mʋ.

english_verse: Pilate asked them, “Do you want me to free the king of the Jews?”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Paleti taasɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Fen biti fɛɛ n yɛgɛ Gyiwu abi owura mʋ?”

english_verse: Pilate knew that the chief priests had brought Jesus to him because they were jealous.
translation_verse: Paleti dan o nyi kesintin fɛɛ aseepu abɩlɩsa ba taa Yesu ba sa mʋ lɩɩ kayɩɩ basa.

english_verse: Then Pilate asked the crowd, “What do you want me to do with this man you say is the king of the Jews?”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Paleti bɩla bwii taasɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Nɩɩ mɩnɛ nɩɩ fen biti fɛɛ n waa ɔmʋ nɩɩ fɛn tɩɩ yɛ Gyiwu abi owura mʋ?”

english_verse: When the soldiers had finished making fun of Jesus, they took off the purple robe. They put his own clothes back on him and led him off to be nailed to a cross.
translation_verse: Ba maa tɛɛ waa Yesu ahin‐sɩn lʋwɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ba bugi bamʋ kɩrɩman‐kyu kɩtaa mʋ, nɩɩ ba taa Yesu gbaa‐gbaa lɛɛ bun mʋ. Nɩɩ ba taa mʋ kyʋn ba naa da mʋ oyu laasa mʋ sʋ. Ba da Yesu oyu laasa sʋ (Matiwu

english_verse: Simon from Cyrene happened to be coming in from a farm, and they forced him to carry Jesus' cross. Simon was the father of Alexander and Rufus. Jesus Is Nailed to a Cross (Matthew
translation_verse: Ba maa kpee mʋ, ba gyaŋa Simon mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɩɩ Siren ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ, ɛɛ ba kadɛ lala mʋ tɔ. Nɩɩ anaakɔpʋ mʋ ba nyan mʋ yɛ ɔ sʋla Yesu oyu laasa mʋ. Simon nɩmʋ mu‐bii ana ɩ gyɛ Alekisanda maa Rufusi.

english_verse: The chief priests and the teachers of the Law of Moses also made fun of Jesus. They said to each other, “He saved others, but he can't save himself.
translation_verse: Kanɩn nɩɩ aseepu bɩlɩsa yɛ nbara akaapʋpʋ mʋ gbaa ba ŋmasɛ Yesu nɩn. Bɛɛ tɔwɛ abaa yɛ, “Ɛɛ mɔlɩgɛ asa amaa ɔ mɛɛ taalɛ mɔlɩgɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ.”

english_verse: Pilate was surprised to hear that Jesus was already dead, and he called in the army officer to find out if Jesus had been dead very long.
translation_verse: Paleti maa nu fɛɛ Yesu tɛɛ wʋla wu mʋ, nɩɩ i kyinkyin mʋ. Nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ anaakɔpʋ ɔbɩlɩsa mʋ taasɛ mʋ yɛ, “Yesu tee wu?”

english_verse: A man named Joseph from Arimathea was brave enough to ask Pilate for the body of Jesus. Joseph was a highly respected member of the Jewish council, and he was also waiting for God's kingdom to come.
translation_verse: nɩɩ Gyosefu mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɩɩ Arimatiya mʋ naa ba. Ɔ gyɛ nyɩmɩsa kparɛ nɩn, nɩɩ o tii kadɛ abɩlɩsa mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ ɔ sʋ bɛɛrɛɛ asa asɛ. Nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ee gyoo Ɩbwaarɛ kuwura‐gyii mʋ kɩba saŋa mʋ. Nɩɩ Gyosefu waa kɔkɔlɔ kpee Paleti asɛ naa kʋlɛ Yesu kibuni mʋ.

english_verse: The soldiers took Jesus to Golgotha, which means “Place of a Skull.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba taa Yesu kpee katɩn mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ yɛ Goligota mʋ. Goligota kasɛ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, “Kumu kawɛ opula.”

english_verse: People who passed by said terrible things about Jesus. They shook their heads and shouted, “Ha! So you're the one who claimed you could tear down the temple and build it again in three days.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ ba ɛɛ kyʋn tʋtɔ gbaa bɛɛ sʋ asebi bɛɛ wʋrɩgɛ Yesu sʋ, yɛgɛ bee fi‐fi bamʋ amu bɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, “To, yɛ fʋ yɛ fii biti fu boyi kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ kɛ fʋ bɩla bwii pɔyɩ kɩmʋ nkɛ nsa akɛ mʋ?

english_verse: If he is the Messiah, the king of Israel, let him come down from the cross! Then we will see and believe.” The two criminals also said cruel things to Jesus. The Death of Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba yɛ, “Fʋ nyɛ nɩɩ fʋ gyɛ Ɔmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ yɛ ɔ ba mɔlɩgɛ asa, nɩɩ fʋ bɩla fʋ gyɛ Gyiwu abi owura mʋ de, kpɩlɩgɛ lɩɩ oyu laasa mʋ sʋ, saamʋ an nyɛ kɔɔlɛ fu gyii.” Asa anyɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba da bamʋ iyu laasa mʋ sʋ gbaa bɛɛ saalɛ Yesu. Yesu kelewu (Matiwu

english_verse: About noon the sky turned dark and stayed that way until around three o'clock.
translation_verse: Kyɔwɛ maa fʋʋ amu nsana mʋ, nɩɩ kitentenbiri ki bun ɔsʋwʋlɛ mʋ kpini sʋ naa fʋʋ kalaatɩpwɛ asɛ.

english_verse: Then about that time Jesus shouted, “Eloi, Eloi, lema sabachthani?” which means, “My God, my God, why have you deserted me?”
translation_verse: Ɩ maa fʋʋ kerefi asa kalaatɩpwɛɛ asɛ mʋ, nɩɩ Yesu kuusi kenken yɛ, “Eli, Eli, lamaa sabatani?” Ɩmʋ kasɛ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, “Mɛ Ɩbwaarɛ, mɛ Ɩbwaarɛ, mɩnɛ ɩ waa nɩɩ fʋ yɛgɛ mɛ kanɩn?”

english_verse: Some of the people standing there heard Jesus and said, “He is calling for Elijah.”
translation_verse: Asa mʋ nɩɩ ba yɩlɛ tʋtɔ mʋ i nu ɩnɩmʋ, nɩɩ ba yɛ, “Fan nu! Ɛɛ tɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Ɔtɔwɛpʋ Eligya.”

english_verse: One of them ran and grabbed a sponge. After he had soaked it in wine, he put it on a stick and held it up to Jesus. He said, “Let's wait and see if Elijah will come and take him down!”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ bamʋ ɔkʋ sɩlɛ naa taa ɔkyɛɛ dufudufu nyɔ nta nyaŋɛsa tɔ, nɩɩ ɔ taa ŋmina oyu sʋ kʋsaa naa tii Yesu kɔnɔ yɛ o nuu. Nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Fan yɛgɛ a kɩɩ fɛɛ Eligya ii biti ɔ ba kpɩlɩgɛ mʋ oyu laasa mʋ sʋ.”

english_verse: Jesus shouted and then died.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu sawʋ kenken, nɩɩ o wu.

english_verse: Some women were looking on from a distance. They and many others had come with Jesus to Jerusalem. But even before this they had been his followers and had helped him while he was in Galilee. Mary Magdalene and Mary the mother of the younger James and of Joseph were two of these women. Salome was also one of them. Jesus Is Buried (Matthew
translation_verse: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Yesu bʋ Galile mʋ, ba buu mʋ, nɩɩ ba kyɛ mʋ tɔ. Akyɩɩ gaalaagaa mʋ nɩɩ ba buu mʋ ba Gyerusalem mʋ gbaa ba yɩlɛ tʋtɔ. Yesu kipula tɔ (Matiwu

english_verse: It was now the evening before the Sabbath, and the Jewish people were getting ready for that sacred day.
translation_verse: Kanɩn kakɛ maŋa kɩ gyɛ kakɛ kʋlasa gyoo kakɛ fʋʋtɛsa mʋ. Kyɔwɛ maa kpee ɔ naa tɩyɛ mʋ,

english_verse: Joseph bought a linen cloth and took the body down from the cross. He had it wrapped in the cloth, and he put it in a tomb that had been cut into solid rock. Then he rolled a big stone against the entrance to the tomb.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Gyosefu naa sɔɔ taafuli, nɩɩ ɔ naa saatɛ Yesu, taa taafuli mʋ maalɛ mʋ. Nɩɩ ɔ taa mʋ naa pula kakyan mʋ nɩɩ ba ŋɛ kɩfʋlɛ tɔ waa ɔbɔ mʋ tɔ. Nɩɩ Gyosefu gbiliti kubuu lala tii kakyan mʋ kɔnɔ.

english_verse: Mary Magdalene and Mary the mother of Joseph were watching and saw where the body was placed.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Mɛɛrɩ Magidalen yɛ Gyose mu‐nyi Mɛɛrɩ ba yɩlɛ kɩɩ katɩn mʋ nɩɩ ba taa Yesu naa pula mʋ.

english_verse: Later, Jesus appeared in another form to two disciples, as they were on their way out of the city.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ kamaa mʋ, Yesu taa ɔkpa pʋpwɛ kʋ sʋ lɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ kaapʋ bamʋ tɔ asa anyɔ akʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba naa bee kpee bamʋ kadɛ tɔ.

english_verse: Then the disciples left and preached everywhere. The Lord was with them, and the miracles they worked proved that their message was true. ANOTHER OLD ENDING TO MARK'S GOSPEL
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu abɩɩlapʋ ba kpee katɩn kʋmaa naa tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ, yɛgɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu ɔlʋn tii bamʋ sʋ, nɩɩ ba waa adangana, nɩɩ ɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ bamʋ asɩn danbɩrasa katɔwɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ kesintin.

english_verse: She left and told his friends, who were crying and mourning.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ o kpee naa tɔwɛ mʋ bɩrɩsa ana mʋ nɩɩ ba bɔɔta tɔ ba tɛ bɛɛ sawʋ mʋ.

english_verse: Very early on Sunday morning, just as the sun was coming up, they went to the tomb.
translation_verse: Lɩɩkaakɛ, nawɔkyɩ kakɛ gyankpaasa akɛ nyenyenfuu, kyɔwɛ maa dan lɩɩ mʋ, nɩɩ ba kʋsʋ bee kpee Yesu kakyan mʋ asɛ.

english_verse: On their way, they were asking one another, “Who will roll the stone away from the entrance for us?”
translation_verse: Ba maa naa bee kpee ɔkpa tɔ mʋ, nɩɩ ba taasɛ abaa yɛ, “Anɩmʋ ii biti ɔ naa gbiliti kubuu mʋ lɩɩ kakyan mʋ kɔnɔ sa anɛ?” Kpalɩ fɛɛ kubuu mʋ kɩ kyɔ gaa.

english_verse: But when they looked, they saw that the stone had already been rolled away. And it was a huge stone!
translation_verse: Ba maa kɩɩ mʋ, ba wu fɛɛ kubuu mʋ kɩ tɛɛ wʋla gbiliti kɩ dɛ.

english_verse: The women went into the tomb, and on the right side they saw a young man in a white robe sitting there. They were alarmed.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba loo kakyan mʋ tɔ, nɩɩ ba wu kɩyaafɔlɛ kʋ maa bun atɔ fufuli ɔ tɛ kakyan mʋ tɔ gyisa sʋ, nɩɩ bamʋ nkɔlɔ ɩ ŋmaa bamʋ.

english_verse: Now go and tell his disciples, and especially Peter, that he will go ahead of you to Galilee. You will see him there, just as he told you.”
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan natɛ naa tɔwɛ mʋ abɩɩlapʋ mʋ yɛ Pita yɛ, Yesu gyankpaa fanɛ ee kpee Galile. Tʋtɔ nɩɩ fen biti fan wu mʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wʋla tɔwɛ fanɛ mʋ.”

english_verse: They will handle snakes and will drink poison and not be hurt. They will also heal sick people by placing their hands on them. Jesus Returns to Heaven (Luke
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nɩɩ ba kan kɩtaa anansɛ tɔ abɛɛ ba kan nuu kʋbwɛ gbaa mʋ, ɩ mɛɛ yɛ ɩ waa bamʋ sɛhn. Bee biti ba taa bamʋ abaa gyaga alɔpʋ sʋ kɛ ba nyɛ alanfɩya.” Ɩbwaarɛ taa mʋ kpee sʋsʋ (Luka

english_verse: But when these disciples told what had happened, the others would not believe either. What Jesus' Followers Must Do (Matthew
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba bwii ba tɔwɛ abanban mʋ, amaa ba man kɔɔlɛ bamʋ gyii. Yesu lɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ kaapʋ abɩɩlapʋ kudu ɔkʋ mʋ (Matiwu

english_verse: Anyone who believes me and is baptized will be saved. But anyone who refuses to believe me will be condemned.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ gyii, nɩɩ ba gyee mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee mʋ, ee biti ɔ nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ. Amaa ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man kɔɔlɛ gyii mʋ, bee biti ba bun mʋ lewu kʋpwɛ.

english_verse: After the Lord Jesus had said these things to the disciples, he was taken back up to heaven where he sat down at the right side of God.
translation_verse: Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu maa tɔwɛ bamʋ asɛ lʋwɛ mʋ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa mʋ kpee sʋsʋ naa kyɩna mʋ gyisa sʋ.

english_verse: Afterwards, Jesus appeared to his eleven disciples as they were eating. He scolded them because they were too stubborn to believe the ones who had seen him after he had been raised to life.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ kpini kamaa mʋ, Yesu lɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ kaapʋ mʋ abɩɩlapʋ kudu ɔkʋ mʋ, yɛgɛ ba tɛ bee gyii. Yesu pwɩɩ bamʋ lɩɩ fɛɛ bamʋ nkɔlɔ ɩ maa bʋlʋn gaa, nɩɩ ba man kɔɔlɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba wu mʋ maa tɛ nkpa tɔ mʋ gyii.

english_verse: Then he told them: Go and preach the good news to everyone in the world.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Fan kpee dulinyaa tɔ katɩn kʋmaa naa tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ sa daadimaadi.

english_verse: Everyone who believes me will be able to do wonderful things. By using my name they will force out demons, and they will speak new languages.
translation_verse: Bamʋ nɩɩ ba kɔɔlɛ gyii mʋ falɛ ɩsɩnkaala ii biti i buu bamʋ. Lɩɩ mɛ kɩtɩɩ tɔ sʋ mʋ, bee biti ba gya nbwɩɩ libi, kɛ ba tɔwɛ ntɔwɛ pʋpwɛ.

english_verse: Many people have tried to tell the story of what God has done among us.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐kyɛmɩnɛ Tiyofolisi, asa damantɛ ba taa tʋʋ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ kyʋrɔɔ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ waa anɛ tɔ mʋ yɩla.

english_verse: They wrote what we had been told by the ones who were there in the beginning and saw what happened.
translation_verse: Ba kyʋrɔɔ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ asa ba wu yɛ ansi, lɩɩ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Yesu asɩn mʋ i yii kasɛ, nɩɩ ba da ɩmʋ kibonbon tɔwɛ anɛ mʋ, yɩla.

english_verse: So I made a careful study of everything and then decided to write and tell you exactly what took place. Honorable Theophilus,
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ bɛɛrɛɛ wuya Tiyofolisi, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ n loo asɩn mʋ tɔ kɩɩ lɩɩ ɩmʋ npiili mʋ, ɩ dagaa fɛɛ n kyʋrɔɔ ɩmʋ kɩgyasʋ‐kɩgyasʋ kyɛɛkyɛɛ sʋ sa fʋ.

english_verse: I have done this to let you know the truth about what you have heard. An Angel Tells about the Birth of John
translation_verse: Kɛ fʋ nyɛ bɩɩ asɩn mʋ kesintin fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba kaapʋ fʋ mʋ. Gyɔn Okyugyeepu Mʋ kakʋʋgɛ Asɩn

english_verse: When Herod was king of Judea, there was a priest by the name of Zechariah from the priestly group of Abijah. His wife Elizabeth was from the family of Aaron.
translation_verse: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Herodi gyɛ owura Gyudeya ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔnyɩn kʋ bʋ tɔ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ mʋ yɛ Sakariya. Ɔ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ aseepu kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ kɩmʋ yɛ Abigya mʋ tɔ ɔkʋ. Nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ mʋ‐ka Elisabeti, nɩɩ ngbaa mʋ lɩɩ oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ Aron kɩnaana tɔ.

english_verse: Both of them were good people and pleased the Lord God by obeying all that he had commanded.
translation_verse: Sakariya maa Elisabeti kakyɩna tɔ ɩkpa i kyiigi Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ, nɩɩ ba buu Ɩbwaarɛ nbara yɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ mʋ nnɔsa mʋ ɩ kaapʋ mʋ.

english_verse: But they did not have children. Elizabeth could not have any, and both Zechariah and Elizabeth were already old.
translation_verse: Ba bɩlɛ, amaa ba man kʋʋgɛ kebii, lɩɩ fɛɛ Elisabeti maa gyɛ ogbentipu sʋ.

english_verse: One day Zechariah's group of priests were on duty, and he was serving God as a priest.
translation_verse: Saŋa kʋ ɩ ba fʋʋ aseepu kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ Sakariya bʋ kɩmʋ tɔ mʋ, nɩɩ bee sun Ɩbwaarɛ ansi tɔ.

english_verse: According to the custom of the priests, he had been chosen to go into the Lord's temple that day and to burn incense,
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba tʋʋ nbii lɛɛ mʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ aseepu ɩkpa ɩ kaapʋ mʋ, fɛɛ o loo kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ mʋ tɔ naa tuwa nlaa.

english_verse: All at once an angel from the Lord appeared to Zechariah at the right side of the altar.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ kabɔɔ ba mʋ asɛ, ba yɩlɛ nlaa kaswɩɩ mʋ gyisa sʋ, katɩn mʋ nɩɩ ee tuwa nlaa mʋ.

english_verse: Zechariah was confused and afraid when he saw the angel.
translation_verse: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Sakariya wu kabɔɔ mʋ, mʋ kɔkɔlɔ kɩ ŋmaa mʋ, nɩɩ ɩ kɩtaa mʋ kufuu.

english_verse: But the angel told him: Don't be afraid, Zechariah! God has heard your prayers. Your wife Elizabeth will have a son, and you must name him John.
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ kabɔɔ mʋ tɔwɛ Sakariya yɛ, “Man waa kufuu, Ɩbwaarɛ nu fʋ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ. Fʋ‐ka Elisabeti ii biti ɔ kʋʋgɛ Obii‐nyɩnsa kɛ fʋ yɩla mʋ kɩtɩɩ yɛ Gyɔn.

english_verse: His birth will make you very happy, and many people will be glad.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ mʋ sʋ mʋ, fanɛ ansi ii biti i gyii, kɛ asa damantɛ gbaa ansi i gyii lɩɩ mʋ kakʋʋgɛ sʋ.

english_verse: Your son will be a great servant of the Lord. He must never drink wine or beer, and the power of the Holy Spirit will be with him from the time he is born.
translation_verse: Ee biti ɔ waa nyɩmɩsa kparɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ansi tɔ. Ɔ man kan waa nuu nta abɛɛ nta bʋlʋnsa. Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ biti o loo bɔla mʋ tɔ, lɩɩ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ mu‐nyi ɔtɔ tɔ mʋ.

english_verse: John will lead many people in Israel to turn back to the Lord their God.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ee biti ɔ yɛgɛ Ɩsɩrayɩ abi gaalaagaa ba nyɛ nfɛɛrɛ kɩkyɛɛgɛ, kɛ ba bwii ba Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ bamʋ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ.

english_verse: He will go ahead of the Lord with the same power and spirit that Elijah had. And because of John, parents will be more thoughtful of their children. And people who now disobey God will begin to think as they ought to. This is how John will get people ready for the Lord.
translation_verse: Fu kebii Gyɔn nɩmʋ ii biti ɔ taa Kayaayu tɔ ɔlʋn gyankpaa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔtɔwɛpʋ Eligya. Ee biti ɔ lɔŋɔ asɛ yɛ nbii bʋga tɔ, kɛ ɔ taa bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn mʋ, ba ba nyɛ kanyaasɩn kɛ bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ ba Ɩbwaarɛ ɩkpa kyiigisa mʋ sʋ. Ee biti ɔ waa ɩnɩmʋ lɔŋɔ asa mʋ gyoo Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ.”

english_verse: Zechariah said to the angel, “How will I know this is going to happen? My wife and I are both very old.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Sakariya taasɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabɔɔ mʋ yɛ, “Nɛnɛ nɩɩ n biti n waa bɩɩ fɛɛ ɩ gyɛ kesintin? Lɩɩ fɛɛ n bɩlɛ, nɩɩ mɛ‐ka gbaa bɩlɛ yɛ kebii kɩnyɛ.”

english_verse: The angel answered, “I am Gabriel, God's servant, and I was sent to tell you this good news.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kabɔɔ mʋ lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Mɛ ɩ gyɛ Gabireli mʋ nɩɩ n yɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ansi tɔ sʋsʋ mʋ. Nɩɩ o sun mɛ yɛ n ba tɔwɛ fʋ asɩn danbɩrasa nɩmʋ.

english_verse: You have not believed what I have said. So you will not be able to say a thing until all this happens. But everything will take place when it is supposed to.”
translation_verse: Kpalɩ fɛɛ fʋ maa man kɔɔlɛ mɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ii biti ɩ ba ɩmʋ saŋa tɔ kyɛɛkyɛɛ gyii sʋ mʋ, n tɔwɛ fʋ yɛ fʋ man bɩla yɛ fʋ taalɛ tɔwɛ sɛhn, naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ mɛ katɔwɛ yɩla mʋ kii biti kɩ ba tɔ.”

english_verse: The crowd was waiting for Zechariah and kept wondering why he was staying in the temple so long.
translation_verse: Saŋa kʋlʋn maa tɔ, yɛgɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ kewusunɔ mʋ, bɛɛ fɛ nfɛɛrɛ kʋtɔ mʋ sʋ nɩɩ Sakariya kyɛɛrɛɛ kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: When he did come out, he could not speak, and they knew he had seen a vision. He motioned to them with his hands, but did not say a thing.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɩɩ obu mʋ tɔ mʋ, ɔ man bɩla ɛɛ taalɛ ɛɛ tɔwɛ bamʋ asɛ, nɩɩ ba bɩɩ fɛɛ, o wu ansi sʋ kɩlɛɛkaapʋ kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ mʋ tɔ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ abaa nɩɩ o sii ɔ sʋ ɛɛ tɔwɛ bamʋ asɛ.

english_verse: When Zechariah's time of service in the temple was over, he went home.
translation_verse: Sakariya maa sun mu kiseepu kusun lʋwɛ kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ, ɔ lɩɩ tʋtɔ kpewu mʋ ayɛ.

english_verse: Soon after this, his wife was expecting a baby, and for five months she did not leave the house. She said to herself,
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ kamaa mʋ, nɩɩ mʋ‐ka Elisabeti nyɛ ɔtɔ. Nɩɩ ɔ taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ baala kɩkpaara sʋ kanɩn ɩbwaayɩ inuu.

english_verse: “What the Lord has done for me will keep people from looking down on me.” An Angel Tells about the Birth of Jesus
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Elisabeti yɛ, “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ ɩ waa ɩnɩmʋ sa mɛ. O su mɛ kʋwɛɛ, nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ ipeeli lɩɩ mɛ sʋ lɩɩ mɛ tɔɔmaa ana tɔ.” Ba tɔwɛ Yesu kakʋʋgɛ asɩn

english_verse: with a message for a virgin named Mary. She was engaged to Joseph from the family of King David.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ sun mʋ kpee kibite mʋ nɩɩ o mee nyi ɔnyɩn nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ mʋ yɛ Mɛɛrɩ mʋ asɛ. Ba taa mʋ sa ɔnyɩn mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ mʋ yɛ Gyosefu kekili, nɩɩ ɔ lɩɩ Dawidi kɩnaana tɔ.

english_verse: The angel greeted Mary and said, “You are truly blessed! The Lord is with you.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kabɔɔ mʋ kpee mʋ asɛ naa fwaala mʋ yɛ, “Faa kumu ɔkɔn! Ɩbwaarɛ bʋ fʋ asɛ, nɩɩ ɔ waa fʋ kusee gaa.”

english_verse: Mary was confused by the angel's words and wondered what they meant.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩ kɩtaa Mɛɛrɩ nfɛɛrɛ lɩɩ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ kabɔɔ mʋ tɔwɛ mʋ mʋ, nɩɩ ɛɛ fɛ kanɩn afwaala mʋ nfɛɛrɛ.

english_verse: Then the angel told Mary, “Don't be afraid! God is pleased with you,
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kabɔɔ mʋ tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Mɛɛrɩ man waa kufuu, lɩɩ fɛɛ fʋ nyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ kabwaala.

english_verse: and you will have a son. His name will be Jesus.
translation_verse: Fii biti fʋ nyɛ ɔtɔ kɛ fʋ kʋʋgɛ Obii‐nyɩnsa, kɛ fʋ yɩla mʋ kɩtɩɩ yɛ Yesu.

english_verse: He will be great and will be called the Son of God Most High. The Lord God will make him king, as his ancestor David was.
translation_verse: Ee biti ɔ waa nyɩmɩsa kparɛ kɛ ba tɩɩ mʋ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Owura lala Mu‐Bii. Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ taa Yesu mʋ naana Dawidi kuwura‐gya mʋ sa mʋ.

english_verse: He will rule the people of Israel forever, and his kingdom will never end.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ee biti o gyii Ɩsɩrayɩ abi sʋ kuwura‐gyii naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ ɔkaa.”

english_verse: Mary asked the angel, “How can this happen? I am not even married!”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Mɛɛrɩ taasɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabɔɔ mʋ yɛ, “Nɛnɛ nɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ ii biti ɩ bɔla sʋ waa, yɛgɛ n gyɛ kibite mʋ nɩɩ n man nyi ɔnyɩn?”

english_verse: The angel answered, “The Holy Spirit will come down to you, and God's power will come over you. So your child will be called the holy Son of God.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kabɔɔ mʋ lɛɛ mʋ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ ii biti ɔ ba fʋ sʋ, kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Owura lala mʋ ɔlʋn o bun fʋ sʋ. Ɩmʋ sʋ bee biti ba tɩɩ obii kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ nɩɩ fii biti fʋ kʋʋgɛ mʋ mʋ, yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii.

english_verse: Your relative Elizabeth is also going to have a son, even though she is old. No one thought she could ever have a baby, but in three months she will have a son.
translation_verse: Fʋ kʋʋpʋ Elisabeti mʋ nɩɩ asa bɛɛ tɩɩ mʋ yɛ ogbentipu nɩɩ ɔ waa kakyɩɩ bɩlɩsa gbaa mʋ, sʋ obii‐nyɩnsa‐bii ɔtɔ ɩbwaayɩ isiye.

english_verse: Mary said, “I am the Lord's servant! Let it happen as you have said.” And the angel left her. Mary Visits Elizabeth
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Mɛɛrɩ lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “N gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ nɩn, yɛgɛ ɩ waa kanɩn sa mɛ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fʋ tɔwɛ mʋ.” Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kabɔɔ mʋ lɩɩ tʋtɔ kyʋn. Mɛɛrɩ bɔɔ Elisabeti sʋ

english_verse: A short time later Mary hurried to a town in the hill country of Judea.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ nkɛ gbɛrɛɛ kamaa mʋ, Mɛɛrɩ kʋʋla mʋ n‐yɩɩ ɛɛ waa bilen o kpee kadɛ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ abɩɩ tɔ Gyudeya ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ.

english_verse: She went into Zechariah's home, where she greeted Elizabeth.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔ naa loo Sakariya kɩkpaara sʋ naa fwaala mʋ‐ka Elisabeti.

english_verse: When Elizabeth heard Mary's greeting, her baby moved within her. The Holy Spirit came upon Elizabeth.
translation_verse: Elisabeti maa nu Mɛɛrɩ afwaala mʋ, kebii mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ mʋ ɔtɔ tɔ mʋ fitii. Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ kɩ maa loo bɔla Elisabeti mʋ,

english_verse: Then in a loud voice she said to Mary: God has blessed you more than any other woman! He has also blessed the child you will have.
translation_verse: nɩɩ ɔ pʋntɛ kenken tɔwɛ yɛ, “Akyɩɩ kpini tɔ mʋ, fʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ waa kusee kʋkyɔ, nɩɩ kusee bun fu kebii mʋ nɩɩ fii biti fʋ kʋʋgɛ mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: Why should the mother of my Lord come to me?
translation_verse: Mɩnɛ kusee lala nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa bwaala mɛ yɛ mɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ mu‐nyi ɔ ba bɔɔ mɛ sʋ?

english_verse: As soon as I heard your greeting, my baby became happy and moved within me.
translation_verse: N maa dan nu fʋ afwaala mʋ, kebii mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ mɛ ɔtɔ tɔ mʋ taa kensi‐gyii fitii.

english_verse: The Lord has blessed you because you believed that he will keep his promise. Mary's Song of Praise
translation_verse: Kusee ɩ gyɛ fʋ lɛɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fʋ maa kɔɔlɛ gyii fɛɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ fʋ mʋ, ii biti ɩ ba tɔ kesintin.” Mɛɛrɩ bɩɩ ɔlʋn yɩn Ɩbwaarɛ

english_verse: Mary said: With all my heart I praise the Lord,
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Mɛɛrɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, “N yɩn Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ lɩɩ mɛ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ.

english_verse: and I am glad because of God my Savior.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ mɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ sʋ mʋ, mi ansi i gyii lɩɩ mɛ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ.

english_verse: God cares for me, his humble servant. From now on, all people will say God has blessed me.
translation_verse: Kpalɩ fɛɛ mɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ kibite mʋ nɩɩ n man bʋ sɛhn tɔ mʋ, mɛ asɩn i tiri Ɩbwaarɛ. Nɩɩ lɩɩ ndaga sʋ i kpee mʋ, ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ii biti ɔ tɩɩ mɛ yɛ kumu ɔkɔn wuya.

english_verse: God All-Powerful has done great things for me, and his name is holy.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɔlʋnpʋ lala Ɩbwaarɛ waa atɔ kparɛ sa mɛ. Mʋ kɩtɩɩ ɩ gyɛ Kɩkyɩrɛkyɩrɛ.

english_verse: The Lord has used his powerful arm to scatter those who are proud.
translation_verse: Ɔ taa mʋ kɩbaa bʋlʋnsa mʋ waa asɩn kyinkyinsa, nɩɩ ɔ yaasɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kʋsaa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ.

english_verse: God drags strong rulers from their thrones and puts humble people in places of power.
translation_verse: Ɔ kʋsaa awura‐gyipu bamʋ ngya sʋ, amaa nɩɩ o diyaa abʋlʋpʋ mʋ sʋsʋ.

english_verse: God gives the hungry good things to eat, and sends the rich away with nothing.
translation_verse: Ɔ yɛgɛ nɩɩ atiripu ba nyɛ atɔ danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ i tiri bamʋ. Amaa atɔ wuya ana bɩrɛ, o bwiiyaa bamʋ yɛ abaa kpan.

english_verse: God helps his servant Israel and is always merciful to his people.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ nyiŋi mʋ asa Ɩsɩrayɩ abi sʋ, nɩɩ o wu bamʋ kʋwɛɛ kyɛ bamʋ tɔ,

english_verse: The Lord made this promise to our ancestors, to Abraham and his family forever!
translation_verse: fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ yɩla anɛ naana ana agyankpaapʋ mʋ. Ɔ tɔwɛ Abraham yɛ ee biti o wu maa mʋ kanaana tɔ abi kpini kʋwɛɛ.”

english_verse: Mary stayed with Elizabeth about three months. Then she went back home. The Birth of John the Baptist
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Mɛɛrɩ kyɩna Elisabeti asɛ ɩ waa fɛɛ ɩbwaayɩ ɩsa pɔyɩ nɩɩ o bwii kpewu. Elisabeti Kʋʋgɛ Gyɔn Okyugyeepu

english_verse: When Elizabeth's son was born,
translation_verse: Elisabeti kakɛ kʋʋgɛsa maa fʋʋ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ kʋʋgɛ kebii‐nyɩnsa‐bii.

english_verse: her neighbors and relatives heard how kind the Lord had been to her, and they too were glad.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Elisabeti mʋ tɔɔmaa ana yɛ mʋ kʋʋpʋ ana ba maa nu kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ wu mʋ kʋwɛɛ mʋ, nɩɩ bamʋ kpini ba bʋga gyii bamʋ ansi.

english_verse: Eight days later they did for the child what the Law of Moses commands. They were going to name him Zechariah, after his father.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ kakɛ buruwasapu mʋ ba gyaŋɛ, kɛ ba tɩn kebii mʋ oduu. Naafɔɔ bee biti ba taa mʋ‐sɛ kɩtɩɩ Sakariya mʋ yɩla mʋ.

english_verse: But Elizabeth said, “No! His name is John.”
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ mu‐nyi kina kɩtɩɩ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ yɛ, “Ba tɩɩ mʋ yɛ Gyɔn.”

english_verse: The people argued, “No one in your family has ever been named John.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba tɔwɛ Elisabeti yɛ, “Fan man sʋ ɔkʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kanɩn kɩtɩɩ fanɛ kanan tɔ.”

english_verse: So they motioned to Zechariah to find out what he wanted to name his son.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba waa abaa tɔwɛ mʋ‐sɛ Sakariya asɛ, kɛ ba bɩɩ kɩtɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ba taa yɩla kebii mʋ.

english_verse: Zechariah asked for a writing tablet. Then he wrote, “His name is John.” Everyone was amazed.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔ yɛgɛ nɩɩ ba taa kɩgyantan‐bi sa mʋ. Nɩɩ ɔ kyʋrɔɔ sʋ yɛ, “Mʋ kɩtɩɩ ɩ gyɛ Gyɔn.” Nɩɩ i kyinkyin bamʋ gaa.

english_verse: All the neighbors were frightened because of what had happened, and everywhere in the hill country people kept talking about these things.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kufuu kɩ kɩtaa mʋ tɔɔmaa ana mʋ kpini, nɩɩ asɩn nɩmʋ ɩ yalagɛ ndɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ abɩɩ tɔ Gyudeya Ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ.

english_verse: Everyone who heard about this wondered what this child would grow up to be. They knew the Lord was with him. Zechariah Praises the Lord
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o nu kanɩn asɩn mʋ ɩɩ fɛ kɩmʋ nfɛɛrɛ, nɩɩ ɛɛ taasɛ yɛ, “Mɩnɛ nɩɩ kanɩn kebii nɩmʋ ba ɔ ba waa?” Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩbaa kɩ gyan mʋ sʋ. Sakariya Bɩɩ Ɔlʋn Yɩn Ɩbwaarɛ

english_verse: The Holy Spirit came upon Zechariah, and he began to speak:
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ bɔla kebii mʋ mʋ‐sɛ Sakariya tɔ, nɩɩ ɛɛ tɔwɛ abwaarɛsɩn yɛ,

english_verse: Praise the Lord, the God of Israel! He has come to save his people.
translation_verse: “Fan yɛgɛ a yɩn anɛ Ɩsɩrayɩ abi Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ ba nɩn ɔ ba kyɛ mʋ asa tɔ kɛ ɔ mɔlɩgɛ bamʋ.

english_verse: Our God has given us a mighty Savior from the family of David his servant.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ mʋ kɩyaafɔlɛ Dawidi kanan tɔ mʋ, ɔ lɛɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ Lʋnpʋ sa anɛ.

english_verse: Long ago the Lord promised by the words of his holy prophets
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ atɔwɛpʋ kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ ba wʋla tɔwɛ yɩla fɛɛ,

english_verse: to save us from our enemies and from everyone who hates us.
translation_verse: ee biti ɔ ba mɔlɩgɛ anɛ lɩɩ anɛ dʋn ana yɛ anɛ akisipu kpini abaa tɔ.

english_verse: God said he would be kind to our people and keep his sacred promise.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ yɛ ee biti o wu anɛ naana ana kʋwɛɛ kɛ o nyiŋi mʋ katɔwɛ kyula kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ.

english_verse: that he would rescue us from our enemies. Then we could serve him without fear,
translation_verse: ee biti ɔ kɔɔlɛ anɛ lɩɩ anɛ akisipu abaa tɔ, kɛ ɔ yɛgɛ a nyɛ ɔlʋn sun mʋ yɛgɛ a man sʋ kufuu.

english_verse: by being holy and good as long as we live.
translation_verse: Kɛ a ba an gyɛ asa kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ kɛ anɛ ɩkpa i kyiigi, mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ ansi tɔ lɩɩ anɛ kakyɩna kpini.”

english_verse: You, my son, will be called the prophet of God Most High. You will go ahead of the Lord to get everything ready for him.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Sakariya tɔwɛ mu‐bii Gyɔn yɛ, “Mi‐bii, bee biti ba tɩɩ fʋ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Ɔlʋnpʋ mʋ ɔtɔwɛpʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ fii biti fʋ gyankpaa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ naa lɔŋɔ mʋ ɔkpa.

english_verse: You will tell his people that they can be saved when their sins are forgiven.
translation_verse: Fii biti fʋ ba yɛgɛ mʋ asa ba bɩɩ fɛɛ ɩ lɩɩ alibi kɩtaakɛɛ sʋ nɩɩ bee biti ba nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ.

english_verse: God's love and kindness will shine upon us like the sun that rises in the sky.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ maa wu anɛ kʋwɛɛ sʋ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ yɛgɛ nɩɩ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ mʋ ba anɛ asɛ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ kyɔwɛ ɩ lɩɩ sʋsʋ ba ɛɛ da kasɛ mʋ.

english_verse: On us who live in the dark shadow of death this light will shine to guide us into a life of peace.
translation_verse: Kɛ ɩ ŋmaŋɛ sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ kitentenbiri mʋ nɩɩ kɩ sʋ bamʋ kii kpee lewu tɔ, kɛ ɩ ŋmaŋɛ tɔ kaapʋ anɛ ɔkpa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ sʋ i kpee keyuula tɔ.”

english_verse: As John grew up, God's Spirit gave him great power. John lived in the desert until the time he was sent to the people of Israel.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kebii mʋ dan nɩɩ ɔ nyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu tɔ ɔlʋn, nɩɩ ɔ kyɩna ofuli sʋ naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ kaapʋ Ɩsɩrayɩ abi.

english_verse: About that time Emperor Augustus gave orders for the names of all the people to be listed in record books.
translation_verse: Kanɩn nkɛ maŋa tɔ mʋ, Owura Kasaro Agusitu sa kɔnɔ yii sʋ tɔwɛ yɛ, ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ Roma kuwura‐gyii kasɛ mʋ kpini ɔ naa kyʋrɔɔ mʋ kɩtɩɩ kɛ ba kalɛ mʋ.

english_verse: At this time a man named Simeon was living in Jerusalem. Simeon was a good man. He loved God and was waiting for him to save the people of Israel. God's Spirit came to him
translation_verse: Kanan saŋa mʋ ɔnyɩn kʋ bʋ Gyerusalem nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ mʋ yɛ Simeyon. Ɔ gyɛ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ mʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi nɩɩ ee sun Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ kɔkɔlɔ kʋlʋn, nɩɩ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ kɩ bɔla mʋ tɔ. Nɩɩ o gyoo saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ bɩya Ɩsɩrayɩ abi kamɔlɩgɛ.

english_verse: Everyone had to go to their own hometown to be listed.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ kpee mʋ kadɛ tɔ kɛ ɔ naa kyʋrɔɔ mʋ kɩtɩɩ.

english_verse: So Joseph had to leave Nazareth in Galilee and go to Bethlehem in Judea. Long ago Bethlehem had been King David's hometown, and Joseph went there because he was from David's family.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Gyosefu gbaa kʋsʋ Nasareti kadɛ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ Galile ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ, kpee kadɛ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ kɩmʋ yɛ Betilehem mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ Gyudeya ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ. Betilehem ɩ gyɛ kadɛ mʋ nɩɩ owura Dawidi lɩɩ. Gyosefu kpee Betilehem kpalɩ fɛɛ ɔ lɩɩ Dawidi kebunɔ nɩn.

english_verse: Mary was engaged to Joseph and traveled with him to Bethlehem. She was soon going to have a baby,
translation_verse: Gyosefu taa Mɛɛrɩ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ yɛ ee biti o kili mʋ mʋ, nɩɩ ba kpee Betilehem ba naa kyʋrɔɔ bamʋ atɩɩ. Kanɩn saŋa maŋa mʋ Mɛɛrɩ sʋ ɔtɔ.

english_verse: she gave birth to her first-born son. She dressed him in baby clothes and laid him on a bed of hay, because there was no room for them in the inn. The Shepherds
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Mɛɛrɩ kʋʋgɛ mu‐bii‐nyɩnsa gyankpaasa. Nɩɩ ɔ taa akyibi mili kebii mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ ɔ taa mʋ dɩɩla kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ atɔbwaaya bee gyii mʋ tɔ. Kpalɩ fɛɛ afɔ ba maa ba kɩkyɔ sʋ mʋ Mɛɛrɩ maa Gyosefu ba man nyɛ opula afɔ obu mʋ tɔ. Nbʋlʋpʋ Akpapʋ Yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Nbɔɔ

english_verse: That night in the fields near Bethlehem some shepherds were guarding their sheep.
translation_verse: Saŋa maŋa tɔ, nbʋlʋpʋ akpapʋ akʋ ba bʋ kadɛ mʋ afitiri tɔ bɛɛ kɩɩ bamʋ nbʋlʋpʋ sʋ kagyanbwɛ.

english_verse: All at once an angel came down to them from the Lord, and the brightness of the Lord's glory flashed around them. The shepherds were frightened.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ opula maa tɔ Ɩbwaarɛ kabɔɔ kʋ kɩ ba bamʋ asɛ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bʋnyaa mʋ ŋmaŋɛ tɔ kyaabɔɔ bamʋ. Nɩɩ kufuu kɩ kɩtaa bamʋ.

english_verse: But the angel said, “Don't be afraid! I have good news for you, which will make everyone happy.
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kabɔɔ mʋ tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Fan man waa kufuu. N bɩya fanɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ ii biti a waa asa kpini ɔkɔn.

english_verse: This very day in King David's hometown a Savior was born for you. He is Christ the Lord.
translation_verse: Ndaga kakɛ nɩmʋ ba kʋʋgɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ mʋ Dawidi kadɛ tɔ. Mʋ ɩ gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, Ɔmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ wʋla lɛɛ mʋ.

english_verse: You will know who he is, because you will find him dressed in baby clothes and lying on a bed of hay.”
translation_verse: Falɛ nɩɩ fen biti fan wu kesintin mʋ. Fen biti fan wu fɛɛ ba maa taa akyibi mili kebii pʋpwɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ dɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ atɔbwaaya bee gyii mʋ tɔ.”

english_verse: Suddenly many other angels came down from heaven and joined in praising God. They said:
translation_verse: Opula maŋa tɔ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ kʋbʋ lala kʋ ba lɩɩ sʋsʋ ba tii kabɔɔ mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ ba yɩn Ɩbwaarɛ bɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ,

english_verse: “Praise God in heaven! Peace on earth to everyone who pleases God.”
translation_verse: “Bʋnyaa bʋ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ sʋsʋ mʋ asɛ. Kɛ keyuula ki bun bamʋ nɩɩ ba bɔla mu ansi mʋ kasɛ sʋ.”

english_verse: After the angels had left and gone back to heaven, the shepherds said to each other, “Let's go to Bethlehem and see what the Lord has told us about.”
translation_verse: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ ba lɩɩ bamʋ asɛ kpee sʋsʋ mʋ, nbʋlʋpʋ akpapʋ mʋ ba tɔwɛ abaa yɛ, “Fan yɛgɛ a kpee Betilehem naa kɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ waa nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ anɛ mʋ.”

english_verse: They hurried off and found Mary and Joseph, and they saw the baby lying on a bed of hay.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ nɩɩ ba kpaala kpee nɩɩ ba naa wu Mɛɛrɩ maa Gyosefu yɛ kebii pʋpwɛ mʋ maa dɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ atɔbwaaya bee gyii tɔ mʋ.

english_verse: When the shepherds saw Jesus, they told his parents what the angel had said about him.
translation_verse: Nbʋlʋpʋ akpaapʋ mʋ ba maa naa wu kebii mʋ, nɩɩ ba tɔwɛ asa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kabɔɔ mʋ ba tɔwɛ bamʋ lɩɩ kebii mʋ sʋ mʋ.

english_verse: But Mary kept thinking about all this and wondering what it meant.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Mɛɛrɩ taa asɩn mʋ kpini waa mʋ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ, ɛɛ fɛ ɩmʋ nfɛɛrɛ.

english_verse: As the shepherds returned to their sheep, they were praising God and saying wonderful things about him. Everything they had seen and heard was just as the angel had said.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ nbʋlʋpʋ akpaapʋ mʋ ba maa bwii bee kpee mʋ, yɛgɛ bɛɛ bɩɩ ɩlʋn bɛɛ yɩn Ɩbwaarɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ba nu nɩɩ ba wu mʋ, ɩ bɔla sʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kabɔɔ mʋ kɩ tɔwɛ bamʋ mʋ. Ba Yɩla Yesu kɩtɩɩ

english_verse: Eight days later Jesus' parents did for him what the Law of Moses commands. And they named him Jesus, just as the angel had told Mary when he promised she would have a baby. Simeon Praises the Lord
translation_verse: Kebii mʋ maa fʋʋ nkɛ nburuwa akɛ kɛ ba tɩn mu oduu mʋ, nɩɩ ba yɩla mʋ kɩtɩɩ yɛ Yesu, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kabɔɔ mʋ wʋla tɔwɛ yɩla pɔyɩ nɩɩ ba nyɛ mʋ ɔtɔ mʋ. Ba Taa Yesu Kpe Kabwaarɛ‐Sun Ayɛ

english_verse: The time came for Mary and Joseph to do what the Law of Moses says a mother is supposed to do after her baby is born. They took Jesus to the temple in Jerusalem and presented him to the Lord,
translation_verse: Nɩɩ saŋa mʋ maa fʋʋ fɛɛ Gyosefu maa Mɛɛrɩ ba fwɩɩ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ ineesi, fɛɛ kanɩn mʋ nɩɩ Mosesi nbara mʋ ɩ kaapʋ mʋ, kanan sʋ ba taa kebii mʋ kpee Gyerusalem ba naa taa mʋ waa Ɩbwaarɛ abaa tɔ.

english_verse: just as the Law of the Lord says, “Each first-born baby boy belongs to the Lord.”
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ba kyʋrɔɔ yɩla Ɩbwaarɛ nbara mʋ tɔ yɛ, “Ɩ dagaa fɛɛ ba taa kebii‐nyɩnsa gyankpaasa kʋmaa nɩmʋ naa sa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ.”

english_verse: The Law of the Lord also says parents have to offer a sacrifice, giving at least a pair of doves or two young pigeons. So that is what Mary and Joseph did.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Mɛɛrɩ maa Gyosefu ba naa lɛɛ saraga fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ nbara ɩ kaapʋ mʋ. Nbara mʋ ɩ kaapʋ yɛ, .

english_verse: and told him that he would not die until he had seen Christ the Lord.
translation_verse: Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ kɩ lɛɛ kaapʋ mʋ fɛɛ, ɔ mɛɛ yɛ o wu, amɔɔ o wu Ɔmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ wʋla lɛɛ mʋ pɔyɩ kɛ o wu.

english_verse: When Mary and Joseph brought Jesus to the temple to do what the Law of Moses says should be done for a new baby, the Spirit told Simeon to go into the temple.
translation_verse: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Mɛɛrɩ maa Gyosefu ba taa kebii mʋ kpee kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ tɔ, kɛ ba naa waa mu kumu sʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ nbara ɩ kaapʋ mʋ, nɩɩ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ kpiya Simeyon kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Simeon took the baby Jesus in his arms and praised God,
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Simeyon kɔɔlɛ kebii mʋ kɩtaa mʋ abaa tɔ nɩɩ ɔ yɩn Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ yɛ,

english_verse: “Lord, I am your servant, and now I can die in peace, because you have kept your promise to me.
translation_verse: “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ fʋ yɛgɛ nɩɩ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ fʋ tɔwɛ mʋ ɩ ba tɔ, kanɩn sʋ nbɩɩnbɩɩ fɩɩ taalɛ yɛgɛ mɛ, fʋ kɩyaafɔlɛ n wu kayɩɩ yuuli tɔ.

english_verse: With my own eyes I have seen what you have done to save your people,
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ mi ansi i wu Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ mʋ nɩɩ fʋ sa asa mʋ.

english_verse: and foreign nations will also see this.
translation_verse: Mʋ ɩ gyɛ Ɔmʋ nɩɩ fʋ wʋla lɔŋɔ sa asa kpini mʋ.

english_verse: Your mighty power is a light for all nations, and it will bring honor to your people Israel.”
translation_verse: Mʋ ɩ gyɛ kaŋmaŋɛ mʋ nɩɩ kii biti kɩ yɛgɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Ɩsɩrayɩ abi mʋ ba bɩɩ fʋ ɔkpa mʋ, kɛ kɩ yɛgɛ fʋ asa, Ɩsɩrayɩ abi gbaa ba nyɛ bʋnyaa.”

english_verse: Jesus' parents were surprised at what Simeon had said.
translation_verse: Asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Simeyon tɔwɛ lɩɩ kebii mʋ sʋ mʋ, i kyinkyin mu‐nyi yɛ mʋ‐sɛ.

english_verse: Then he blessed them and told Mary, “This child of yours will cause many people in Israel to fall and others to stand. The child will be like a warning sign. Many people will reject him,
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Simeyon waa Mɛɛrɩ maa Gyosefu kusee, nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ Mɛɛrɩ yɛ, “Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ kebii nɩmʋ nɩn, yɛ kpalɩ mʋ sʋ mʋ, Ɩsɩrayɩ abi gaalaagaa bee biti ba tɩyɛ, kɛ akʋ mɔɔ ba nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ. Mʋ ii biti ɔ lɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn mʋ kaapʋ, kɛ asa ba gyii ɩmʋ ɩmɔɔrɛ.

english_verse: and you, Mary, will suffer as though you had been stabbed by a dagger. But all this will show what people are really thinking.” Anna Speaks about the Child Jesus
translation_verse: Kɛ asa gaalaagaa nfɛɛrɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ bamʋ amu tɔ mʋ ɩ lɩɩ ifuli. Kɛ fʋ Mɛɛrɩ mɔɔ, fʋ kayɩyɛɛ kii biti kɩ waa fɛɛ deebi bʋyɛsa nɩɩ ba taa yii fʋ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ mʋ.”

english_verse: The prophet Anna was also there in the temple. She was the daughter of Phanuel from the tribe of Asher, and she was very old. In her youth she had been married for seven years, but her husband died.
translation_verse: Saŋa maŋa mʋ, kakyɩɩ bɩlɩsa kʋ bʋ tɔ, bɛɛ tɩɩ mʋ yɛ Ana nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔtɔwɛpʋ. O kili nsu nsunɔ nɩɩ mu‐kuli wu. Mʋ‐sɛ ɩ gyɛ Fanuweli, nɩɩ ɔ lɩɩ Asee kebunɔ.

english_verse: At this time Anna came in and praised God. She spoke about the child Jesus to everyone who hoped for Jerusalem to be set free. The Return to Nazareth
translation_verse: Opula maŋa tɔ nɩɩ Ana ba Gyosefu maa Mɛɛrɩ asɛ nɩɩ ɔ fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ, nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ kebii mʋ asɩn sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba tɛ ba gyoo Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ mʋ nɩɩ ee biti ɔ ba lɛɛ Gyerusalem abi lɩɩ awʋrʋfɔ tɔ mʋ. Gyosefu maa Mɛɛrɩ ba bwii kpee Nasareti kadɛ tɔ

english_verse: After Joseph and Mary had done everything that the Law of the Lord commands, they returned home to Nazareth in Galilee.
translation_verse: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Mɛɛrɩ maa Gyosefu ba lʋwɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ dagaa fɛɛ ba waa fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ nbara ɩ kaapʋ mʋ, ba bwii kpewu bamʋ kadɛ tɔ Nasareti mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ Galile ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ mʋ.

english_verse: The child Jesus grew. He became strong and wise, and God blessed him. The Boy Jesus in the Temple
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu dan nɩɩ ɔ nyɛ ɔlʋn, nɩɩ kanyaasɩn kɩ bɔla mʋ tɔ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala kɩ bʋ mʋ sʋ. Yesu kebii Tɔ Mʋ O Kpe Kabwaarɛ‐Sunkpa Ayɛ

english_verse: Every year Jesus' parents went to Jerusalem for Passover.
translation_verse: Kesu kʋmaa Gyosefu maa Mɛɛrɩ bee kpee Gyerusalem ba naa gyii Kanyaŋɛ nbunɔ kesu kɔnɔ kɔlɔŋɔ.

english_verse: And when Jesus was twelve years old, they all went there as usual for the celebration.
