translation_verse: Lɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ Gyiwu abi ba payɩ ansi bee biti ɩkpa ba mɔɔ mʋ. Man gyɛ kakɛ fʋʋtɛsa akɛ nbara kinyita mʋ wʋlɛ nkʋn sʋ, amaa ɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ mʋ‐Sɛ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ, mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ maa Ɩbwaarɛ kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

english_verse: Jesus told the people: I tell you for certain the Son cannot do anything on his own. He can do only what he sees the Father doing, and he does exactly what he sees the Father do.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu kyaga sʋ lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “N tɔwɛ fanɛ kesintin yɛ, mɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii mʋ n mɛɛ taalɛ waa sɛhn mɛ kɩba sʋ. Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ n wu Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ waa mʋ, kɩmʋ nɩɩ ngbaa mɛ n waa.

english_verse: The Father loves the Son and has shown him everything he does. The Father will show him even greater things, and you will be amazed.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ sʋ kebiti sa mɛ, nɩɩ ɛɛ kaapʋ mɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa mʋ. Mɛ‐Sɛ ii biti ɔ kaapʋ mɛ atɔ kparɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ kyɔ ɩnɩmʋ, kɛ n waa kɛ i kyinkyin fanɛ.

english_verse: Just as the Father raises the dead and gives life, so the Son gives life to anyone he wants to.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ ii kyiŋi alewupu nɩɩ ɛɛ sa bamʋ nkpa mʋ, kanɩn maŋa sʋ nɩɩ mɛ, Obii mʋ gbaa n sa nkpa mi kebiti tɔ.

english_verse: The Father doesn't judge anyone, but he has made his Son the judge of everyone.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐Sɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛɛ talɛ ɔkʋ, amaa ɔ taa ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ katalɛ waa mɛ kɩbaa tɔ.

english_verse: The Father wants all people to honor the Son as much as they honor him. When anyone refuses to honor the Son, this is the same as refusing to honor the Father who sent him.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐Sɛ ii biti asa kpini ba taa bʋnyaa sa mɛ, Obii mʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ taa bʋnyaa bɛɛ sa Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ. Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ taa bʋnyaa sa mɛ, Obii mʋ, ɩɩ kaapʋ nɩn fɛɛ ɔ mɛɛ taa bʋnyaa ɛɛ sa Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ nɩɩ o sun mɛ mʋ.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that everyone who hears my message and has faith in the one who sent me has eternal life and will never be condemned. They have already gone from death to life.
translation_verse: “N tɔwɛ fanɛ kesintin fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o nu mɛ asɩn, nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ o sun mɛ mʋ gyii mʋ, sʋ nkpa kakpaa, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ mɛɛ yɛ o bun mʋ kʋpwɛ. Ɔ tɛɛ faa lɩɩ lewu tɔ ba nkpa tɔ.

english_verse: I tell you for certain the time will come, and it is already here, when all of the dead will hear the voice of the Son of God. And those who listen to it will live!
translation_verse: N tɔwɛ fanɛ kesintin fɛɛ saŋa kʋ ɩɩ ba, nɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ gbaa ɩɩ tɛɛ ba. Nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba du fɛɛ alewupu lɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba man nyi Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ sʋ mʋ, bee biti ba nu mɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii mʋ ɔbʋlɛ, nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba nu mɛ asɛ mʋ, bee biti ba nyɛ nkpa.

english_verse: The Father has the power to give life, and he has given that same power to the Son.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Kanan mʋ nɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ gyɛ nkpa kumu mʋ, kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ ɔ sa mɛ, Mu‐Bii mʋ ɔkpa fɛɛ n baa n gyɛ nkpa kumu.

english_verse: And he has given his Son the right to judge everyone, because he is the Son of Man.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔ sa mɛ ɔlʋn yɛ n talɛ daadimaadi kʋmaa, lɩɩ fɛɛ mɛ ɩ gyɛ Daadimaadi Obii‐nyɩnsa.

english_verse: Don't be surprised! The time will come when all of the dead will hear the voice of the Son of Man,
translation_verse: “Fan man yɛgɛ ɩnɩmʋ i kyinkyin fanɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ saŋa kʋ ii biti ɔ ba nɩɩ alewupu mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ nkyan tɔ kpini bee biti ba nu mɛ ɔbʋlɛ,

english_verse: and they will come out of their graves. Everyone who has done good things will rise to life, but everyone who has done evil things will rise and be condemned.
translation_verse: kɛ ba lɩɩ bamʋ nkyan tɔ ba. Nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba waa adanbɩrasa mʋ, bee biti ba kyiŋi nyɛ nkpa, kɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba waa alibi mʋ, bee biti ba kyiŋi kɛ ba gyii kʋpwɛ.

english_verse: I cannot do anything on my own. The Father sent me, and he is the one who told me how to judge. I judge with fairness, because I obey him, and I don't just try to please myself. Witnesses to Jesus
translation_verse: Nɩɩ mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ mɛɛ taalɛ waa sɛhn mɛ kɩbaa sʋ. N talɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n nu lɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ asɛ, nɩɩ n gyii asɩn ɩmʋ ɔkpa sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ n mee biti n waa mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ kɔkɔlɔ biti, amɔɔ ɔmʋ nɩɩ o sun mɛ mʋ lɛɛ.” Asɩn mʋ nɩɩ i gyii Yesu n‐yɩɩ sʋ kesintin

english_verse: If I speak for myself, there is no way to prove I am telling the truth.
translation_verse: Yesu kyaga sʋ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Nɩɩ n gyii mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ asɩn kesintin mʋ, ɩ mɛɛ yɛ ɩ baa i budu.

english_verse: But there is someone else who speaks for me, and I know what he says is true.
translation_verse: Amaa ɔkʋ bʋ tɔ nɩɩ ee gyii mɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ asɩn, mʋ ɩ gyɛ mɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ, nɩɩ n nyi fɛɛ mɛ n‐yɩɩ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ee gyii mʋ ɩ gyɛ kesintin.

english_verse: You sent messengers to John, and he told them the truth.
translation_verse: “Nɩɩ fanɛ gbaa‐gbaa fan sun kpee Gyɔn asɛ, nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ kesintin mʋ tɔwɛ fanɛ lɩɩ mɛ sʋ.

english_verse: I don't depend on what people say about me, but I tell you these things so that you may be saved.
translation_verse: Man gyɛ fɛɛ n biti nyɩmɩsa daadimaadi o gyii mɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ kesintin nɩn, amaa n tɔwɛ asɩn nɩmʋ lɩɩ Gyɔn sʋ nɩn, kɛ fan nu kasɛ kɛ fan nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ.

english_verse: John was a lamp that gave a lot of light, and you were glad to enjoy his light for a while.
translation_verse: Gyɔn kyɩna o du nɩn fɛɛ ɩŋmaŋɛsa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ kyaŋɛ nɩɩ kɩ kɩɩ tɔ, nɩɩ fan gyii fanɛ ansi gbɛrɛɛ ɩmʋ tɔ.

english_verse: But something more important than John speaks for me. I mean the things that the Father has given me to do! All of these speak for me and prove that the Father sent me.
translation_verse: “Amaa n sʋ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ii gyii mɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ kesintin, nɩɩ i budu ɩ kyɔ Gyɔn lɛɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ kusun mʋ nɩɩ mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ taa sa mɛ nɩɩ n sun falɛ mʋ, ɩɩ lɛɛ kaapʋ kesintin fɛɛ mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ i sun mɛ.

english_verse: The Father who sent me also speaks for me, but you have never heard his voice or seen him face to face.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ nɩɩ o sun mɛ mʋ gbaa gyii mɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ kesintin. Nɩɩ fan man pɩɩta nu mʋ ɔbʋlɛ abɛɛ fan wu mʋ yɛ ansi,

english_verse: You search the Scriptures, because you think you will find eternal life in them. The Scriptures tell about me,
translation_verse: Fan payɩ ansi bɩɩla Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fɛn fɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ kanan ɔkpa maŋa sʋ nɩɩ fen biti fan nyɛ nkpa kakpaa, yɛgɛ kanɩn Asɩnkyan yɩlasa maŋa ii gyii mɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ kesintin.

english_verse: but you refuse to come to me for eternal life.
translation_verse: Amaa fan kina mɛ asɛ kɩba, kɛ fan ba nyɛ nkpa.

english_verse: I don't care about human praise,
translation_verse: “Ayɩn‐bi lɩɩ daadimaadi kʋ asɛ man tiri mɛ.

english_verse: but I do know that none of you love God.
translation_verse: Amaa n nyi fanɛ. N nyi fan maa man sʋ kebiti sa Ɩbwaarɛ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ.

english_verse: I have come with my Father's authority, and you have not welcomed me. But you will welcome people who come on their own.
translation_verse: N ba mɛ‐Sɛ kɩtɩɩ tɔ, nɩɩ fan man kɔɔlɛ mɛ, amaa nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan ba mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ kɩtɩɩ tɔ mʋ, fan biti fan kɔɔlɛ mʋ.

english_verse: How could you possibly believe? You like to have your friends praise you, and you don't care about praise that the only God can give!
translation_verse: Fan maa biti ayɩn‐bi lɩɩ abaa asɛ falɛ, yɛgɛ fɛn mɛɛ kpan fanɛ n‐yɩɩ fan nyɛ ayɩn‐bi lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ nkʋn asɛ mʋ, nɛnɛ nɩɩ fen biti fan waa kɔɔlɛ gyii?

english_verse: Don't think that I will be the one to accuse you to the Father. You have put your hope in Moses, yet he is the very one who will accuse you.
translation_verse: “Fan man fɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ n biti n pwɩɩ fanɛ Mɛ‐Sɛ mu ansi tɔ. Fanɛ naana Mosesi mʋ nɩɩ fan taa fanɛ tamaa tʋʋ mʋ sʋ mʋ, mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ee biti ɔ pwɩɩ fanɛ.

english_verse: Moses wrote about me, and if you had believed Moses, you would have believed me.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fan kan kɔɔlɛ Mosesi gyii mʋ, naafɔɔ fen biti fan kɔɔlɛ ngbaa mɛ gyii, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ kyʋrɔɔ mɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ asɩn.

english_verse: The disciples gathered them up and filled twelve large baskets with what was left over from the five barley loaves.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ ba maa gyii bodobodo pii‐pii anu mʋ, ba tasɛ‐tasɛ ɩmʋ agyisan mʋ kpini bɔla alantan kudu anyɔ.

english_verse: The disciples wanted to take him into the boat, but suddenly the boat reached the shore where they were headed. The Bread That Gives Life
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba maa biti fɛɛ ba taa Yesu waa ɔkʋlɩ mʋ tɔ mʋ, opula maŋa tɔ nɩɩ ɔkʋlɩ mʋ dan katɩn mʋ nɩɩ bee biti fɛɛ ba fʋʋ mʋ.

english_verse: They replied, “What miracle will you work, so that we can have faith in you? What will you do?
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba taasɛ mʋ yɛ, “Mɩnɛ asɩn kyinkyinsa nɩɩ fii biti fʋ waa kɛ an wu kɛ a kɔɔlɛ fu gyii? Mɩnɛ nɩɩ fii biti fʋ waa?

english_verse: No one can come to me, unless the Father who sent me makes them want to come. But if they do come, I will raise them to life on the last day.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ ba mɛ asɛ, amɔɔ Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ nɩɩ o sun mɛ mʋ, ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ ɔ ba, nɩɩ n biti n kyiŋi mʋ ba nkpa tɔ kakɛ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ.

english_verse: “There is a boy here who has five small loaves of barley bread and two fish. But what good is that with all these people?”
translation_verse: “Kebii‐nyɩnsa‐bii kʋ bʋ nfɩɩ, nɩɩ ɔ sʋ bodobodo pii‐pii anuu yɛ ɩkɩn‐bi anyɔ. Kanɩn agyitɔ pii nɩmʋ, nɛnɛ nɩɩ ii biti ɩ waa kɛ ɩ fʋʋ asa damantɛ banɩmʋ?”

english_verse: They got into a boat and started across for Capernaum. Later that evening Jesus had still not come to them,
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩ maa sʋla naa fʋʋ kagyanbwɛ yɛgɛ Yesu man pɩɩta bwii ba bamʋ asɛ mʋ, ba naa loo ɔkʋlɩ tɔ bɛɛ faa bee kpee Kapanum.

english_verse: Jesus crossed Lake Galilee, which was also known as Lake Tiberias.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ kamaa mʋ, Yesu faa Galile ɔbʋn lala mʋ nɩɩ ba bɩla bɛɛ tɩɩ yɛ Tiberiya mʋ kpee kɩmʋ benben.

english_verse: A large crowd had seen him work miracles to heal the sick, and those people went with him.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ asa damantɛ ba buu mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ba wu mʋ asɩn kyinkyinsa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa ɛɛ kyɛ alɔpʋ mʋ.

english_verse: It was almost time for the Jewish festival of Passover, and Jesus went up on a mountain with his disciples and sat down.
translation_verse: Kanɩn saŋa maŋa mʋ, Gyiwu abi Kesu kɔnɔ Kanyaŋɛ nbunɔ kensi‐gyii mʋ ki tiri tɔ.

english_verse: Philip answered, “Don't you know that it would take almost a year's wages just to buy only a little bread for each of these people?”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Filipu lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Pɔyɩ kɛ a taalɛ nyɛ agyitɔ gbɛrɛɛ‐gbɛrɛɛ sa ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ o gyii mʋ, amɔɔ an biti a nyita ɩbwaayɩ iburuwa kʋkɔka.”

english_verse: Andrew, the brother of Simon Peter, was one of the disciples. He spoke up and said,
translation_verse: Yesu abɩɩlapʋ mʋ tɔ ɔmʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ mʋ yɛ Andiruwu, Simon Pita mu‐supu mʋ tɔwɛ yɛ,

english_verse: Jesus took the bread in his hands and gave thanks to God. Then he passed the bread to the people, and he did the same with the fish, until everyone had plenty to eat.
translation_verse: Ba maa kyɩna kanɩn mʋ, Yesu taa bodobodo mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ, nɩɩ ɔ taa sa yɛ ba barɩgɛ tɔ sa bamʋ. Kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ ɔ waa ɩkɩn mʋ gbaa. Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ nyɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ee biti.

english_verse: The people ate all they wanted, and Jesus told his disciples to gather up the leftovers, so that nothing would be wasted.
translation_verse: Ba maa gyii ŋmɛ mʋ, Yesu tɔwɛ mʋ abɩɩlapʋ mʋ yɛ, “Fan tasɛ‐tasɛ agyisan mʋ, kɛ fan man yɛgɛ ɩmʋ ɩkʋ i sii.”

english_verse: Jesus realized that they would try to force him to be their king. So he went up on a mountain, where he could be alone. Jesus Walks on the Water (Matthew
translation_verse: Yesu maa bɩɩ fɛɛ, bee biti ba ba taa mʋ ɔlʋn sʋ, kɛ ba naa bun mʋ kuwura mʋ, ɔ bɩla lɩɩ bamʋ tɔ kpee kɩbɩɩ‐bi sʋ mʋ nkʋn. Yesu natɛ nkyu sʋ (Matiwu

english_verse: The people who had stayed on the east side of the lake knew that only one boat had been there. They also knew that Jesus had not left in it with his disciples. But the next day
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ lɩɩkaakɛ mʋ, asa damantɛ mʋ nɩɩ ba sii ɔbʋn lala mʋ benben mʋ, ba wu fɛɛ ɔkʋlɩ kʋlʋn ki sii kɩ dan tʋtɔ ndee nɩɩ kɩmʋ nɩɩ abɩɩlapʋ mʋ ba taa. Amaa Yesu mɔɔ man loo mʋ abɩɩlapʋ mʋ asɛ ɔkʋlɩ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Don't work for food that spoils. Work for food that gives eternal life. The Son of Man will give you this food, because God the Father has given him the right to do so.”
translation_verse: Fan man waa kusun biti agyitɔ mʋ nɩɩ ii biti i nyita, amaa fan waa kusun biti agyitɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ sa nkpa kakpaa. Mɛ, Daadimaadi Obii‐nyɩnsa n biti n sa fanɛ kanɩn agyitɔ mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ Mɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ lɛɛ kaapʋ fɛɛ mʋ kɩbaa kɩ gyan mɛ sʋ.”

english_verse: One of the prophets wrote, “God will teach all of them.” And so everyone who listens to the Father and learns from him will come to me.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ Atɔwɛpʋ ba kyʋrɔɔ yɩla yɛ, ‘Ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ii biti ɔ nyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩkaapʋ.’ Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o nu Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ asɛ, nɩɩ ɔ bɩɩla lɩɩ mʋ asɛ mʋ, ii biti ɔ ba mɛ asɛ.

english_verse: That evening, Jesus' disciples went down to the lake.
translation_verse: Kalaatɩpwɛ asɛ maa fʋʋ mʋ, Yesu abɩɩlapʋ mʋ ba kpɩlɩgɛ kpee ɔbʋn lala kɔnɔ.

english_verse: and a strong wind was making the water rough.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ afuu lala a tigi a daa yɛgɛ nkyu mʋ ii wuli tɔ.

english_verse: When the disciples had rowed for five or six kilometers, they saw Jesus walking on the water. He kept coming closer to the boat, and they were terrified.
translation_verse: Yesu abɩɩlapʋ mʋ ba maa palɛ kpee ansi tɔ fɛɛ mayɩlɩ asa abɛɛ ana mʋ, ba wu Yesu maa naa nkyu mʋ sʋ ɛɛ ba bamʋ ɔkʋlɩ mʋ asɛ, nɩɩ kufuu kɩ kɩtaa bamʋ.

english_verse: But he said, “I am Jesus! Don't be afraid!”
translation_verse: Amaa Yesu tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Mɛ nɩn, fan man waa kufuu.”

english_verse: some boats from Tiberias sailed near the place where the crowd had eaten the bread for which the Lord had given thanks.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩkʋlɩ ɩkʋ mɔɔ ɩ lɩɩ Tiberiya ba dan tʋtɔ tiri katɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ daa taa afwaala sa Ɩbwaarɛ nɩɩ asa ba gyii agyitɔ mʋ.

english_verse: They saw that Jesus and his disciples had left. Then they got into the boats and went to Capernaum to look for Jesus.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ asa damantɛ mʋ ba maa bɩɩ fɛɛ Yesu abɛɛ mʋ abɩɩlapʋ ba man bʋ tʋtɔ mʋ, ba loo ɩkʋlɩ mʋ tɔ kpee Kapanum ba naa bee biti Yesu. Yesu ɩ gyɛ bodobodo mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ sa nkpa

english_verse: They found him on the west side of the lake and asked, “Rabbi, when did you get here?”
translation_verse: Ba maa naa wu mʋ ɔbʋn mʋ benben mʋ, ba taasɛ mʋ yɛ, “Ɔkaapʋpʋ, saŋa mɔɔ nɩɩ fʋ fʋʋ nfɩɩ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “I tell you for certain that you are not looking for me because you saw the miracles, but because you ate all the food you wanted.
translation_verse: Yesu lɛɛ bamʋ kɔnɔ yɛ “N tɔwɛ fanɛ kesintin, man gyɛ asɩn kyinkyinsa mʋ nɩɩ fan wu sʋ nɩɩ fan naa fen biti mɛ, amaa lɩɩ fan maa nyɛ agyitɔ gyii ŋmɛ kanan sʋ nɩɩ fen biti mɛ.

english_verse: “What exactly does God want us to do?” the people asked.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ ba taasɛ Yesu yɛ, “Mɩnɛ ii tiri fɛɛ a waa kɛ a taalɛ waa kusun mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti?”

english_verse: For example, when our ancestors were in the desert, they were given manna to eat. It happened just as the Scriptures say, ‘God gave them bread from heaven to eat.’ ”
translation_verse: Saŋa kʋ tɔ, anɛ naana ana ba gyii agyitɔ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ ɩmʋ yɛ Mana mʋ ofuli sʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, ‘Ɔ sa bamʋ agyitɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ lɩɩ sʋsʋ nɩɩ ba gyii.’ ”

english_verse: Jesus then told them, “I tell you for certain that Moses wasn't the one who gave you bread from heaven. My Father is the one who gives you the true bread from heaven.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “N tɔwɛ fanɛ kesintin, man gyɛ Mosesi ɩ sa fanɛ naana ana agyitɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ lɩɩ sʋsʋ mʋ. Amaa Mɛ‐Sɛ ɩ sa fanɛ naana kesintin agyitɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ lɩɩ sʋsʋ mʋ. Nɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ gbaa ɩɩ sa fanɛ kesintin agyitɔ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ lɩɩ sʋsʋ mʋ.

english_verse: And the bread that God gives is the one who came down from heaven to give life to the world.”
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ agyitɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ sa asa mʋ, ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ kpɩlɩgɛ lɩɩ sʋsʋ ba kasɛ sʋ, nɩɩ ɛɛ sa dulinyaa tɔ asa nkpa mʋ.”

english_verse: The people said, “Sir, give us this bread and don't ever stop!”
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ nɩɩ ba tɔwɛ Yesu yɛ, “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, lɩɩ ndaga ɩ sʋ ii kpee sa anɛ kanɩn agyitɔ maŋa saŋa kʋmaa.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: I am the bread that gives life! No one who comes to me will ever be hungry. No one who has faith in me will ever be thirsty.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ “Mɛ ɩ gyɛ agyitɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ sa nkpa mʋ. Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ ba mɛ asɛ mʋ, akʋn ɩ mɛɛ yɛ a mɔɔ mʋ kakaakʋ, nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ mɛ gyii mʋ, bʋlɩfɔ mɛɛ yɛ ɩ kɩtaa mʋ.

english_verse: I have told you already that you have seen me and still do not have faith in me.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n wʋla tɔwɛ fanɛ mʋ, fan wu mɛ, amaa fɛn mɛɛ kɔɔlɛ mɛ fen gyii.

english_verse: Everything and everyone that the Father has given me will come to me, and I won't turn any of them away.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ taa sa mɛ mʋ, ii biti ɔ ba mɛ asɛ. Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ ba mɛ asɛ mʋ, mɛɛ yɛ n gya mʋ.

english_verse: I didn't come from heaven to do what I want! I came to do what the Father wants me to do. He sent me,
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ n lɩɩ sʋsʋ ba kasɛ sʋ, kɛ n ba waa ɔmʋ nɩɩ o sun mɛ mʋ kebiti, amaa man gyɛ mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mi kebiti.

english_verse: and he wants to make certain that none of the ones he has given me will be lost. Instead, he wants me to raise them to life on the last day.
translation_verse: Ɔmʋ nɩɩ o sun mɛ mʋ kebiti ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ, bamʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa bamʋ sa mɛ mʋ kpini, bamʋ tɔ ɔkʋlʋn gbaa ɔ man fɔyɩ. Amaa n biti n kyiŋi bamʋ ba nkpa tɔ kakɛ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ.

english_verse: My Father wants everyone who sees the Son to have faith in him and to have eternal life. Then I will raise them to life on the last day.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Mɛ‐Sɛ kebiti ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ, ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o wu mɛ, Mu‐Bii mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ mɛ gyii mʋ ɩɩ nyɛ nkpa kakpaa. Nɩɩ n biti n kyiŋi mʋ lɩɩ lewu tɔ ba nkpa tɔ kakɛ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ.”

english_verse: The people started grumbling because Jesus had said he was the bread that had come down from heaven.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Gyiwu abi mʋ ba piili bɛɛ kɔlɩtɛ bee yii Yesu, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Mɛ ɩ gyɛ agyitɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ lɩɩ sʋsʋ ba kasɛ sʋ mʋ.”

english_verse: They were asking each other, “Isn't he Jesus, the son of Joseph? Don't we know his father and mother? How can he say that he has come down from heaven?”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba tɔwɛ yɛ, “Man gyɛ Gyosefu mu‐bii mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ mʋ yɛ Yesu mʋ nɩn? An nyi mʋ‐sɛ yɛ mu‐nyi a! Nɩɩ mɩnɛ sʋ nɩɩ, ɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, ‘N lɩɩ sʋsʋ nɩn ba?’ ”

english_verse: The only one who has seen the Father is the one who has come from him. No one else has ever seen the Father.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ mɛɛ kaapʋ fɛɛ ɔkʋ tee wu Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ, amɔɔ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ mʋ nkʋn i wu mʋ.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that everyone who has faith in me has eternal life.
translation_verse: N tɔwɛ fanɛ kesintin yɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ mɛ gyii mʋ, sʋ nkpa kakpaa.

english_verse: I am the bread that gives life!
translation_verse: Mɛ ɩ gyɛ agyitɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ sa nkpa mʋ.

english_verse: Your ancestors ate manna in the desert, and later they died.
translation_verse: Fanɛ naana ana ba gyii agyitɔ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ yɛ Mana mʋ ofuli sʋ, amaa ba wu.

english_verse: But the bread from heaven has come down, so that no one who eats it will ever die.
translation_verse: Amaa agyitɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ lɩɩ sʋsʋ ba kasɛ sʋ mʋ ndee, nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o gyii kanɩn agyitɔ maŋa mʋ, mɛɛ yɛ o wu.

english_verse: I am that bread from heaven! Everyone who eats it will live forever. My flesh is the life-giving bread I give to the people of this world.
translation_verse: Mɛ ɩ gyɛ agyitɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ sa nkpa nɩɩ n kpɩlɩgɛ lɩɩ sʋsʋ ba kasɛ sʋ mʋ. Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o gyii kanɩn agyitɔ nɩmʋ mʋ, ee biti ɔ kyɩna kakpaa. Nɩɩ agyitɔ mʋ nɩɩ n biti n sa dulinyaa tɔ asa kɛ ba nyɛ nkpa mʋ ɩ gyɛ mɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus answered: I tell you for certain that you won't live unless you eat the flesh and drink the blood of the Son of Man.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “N tɔwɛ fanɛ kesintin fɛɛ, fan kan fan man wɛ mɛ, Daadimaadi Obii‐nyɩnsa mʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ, kɛ fen nuu mɛ nkalan de, fɛn mɛɛ yɛ fan nyɛ nkpa.

english_verse: But if you do eat my flesh and drink my blood, you will have eternal life, and I will raise you to life on the last day.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wɛ mɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ, nɩɩ o nuu mɛ nkalan mʋ, ɔ sʋ nkpa kakpaa, nɩɩ n biti n kyiŋi mʋ ba nkpa tɔ kakɛ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: My flesh is the true food, and my blood is the true drink.
translation_verse: Kpalɩ fɛɛ mɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ ɩ gyɛ agyitɔ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ, nɩɩ mɛ nkalan ɩ gyɛ atɔ nuusa gbaa‐gbaa mʋ.

english_verse: If you eat my flesh and drink my blood, you are one with me, and I am one with you.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wɛ mɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ, nɩɩ o nuu mɛ nkalan mʋ, ɔ bʋ mɛ tɔ nɩɩ ngbaa mɛ n bʋ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: The living Father sent me, and I have life because of him. Now everyone who eats my flesh will live because of me.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ nkpa kumu sun mɛ, nɩɩ lɩɩ mʋ sʋ nɩɩ n sʋ nkpa mʋ, ɔkpa kʋlʋn maŋa sʋ, ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wɛ mɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ, ii biti ɔ nyɛ nkpa lɩɩ mɛ sʋ.

english_verse: Jesus was teaching in a synagogue in Capernaum when he said these things. The Words of Eternal Life
translation_verse: Yesu maa bʋ Kapaniyum, Gyiwu abi kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ ɔgyaŋɛkpa ɛɛ kaapʋ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ falɛ asɩn nɩmʋ. Yesu abɩɩlapʋ gaalaagaa ba bwii bamʋ kamaa

english_verse: Many of Jesus' disciples heard him and said, “This is too hard for anyone to understand.”
translation_verse: Yesu abɩɩlapʋ gaalaagaa ba maa nu ɩnɩmʋ mʋ, ba tɔwɛ yɛ, “Falɛ kɩkaapʋ kɩnɩmʋ kɩ bʋlʋn. Anɩmʋ ɩ taalɛ kɔɔlɛ ɩmʋ kyula?”

english_verse: What if you should see the Son of Man go up to heaven where he came from?
translation_verse: Kanɩn bɩrɛ nɩɩ fan kan wu mɛ, Daadimaadi Obii‐nyɩnsa n maa bwii n kpee sʋsʋ katɩn mʋ nɩɩ n lɩɩ ba kasɛ sʋ mʋ mɔɔ de?

english_verse: The Spirit is the one who gives life! Human strength can do nothing. The words that I have spoken to you are from that life-giving Spirit.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ sa nkpa, amaa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ asa ba sʋ bamʋ ɔlʋn bɛɛ waa mʋ man sʋ tɔnɔ. Asɩn mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ sa fanɛ mʋ, ɩ lɩɩ Kayaayu tɔ nɩn nɩɩ ɩɩ sa nkpa.

english_verse: But some of you refuse to have faith in me.” Jesus said this, because from the beginning he knew who would have faith in him. He also knew which one would betray him.
translation_verse: Amaa yɛgɛ fanɛ tɔ akʋ ba mɛɛ kɔɔlɛ bee gyii.” Yesu tɔwɛ kanɩn lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ wʋla o nyi lɩɩ npiili asɛ, bamʋ nɩɩ ba man kɔɔlɛ gyii yɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ee biti ɔ ba lɛɛ mʋ ɛ sa mʋ.

english_verse: Then Jesus said, “You cannot come to me, unless the Father makes you want to come. That is why I have told these things to all of you.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu kyaga sʋ yɛ, “Kpalɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ n wʋla tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ, ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ ba mɛ asɛ mʋ kɩbaa sʋ, amɔɔ Mɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ sa mʋ ɔkpa.”

english_verse: Because of what Jesus said, many of his disciples turned their backs on him and stopped following him.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ kanɩn saŋa maŋa mʋ, nɩɩ mʋ abɩɩlapʋ gaalaagaa ba bwii kamaa, nɩɩ ba man bɩla buu mʋ.

english_verse: Jesus then asked his twelve disciples if they also were going to leave him.
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ nɩɩ Yesu taasɛ mʋ abɩɩlapʋ kudu anyɔ mʋ yɛ, “Fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fen biti fan bwii do?”

english_verse: Simon Peter answered, “Lord, there is no one else that we can go to! Your words give eternal life.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Simon Pita lɛɛ mʋ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, anɩmʋ asɛ nɩɩ an sʋ an kpee? Fʋ nkʋn ɩ sʋ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ sa nyɩmɩsa nkpa kakpaa.

english_verse: We have faith in you, and we are sure that you are God's Holy One.”
translation_verse: An kɔɔlɛ gyii nɩɩ an bɩɩ fɛɛ fʋ nkʋn ɩ gyɛ Ɔkyɩrɛkyɩrɛpʋ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mʋ.”

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples, “I chose all twelve of you, but one of you is a demon!”
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ nɩɩ Yesu lɛɛ bamʋ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Man gyɛ fanɛ kudu anyɔ mʋ, nɩɩ n lɛɛ? Amaa fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ gyɛ Sɩtaanɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus was talking about Judas, the son of Simon Iscariot. He would later betray Jesus, even though he was one of the twelve disciples.
translation_verse: Gyudasi mʋ nɩɩ mʋ‐sɛ ɩ gyɛ Simon Isikariyoti mʋ asɩn nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ mʋ. Halɩɩ Gyudasi maa gyɛ abɩɩlapʋ kudu anyɔ mʋ tɔ ɔkʋ gbaa mʋ, kamaa tɔ mʋ, mʋ ii biti ɔ ba lɛɛ Yesu sa.

english_verse: Jesus decided to leave Judea and to start going through Galilee because the leaders of the people wanted to kill him.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ kpini kamaa mʋ, Yesu naa ɔ naa Galile ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ. Ee mee biti maa loo Gyudeya ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ Gyiwu abi abɩlɩsa bee biti ba mɔɔ mʋ.

english_verse: It was almost time for the Festival of Shelters,
translation_verse: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Gyiwu abi Kesu kɔnɔ abuu kiyii kensi‐gyii a maa tiri tɔ mʋ,

english_verse: and Jesus' brothers said to him, “Why don't you go to Judea? Then your disciples can see what you are doing.
translation_verse: Yesu mu‐supu ana ba tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Ɩ dagaa fʋ maa lɩɩ nfɩɩ kpee Gyudeya, kɛ fu abuupu ba naa wu fʋ asɩn kyinkyinsa mʋ nɩɩ fɩɩ waa mʋ.

english_verse: No one does anything in secret, if they want others to know about them. So let the world know what you are doing!”
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee biti yɛ mʋ kɩtɩɩ ki dii mʋ, ɔ mɛɛ waa mʋ asɩn ɛɛ baala. Lɩɩ asɩn kyinkyinsa mʋ nɩɩ fɩɩ waa falɛ mʋ sʋ mʋ, ɩ dagaa fʋ maa lɛɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ ifuli kaapʋ dulinyaa tɔ asa.”

english_verse: Even Jesus' own brothers had not yet become his followers.
translation_verse: Halɩɩ mu‐supu ana gbaa ba man kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii.

english_verse: Jesus answered, “My time hasn't yet come, but your time is always here.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Mɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa mʋ, man pɩɩ fʋʋ, fanɛɛ fanɛ saŋa kʋmaa bʋrɔn sa fanɛ.

english_verse: The people of this world cannot hate you. They hate me, because I tell them that they do evil things.
translation_verse: Dulinya asa mɛɛ taalɛ kisi fanɛ. Amaa mɛ nɩɩ bee kisi, lɩɩ fɛɛ n gyii bamʋ kesintin fɛɛ bamʋ asunsunsa ɩ gyɛ alibi.

english_verse: Go on to the festival. My time hasn't yet come, and I am not going.”
translation_verse: Fanɛ fanɛ fan kpee kensi‐gyii ngyaŋɛ mʋ tɔ. N mɛɛ yɛ n kpee ngyaŋɛ mʋ tɔ nbɩɩnbɩɩ, lɩɩ fɛɛ mɛ saŋa man pɩɩta fʋʋ.”

english_verse: Jesus said this and stayed on in Galilee. Jesus at the Festival of Shelters
translation_verse: Maa tɔwɛ ɩnɩmʋ maŋa lʋwɛ mʋ o sii kyɩna Galile.

english_verse: After Jesus' brothers had gone to the festival, he went secretly, without telling anyone.
translation_verse: Amaa Yesu mu‐supu ana ba maa lɩɩ kyʋn kensi‐gyii ngyaŋɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ, mʋ gbaa mʋ kpee nɩɩ ɔ man lɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ ifuli.

english_verse: During the festival the leaders of the people looked for Jesus and asked, “Where is he?”
translation_verse: Kensi‐gyii ngyaŋɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ Gyiwu abɩlɩsa mʋ bɛɛ kɩɩ bee biti mʋ, yɛgɛ bɛɛ taasɛ asa yɛ, “Fɩnɛ nɩɩ ɔnyɩn maŋa bʋ?”

english_verse: The crowds even got into an argument about him. Some were saying, “Jesus is a good man,” while others were saying, “He is lying to everyone.”
translation_verse: Sakyɔ mʋ tɔ asa damantɛ bee muni abaa asɛ lɩɩ mʋ sʋ. Akʋ ba yɛ, “Ɔ gyɛ nyɩmɩsa danbɩrasa.” Nɩɩ akʋ mɔɔ ba yɛ, “Ɛɛ pɩna asa nɩn.”

english_verse: But the people were afraid of their leaders, and none of them talked in public about him.
translation_verse: Amaa ɔkʋ man taalɛ lɩɩ ifuli tɔwɛ Yesu n‐yɩɩ sʋ asɩn, lɩɩ fɛɛ ba maa sɩlɛ Gyiwu abɩlɩsa mʋ sʋ. Yesu ɩ kaapʋ kensi‐gyii ngyaŋɛ mʋ tɔ

english_verse: When the festival was about half over, Jesus went into the temple and started teaching.
translation_verse: Ba maa waa kensi‐gyii ngyaŋɛ mʋ naa fʋʋ nsana mʋ, Yesu kpee Kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ mʋ tɔ nɩɩ o piili ɛɛ kaapʋ asɩn.

english_verse: The leaders were surprised and said, “How does this man know so much? He has never been taught!”
translation_verse: Mʋ kɩkaapʋ mʋ i kyinkyin Gyiwu abɩlɩsa mʋ, nɩɩ ba taasɛ yɛ, “Nɛnɛ nɩɩ ɔnyɩn nɩmʋ man bɩɩla nɩɩ ɔ nyɛ falɛ kinyi?”

english_verse: Jesus replied: I am not teaching something I thought up. What I teach comes from the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu lɛɛ bamʋ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Mɛ kɩkaapʋ mʋ man gyɛ mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ lɛɛ. Ɩ lɩɩ ɔmʋ nɩɩ o sun mɛ mʋ asɛ nɩn.

english_verse: If you really want to obey God, you will know if what I teach comes from God or from me.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee biti ɔ waa Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti mʋ, ee biti ɔ bu fɛɛ mɛ kɩkaapʋ mʋ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ, abɛɛ n tɔwɛ mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ ɔlʋn sʋ nɩn.

english_verse: If I wanted to bring honor to myself, I would speak for myself. But I want to honor the one who sent me. This is why I tell the truth and not a lie.
translation_verse: Ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ tɔwɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ ɔlʋn sʋ mʋ, ɩɩ waa kanɩn nɩn ee biti bʋnyaa ɛɛ sa mʋ n‐yɩɩ. Amaa ɔmʋ nɩɩ ee biti bʋnyaa ɛɛ sa ɔmʋ nɩɩ o sun mʋ mʋ, ɩ gyɛ kesintin wuya, nɩɩ antɩŋɛsa kʋ ɩ man bʋ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Didn't Moses give you the Law? Yet none of you obey it! So why do you want to kill me?
translation_verse: Mosesi man sa fanɛ nbara mʋ? Amaa fanɛ ɔkʋ man buu nbara mʋ. Mɩnɛ waa nɩɩ fen biti fan mɔɔ mɛ?”

english_verse: The crowd replied, “You're crazy! What makes you think someone wants to kill you?”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ sakyɔ mʋ ba lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Nbwɩɩ libi ba bʋ fʋ tɔ. Anɩmʋ ana ii biti fʋ kɩmɔɔ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered: I worked one miracle, and it amazed you.
translation_verse: Yesu tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “N maa waa adangana kʋlʋn kakɛ fʋʋtɛsa akɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ɩmʋ i kyinkyin fanɛ falɛ.

english_verse: Moses commanded you to circumcise your sons. But it wasn't really Moses who gave you this command. It was your ancestors, and even on the Sabbath you circumcise your sons
translation_verse: Mosesi sa fanɛ oduu kɩtɩn nbara, yɛgɛ kakɛ fʋʋtɛsa akɛ fɛn tɩn kebii oduu. Kesintin tɔ mʋ nbara mʋ man lɩɩ Mosesi asɛ, amaa ɩ lɩɩ anɛ naana ana asɛ.

english_verse: in order to obey the Law of Moses. Why are you angry with me for making someone completely well on the Sabbath?
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fan maa tɩn kebii oduu kakɛ fʋʋtɛsa akɛ, kɛ i mee nyita Mosesi nbara mʋ, mɩnɛ ɩ waa nɩɩ n kyɛ nyɩmɩsa laalaamuu kakɛ fʋʋtɛsa akɛ nɩɩ fɛn nyɛ agbʋ waa mɛ?

english_verse: Some of the people from Jerusalem were saying, “Isn't this the man they want to kill?
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Gyerusalem asa akʋ ba piili bɛɛ taasɛ yɛ, “Man gyɛ ɔnyɩn nɩmʋ nɩɩ bee biti mʋ yɛ ba mɔɔ mʋ?

english_verse: Yet here he is, speaking for everyone to hear. And no one is arguing with him. Do you suppose the authorities know he is the Messiah?
translation_verse: Fan kɩɩ, mʋ ɩ yɩlɛ asa tɔ ɛɛ tɔwɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔkʋ mɛɛ tɔwɛ mʋ sɛhn. Abɛɛ abɩlɩsa mʋ ba bɩɩ nɩn fɛɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ Krisito, Ɔmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ wʋla lɛɛ mʋ?

english_verse: But how could that be? No one knows where the Messiah will come from, but we know where this man comes from.”
translation_verse: Ɔnyɩn nɩmʋ bɩrɛ an nyi katɩn mʋ nu ɔ lɩɩ. Amaa Krisito, Ɔmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ wʋla lɛɛ mʋ kan ba mʋ, ɔkʋ mɛɛ yɛ ɔ bɩɩ katɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɩɩ.”

english_verse: As Jesus was teaching in the temple, he shouted, “Do you really think you know me and where I came from? I didn't come on my own! The one who sent me is truthful, and you don't know him.
translation_verse: Yesu maa san ɔ bʋ Kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa obu lala tɔ ɛɛ kaapʋ, nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ kenken yɛ, “Kesintin, fan nyi mɛ, nɩɩ fan nyi katɩn mʋ nɩɩ n lɩɩ. Man gyɛ mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ ɔlʋn sʋ nɩɩ n ba nfɩɩ, amaa ɔmʋ nɩɩ o sun mɛ mʋ gyɛ kesintin wuya nɩɩ fanɛɛ fanɛ fan man nyi mʋ.

english_verse: But I know the one who sent me, because I came from him.”
translation_verse: Amaa mɛɛ mɛ n nyi mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ n lɩɩ mʋ asɛ, nɩɩ mʋ i sun mɛ.”

english_verse: Some of the people wanted to arrest Jesus right then. But no one even laid a hand on him, because his time had not yet come.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ ba biti yɛ ba kɩtaa mʋ, amaa ɔkʋ man taa mʋ kɩbaa mata mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ mʋ saŋa man pɩɩta fʋʋ.

english_verse: A lot of people in the crowd put their faith in him and said, “When the Messiah comes, he surely won't perform more miracles than this man has done!” Officers Sent To Arrest Jesus
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ kpini gbaa mʋ asa gaalaagaa ba kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii sakyɔ mʋ tɔ. Nɩɩ bɛɛ taasɛ yɛ, “Nɩɩ Krisito, Ɔmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ wʋla lɛɛ mʋ kan ba mʋ, ee biti ɔ taalɛ waa asɩn kyinkyinsa ɔ kyɔ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɔnyɩn nɩmʋ waa falɛ?”

english_verse: When the Pharisees heard the crowd arguing about Jesus, they got together with the chief priests and sent some temple police to arrest him.
translation_verse: Farasii abi mʋ ba nu sakyɔ mʋ ba maa muni falɛ asɩn lɩɩ mʋ sʋ. Nɩɩ ba maa Oseepu bɩlɩsa mʋ ba sun Kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa obu lala akɩɩsʋpʋ yɛ ba naa kɩtaa mʋ ba.

english_verse: But Jesus told them, “I will be with you a little while longer, and then I will return to the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “N mɛɛ yɛ n bɩla n kyɩna fanɛ asɛ kyɛɛrɛɛ, kɛ n bwii kpee ɔmʋ nɩɩ o sun mɛ mʋ asɛ.

english_verse: You will look for me, but you won't find me. You cannot go where I am going.”
translation_verse: Fen biti fan kɩɩ biti mɛ amaa fan mɛɛ yɛ fan wu mɛ, nɩɩ katɩn mʋ nɩɩ n bʋ mʋ, fan mɛɛ taalɛ ba tʋtɔ.”

english_verse: The people asked each other, “Where can he go to keep us from finding him? Is he going to some foreign country where our people live? Is he going there to teach the Greeks?
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Gyiwu abɩlɩsa mʋ bɛɛ taasɛ abaa yɛ, “Fɩnɛ nɩɩ kanyɩn nɩmʋ ii biti o kpee nɩɩ a man bɩla yɛ a wu mʋ? Ee biti o kpee Giriki abi tɔ, katɩn mʋ nɩɩ anɛ asa ba yaasɛ loo, kɛ ɔ naa kaapʋ Giriki abi mʋ abɛɛ?

english_verse: What did he mean by saying that we will look for him, but won't find him? Why can't we go where he is going?” Streams of Life-Giving Water
translation_verse: Maa tɔwɛ yɛ, ‘Fen biti fan biti mɛ amaa fan mɛɛ yɛ fan wu mɛ, nɩɩ katɩn mʋ nɩɩ n bʋ mʋ fan mɛɛ taalɛ ba tʋtɔ mʋ’ mɩnɛ nɩɩ ɛɛ kaapʋ?”

english_verse: On the last and most important day of the festival, Jesus stood up and shouted, “If you are thirsty, come to me and drink!
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kakɛ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ kakɛ kparɛ kensi‐gyii mʋ tɔ mʋ, Yesu kʋsʋ yɩlɛ nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ kenken yɛ, “Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ bʋlɩfɔ kan ɔ sʋ mʋ mʋ, ɔ ba mɛ asɛ ba nuu nkyu.

english_verse: Have faith in me, and you will have life-giving water flowing from deep inside you, just as the Scriptures say.”
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ mɛ gyii mʋ, nkyu mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ sa nkpa mʋ ii biti ɩ baa ɩ lɩɩ mʋ tɔ ɩɩ kyʋn fɛɛ ɔbʋn, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ mʋ.”

english_verse: Jesus was talking about the Holy Spirit, who would be given to everyone that had faith in him. The Spirit had not yet been given to anyone, since Jesus had not yet been given his full glory. The People Take Sides
translation_verse: Nkyu mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ sa nkpa asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ nfɩɩ mʋ, yɩlɛ sa Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ, nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii mʋ, bee biti ba ba nyɛ. Saŋa maŋa tɔ mʋ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ man pɩɩ ba, lɩɩ fɛɛ Yesu bʋnyaa man pɩɩta lɩɩ ifuli.

english_verse: When the crowd heard Jesus say this, some of them said, “He must be the Prophet!”
translation_verse: Sakyɔ mʋ ba maa nu maa tɔwɛ falɛ asɩn mʋ, bamʋ akʋ ba tɔwɛ yɛ, “Kesintin tɔ, ɔnyɩn nɩmʋ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔtɔwɛpʋ mʋ.”

english_verse: Others said, “He is the Messiah!” Others even said, “Can the Messiah come from Galilee?
translation_verse: Akʋ ba yɛ, “Mʋ ɩ gyɛ Krisito mʋ.” Nɩɩ akʋ mɔɔ ba taasɛ yɛ, “Nɛnɛ nɩɩ Krisito ii biti ɔ lɩɩ Galile?

english_verse: The Scriptures say that the Messiah will come from the family of King David. Doesn't this mean that he will be born in David's hometown of Bethlehem?”
translation_verse: Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ Krisito ii biti ɔ lɩɩ Owura Dawidi kanan tɔ, kɛ ba kʋʋgɛ mʋ Betilehem kadɛ tɔ katɩn mʋ nɩɩ Owura Dawidi daa kyɩna mʋ”

english_verse: The people started taking sides against each other because of Jesus.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ kanɩn sʋ nbarɩgɛ tɔ ɩ ba sakyɔ mʋ tɔ lɩɩ Yesu sʋ.

english_verse: Some of them wanted to arrest him, but no one laid a hand on him. The Leaders Refuse To Have Faith in Jesus
translation_verse: Nɩɩ bamʋ akʋ bee biti ba kɩtaa mʋ, amaa ɔkʋ man taa kɩbaa mata mʋ. Gyiwu abɩlɩsa ba man sʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii

english_verse: When the temple police returned to the chief priests and Pharisees, they were asked, “Why didn't you bring Jesus here?”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa akɩɩsʋpʋ mʋ ba bwii kpee Ɩbwaarɛ aseepu abɩlɩsa yɛ Farasii abi mʋ asɛ, nɩɩ ba taasɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Mɩnɛ waa nɩɩ fan man kɩtaa mʋ ba?”

english_verse: They answered, “No one has ever spoken like this man!”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ akɩɩsʋpʋ mʋ ba lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Nyɩmɩsa kʋ man pɩɩta tɔwɛ asɩn fɛɛ ɔnyɩn nɩmʋ.”

english_verse: The Pharisees said to them, “Have you also been fooled?
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Farasii abi mʋ ba taasɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Ɩmʋ sʋ ɔ bɩla pɩna fanɛ gbaa fanɛ?

english_verse: Not one of the chief priests or the Pharisees has faith in him.
translation_verse: Fan wu kadɛ nɩmʋ tɔ abɩlɩsa abɛɛ Farasii abi mʋ tɔ ɔkʋ maa kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii? Ayee!

english_verse: Nicodemus was there at the time. He was a member of the council, and was the same one who had earlier come to see Jesus. He said,
translation_verse: Nikodemusi mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wʋla ba Yesu asɛ kakaakʋ, nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ bamʋ abɩlɩsa mʋ tɔ ɔkʋ mʋ, taasɛ bamʋ yɛ,

english_verse: “Our Law doesn't let us condemn people before we hear what they have to say. We cannot judge them before we know what they have done.”
translation_verse: “Anɛ nbara ɩɩ sa ɔkpa fɛɛ a taalɛ bun nyɩmɩsa kʋpwɛ yɛgɛ a man nu mʋ kɔnɔ tɔ asɩn wu kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa?”

english_verse: Then they said, “Nicodemus, you must be from Galilee! Read the Scriptures, and you will find that no prophet is to come from Galilee.” A Woman Caught in Sin
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba lɛɛ mʋ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Ngbaa fʋ, fʋ lɩɩ Galile nɩn? Kɩɩ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ danbɩrasa, fii biti fu wu fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔtɔwɛpʋ kʋ man lɩɩ Galile.”

english_verse: but Jesus walked out to the Mount of Olives.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ maa kyʋn mʋ ayɛ mʋ, nɩɩ Yesu lɩɩ tʋtɔ kpee Olifu kɩbɩɩ mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: Then early the next morning he went to the temple. The people came to him, and he sat down and started teaching them.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ lɩɩkaakɛ nyenyenfuu mʋ, Yesu bwii ba Kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa obu lala mʋ tɔ. Nɩɩ asa ba ba yɩlɛ kyaabɔɔ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ kyʋn kyɩna nɩɩ o piili ɛɛ kaapʋ bamʋ.

english_verse: The Pharisees and the teachers of the Law of Moses brought in a woman who had been caught in bed with a man who wasn't her husband. They made her stand in the middle of the crowd.
translation_verse: Maa bʋ tʋtɔ mʋ, nɩɩ nbara akaapʋpʋ yɛ Farasii abi ba bɩya ɔkyɩɩ kilipu kʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba kɩtaa mʋ maa ɔnyɩn. Nɩɩ ba taa mʋ ba yɩlɛ bamʋ nsana.

english_verse: Then they said, “Teacher, this woman was caught sleeping with a man who isn't her husband.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba tɔwɛ Yesu yɛ, “Ɔkaapʋpʋ, ba kɩtaa ɔkyɩɩ nɩmʋ maa ɔnyɩn.

english_verse: The Law of Moses teaches that a woman like this should be stoned to death! What do you say?”
translation_verse: Mosesi nbara mʋ ɩɩ kaapʋ anɛ yɛ a tʋʋ abuu mɔɔ kanɩn akyɩɩ maŋa. Nbɩɩnbɩɩ, nɛnɛ nɩɩ fʋ sʋ fɩɩ tɔwɛ.”

english_verse: They asked Jesus this question, because they wanted to test him and bring some charge against him. But Jesus simply bent over and started writing on the ground with his finger.
translation_verse: Ba taasɛ mʋ asɩn nɩmʋ kɛ ba nu mʋ kɔnɔ tɔ alibi, kɛ ba nyɛ yɩlɛ ɩmʋ sʋ pwɩɩ mʋ. Amaa Yesu nyɔn mu kumu yii tɔ, taa mʋ kɩbaa‐bi ɛɛ kyʋrɔɔ kasɛ.

english_verse: They kept on asking Jesus about the woman. Finally, he stood up and said, “If any of you have never sinned, then go ahead and throw the first stone at her!”
translation_verse: Ba maa maa sʋ bɛɛ taasɛ mʋ mʋ, ɔ kʋsaa mu kumu nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Nɩɩ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man pɩɩta waa alibi mʋ, ɔ gyankpaa tʋʋ kubuu da ɔkyɩɩ mʋ.”

english_verse: Once again he bent over and began writing on the ground.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ o bwii nyɔn mu kumu yii tɔ ɛɛ kyʋrɔɔ kasɛ.

english_verse: The people left one by one, beginning with the oldest. Finally, Jesus and the woman were there alone.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba maa nu kanɩn mʋ, ba piili bɛɛ lɩɩ kʋkʋlʋn‐kʋkʋlʋn. Abɩlɩsa mʋ ba gyankpaa lɩɩ pɔyɩ. Nɩɩ ɩ san Yesu maa ɔkyɩɩ mʋ nkʋn yɛgɛ ɔ yɩlɛ tʋtɔ.

english_verse: Jesus stood up and asked her, “Where is everyone? Isn't there anyone left to accuse you?”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu kusaa mu kumu nɩɩ ɔ taasɛ ɔkyɩɩ mʋ yɛ, “Ɔkyɩɩ, ba bʋ fɩnɛ? Ɔkʋ man bʋ tɔ kɛ o bun fʋ kʋpwɛ fʋ?”

english_verse: “No sir,” the woman answered. Then Jesus told her, “I am not going to accuse you either. You may go now, but don't sin anymore.” Jesus Is the Light for the World
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, ayee, ɔkʋ man bʋ tɔ.” Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Ngbaa mɛ mɛɛ yɛ n bun fʋ kʋpwɛ. Natɛ, lɩɩ ndaga ɩɩ sʋ ii kpee man bɩla naa waa alibi.” Yesu gyɛ dulinyaa tɔ ɩŋmaŋɛsa

english_verse: Once again Jesus spoke to the people. This time he said, “I am the light for the world! Follow me, and you won't be walking in the dark. You will have the light that gives life.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu bwii tɔwɛ Farasii abi mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ tʋtɔ mʋ yɛ, “Mɛ ɩ gyɛ dulinyaa tɔ ɩŋmaŋɛsa mʋ. Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o buu mɛ mʋ, mɛɛ yɛ ɔ natɛ kitentenbiri tɔ, amaa ee biti ɔ nyɛ ɩŋmaŋɛsa mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ sa nkpa mʋ.”

english_verse: The Pharisees objected, “You are the only one speaking for yourself, and what you say isn't true!”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Farasii abi mʋ ba tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Nbɩɩnbɩɩ, fii gyii fʋ gbaa‐gbaa fʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ kesintin nɩn, ɩmʋ sʋ a mɛɛ yɛ a taalɛ kɔɔlɛ fu gyii.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: Even if I do speak for myself, what I say is true! I know where I came from and where I am going. But you don't know where I am from or where I am going.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Halɩɩ nɩɩ n gyii mɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ kesintin gbaa mʋ, mɛ asɩn mʋ ɩ gyɛ kesintin. Lɩɩ fɛɛ n nyi katɩn mʋ nɩɩ n lɩɩ nɩɩ n nyi katɩn mʋ nɩɩ n kpee. Amaa fanɛɛ fanɛ bɩrɛ, fan man nyi katɩn mʋ nɩɩ n lɩɩ, nɩɩ fan man nyi katɩn mʋ nɩɩ n kpee.

english_verse: You judge in the same way that everyone else does, but I don't judge anyone.
translation_verse: Fanɛ bɩrɛ, nyɩmɩsa ɩkpa sʋ nɩɩ fɛn yɩlɛ sʋ fen gyii asɩn. Mɛɛ mɛ bɩrɛ n mee gyii ɔkʋ asɩn.

english_verse: If I did judge, I would judge fairly, because I would not be doing it alone. The Father who sent me is here with me.
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ n kan gyii asɩn mʋ, mɛ asɩn kigyii kɩ dɛ ɔkpa, lɩɩ fɛɛ man gyɛ mɛ nkʋn ii gyii asɩn mʋ. Amaa maa Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ nɩɩ o sun mɛ mʋ.

english_verse: I am one of my witnesses, and the Father who sent me is the other one.
translation_verse: Mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ ii gyii mɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ kesintin, nɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ nɩɩ o sun mɛ mʋ gbaa ii gyii mɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ kesintin.”

english_verse: “Where is your Father?” they asked. “You don't know me or my Father!” Jesus answered. “If you knew me, you would know my Father.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba taasɛ mʋ yɛ, “Fʋ‐sɛ bʋ fɩnɛ?” Nɩɩ Yesu lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Fan man nyi mɛ, nɩɩ fan man nyi Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ gbaa. Nɩɩ fan daa fan nyi mɛ nɩn, naafɔɔ fan bɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ gbaa.”

english_verse: Jesus said this while he was still teaching in the place where the temple treasures were stored. But no one arrested him, because his time had not yet come. You Cannot Go Where I Am Going
translation_verse: Yesu tɔwɛ asɩn nɩmʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kaapʋ asɩn Kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ mʋ, katɩn mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ yɛ afulee ɔyɩlɛkpa mʋ. Amaa ɔkʋ man kɩtaa mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ mʋ saŋa man pɩɩta fʋʋ.

english_verse: Jesus also told them, “I am going away, and you will look for me. But you cannot go where I am going, and you will die with your sins unforgiven.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu bwii tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “N kpee nɩmʋ. Nɩɩ fen biti fan kɩɩ biti mɛ, kɛ fan wu fanɛ alibi tɔ. Nɩɩ katɩn mʋ nɩɩ n kpee mʋ fɛn mɛɛ taalɛ ba tʋtɔ.”

english_verse: The people asked, “Does he intend to kill himself? Is that what he means by saying we cannot go where he is going?”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Gyiwu abi mʋ bɛɛ taasɛ abaa yɛ, “Maa tɔwɛ yɛ, ‘Katɩn mʋ nɩɩ n kpee mʋ fɛn mɛɛ taalɛ ba tʋtɔ’ mʋ, ee biti ɔ mɔɔ mʋ n‐yɩɩ nɩn abɛɛ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “You are from below, but I am from above. You belong to this world, but I don't.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔ kyaga sʋ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Fan lɩɩ kasɛ sʋ nfɩɩ nɩn, mɛɛ mɛ n lɩɩ sʋsʋ. Nɩɩ fan gyɛ dulinyaa nɩmʋ lɛɛ nɩn, mɛɛ mɛ bɩrɛ n man gyɛ dulinyaa nɩmʋ lɛɛ.

english_verse: This is why I said you will die with your sins unforgiven. If you don't have faith in me for who I am, you will die, and your sins will not be forgiven.”
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ, fen biti fan wu fanɛ alibi tɔ mʋ. Nɩɩ fan man kan kɔɔlɛ mɛ gyii yɛ, mɛ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ yɛ n gyɛ mʋ, fen biti fan wu fanɛ alibi tɔ kesintin.”

english_verse: “Who are you?” they asked Jesus. Jesus answered, “I am exactly who I told you at the beginning.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba taasɛ mʋ yɛ, “Fʋ ɩ gyɛ anɩmʋ?” Nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Mɛ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ n dan wʋla n tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ n gyɛ mʋ.

english_verse: There is a lot more I could say to condemn you. But the one who sent me is truthful, and I tell the people of this world only what I have heard from him.”
translation_verse: N sʋ asɩn gaa n tɔwɛ lɩɩ fanɛ sʋ, kɛ n taa gyii fanɛ asɩn. Amaa ɔmʋ nɩɩ o sun mɛ mʋ gyɛ kesintin wuya, nɩɩ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ n nu lɩɩ mʋ asɛ mʋ nkʋn nɩɩ n tɔwɛ n sa dulinyaa abi.”

english_verse: No one understood that Jesus was talking to them about the Father.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ kpini gbaa mʋ ba man pɩɩta bɩɩ fɛɛ Mʋ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn nɩɩ ɛɛ tɔwɛ bamʋ.

english_verse: Jesus went on to say, “When you have lifted up the Son of Man, you will know who I am. You will also know that I don't do anything on my own. I say only what my Father taught me.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ Yesu tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Nɩɩ fan kan ba kʋsaa mɛ, Daadimaadi Obii‐nyɩnsa mʋ sʋsʋ mʋ, tʋtɔ nɩɩ fen biti fan bɩɩ fɛɛ n gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ n wʋla tɔwɛ yɛ n gyɛ mʋ, nɩɩ n mɛɛ waa kʋtɔ kʋ mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ ɔlʋn sʋ, amaa asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ kaapʋ mɛ mʋ, ɩmʋ nɩɩ n sʋ n tɔwɛ.

english_verse: The one who sent me is with me. I always do what pleases him, and he will never leave me.”
translation_verse: Ɔmʋ nɩɩ o sun mɛ mʋ bʋ mɛ asɛ, ɔ man yɛgɛ mɛ nkʋn, lɩɩ fɛɛ saŋa kʋmaa n waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ pɩrɛ mʋ.”

english_verse: After Jesus said this, many of the people put their faith in him. The Truth Will Set You Free
translation_verse: Nɩɩ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba nu Yesu maa tɔwɛ ɩnɩmʋ kpini mʋ gaalaagaa ba kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii. Bamʋ nɩɩ ba gyɛ Abraham mu‐bii ana gbaa‐gbaa mʋ

english_verse: Jesus told the people who had faith in him, “If you keep on obeying what I have said, you truly are my disciples.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ nɩɩ ba kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii mʋ yɛ, “Nɩɩ fan kan fan buu mɛ asɩn kaapʋsa mʋ, fan gyɛ mɛ abɩɩlapʋ kesintin tɔ.

english_verse: You will know the truth, and the truth will set you free.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fen biti fan bɩɩ kesintin mʋ, kɛ kesintin mʋ ɔ yɛgɛ fan nyɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ.”

english_verse: They answered, “We are Abraham's children! We have never been anyone's slaves. How can you say we will be set free?”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “An gyɛ Abraham kɩnaana tɔ asa nɩn. Nɩɩ anɛɛnɛ bɩrɛ, kakaakʋ a man pɩɩta waa ɔkʋ kɩnyɛ. Nɩɩ mɩnɛ sʋ nɩɩ fɩɩ tɔwɛ yɛ an biti a nyɛ anɛ n‐yɩɩ?”

english_verse: Jesus replied: I tell you for certain that anyone who sins is a slave of sin!
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “N tɔwɛ fanɛ kesintin, ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa alibi mʋ gyɛ kɩnyɛ sa alibi nɩn.

english_verse: And slaves don't stay in the family forever, though the Son will always remain in the family.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kɩnyɛ man gyɛ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ o tii kɩkpaara abi sʋ, amaa obii bɩrɛ gyɛ kɩkpaara mʋ sʋ obii kakpaa.

english_verse: I know that you are from Abraham's family. Yet you want to kill me, because my message isn't really in your hearts.
translation_verse: N nyi fan maa gyɛ Abraham anaana‐bii. Amaa ɩnɩmʋ kpini gbaa mʋ, fen biti fɛɛ fan mɔɔ mɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fɛn mɛɛ kɔɔlɛ mɛ asɩn mʋ fɛn waa fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ.

english_verse: I am telling you what my Father has shown me, just as you are doing what your father has taught you. Your Father Is the Devil
translation_verse: Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ kaapʋ mɛ mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ fanɛ falɛ. Nɩɩ fanɛɛ fanɛ fɛn waa atɔ mʋ nɩɩ fan nu lɩɩ fanɛ‐sɛ asɛ.”

english_verse: The people said to Jesus, “Abraham is our father!” Jesus replied, “If you were Abraham's children, you would do what Abraham did.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Anɛ‐sɛ ɩ gyɛ Abraham.” Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Fan daa fan gyɛ Abraham mu‐bii ana kesintin tɔ nɩn, naafɔɔ fen biti fan waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa mʋ.

english_verse: Instead, you want to kill me for telling you the truth that God gave me. Abraham never did anything like that.
translation_verse: Amaa n maa tɔwɛ fanɛ kesintin mʋ nɩɩ n nu lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ gbaa mʋ, fen biti fan mɔɔ mɛ. Abraham man waa falɛ atɔ.

english_verse: But you are doing exactly what your father does.” “Don't accuse us of having someone else as our father!” they said. “We just have one father, and he is God.”
translation_verse: Atɔ mʋ nɩɩ fanɛ‐sɛ waa mʋ, nɩɩ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fɛn waa.” Nɩɩ ba lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “A man gyɛ akuyurubi, ɔsɛ kʋlʋn nɩɩ an sʋ, mʋ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ.” Bamʋ nɩɩ ba gyɛ Sɩtaanɛ abi ana

english_verse: Jesus answered: If God were your Father, you would love me, because I came from God and now I am here. He sent me. I did not come on my own.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Ɩbwaarɛ daa ɔ gyɛ fanɛ‐Sɛ nɩn, naafɔɔ fen biti fan nyɛ kebiti sa mɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ n lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ nɩn, nɩɩ n ba nfɩɩ. Man gyɛ mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ ɔlʋn sʋ nɩɩ n ba, amaa mʋ i sun mɛ.

english_verse: Why can't you understand what I am talking about? Can't you stand to hear what I am saying?
translation_verse: Nɩɩ mɩnɛ waa sʋ nɩɩ fen mee nu mɛ asɩn tɔwɛsa mʋ kasɛ? Lɩɩ fɛɛ fɛn mɛɛ taalɛ fen nu mɛ asɩn mʋ.

english_verse: Your father is the devil, and you do exactly what he wants. He has always been a murderer and a liar. There is nothing truthful about him. He speaks on his own, and everything he says is a lie. Not only is he a liar himself, but he is also the father of all lies.
translation_verse: Fan gyɛ fanɛ‐sɛ Sɩtaanɛ mu‐bii ana nɩn, ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ fen biti fan waa fanɛ‐sɛ mʋ kɔkɔlɔ biti. Lɩɩ npiili asɛ mʋ kpini nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ ɔmɔɔpʋ, nɩɩ ɔ man buu kesintin, lɩɩ fɛɛ kesintin man bʋ mʋ tɔ. Mʋ lɛɛ kpini ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ ɔ tɔwɛ antɩŋɛsa, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ gyɛ antɩŋɛsa wuya, yɛ antɩŋɛsa wuya ana bamʋ‐sɛ.

english_verse: Everything I have told you is true, and you still refuse to have faith in me.
translation_verse: Amaa mɛɛ mɛ bɩrɛ n gyii fanɛ kesintin nɩn, ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ fɛɛ mɛɛ kɔɔlɛ mɛ fen gyii.

english_verse: Can any of you accuse me of sin? If you cannot, why won't you have faith in me? After all, I am telling you the truth.
translation_verse: Fanɛ tɔ anɩmʋ ɩ taalɛ kaapʋ fɛɛ n gyii alibi kʋpwɛ? Nɩɩ n maa tɔwɛ kesintin mʋ, mɩnɛ waa nɩɩ fɛn mɛɛ kɔɔlɛ fen gyii?

english_verse: Anyone who belongs to God will listen to his message. But you refuse to listen, because you don't belong to God. Jesus and Abraham
translation_verse: Ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mʋ, ii nu asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ. Kʋtɔ mʋ sʋ nɩɩ fen mee nu Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ fan man gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ.” Kanan mʋ nɩɩ Yesu kyɔ Abraham

english_verse: The people told Jesus, “We were right to say that you are a Samaritan and that you have a demon in you!”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Gyiwu abi mʋ mɔɔ ba tɔwɛ Yesu yɛ, “Nɩɩ a maa tɔwɛ yɛ fʋ gyɛ Kasamariya‐nyɩn nɩɩ nbwɩɩ libi ba tɛ fʋ tɔ mʋ, ɩ man gyɛ kesintin?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “I don't have a demon in me. I honor my Father, and you refuse to honor me.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ “Nbwɩɩ libi akʋ ba man tɛ mɛ tɔ, amaa n bʋnyaa mɛ‐Sɛ, yɛgɛ fanɛɛ fanɛ fɛn mɛɛ bʋnyaa mɛ.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that if you obey my words, you will never die.”
translation_verse: N tɔwɛ fanɛ kesintin yɛ, ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o buu mɛ kɩkaapʋ mʋ, ɔ mɛɛ yɛ o wu kakaakʋ.”

english_verse: Then the people said, “Now we are sure that you have a demon. Abraham is dead, and so are the prophets. How can you say that no one who obeys your words will ever die?
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Gyiwu abi mʋ ba tɔwɛ yɛ, “Nbɩɩnbɩɩ an wu kesintin tɔ fɛɛ nbwɩɩ libi ba bʋ fʋ tɔ. Abraham wu, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ atɔwɛpʋ mʋ gbaa ba wu. Amaa fʋ, fʋ tɔwɛ yɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o buu fʋ kɩkaapʋ mʋ ɔ mɛɛ yɛ o wu.

english_verse: Are you greater than our father Abraham? He died, and so did the prophets. Who do you think you are?”
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fii biti fʋ kaapʋ fɛɛ fʋ kyɔ anɛ‐sɛ Abraham abɛɛ? O wu, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ atɔwɛpʋ mʋ gbaa ba wu. Anɩmʋ nɩɩ fɩɩ fɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ fʋ gyɛ?”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “If I honored myself, it would mean nothing. My Father is the one who honors me. You claim that he is your God,
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Nɩɩ n kan sa mɛ n‐yɩɩ bʋnyaa mʋ, mɛ bʋnyaa mʋ gyɛ kɩyan. Amaa mɛ‐Sɛ, mʋ nɩɩ fɛn tɔwɛ yɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ fanɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ bʋnyaa mɛ.

english_verse: even though you don't really know him. If I said I didn't know him, I would be a liar, just like all of you. But I know him, and I do what he says.
translation_verse: Fan man nyi mʋ, mɛɛ mɛ bɩrɛ n nyi mʋ. Nɩɩ n kan n tɔwɛ yɛ n man n nyi mʋ mʋ, n gyɛ antɩŋɛsa wuya fɛɛ fanɛ, amaa n nyi mʋ, nɩɩ n nu mʋ asɛ.

english_verse: Jesus answered, “I tell you for certain that even before Abraham was, I was, and I am.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “N tɔwɛ fanɛ kesintin yɛ, pɔyɩ kɛ ba kʋʋgɛ Abraham mʋ, yɛgɛ n bʋ tɔ.”

english_verse: The people picked up stones to kill Jesus, but he hid and left the temple.
translation_verse: Ba maa nu falɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ba kukuri abuu yɛ ba tʋʋ mʋ. Amaa Yesu loo asa mʋ tɔ bʋlɛ, nɩɩ ɔ lɩɩ Kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ mʋ tɔ kyʋn.

english_verse: As Jesus walked along, he saw a man who had been blind since birth.
translation_verse: Yesu maa naa ɛɛ kyʋn mʋ, o wu ɔnyɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ gyaatanapʋ lɩɩ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ba kʋʋgɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Jesus' disciples asked, “Teacher, why was this man born blind? Was it because he or his parents sinned?”
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ nɩɩ Yesu abɩɩlapʋ ba taasɛ mʋ yɛ, “Ɔkaapʋpʋ, mɩnɛ sʋ nɩɩ ba kʋʋgɛ ɔnyɩn nɩmʋ gyaatanapʋ? Mʋ gbaa‐gbaa alibi sʋ abɛɛ mʋ akʋʋgɛpʋ alibi sʋ?”

english_verse: As long as it is day, we must do what the one who sent me wants me to do. When night comes, no one can work.
translation_verse: Kyɔwɛ maa dan san ɔ bʋ tɔ falɛ bɩrɛ, ɩ dagaa a maa waa ɔmʋ nɩɩ o sun mɛ mu kusun. Kyɔwɛ ii biti ɔ lʋwɛ yɛgɛ ɔkʋ mɛɛ bɩla taalɛ sun kusun.

english_verse: While I am in the world, I am the light for the world.”
translation_verse: N maa dan san n bʋ dulinyaa tɔ falɛ bɩrɛ, mɛ ɩ gyɛ dulinyaa tɔ ɩŋmaŋɛsa mʋ.”

english_verse: After Jesus said this, he spit on the ground. He made some mud and smeared it on the man's eyes.
translation_verse: Yesu maa tɔwɛ ɩnɩmʋ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ tʋʋ nkyɔlɛ tʋʋ kasɛ nɩɩ ɔ palɛ ɩsɛ, taa tayɩ ɔnyɩn mu ansi sʋ.

english_verse: Then he said, “Go wash off the mud in Siloam Pool.” The man went and washed in Siloam, which means “One Who Is Sent.” When he had washed off the mud, he could see.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ ɔnyɩn mʋ yɛ, “Kpe Silom kapatɩyɛ mʋ tɔ naa fwɩɩ fu ansi.” . Ɔnyɩn mʋ maa naa fwɩɩ mu ansi bwii ba mʋ, mu ansi mʋ a bugi.

english_verse: The man's neighbors and the people who had seen him begging wondered if he really could be the same man.
translation_verse: Mʋ bɩrɩsa ana yɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba wʋla be nyi mʋ maa kyɩna ɔkpa asɛ ɛɛ kʋlɛ mʋ, bɛɛ taasɛ abaa yɛ, “Man gyɛ ɔnyɩn nɩmʋ ɩɩ kyɩna ɔkpa asɛ ɛɛ kʋlɛ mʋ?”

english_verse: Some of them said he was the same beggar, while others said he only looked like him. But he told them, “I am that man.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ bamʋ akʋ ba yɛ, “Mʋ nɩn.” Nɩɩ akʋ mɔɔ ba yɛ, “Man gyɛ mʋ nɩn, o duli mʋ nɩn.” Amaa ɔnyɩn mʋ gbaa‐gbaa tɔwɛ yɛ, “Mɛ nɩn.”

english_verse: “Then how can you see?” they asked.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba taasɛ mʋ yɛ, “Ɩ waa nɛnɛ nɩɩ fu ansi i bugi?”

english_verse: He answered, “Someone named Jesus made some mud and smeared it on my eyes. He told me to go and wash it off in Siloam Pool. When I did, I could see.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ bamʋ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Ɔnyɩn mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ mʋ yɛ Yesu mʋ, ɩ palɛ ɩsɛ tayɩ mi ansi sʋ. Nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ mɛ yɛ n kpee Silom kapatɩyɛ mʋ tɔ naa fwɩɩ mi ansi. Ɩmʋ sʋ n kpee tʋtɔ naa fwɩɩ mi ansi, nɩɩ opula maŋa tɔ nɩɩ mi ansi i bugi.”

english_verse: “Where is he now?” they asked. “I don't know,” he answered. The Pharisees Try To Find Out What Happened
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba taasɛ mʋ yɛ, “Ɔnyɩn mʋ bʋ fɩnɛ?” Nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “N man nyi.” Farasii abi ba taasɛ gyaatanapʋ mʋ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ nyɛ kɩkyɛ

english_verse: The day when Jesus made the mud and healed the man was a Sabbath. So the people took the man to the Pharisees.
translation_verse: Kanɩn kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ Yesu palɛ ɩsɛ tayɩ kanɩn ɔnyɩn ansi sʋ mʋ, gyɛ kakɛ fʋʋtɛsa nɩn.

english_verse: They asked him how he was able to see, and he answered, “Jesus made some mud and smeared it on my eyes. Then after I washed it off, I could see.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Farasii abi mʋ mɔɔ ba taasɛ mʋ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ waa nɩɩ mu ansi i bugi. Nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Ɔ palɛ ɩsɛ nɩn tayɩ mi ansi sʋ, nɩɩ n naa fwɩɩ, nɩɩ mi ansi i bugi.”

english_verse: Some of the Pharisees said, “This man Jesus doesn't come from God. If he did, he would not break the law of the Sabbath.” Others asked, “How could someone who is a sinner work such a miracle?” Since the Pharisees could not agree among themselves,
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ nɩɩ Farasii abi mʋ akʋ ba yɛ, “Ɔnyɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa kanɩn asɩn maŋa mʋ, man lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ o mee buu kakɛ fʋʋtɛsa nbara mʋ.” Amaa akʋ mɔɔ ba yɛ, “Nɛnɛ nɩɩ alibi ɔwaapʋ ɩ taalɛ waa asɩn kyinkyinsa falɛ kudubi?” Nɩɩ nbarɩgɛ ɩ ba bamʋ nsana.

english_verse: they asked the man, “What do you say about this one who healed your eyes?” “He is a prophet!” the man told them.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ kpini kamaa mʋ, Farasii abi mʋ ba bwii taasɛ ɔnyɩn mʋ yɛ, “Ɔnyɩn mʋ nɩɩ o bugi fu ansi mʋ, mɩnɛ asɩn nɩɩ fʋ sʋ fʋ tɔwɛ lɩɩ mʋ sʋ?” Nɩɩ ɔnyɩn mʋ lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Ɔ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔtɔwɛpʋ nɩn.”

english_verse: But the Jewish leaders would not believe that the man had once been blind. They sent for his parents
translation_verse: Gyiwu abɩlɩsa mʋ be mee biti ba kɔɔlɛ gyii fɛɛ ɔ wʋla ɔ gyɛ gyaatanapʋ, nɩɩ mu ansi i bugi, ɩmʋ sʋ ba sun tɩɩ mʋ akʋʋgɛpʋ.

english_verse: and asked them, “Is this the son that you said was born blind? How can he now see?”
translation_verse: Ba maa ba mʋ, ba taasɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Fanɛ‐bii‐nyɩnsa ndee? Fan yɛ fan kʋʋgɛ mʋ gyaatanapʋ nɩn, nɛnɛ ɩ waa sʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ?”

english_verse: The man's parents answered, “We are certain that he is our son, and we know that he was born blind.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ mʋ akʋʋgɛpʋ ba lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “An nyi maa gyɛ anɛ‐bii‐nyɩnsa nɩn, nɩɩ an kʋʋgɛ mʋ gyaatanapʋ nɩn.

english_verse: But we don't know how he got his sight or who gave it to him. Ask him! He is old enough to speak for himself.”
translation_verse: Amaa a man nyi kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ waa nɩɩ mu ansi ɩ kɩɩ, abɛɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ o bugi mu ansi. Ɔ man bɩla ɔ gyɛ kebii, ɩmʋ sʋ fan taasɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa, ɛɛ taalɛ lɛɛ kɔnɔ.”

english_verse: The man's parents said this because they were afraid of their leaders. The leaders had already agreed that no one was to have anything to do with anyone who said Jesus was the Messiah.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ nɩɩ mʋ akʋʋgɛpʋ mʋ ba tɔwɛ yɛ, “Ɔ man bɩla ɔ gyɛ kebii, fan taasɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mu.”

english_verse: The leaders called the man back and said, “Swear by God to tell the truth! We know that Jesus is a sinner.”
translation_verse: Gyiwu abɩlɩsa mʋ ba bwii tɩɩ ɔnyɩn mʋ nɩɩ naafɔɔ ɔ gyɛ gyaatanapʋ mʋ kɩnyɔsapʋ, nɩɩ ba tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Bɔ Ɩbwaarɛ fɛɛ kesintin nɩɩ fɩɩ tɔwɛ. An nyi fɛɛ ɔnyɩn mʋ nɩɩ o bugi fu ansi mʋ gyɛ alibi ɔwaapʋ nɩn.”

english_verse: The man replied, “I don't know if he is a sinner or not. All I know is that I used to be blind, but now I can see!”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔnyɩn mʋ lɛɛ bamʋ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Mɛɛ mɛ man nyi yɛ ɔ gyɛ alibi ɔwaapʋ abɛɛ ɔ man gyɛ. Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ n nyi mʋ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ, n kyɩna n gyɛ gyaatanapʋ, amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ n kɩɩ.”

english_verse: “What did he do to you?” they asked. “How did he heal your eyes?”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Gyiwu abɩlɩsa mʋ ba bɩla taasɛ mʋ yɛ, “Mɩnɛ nɩɩ ɔ waa fʋ? Nɛnɛ nɩɩ ɔ waa kyɛ fu ansi?”

english_verse: The man answered, “I have already told you once, and you refused to listen. Why do you want me to tell you again? Do you also want to become his disciples?”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔnyɩn mʋ lɛɛ bamʋ kɔnɔ yɛ, “N wʋla tɔwɛ fanɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ ba, nɩɩ fan kina kunu. Mɩnɛ ɩ waa sʋ nɩɩ fen biti fan bwii nu kɩnyɔsapʋ? Abɛɛ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fen biti fɛɛ fan biliŋi mʋ abɩɩlapʋ nɩn?”

english_verse: The leaders insulted the man and said, “You are his follower! We are followers of Moses.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba saalɛ mʋ, tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Fʋ ɩ gyɛ mu obuupu, amaa anɛɛnɛ bɩrɛ an gyɛ Mosesi abuupu nɩn.

english_verse: We are sure God spoke to Moses, but we don't even know where Jesus comes from.”
translation_verse: An nyi ɩmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ maa kyɩna tɔwɛ Mosesi asɛ, amaa kanɩn Yesu maŋa bɩrɛ, a man nyi mʋ ɔlɩɩkpa!”

english_verse: “How strange!” the man replied. “He healed my eyes, and yet you don't know where he comes from.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔnyɩn mʋ lɛɛ bamʋ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Mɩnɛ alɩmankarɛ nɩɩ fɛn tɔwɛ kanɩn! Fan yɛ fan man nyi katɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɩɩ, amaa mʋ i bugi mi ansi falɛ.

english_verse: We know that God listens only to people who love and obey him. God doesn't listen to sinners.
translation_verse: An nyi yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mee nu alibi awaapʋ asɛ. Amaa asa mʋ nɩɩ bee sun Ɩbwaarɛ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa mʋ kɔkɔlɔ biti mʋ, bamʋ asɛ nɩɩ ee nu.

english_verse: And this is the first time in history anyone has ever given sight to someone born blind.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ koo saŋa mʋ nɩɩ dulinyaa piili mʋ, a man pɩɩta nu fɛɛ ɔsa kʋ bugi nyɩmɩsa mʋ nɩɩ ba kʋʋgɛ mʋ gyaatanapʋ ansi.

english_verse: Jesus could not do anything unless he came from God.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔnyɩn nɩmʋ man dɩn lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ mʋ, naafɔɔ ɔ man dɩn taalɛ waa ɩnɩmʋ.”

english_verse: The leaders told the man, “You have been a sinner since the day you were born! Do you think you can teach us anything?” Then they said, “You can never come back into any of our synagogues!”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Kɩɩ, fʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba kʋʋgɛ fʋ alibi tɔ, nɛnɛ nɩɩ fʋ ii biti fʋ ba kaapʋ anɛ asɩn?” Tʋtɔ nɩɩ ba gya mʋ lɛɛ ɔgyaŋɛkpa obu mʋ tɔ. Bamʋ nɩɩ ba man kɔɔlɛ Krisito gyii mʋ ba gyɛ agyaatanapʋ

english_verse: When Jesus heard what had happened, he went and found the man. Then Jesus asked, “Do you have faith in the Son of Man?”
translation_verse: Yesu maa nu yɛ Gyiwu abɩlɩsa mʋ ba gya ɔnyɩn mʋ lɛɛ ɔgyaŋɛkpa obu mʋ tɔ kanɩn mʋ, ɔ naa wu mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ taasɛ mʋ yɛ, “Fɩɩ kɔɔlɛ Daadimaadi Obii‐nyɩnsa mʋ fii gyii.”

english_verse: He replied, “Sir, if you will tell me who he is, I will put my faith in him.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔnyɩn mʋ lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, mʋ ɩ gyɛ anɩmʋ? Tɔwɛ mɛ kɛ n kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii.”

english_verse: “You have already seen him,” Jesus answered, “and right now he is talking with you.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Fʋ tɛɛ wʋla wu mʋ, mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ tɔwɛ fʋ asɛ nbɩɩnbɩɩ falɛ.”

english_verse: The man said, “Lord, I put my faith in you!” Then he worshiped Jesus.
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ nɩɩ ɔnyɩn mʋ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Mɛ‐nyɩrɩpɛ, n kɔɔlɛ fu gyii.” Nɩɩ ɔ kyʋn muŋa Yesu ayaa tɔ.

english_verse: Jesus told him, “I came to judge the people of this world. I am here to give sight to the blind and to make blind everyone who can see.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ yɛ, “N ba dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ kɛ n ba gyii asa asɩn, kɛ agyaatanapʋ ansi i bugi, kɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kɩɩ mʋ, mɔɔ ba biliŋi agyaatanapʋ.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “If you were blind, you would not be guilty. But now that you claim to see, you will keep on being guilty.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu lɛɛ bamʋ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Fan kan fan gyɛ agyaatanapʋ bɩrɛ, naafɔɔ fan mɛɛ yɛ fan gyii alibi kʋpwɛ. Amaa fan maa tɔwɛ yɛ fan kɩɩ falɛ bɩrɛ, fan gyii alibi kʋpwɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus said: I tell you for certain only thieves and robbers climb over the fence instead of going in through the gate to the sheep pen.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “N tɔwɛ fanɛ kesintin fɛɛ, ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ bɔla nbʋlʋpʋ kubunlun kebunɔ mʋ tɔ ee loo, nɩɩ ɔ naa bɔla opula pʋpwɛ loo to mʋ, gyɛ oyu yɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ee yuuri ɔlʋn sʋ.

english_verse: But the gatekeeper opens the gate for the shepherd, and he goes in through it. The sheep know their shepherd's voice. He calls each of them by name and leads them out.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkpapʋ mʋ kan ba mʋ, kebunɔ ɔkɩɩsʋpʋ mʋ ii tigi sa mʋ, nɩɩ ee loo to. Ɛɛ tɩɩ mʋ nbʋlʋpʋ mʋ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ maa mʋ kɩtɩɩ, nɩɩ nbʋlʋpʋ mʋ be nyi mʋ ɔbʋlɛ, nɩɩ ɛɛ lɩɩ gyankpaa bamʋ.

english_verse: When he has led out all of his sheep, he walks in front of them, and they follow, because they know his voice.
translation_verse: Ɔkpapʋ mʋ maa tɛɛ lɛɛ bamʋ kpini lɩɩ kubunlun mʋ tɔ mʋ, nɩɩ ɛɛ kyʋn gyankpaa bamʋ yɛgɛ bee buu mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ be nyi mʋ ɔbʋlɛ.

english_verse: The sheep will not follow strangers. They don't recognize a stranger's voice, and they run away.
translation_verse: Amaa ba mɛɛ yɛ ba buu ɔfɔ, bee biti ba sɩlɛ yɛgɛ mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ba man nyi mʋ ɔbʋlɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus told the people this story. But they did not understand what he was talking about. Jesus Is the Good Shepherd
translation_verse: Yesu bɔ bamʋ kɩŋasan kɩnɩmʋ nɩn, amaa ba man nu kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ tɔwɛ bamʋ mʋ kasɛ.

english_verse: Jesus said: I tell you for certain that I am the gate for the sheep.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ Yesu bwii tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “N tɔwɛ fanɛ kesintin fɛɛ mɛ ɩ gyɛ nbʋlʋpʋ kubunlun kebunɔ mʋ.

english_verse: Everyone who came before me was a thief or a robber, and the sheep did not listen to any of them.
translation_verse: Bamʋ nɩɩ ba gyankpaa mɛ ba mʋ kpini, nɩɩ ba waa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ fɛɛ nbʋlʋpʋ akpapʋ mʋ, ba gyɛ ayu yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bee yuuri ɔlʋn sʋ, kanɩn sʋ nɩɩ nbʋlʋpʋ mʋ ba man nu bamʋ asɛ mʋ.

english_verse: I am the gate. All who come in through me will be saved. Through me they will come and go and find pasture.
translation_verse: Mɛ ɩ gyɛ kebunɔ mʋ, ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bɔla mɛ sʋ loo mʋ, ii biti ɔ nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ. Mʋ kɩlɩɩ kpee yɛ mʋ kibwii ba mʋ ɛɛ nyɛ agyitɔ o gyii.

english_verse: A thief comes only to rob, kill, and destroy. I came so everyone would have life, and have it fully.
translation_verse: Oyu bɩrɛ, mʋ lɛɛ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ o be yuuri, kɛ ɔ mɔɔ, kɛ o nyita. Amaa mɛɛ mɛ n ba nɩn kɛ asa ba nyɛ nkpa, kɛ ba nyɛ ɩmʋ kʋkyɔ‐kʋkyɔ.

english_verse: I am the good shepherd, and the good shepherd gives up his life for his sheep.
translation_verse: “Mɛ ɩ gyɛ nbʋlʋpʋ ɔkpapʋ danbɩrasa mʋ. Mɛ, nbʋlʋpʋ ɔkpapʋ danbɩrasa mʋ n taa mɛ nkpa sa nbʋlʋpʋ mʋ halɩɩ lewu tɔ.

english_verse: Hired workers are not like the shepherd. They don't own the sheep, and when they see a wolf coming, they run off and leave the sheep. Then the wolf attacks and scatters the flock.
translation_verse: Paa ogyipu bɩrɛ, ɔ man du fɛɛ nbʋlʋpʋ ɔkpapʋ danbɩrasa mʋ. Nbʋlʋpʋ mʋ ba maa man gyɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ lɛɛ sʋ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ kan wu fɛɛ kuntun ɩɩ ba mʋ, ɛɛ sɩlɛ yɛgɛ nbʋlʋpʋ mʋ nɩn, kɛ kuntun mʋ ɔ ba kɩtaa bamʋ ɔkʋ kɛ ɔ yaasɛ asansa.

english_verse: I am the good shepherd. I know my sheep, and they know me.
translation_verse: “Mɛ ɩ gyɛ nbʋlʋpʋ ɔkpapʋ danbɩrasa mʋ. N nyi mɛ nbʋlʋpʋ, nɩɩ mɛ nbʋlʋpʋ gbaa be nyi mɛ.

english_verse: Just as the Father knows me, I know the Father, and I give up my life for my sheep.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ mu nyi mɛ, nɩɩ ngbaa mɛ n nyi Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ, ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ n biti n taa mɛ nkpa sa mɛ nbʋlʋpʋ mʋ halɩɩ lewu tɔ.

english_verse: I have other sheep that are not in this sheep pen. I must also bring them together, when they hear my voice. Then there will be one flock of sheep and one shepherd.
translation_verse: N san n sʋ nbʋlʋpʋ akʋ nɩɩ mʋ ba man bʋ nbʋlʋpʋ anɩmʋ tɔ. Nɩɩ ii tiri fɛɛ n naa taa bamʋ gbaa ba. Bee biti ba be nu mɛ ɔbʋlɛ, kɛ bamʋ kpini ba ba waa kʋbʋ kʋlʋn yɛ ɔkpapʋ kʋlʋn.

english_verse: The Father loves me, because I give up my life, so I may receive it back again.
translation_verse: Kʋtɔ mʋ sʋ nɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ ii biti mɛ asɩn ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ, n kyula yɛ n taa mɛ nkpa sa halɩɩ lewu tɔ, kɛ n bɩla bwii nyɛ kɩmʋ.

english_verse: No one takes my life from me. I give it up willingly! I have the power to give it up and the power to receive it back again, just as my Father commanded me to do.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ kɔɔlɛ mɛ nkpa lɩɩ mɛ abaa tɔ. Amaa mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mi kebiti tɔ nɩɩ n kyula yɛ n wu. N sʋ ɔkpa fɛɛ n taa mɛ nkpa sa halɩɩ lewu tɔ, kɛ n bɩla bwii nyɛ kɩmʋ. Falɛ kɔnɔsa kanɩmʋ nɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ sa mɛ yɛ n waa.”

english_verse: The people took sides because of what Jesus had told them.
translation_verse: Asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ falɛ sʋ mʋ, nbarɩgɛ ɩ bɩla bwii ba Gyiwu abɩlɩsa mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Many of them said, “He has a demon in him! He is crazy! Why listen to him?”
translation_verse: Asa mʋ tɔ gaalaagaa bɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Nbwɩɩ libi ba bʋ mʋ tɔ, ɛɛ lɔ ɩbʋn. Mɩnɛ sʋ nɩɩ fen nu mʋ asɛ?”

english_verse: But others said, “How could anyone with a demon in him say these things? No one like this could give sight to a blind person!” Jesus Is Rejected
translation_verse: Amaa bamʋ akʋ mɔɔ ba yɛ, “Ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ nbwɩɩ libi ba bʋ mʋ tɔ mʋ, mɛɛ tɔwɛ falɛ ntɔwɛ nɩmʋ. Nɛnɛ nɩɩ nbwɩɩ libi ɩ taalɛ bugi gyaatanapʋ ansi?” Gyiwu abɩlɩsa ba man kɔɔlɛ Yesu gyii

english_verse: One day he was walking in the part of the temple known as Solomon's Porch,
translation_verse: nɩɩ Yesu bʋ Kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ mʋ tɔ, yɛgɛ ɔ naa katɩn mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ yɛ Owura Solomon kasɔrɔga mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: and the people gathered all around him. They said, “How long are you going to keep us guessing? If you are the Messiah, tell us plainly!”
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ nɩɩ Gyiwu abɩlɩsa mʋ ba yɩlɛ kyaabɔɔ mʋ, nɩɩ ba taasɛ mʋ yɛ, “Saŋa mɔɔ nɩɩ fii biti fɛɛ a gyoo naa fʋʋ, pɔyɩ kɛ a wu asɩn mʋ tɔ kyɛɛkyɛɛ? Nɩɩ fʋ ɩ kan fʋ gyɛ Krisito, Ɔmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ wʋla lɛɛ mʋ, dan tiisi tɔwɛ anɛ kesintin.”

english_verse: Jesus answered: I have told you, and you refused to believe me. The things I do by my Father's authority show who I am.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “N wʋla tɔwɛ fanɛ, amaa fan man kɔɔlɛ mɛ gyii. Asɩn kyinkyinsa mʋ nɩɩ n sʋ n waa Mɛ‐Sɛ kɩtɩɩ tɔ mʋ, ɩmʋ ii gyii mɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ kesintin.

english_verse: But since you are not my sheep, you don't believe me.
translation_verse: Amaa fan man kɔɔlɛ mɛ gyii, lɩɩ fɛɛ fan maa man gyɛ mɛ nbʋlʋpʋ mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: My sheep know my voice, and I know them. They follow me,
translation_verse: Mɛ nbʋlʋpʋ bee nyi mɛ ɔbʋlɛ, nɩɩ n nyi bamʋ, nɩɩ bee buu mɛ.

english_verse: and I give them eternal life, so that they will never be lost. No one can snatch them out of my hand.
translation_verse: N sa bamʋ nkpa kakpaa, nɩɩ ba mɛɛ yɛ ba fɔyɩ. Nɩɩ ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ bɩɩtɛ bamʋ kɔɔlɛ lɩɩ mɛ abaa tɔ.

english_verse: My Father gave them to me, and he is greater than all others. No one can snatch them from his hands,
translation_verse: Mɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ, mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa bamʋ sa mɛ mʋ, kyɔ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ, ɩmʋ sʋ ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ bɩɩtɛ bamʋ kɔɔlɛ lɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ abaa tɔ.

english_verse: and I am one with the Father.
translation_verse: N maa Mɛ‐Sɛ an gyɛ kʋkʋlʋn nɩn.”

english_verse: Once again the people picked up stones in order to kill Jesus.
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ nɩɩ Gyiwu abi ba bɩla naa taa abuu kɛ ba tʋʋ mʋ.

english_verse: But he said, “I have shown you many good things my Father sent me to do. Which one are you going to stone me for?”
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “N waa asɩn kyinkyinsa damantɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ lɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ asɛ kaapʋ fanɛ. Ɩmʋ ɩmɔɔ sʋ nɩɩ fen biti fan tʋʋ mɛ abuu?”

english_verse: They answered, “We are not stoning you because of any good thing you did. We are stoning you because you did a terrible thing. You are just a man, and here you are claiming to be God!”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Gyiwu abi mʋ ba tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Man gyɛ asɩn kyinkyinsa damantɛ mʋ nɩɩ fʋ waa sʋ nɩɩ an biti a tʋʋ fʋ abuu. Amaa fʋ tɔwɛ nbusaa asɩn yii Ɩbwaarɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fʋ gyɛ nyɩmɩsa nɩn, nɩɩ fɩɩ tɔwɛ yɛ fʋ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ.”

english_verse: If I don't do as my Father does, you should not believe me.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n mɛɛ kan n waa atɔ mʋ nɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ ii biti fɛɛ n waa mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ fan man kɔɔlɛ mɛ gyii.

english_verse: But if I do what my Father does, you should believe because of that, even if you don't have faith in me. Then you will know for certain that the Father is one with me, and I am one with the Father.
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ n kan waa ɩmʋ bɩrɛ, nɩɩ halɩɩ fan man kɔɔlɛ mɛ gyii gbaa mʋ, fan kɔɔlɛ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ n waa mʋ kpini gyii, kɛ fan nyɛ bɩɩ fɛɛ n maa Mɛ‐Sɛ an gyɛ kʋkʋlʋn.”

english_verse: Again they wanted to arrest Jesus. But he escaped
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ nɩɩ asa mʋ ba biti fɛɛ ba kɩtaa mʋ, amaa ɔ bʋlɛ bamʋ tɔ lɩɩ kyʋn.

english_verse: and crossed the Jordan to the place where John had earlier been baptizing. While Jesus was there,
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu bwii naa faa Gyɔdan ɔbʋn kpee kɩmʋ benben, opula mʋ nɩɩ Gyɔn kyɩna gyee asa Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee mʋ. Ɔ maa bʋ tʋtɔ mʋ,

english_verse: many people came to him. They were saying, “John didn't work any miracles, but everything he said about Jesus is true.”
translation_verse: nɩɩ asa damantɛ ba ba mʋ asɛ, nɩɩ bɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Halɩɩ Gyɔn maa man waa asɩn kyinkyinsa ɩkʋ gbaa mʋ, kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ lɩɩ ɔnyɩn nɩmʋ sʋ mʋ, kpini gyɛ kesintin.”

english_verse: A lot of those people also put their faith in Jesus.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ tʋtɔ mʋ gaalaagaa ba kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii.

english_verse: The sisters sent a message to the Lord and told him that his good friend Lazarus was sick.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ mʋ pɩɩkyɩɩ ana ba sun Yesu asɛ naa tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, fʋ kyɛmɩnɛ danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ fʋ sʋ kebiti sa mʋ mʋ, dɛ ɛɛ lɔ.”

english_verse: When Jesus heard this, he said, “His sickness won't end in death. It will bring glory to God and his Son.”
translation_verse: Yesu maa nu ɩnɩmʋ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Kʋlɔ kɩnɩmʋ man gyɛ lewu kʋlɔ. Ii biti ɩ bɩya Ɩbwaarɛ bʋnyaa nɩn, kɛ mɛ, Mu‐Bii mʋ n nyɛ bʋnyaa lɩɩ ɩmʋ sʋ.”

english_verse: Then he said to his disciples, “Now we will go back to Judea.”
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ kamaa mʋ ɔ tɔwɛ mʋ abɩɩlapʋ yɛ, “Fan yɛgɛ a bwii kpee Gyudeya ɔsʋwʋlɛ.”

english_verse: “Teacher,” they said, “the people there want to stone you to death! Why do you want to go back?”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ abɩɩlapʋ mʋ ba tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ. “Ɔkaapʋpʋ, nkɛ nnyɔ nɩmʋ tɔ nɩɩ Gyiwu abi bee biti ba tʋʋ fʋ abuu mɔɔ, mɩnɛ sʋ nɩɩ fɩɩ bɩla fii kpee tʋtɔ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Aren't there twelve hours in each day? If you walk during the day, you will have light from the sun, and you won't stumble.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Man gyɛ kerefi kudu anyɔ ɩ bʋ kayɩkɛ tɔ? Nyɩmɩsa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ naa kayɩkɛ tɔ mʋ mee siti, lɩɩ fɛɛ kyɔwɛ kɩɩ tɔ ɛɛ sa mʋ katɩn kʋmaa.

english_verse: But if you walk during the night, you will stumble, because you don't have any light.”
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ ɔ natɛ kagyanbwɛ bɩrɛ ee siti, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ man sʋ ɩŋmaŋɛsa.”

english_verse: Then he told them, “Our friend Lazarus is asleep, and I am going there to wake him up.”
translation_verse: Maa tɔwɛ ɩnɩmʋ kamaa mʋ, ɔ tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Anɛ kyɛmɩnɛ Lasarusi dɛ nsɩɩrɛ nɩn, amaa n biti n kpee tʋtɔ n naa kyiŋi mʋ.”

english_verse: They replied, “Lord, if he is asleep, he will get better.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ mʋ abɩɩlapʋ ba lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, nɩɩ ɔ kan dɛ nsɩɩrɛ bɩrɛ, ee biti ɔ nyɛ alanfɩya.”

english_verse: Jesus really meant that Lazarus was dead, but they thought he was talking only about sleep.
translation_verse: Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Yesu ɩɩ kaapʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ Lasarusi wu, amaa mʋ abɩɩlapʋ bɩrɛ be nyi nɩn fɛɛ nsɩɩrɛ gbaa‐gbaa asɩn nɩɩ ɔ dɩyɛ.

english_verse: I am glad I wasn't there, because now you will have a chance to put your faith in me. Let's go to him.”
translation_verse: Amaa lɩɩ fanɛ sʋ mʋ, mi ansi i gyii fɛɛ n maa man bʋ tʋtɔ nɩɩ o wu. Ɩnɩmʋ ii biti ɩ yɛgɛ kɛ fan nyɛ kɔɔlɛ mɛ gyii. Kanɩn sʋ fan yɛgɛ a kpee mʋ asɛ.”

english_verse: Thomas, whose nickname was “Twin,” said to the other disciples, “Come on. Let's go, so we can die with him.” Jesus Brings Lazarus to Life
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Tomasi mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ mʋ Kabwaara‐bii mʋ, tɔwɛ abɩɩlapʋ asansa mʋ yɛ, “Fan yɛgɛ anɛ gbaa anɛ a kpee kɛ anaa mʋ a naa wu.” Yesu kyiŋi asa lɩɩ lewu tɔ

english_verse: When Jesus got to Bethany, he found that Lazarus had already been in the tomb four days.
translation_verse: Yesu maa fʋʋ Betani kadɛ tɔ mʋ, o nu yɛ ba tee pula Lasarusi ɩmʋ nkɛ nna.

english_verse: Bethany was less than three kilometers from Jerusalem,
translation_verse: Lɩɩ Betani kpee Gyerusalem man bʋ kata, ɩ waa fɛɛ ɩmaalɩ ɩnyɔ,

english_verse: and many people had come from the city to comfort Martha and Mary because their brother had died.
translation_verse: nɩɩ Gyiwu abi mʋ gaalaagaa ba ba Mata maa Mɛɛrɩ asɛ, ba ba tɔwɛ yuula bamʋ nkɔlɔ lɩɩ bamʋ pɩɩnyɩn kelewu sʋ.

english_verse: When Martha heard that Jesus had arrived, she went out to meet him, but Mary stayed in the house.
translation_verse: Mata maa nu fɛɛ Yesu ɩɩ ba mʋ, ɔ lɩɩ naa gyaŋa mʋ ɔkpa tɔ, amaa Mɛɛrɩ bɩrɛ o sii kɩkpaara sʋ.

english_verse: Martha said to Jesus, “Lord, if you had been here, my brother would not have died.
translation_verse: Mata maa gyaŋa mʋ mʋ, ɔ tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, fʋ daa fʋ bʋ nfɩɩ nɩn, naafɔɔ mɛ pɩɩnyɩn man dɩn wu.

english_verse: Jesus told her, “Your brother will live again!”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Fʋ pɩɩnyɩn ii biti o bwii kyiŋi ba nkpa tɔ.”

english_verse: Martha answered, “I know he will be raised to life on the last day, when all the dead are raised.”
translation_verse: Mata lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “N nyi yɛ ee biti o kyiŋi ba nkpa tɔ kakɛ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ, saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti o kyiŋi asa ba nkpa tɔ mʋ.”

english_verse: Jesus then said, “I am the one who raises the dead to life! Everyone who has faith in me will live, even if they die.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Mɛ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ n kyiŋi asa n lɩɩ lewu tɔ, nɩɩ ɛɛ sa bamʋ nkpa mʋ. Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ mɛ gyii mʋ, halɩɩ o wu gbaa ee biti ɔ nyɛ nkpa.

english_verse: “Yes, Lord!” she replied. “I believe you are the Christ, the Son of God. You are the one we hoped would come into the world.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Mata kyula yɛ, “Ɛɛhn! Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ n kɔɔlɛ gyii yɛ fʋ ɩ gyɛ Krisito, Ɔmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ wʋla lɛɛ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ yɛ ee biti o sun mʋ ba dulinyaa tɔ mʋ.”

english_verse: After Martha said this, she went and privately said to her sister Mary, “The Teacher is here, and he wants to see you.”
translation_verse: Maa tɔwɛ ɩnɩmʋ lʋwɛ mʋ, o bwii kpee kɩkpaara sʋ, nɩɩ ɔ naa tɩɩ mu‐supu Mɛɛrɩ lɩɩ ɩkaa sʋ, nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Ɔkaapʋpʋ mʋ bʋ nfɩɩ, nɩɩ ɔ taasɛ fʋ sʋ.”

english_verse: As soon as Mary heard this, she got up and went out to Jesus.
translation_verse: Mɛɛrɩ maa nu kanɩn mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ kʋsʋ bilen ee kpee mʋ asɛ.

english_verse: He was still outside the village where Martha had gone to meet him.
translation_verse: Yesu man pɩɩta loo kadɛ mʋ tɔ, amaa ɔ san ɔ bʋ katɩn mʋ nɩɩ Mata naa gyaŋa mʋ mʋ.

translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ ba kan kʋsaa mɛ sʋsʋ lɩɩ kasɛ sʋ bɩrɛ, n biti n bɩɩtɛ asa kpini ba mɛ asɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus was talking about the way he would be put to death.
translation_verse: Ɔ tɔwɛ ɩnɩmʋ nɩn kaapʋ tɔ lɩɩ kelewu mʋ nɩɩ ee biti o wu.

english_verse: The crowd said to Jesus, “The Scriptures teach that the Messiah will live forever. How can you say that the Son of Man must be lifted up? Who is this Son of Man?”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ sakyɔ mʋ ba lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “An nu lɩɩ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ fɛɛ, Krisito, Ɔmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ wʋla lɛɛ mʋ, ii biti ɔ kyɩna nkpa tɔ kakpaa. Mɩnɛ sʋ nɩɩ fɩɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, Ɩ dagaa ba maa kʋsaa Daadimaadi Obii‐nyɩnsa mʋ sʋsʋ? Anɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ Daadimaadi Obii‐nyɩnsa mʋ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “The light will be with you for only a little longer. Walk in the light while you can. Then you won't be caught walking blindly in the dark.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ bamʋ lɩɩ mʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ yɛ, “Ɩŋmaŋɛsa mʋ ɩ man bɩla yɛ ɩ kyɛɛrɛɛ fanɛ asɛ. Ɩmʋ sʋ fan kyaga sʋ natɛ ɩŋmaŋɛsa mʋ tɔ, kɛ kitentenbiri kɩ man nyɛ loo fanɛ tɔ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ naa kitentenbiri tɔ mʋ man nyi katɩn mʋ nɩɩ ee kpee.
