english_verse: Have faith in the light while it is with you, and you will be children of the light.” The People Refuse To Have Faith in Jesus After Jesus had said these things, he left and went into hiding.
translation_verse: Fan maa san fan sʋ ɩŋmaŋɛsa fanɛ asɛ falɛ bɩrɛ, fan kɔɔlɛ ɩmʋ gyii, kɛ fan baa fan gyɛ ɩŋmaŋɛsa mʋ asa.” Yesu maa tɔwɛ ɩnɩmʋ kamaa tɔ mʋ, ɔ lɩɩ tʋtɔ naa baala bamʋ sʋ mʋ nkʋn. Gyiwu abi ba san ba mɛɛ kɔɔlɛ Yesu bee gyii

english_verse: He had worked a lot of miracles among the people, but they were still not willing to have faith in him.
translation_verse: Halɩɩ asɩn kyinkyinsa mʋ nɩɩ Yesu waa asa ansi tɔ kpini falɛ gbaa mʋ, ba san ba mɛɛ kɔɔlɛ mʋ bee gyii.

english_verse: This happened so that what the prophet Isaiah had said would come true, “Lord, who has believed our message? And who has seen your mighty strength?”
translation_verse: Asɩn nɩmʋ a waa nɩn, kɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔtɔwɛpʋ Isaya wʋla tɔwɛ mʋ, ɩ ba tɔ kesintin. Falɛ nɩɩ ɔ taasɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ, “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, anɩmʋ ɩ kɔɔlɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ an tɔwɛ mʋ gyii? Nɩɩ asa mɔɔ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ lɛɛ mʋ ɔlʋn mʋ kaapʋ?”

english_verse: The people could not have faith in Jesus, because Isaiah had also said,
translation_verse: Kpalɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ mʋ, ba man taalɛ kɔɔlɛ Yesu gyii, lɩɩ fɛɛ Isaya bɩla tɔwɛ mʋ ɔwʋlɛ tɔ katɩn kʋ yɛ,

english_verse: Isaiah said this, because he saw the glory of Jesus and spoke about him.
translation_verse: Isaya gyankpaa wu Yesu bʋnyaa mʋ, ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ ɩnɩmʋ lɩɩ mʋ sʋ mʋ.

english_verse: Even then, many of the leaders put their faith in Jesus, but they did not tell anyone about it. The Pharisees had already given orders for the people not to have anything to do with anyone who had faith in Jesus.
translation_verse: Halɩɩ ɩ maa ɩmʋ gbaa mʋ, Gyiwu abɩlɩsa mʋ adamantɛ ba kɔɔlɛ Yesu gyii. Amaa lɩɩ Farasii abi mʋ sʋ mʋ, ba man taalɛ lɛɛ bamʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ ifuli, lɩɩ fɛɛ ba sʋ kufuu fɛɛ bee biti ba gya bamʋ lɩɩ ɔgyaŋɛkpa mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: And besides, the leaders liked praise from others more than they liked praise from God. Jesus Came To Save the World
translation_verse: Kpalɩ fɛɛ abɩlɩsa mʋ bee biti kɩyɩn lɩɩ nyɩmɩsa asɛ ba kyɔ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ, ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa kanɩn.

english_verse: In a loud voice Jesus said: Everyone who has faith in me also has faith in the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ kenken yɛ, “Ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ mɛ gyii mʋ, man gyɛ mɛ nkʋn nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ gyii, amaa ɔmʋ nɩɩ o sun mɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ gyii.

english_verse: And everyone who has seen me has seen the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o wu mɛ mʋ, o wu ɔmʋ nɩɩ o sun mɛ mʋ.

english_verse: I am the light that has come into the world. No one who has faith in me will stay in the dark.
translation_verse: Mɛ ɩ gyɛ ɩŋmaŋɛsa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ ba dulinyaa nɩmʋ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ mɛ gyii mʋ, ɔ man sii kitentenbiri tɔ.

english_verse: I am not the one who will judge those who refuse to obey my teachings. I came to save the people of this world, not to be their judge.
translation_verse: “Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o nu mɛ asɩn tɔwɛsa, nɩɩ ɔ man buu ɩmʋ mʋ, man gyɛ mɛ ii biti n bun mʋ kʋpwɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ n man ba nɩn yɛ n ba bun dulinyaa tɔ asa kʋpwɛ, amaa n ba nɩn kɛ n ba mɔlɩgɛ kɩmʋ asa.

english_verse: But everyone who rejects me and my teachings will be judged on the last day by what I have said.
translation_verse: Ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o kina mɛ, nɩɩ ɔ man kɔɔlɛ mɛ asɩn mʋ, wʋla nyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ee biti o bun mʋ kʋpwɛ. Nɩɩ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ mʋ ii biti i bun mʋ kʋpwɛ kakɛ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ.

english_verse: I don't speak on my own. I say only what the Father who sent me has told me to say.
translation_verse: Kpalɩ fɛɛ ɩ man gyɛ mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ ɔlʋn tɔ nɩɩ n sʋ n tɔwɛ, amaa mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ nɩɩ o sun mɛ mʋ, sa mɛ kɔnɔsa lɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ sʋ, nɩɩ ɩmʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ.

english_verse: I know that his commands will bring eternal life. This is why I tell you exactly what the Father has told me.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n nyi fɛɛ mʋ kɔnɔsa mʋ ɩɩ sa nkpa kakpaa. Ɩmʋ sʋ asɩn kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ mʋ, ɩ gyɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ tɔwɛ mɛ yɛ n tɔwɛ.”

english_verse: It was before Passover, and Jesus knew that the time had come for him to leave this world and to return to the Father. He had always loved his followers in this world, and he loved them to the very end.
translation_verse: Ɩ maa san gbɛrɛɛ kɛ ba piili Kesu kɔnɔ Kanyaŋɛ nbunɔ kensi‐gyii mʋ, Yesu bɩɩ fɛɛ saŋa fʋʋ fɛɛ ɔ lɩɩ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ bwii kpee Mʋ‐sɛ asɛ. Maa sʋ kebiti sa mʋ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ sʋ mʋ, ɔ nyɛ kebiti sa bamʋ naa fʋʋ ɔkaa.

english_verse: Even before the evening meal started, the devil had made Judas, the son of Simon Iscariot, decide to betray Jesus.
translation_verse: Pɔyɩ kɛ ba piili kalaatɩpwɛ sʋ agyitɔ kigyii mʋ, Sɩtaanɛ wʋla loo Simon mu‐bii, Gyudasi Isikariyoti mʋ tɔ yɛ, ɔ lɛɛ Yesu sa.

english_verse: Jesus knew he had come from God and would go back to God. He also knew that the Father had given him complete power.
translation_verse: Yesu nyi Mʋ‐sɛ maa taa kʋtɔ kʋmaa waa mʋ kɩbaa tɔ, nɩɩ o nyi maa lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ nɩn, nɩɩ mʋ asɛ nɩɩ ee biti o bwii kpee.

english_verse: So during the meal Jesus got up, removed his outer garment, and wrapped a towel around his waist.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɔ kʋsʋ lɩɩ agyitɔ mʋ asɛ, nɩɩ o bugi mʋ balɩmaasʋ, nɩɩ ɔ taa bɔrɩdɩba dɩla mʋ kasɩyɛ.

english_verse: He put some water into a large bowl. Then he began washing his disciples' feet and drying them with the towel he was wearing.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔ kyɛɛgɛ nkyu waa lapɛ gyeesa tɔ, nɩɩ o piili ɛɛ fwɩɩ mʋ abɩɩlapʋ mʋ ayaa sʋ, yɛgɛ ɔ sʋ bɔrɩdɩba mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa maalɛ mʋ kasɩyɛ mʋ ɛɛ kpayɩ bamʋ ayaa sʋ.

english_verse: But when he came to Simon Peter, this disciple asked, “Lord, are you going to wash my feet?”
translation_verse: Maa waa kanɩn naa fʋʋ Simon Pita sʋ mʋ, ɔ taasɛ mʋ yɛ, “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, fii biti fʋ fwɩɩ mɛ ayaa sʋ nɩn?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “You don't really know what I am doing, but later you will understand.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Nbɩɩnbɩɩ ɩmʋ nɩɩ n waa falɛ fɩɩ mɛɛ yɛ fʋ nu kasɛ, amaa kamaa tɔ fii biti fʋ ba nu ɩmʋ kasɛ.”

english_verse: “You will never wash my feet!” Peter replied. “If I don't wash you,” Jesus told him, “you don't really belong to me.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Pita tɔwɛ Yesu yɛ, “Ayee, n mɛɛ yɛgɛ fʋ fwɩɩ mɛ ayaa sʋ kakaakʋ.” Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Nɩɩ fʋ man yɛgɛ nɩɩ n fwɩɩ fʋ ayaa sʋ bɩrɛ, fʋ man bɩla fii tii mɛ abɩɩlapʋ mʋ sʋ.”

english_verse: Peter said, “Lord, don't wash just my feet. Wash my hands and my head.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Simon Pita tɔwɛ Yesu yɛ, “Kanɩn bɩrɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, man fwɩɩ mɛ ayaa sʋ nkʋn, fwɩɩ mɛ abaa yɛ mi kumu tɔ gbaa tii sʋ.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “People who have bathed and are clean all over need to wash just their feet. And you, my disciples, are clean, except for one of you.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tee gyee mʋ, mʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ ɩ man bɩla ɩ sʋ ineesi, ɩmʋ sʋ mʋ ayaa sʋ nkʋn nɩɩ ɛɛ fwɩɩ. Fanɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ ɩ man sʋ ineesi kʋ, amɔɔ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋlʋn.”

english_verse: Jesus knew who would betray him. That is why he said, “except for one of you.”
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ tɛɛ wʋla o nyi ɔmʋ nɩɩ ee biti ɔ lɛɛ mʋ sa, ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ yɛ, “amɔɔ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋlʋn” ɩ sʋ ineesi.

english_verse: After Jesus had washed his disciples' feet and had put his outer garment back on, he sat down again. Then he said: Do you understand what I have done?
translation_verse: Maa fwɩɩ bamʋ ayaa sʋ lʋwɛ mʋ, nɩɩ o bwii taa mʋ balɩmaasʋ bun, nɩɩ o bwii naa kyɩna mʋ ɔkyɩnakpa. Nɩɩ ɔ taasɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Fan nu ɩmʋ nɩɩ n waa sa fanɛ falɛ kasɛ?”

english_verse: You call me your teacher and Lord, and you should, because that is who I am.
translation_verse: Fɛn tɩɩ mɛ yɛ “Ɔkaapʋpʋ” yɛ “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ” nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ kesintin, lɩɩ fɛɛ kanɩn nɩɩ n gyɛ.

english_verse: I have set the example, and you should do for each other exactly what I have done for you.
translation_verse: N waa sɩnkaala sa fanɛ, yɛ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fan waa fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n waa sa fanɛ falɛ.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that servants are not greater than their master, and messengers are not greater than the one who sent them.
translation_verse: N tɔwɛ fanɛ kesintin, kɩyaafɔlɛ mɛɛ taalɛ ɔ kyɔ mʋ‐nyɩrɩpɛ, nɩɩ kabɔɔ mɛɛ taalɛ ɔ kyɔ ɔmʋ nɩɩ o sun mʋ mʋ.

english_verse: I am not talking about all of you. I know the ones I have chosen. But what the Scriptures say must come true. And they say, “The man who ate with me has turned against me!”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ yɛ, “Man gyɛ fanɛ kpini asɩn nɩɩ n tɔwɛ falɛ. N nyi bamʋ nɩɩ n lɛɛ mʋ. Amaa asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ba tɔwɛ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ mʋ, ɩ dagaa ɩ maa ba tɔ. Asɩn mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, ‘Ɔnyɩn mʋ nɩɩ n maa mʋ an bʋga lapɛ kʋlʋn tɔ an gyii mʋ, biliŋi ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ kʋsʋ yɩlɛ mɛ sʋ.’

english_verse: I am telling you this before it all happens. Then when it does happen, you will believe who I am.
translation_verse: “N tɔwɛ fanɛ nɩn pɔyɩ kɛ ɩ ba waa. Nɩɩ ɩ ba mʋ, fen biti fan bɩɩ fɛɛ mɛ ɩ gyɛ ‘Ɔmʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ yɛ n gyɛ mʋ’.

english_verse: So the disciple leaned toward Jesus and asked, “Lord, which one of us are you talking about?”
translation_verse: Maa kpɛɛ Yesu mʋ, ɔ taasɛ mʋ yɛ, “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, anɩmʋ nɩɩ fʋ dɛɛ?”

english_verse: After Jesus had said these things, he was deeply troubled and told his disciples, “I tell you for certain that one of you will betray me.”
translation_verse: Yesu maa tɔwɛ ɩnɩmʋ kpini lʋwɛ mʋ, nɩɩ mʋ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ nyita mʋ. Nɩɩ o bugi tɔ tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “N tɔwɛ fanɛ kesintin yɛ, fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ ii biti ɔ lɛɛ mɛ sa.”

english_verse: Jesus' favorite disciple was sitting next to him at the meal,
translation_verse: Mʋ abɩɩlapʋ mʋ tɔ ɔkʋlʋn, ɔmʋ nɩɩ Yesu sʋ kebiti sa mʋ mʋ, tɛ ɔ maa Yesu.

english_verse: and Simon motioned for this disciple to find out which one Jesus meant.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Simon Pita ŋabɛɛ mu ansi yɛ, “Taasɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ yɛ, anɩmʋ asɩn nɩɩ ɛɛ tɔwɛ falɛ?”

english_verse: No one at the meal understood what Jesus meant.
translation_verse: Bamʋ nɩɩ ba tɛ ogyikpa maŋa kpini, ɔkʋ man nu asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ mʋ kasɛ.

english_verse: But because Judas was in charge of the money, some of them thought that Jesus had told him to buy something they needed for the festival. Others thought that Jesus had told him to give some money to the poor.
translation_verse: Amaa Gyudasi maa gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kɩtaa bamʋ afulee sʋ mʋ, akʋ ba fɛ nfɛɛrɛ yɛ, Yesu sun mʋ yɛ ɔ naa sɔɔ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ii tiri sa Kesu kɔnɔ Kanyaŋɛ nbunɔ agyitɔ mʋ. Nɩɩ akʋ mɔɔ ba fɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ o sun mʋ nɩn yɛ ɔ taa afulee naa sa atiripu.

english_verse: Judas took the piece of bread and went out. It was already night. The New Command
translation_verse: Gyudasi maa dan kɔɔlɛ agyitɔ mʋ lʋwɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ lɩɩ kewu kyʋn. Saŋa maŋa gyɛ kagyanbwɛ nɩn. Yesu sa mʋ abɩɩlapʋ mʋ nbara pʋpwɛ

english_verse: Then, after God is given glory because of him, God will bring glory to him, and God will do it very soon.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kan bɔla mɛ sʋ lɛɛ mʋ bʋnyaa mʋ ifuli mʋ, ee biti ɔ bʋnyaa mɛ, Daadimaadi Obii‐nyɩnsa mʋ. Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ waa ɩmʋ nbɩɩnbɩɩ nɩmʋ.

english_verse: My children, I will be with you for only a little while longer. Then you will look for me, but you won't find me. I tell you just as I told the people, “You cannot go where I am going.”
translation_verse: “Mi‐bii ana, saŋa gbɛrɛɛ ɩ san kɛ n kyɩna fanɛ asɛ. Fen biti fan kɩɩ biti mɛ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ Gyiwu abi abɩlɩsa mʋ, kanɩn nɩɩ n tɔwɛ fanɛ nbɩɩnbɩɩ falɛ yɛ, katɩn mʋ nɩɩ n biti n kpee mʋ, fan mɛɛ yɛ fan taalɛ ba tʋtɔ.

english_verse: Peter asked, “Lord, why can't I go with you now? I would die for you!”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Pita taasɛ mʋ yɛ “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, mɩnɛ waa nɩɩ n mɛɛ taalɛ buu fʋ nbɩɩnbɩɩ. N biti n taa mɛ nkpa taga apʋ sa fʋ.”

english_verse: “Would you really die for me?” Jesus asked. “I tell you for certain before a rooster crows, you will say three times that you don't even know me.”
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ nɩɩ Yesu taasɛ mʋ yɛ, “Fii biti fu taa fʋ nkpa taga apʋ sa mɛ kesintin? N tɔwɛ fʋ kesintin yɛ, pɔyɩ kɛ kyaasɛ ɔ bʋn mʋ, fii biti fʋ kyɛɛ ɩlɩɩ ɩsa yɛ fʋ man nyi mɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples, “Don't be worried! Have faith in God and have faith in me.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ mʋ abɩɩlapʋ mʋ yɛ, “Fan man yɛgɛ fanɛ nkɔlɔ ɩ ŋmaa fanɛ. Fan kɔɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ gyii kɛ fan kɔɔlɛ ngbaa mɛ gyii.

english_verse: There are many rooms in my Father's house. I wouldn't tell you this, unless it was true. I am going there to prepare a place for each of you.
translation_verse: Ibu damantɛ ɩ bʋ Mɛ‐Sɛ kɩkpaara sʋ. Nɩɩ ɩ daa ɩ man gyɛ kanɩn nɩn, naafɔɔ n tɔwɛ fanɛ. N kpee n naa lɔŋɔ ɔkyɩnakpa sa fanɛ.

english_verse: After I have done this, I will come back and take you with me. Then we will be together.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n kan kpee naa lɔŋɔ ɔkyɩnakpa sa fanɛ mʋ, n biti n bwii ba taa fanɛ kpee mɛ asɛ, kɛ fan naa kyɩna katɩn mʋ nɩɩ n tɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Thomas said, “Lord, we don't even know where you are going! How can we know the way?”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Tomasi tɔwɛ Yesu yɛ, “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, a man nyi katɩn mʋ nɩɩ fii kpee. Nɩɩ nɛnɛ nɩɩ an biti a waa bɩɩ ɔkpa mʋ?”

english_verse: “I am the way, the truth, and the life!” Jesus answered. “Without me, no one can go to the Father.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Mɛ ɩ gyɛ ɔkpa mʋ yɛ kesintin mʋ yɛ nkpa mʋ. Ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ kpee Mɛ‐Sɛ asɛ, amɔɔ ɔ bɔla mɛ sʋ.

english_verse: If you had really known me, you would have known the Father. But from now on, you do know him, and you have seen him.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fan kan fan nyi mɛ kesintin tɔ mʋ, naafɔɔ fan nyi Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ gbaa. Lɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ nɩmʋ ɩɩ sʋ ii kpee mʋ, fen nyi mʋ, nɩɩ fen wu mʋ.”

english_verse: Philip said, “Lord, show us the Father. That is all we need.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Filipu tɔwɛ yɛ, “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, kaapʋ anɛ Fʋ‐sɛ mʋ, kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ki tiri anɛ nɩn.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: Philip, I have been with you for a long time. Don't you know who I am? If you have seen me, you have seen the Father. How can you ask me to show you the Father?
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ nɩɩ Yesu lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Filipu, amɔɔ fʋ man nyi mɛ, halɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n kyɩna fanɛ asɛ kyɛɛrɛɛ falɛ? Ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o wu mɛ mʋ, o wu Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ. Mɩnɛ ɩ waa nɩɩ fʋ bɩla fɩɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, ‘Kaapʋ anɛ Fʋ‐sɛ mʋ?’

english_verse: Don't you believe that I am one with the Father and that the Father is one with me? What I say isn't said on my own. The Father who lives in me does these things.
translation_verse: Abɛɛ fʋ man kɔɔlɛ gyii yɛ n maa Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ an gyɛ kʋkʋlʋn? Asɩn mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ fanɛ mʋ man gyɛ mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ lɛɛ. Amaa Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ mɛ tɔ mʋ ii sun mu kusun.

english_verse: Have faith in me when I say that the Father is one with me and that I am one with the Father. Or else have faith in me simply because of the things I do.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ fan kɔɔlɛ mɛ gyii fɛɛ n maa tɔwɛ yɛ, n maa Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ an gyɛ kʋkʋlʋn. Nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ kanɩn gbaa mʋ, fan kɔɔlɛ mɛ gyii lɩɩ asɩn kyinkyinsa mʋ nɩɩ fan wu n maa waa falɛ sʋ.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that if you have faith in me, you will do the same things I am doing. You will do even greater things, now that I am going back to the Father.
translation_verse: N tɔwɛ fanɛ kesintin, ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kɔɔlɛ mɛ ee gyii mʋ, ee biti ɔ waa atɔ mʋ nɩɩ n waa mʋ. Ee biti ɔ waa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ kyɔ falɛ gbaa, lɩɩ fɛɛ n kpee Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ asɛ nɩn.

english_verse: Ask me, and I will do whatever you ask. This way the Son will bring honor to the Father.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ fan kʋlɛ mɛ kɩtɩɩ tɔ sʋ mʋ, n biti n waa sa fanɛ, kɛ mɛ, Obii mʋ n bɩya bʋnyaa sa Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples: If you love me, you will do as I command.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ mʋ abɩɩlapʋ mʋ yɛ, “Nɩɩ fan kan fan sʋ kebiti sa mɛ mʋ, fen biti fan buu mɛ kɔnɔsa.

english_verse: Then I will ask the Father to send you the Holy Spirit who will help you and always be with you.
translation_verse: N biti n kʋlɛ Mɛ‐Sɛ kɛ ɔ sa fanɛ Ɔkyɛtɔpʋ pʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ ee biti ɔ baa ɔ bʋ fanɛ asɛ kakpaa.

english_verse: The Spirit will show you what is true. The people of this world cannot accept the Spirit, because they don't see or know him. But you know the Spirit, who is with you and will keep on living in you.
translation_verse: Mʋ ɩ gyɛ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ lɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kesintin mʋ ɛɛ kaapʋ. Dulinya abi ba mɛɛ yɛ ba taalɛ kɔɔlɛ mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ba man nyi mʋ, nɩɩ be mee wu mʋ. Amaa fanɛɛ fanɛ fan nyi mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ bʋ fanɛ asɛ, nɩɩ ee biti ɔ baa ɔ bʋ fanɛ tɔ.

english_verse: I won't leave you like orphans. I will come back to you.
translation_verse: N mɛɛ yɛ n yɛgɛ fanɛ fɛɛ aŋmengyi, n biti n bwii ba fanɛ asɛ.

english_verse: In a little while the people of this world won't be able to see me, but you will see me. And because I live, you will live.
translation_verse: Ɩ san gbɛrɛɛ, dulinyaa abi ba man bɩla yɛ ba wu mɛ. Amaa fanɛɛ fanɛ bɩrɛ fen biti fan wu mɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ n maa tɛ nkpa tɔ falɛ, fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fen biti fan baa fan tɛ nkpa tɔ.

english_verse: Then you will know I am one with the Father. You will know you are one with me, and I am one with you.
translation_verse: Kanɩn kakɛ maŋa fen biti fan bɩɩ fɛɛ n maa Mɛ‐Sɛ an gyɛ kʋkʋlʋn, nɩɩ n maa fanɛ gbaa an gyɛ kʋkʋlʋn.

english_verse: If you love me, you will do what I have said, and my Father will love you. I will also love you and show you what I am like.
translation_verse: “Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ mɛ kɔnɔsa, nɩɩ o buu ɩmʋ mʋ, mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kebiti sa mɛ. Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kebiti sa mɛ mʋ, Mɛ‐Sɛ gbaa ii biti ɔ nyɛ kebiti sa mʋ. Ngbaa mɛ n biti n nyɛ kebiti sa mʋ, kɛ n lɛɛ mɛ n‐yɩɩ kaapʋ mʋ.”

english_verse: The other Judas, not Judas Iscariot, then spoke up and asked, “Lord, what do you mean by saying that you will show us what you are like, but you will not show the people of this world?”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Gyudasi tɔwɛ yɛ, “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, mɩnɛ waa nɩɩ fii biti fʋ lɛɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ kaapʋ anɛ nkʋn, nɩɩ man gyɛ dulinyaa abi mʋ?”

english_verse: Jesus replied: If anyone loves me, they will obey me. Then my Father will love them, and we will come to them and live in them.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kebiti sa mɛ mʋ, ii biti o buu mɛ kɩkaapʋ mʋ. Mɛ‐Sɛ ii biti ɔ nyɛ kebiti sa mʋ, nɩɩ maa Mɛ‐Sɛ an biti a ba mʋ asɛ, kɛ a taa mʋ biliŋi anɛ ayɛ.

english_verse: But anyone who doesn't love me, won't obey me. What they have heard me say doesn't really come from me, but from the Father who sent me.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man sʋ kebiti sa mɛ mʋ, mɛɛ yɛ o buu mɛ kɩkaapʋ mʋ. Kɩkaapʋ mʋ nɩɩ fen nu falɛ man gyɛ mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ kɩkaapʋ, ɩɩ lɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ nɩɩ o sun mɛ mʋ asɛ nɩn.

english_verse: I have told you these things while I am still with you.
translation_verse: “N maa san n bʋ fanɛ asɛ falɛ sʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ fanɛ falɛ asɩn.

english_verse: But the Holy Spirit will come and help you, because the Father will send the Spirit to take my place. The Spirit will teach you everything and will remind you of what I said while I was with you.
translation_verse: Amaa Ɔkyɛtɔpʋ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ, mʋ nɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ ii biti o sun mɛ kɩtɩɩ tɔ mʋ, ii biti ɔ kaapʋ fanɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa kɛ o nyiŋi fanɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ fanɛ falɛ.

english_verse: I give you peace, the kind of peace only I can give. It isn't like the peace this world can give. So don't be worried or afraid.
translation_verse: Kayɩɩ‐yuuli kɩ baa kɩ bʋ fanɛ asɛ, mɛ gbaa‐gbaa kayɩɩ‐yuuli nɩɩ n sʋ n sa fanɛ. Amaa ɩ man du fɛɛ dulinyaa kayɩɩ‐yuuli mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ sa mʋ. Fan man yɛgɛ fanɛ nkɔlɔ i nyita, fan man waa kufuu.

english_verse: You have already heard me say I am going and I will also come back to you. If you really love me, you should be glad I am going back to the Father, because he is greater than I am.
translation_verse: “Fan nu n maa tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ, ‘N kpee kɛ n bɩla bwii ba fanɛ asɛ.’ Nɩɩ fɛn kan fen biti mɛ asɩn mʋ, naafɔɔ fanɛ ansi ii biti i gyii fɛɛ n maa kpee Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ asɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔkparɛ ɔ kyɔ mɛ.

english_verse: I am telling you this before I leave, so when it does happen, you will have faith in me.
translation_verse: N wʋla n tɔwɛ fanɛ ɩnɩmʋ kpini nbɩɩnbɩɩ pɔyɩ kɛ ɩ ba waa, nɩɩ ɩ kan ba waa mʋ kɛ fan kɔɔlɛ mɛ gyii.

english_verse: I cannot speak with you much longer, because the ruler of this world is coming. But he has no power over me.
translation_verse: N mɛɛ bɩla yɛ n tɔwɛ fanɛ asɛ kyɛɛrɛɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ dulinyaa tɔ owura ɩɩ ba. Ɔ man sʋ ɔlʋn mɛ sʋ,

english_verse: I obey my Father, so everyone in the world might know that I love him. It is time for us to go now.
translation_verse: amaa i tiri fɛɛ n maa waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ sa mɛ kɔnɔ yɛ n waa mʋ, kɛ dulinyaa abi ba bɩɩ fɛɛ n sʋ kebiti sa Mɛ‐Sɛ. Fan ba kɛ a lɩɩ nfɩɩ.”

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples: I am the true vine, and my Father is the gardener.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ mʋ abɩɩlapʋ mʋ yɛ, “Mɛ ɩ gyɛ wayɩn oyu gbaa‐gbaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ sɔyɩ abi, nɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ ɩ gyɛ oyu mʋ ɔdɔɔpʋ.

english_verse: He cuts away every branch of mine that doesn't produce fruit. But he trims clean every branch that does produce fruit, so that it will produce even more fruit.
translation_verse: Kayaa‐bi kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ kyaa mɛ sʋ nɩɩ kɩ mɛɛ sɔyɩ abi mʋ, ɛɛ ŋɛ kɩmʋ nɩn ɛɛ fɔyɩ, nɩɩ kayaa‐bi kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ sɔyɩ abi mʋ, ɛɛ kpaalɛ kayaa‐bi mʋ kɛ kɩ nyɛ sɔyɩ abi tii sʋ.

english_verse: You are already clean because of what I have said to you.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ sa fanɛ sʋ mʋ, fan tɛɛ waa kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ.

english_verse: Stay joined to me, and I will stay joined to you. Just as a branch cannot produce fruit unless it stays joined to the vine, you cannot produce fruit unless you stay joined to me.
translation_verse: Fan baa fan bʋ mɛ asɛ, kɛ ngbaa mɛ n baa n bʋ fanɛ asɛ. Kɩyaa‐bi nkʋn mɛɛ taalɛ sɔyɩ abi, amɔɔ kɩ kyaa oyu mʋ sʋ. Kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fɛn mɛɛ taalɛ sɔyɩ abi, amɔɔ fan bʋ mɛ asɛ.

english_verse: I am the vine, and you are the branches. If you stay joined to me, and I stay joined to you, then you will produce lots of fruit. But you cannot do anything without me.
translation_verse: “Mɛ ɩ gyɛ oyu mʋ, nɩɩ fanɛ ɩ gyɛ kɩmʋ n‐yaabi mʋ. Ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kan ɔ bʋ mɛ asɛ, nɩɩ ngbaa n bʋ mʋ asɛ sʋ mʋ, ee biti ɔ sɔyɩ abi gaa, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ kayaa‐bi kyaa oyu sʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ sɔyɩ abi mʋ. Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ fan man tii mɛ sʋ bɩrɛ, fɛn mɛɛ taalɛ waa sɛhn.

english_verse: If you don't stay joined to me, you will be thrown away. You will be like dry branches that are gathered up and burned in a fire.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man kan ɔ bʋ mɛ asɛ bɩrɛ, o du nɩn fɛɛ kayaa‐bi mʋ nɩɩ ba ŋɛ tʋʋ nɩɩ kɩ wʋlɛ. Kanɩn n‐yaabi nɩɩ bɛɛ tasɛ bɛɛ tʋʋ fʋlɔn tɔ, kɛ ɩ dɩyɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Stay joined to me and let my teachings become part of you. Then you can pray for whatever you want, and your prayer will be answered.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fan kan fan bʋ mɛ asɛ, nɩɩ mɛ asɩn mʋ bʋ fanɛ tɔ mʋ, kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ fen biti, nɩɩ fan kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, ee biti ɔ waa sa fanɛ.

english_verse: I have loved you, just as my Father has loved me. So remain faithful to my love for you.
translation_verse: “Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ sʋ kebiti sa mɛ mʋ, kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ ngbaa mɛ n sʋ kebiti sa fanɛ. Ɩmʋ sʋ fan kyaga sʋ kyɩna mi kebiti mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: If you obey me, I will keep loving you, just as my Father keeps loving me, because I have obeyed him.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fan kan buu mɛ kɔnɔsa mʋ, n biti n kyaga sʋ nyɛ kebiti sa fanɛ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n buu Mɛ‐Sɛ kɔnɔsa nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kebiti sa mɛ mʋ.

english_verse: I have told you this to make you as completely happy as I am.
translation_verse: N tɔwɛ fanɛ ɩnɩmʋ nɩn kɛ mi kensi‐gyii ɔ kyɩna fanɛ tɔ, kɛ fanɛ kensi‐gyii mʋ ɔ naa lʋwɛ kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

english_verse: Now I tell you to love each other, as I have loved you.
translation_verse: Mɛ kɔnɔsa ɩ gyɛ yɛ, Fan nyɛ kebiti sa abaa, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n nyɛ kebiti sa fanɛ mʋ.

english_verse: The greatest way to show love for friends is to die for them.
translation_verse: Kebiti kɩ man bʋ tɔ kɩ kyɔ kɩnɩmʋ fɛɛ ɔkʋ maa wu sa mʋ kyɛmɩnɛ ana.

english_verse: And you are my friends, if you obey me.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fan kan buu mɛ kɔnɔsa mʋ bɩrɛ, fan gyɛ mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ ana nɩn.

english_verse: Servants don't know what their master is doing, and so I don't speak to you as my servants. I speak to you as my friends, and I have told you everything my Father has told me.
translation_verse: N mɛɛ bɩla yɛ n tɩɩ fanɛ mɛ ayaafɔlɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ kɩyaafɔlɛ man nyi kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ mʋ‐nyɩrɩpɛ ɩɩ waa. Amaa n tɩɩ fanɛ mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ ana nɩn, lɩɩ fɛɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ n bɩɩla lɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ asɛ mʋ, n lɛɛ kaapʋ fanɛ.

english_verse: You did not choose me. I chose you and sent you out to produce fruit, the kind of fruit that will last. Then my Father will give you whatever you ask for in my name.
translation_verse: Man gyɛ fanɛ ɩ lɛɛ mɛ. Amaa mɛ ɩ lɛɛ fanɛ, nɩɩ n sun fanɛ yɛ fan naa sɔyɩ abi mʋ nɩɩ ii biti ɩ kyɛɛrɛɛ. Nɩɩ fan kan waa kanɩn mʋ, kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ fan kʋlɛ Mɛ‐Sɛ mɛ kɩtɩɩ tɔ mʋ, ee biti ɔ waa sa fanɛ.

english_verse: So I command you to love each other. The World's Hatred
translation_verse: Mɛ kɔnɔsa ɩ gyɛ yɛ, fan nyɛ kebiti sa abaa.” Dulinya asa bee kisi abɩɩlapʋ mʋ

english_verse: If the people of this world hate you, just remember that they hated me first.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ yɛ, “Nɩɩ dulinyaa abi ba kan bɛɛ kisi fanɛ mʋ, fan baa fan nyiŋi fɛɛ mɛ nɩɩ ba daa kikisi.

english_verse: If you belonged to the world, its people would love you. But you don't belong to the world. I have chosen you to leave the world behind, and this is why its people hate you.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fan kan fan du fɛɛ dulinyaa tɔ abi bɩrɛ, naafɔɔ dulinyaa abi bee biti ba nyɛ kebiti sa fanɛ fɛɛ kɩmʋ asa. Amaa fan man gyɛ dulinyaa abi. Mɛ ɩ lɛɛ fanɛ lɩɩ dulinyaa abi tɔ. Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ dulinyaa abi bee kisi fanɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Remember how I told you that servants are not greater than their master. So if people mistreat me, they will mistreat you. If they do what I say, they will do what you say.
translation_verse: Fan nyiŋi asɩn mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ fanɛ mʋ yɛ, ‘Kɩyaafɔlɛ mɛɛ taalɛ ɔ kyɔ mʋ‐nyɩrɩpɛ.’ Ɩmʋ sʋ n maa wu awʋrʋfɔ bamʋ abaa tɔ falɛ, kanɩn nɩɩ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fen biti fan wu awʋrʋfɔ bamʋ abaa tɔ. Nɩɩ ba kan buu mɛ kɩkaapʋ mʋ, bee biti ba buu fanɛ kɩkaapʋ mʋ gbaa.

english_verse: People will do to you exactly what they did to me. They will do it because you belong to me, and they don't know the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ mɛ kɩtɩɩ sʋ, nɩɩ bee biti ba waa fanɛ ɩnɩmʋ kpini, lɩɩ fɛɛ ba man nyi Ɔmʋ nɩɩ o sun mɛ mʋ.

english_verse: If I had not come and spoken to them, they would not be guilty of sin. But now they have no excuse for their sin.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n daa man ba tɔwɛ asɩn mʋ sa bamʋ nɩn, naafɔɔ ba mɛɛ yɛ ba wu alibi kʋpwɛ. Amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ ba man sʋ kɔnɔ kɩlɛɛ lɩɩ bamʋ alibi sʋ.

english_verse: Everyone who hates me also hates my Father.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee kisi mɛ mʋ, ee kisi Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ gbaa.

english_verse: I have done things no one else has ever done. If they had not seen me do these things, they would not be guilty. But they did see me do these things, and they still hate me and my Father too.
translation_verse: N ba waa asɩn kyinkyinsa mʋ nɩɩ ɔkʋ man pɩɩ taalɛ waa bamʋ tɔ. Nɩɩ ba daa ba man wu ɩmʋ bɩrɛ nɩn, naafɔɔ ba mɛɛ yɛ ba wu alibi kʋpwɛ. Amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ ba wu asɩn kyinkyinsa nɩmʋ kpini. Halɩɩ ɩmʋ kpini gbaa mʋ ba kisi maa Mɛ‐Sɛ.

english_verse: This is why the Scriptures are true when they say, “People hated me for no reason.”
translation_verse: Amaa ɩnɩmʋ ɩ yɛgɛ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩ ba tɔ. Asɩn mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, ‘Ba kisi mɛ yɛgɛ ɩ man sʋ kasɛ.’

english_verse: I will send you the Spirit who comes from the Father and shows what is true. The Spirit will help you and will tell you about me.
translation_verse: “Amaa n biti n sun Ɔkyɛtɔpʋ mʋ lɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ asɛ, mʋ ɩ gyɛ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ lɛɛ kesintin lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sʋ ɛɛ kaapʋ.

english_verse: Then you will also tell others about me, because you have been with me from the beginning.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fan gyii mɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ kesintin, lɩɩ fɛɛ fan bʋ mɛ asɛ lɩɩ npiili asɛ.

english_verse: I am telling you these things, so that you will not turn away.
translation_verse: “N tɔwɛ fanɛ ɩnɩmʋ kpini nɩn, kɛ fan man nyɛ yɛgɛ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: You will be chased out of the synagogues. And the time will come when people will kill you and think they are doing God a favor.
translation_verse: Bee biti ba gya fanɛ lɩɩ Gyiwu abi kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ ɔgyaŋɛkpa. Saŋa kʋ ii biti ɔ ba, nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan ba mɔɔ fanɛ gbaa mʋ, ee biti ɔ fɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ ee sun kusun ɛɛ kyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔ nɩn.

english_verse: They will do these things because they don't know either the Father or me.
translation_verse: Bee biti ba waa falɛ atɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ba man nyi Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ba man nyi mɛ.

english_verse: I am saying this to you now, so that when the time comes, you will remember what I have said. The Work of the Holy Spirit I was with you at the first, and so I didn't tell you these things.
translation_verse: N tɔwɛ fanɛ ɩnɩmʋ nɩn, nɩɩ saŋa mʋ kan fʋʋ mʋ, fen biti fan nyiŋi fɛɛ n wʋla da fanɛ amu tɔ. N man tɔwɛ fanɛ ɩnɩmʋ bilen, lɩɩ fɛɛ n san n bʋ fanɛ asɛ.” Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ kusun (Gyɔn

english_verse: But now I am going back to the Father who sent me, and none of you asks me where I am going.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ yɛ, “Nbɩɩnbɩɩ n kpee ɔmʋ nɩɩ o sun mɛ mʋ asɛ nɩn, amaa fanɛ ɔkʋ man taasɛ mɛ katɩn mʋ nɩɩ n kpee.

english_verse: You are very sad from hearing all of this.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ n maa tɔwɛ fanɛ ɩnɩmʋ kpini sʋ mʋ, fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ i nyita.

english_verse: But I tell you I am going to do what is best for you. This is why I am going away. The Holy Spirit cannot come to help you until I leave. But after I am gone, I will send the Spirit to you.
translation_verse: Amaa n tɔwɛ fanɛ kesintin, mi kikpe mʋ kɩ gyɛ tɔnɔ sa fanɛ nɩn. Nɩɩ n man kan kpee mʋ, Ɔkyɛtɔpʋ mʋ mɛɛ yɛ ɔ ba fanɛ asɛ. Amaa nɩɩ n kan kpee mʋ, n biti n sun mʋ fanɛ asɛ.

english_verse: The Spirit will come and show the people of this world the truth about sin and God's justice and the judgment.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔ kan ba mʋ, ee biti ɔ ba yɛgɛ dulinyaa tɔ asa ba bɩɩ fɛɛ ba fɔyɩ ɔkpa lɩɩ bamʋ alibi sʋ, yɛ ɩkpa kikyiigi mʋ sʋ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn kigyii sʋ.

english_verse: The Spirit will show them that they are wrong about sin, because they didn't have faith in me.
translation_verse: Ɔkpa mʋ nɩɩ ba fɔyɩ lɩɩ bamʋ alibi sʋ mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ ba mɛɛ kɔɔlɛ mɛ bee gyii.

english_verse: They are wrong about God's justice, because I am going to the Father, and you won't see me again.
translation_verse: Ɔkpa mʋ nɩɩ ba fɔyɩ lɩɩ ɩkpa kikyiigi sʋ mʋ, ɩ gyɛ yɛ n kpee Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ asɛ katɩn mʋ nɩɩ fan man bɩla yɛ fan wu mɛ.

english_verse: And they are wrong about the judgment, because God has already judged the ruler of this world.
translation_verse: Ɔkpa mʋ nɩɩ ba fɔyɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn kigyii sʋ mʋ, ɩ gyɛ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ tɛɛ wʋla bun dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ Owura mʋ kʋpwɛ.

english_verse: I have much more to say to you, but right now it would be more than you could understand.
translation_verse: “N sʋ asɩn kʋkyɔ n tɔwɛ fanɛ, amaa fan mɛɛ taalɛ kɩtaa ɩmʋ kpini nbɩɩnbɩɩ nɩmʋ.

english_verse: The Spirit shows what is true and will come and guide you into the full truth. The Spirit doesn't speak on his own. He will tell you only what he has heard from me, and he will let you know what is going to happen.
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ Kayaayu mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ lɛɛ kesintin ɛɛ kaapʋ kan ba mʋ, ee biti ɔ kaapʋ fanɛ kɛ fan bɩɩ kesintin mʋ kpini. Man gyɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa ɔlʋn sʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ tɔwɛ. Amaa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ee nu mʋ nkʋn nɩɩ ɛɛ tɔwɛ, nɩɩ ee biti ɔ tɔwɛ fanɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kii biti kɩ ba.

english_verse: The Spirit will bring glory to me by taking my message and telling it to you.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ o nu lɩɩ mɛ asɛ nɩɩ ee biti ɔ lɛɛ kaapʋ fanɛ, kɛ ee biti ɔ bɩya mɛ bʋnyaa.

english_verse: Everything the Father has is mine. This is why I have said that the Spirit takes my message and tells it to you. Sorrow Will Turn into Joy
translation_verse: Kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ lɛɛ mʋ, gyɛ mɛ lɛɛ nɩn. Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ Kayaayu mʋ ii biti ɔ taa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ mɛ lɛɛ mʋ ba kaapʋ fanɛ.” Kɔkɔlɔ nyita biliŋi kɔkɔlɔ fuuli

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples, “For a little while you won't see me, but after a while you will see me.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu kyaga sʋ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Ɩ san gbɛrɛɛ fan man bɩla yɛ fen wu mɛ, nɩɩ ɩ bɩla waa gbɛrɛɛ fen biti fen wu mɛ.”

english_verse: They said to each other, “What does Jesus mean by saying that for a little while we won't see him, but after a while we will see him? What does he mean by saying he is going to the Father?
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ maŋa nɩɩ mʋ abɩɩlapʋ akʋ bɛɛ taasɛ abaa yɛ, “Mɩnɛ nɩɩ mʋ katɔwɛ mʋ ɩɩ kaapʋ? Maa tɔwɛ yɛ, ‘Ɩ san gbɛrɛɛ fan man bɩla yɛ fan wu mɛ, nɩɩ ɩ bɩla waa gbɛrɛɛ, fen biti fan wu mɛ’ nɩɩ ɔ bɩla bwii tɔwɛ yɛ, ‘N kpee Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ asɛ’ mʋ, mɩnɛ nɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ ɩɩ kaapʋ?”

english_verse: What is this ‘little while’ that he is talking about? We don't know what he means.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba maa sʋ bɛɛ taasɛ yɛ, “ ‘Ɩ san gbɛrɛɛ’ mʋ, ɩmʋ kasɛ ɩ gyɛ nɛnɛ? A mee nu asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ tɔwɛ mʋ kasɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus knew they had some questions, so he said: You are wondering what I meant when I said that for a little while you won't see me, but after a while you will see me.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu bɩɩ fɛɛ mʋ abɩɩlapʋ mʋ bee biti ba taasɛ mʋ asɩn mʋ kasɛ, nɩɩ ɔ taasɛ bamʋ yɛ, “N maa tɔwɛ yɛ, ‘Ɩ san gbɛrɛɛ fan man bɩla yɛ fen wu mɛ, nɩɩ ɩ bɩla waa gbɛrɛɛ fen biti fan wu mɛ’ mʋ, ɩmʋ asɩn nɩɩ fɛn taasɛ abaa?

english_verse: I tell you for certain that you will cry and be sad, but the world will be happy. You will be sad, but later you will be happy.
translation_verse: N tɔwɛ fanɛ kesintin yɛ, fen biti fan su kɛ fan bɔta tɔ, yɛgɛ dulinyaa abi mɔɔ bee gyii bamʋ ansi. Fanɛ nkɔlɔ ii biti ii nyita fanɛ, amaa fanɛ nkɔlɔ kinyita ii biti ɩ ba biliŋi nkɔlɔ fuuli.

english_verse: When a woman is about to give birth, she is in great pain. But after it is all over, she forgets the pain and is happy, because she has brought a child into the world.
translation_verse: I du nɩn fɛɛ keduŋidi maa kɩtaa ɔkyɩɩ mʋ, ɩ kɔ mʋ lɩɩ fɛɛ mʋ awʋrʋfɔ saŋa fʋʋ. Amaa nɩɩ ɔ kʋʋgɛ kebii mʋ, ɛɛ tan mʋ awʋrʋfɔ mʋ sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ kʋʋgɛ kebii waa dulinyaa tɔ.

english_verse: You are now very sad. But later I will see you, and you will be so happy that no one will be able to change the way you feel.
translation_verse: Kanɩn nɩɩ i du sa fanɛ gbaa fanɛ. Nbɩɩnbɩɩ fan bʋ awʋrʋfɔ tɔ. Amaa n biti n bɩla wu fanɛ, kɛ fanɛ ansi i gyii. Nɩɩ ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ lɛɛ kanɩn kensi‐gyii maŋa lɩɩ fanɛ tɔ.

english_verse: When that time comes, you won't have to ask me about anything. I tell you for certain the Father will give you whatever you ask for in my name.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kakɛ maŋa kan fʋʋ mʋ, fan man bɩla yɛ fan taasɛ mɛ sɛhn. N tɔwɛ fanɛ kesintin yɛ Mɛ‐Sɛ ii biti ɔ sa fanɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ fan kʋlɛ lɩɩ mɛ kɩtɩɩ tɔ sʋ.

english_verse: You have not asked for anything in this way before, but now you must ask in my name. Then it will be given to you, so you will be completely happy.
translation_verse: Halɩɩ ba lɩɩ ndaga fan man pɩɩta kʋlɛ kʋtɔ kʋ lɩɩ mɛ kɩtɩɩ tɔ sʋ. Fan kʋlɛ, fen biti fan nyɛ, kɛ fanɛ kensi‐gyii ɔ nyɛ akyɔ.

english_verse: I have used examples to explain to you what I have been talking about. But the time will come when I will speak to you plainly about the Father and will no longer use examples like these.
translation_verse: “Ɩ gyɛ kesintin fɛɛ aŋasan tɔ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ asɩn nɩmʋ. Amaa saŋa kʋ ɩɩ ba nɩɩ n man bɩla yɛ n tɔwɛ fanɛ aŋasan tɔ. N biti n lɛɛ ifuli tɔwɛ fanɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ lɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ sʋ.

english_verse: You will ask the Father in my name, and I won't have to ask him for you.
translation_verse: Kanɩn kakɛ maŋa fen biti fan kʋlɛ Mɛ‐Sɛ lɩɩ mɛ kɩtɩɩ tɔ sʋ. N mɛɛ tɔwɛ nɩn yɛ n biti n yɩlɛ fanɛ ayaa tɔ kʋlɛ Mɛ‐Sɛ sa fanɛ.

english_verse: God the Father loves you because you love me, and you believe I have come from him.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa sʋ kebiti sa fanɛ, kpalɩ fɛɛ fan sʋ kebiti sa mɛ nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ gyii fɛɛ n lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ.

english_verse: I came from the Father into the world, but I am leaving the world and returning to the Father.
translation_verse: N lɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ asɛ ba dulinyaa tɔ. Nɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ n lɩɩ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ n bwii n kpee Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ asɛ.”

english_verse: The disciples said, “Now you are speaking plainly to us! You are not using examples.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu abɩɩlapʋ mʋ ba tɔwɛ yɛ, “Nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ, fʋ man bɩla fɩɩ tɔwɛ aŋasan tɔ, fii sii fii bugi tɔ nɩn fɩɩ tɔwɛ.

english_verse: At last we know that you understand everything, and we don't have any more questions. Now we believe you truly have come from God.”
translation_verse: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ an wu fɛɛ fu nyi kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ, nɩɩ ɩ man bɩla i tiri fɛɛ ɔkʋ a taasɛ fʋ kʋtɔ kʋ. Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an kɔɔlɛ fu gyii yɛ fʋ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: Do you really believe me?
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ fan kɔɔlɛ gyii?

english_verse: The time will come and is already here when all of you will be scattered. Each of you will go back home and leave me by myself. But the Father will be with me, and I won't be alone.
translation_verse: Amaa saŋa kʋ ɩɩ ba, nɩɩ kɩ tɛɛ ba gbaa, nɩɩ fanɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ii biti ɔ yaasɛ tɔ kpee mʋ ayɛ. Fen biti fan yɛgɛ mɛ nkʋn. Amaa ɩ mɛɛ yɛ ɩ san mɛ nkʋn lɩɩ fɛɛ Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ bʋ mɛ asɛ.

english_verse: I have told you this, so that you might have peace in your hearts because of me. While you are in the world, you will have to suffer. But cheer up! I have defeated the world.
translation_verse: “N tɔwɛ fanɛ falɛ asɩn nɩn, kɛ lɩɩ mɛ sʋ mʋ, kɛ fan nyɛ kayɩɩ‐yuuli. Fen biti fan gyii awʋrʋfɔ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ. Amaa fan nyɛ nkɔlɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ n kɔ gyii dulinyaa mʋ sʋ.”

english_verse: After Jesus had finished speaking to his disciples, he looked up toward heaven and prayed: Father, the time has come for you to bring glory to your Son, in order that he may bring glory to you.
translation_verse: Yesu maa tɔwɛ ɩnɩmʋ lʋwɛ mʋ, ɔ kʋsaa mu kumu kɩɩ sʋsʋ nɩɩ ɔ kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ, “Nsɛ saŋa mʋ fʋʋ. Sa mɛ, Fu‐bii mʋ bʋnyaa, kɛ mɛ, Fu‐bii mʋ gbaa n sa fʋ bʋnyaa.

english_verse: And you gave him power over all people, so he would give eternal life to everyone you give him.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ fʋ sa mɛ ɔlʋn lɩɩ asa kpini sʋ, fɛɛ n sa asa mʋ nɩɩ fʋ taa bɔɔta mɛ mʋ kpini nkpa kakpaa.

english_verse: Eternal life is to know you, the only true God, and to know Jesus Christ, the one you sent.
translation_verse: Nkpa kakpaa mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ asa ba bɩɩ fʋ, kesintin Ɩbwaarɛ kʋlʋn mʋ, kɛ ba bɩɩ mɛ, Yesu Krisito mʋ nɩɩ fu sun mʋ.

english_verse: I have brought glory to you here on earth by doing everything you gave me to do.
translation_verse: N bɩya fʋ bʋnyaa kasɛ sʋ nfɩɩ, lɩɩ n maa lʋwɛ fu kusun mʋ nɩɩ fʋ sa mɛ yɛ n ba waa mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: Now, Father, give me back the glory I had with you before the world was created.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐Sɛ, sa mɛ bʋnyaa fu ansi tɔ nbɩɩnbɩɩ nɩmʋ, bʋnyaa mʋ nɩɩ n wʋla n sʋ fʋ asɛ pɔyɩ nɩɩ fʋ tʋʋ dulinyaa mʋ.” Yesu kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ sa mʋ abɩɩlapʋ mʋ

english_verse: You have given me some followers from this world, and I have shown them what you are like. They were yours, but you gave them to me, and they have obeyed you.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu kyaga sʋ yɛ, “N lɛɛ fu kedubi kaapʋ bamʋ nɩɩ fʋ lɛɛ bamʋ lɩɩ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ sa mɛ mʋ. Ba daa ba gyɛ fʋ lɛɛ nɩn, nɩɩ fʋ taa bamʋ sa mɛ. Nɩɩ ba kɔɔlɛ fʋ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ba buu ɩmʋ.

english_verse: They know that you gave me everything I have.
translation_verse: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ, ba bɩɩ fɛɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ n sʋ mʋ lɩɩ fʋ asɛ nɩn.

english_verse: I told my followers what you told me, and they accepted it. They know I came from you, and they believe you are the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ n tɔwɛ bamʋ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ fʋ sa mɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ba kɔɔlɛ. Ba bɩɩ kesintin tɔ fɛɛ n lɩɩ fʋ asɛ, nɩɩ ba kɔɔlɛ gyii fɛɛ fu i sun mɛ.

english_verse: I am praying for them, but not for those who belong to this world. My followers belong to you, and I am praying for them.
translation_verse: N kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ n sa bamʋ. N mɛɛ kʋlɛ n sa dulinyaa abi, amaa bamʋ nɩɩ fʋ taa sa mɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ba gyɛ fʋ lɛɛ mʋ.

english_verse: All I have is yours, and all you have is mine, and they will bring glory to me.
translation_verse: Asa mʋ nɩɩ ba gyɛ mɛ lɛɛ mʋ kpini, ba gyɛ fʋ lɛɛ, nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba gyɛ fʋ lɛɛ mʋ ba gyɛ mɛ lɛɛ. Lɩɩ bamʋ sʋ nɩɩ mɛ bʋnyaa mʋ lɩɩ ifuli.

english_verse: Holy Father, I am no longer in the world. I am coming to you, but my followers are still in the world. So keep them safe by the power of the name you have given me. Then they will be one with each other, just as you and I are one.
translation_verse: N man bɩla yɛ n kyɩna dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ, n ba fʋ asɛ nɩn. Amaa bɛɛ bamʋ bɩrɛ ba san ba bʋ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ. Nsɛ Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ taa fʋ kɩtɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ fʋ sa mɛ ɔlʋn mʋ kun bamʋ, kɛ ba nyɛ waa kʋkʋlʋn fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ maa fʋ an gyɛ kʋkʋlʋn mʋ.

english_verse: While I was with them, I kept them safe by the power you have given me. I guarded them, and not one of them was lost, except the one who had to be lost. This happened so that what the Scriptures say would come true.
translation_verse: Maa kyɩna n bʋ bamʋ asɛ mʋ, kɩtɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ fʋ sa mɛ mʋ, kɩmʋ ɔlʋn tɔ nɩɩ n taa kɩɩ bamʋ sʋ, nɩɩ n kun bamʋ. Ɩmʋ sʋ bamʋ tɔ ɔkʋ man fɔyɩ, amɔɔ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ dagaa fɛɛ ɔ fɔyɩ mʋ, kɛ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩ ba tɔ.

english_verse: I am on my way to you. But I say these things while I am still in the world, so my followers will have the same complete joy that I do.
translation_verse: “Nbɩɩnbɩɩ n ba fʋ asɛ nɩmʋ. Amaa maa san n bʋ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ ɩnɩmʋ, kɛ ba nyɛ mɛ kensi‐gyii bamʋ tɔ danbɩrasa naa lʋwɛ.

english_verse: I have told them your message. But the people of this world hate them, because they don't belong to this world, just as I don't.
translation_verse: N taa fʋ asɩn mʋ sa bamʋ, nɩɩ dulinyaa abi ba kisi bamʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ba man bɩla ba gyɛ dulinyaa tɔ abi, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n man gyɛ dulinyaa tɔ obii mʋ.

english_verse: Father, I don't ask you to take my followers out of the world, but keep them safe from the evil one.
translation_verse: N mɛɛ kʋlɛ fʋ nɩn yɛ fʋ lɛɛ bamʋ lɩɩ dulinyaa tɔ, amaa n kʋlɛ nɩn yɛ fu kun bamʋ lɩɩ Sɩtaanɛ sʋ.

english_verse: They don't belong to this world, and neither do I.
translation_verse: Ba man gyɛ dulinyaa nɩmʋ lɛɛ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n man gyɛ kɩmʋ lɛɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Your word is the truth. So let this truth make them completely yours.
translation_verse: Taa fʋ asɩn kesintin lɔŋɔ bamʋ yɩla, lɩɩ fɛɛ fʋ asɩn mʋ ɩ gyɛ kesintin.

english_verse: I am sending them into the world, just as you sent me.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fu sun mɛ dulinyaa tɔ mʋ, kanɩn nɩɩ ngbaa mɛ n sun bamʋ dulinyaa tɔ.

english_verse: I have given myself completely for their sake, so they may belong completely to the truth.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ bamʋ sʋ nɩɩ n taa mɛ n‐yɩɩ sa fʋ, kɛ ngbaa bamʋ ba nyɛ taa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ sa fʋ kesintin tɔ.” Yesu kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ sa mu abuupu kpini

english_verse: I am not praying just for these followers. I am also praying for everyone else who will have faith because of what my followers will say about me.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu bɩla kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ, “Man gyɛ mɛ abɩɩlapʋ mʋ nkʋn nɩɩ n kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ n sa. N kʋlɛ n sa bamʋ nɩɩ bee biti ba be nu mɛ asɩn lɩɩ bamʋ asɛ kɛ ba kɔɔlɛ mɛ gyii mʋ gbaa.

english_verse: I want all of them to be one with each other, just as I am one with you and you are one with me. I also want them to be one with us. Then the people of this world will believe that you sent me.
translation_verse: Nsɛ, mɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ ɩ gyɛ yɛ bamʋ kpini ba waa kʋkʋlʋn, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fʋ bʋ mɛ tɔ nɩɩ ngbaa n bʋ fʋ tɔ mʋ. N kʋlɛ fʋ yɛ, ba baa ba bʋ anɛ tɔ, kɛ dulinyaa abi ba kɔɔlɛ gyii yɛ fu i sun mɛ.

english_verse: I have honored my followers in the same way you honored me, in order that they may be one with each other, just as we are one.
translation_verse: N sa bamʋ bʋnyaa mʋ nɩɩ fʋ sa mɛ mʋ, kɛ ba nyɛ waa kʋkʋlʋn fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an gyɛ kʋkʋlʋn mʋ.

english_verse: I am one with them, and you are one with me, so they may become completely one. Then this world's people will know that you sent me. They will know that you love my followers as much as you love me.
translation_verse: N ba n bʋ bamʋ tɔ yɛgɛ fʋ bʋ mɛ tɔ, kɛ ba bʋga waa kɔnɔ kʋlʋn naa lʋwɛ. Ɩnɩmʋ ii biti ɩ yɛgɛ dulinyaa abi ba bɩɩ fɛɛ fu i sun mɛ, nɩɩ fʋ sʋ kebiti sa bamʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fʋ sʋ kebiti sa mɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Father, I want everyone you have given me to be with me, wherever I am. Then they will see the glory you have given me, because you loved me before the world was created.
translation_verse: “Nsɛ n biti fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ fʋ taa sa mɛ mʋ, ba baa ba bʋ mɛ asɛ katɩn mʋ nɩɩ n bʋ mʋ. Kɛ ba wu mɛ bʋnyaa mʋ nɩɩ fʋ taa sa mɛ mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fʋ sʋ kebiti sa mɛ pɔyɩ nɩɩ fʋ tʋʋ dulinyaa mʋ.

english_verse: Good Father, the people of this world don't know you. But I know you, and my followers know that you sent me.
translation_verse: “Nsɛ, ɩkpa kyiigisa wuya, dulinyaa abi ba maa man nyi fʋ, amaa mɛɛ mɛ n nyi fʋ, nɩɩ mi abuupu mʋ be nyi fɛɛ fu i sun mɛ.

english_verse: I told them what you are like, and I will tell them even more. Then the love you have for me will become part of them, and I will be one with them.
translation_verse: N lɛɛ fu kedubi kaapʋ bamʋ, nɩɩ n biti n kyaga sʋ lɛɛ fʋ kaapʋ bamʋ, kɛ fu kebiti mʋ nɩɩ fʋ sʋ sa mɛ mʋ kɩ baa kɩ bʋ bamʋ tɔ, kɛ ngbaa mɛ n baa n bʋ bamʋ tɔ.”

english_verse: One of the high priest's servants was there. He was a relative of the servant whose ear Peter had cut off, and he asked, “Didn't I see you in the garden with that man?”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ mʋ ayaafɔlɛ mʋ tɔ ɔkʋ, ɔmʋ nɩɩ Pita ŋɛ mʋ kʋsʋ tɩn mʋ, mʋ kʋʋpʋ, taasɛ mʋ yɛ, “N man wu fʋ maa bʋ mʋ asɛ kadɔɔ‐bi mʋ tɔ?”

english_verse: Jesus again asked, “Who are you looking for?” “We are looking for Jesus from Nazareth,” they answered.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔ bɩla taasɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Anɩmʋ nɩɩ fen biti?” Nɩɩ ba lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “An biti Yesu Kanasareti‐nyɩn mʋ nɩn.”

english_verse: This time Jesus replied, “I have already told you that I am Jesus. If I am the one you are looking for, let these others go.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “N tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ mɛ ɩ gyɛ mʋ. Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ mɛ nɩɩ fen biti bɩrɛ, fan yɛgɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba tii mɛ sʋ falɛ ba natɛ.”

english_verse: Simon Peter had brought along a sword. He pulled it out and struck at Malchus, the servant of the high priest, cutting off his right ear.
translation_verse: Simon Pita sʋ sakunde, nɩɩ ɔ bɩɩtɛ kɩmʋ lɔɔrɛ nɩɩ ɔ ŋɛ oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ kɩyaafɔlɛ gyisa kʋsʋ tɩn. Kɩyaafɔlɛ maŋa kɩtɩɩ ɩ gyɛ Malikusi.

english_verse: The Roman officer and his men, together with the temple police, arrested Jesus and tied him up.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ anaakɔpʋ mʋ yɛ bamʋ ɔbɩlɩsa yɛ kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ akɩɩsʋpʋ mʋ ba kɩtaa Yesu, nɩɩ ba ŋmina mʋ.

english_verse: Peter stayed outside near the gate. But the other disciple came back out and spoke to the girl at the gate. She let Peter go in,
translation_verse: Amaa Pita gyoo kebunɔ. Ɔbɩɩlapʋ mʋ nɩɩ o nyi Oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ mʋ, bwii ba tɔwɛ kibite mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kɩɩ kebunɔ mʋ sʋ mʋ asɛ, nɩɩ ɔ taa Pita loo.

english_verse: but asked him, “Aren't you one of that man's followers?” “No, I am not!” Peter answered.
translation_verse: Kibite mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɩɩ kebunɔ mʋ taasɛ Pita yɛ, “Fʋ man gyɛ Yesu abɩɩlapʋ mʋ ɔkʋ nɩn?” Nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Ayee, n man gyɛ.”

english_verse: It was cold, and the servants and temple police had made a charcoal fire. They were warming themselves around it, when Peter went over and stood near the fire to warm himself. Jesus Is Questioned by the High Priest (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɩ kyɩna ɩ gyɛ awɔɔ tɔ nɩn, nɩɩ ayaafɔlɛ yɛ kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ akɩɩsʋpʋ mʋ ba dɩyɛla fʋlɔn bɛɛ wʋlɛ, nɩɩ Pita gbaa ba yɩlɛ bamʋ asɛ ɛɛ wʋlɛ fʋlɔn. Oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ mʋ taasɛ Yesu asɩn (Matiwu

english_verse: The high priest questioned Jesus about his followers and his teaching.
translation_verse: Oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ Anasi taasɛ Yesu lɩɩ mʋ abɩɩlapʋ mʋ yɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kaapʋ mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: Why are you questioning me? Why don't you ask the people who heard me? They know what I have said.”
translation_verse: Mɩnɛ sʋ nɩɩ fɩɩ taasɛ mɛ falɛ asɩn? Taasɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba nu mɛ asɛ mʋ. Ba nyi kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus was still tied up, and Annas sent him to Caiaphas the high priest. Peter Again Denies that He Knows Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ nɩɩ ɔbɩlɩsa Anasi yɛgɛ nɩɩ ba taa Yesu yɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba ŋmina mʋ mʋ naa sa Kayifasi, Oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ mʋ. Pita kɩkyɛɛ kɩnyɔsapʋ yɛ kɩsasapʋ yɛ ɔ man nyi Yesu (Matiwu

english_verse: It was early in the morning when Jesus was taken from Caiaphas to the building where the Roman governor stayed. But the crowd waited outside. Any of them who had gone inside would have become unclean and would not be allowed to eat the Passover meal.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba lɛɛ Yesu lɩɩ Kayifasi asɛ nyenyenfuu, kpee Ɔsʋwʋlɛ Ɔkɩɩsʋpʋ mʋ kɩkpaara tɔ Amaa Gyiwu abi mʋ ba man loo kɩkpaara mʋ tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ nɩɩ ba kan loo tʋtɔ mʋ, bee biti ba waa ineesi kɛ i tii bamʋ ɔkpa kɛ ba man nyɛ gyii Kesu kɔnɔ Kanyaŋɛ nbunɔ mʋ.

english_verse: Pilate came out and asked, “What charges are you bringing against this man?”
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ Ɔsʋwʋlɛ ɔkɩɩsʋpʋ Paleti lɩɩ kɩkpaara sʋ ba bamʋ asɛ, nɩɩ ɔ taasɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Mɩnɛ asɩn pwɩɩsa nɩɩ fan sʋ lɩɩ ɔnyɩn nɩmʋ sʋ?”

english_verse: They answered, “He is a criminal! That's why we brought him to you.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Ɔ daa ɔ man waa alibi akʋ nɩn, naafɔɔ a mɛɛ yɛ a taa mʋ ba waa fʋ abaa tɔ.”

english_verse: And so what Jesus said about his death would soon come true.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ waa nɩn kɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ lɩɩ mu lewu mʋ nɩɩ ee biti o wu mʋ kudubi ɩ ba tɔ.

english_verse: Pilate then went back inside. He called Jesus over and asked, “Are you the king of the Jews?”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Paleti bwii loo mʋ kɩkpaara tɔ. Nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ Yesu ba yɩlɛ mu ansi tɔ, nɩɩ ɔ taasɛ mʋ yɛ, “Fʋ ɩ gyɛ Gyiwu abi Owura mʋ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Are you asking this on your own or did someone tell you about me?”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu taasɛ mʋ yɛ, “Asɩn mʋ nɩɩ fʋ taasɛ mɛ falɛ lɩɩ fʋ asɛ nɩn abɛɛ ɔsa kʋ ɩ tɔwɛ mɛ asɩn sa fʋ?”

english_verse: “You know I'm not a Jew!” Pilate said. “Your own people and the chief priests brought you to me. What have you done?”
translation_verse: Paleti lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “N gyɛ Gyiwu obii nɩn? Fʋ gbaa‐gbaa fʋ asa yɛ fʋ aseepu bɩlɩsa ɩ taa fʋ waa mɛ kɩbaa tɔ. Mɩnɛ nɩɩ fʋ waa?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “My kingdom doesn't belong to this world. If it did, my followers would have fought to keep me from being handed over to our leaders. No, my kingdom doesn't belong to this world.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Mi kuwura‐gyii kɩ man gyɛ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ lɛɛ. Nɩɩ n daa n gyɛ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ lɛɛ nɩn, naafɔɔ mi abuupu ba dɩn kɔ sa mɛ, kɛ Gyiwu abi ba man nyɛ mɛ kɩtaa waa bamʋ abɩlɩsa abaa tɔ. Amaa mi kuwura‐gyii mʋ kɩ man gyɛ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ lɛɛ.”

english_verse: “So you are a king,” Pilate replied. “You are saying that I am a king,” Jesus told him. “I was born into this world to tell about the truth. And everyone who belongs to the truth knows my voice.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Paleti lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Kanɩn bɩrɛ fʋ gyɛ owura nɩn!” Yesu lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Fʋ maa tɔwɛ yɛ n gyɛ owura mʋ, ɩ gyɛ kesintin. Ɩnɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ ba kʋʋgɛ mɛ ba dulinyaa tɔ, kɛ n ba tɔwɛ lɩɩ kesintin mʋ sʋ. Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee biti kesintin mʋ ii nu mɛ asɛ.” Ba bun Yesu lewu kʋpwɛ (Matiwu

english_verse: And since I usually set a prisoner free for you at Passover, would you like for me to set free the king of the Jews?”
translation_verse: Amaa ɩ gyɛ fanɛ anaana tɔ nɩn fɛɛ Kesu kɔnɔ Kanyaŋɛ nbunɔ kensi‐gyii saŋa n yɛgɛ n lɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba tii bamʋ obu mʋ ɔkʋ mʋ nɩɩ fen biti mʋ, n sa fanɛ. Ɩmʋ sʋ fen biti fɛɛ n yɛgɛ fanɛ Gyiwu abi owura mʋ sa fanɛ abɛɛ?”

english_verse: They shouted, “No, not him! We want Barabbas.” Now Barabbas was a terrorist.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba kuusi tɔwɛ yɛ, “Ayee! Man gyɛ mʋ, lɛɛ Barabasi sa anɛ.” Barabasi ɩ kyɩna ɔ kʋsʋ yɩlɛ awura sʋ bɩya keluu.

english_verse: Pilate gave orders for Jesus to be beaten with a whip.
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ nɩɩ Paleti taa Yesu sa, nɩɩ ba tɩŋɛ mʋ awulibi.

english_verse: The soldiers made a crown out of thorn branches and put it on Jesus. Then they put a purple robe on him.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ anaakɔpʋ mʋ ba taa iwii bɔɔ kuwura‐wʋrʋ bun mʋ, nɩɩ ba bun mʋ kɩrɩman‐kyu balɩmaasʋ fɛɛ owura.

english_verse: They came up to him and said, “Hey, you king of the Jews!” They also hit him with their fists.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ bɛɛ ba mʋ asɛ bɛɛ tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Eee! Gyiwu abi owura, eee, owura!” Nɩɩ bɛɛ kpee bɛɛ kpa mʋ ɩtan.

english_verse: Once again Pilate went out. This time he said, “I will have Jesus brought out to you again. Then you can see for yourselves that I have not found him guilty.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Paleti bɩla lɩɩ ba kewu Gyiwu abi mʋ asɛ ba tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Fan nu nfɩɩ, n sʋ mʋ n bɩya fanɛ, kɛ fan bɩɩ fɛɛ mɛɛ mɛ n man wu alibi akʋ mʋ sʋ, mʋ nɩɩ n taa bun mʋ kʋpwɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus came out, wearing the crown of thorns and the purple robe. Pilate said, “Here is the man!”
translation_verse: Yesu maa lɩɩ ba mʋ, o bun iwii kuwura‐wʋrʋ yɛ kɩrɩman‐kyu balɩmaasʋ, nɩɩ Paleti tɔwɛ asa mʋ yɛ, “Fan kɩɩ, ɔnyɩn mʋ ndee!”

english_verse: When the chief priests and the temple police saw him, they yelled, “Nail him to a cross! Nail him to a cross!” Pilate told them, “You take him and nail him to a cross! I don't find him guilty of anything.”
translation_verse: Aseepu bɩlɩsa yɛ Gyiwu anaakɔpʋ ba maa wu Yesu mʋ ba kuusi yɛ, “Da mʋ mata oyu laasa sʋ mɔɔ. Da mʋ mata.” Nɩɩ Paleti tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Fanɛ gbaa‐gbaa fanɛ fan taa mʋ naa da mata oyu laasa sʋ. Mɛɛ mɛ n man wu alibi akʋ mʋ nɩɩ n taa bun mʋ kʋpwɛ.”

english_verse: The crowd replied, “He claimed to be the Son of God! Our law says that he must be put to death.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Gyiwu abi mʋ ba lɛɛ Paleti kɔnɔ yɛ, “An sʋ nbara kʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ ɔnyɩn nɩmʋ dagaa maa wu, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ tɩɩ mʋ n‐yɩɩ yɛ mʋ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii.”

english_verse: When Pilate heard this, he was terrified.
translation_verse: Paleti maa nu ɩnɩmʋ mʋ kufuu kɩ kɩtaa mʋ tii sʋ.

english_verse: He went back inside and asked Jesus, “Where are you from?” But Jesus did not answer.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ o bwiiyaa Yesu loo kɩkpaara mʋ tɔ nɩɩ ɔ taasɛ mʋ yɛ, “Fɩnɛ nɩɩ fʋ lɩɩ?” Amaa Yesu man tʋwɛ mʋ.

english_verse: “Why won't you answer my question?” Pilate asked. “Don't you know I have the power to let you go free or to nail you to a cross?”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔ bɩla taasɛ mʋ yɛ, “Fu kina mɛ asɛ kɩ tɔwɛ? Fʋ man nyi fɛɛ n sʋ ɔlʋn n taalɛ yɛgɛ fʋ natɛ kɩyan, abɛɛ ba da fʋ mata oyu laasa sʋ mɔɔ?”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “If God had not given you the power, you couldn't do anything at all to me. But the one who handed me over to you did something even worse.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu lɛɛ mʋ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ daa ɔ man sa fʋ ɔlʋn mɛ sʋ nɩn, naafɔɔ fʋ mɛɛ taalɛ waa mɛ sɛhn. Amaa ɔnyɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ mɛ sa fʋ mʋ, mu alibi ɩ kyɔ fʋ lɛɛ gaa.”

english_verse: Then Pilate wanted to set Jesus free. But the crowd again yelled, “If you set this man free, you are no friend of the Emperor! Anyone who claims to be a king is an enemy of the Emperor.”
translation_verse: Paleti maa nu kanɩn mʋ, o biti ɔkpa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bɔla yɛgɛ Yesu ɔ natɛ kɩyan. Amaa Gyiwu abi mʋ ba kuusi yɛ, “Fʋ dan kan yɛgɛ nɩɩ ɔnyɩn nɩmʋ natɛ kɩyan bɩrɛ, fʋ man gyɛ Owura lala Kasaro mʋ kyɛmɩnɛ. Kpalɩ fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ tɩɩ mʋ n‐yɩɩ yɛ ɔ gyɛ owura mʋ, gyɛ Owura lala Kasaro mʋ dʋn nɩn.”

english_verse: When Pilate heard this, he brought Jesus out. Then he sat down on the judge's bench at the place known as “The Stone Pavement.” In Aramaic this pavement is called “Gabbatha.”
translation_verse: Paleti maa nu kanɩn mʋ, ɔ taa Yesu lɩɩ ba kɩlandɛ sʋ, nɩɩ Paleti naa kyɩna kagya mʋ nɩɩ awura bɛɛ kyɩna kɩmʋ tɔ bɛɛ gyii asɩn mʋ. Bɛɛ tɩɩ tʋtɔ yɛ, “Abuu ɔtagakpa.” Gyiwu abi katɔwɛ tɔ bɛɛ tɩɩ kɩmʋ yɛ, “Gabata.”

english_verse: It was about noon on the day before Passover, and Pilate said to the crowd, “Look at your king!”
translation_verse: Kanɩn kakɛ maŋa gyɛ kakɛ kʋlasa sa Kesu kɔnɔ Kanyaŋɛ nbunɔ kensi‐gyii mʋ. Lɩɩ ɩ maa fʋʋ kyɔwɛ amu nsana mʋ. Nɩɩ Paleti tɔwɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ yɛ, “Fan kɩɩ fanɛ Owura!”

english_verse: Then Pilate handed Jesus over to be nailed to a cross. Jesus Is Nailed to a Cross (Matthew
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ maŋa nɩɩ Paleti taa mʋ sa bamʋ yɛ ba naa da mʋ mata oyu laasa sʋ mɔɔ. Ba da Yesu mata oyu laasa sʋ (Matiwu

english_verse: So the chief priests went to Pilate and said, “Why did you write that he is King of the Jews? You should have written, ‘He claimed to be King of the Jews.’ ”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ aseepu bɩlɩsa mʋ ba ba tɔwɛ Paleti yɛ, “Man kyʋrɔɔ yɛ ‘Gyiwu abi Owura’, amaa kyʋrɔɔ yɛ ‘Ɔnyɩn nɩmʋ ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ Gyiwu abi owura.’ ”

english_verse: When Jesus saw his mother and his favorite disciple with her, he said to his mother, “This man is now your son.”
translation_verse: Yesu maa wu mu‐nyi yɛ mʋ ɔbɩɩlapʋ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kebiti sa mʋ ba maa yɩlɛ tʋtɔ mʋ, ɔ tɔwɛ mu‐nyi yɛ, “Ɔkyɩɩ, fu‐bii ndee.”

english_verse: ) Jesus was taken away,
translation_verse: ) Ɩmʋ sʋ anaakɔpʋ mʋ ba taa Yesu kyʋn.

english_verse: and he carried his cross to a place known as “The Skull.” In Aramaic this place is called “Golgotha.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu lɩɩ tʋtɔ ɔ kyɛ mʋ oyu laasa naa fʋʋ katɩn mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ yɛ “Kumu kawɛ opula.” Nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ kɩmʋ Gyiwu abi katɔwɛ tɔ yɛ, “Goligota” mʋ.

english_verse: There Jesus was nailed to the cross, and on each side of him a man was also nailed to a cross.
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ nɩɩ ba da mʋ anyenbi mata oyu laasa sʋ. Nɩɩ ba bɩla da asa nyɔ anyenbi mata iyu laasa sʋ, ɔkʋ bʋ mʋ gyisa sʋ nɩɩ ɔkʋ mɔɔ bʋ mʋ bɩna sʋ.

english_verse: Pilate ordered the charge against Jesus to be written on a board and put above the cross. It read, “Jesus of Nazareth, King of the Jews.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Paleti yɛgɛ nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ asɩn gyaga kʋtɔ kʋ sʋ naa mata oyu laasa mʋ sʋ yɛ, “YESU KANASARETI‐NYƖN, GYIWU ABI OWURA.”

english_verse: The words were written in Hebrew, Latin, and Greek. The place where Jesus was taken wasn't far from the city, and many of the people read the charge against him.
translation_verse: Ba kyʋrɔɔ ɩmʋ Gyiwu abi yɛ Roma abi yɛ Giriki abi ntɔwɛ tɔ, nɩɩ Gyiwu abi gaalaagaa ba kalɛ ɩmʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ katɩn mʋ nɩɩ ba da mʋ mata oyu laasa sʋ mʋ, man bʋ kata yɛ kadɛ mʋ.

english_verse: But Pilate told them, “What is written will not be changed!”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Paleti tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ n dan kyʋrɔɔ mʋ kɩmʋ nɩɩ n kyʋrɔɔ.” Ba barɩgɛ Yesu atɔ bunsa tɔ

english_verse: The soldiers said to each other, “Let's not rip it apart. We will gamble to see who gets it.” This happened so the Scriptures would come true, which say, “They divided up my clothes and gambled for my garments.” The soldiers then did what they had decided.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ anaakɔpʋ mʋ ba tɔwɛ abaa yɛ, “A man kyatɛ kɩmʋ barɩgɛ tɔ. Fan yɛgɛ a tʋʋ kɩmʋ sʋ nbii, kɛ a kɩɩ anɛ tɔ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ee biti o gyii kɩmʋ.” Ba maa waa kanɩn mʋ, ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩ ba tɔ kesintin. Ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, “Ba barɩgɛ mɛ atɔ bunsa tɔ sa abaa, nɩɩ ba tʋʋ nbii mɛ kaalɛ bʋnswɩɩsa sʋ.” Ɩmʋ sʋ kanɩn nɩɩ anaakɔpʋ mʋ ba waa.

english_verse: Jesus' mother stood beside his cross with her sister and Mary the wife of Clopas. Mary Magdalene was standing there too.
translation_verse: Yesu mu‐nyi yɛ mʋ nɩkarɛ yɛ Kilopa mʋ‐ka Mɛɛrɩ yɛ Mɛɛrɩ Magidalen ba yɩlɛ Yesu oyu laasa mʋ asɛ.

english_verse: But when they came to Jesus, they saw he was already dead, and they did not break his legs.
translation_verse: Amaa ba maa fʋʋ Yesu asɛ mʋ, ba wu fɛɛ ɔ tɛɛ wʋla wu, kanɩn sʋ ba man gyayɩ mʋ ayaa.

english_verse: In the place where Jesus had been nailed to a cross, there was a garden with a tomb that had never been used.
translation_verse: Kadɔɔ‐bi kʋ bʋ tiri katɩn mʋ nɩɩ ba da Yesu anyenbi mata oyu laasa sʋ mʋ. Kanɩn kadɔɔ‐bi maŋa tɔ mʋ, nɩɩ ba lɔŋɔ kakyan kʋ kʋfʋlɛ tɔ yɩla, nɩɩ ba man pɩɩta pula ɔkʋ kɩmʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Jesus knew that he had now finished his work. And in order to make the Scriptures come true, he said, “I am thirsty!”
translation_verse: Asɩn nɩmʋ kpini kamaa mʋ, Yesu nyi fɛɛ nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa kɩ lʋwɛ, nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Bʋlɩfɔ sʋ mɛ.” Ɔ tɔwɛ ɩnɩmʋ nɩn kɛ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩ nyɛ ba tɔ.

english_verse: A jar of cheap wine was there. Someone then soaked a sponge with the wine and held it up to Jesus' mouth on the stem of a hyssop plant.
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ mʋ, nta nyaŋɛsa ɩ bɔla kɔlɔ‐bi ɩ yɩlɛ, nɩɩ anaakɔpʋ mʋ ba taa ɔkyɛɛ ba nyɔ nta mʋ tɔ, nɩɩ ba taa sɔgɩta hisopi oyu sʋ, nɩɩ ba kʋsaa kɩmʋ naa tii mʋ kɔnɔ.

english_verse: kilograms of spices made from myrrh and aloes. This was the same Nicodemus who had visited Jesus one night.
translation_verse: Yesu maa kyʋkyʋʋ nta mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ ɩ lʋwɛ.” Nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ ɔŋɛɛ.

english_verse: The next day would be both a Sabbath and the Passover. It was a special day for the Jewish people, and they did not want the bodies to stay on the crosses during this day. So they asked Pilate to break the men's legs and take their bodies down.
translation_verse: Kanɩn kakɛ maŋa kɩ gyɛ kakɛ kʋlasa akɛ sa Kakɛ fʋʋtɛsa. Kakɛ fʋʋtɛsa maŋa maa gyɛ Kakɛ fʋʋtɛsa lala mʋ, nɩɩ Gyiwu abɩlɩsa mʋ be mee biti fɛɛ asa mʋ ba baa ba saa iyu laasa mʋ sʋ naa fʋʋ kakɛ fʋʋtɛsa maŋa. Kanɩn sʋ Gyiwu abɩlɩsa mʋ ba naa kʋlɛ Paleti yɛ ɔ yɛgɛ ba naa gyayɩ‐gyayɩ bamʋ ayaa, kɛ ba wu bilen, kɛ ba nyɛ saatɛ bamʋ lɩɩ iyu laasa mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: One of the soldiers stuck his spear into Jesus' side, and blood and water came out.
translation_verse: Amaa anaakɔpʋ mʋ tɔ ɔkʋ taa kɩkpɛ yii Yesu kikelebi tɔ. Opula maŋa tɔ nɩɩ nkalan yɛ nkyu ɩ lɩɩ wʋrɩgɛ.

english_verse: We know this is true, because it was told by someone who saw it happen. Now you can have faith too.
translation_verse: Ɔmʋ nɩɩ o wu ɩmʋ yɛ ansi ɩ maa waa mʋ, mʋ ii gyii ɩmʋ kesintin, kɛ fan nyɛ kɔɔlɛ gyii. Nɩɩ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ kesintin, nɩɩ o nyi fɛɛ mʋ asɩn mʋ gyɛ kesintin.

english_verse: All this happened so that the Scriptures would come true, which say, “No bone of his body will be broken”
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ waa nɩn kaapʋ fɛɛ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩ ba tɔ kesintin. Asɩn mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, “Mu kuwuya kʋlʋn gbaa kɩ mɛɛ yɛ kɩ gya.”

english_verse: and “They will see the one in whose side they stuck a spear.” Jesus Is Buried (Matthew
translation_verse: Nɩɩ bɩla kyʋrɔɔ yɩla katɩn kʋ gbaa tɔwɛ yɛ, “Asa bee biti ba kɩɩ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ba taa kɩkpɛ yii mʋ mʋ.” Yesu kepula (Matiwu

english_verse: The tomb was nearby, and since it was the time to prepare for the Sabbath, they were in a hurry to put Jesus' body there.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ kanɩn kakɛ maŋa maa gyɛ Gyiwu abi kakɛ kʋlasa sa Kakɛ fʋʋtɛsa sʋ mʋ, nɩɩ kakyan mʋ maa tiri tʋtɔ sʋ mʋ, ba taa Yesu naa pula tʋtɔ.

english_verse: Joseph from Arimathea was one of Jesus' disciples. He had kept it secret though, because he was afraid of the Jewish leaders. But now he asked Pilate to let him have Jesus' body. Pilate gave him permission, and Joseph took it down from the cross.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ kamaa tɔ mʋ, ɔnyɩn mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ mʋ yɛ Gyosefu mʋ kpee Paleti asɛ naa kʋlɛ mʋ yɛ, ɔ sa mʋ ɔkpa kɛ ɔ naa saatɛ Yesu kibuni naa pula. Nɩɩ Paleti sa mʋ ɔkpa, nɩɩ o kpee naa taa Yesu kibuni mʋ. Gyosefu maŋa lɩɩ Arimatiya kadɛ tɔ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Yesu ɔbɩɩlapʋ mʋ tɔ ɔkʋ. Amaa maa sɩlɛ Gyiwu abɩlɩsa sʋ mʋ, ɔ man lɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ ifuli.

english_verse: The two men wrapped the body in a linen cloth, together with the spices, which was how the Jewish people buried their dead.
translation_verse: Anyɩn anyɔ mʋ ba taa Yesu kibuni mʋ, nɩɩ ba taa taafuli mili mʋ, nɩɩ ba bɔ mʋ tulale fɛɛ kanɩn mʋ nɩɩ Gyiwu abi bɛɛ waa bamʋ obuni, pɔyɩ nɩɩ bee pula mʋ.

english_verse: Thomas replied, “You are my Lord and my God!”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Tomasi tɔwɛ yɛ, “Fʋ ɩ gyɛ mɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ yɛ mɛ Ɩbwaarɛ.”

english_verse: On Sunday morning while it was still dark, Mary Magdalene went to the tomb and saw that the stone had been rolled away from the entrance.
translation_verse: Kwasida akɛ kabwaayɩkɛ ɩ maa man pɩɩ ŋmaŋɛ tɔ mʋ, Mɛɛrɩ Magidalen kpee kakyan mʋ asɛ, nɩɩ o wu fɛɛ ba lɛɛ kubuu mʋ nɩɩ ba gbiliti ba tii kɩfʋlɛ tɔ kakyan mʋ kɔnɔ mʋ.

english_verse: So the two of them went back to the other disciples. Jesus Appears to Mary Magdalene (Mark
translation_verse: Nɩɩ abɩɩlapʋ mʋ ba bwii kpee bamʋ akpaara sʋ.

english_verse: The disciple who got there first then went into the tomb, and when he saw it, he believed.
translation_verse: Ɔbɩɩlapʋ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyankpaa fʋʋ tʋtɔ gbaa maa loo to nɩɩ o wu ɩmʋ mʋ, ɔ kɔɔlɛ gyii.

english_verse: Although Thomas the Twin was one of the twelve disciples, he wasn't with the others when Jesus appeared to them.
translation_verse: Tomasi mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ abɩɩlapʋ kudu anyɔ mʋ tɔ ɔkʋ, nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Kabwaarabi mʋ, ɔ man bʋ abɩɩlapʋ mʋ asɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Yesu ba bamʋ asɛ mʋ.

english_verse: and saw two angels inside. They were dressed in white and were sitting where Jesus' body had been. One was at the head and the other was at the foot.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ o wu Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ anyɔ yɛgɛ ba bun atɔ fufuli, ba maa tɛ katɩn mʋ nɩɩ ba daa taa Yesu kibuni yɩla mʋ, ɔkʋ tɛ mu amu sʋ nɩɩ ɔkʋ mɔɔ tɛ mʋ ayaa kasɛ.

english_verse: She ran to Simon Peter and to Jesus' favorite disciple and said, “They have taken the Lord from the tomb! We don't know where they have put him.”
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɔ sɩlɛ bwii kpee Simon Pita yɛ ɔbɩɩlapʋ banban mʋ nɩɩ Yesu su kebiti sa mʋ mʋ asɛ, naa tɔwɛ yɛ, “Ba taa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ lɩɩ kakyan mʋ tɔ, nɩɩ a man nyi katɩn mʋ nɩɩ ba taa mʋ naa yɩla.”

english_verse: Peter and the other disciple started for the tomb.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ Pita maa ɔbɩɩlapʋ banban mʋ ba lɩɩ bee kpee kakyan mʋ asɛ.

english_verse: They ran side by side, until the other disciple ran faster than Peter and got there first.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ bamʋ anyɔ maa kpini ba sɩlɛ kyɛɛkyɛɛ bee kpee, amaa ɔbɩɩlapʋ banban mʋ sɩlɛ kyʋn Pita sʋ gyankpaa naa fʋʋ kakyan mʋ asɛ.

english_verse: He bent over and saw the strips of linen cloth lying inside the tomb, but he did not go in.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ o muŋa kɩɩ kakyan mʋ tɔ, nɩɩ o wu taafuli maa dɛ tɔ, amaa ɔ man loo to.

english_verse: When Simon Peter got there, he went into the tomb and saw the strips of cloth.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Simon Pita ba kamaa tɔ, nɩɩ o loo kakyan mʋ tɔ, nɩɩ o wu taafuli maa dɛ tʋtɔ,

english_verse: He also saw the piece of cloth that had been used to cover Jesus' face. It was rolled up and in a place by itself.
translation_verse: yɛ kikyibi fufuli mʋ nɩɩ ba taa ŋmina mu kumu mʋ. Kikyibi mʋ kɩ bɔɔ kɩ dɛ kɩmʋ kʋkwɛ.

english_verse: Mary Magdalene stood crying outside the tomb. She was still weeping, when she stooped down
translation_verse: Amaa Mɛɛrɩ bɩrɛ ɔ yɩlɛ kakyan mʋ asɛ ee su. Maa yɩlɛ ee su mʋ, nɩɩ o muŋa suŋa kɩɩ kakyan mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: The angels asked Mary, “Why are you crying?” She answered, “They have taken away my Lord's body! I don't know where they have put him.”
translation_verse: Ba taasɛ mʋ yɛ, “Ɔkyɩɩ, mɩnɛ waa nɩɩ fii su?” Nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Ba taa mɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ kyʋn, nɩɩ n man nyi katɩn mʋ nɩɩ ba taa mʋ naa yɩla.”

english_verse: Jesus asked her, “Why are you crying? Who are you looking for?” She thought he was the gardener and said, “Sir, if you have taken his body away, please tell me, so I can go and get him.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu taasɛ mʋ yɛ, “Ɔkyɩɩ, mɩnɛ ɩ waa nɩɩ fii su? Anɩmʋ nɩɩ fii biti?” Mɛɛrɩ maa fɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ ɔ gyɛ kʋdɔɔ mʋ ɔkɩɩsʋpʋ mʋ, ɔ lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Ɔbɩlɩsa, nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ fʋ ɩ kan taa mʋ mʋ, tɔwɛ mɛ katɩn mʋ nɩɩ fʋ taa mʋ naa yɩla kɛ n naa taa mʋ.”

english_verse: Jesus told her, “Don't hold on to me! I have not yet gone to the Father. But tell my disciples I am going to the one who is my Father and my God, as well as your Father and your God.”
translation_verse: Yesu tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Man mata mɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ n man pɩɩta bwii kpee Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ asɛ. Amaa kpee mi abuupu mʋ asɛ naa tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, n bwii n kpee Mɛ‐Sɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ fanɛ‐Sɛ, yɛ mɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ fanɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ asɛ.”

english_verse: and showed them his hands and his side. When the disciples saw the Lord, they became very happy.
translation_verse: Maa tɔwɛ ɩnɩmʋ lʋwɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ taa mʋ abaa yɛ mu kikelebi kaapʋ bamʋ. Nɩɩ abɩɩlapʋ mu ansi i gyii fɛɛ ba maa wu Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ.

english_verse: The disciples were afraid of the Jewish leaders, and on the evening of that same Sunday they locked themselves in a room. Suddenly, Jesus appeared in the middle of the group. He greeted them
translation_verse: Kwasida maŋa kalaatɩpwɛ sʋ mʋ, abɩɩlapʋ mʋ ba bʋ obu to, nɩɩ ba tii ɔpʋnʋ mʋ biri bamʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ waa tɔ, lɩɩ ba maa sɩlɛ Gyiwu abɩlɩsa mʋ sʋ. Nɩɩ Yesu ba yɩlɛ bamʋ nsana, nɩɩ ɔ fwaala bamʋ yɛ, “Kayɩɩ yuuli kɩ ba fanɛ asɛ!”

english_verse: After Jesus had greeted them again, he said, “I am sending you, just as the Father has sent me.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu bɩla tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Kayɩɩ yuuli kɩ ba fanɛ asɛ. Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Mɛ‐Sɛ sun mɛ mʋ, kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ ngbaa mɛ n sun fanɛ.”

english_verse: Then he breathed on them and said, “Receive the Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔ fʋʋtɛ bun bamʋ, nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Fan kɔɔlɛ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ.

english_verse: If you forgive anyone's sins, they will be forgiven. But if you don't forgive their sins, they will not be forgiven.” Jesus and Thomas
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fan kan taa ɔkʋ alibi kɛɛ mʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ gbaa ii biti ɔ taa mu alibi kɛɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ fan man kan taa mu alibi kɛɛ mʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ gbaa mɛɛ yɛ ɔ taa mu alibi kɛɛ mʋ.” Yesu lɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ kaapʋ Tomasi

english_verse: So they told him, “We have seen the Lord!” But Thomas said, “First, I must see the nail scars in his hands and touch them with my finger. I must put my hand where the spear went into his side. I won't believe unless I do this!”
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ abɩɩlapʋ banban mʋ ba tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “An wu Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ.” Amaa ɔ tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Nɩɩ n man kan wu anyenbi alɔpanɛ mʋ abaa tɔ, kɛ n taa mɛ kɩbaa‐bi yii ɩmʋ tɔ, kɛ n taa mɛ kɩbaa yii mʋ kikelebi tɔ mʋ, n mɛɛ yɛ n kɔɔlɛ gyii.”

english_verse: A week later the disciples were together again. This time, Thomas was with them. Jesus came in while the doors were still locked and stood in the middle of the group. He greeted his disciples
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ nkɛ nsunɔ kamaa mʋ, abɩɩlapʋ mʋ ba bɩla ba bʋ kɩkpaara mʋ sʋ, yɛgɛ Tomasi bʋ bamʋ asɛ. Ba tii bamʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ biri sʋ waa obu to. Ba ba kɩɩ mʋ, Yesu ba yɩlɛ bamʋ nsana, nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Kayɩɩ yuula ɩ ba fanɛ sʋ!”

english_verse: and said to Thomas, “Put your finger here and look at my hands! Put your hand into my side. Stop doubting and have faith!”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ Tomasi yɛ, “Taa fʋ kɩbaa‐bi yii nfɩɩ, kɛ fʋ kɩɩ mɛ abaa tɔ. Tɛɛŋɛ fʋ kɩbaa yii mɛ kikelebi tɔ. Yɛgɛ sika‐sika kɩwaa kɛ fʋ kɔɔlɛ gyii.”

english_verse: Jesus said, “Thomas, do you have faith because you have seen me? The people who have faith in me without seeing me are the ones who are really blessed!” Why John Wrote His Book
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Tomasi, fʋ maa wu mɛ sʋ nɩɩ fʋ kɔɔlɛ gyii? Kusee ɩ gyɛ sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba man wu mɛ nɩɩ ba kɔɔlɛ gyii.”

english_verse: Jesus worked many other miracles for his disciples, and not all of them are written in this book.
translation_verse: Yesu waa ɩsɩnkaala gaalaagaa abɩɩlapʋ mu ansi tɔ, mʋ nɩɩ ba man kyʋrɔɔ ɩmʋ waa ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ tɔ.

english_verse: But these are written so that you will put your faith in Jesus as the Messiah and the Son of God. If you have faith in him, you will have true life.
translation_verse: Amaa ba kyʋrɔɔ ɩnɩmʋ nɩn, kɛ fan nyɛ kɔɔlɛ gyii fɛɛ Yesu ɩ gyɛ Krisito, Ɔmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ wʋla lɛɛ, nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Mu‐Bii mʋ. Nɩɩ fan kan kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii mʋ, fen biti fan nyɛ nkpa.

english_verse: Simon Peter, Thomas the Twin, Nathanael from Cana in Galilee, and the brothers James and John, were there, together with two other disciples.
translation_verse: Kakaakʋ abɩɩlapʋ mʋ akʋ ba baa ba bʋ katɩn kʋlʋn. Bamʋ ɩ gyɛ Simon Pita maa Tomasi mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ mʋ Kabwaarabi mʋ, yɛ Nataneli mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɩɩ Kena, yɛ Sebedi mu‐bii ana anyɔ yɛ abɩɩlapʋ anyɔ akʋ.

english_verse: Simon Peter said, “I'm going fishing!” The others said, “We will go with you.” They went out in their boat. But they didn't catch a thing that night.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Simon Pita tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “N kpee n naa kɩtaa ɩkɩn.” Nɩɩ ngbaa bamʋ ba tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “An biti a buu fʋ kpee.” Nɩɩ bamʋ kpini ba naa loo ɔkʋlɩ tɔ, amaa kanɩn kagyanbwɛ maŋa ba man kɩtaa sɛhn.

english_verse: Early the next morning Jesus stood on the shore, but the disciples did not realize who he was.
translation_verse: Kayɩ maa kɛ nyenyenfuu mʋ, Yesu ba nɩɩ ɔ yɩlɛ ɔlɩɩkaa, amaa abɩɩlapʋ mʋ ba man bɩɩ yɛ mʋ nɩn.

english_verse: So he told them, “Let your net down on the right side of your boat, and you will catch some fish.” They did, and the net was so full of fish that they could not drag it up into the boat.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Fan tʋʋ fanɛ kisewu mʋ ɔkʋlɩ mʋ gyisa sʋ, fen biti fan nyɛ akʋ kɩtaa.” Ba maa tʋʋ kisewu mʋ, ba kɩtaa ɩkɩn damantɛ, halɩɩ ba man taalɛ bɩɩtɛ kisewu mʋ waa ɔkʋlɩ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Jesus' favorite disciple told Peter, “It's the Lord!” When Simon heard it was the Lord, he put on the clothes he had taken off while he was working. Then he jumped into the water.
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ nɩɩ ɔbɩɩlapʋ mʋ nɩɩ Yesu ii biti mʋ asɩn gaa mʋ tɔwɛ Pita yɛ, “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ nɩn.” Simon maa nu yɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ taa mʋ kaalɛ lala mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wʋla lɛɛ yɩla mʋ bun, nɩɩ ɔ kpɩlɩgɛ loo nkyu mʋ tɔ ba kidenbi sʋ.

english_verse: When the disciples got out of the boat, they saw some bread and a charcoal fire with fish on it.
translation_verse: Ba maa dan mʋ, ba wu ɔkɩn maa gyan afʋlɔn‐gyi sʋ yɛgɛ bodobodo dɛ tʋtɔ.

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples, “Bring some of the fish you just caught.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Fan taa ɩkɩn mʋ nɩɩ fan dan kɩtaa mʋ akʋ ba.”

english_verse: Jesus said, “Come and eat!” But none of the disciples dared ask who he was. They knew he was the Lord.
translation_verse: Yesu tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, “Fan ba biri kɔnɔ.” Amaa abɩɩlapʋ mʋ ɔkʋ man taalɛ nyɛ kɔkɔlɔ taasɛ mʋ yɛ, “Fʋ ɩ gyɛ anɩmʋ?” Yɛgɛ be nyi yɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ nɩn.

english_verse: Jesus took the bread in his hands and gave some of it to his disciples. He did the same with the fish.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu naa taa bodobodo mʋ sa bamʋ, nɩɩ kanɩn gbaa nɩɩ ɔ taa ɔkɩn mʋ sa bamʋ.

english_verse: This was the third time Jesus appeared to his disciples after he was raised from death. Jesus and Peter
translation_verse: Yesu maa kyiŋi lɩɩ lewu tɔ mʋ, kɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ kɩsasapʋ maa lɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ kaapʋ mʋ abɩɩlapʋ. Yesu maa Pita

english_verse: When Jesus and his disciples had finished eating, he asked, “Simon son of John, do you love me more than the others do?” Simon Peter answered, “Yes, Lord, you know I do!” “Then feed my lambs,” Jesus said.
translation_verse: Ba maa biri kɔnɔ lʋwɛ mʋ, Yesu taasɛ Simon Pita yɛ, “Simon, Gyɔn mu‐bii, fii biti mɛ fʋ kyɔ kanan mʋ nɩɩ banɩmʋ bee biti mɛ mʋ?” Nɩɩ Pita lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Ɛɛhn Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, fu nyi n maa sʋ kebiti sa fʋ.” Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Sa mɛ nbʋlʋpʋ‐bi mʋ agyitɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus asked a second time, “Simon son of John, do you love me?” Peter answered, “Yes, Lord, you know I love you!” “Then take care of my sheep,” Jesus told him.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu bɩla taasɛ mʋ kɩnyɔsapʋ yɛ, “Simon, Gyɔn mu‐bii, fʋ sʋ kebiti sa mɛ?” Nɩɩ Simon lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, fu nyi n maa sʋ kebiti sa fʋ.” Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Kɩɩ mɛ nbʋlʋpʋ sʋ.”

english_verse: Jesus asked a third time, “Simon son of John, do you love me?” Peter was hurt because Jesus had asked him three times if he loved him. So he told Jesus, “Lord, you know everything. You know I love you.” Jesus replied, “Feed my sheep.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu taasɛ mʋ kɩlɩɩ sasapʋ yɛ, “Simon, Gyɔn mu‐bii, fʋ sʋ kebiti sa mɛ?” Nɩɩ ɩ tɔɔrɔɔ Pita fɛɛ Yesu maa taasɛ mʋ ɩlɩɩ ɩsa yɛ, “Fʋ sʋ kebiti sa mɛ.” Nɩɩ Pita tɔwɛ yɛ, “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, fu nyi kʋtɔ kʋmaa, fu nyi n maa sʋ kebiti sa fʋ.” Nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Sa mɛ nbʋlʋpʋ mʋ agyitɔ.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that when you were a young man, you dressed yourself and went wherever you wanted to go. But when you are old, you will hold out your hands. Then others will wrap your belt around you and lead you where you don't want to go.”
translation_verse: N tɔwɛ fʋ kesintin, saŋa mʋ nɩɩ fʋ gyɛ kɩyaafɔlɛ mʋ, fii bun fʋ atɔ bunsa, nɩɩ fii kpee katɩn kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ fii biti, amaa fʋ ba waa kɩnyɩn bɩlɩsa mʋ, fɩɩ tɛɛŋɛ fʋ abaa tɔ kɛ ɔkʋ o bun fʋ, kɛ ɔ taa fʋ kpee katɩn mʋ nɩɩ fii mee biti.”

english_verse: Jesus said this to tell how Peter would die and bring honor to God. Then he said to Peter, “Follow me!” Jesus and His Favorite Disciple
translation_verse: Yesu tɔwɛ ɩnɩmʋ nɩn kaapʋ lewu mʋ nɩɩ Pita ii biti o be wu mu kedubi, kɛ ɩ lɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ bʋnyaa kaapʋ. Yesu maa tɔwɛ ɩnɩmʋ lʋwɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Buu mɛ!”

english_verse: Peter turned and saw Jesus' favorite disciple following them. He was the same one who had sat next to Jesus at the meal and had asked, “Lord, who is going to betray you?”
translation_verse: Pita maa biliŋi mu ansi kɩɩ mʋ, o wu fɛɛ ɔbɩɩlapʋ mʋ nɩɩ Yesu sʋ kebiti sa mʋ mʋ, buu bamʋ. Mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɛ ɔ kpɛɛ Yesu saŋa mʋ nɩɩ bee gyii kalaatɩpwɛ sʋ agyitɔ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ taasɛ Yesu yɛ, “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, anɩmʋ ii biti ɔ lɛɛ fʋ sa mʋ?”

english_verse: When Peter saw this disciple, he asked Jesus, “Lord, what about him?”
translation_verse: Pita maa wu mʋ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taasɛ yɛ, “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, ɔnɩmʋ mɔɔ de?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “What is it to you, if I want him to live until I return? You must follow me.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu lɛɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Nɩɩ n kan n biti yɛ ɔ baa ɔ tɛ nkpa tɔ naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n biti n bwii ba mʋ, ɩ gyɛ fʋ asɩn? Fɛɛ fʋ buu mɛ.”

english_verse: So the rumor spread among the other disciples that this disciple would not die. But Jesus did not say he would not die. He simply said, “What is it to you, if I want him to live until I return?”
translation_verse: Lɩɩ falɛ sʋ mʋ, asɩn nɩmʋ a yaasɛ tɔ loo kpee Krisito abuupu kpini asɛ fɛɛ, ɔbɩɩlapʋ nɩmʋ man bʋ tɔ o wu. Amaa Yesu man tɔwɛ yɛ ɔ mɛɛ yɛ o wu. Asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, “Nɩɩ n kan n biti yɛ ɔ baa ɔ tɛ nkpa tɔ naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ mʋ nɩɩ n biti n bwii ba mʋ, ɩ gyɛ fʋ asɩn?”

english_verse: This disciple is the one who told all of this. He wrote it, and we know he is telling the truth.
translation_verse: Ɔbɩɩlapʋ nɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ mʋ nɩɩ ee gyii asɩn nɩmʋ kesintin, nɩɩ mʋ ɩ kyʋrɔɔ ɩmʋ yɩla. Nɩɩ an nyi fɛɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ mʋ gyɛ kesintin.

english_verse: Jesus did many other things. If they were all written in books, I don't suppose there would be room enough in the whole world for all the books.
translation_verse: Yesu waa atɔ gaalaagaa tii sʋ. Nɩɩ ba daa kyʋrɔɔ ɩmʋ kpini yɩla nɩn, naafɔɔ ɩwʋlɛ mʋ ii biti i tiri dulinyaa tɔ, nɩɩ ɩ mɛɛ yɛ ɩ nyɛ opula yɩlakpa.

english_verse: until he was taken up to heaven. But before he was taken up, he gave orders to the apostles he had chosen with the help of the Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: naa fʋʋ kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa mʋ kyʋn sʋsʋ mʋ. Pɔyɩ kɛ ɔ taa mʋ kpee sʋsʋ mʋ, Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu bɔla Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ sʋ kaapʋ mu asunpu mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ bamʋ mʋ, atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba waa.

english_verse: While he was still with them, he said: Don't leave Jerusalem yet. Wait here for the Father to give you the Holy Spirit, just as I told you he has promised to do.
translation_verse: Maa bamʋ ba maa nsarɛ bee gyii kakaakʋ mʋ, ɔ sa bamʋ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Fan man kan waa lɩɩ Gyerusalem, amaa fan gyoo fanɛ kɛkɛɛ mʋ nɩɩ n wʋla tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ, Nsɛ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ yɛ ee biti ɔ sa fanɛ mʋ.

english_verse: John baptized with water, but in a few days you will be baptized with the Holy Spirit. Jesus Is Taken to Heaven
