translation_verse: Nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba kan bee buu nbara mʋ, ɩ gyɛ dulinyaa kapatɩyɛ agyipu bɩrɛ, kanɩn bɩrɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ kɩ gyɛ kɩyan, nɩɩ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ kɩda mʋ man sʋ kyaarɛ.

english_verse: God becomes angry when his Law is broken. But where there isn't a law, it cannot be broken.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba fɔyɩ nbara mʋ, bɛɛ nyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ. Amaa nɩɩ nbara ɩ man bʋ tɔ mʋ, nbara kɩfɔyɩ gbaa man bʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Everything depends on having faith in God, so that God's promise is assured by his gift of undeserved grace. This promise isn't only for Abraham's descendants who have the Law. It is for all who are Abraham's descendants because they have faith, just as he did. Abraham is the ancestor of us all.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ lɩɩ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ nɩɩ asa bɛɛ nyɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ sa bamʋ mʋ. Ɩ gyɛ kabwaala kakɛɛ sa Abraham kɩnaana tɔ. Ɩ man gyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bee buu nbara mʋ nkʋn, amaa yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba kɔɔlɛ gyii gbaa fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Abraham kɔɔlɛ gyii mʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ anɛ kpini anɛ‐sɛ.

english_verse: The Scriptures say that Abraham would become the ancestor of many nations. This promise was made to Abraham because he had faith in God, who raises the dead to life and creates new things.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ yɩla mʋ yɛ, “N waa fʋ ɔsɛ sa ndɛndɛmandɛ kpini.” Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ mʋ Abraham ɩ gyɛ ɔsɛ sa anɛ kpini. Abraham kɔɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ee kyiŋi alewupu ɛɛ ba nkpa tɔ mʋ gyii, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ɛɛ sa alewupu nkpa. Nɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ man wʋla kɩ bʋ tɔ mʋ, mʋ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ kɩɩ ba.

english_verse: God promised Abraham a lot of descendants. And when it all seemed hopeless, Abraham still had faith in God and became the ancestor of many nations.
translation_verse: Ɩ maa du fɛɛ tamaa man bʋ tɔ gbaa mʋ, Abraham kɔɔlɛ gyii nɩɩ ɔ sʋ tamaa. Nɩɩ ɔ ba waa ɔsɛ sa ndɛndɛmandɛ gaalaagaa fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Kanɩn nɩɩ fʋ anaana‐bii bee biti ba ba nyɛ akyɔ fɛɛ akyikpebi.”

english_verse: But Abraham never doubted or questioned God's promise. His faith made him strong, and he gave all the credit to God.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ sa mʋ mʋ, ɔ man gyii ɩmʋ ɩmɔɔrɛ, amaa ɔ nyɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ ɔlʋn nɩɩ ɔ taa bʋnyaa sa Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: just as we read in the Scriptures. But these words were not written only for Abraham.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ yɛ Abraham ɩkpa i kyiigi Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ mʋ, man gyɛ mʋ nkʋn sʋ nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ kanɩn.

english_verse: They were written for us, since we will also be accepted because of our faith in God, who raised our Lord Jesus to life.
translation_verse: Amaa anɛ kpini sʋ nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ kanɩn. Kanɩn sʋ anɛ gbaa anɛ mʋ nɩɩ an kɔɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ o kyiŋi anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu lɩɩ lewu tɔ gyii mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ kɔɔlɛ anɛ fɛɛ anɛ ɩkpa i kyiigi.

english_verse: God gave Jesus to die for our sins, and he raised him to life, so that we would be made acceptable to God.
translation_verse: Kpalɩ fɛɛ anɛ alibi sʋ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mʋ sa fɛɛ o wu, nɩɩ o kyiŋi mʋ ba nkpa tɔ nɩɩ lɩɩ mʋ sʋ mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ kɔɔlɛ anɛ fɛɛ anɛ ɩkpa i kyiigi.

english_verse: By faith we have been made acceptable to God. And now, thanks to our Lord Jesus Christ, we have peace with God.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ, lɩɩ anɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ kyula yɛ anɛ ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ asɛ, nɩɩ lɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito sʋ mʋ, kayɩɩ yuuli kɩ bʋ anaa Ɩbwaarɛ nsana.

english_verse: Christ has also introduced us to God's gift of undeserved grace on which we now take our stand. So we are happy, as we look forward to sharing in the glory of God.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ mʋ sʋ nɩɩ an taa anɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii nyɛ kabwaala mʋ nɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ an yɩlɛ kɩmʋ tɔ falɛ. Nɩɩ anɛ ansi i gyii lɩɩ fɛɛ an sʋ tamaa fɛɛ an biti an nyɛ bʋnyaa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ sa anɛ sʋsʋ mʋ.

english_verse: But that's not all! We gladly suffer, because we know that suffering helps us to endure.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ man gyɛ kanɩn nkʋn sʋ, amaa awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ an gyii falɛ gbaa mʋ, anɛ ansi i gyii, lɩɩ fɛɛ awʋrʋfɔ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ asa ba nyɛ aniya yɩlɛ tɔ.

english_verse: And endurance builds character, which gives us a hope
translation_verse: Nɩɩ aniya kɩyɩlɛ tɔ mɔɔ ɩ bɩya kɩbɩɩlabɩɩ, nɩɩ kɩbɩɩlabɩɩ kɩ bɩya tamaa.

english_verse: that will never disappoint us. All of this happens because God has given us the Holy Spirit, who fills our hearts with his love.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ tamaa mɛɛ waa kɩyan, lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa sa anɛ mʋ sʋ kyɛɛgɛ mu kebiti mʋ bɔla anɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ.

english_verse: Christ died for us at a time when we were helpless and sinful.
translation_verse: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ anɛ anyɩmɩsa a mɛɛ bɩla taalɛ waa sɛhn mʋ, kanɩn saŋa maŋa tɔ kyɛɛkyɛɛ nɩɩ Krisito ba wu sa anɛ alibi awaapʋ.

english_verse: No one is really willing to die for an honest person, though someone might be willing to die for a truly good person.
translation_verse: Ii biti ɩ waa ɔlʋn sa nyɩmɩsa fɛɛ o wu sa ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ mʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi gbaa. Amaa ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ adanbɩrasa ɔwaapʋ bɩrɛ akʋtɔ fɛɛ ɔkʋ ii biti ɔ waa kɔkɔlɔ ɔsɩɩ yɛ ee biti o wu sa mʋ.

english_verse: But God showed how much he loved us by having Christ die for us, even though we were sinful.
translation_verse: Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mu kebiti mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ sa anɛ mʋ kaapʋ lɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ a maa san an gyɛ alibi awaapʋ gbaa mʋ, nɩɩ Krisito ba wu sa anɛ.

english_verse: But there is more! Now that God has accepted us because Christ sacrificed his life's blood, we will also be kept safe from God's anger.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ Yesu Krisito nkalan sʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kɔɔlɛ kyula fɛɛ anɛ ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ asɛ. Kanɩn maŋa sʋ lɩɩ Krisito sʋ mʋ, ee biti ɔ mɔlɩgɛ anɛ lɩɩ mʋ kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Even when we were God's enemies, he made peace with us, because his Son died for us. Yet something even greater than friendship is ours. Now that we are at peace with God, we will be saved by the life of his Son.
translation_verse: Halɩɩ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ an gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ akisipu mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ yɛgɛ mu‐bii Yesu ba wu nɩɩ ɩ lɔŋɔ anaa mʋ nsana. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Yesu maa tɛ nkpa tɔ sʋ mʋ, ee biti ɔ mɔlɩgɛ anɛ lɩɩ kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ kakpaa mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: And in addition to everything else, we are happy because God sent our Lord Jesus Christ to make peace with us. Adam and Christ
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ ɩnɩmʋ nkʋn, amaa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ bɩla i tii sʋ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ anɛ ansi i gyii lɩɩ kɔlɔŋɔ mʋ nɩɩ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito ba lɔŋɔ anaa Ɩbwaarɛ nsana mʋ sʋ. Lewu bɔla Adam sʋ ba, nɩɩ nkpa ɩ bɔla Yesu Krisito sʋ ba

english_verse: Adam sinned, and that sin brought death into the world. Now everyone has sinned, and so everyone must die.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ lɩɩ nyɩmɩsa kʋlʋn awaasa sʋ nɩɩ alibi ɩ ba dulinyaa, nɩɩ lɩɩ alibi sʋ nɩɩ lewu ba dulinyaa tɔ. Nɩɩ falɛ sʋ nɩɩ lewu nyɛ ɔkpa asa kpini sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ waa alibi.

english_verse: Sin was in the world before the Law came. But no record of sin was kept, because there was no Law.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ pɔyɩ kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ bɩya nbara mʋ, alibi ɩ wʋla ɩ bʋ dulinyaa tɔ. Amaa saŋa mʋ nɩɩ nbara mʋ ɩ man bʋ tɔ mʋ, ba mɛɛ taa alibi bɛɛ tɩɩ sɛhn.

english_verse: Yet death still had power over all who lived from the time of Adam to the time of Moses. This happened, though not everyone disobeyed a direct command from God, as Adam did. In some ways Adam is like Christ who came later.
translation_verse: Amaa lɩɩ alibi sʋ mʋ, lewu gyii nyɩmɩsa sʋ kuwura lɩɩ Adam sʋ ba fʋʋ Mosesi saŋa sʋ, halɩɩ ba maa man nyita Ɩbwaarɛ kɔnɔsa mʋ fɛɛ Adam lɛɛ mʋ gbaa. Ɔkpa kʋ sʋ mʋ Adam ɩ yɩlɛ sa Yesu mʋ nɩɩ ɔ ba ba kamaa tɔ mʋ.

english_verse: But the gift of God's undeserved grace was very different from Adam's sin. That one sin brought death to many others. Yet in an even greater way, Jesus Christ alone brought God's gift of undeserved grace to many people.
translation_verse: Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala kakɛɛ mʋ man du fɛɛ Adam alibi mʋ. Kpalɩ fɛɛ Adam kʋlʋn alibi mʋ sʋ mʋ, ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ wu. Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa kɛɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ lɩɩ Yesu Krisito kʋlʋn sʋ mʋ, kɩ gyɛ kʋtɔ kparɛ.

english_verse: There is a lot of difference between Adam's sin and God's gift. That one sin led to punishment. But God's gift made it possible for us to be acceptable to him, even though we have sinned many times.
translation_verse: Kanɩn maŋa gbaa nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kakɛɛ mʋ kɩ man du fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Adam nyɩmɩsa kʋlʋn alibi ɩ ba waa mʋ. Nyɩmɩsa kʋlʋn alibi katalɛ sʋ mʋ, i bun ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ kʋpwɛ. Amaa lɩɩ asa alibi gaalaagaa kɩwaa kamaa mʋ, ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ yɛgɛ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩɩ taalɛ kyula fɛɛ nyɩmɩsa ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ asɛ mʋ, ɩ ba.

english_verse: Death ruled like a king because Adam had sinned. But that cannot compare with what Jesus Christ has done. God has treated us with undeserved grace, and he has accepted us because of Jesus. And so we will live and rule like kings.
translation_verse: Nyɩmɩsa kʋlʋn alibi sʋ nɩɩ lewu gyii asa sʋ ɔlʋn lɩɩ kanɩn nyɩmɩsa kʋlʋn maŋa sʋ. Nɩɩ Yesu Krisito nyɩmɩsa kʋlʋn gbaa sʋ mʋ, anyɩmɩsa ba nyɛ kabwaala nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii kyula fɛɛ bamʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ asɛ, nɩɩ ba nyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ kakyɩna kakpaa. Ɩmʋ sʋ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Yesu Krisito waa mʋ, kɩ kyɔ lewu ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ kɩ da gyii anɛ sʋ mʋ.

english_verse: Everyone was going to be punished because Adam sinned. But because of the good thing that Christ has done, God accepts us and gives us the gift of life.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa kʋlʋn alibi sʋ nɩɩ asa kpini ba gyii kʋpwɛ mʋ, kanɩn maŋa sʋ nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa kʋlʋn ɩkpa kikyiigi sʋ mʋ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii kyula yɛ asa bamʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi, nɩɩ ba nyɛ nkpa.

english_verse: The Law came, so that the full power of sin could be seen. Yet where sin was powerful, God's gift of undeserved grace was even more powerful.
translation_verse: Mosesi nbara mʋ ɩ ba nɩn, kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ asa ba wu alibi mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa mʋ kʋkyɔ. Amaa alibi kɩwaa kɩ maa nyɛ akyɔ mʋ, yɛgɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ kɩ nyɛ akyɔ ki tii sʋ.

english_verse: Sin ruled by means of death. But God's gift of grace now rules, and God has accepted us because of Jesus Christ our Lord. This means that we will have eternal life.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ alibi nyɛ ɔlʋn nyɩmɩsa sʋ nɩɩ ɔ nyɛ lewu mʋ, kanɩn maŋa sʋ nɩɩ asa ba nyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala fɛɛ maa kyula fɛɛ asa ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ asɛ. Ɩmʋ sʋ lɩɩ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito sʋ mʋ, asa ba nyɛ nkpa kakpaa.

english_verse: What should we say? Should we keep on sinning, so that God's gift of undeserved grace will show up even better?
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ, mɩnɛ nɩɩ an biti a tɔwɛ? A kyaga sʋ an waa alibi kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ kɩ nyɛ akyɔ ki tii sʋ abɛɛ?

english_verse: No, we should not! If we are dead to sin, how can we go on sinning?
translation_verse: Ayee! Alibi ɩ man bɩla sʋ anɛ sʋ ɔlʋn, lɩɩ fɛɛ i du nɩn fɛɛ a maa wu mʋ, nɛnɛ nɩɩ an bɩla taalɛ kyɩna alibi mʋ tɔ?

english_verse: Don't you know that all who share in Christ Jesus by being baptized also share in his death?
translation_verse: Abɛɛ fan man nyi fɛɛ anɛ kpini mʋ nɩɩ ba gyee anɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee mʋ waa Yesu Krisito tɔ mʋ, ɩ waa fɛɛ anaa mʋ an waa kʋkʋlʋn mu lewu tɔ abɛɛ?

english_verse: When we were baptized, we died and were buried with Christ. We were baptized, so we would live a new life, as Christ was raised to life by the glory of God the Father.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ lɩɩ anɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee mʋ sʋ mʋ, anaa mʋ an wu, nɩɩ ba pula anaa mʋ. Ɩmʋ sʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ taa mʋ bʋnyaa kyiŋi mʋ lɩɩ lewu tɔ mʋ, anɛ gbaa anɛ an biti a kyɩna kakyɩna pʋpwɛ tɔ.

english_verse: If we shared in Jesus' death by being baptized, we will be raised to life with him.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ anaa mʋ a maa gyɛ kʋkʋlʋn lɩɩ mʋ kelewu mʋ sʋ mʋ, kanɩn maŋa sʋ nɩɩ anaa mʋ an biti a ba an gyɛ kʋlʋn lɩɩ mu kikyiŋi bwii ba nkpa tɔ mʋ.

english_verse: We know that the persons we used to be were nailed to the cross with Jesus. This was done, so our sinful bodies would no longer be the slaves of sin.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ an nyi fɛɛ ba da anɛ alibi n‐yɩɩ dɩdaa mʋ yɛ mʋ mata oyu laasa sʋ mɔɔ, nɩɩ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ anɛ alibi n‐yɩɩ dɩdaa man bɩla kɩ sʋ ɔlʋn anɛ sʋ, kɛ a man bɩla taa anɛ n‐yɩɩ waa anyɛ sa alibi.

english_verse: We know sin doesn't have power over dead people.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o wu mʋ, ɔ nyɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ alibi kɩwaa sʋ.

english_verse: As surely as we died with Christ, we believe we will also live with him.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ anaa Krisito a maa wu falɛ mʋ, an kɔɔlɛ gyii fɛɛ anaa mʋ an biti a bʋga kyɩna.

english_verse: We know that death no longer has any power over Christ. He died and was raised to life, never again to die.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ an nyi fɛɛ Krisito maa kyiŋi lɩɩ lewu tɔ falɛ mʋ, ɔ mɛɛ bɩla yɛ o wu, nɩɩ lewu man bɩla ɔ sʋ mʋ sʋ ɔlʋn.

english_verse: When Christ died, he died for sin once and for all. But now he is alive, and he lives only for God.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kelewu mʋ nɩɩ o wu mʋ, o wu sa anɛ alibi kɩlɩɩ kʋlʋn kakpaa, amaa nkpa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɛ kɩmʋ tɔ mʋ, ɔ tɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: In the same way, you must think of yourselves as dead to the power of sin. But Christ Jesus has given life to you, and you live for God.
translation_verse: Kanɩn ɔkpa maŋa sʋ, fan kɩɩ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ fɛɛ fan wu, nɩɩ alibi kɩwaa kɩ man bɩla kɩ sʋ fanɛ sʋ ɔlʋn, amaa fan tɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fan naa Yesu Krisito fan waa kʋkʋlʋn.

english_verse: Don't let sin rule your body. After all, your body is bound to die, so don't obey its desires
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan man yɛgɛ alibi i gyii kuwura fanɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ sʋ, kɛ fan man buu atɔ libi mʋ nɩɩ fanɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ ii biti ɩ waa mʋ.

english_verse: or let any part of it become a slave of evil. Give yourselves to God, as people who have been raised from death to life. Make every part of your body a slave that pleases God.
translation_verse: Fan man taa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ katɩn kʋ sa alibi kɛ ɩ taa waa asun libi, amaa fan taa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ sa Ɩbwaarɛ fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ bamʋ lɩɩ lewu tɔ ba nkpa tɔ mʋ, kɛ fan taa fanɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kpini taa sa mʋ, kɛ ɔ taa fanɛ waa ɩkpa kyiigisa atɔ.

english_verse: Don't let sin keep ruling your lives. You are ruled by God's undeserved grace and not by the Law. Slaves Who Do What Pleases God
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fan man bɩla yɛgɛ alibi i gyii fanɛ sʋ ɔlʋn, lɩɩ fɛɛ fan man bʋ Mosesi nbara mʋ kasɛ, amaa Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ tɔ nɩɩ fan bʋ. An gyɛ anyɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ

english_verse: What does all this mean? Does it mean we are free to sin, because we are ruled by God's gift of undeserved grace and not by the Law? Certainly not!
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ mɩnɛ nɩɩ an biti a tɔwɛ? Fɛɛ a maa man bɩla an bʋ nbara mʋ kasɛ, nɩɩ an nyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ, a kyaga sʋ an waa alibi? Ayee!

english_verse: Don't you know that you are slaves of anyone you obey? You can be slaves of sin and die, or you can be obedient slaves of God and be acceptable to him.
translation_verse: Fan man nyi fɛɛ nɩɩ fan kan taa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ sa ɔkʋ nɩɩ fan nu mʋ asɛ mʋ, fan gyɛ anyɛ sa ɔsa maŋa. Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ fan kan buu alibi mʋ, fan gyɛ anyɛ sa ɩmʋ, nɩɩ ɩɩ sʋ fanɛ i kpee lewu tɔ, amaa nɩɩ fan kan buu Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, ɩmʋ ɩ sʋ fanɛ i kpee ɩkpa kyiigisa tɔ.

english_verse: You used to be slaves of sin. But I thank God that with all your heart you followed the example set forth in the teaching you received.
translation_verse: Fan kyɩna fan gyɛ anyɛ sa alibi, amaa n fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ fɛɛ nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ fan taa fanɛ nkɔlɔ kpini buu kesintin kɩkaapʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba taa kaapʋ fanɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Now you are set free from sin and are slaves who please God.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ kɔɔlɛ fanɛ lɩɩ alibi tɔ, nɩɩ fan ba biliŋi anyɛ sa ɩkpa kyiigisa awaasa.

english_verse: I am using these everyday examples, because in some ways you are still weak. You used to let the different parts of your body be slaves of your evil thoughts. But now you must make every part of your body serve God, so that you will belong completely to him.
translation_verse: Fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kɩ maa man pɩɩta waa ɔlʋn sʋ, nɩɩ n taa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ tɔ asɩn n kala n sa fanɛ falɛ. Dɩdaa mʋ fan kyɩna taa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ biliŋi anyɛ alibi tɔ, nɩɩ fan waa alibi kɩkyɔ tii sʋ. Kanɩn sʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ nbɩɩnbɩɩ fan taa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kpini fɛɛ anyɛ sa ɩkpa kyiigisa awaasa, kɛ fan ba biliŋi Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ.

english_verse: When you were slaves of sin, you didn't have to please God.
translation_verse: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ fan gyɛ anyɛ sa alibi mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ɩkpa kyiigisa asɩn mʋ, fan man taa ɩmʋ waa sɛhn.

english_verse: But what good did you receive from the things you did? All you have to show for them is your shame, and they lead to death.
translation_verse: Mɩnɛ tɔnɔ nɩɩ fan nyɛ lɩɩ kanɩn saŋa maŋa, lɩɩ kanɩn atɔ maŋa mʋ nɩɩ ndaga ɩ gyɛ ipeeli‐sɩn sa fanɛ falɛ? Kanɩn atɔ maŋa ɩ bɩya lewu.

english_verse: Now you have been set free from sin, and you are God's slaves. This will make you holy and will lead you to eternal life.
translation_verse: Amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ fan maa man bɩla fan gyɛ anyɛ sa alibi falɛ, nɩɩ fan biliŋi anyɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, tɔnɔ mʋ nɩɩ fen biti fan nyɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ fan maa biliŋi Ɩbwaarɛ asa, nɩɩ ɩ bɩya fanɛ nkpa kakpaa.

english_verse: Sin pays off with death. But God's gift is eternal life given by Jesus Christ our Lord.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ alibi kʋkɔka ɩ gyɛ lewu, amaa Ɩbwaarɛ kakɛɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bɔla anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito sʋ sa anɛ ɩ gyɛ nkpa kakpaa.

english_verse: My friends, you surely understand enough about law to know that laws only have power over people who are alive.
translation_verse: Mɛ bɩrɩsa ana akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu, fanɛ kpini fan nyi fɛɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa san ɔ tɛ nkpa tɔ mʋ, saŋa maa nkʋn nɩɩ nbara mʋ ɩ sʋ ɔlʋn mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: For example, the Law says that a man's wife must remain his wife as long as he lives. But once her husband is dead, she is free
translation_verse: I du nɩn fɛɛ ɔkyɩɩ kilipu. Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ mu‐kuli san ɔ tɛ nkpa tɔ mʋ, kekili nbara mʋ i ŋmina mʋ sa mu‐kuli. Amaa nɩɩ mu‐kuli mʋ kan wu bɩrɛ ɔ nyɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ kekili nbara mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: That is how it is with you, my friends. You are now part of the body of Christ and are dead to the power of the Law. You are free to belong to Christ, who was raised to life so we could serve God.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fan maa kɔɔlɛ Yesu Krisito gyii mʋ, fan bɔla mʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ sʋ wu nɩn. Ɩmʋ sʋ Mosesi nbara mʋ ɩ man bɩla ɩ sʋ fanɛ sʋ ɔlʋn. Ɩmʋ sʋ nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ fan gyɛ sa Krisito mʋ nɩɩ o wu kyiigi lɩɩ lewu tɔ mʋ, kɛ a nyɛ waa adanbɩrasa sa Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: When we thought only of ourselves, the Law made us have sinful desires. It made every part of our bodies into slaves who are doomed to die.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ an bʋ anɛ gbaa‐gbaa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kebiti tɔ mʋ, nbara mʋ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ alibi mʋ, ɩ waa kusun anɛ n‐yɩɩ tɔ, nɩɩ an sun asun libi nɩɩ ɩ sʋ anɛ ii kpee lewu tɔ.

english_verse: But the Law no longer rules over us. We are like dead people, and it cannot have any power over us. Now we can serve God in a new way by obeying his Spirit, and not in the old way by obeying the written Law. The Battle with Sin
translation_verse: Amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ an nyɛ anɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ nbara mʋ nɩɩ ɩ daa kyɩna ŋmina anɛ mʋ tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ i du nɩn fɛɛ anaa Krisito a maa wu. Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ a man bɩla an sun nbara dɩdaa mʋ nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ yɩla mʋ, amaa an sun Ɩbwaarɛ ɔkpa pʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bɔla Kayaayu mʋ sʋ. Mosesi nbara yɛ alibi

english_verse: Does this mean that the Law is sinful? Certainly not! But if it had not been for the Law, I would not have known what sin is really like. For example, I would not have known what it means to want something that belongs to someone else, unless the Law had told me not to do this.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ mɩnɛ nɩɩ an biti a tɔwɛ? Nbara mʋ ɩ gyɛ alibi nɩn abɛɛ? Ayee! Ɩ man gyɛ alibi nɩn. Nbara mʋ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ n bɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ alibi ɩ gyɛ. Nɩɩ nbara mʋ ɩ man dɩn tɔwɛ yɛ, “Man yɛgɛ fu ansi ɩ payɩ ɔkʋ atɔ sʋ mʋ” naafɔɔ n mɛɛ yɛ n bɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ onsi‐payɩ gyɛ.

english_verse: It was sin that used this command as a way of making me have all kinds of desires. But without the Law, sin is dead.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ nbara ɩnɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ alibi a bɔla nyɛ ɔkpa mɛ tɔ, nɩɩ ɩɩ sʋ mɛ ɔbʋlɛ nɩɩ n biti alibi kʋmaa kɩwaa tii sʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ nɩɩ nbara ɩ man bʋ tɔ mʋ, alibi mʋ kɔnɔ ki wu.

english_verse: Before I knew about the Law, I was alive. But as soon as I heard that command, sin came to life,
translation_verse: Saŋa kʋ tɔ mʋ n daa kyɩna yɛgɛ n man nyi Mosesi nbara mʋ. Amaa saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n ba bɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kɔnɔsa mʋ, nɩɩ n lan bɩɩ fɛɛ alibi tɔ nɩɩ n tɛ, nɩɩ n wu.

english_verse: and I died. The very command that was supposed to bring life to me, instead brought death.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n lan bɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɔnɔsa mʋ nɩɩ naafɔɔ ɩ bɩya mɛ nkpa mʋ, ɩ taa mɛ kpee lewu tɔ.

english_verse: Sin used this command to trick me, and because of it I died.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ alibi ɩ bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ kɔnɔsa mʋ sʋ nyɛ ɔkpa pɩna mɛ, nɩɩ ɩ bɔla ɩmʋ sʋ mɔɔ mɛ.

english_verse: Still, the Law and its commands are holy and correct and good.
translation_verse: Mosesi nbara mʋ i du kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kɔnɔsa mʋ gbaa i du kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ, nɩɩ i du kyɛɛkyɛɛ nɩɩ ɩ bʋrɔn.

english_verse: Am I saying something good caused my death? Certainly not! It was sin that killed me by using something good. Now we can see how terrible and evil sin really is.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ falɛ kʋtɔ danbɩrasa nɩmʋ ɩ bɩya mɛ lewu nɩn? Ayee! Amaa alibi a bɔla kʋtɔ danbɩrasa nɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ n wu lewu. Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ waa nɩn kɛ alibi ɩ lɩɩ ifuli kaapʋ kanan mʋ nɩɩ i du. Nɩɩ kɔnɔsa mʋ kɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an taalɛ wu kesintin fɛɛ alibi ɩ gyɛ alibi ɩ man bʋrɔn nɩn kpini‐kpini.

english_verse: We know that the Law is spiritual. But I am merely a human, and I have been sold as a slave to sin.
translation_verse: An nyi fɛɛ nbara mʋ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu tɔ atɔ nɩn, amaa mɛɛ mɛ bɩrɛ n gyɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ nyɩmɩsa nɩn, nɩɩ alibi i gyii mɛ sʋ nɩɩ ɩ waa mɛ fɛɛ kɩnyɛ.

english_verse: In fact, I don't understand why I act the way I do. I don't do what I know is right. I do the things I hate.
translation_verse: N mee nu mɛ awaasa mʋ kasɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ n biti fɛɛ n waa mʋ, mɛɛ taalɛ n waa, amaa ɩmʋ nɩɩ n mee biti mʋ, ɩmʋ nɩɩ n waa.

english_verse: Although I don't do what I know is right, I agree that the Law is good.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fɛɛ nɩɩ n kan waa ɩmʋ nɩɩ n mee biti fɛɛ n waa bɩrɛ, n kyula fɛɛ nbara mʋ ɩ bʋrɔn.

english_verse: So I am not the one doing these evil things. The sin that lives in me is what does them.
translation_verse: Kanɩn bɩrɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ i du mʋ, man gyɛ mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ ɩ waa atɔ waasa libi nɩmʋ, amaa alibi mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ mɛ tɔ mʋ ɩ waa ɩmʋ.

english_verse: I know that my selfish desires won't let me do anything that is good. Even when I want to do right, I cannot.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n nyi fɛɛ mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ tɔ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ mɛ kɩbaabʋtɔ dɩdaa mʋ, kʋtɔ danbɩrasa kʋ kɩ man bʋ mɛ tɔ. Ɩ gyɛ mɛ kɩpɩrɛ fɛɛ n waa adanbɩrasa, amaa n mɛɛ taalɛ n waa.

english_verse: And so, if I don't do what I know is right, I am no longer the one doing these evil things. The sin that lives in me is what does them.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nɩɩ n kan waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ man gyɛ mi kebiti fɛɛ n waa mʋ, man gyɛ mɛ ɩ waa ɩmʋ kanɩn, amaa alibi mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ mɛ tɔ mʋ, ɩmʋ ɩ waa kanɩn.

english_verse: The Law has shown me that something in me keeps me from doing what I know is right.
translation_verse: N wu fɛɛ saŋa kʋmaa mʋ, kanɩn nɩɩ ɩ waa mɛ nɩn. Lɩɩ fɛɛ saŋa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ n biti fɛɛ n waa adanbɩrasa mʋ, alibi nɩɩ ɩ sʋla mɛ naa waa.

english_verse: With my whole heart I agree with the Law of God.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ mɛ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ mʋ, n kɔɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nbara mʋ kyula fɛɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ n biti n buu.

english_verse: But in every part of me I discover something fighting against my mind, and it makes me a prisoner of sin that controls everything I do.
translation_verse: Amaa n wu nbara kʋ maa bʋ mɛ tɔ ɩɩ waa kusun, nɩɩ ɩ kɔ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nbara mʋ nɩɩ n kɔɔlɛ kyula mɛ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ mʋ. Nbara nɩmʋ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ alibi gyii mi kumu nɩɩ i loo mɛ n‐yɩɩ tɔ kpini.

english_verse: What a miserable person I am. Who will rescue me from this body that is doomed to die?
translation_verse: Mɛ awʋrʋfɔ wuya nɩmʋ! Anɩmʋ ii biti ɔ mɔlɩgɛ mɛ lɩɩ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ awaasa libi mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ sʋ mɛ kii kpee lewu tɔ falɛ?

english_verse: Thank God! Jesus Christ will rescue me. So with my mind I serve the Law of God, although my selfish desires make me serve the law of sin.
translation_verse: N afwaala Ɩbwaarɛ fɛɛ ɔ bɔla anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito sʋ mɔlɩgɛ mɛ. Mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ mʋ, n buu Ɩbwaarɛ nbara mʋ, amaa mɛ kɩbaabʋtɔ dɩdaa mʋ, kii biti alibi kɩwaa.

english_verse: If you belong to Christ Jesus, you won't be punished.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ, nbɩɩnbɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kʋpwɛ kubun man bʋ tɔ sa anɛ mʋ nɩɩ anaa Yesu Krisito an waa kʋkʋlʋn mʋ.

english_verse: The Law of Moses cannot do this, because our selfish desires make the Law weak. But God set you free when he sent his own Son to be like us sinners and to be a sacrifice for our sin. God used Christ's body to condemn sin.
translation_verse: Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Mosesi nbara mʋ ɩ man taalɛ waa, kpalɩ fɛɛ anɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ maa man bɩla kɩ bʋlʋn ki buu nbara mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ taalɛ waa fɛɛ maa sun mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mu‐bii fɛɛ nyɩmɩsa alibi awaapʋ keduli. Nɩɩ ɔ taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ waa saraga sa anɛ alibi, ba bun alibi mʋ nɩɩ i gyii nyɩmɩsa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ sʋ mʋ kʋpwɛ.

english_verse: He did this, so that we would do what the Law commands by obeying the Spirit instead of our own desires.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ waa falɛ nɩn kɛ a taalɛ waa kesintin ɩkpa danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ nbara ii biti mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ an man bɩla an buu anɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ dɩdaa mʋ, amaa an buu Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu kebiti mʋ.

english_verse: People who are ruled by their desires think only of themselves. Everyone who is ruled by the Holy Spirit thinks about spiritual things.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba naa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ dɩdaa tɔ mʋ, bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ dɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kebiti sʋ nɩn, amaa bamʋ nɩɩ ba naa Kayaayu tɔ mʋ, bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ dɛ Kayaayu kebiti tɔ nɩn.

english_verse: If our minds are ruled by our desires, we will die. But if our minds are ruled by the Spirit, we will have life and peace.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kebiti kan gyii ɔkʋ nfɛɛrɛ sʋ mʋ, ɩ bɩya mʋ lewu nɩn, amaa ɔmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu kebiti gyii mʋ nfɛɛrɛ sʋ mʋ, ɩ bɩya mʋ nkpa yɛ keyuula.

english_verse: If we follow our desires, we cannot please God.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa bamʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kebiti mʋ, ba mɛɛ bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ ansi.

english_verse: You are no longer ruled by your desires, but by God's Spirit, who lives in you. People who don't have the Spirit of Christ in them don't belong to him.
translation_verse: Amaa fanɛ bɩrɛ fɛn mɛɛ waa fanɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kebiti, amaa Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ fanɛ tɔ mʋ kebiti nɩɩ fɛn waa. Nɩɩ ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man sʋ Krisito Kayaayu mʋ, ɔ man gyɛ Krisito lɛɛ.

english_verse: But Christ lives in you. So you are alive because God has accepted you, even though your bodies must die because of your sins.
translation_verse: Amaa fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ Krisito bʋ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ mʋ bɩrɛ, fanɛ n‐yaayu mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ fanɛ tɔ mʋ ɩ sʋ nkpa. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ yɛ fanɛ ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ asɛ, amaa lɩɩ fanɛ alibi sʋ mʋ fanɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kii biti ki wu.

english_verse: If you do, you will die. But you will live, if by the help of God's Spirit you say “No” to your desires.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fan kan taa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ asun libi waa fanɛ kakyɩna tɔ bɩrɛ fen biti fen wu, amaa nɩɩ fan bɔla Kayaayu mʋ sʋ kina nɩɩ fan yɛgɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ asun libi mʋ bɩrɛ, fen biti fan nyɛ nkpa.

english_verse: Only those people who are led by God's Spirit are his children.
translation_verse: Bamʋ nɩɩ ba buu Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu ɔkpa kaapʋsa bamʋ mʋ, bamʋ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii ana.

english_verse: God's Spirit doesn't make us slaves who are afraid of him. Instead, we become his children and call him our Father.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Kayaayu mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sa fanɛ mʋ, mɛɛ waa fanɛ anyɛ kɛ fan baa fan sʋ kufuu. Amaa fan nyɛ Kayaayu mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ waa fanɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii ana. Ɩmʋ ɔlʋn tɔ nɩɩ an taalɛ tɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ, “Abaa! Anɛ‐Sɛ.”

english_verse: God's Spirit makes us sure that we are his children.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ gbaa‐gbaa ɩ lɛɛ ɩ kaapʋ anɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ kesintin fɛɛ an gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii ana.

english_verse: His Spirit lets us know that together with Christ we will be given what God has promised. We will also share in the glory of Christ, because we have suffered with him. A Wonderful Future for God's People
translation_verse: Nɩɩ a maa gyɛ mu‐bii ana falɛ sʋ mʋ, an biti a nyɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ yɛ ee biti ɔ sa anɛ mʋ. Nɩɩ anaa Krisito an biti a bʋga nyɛ kanɩn kʋtɔ maŋa. Amɔɔ ana mʋ an bʋga gyii mʋ awʋrʋfɔ mʋ, pɔyɩ kɛ ana mʋ a bʋga gyii mʋ bʋnyaa mʋ. Kakaakʋ bʋnyaa kɩ nyɛ

english_verse: I am sure what we are suffering now cannot compare with the glory that will be shown to us.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n wu fɛɛ nbɩɩnbɩɩ awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ an gyii falɛ mʋ, ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ taa kaala bʋnyaa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ lɛɛ kaapʋ anɛ mʋ.

english_verse: In fact, all creation is eagerly waiting for God to show who his children are.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ atɔ tʋʋsa mʋ kpini bɛɛ gyʋgyʋʋ ba gyoo Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ ba lɛɛ mu‐bii ana mʋ kaapʋ.

english_verse: Meanwhile, creation is confused, but not because it wants to be confused. God made it this way in the hope
translation_verse: Nɩɩ atɔ tʋʋsa mʋ kpini ɩ ba waa atɔ kɩyan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ ɩmʋ kebiti sʋ, amaa Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ waa ɩmʋ kanɩn kɛ ɔ sa ɩmʋ tamaa.

english_verse: that creation would be set free from decay and would share in the glorious freedom of his children.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ atɔ tʋʋsa mʋ kpini bee biti ba kɔɔlɛ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ lewu yɛ kinyita tɔ, kɛ ba ba nyɛ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ yɛ bʋnyaa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii ana mʋ.

english_verse: We know that all creation is still groaning and is in pain, like a woman about to give birth.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ an nyi fɛɛ atɔ tʋʋsa mʋ kpini bɛɛ yɩyɛɛ ba fʋʋ halɩɩ ndaga, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔkyɩɩ ii duŋi mʋ.

english_verse: The Spirit makes us sure about what we will be in the future. But now we groan silently, while we wait for God to show that we are his children. This means that our bodies will also be set free.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ ɩmʋ nkʋn ɩɩ yɩyɛɛ, amaa anɛ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ nɩɩ an nyɛ Kayaayu mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kakɛɛ gyankpaasa mʋ gbaa an yɩyɛɛ anɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ. An yɩyɛɛ an gyoo kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ taa anɛ waa mu‐bii ana, kɛ ɔ kɔɔlɛ anɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ yɛgɛ mʋ.

english_verse: And this hope is what saves us. But if we already have what we hope for, there is no need to keep on hoping.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ tamaa mʋ nɩɩ an sʋ mʋ sʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ mɔlɩgɛ anɛ. Amaa nɩɩ ɔkʋ sʋ tamaa lɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɛɛ wʋla wu mʋ, man gyɛ tamaa kpini‐kpini. Nɩɩ anɩmʋ ɩ sʋ tamaa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɛɛ wʋla ɔ sʋ mʋ sʋ?

english_verse: However, we hope for something we have not yet seen, and we patiently wait for it.
translation_verse: Amaa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ an man pɩɩta nyɛ nɩɩ an sʋ ɩmʋ sʋ tamaa mʋ an nyɛ kenyiita nɩn an gyoo kɩmʋ.

english_verse: In certain ways we are weak, but the Spirit is here to help us. For example, when we don't know what to pray for, the Spirit prays for us in ways that cannot be put into words.
translation_verse: Kanɩn ɔkpa kʋlʋn sʋ nɩɩ Kayaayu mʋ ɩ kyɛ anɛ tɔ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ anɛ n‐yɩɩ ɩ yɔɔ anɛ mʋ. Kpalɩ fɛɛ a maa man nyi kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ a kʋlɛ, nɩɩ a man nyi kanan mʋ nɩɩ a tɔwɛ anɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ tɔ mʋ, Kayaayu mʋ gbaa‐gbaa ii muusi ɛɛ tɔwɛ atɔwɛ‐bi mʋ nɩɩ ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ taa kɔnɔ tɔwɛ nɩɩ ɔ yɩlɛ tɔ ɛɛ kʋlɛ ɛɛ kyɛ anɛ tɔ.

english_verse: All of our thoughts are known to God. He can understand what is in the mind of the Spirit, as the Spirit prays for God's people.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ o nyi anɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ mʋ, nyi nfɛɛrɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ Kayaayu mʋ tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ Kayaayu mʋ ɩ yɩlɛ tɔ ɛɛ kʋlɛ ɛɛ sa akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti sʋ. An kyɔ bamʋ nɩɩ ba kɔ gyii lɩɩ mʋ

english_verse: We know that God is always at work for the good of everyone who loves him. They are the ones God has chosen for his purpose,
translation_verse: Nɩɩ an nyi fɛɛ atɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ ba mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ sʋ ɩmʋ kpini ɛɛ waa kusun, kɛ i kpee naa lʋwɛ danbɩrasa sa bamʋ nɩɩ bee biti mʋ asɩn mʋ. Bamʋ ɩ gyɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ wʋla tɩɩ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wʋla tɔwɛ yɩla mʋ.

english_verse: and he has always known who his chosen ones would be. He had decided to let them become like his own Son, so his Son would be the first of many children.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ wʋla o nyi mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ bamʋ yɩla kɛ ba ba waa fɛɛ mu‐bii keduli mʋ, kɛ mu‐bii mʋ ɔ ba waa nbii damantɛ mʋ tɔ obii gyankpaasa.

english_verse: God then accepted the people he had already decided to choose, and he has shared his glory with them. God's Love
translation_verse: Nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ yɩla mʋ, ɔ tɩɩ bamʋ, nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ mʋ, ɔ tɔwɛ yɛ bamʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ asɛ, nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ bamʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ asɛ mʋ, ɔ taa mʋ bʋnyaa mʋ sa bamʋ.

english_verse: What can we say about all this? If God is on our side, can anyone be against us?
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ kpini kamaa mʋ, mɩnɛ nɩɩ an biti a tɔwɛ? Fɛɛ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kan ɔ yɩlɛ anɛ kamaa mʋ, anɩmʋ ɩ taalɛ kɔ yɛ anɛ?

english_verse: God did not keep back his own Son, but he gave him for us. If God did this, won't he freely give us everything else?
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man kina mu‐bii kɩtaa sa, nɩɩ lɩɩ anɛ alibi sʋ mʋ, ɔ yɛgɛ nɩɩ o be wu sa anɛ mʋ, mɩnɛ sʋ nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ yɛ ɔ taa atɔ kpini tii mʋ sʋ bwaala anɛ?

english_verse: If God says his chosen ones are acceptable to him, can anyone bring charges against them?
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ gbaa‐gbaa maa tɔwɛ yɛ an gyii asʋ mʋ, anɩmʋ ii biti ɔ taalɛ pwɩɩ anɛ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ wʋla lɛɛ yɩla sa mʋ n‐yɩɩ mʋ?

english_verse: Or can anyone condemn them? No indeed! Christ died and was raised to life, and now he is at God's right side, speaking to him for us.
translation_verse: Anɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋnɩ o bun anɛ kʋpwɛ? Yesu Krisito abɛɛ. Ayee! Mʋ i wu sa anɛ nɩɩ o kyiŋi lɩɩ lewu tɔ sa anɛ, nɩɩ ɔ tɛ Ɩbwaarɛ gyisa sʋ ɔ yɩlɛ tɔ ɛɛ kʋlɛ ɛɛ kyɛ anɛ tɔ.

english_verse: Can anything separate us from the love of Christ? Can trouble, suffering, and hard times, or hunger and nakedness, or danger and death?
translation_verse: Mɩnɛ ɩ taalɛ barɩgɛ anɛ lɩɩ Krisito kebiti mʋ tɔ? Kayɩyɛɛ, abɛɛ kɩkpɩnɛ, abɛɛ kanyanla, abɛɛ akʋn, abɛɛ kitiri, atɔ mʋ nɩɩ a sʋ kufuu, abɛɛ kɩmɔmɔ? Ɩnɩmʋ kpini ɩ mɛɛ taalɛ barɩgɛ anɛ lɩɩ Yesu kebiti mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: It is exactly as the Scriptures say, “For you we face death all day long. We are like sheep on their way to be butchered.”
translation_verse: N tɔwɛ kanɩn lɩɩ fɛɛ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, “O! Ɩbwaarɛ, kpalɩ fʋ sʋ bɛɛ mɔɔ anɛ kakɛ kʋmaa, nɩɩ ba taa anɛ waa fɛɛ nbʋlʋpʋ mʋ nɩɩ bee biti ba naa mɔɔ bamʋ mʋ.”

english_verse: In everything we have won more than a victory because of Christ who loves us.
translation_verse: Amaa lɩɩ Yesu Krisito kebiti mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ sa anɛ sʋ mʋ, an kɔ an lɩɩ ɩmʋ kpini‐kpini tɔ.

english_verse: I am sure that nothing can separate us from God's love—not life or death, not angels or spirits, not the present or the future,
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n nyi ɩ maa gyɛ kesintin fɛɛ lewu nɩn o, nkpa nɩn o, Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ nɩn o, nbwɩɩ libi nɩn o, atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ tɔ nbɩɩnbɩɩ nɩn o, atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ii biti ɩ ba nɩn o, kasɛ sʋ atɔ nɩn o, ɔlʋn nɩn o,

english_verse: and not powers above or powers below. Nothing in all creation can separate us from God's love for us in Christ Jesus our Lord!
translation_verse: sʋsʋ nɩn o, kasɛ tɔ kasɛ tɔ atɔ nɩn o, atɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tʋʋ mʋ, kʋkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ barɩgɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ an naa mʋ nsana lɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito sʋ.

english_verse: I am a follower of Christ, and the Holy Spirit is a witness to my conscience. So I tell the truth and I am not lying when I say
translation_verse: Lɩɩ maa Krisito a maa gyɛ kʋkʋlʋn sʋ mʋ, asɩn mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ falɛ ɩ gyɛ kesintin, n mɛɛ tɩn antɩŋɛsa. Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ yɛ mɛ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ ii gyii mɛ kesintin, fɛɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ falɛ ɩ man gyɛ antɩŋɛsa.

english_verse: my heart is broken and I am in great sorrow.
translation_verse: Mɛ ɔtɔ tɔ ɩ fɔyɩ mɛ nɩɩ mɛ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ ki nyita sa mɛ asa.

english_verse: I would gladly be placed under God's curse and be separated from Christ for the good of my own people.
translation_verse: Naafɔɔ nɩɩ ii biti ɩ waa mʋ, n biti n taa mɛ n‐yɩɩ sa kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ tɔwɛ mɛ nnɔ, kɛ ɩ barɩgɛ maa Yesu nsana, kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ mɛ asa Ɩsɩrayɩ abi ba nyɛ nkpa.

english_verse: They are the descendants of Israel, and they are also God's chosen people. God showed them his glory. He made agreements with them and gave them his Law. The temple is theirs and so are the promises that God made to them.
translation_verse: Ɩsɩrayɩ abi ba gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asa. Bamʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ nɩɩ ɔ taa bamʋ waa mʋ asa, bamʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ mʋ bʋnyaa kparɛ mʋ kaapʋ, nɩɩ maa bamʋ ba waa katɔwɛ kyula, nɩɩ ɔ sa bamʋ mʋ Nbara mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ kaapʋ bamʋ ɔkpa mʋ nɩɩ ba taa sʋ sun mʋ, nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ɔ da kɔkɔlɔ sʋ sa.

english_verse: They have those famous ancestors, who were also the ancestors of the Christ. I pray that God, who rules over all, will be praised forever! Amen.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩsɩrayɩ abi banɩmʋ tɔ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asa kparɛ‐kparɛ mʋ ba lɩɩ, nɩɩ Krisito maa ba fɛɛ nyɩmɩsa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ tɔ mʋ, ɔ lɩɩ kanɩn kɩnaana maŋa tɔ. Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋnɩ kʋtɔ kʋmaa kɩ bʋ mʋ kasɛ, nɩɩ ayɩn‐bi a gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ kakpaa. Amen!

english_verse: It cannot be said that God broke his promise. After all, not all of the people of Israel are the true people of God.
translation_verse: Amaa ɩ man gyɛ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ man waa asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ tɔwɛ yɩla mʋ tɔ nɩn. Kpalɩ fɛɛ man gyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba lɩɩ Ɩsɩrayɩ kɩnaana mʋ tɔ kpini ɩ gyɛ Ɩsɩrayɩ abi kesintin.

english_verse: In fact, when God made the promise to Abraham, he meant only Abraham's descendants by his son Isaac. God was talking only about Isaac when he promised
translation_verse: Asɩn mʋ kasɛ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, man gyɛ nbii mʋ nɩɩ Abraham kʋʋgɛ mʋ kpini ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii ana. Amɔɔ bamʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ sa Abraham mʋ nkʋn ɩ gyɛ mʋ anaana‐bii.

english_verse: Sarah, “At this time next year I will return, and you will already have a son.”
translation_verse: Kpalɩ fɛɛ falɛ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ tɔwɛ Abraham, ‘Kesu kakʋ falɛ saŋa kɛ n ba bwii ba mʋ, fʋ‐ka Sara ii biti ɔ kʋʋgɛ kebii‐nyɩnsa‐bii.’

english_verse: Don't forget what happened to the twin sons of Isaac and Rebekah.
translation_verse: “Man gyɛ ɩmʋ nkʋn. Amaa ɔkyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ba tɩɩ mʋ yɛ Rebeka mʋ ɔ kʋʋgɛ nbwaara‐bii mʋ nɩɩ bamʋ‐sɛ gyɛ anɛ naana Isaki.

english_verse: That's why the Scriptures say that the Lord liked Jacob more than Esau.
translation_verse: Kanɩn nɩɩ ɔ wʋla tɔwɛ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, ‘N biti Gyekobu, amaa n kisi Esawu.’

english_verse: Everything then depends on God's mercy and not on what people want or do.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɩ man gyɛ nyɩmɩsa kɩpɩrɛ sʋ abɛɛ maa kpan mʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ, amaa ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kʋwɛɛ kuwu nɩn.

english_verse: In the Scriptures the Lord says to the king of Egypt, “I let you become king, so that I could show you my power and be praised by all people on earth.”
translation_verse: Kpalɩ fɛɛ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ Faro yɛ, ‘Ɩnɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ n bun fu kuwura kɛ n bɔla fʋ sʋ lɛɛ mɛ ɔlʋn kaapʋ, kɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ dulinyaa kpini tɔ ba yɩn mɛ kɩtɩɩ.’

english_verse: Everything depends on what God decides to do, and he can either have pity on people or make them stubborn. God's Anger and Mercy
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ kpini ɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti o wu kʋwɛɛ mʋ, bamʋ nɩɩ ee wu kʋwɛɛ, nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ee biti ba waa mʋ kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn mʋ, ɛɛ yɛgɛ nɩɩ ba waa kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn.

english_verse: Someone may ask, “How can God blame us, if he makes us behave in the way he wants us to?”
translation_verse: “Fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ ii biti ɔ taasɛ mɛ yɛ, ‘Nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ kanɩn bɩrɛ, ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ kina Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti mʋ, mɩnɛ ɩ waa sʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ san ɛɛ pwɩɩ anɛ kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn sʋ?’

english_verse: But, my friend, I ask, “Who do you think you are to question God? Does the clay have the right to ask the potter why he shaped it the way he did?
translation_verse: Amaa nyɩmɩsa, fʋ ɩ gyɛ anɩmʋ, nɩɩ fɩɩ taalɛ tɔwɛ gyaŋa Ɩbwaarɛ? Kʋtɔ pɔyɩsa ɩ taalɛ tɔwɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ pɔyɩ kɩmʋ mʋ yɛ, ‘Mɩnɛ ɩ waa nɩɩ fʋ pɔyɩ mɛ falɛ?’

english_verse: Doesn't a potter have the right to make a fancy bowl and a plain bowl out of the same lump of clay?”
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔpɔyɩpʋ sʋ ɔkpa fɛɛ ɔ barɩgɛ kabɔlɛ kuli tɔ kɩnyɔ, kɛ ɔ taa kʋkʋ pɔyɩ lapɛ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ yɛgɛ bɛɛ yɩla kensi‐gyii akɛ, kɛ ɔ taa kʋkʋ pɔyɩ lapɛ mʋ nɩɩ bee gyii tɔ kakɛ kʋmaa.

english_verse: God wanted to show his anger and reveal his power against everyone who deserved to be destroyed. But instead, he patiently put up with them.
translation_verse: “Kanɩn ɔkpa kʋlʋn sʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti fɛɛ ɔ lɛɛ mʋ agbʋ kaapʋ asa, kɛ ba wu mʋ ɔlʋn mʋ, amaa bamʋ nɩɩ ɔ nyɛ agbʋ bamʋ sʋ, nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ o nyita bamʋ mʋ, ɔ nyɛ kenyiita gaa sa bamʋ.

english_verse: He did this by showing how glorious he is when he has pity on the people he has chosen to share in his glory.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔ bɩla ee biti fɛɛ ɔ lɛɛ mʋ bʋnyaa kparɛ mʋ kaapʋ mʋ asa mʋ nɩɩ ee wu bamʋ kʋwɛɛ, nɩɩ ba gyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɔŋɔ bamʋ yɩla sa mʋ bʋnyaa mʋ.

english_verse: just as the Lord says in the book of Hosea, “Although they are not my people, I will make them my people. I will treat with love those nations that have never been loved.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ ɔtɔwɛpʋ Hoseya ɔwʋlɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ yɛ, ‘Asa mʋ nɩɩ naafɔɔ ba man gyɛ mɛ asa mʋ, n biti n tɩɩ bamʋ mɛ asa. Nɩɩ ɔsʋwʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ n man sʋ kebiti sa bamʋ mʋ, n biti n biti bamʋ.’

english_verse: “Once they were told, ‘You are not my people.’ But in that very place they will be called children of the living God.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ii biti ɩ ba fɛɛ opula mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, ‘Fan man gyɛ mɛ asa mʋ, kanɩn opula maŋa tɔ nɩɩ bee biti ba tɩɩ bamʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ nkpa wuya mu‐bii ana.’ ”

english_verse: And this is what the prophet Isaiah said about the people of Israel, “The people of Israel are as many as the grains of sand along the beach. But only a few who are left will be saved.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ ɔtɔwɛpʋ Isaya gbaa kuusi tɔwɛ lɩɩ Ɩsɩrayɩ abi sʋ yɛ, “Halɩɩ Ɩsɩrayɩ abi ba maa kyɔ fɛɛ ɔpʋ kɔnɔ kɩkyafa falɛ gbaa mʋ, bamʋ tɔ akalɩsa akʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ ba mɔlɩgɛ.

english_verse: The Lord will be quick and sure to do on earth what he has warned he will do.”
translation_verse: Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti o gyii mʋ asɩn kasɛ sʋ bilen‐bilen kɛ ɔ lʋwɛ ɩmʋ kɛ ɔ tɩn ɩmʋ kɩdɩyɛ.”

english_verse: Isaiah also said, “If the Lord All-Powerful had not spared some of our descendants, we would have been destroyed like the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah.” Israel and the Good News
translation_verse: I du nɩn fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Isaya wʋla tɔwɛ yɩla mʋ yɛ, “Fɛɛ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Ɔlʋn kpini wuya man dɩn dan yɛgɛ anɛ odu tɔ sa akʋ yɩla mʋ, naafɔɔ an dɩn muuri fɛɛ Sodom yɛ Gomora abi mʋ.” Ɩsɩrayɩ abi ba man kɔɔlɛ asɩn mʋ gyii

english_verse: What does all of this mean? It means that the Gentiles were not trying to be acceptable to God, but they found that he would accept them if they had faith.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ mɩnɛ nɩɩ an biti a tɔwɛ? An biti an tɔwɛ yɛ, bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi, nɩɩ bamʋ ansi an man payɩ bee biti ɩkpa kyiigisa mʋ, lɩɩ bamʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ Yesu gyii sʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ kɔɔlɛ bamʋ fɛɛ bamʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ asɛ.

english_verse: It also means that the people of Israel were not acceptable to God. And why not? It was because they were trying to be acceptable by obeying the Law instead of by having faith in God. The people of Israel fell over the stone that makes people stumble,
translation_verse: Mɩnɛ maa waa sʋ? Lɩɩ fɛɛ ba man taa kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ bee biti, amaa ba sʋ ba naa yɛ awaasa sʋ nɩn. Nɩɩ ba siti “Kubuu sitisa” mʋ lɩɩ tɩyɛ,

english_verse: just as God says in the Scriptures, “Look! I am placing in Zion a stone to make people stumble and fall. But those who have faith in that one will never be disappointed.”
translation_verse: fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ lɩɩ Yesu mʋ nɩɩ ɔ yɩlɛ sa kubuu nɩmʋ asɩn Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, “Fan kɩɩ! N taa kubuu mʋ nɩɩ kɩ yɛgɛ asa ba siti mʋ yɩla Siyon kadɛ tɔ. Kɛ kanɩn kɩfʋlɛ‐buu maŋa kɩ yɛgɛ asa ba lɩɩ bɛɛ tɩyɛ. Amaa ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii mʋ, mɛɛ yɛ o gyii ipeeli.”

english_verse: Dear friends, my greatest wish and my prayer to God is for the people of Israel to be saved.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, mɛ kɔkɔlɔ biti yɛ mɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ ɩ gyɛ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ mɔlɩgɛ Ɩsɩrayɩ abi.

english_verse: But Christ makes the Law no longer necessary for those who become acceptable to God by faith. Anyone Can Be Saved
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ kesintin ɩ gyɛ yɛ Krisito ɩ waa nbara mu kusun mʋ lʋwɛ, nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ tɔwɛ yɛ mʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ asɛ.

english_verse: Moses said a person could become acceptable to God by obeying the Law. He did this when he wrote, “If you want to live, you must do all the Law commands.”
translation_verse: Mosesi kaapʋ asa kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba buu nbara mʋ, kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ kɔɔlɛ bamʋ fɛɛ bamʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ asɛ. Nɩɩ ɔ kyʋrɔɔ yɛ, “Ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o buu ɩnɩmʋ mʋ ee biti ɔ nyɛ nkpa lɩɩ ɩmʋ sʋ.”

english_verse: Neither will they ask, “Who will go down into the world of the dead to raise him to life?”
translation_verse: abɛɛ man tɔwɛ yɛ, anɩmʋ ii biti ɔ kpɩlɩgɛ kpee kasɛ‐kasɛ tɔ? ”

english_verse: All who are acceptable because of their faith simply say, “The message is as near as your mouth or your heart.” And this is the same message we preach about faith.
translation_verse: Amaa nɛnɛ nɩɩ ɩ kyaga sʋ ɩ tɔwɛ? “Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn mʋ i tiri fʋ tɔ, nɩɩ ɩ bʋ fʋ kɔnɔ tɔ yɛ fʋ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ.” Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii asɩn mʋ nɩɩ an tɔwɛ mʋ.

english_verse: So you will be saved, if you honestly say, “Jesus is Lord,” and if you believe with all your heart that God raised him from death.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fʋ kan taa fʋ kɔnɔ lɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, Yesu ɩ gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ, nɩɩ fʋ kɔɔlɛ gyii fʋ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kyiŋi mʋ lɩɩ lewu tɔ mʋ, fii biti fʋ nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ.

english_verse: no matter if that person is a Jew or a Gentile. There is only one Lord, and he is generous to everyone who asks for his help.
translation_verse: Gyiwu abi ba man kwɩɩ yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ tɔ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ kʋlʋn ɩ gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ sa asa kpini. Nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kʋsee kʋkyɔ ɛɛ sa ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ tɩɩ mʋ kɩtɩɩ mʋ,

english_verse: How can people have faith in the Lord and ask him to save them, if they have never heard about him? And how can they hear, unless someone tells them?
translation_verse: Nɛnɛ nɩɩ bee biti ba waa kɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man pɩɩta kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii mʋ, ba taalɛ tɩɩ mʋ kɩtɩɩ? Nɩɩ ba man kan nu mʋ asɩn mʋ, nɛnɛ nɩɩ bee biti ba waa kɛ ba kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii? Nɩɩ ɔkʋ man pɩɩta tɔwɛ bamʋ abwaarɛsɩn mʋ, nɛnɛ nɩɩ bee biti ba waa kɛ ba nu?

english_verse: And how can anyone tell them without being sent by the Lord? The Scriptures say it is a beautiful sight to see even the feet of someone coming to preach the good news.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ man kan sun bamʋ yɛ ba naa tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ, nɛnɛ nɩɩ bee biti ba waa kɛ ba naa tɔwɛ asɩn mʋ? Ɩbwaarɛ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Bamʋ nɩɩ ba naa bɛɛ tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ, bamʋ kɩnatɛ mʋ kɩ bʋrɔn gaa.”

english_verse: Yet not everyone has believed the message. For example, the prophet Isaiah asked, “Lord, has anyone believed what we said?”
translation_verse: Amaa man gyɛ Ɩsɩrayɩ abi kpini ɩ kɔɔlɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ gyii. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔtɔwɛpʋ Isaya tɔwɛ yɛ, “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ, anɩmʋ ɩ kɔɔlɛ anɛ asɩn tɔwɛsa mʋ gyii?”

english_verse: But am I saying that the people of Israel did not hear? No, I am not! The Scriptures say, “The message was told everywhere on earth. It was announced all over the world.”
translation_verse: Amaa n taasɛ yɛ, Gyiwu abi mʋ nɩɩ ba man kɔɔlɛ gyii mʋ, ba man nu asɩn mʋ nɩn? Ba nu yɛ bamʋ asʋ. Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Asɩn danbɩrasa kɩtɔwɛ mʋ, ii kpee dulinyaa tɔ kpini, nɩɩ asɩn tɔwɛsa nɩmʋ i kpee ɩsʋwʋlɛ kpini sʋ.”

english_verse: Did the people of Israel understand or not? Moses answered this question when he told that the Lord had said, “I will make Israel jealous of people who are a nation of nobodies. I will make them angry with people who don't understand a thing.”
translation_verse: N bɩla taasɛ yɛ, “Ɩsɩrayɩ abi ba man nu kasɛ nɩn? Ba nu kasɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ Mosesi wʋla gyankpaa tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ, ‘N biti n taa bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ, nɩɩ ba man gyɛ kʋbʋ fɛɛ fanɛ mʋ, waa fanɛ kensi payɩ. N biti n taa asa mʋ nɩɩ ba man nyi mɛ mʋ waa fanɛ agbʋ.’

english_verse: Isaiah was fearless enough to tell that the Lord had said, “I was found by people who were not looking for me. I appeared to the ones who were not asking about me.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔtɔwɛpʋ Isaya yɩlɛ kɩnyɩntɔ kyaga sʋ tɔwɛ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ, ‘Bamʋ nɩɩ ba man kɩɩ biti mɛ gbaa mʋ, bamʋ nɩɩ n yɛgɛ nɩɩ ba wu mɛ. Nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man taasɛ mɛ sʋ mʋ, n lɛɛ mɛ n‐yɩɩ n kaapʋ bamʋ.’

english_verse: And Isaiah said about the people of Israel, “All day long the Lord has reached out to people who are stubborn and refuse to obey.”
translation_verse: Amaa lɩɩ Ɩsɩrayɩ abi mʋ sʋ bɩrɛ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, ‘Halɩɩ Ɩsɩrayɩ abi ba maa bamʋ kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn, yɛ bamʋ kikina mɛ sʋ mʋ, n san n da kɩbaa n tɩɩ bamʋ kakɛ kʋmaa yɛ ba ba mɛ asɛ.’ ”

english_verse: Am I saying that God has turned his back on his people? Certainly not! I am one of the people of Israel, and I myself am a descendant of Abraham from the tribe of Benjamin.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n taasɛ yɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ kina mʋ asa Ɩsɩrayɩ abi nɩn abɛɛ? Ayee! Ngbaa mɛ n gyɛ Ɩsɩrayɩ obii nɩn. Nɩɩ n gyɛ Abraham kanaana‐bii nɩɩ n lɩɩ Bengyamin kebunɔ.

english_verse: God did not turn his back on his chosen people. Don't you remember reading in the Scriptures how Elijah complained to God about the people of Israel?
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ man kina mʋ asa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wʋla o nyi bamʋ mʋ. Nɩɩ fan man nyiŋi asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Eligya tɔwɛ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ mʋ? Eligya maa fabɩlɛ ɛɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ lɩɩ Ɩsɩrayɩ abi sʋ yɛ,

english_verse: He said, “Lord, they killed your prophets and destroyed your altars. I am the only one left, and now they want to kill me.”
translation_verse: “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ, ba mɔɔ fʋ atɔwɛpʋ kpini, nɩɩ ba boyi fʋ saraga nswɩɩ kpini. Nɩɩ mɛ nkʋn i sii nɩɩ bee biti ba mɔɔ mɛ.”

english_verse: This means that only a chosen few of the people of Israel found what all of them were searching for. And the rest of them were stubborn,
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ mɩnɛ? Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩsɩrayɩ abi bɛɛ kpan bamʋ n‐yɩɩ bee biti mʋ ba man nyɛ kɩmʋ, amɔɔ bamʋ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ bamʋ mʋ ɩ nyɛ. Amaa bamʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba san mʋ nkɔlɔ ɩ bʋlʋn.

english_verse: It is the same way now. God treated the people of Israel with undeserved grace, and so a few of them are still his followers.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ anɛ saŋa nɩmʋ tɔ gbaa, Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mʋ asa kalɩsa akʋ lɩɩ mʋ kabwaala sʋ.

english_verse: This happened because of God's undeserved kindness and not because of anything they have done. It could not have happened except for God's gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩlɛɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ kabwaala sʋ bɩrɛ, kanɩn bɩrɛ ɩ man bɩla ɩ gyɛ kusun mʋ nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa sun. Nɩɩ ɩ kan ɩ gyɛ kusun sʋ bɩrɛ, kabwaala man bɩla kɩ gyɛ kabwaala.

english_verse: just as the Scriptures say, “God made them so stupid that their eyes are blind, and their ears are still deaf.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Isaya tɔwɛ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, “Ɩbwaarɛ waa bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ fɛɛ amelensipu, nɩɩ ba mɛɛ taalɛ taa bamʋ ansi wu, nɩɩ ba mɛɛ taalɛ taa bamʋ asʋ gbaa nu ba fʋʋ ndaga kakɛ nɩmʋ.”

english_verse: Then David said, “Turn their meals into bait for a trap, so that they will stumble and be given what they deserve.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Dawidi gbaa tɔwɛ lɩɩ Ɩlʋn ɩwʋlɛ mʋ tɔ yɛ, “Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ yɛgɛ bamʋ ansi ogyikpa i biliŋi ɔdʋʋ da bamʋ, kɛ ɩ bɩla yɛgɛ ba lɩɩ tɩyɛ, kɛ ɩ baa ɩ gyɛ bamʋ kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ.

english_verse: Blindfold their eyes! Don't let them see. Bend their backs beneath a burden that will never be lifted.” Gentiles Will Be Saved
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ yɛgɛ bamʋ ansi i bun kɛ ba man bɩla wu, kɛ ɔ yɛgɛ awʋrʋfɔ i nu bamʋ kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ ba nyɔn tɔ kakpaa.” Ɩbwaarɛ kamɔlɩgɛ mʋ kɩ dɛ sa asa kpini

english_verse: Do I mean that the people of Israel fell, never to get up again? Certainly not! Their failure made it possible for the Gentiles to be saved, and this will make the people of Israel jealous.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n bɩla taasɛ yɛ, “Ɩsɩrayɩ abi ba maa siti tɩyɛ mʋ, ba mɛɛ bɩla taalɛ kʋsʋ? Ayee!” Amaa lɩɩ bamʋ alibi sʋ mʋ, bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Ɩsɩrayɩ abi mʋ bee biti ba ba nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ Ɩsɩrayɩ abi ba nyɛ kayɩɩ basa.

english_verse: I am now speaking to you Gentiles, and as long as I am an apostle to you, I will take pride in my work.
translation_verse: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ n tɔwɛ n sa fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ nɩn. Fɛɛ n maa gyɛ Krisito osunpu mʋ nɩɩ o sun mɛ fanɛ asɛ mʋ, kusun mʋ ki gyii mi ansi.

english_verse: I hope in this way to make some of my own people jealous enough to be saved.
translation_verse: N sʋ tamaa fɛɛ akʋtɔ mi kusun mʋ kii biti kɩ taalɛ yɛgɛ mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ asa ba nyɛ kayɩɩ basa kɛ bamʋ akʋ ba nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ.

english_verse: When Israel rejected God, the rest of the people in the world were able to turn to him. So when God makes friends with Israel, it will be like bringing the dead back to life.
translation_verse: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kina Ɩsɩrayɩ abi mʋ, ɩmʋ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ dulinyaa abi ba bwii ba Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ. Kanɩn sʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bwii kɔɔlɛ Ɩsɩrayɩ abi mʋ, ii biti ɩ baa i du nɩn fɛɛ alewupu ii bwii kyiŋi ba nkpa tɔ.

english_verse: If part of a batch of dough is made holy by being offered to God, then all of the dough is holy. If the roots of a tree are holy, the rest of the tree is holy too.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nɩɩ ba kan lɛɛ atɔ kʋ tɔ ɩkʋ waa saraga sa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ san mʋ gbaa ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ nɩn. Fɛɛ nɩɩ ba taa oyu ilin waa saraga sa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ n‐yaabi mʋ kpini ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ.

english_verse: But don't think you are better than the branches that were cut away. Just remember you are not supporting the roots of this tree. Its roots are supporting you.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan man kaapʋ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ fɛɛ fan kyɔ kewu tɔ oyu duusa mʋ n‐yaabi mʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ man gyɛ fanɛ ɩɩ sa ilin mʋ nkpa, amaa ilin mʋ ɩɩ sa fanɛ nkpa.

english_verse: Maybe you think those branches were cut away, so you could be put in their place.
translation_verse: Akʋtɔ fii biti fʋ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Ba ŋɛ n‐yaabi fɔyɩ kɛ ba nyɛ taa mɛ ŋmina kyaga sʋ.”

english_verse: That's true enough. But they were cut away because they did not have faith, and you are where you are because you do have faith. So don't be proud, but be afraid.
translation_verse: Ɩ bʋ tɔ kanɩn. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ba maa man kɔɔlɛ gyii sʋ nɩɩ ba ŋɛ bamʋ fɔyɩ. Nɩɩ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ nɩɩ fan ba yii bamʋ ayaa tɔ. Kanɩn sʋ fan man kan kʋsaa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ, amaa fan baa fan daa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ.

english_verse: Now you see both how kind and how hard God can be. He was hard on those who fell, but he was kind to you. And he will keep on being kind to you, if you keep on trusting in his kindness. Otherwise, you will be cut away too.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan kɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ wu asa kʋwɛɛ yɛ mʋ katalɛ ɔkpa sʋ. Bamʋ nɩɩ ba waa mʋ kʋsʋ ɔlʋn mʋ, ɛɛ talɛ bamʋ ɔkpa sʋ, amaa fanɛɛ fanɛ bɩrɛ ee su fanɛ kʋwɛɛ. Nɩɩ fan kan kyaga sʋ kɔɔlɛ mʋ kʋwɛɛ kuwu gyii mʋ, ee biti ɔ kyaga sʋ ee wu fanɛ kʋwɛɛ. Nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ kanɩn mʋ, ee biti ɔ ŋɛ fanɛ tʋʋ.

english_verse: If those other branches will start having faith, they will be made a part of that tree again. God has the power to put them back.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Gyiwu abi bɩrɛ, nɩɩ ba kan yɛgɛ bamʋ kɩman kɔɔlɛ gyii mʋ bɩrɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti o bwiiyaa bamʋ ba kyaga oyu duusa mʋ sʋ. Ɩbwaarɛ sʋ ɔlʋn ɔ taalɛ waa kanɩn.

english_verse: After all, it wasn't natural for branches to be cut from a wild olive tree and to be made part of a cultivated olive tree. So it is much more likely that God will join the natural branches back to the cultivated olive tree. The People of Israel Will Be Brought Back
translation_verse: Fan kɩɩ, fanɛ gbaa‐gbaa fanɛ ɩ gyɛ afitiri tɔ olifu n‐yaabi, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ŋɛ fanɛ lɩɩ tʋtɔ ba kyaga kewu tɔ olifu oyu duusa mʋ sʋ. Ɩmʋ sʋ ɩ mɛɛ yɛ ɩ ba ɩ bʋlʋn sa Ɩbwaarɛ fɛɛ o bwiiyaa kewu oyu duusa mʋ n‐yaabi ba kyaga kɩmʋ gbaa‐gbaa sʋ. Ɩbwaarɛ i wu asa kpini kʋwɛɛ

english_verse: My friends, I don't want you Gentiles to be too proud of yourselves. So I will explain the mystery of what has happened to the people of Israel. Some of them have become stubborn, and they will stay like that until the complete number of you Gentiles has come in.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, n biti fɛɛ fan baa fen nyi falɛ asɩn baalasa nɩmʋ sʋ, kɛ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ ɔ man kʋsaa mʋ n‐yɩɩ. Gyiwu abi akʋ ba nyɛ kɔkɔlɔ ɔsɩɩ naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ gaalaagaa ba ba kɔɔlɛ Yesu gyii.

english_verse: In this way all of Israel will be saved, as the Scriptures say, “From Zion someone will come to rescue us. Then Jacob's descendants will stop being evil.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ falɛ ɔkpa sʋ nɩɩ Ɩsɩrayɩ abi kpini bee biti ba nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ. Kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, “Siyon kadɛ tɔ nɩɩ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ mʋ ii biti ɔ lɩɩ. Ee biti ɔ ba yɛgɛ Ɩsɩrayɩ abi kpini ba yɛgɛ asɩn gyaga kɩwaa.

english_verse: This is what the Lord has promised to do when he forgives their sins.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n kan taa bamʋ alibi kɛɛ bamʋ mʋ, ɩmʋ ii biti ɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ maa bamʋ katɔwɛ kyula mʋ kɩ ba tɔ.”

english_verse: The people of Israel are treated as God's enemies, so the good news can come to you Gentiles. But they are still the chosen ones, and God loves them because of their famous ancestors.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ Ɩsɩrayɩ abi asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ kekina sʋ mʋ, ba biliŋi Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ‐dʋn ana. Amaa bamʋ kekina mʋ ɩ yɛgɛ fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan man gyɛ Gyiwu abi fan nyɛ tɔnɔ. Amaa lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩlɛɛ tɔ mʋ, ba gyɛ mʋ asa bitisa lɩɩ bamʋ naana ana sʋ.

english_verse: God doesn't take back the gifts he has given or disown the people he has chosen.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kan kɛɛ ɔkʋ kakɛɛ abɛɛ nɩɩ ɔ kan tɩɩ ɔkʋ mʋ, ɔ man bɩla yɛ ɔ kyɛɛgɛ mʋ nfɛɛrɛ.

english_verse: At one time you Gentiles rejected God. But now Israel has rejected God, and you have been shown mercy.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan man gyɛ Gyiwu abi fan kyɩna waa Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn, nɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ wu fanɛ kʋwɛɛ, kpalɩ fɛɛ Gyiwu abi ba maa waa kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn sʋ,

english_verse: All people have disobeyed God, and that's why he treats them as prisoners. But he does this, so that he can have mercy on all of them.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛgɛ nɩɩ asa kpini kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn gyii bamʋ sʋ, kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ waa kɛ o wu bamʋ kʋwɛɛ. Ayɩn‐bi ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ

english_verse: Who can measure the wealth and wisdom and knowledge of God? Who can understand his decisions or explain what he does?
translation_verse: Fan kɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ atɔ kparɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ mʋ. Ɩbwaarɛ kanyaasɩn yɛ mʋ kinyi man sʋ ɔkaa. Anɩmʋ ɩ taalɛ bɩɩ mʋ ntalɛ tɔ kyɛɛkyɛɛ? Nɩɩ anɩmʋ ɩ taalɛ kɩɩ biti wu mʋ ɩkpa naa lʋwɛ?

english_verse: Has anyone loaned something to the Lord that must be repaid?”
translation_verse: “Nɩɩ anɩmʋ ɩ tɛɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ atɔ kʋ, kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ ba ka ɩmʋ kʋkɔ?”

english_verse: Everything comes from the Lord. All things were made because of him and will return to him. Praise the Lord forever! Amen.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ atɔ kpini ɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ, nɩɩ mʋ ɔlʋn sʋ nɩɩ ɩmʋ kpini ɩ bʋ tɔ, nɩɩ ɩmʋ kpini ɩ gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ. Mʋ nɩɩ bʋnyaa gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ kakpaa. Ɩ ba kanɩn.

english_verse: Don't be like the people of this world, but let God change the way you think. Then you will know how to do everything that is good and pleasing to him.
translation_verse: Fan man kasɛ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ asɩn waasa, amaa fan kyɛɛgɛ fanɛ kɩbaabʋtɔ, kɛ fan nyɛ nfɛɛrɛ pʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋrɔn. Ɩmʋ ii biti ɩ yɛgɛ fan taalɛ kaala bɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti yɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋrɔn yɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ i gyii mu ansi yɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ dɛ kyɛɛkyɛɛ naa fʋʋ ɔkaa.

english_verse: I realize God has treated me with undeserved grace, and so I tell each of you not to think you are better than you really are. Use good sense and measure yourself by the amount of faith that God has given you.
translation_verse: N bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ bwaala kɛkɛɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa sa mɛ mʋ sʋ, n tɔwɛ n sa fanɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ yɛ, ɔ man kɩɩ mʋ n‐yɩɩ ɔ kyɔ kanan mʋ nɩɩ o du, amaa ɔ bɩya mʋ nfɛɛrɛ kasɛ lɩɩ mʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kaala sa mʋ sʋ mʋ.

english_verse: A body is made up of many parts, and each of them has its own use.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ anɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ sʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kʋlʋn yɛ ɩkyagakpa kʋkwɩɩ‐kʋkwɩɩ, nɩɩ kʋkʋmaa nɩmʋ sʋ kɩmʋ kusun sunsa mʋ,

english_verse: That's how it is with us. There are many of us, but we each are part of the body of Christ, as well as part of one another.
translation_verse: kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ a maa kyɔ gbaa mʋ, an bʋga waa kʋbʋ kʋlʋn Krisito tɔ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ sʋ ɩkyagakpa kʋkwɩɩ‐kʋkwɩɩ, nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ kayɩɩ kʋlʋn mʋ.

english_verse: God has also given each of us different gifts to use. If we can prophesy, we should do it according to the amount of faith we have.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ an sʋ kabwaala kakɛɛ kʋkwɩɩ‐kʋkwɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa sa anɛ. Nɩɩ ɔkʋ lɛɛ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ maa bɔla mʋ sʋ ɛɛ tɔwɛ asɩn mʋ, ɔ taa waa Ɩbwaarɛ ɔtɔwɛpʋ kusun fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ mʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kɩ kaapʋ mʋ.

english_verse: If we can serve others, we should serve. If we can teach, we should teach.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ lɛɛ kan ɔ gyɛ ɔ taa sun mʋ tɔɔmaa ana mʋ, ɔ taa sun bamʋ. Nɩɩ ɔkʋ lɛɛ kan ɔ gyɛ kɩkaapʋ mʋ, ɔ taa kaapʋ asa.

english_verse: If we can encourage others, we should encourage them. If we can give, we should be generous. If we are leaders, we should do our best. If we are good to others, we should do it cheerfully. Rules for Christian Living
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ lɛɛ kan ɔ gyɛ kɩtɔwɛ waa mʋ, ɔ tɔwɛ waa. Nɩɩ ɔkʋ lɛɛ kan ɔ gyɛ kɛkɛɛ sa asa mʋ nɩɩ ii tiri bamʋ mʋ, ɔ lɛɛ mʋ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ sa. Nɩɩ ɔkʋ lɛɛ kan ɔ gyɛ kɩbɩlɩsa mʋ, ɔ kɩɩ sʋ kpan mʋ n‐yɩɩ waa. Nɩɩ ɔkʋ mɔɔ lɛɛ kan ɔ gyɛ kʋwɛɛ kuwu mʋ, o bugi mʋ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ su asa sʋ. Kebiti abaa

english_verse: Be sincere in your love for others. Hate everything that is evil and hold tight to everything that is good.
translation_verse: Fan biti abaa lɩɩ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ. Fan yɛgɛ alibi ɩ waa fanɛ kʋtɔ kisisa, kɛ fan kɩtaa kɩdanbɩrasa tɔ kinkin.

english_verse: Love each other as brothers and sisters and honor others more than you do yourself.
translation_verse: Fan biti fanɛ bɩrɩsa ana Krisito abi fɛɛ kinyi‐bii. Kɛ fan taa bɛɛrɛɛ sa abaa fan kyɔ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ.

english_verse: Never give up. Eagerly follow the Holy Spirit and serve the Lord.
translation_verse: Fan kpan fanɛ n‐yɩɩ, kɛ fan man waa wʋlʋgyɔ, amaa fan taa fanɛ ɔlʋn kpini sun Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ.

english_verse: Ask God to bless everyone who mistreats you. Ask him to bless them and not to curse them.
translation_verse: Fan kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ waa bamʋ nɩɩ bee kisi fanɛ gbaa mʋ kusee. Ɛɛhn! Fan kʋlɛ mʋ ɔ waa bamʋ kusee, kɛ fan man tɔwɛ bamʋ nnɔ.

english_verse: When others are happy, be happy with them, and when they are sad, be sad.
translation_verse: Bamʋ nɩɩ bee gyii ansi mʋ, fan naa bamʋ fan bʋga gyii ansi, nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ bɔta bee su mʋ, fan naa bamʋ fɛn bɔta tɔ su.

english_verse: Be friendly with everyone. Don't be proud and feel that you know more than others. Make friends with ordinary people.
translation_verse: Fan waa kɔnɔ kʋlʋn tɔwɛ kyula abaa. Fan man kaapʋ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ, amaa fan taa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ bʋga asa mʋ nɩɩ ba man bʋ sɛhn tɔ mʋ. Fan man fɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ fan nyi fan kyɔ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ.

english_verse: and do your best to live at peace with everyone.
translation_verse: Fan waa fanɛ abaa ɔkaa lɛɛ, kɛ fan naa ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ fan kyɩna kayɩɩ yuuli tɔ.

english_verse: Dear friends, don't try to get even. Let God take revenge. In the Scriptures the Lord says, “I am the one to take revenge and pay them back.”
translation_verse: Mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ ana, fan man taa alibi ka ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa fanɛ alibi mʋ kʋkɔ. Fan yɛgɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa sa Ɩbwaarɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Mɛ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ n tɛɛla asa, nɩɩ n ka alibi kʋkɔ.”

english_verse: The Scriptures also say, “If your enemies are hungry, give them something to eat. And if they are thirsty, give them something to drink. This will be the same as piling burning coals on their heads.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa ɩ bɩla tɔwɛ yɛ, “Fɛɛ nɩɩ akʋn ɩ kan ɩ sʋ fu okisipu mʋ, sa mʋ agyitɔ kɛ o gyii, nɩɩ bʋlɩfɔ kan ɔ sʋ mʋ mʋ, sa mʋ nkyu kɛ o nuu. Fʋ nyɛ nɩɩ fʋ waa kanɩn mʋ, i du nɩn fɛɛ fʋ maa kʋʋla afʋlɔn‐gyi gyaga mu kumu nsana.”

english_verse: Don't let evil defeat you, but defeat evil with good.
translation_verse: Fan man yɛgɛ alibi i gyii fanɛ sʋ, amaa fan taa fanɛ adanbɩrasa gyii alibi sʋ.

english_verse: Obey the rulers who have authority over you. Only God can give authority to anyone, and he puts these rulers in their places of power.
translation_verse: Ɩ dagaa fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ maa bɩya mʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa kɩbanɛ alʋlʋnpʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔlʋnpʋ kʋ man bʋ tɔ, amɔɔ ɔmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ yɩla mʋ. Nɩɩ alʋlʋnpʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ tɔ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ i yii bamʋ.

english_verse: Rulers are a threat to evil people, not to good people. There is no need to be afraid of the authorities. Just do right, and they will praise you for it.
translation_verse: Kpalɩ fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa adanbɩrasa mʋ ba man sɩlɛ ɩsʋwʋlɛ akɩɩsʋpʋ, amɔɔ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa alibi nkʋn ɩ sɩlɛ bamʋ. Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ fen mee biti fan baa fan sɩlɛ alʋlʋnpʋ mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ fan baa fɛn waa adanbɩrasa, kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ ba yɩn fanɛ.

english_verse: After all, they are God's servants, and it is their duty to help you. If you do something wrong, you ought to be afraid, because these rulers have the right to punish you. They are God's servants who punish criminals to show how angry God is.
translation_verse: Kpalɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ lɛɛ bamʋ waa akɩɩsʋpʋ kɛ ɩ kyɛ fanɛ tɔ kɛ ɩ waa ɔdan sa fanɛ. Amaa nɩɩ fan waa alibi bɩrɛ, fan sɩlɛ bamʋ kpalɩ fɛɛ man gyɛ kɩyan sʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ ɔlʋn fanɛ sʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ba gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ayaafɔlɛ mʋ nɩɩ ba yɩlɛ mʋ ayaa tɔ ba bɩɩtɛ alibi awaapʋ asʋ.

english_verse: But you should obey the rulers because you know it is the right thing to do, and not just because of God's anger.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ fan bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa alʋlʋnpʋ mʋ. Man gyɛ kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ nkʋn sʋ, amaa fen nyi fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ fɛɛ ɩmʋ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ fan waa.

english_verse: You must also pay your taxes. The authorities are God's servants, and it is their duty to take care of these matters.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ kpini sʋ mʋ fan ka fanɛ tʋʋtʋʋ sa kɩbanɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ alʋlʋnpʋ mʋ ba gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ayaafɔlɛ nɩn, nɩɩ ba sʋ bamʋ saŋa kpini bɛɛ waa bamʋ kusun.

english_verse: In the Law there are many commands, such as, “Be faithful in marriage. Do not murder. Do not steal. Do not want what belongs to others.” But all of these are summed up in the command that says, “Love others as much as you love yourself.”
translation_verse: Mosesi nbara mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Man lɩɩ fʋ‐ka abɛɛ fu‐kuli kamaa, man mɔɔ nyɩmɩsa, man kan yuuri, man kan yɛgɛ fu ansi ɩ payɩ ɔkʋ atɔ sʋ.” Nbara mʋ yɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ bɩla i tii sʋ mʋ, ɩmʋ kpini kumu ɩ gyɛ nbara mʋ nɩɩ ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Biti fʋ bɩrɩsa fɛɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ.”

english_verse: No one who loves others will harm them. So love is all that the Law demands. The Day When Christ Returns
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kebiti sa mʋ bɩrɩsa mʋ, mɛɛ waa mʋ alibi. Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ fʋ kan fii biti fʋ bɩrɩsa ana mʋ, fu buu nbara mʋ nɩmʋ.

english_verse: You know what sort of times we live in, and so you should live properly. It is time to wake up. You know that the day when we will be saved is nearer now than when we first put our faith in the Lord.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ fan buu nbara nɩmʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fen nyi nbɩɩnbɩɩ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ an bʋ kɩmʋ tɔ falɛ. Saŋa mʋ fʋʋ fɛɛ fan kyiŋi lɩɩ fanɛ nsɩɩrɛ tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ anɛ kamɔlɩgɛ saŋa mʋ tiri tɔ nbɩɩnbɩɩ ɩ kyɔ kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ an kɔɔlɛ Yesu gyii mʋ.

english_verse: Night is almost over, and day will soon appear. We must stop behaving as people do in the dark and be ready to live in the light.
translation_verse: Kagyanbwɛ kɩ tɛɛ kɩɩ lʋwɛ, nɩɩ kayɩkɛ mɔɔ kii tiri tɔ. Ɩmʋ sʋ fan yɛgɛ a lɛɛ kitentenbiri awaasa mʋ tʋʋ, kɛ a taa fɩtɩla atɔ mʋ nɩɩ an taa kɔ kitentenbiri tɔ awaasa mʋ taa bun.

english_verse: So behave properly, as people do in the day. Don't go to wild parties or get drunk or be vulgar or indecent. Don't quarrel or be jealous.
translation_verse: Fan yɛgɛ anɛ kɩbaabʋtɔ kɩ baa kɩ bʋrɔn yɛgɛ kɩ kɩɩ tɔ fɛɛ kakyʋwapɛ, kɛ an man nyita saŋa iseeli libi abɛɛ kata‐bʋʋ tɔ, abɛɛ anɛ tɔ ɔkʋ ɔ man lɩɩ mʋ‐ka abɛɛ mu‐kuli kamaa, an man waa ineesi atɔ, kɛ a man kɔ nluu kɛ a man waa kensi payɩ libi yɛ abaa.

english_verse: Let the Lord Jesus Christ be as near to you as the clothes you wear. Then you won't try to satisfy your selfish desires.
translation_verse: Amaa fan taa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito waa fɛɛ fanɛ ɩkaalɛ bunsa. Kɛ fan man fɛ nfɛɛrɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fanɛ alibi kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ kɩ taa waa kɩmʋ kebiti.

english_verse: Welcome all the Lord's followers, even those whose faith is weak. Don't criticize them for having beliefs that are different from yours.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fanɛ akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ tɔ ɔkʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kɩ man bʋlʋn mʋ, fan kɔɔlɛ mʋ, amaa fan man gyii mʋ ɩmɔɔrɛ.

english_verse: Some think it is all right to eat anything, while those whose faith is weak will eat only vegetables.
translation_verse: A taa fɛɛ ɔkʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ ɛɛ taalɛ gyii kʋtɔ kʋmaa, amaa ɔkʋ mʋ nɩɩ mʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kɩ man bʋlʋn mʋ, ee gyii afatɛɛ ɩpʋ nkʋn.

english_verse: What right do you have to criticize someone else's servants? Only their Lord can decide if they are doing right, and the Lord will make sure that they do right.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ, fʋ ɩ gyɛ anɩmʋ nɩɩ fɩɩ pwɩɩ ɔkʋ kɩyaafɔlɛ? Mʋ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa ɩ taalɛ wu fɛɛ ɔ yɩlɛ tɔ abɛɛ ɔ waa tɩyɛ. Nɩɩ ee biti ɔ taalɛ yɩlɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ yɛgɛ ɔ taalɛ yɩlɛ.

english_verse: Some of the Lord's followers think one day is more important than another. Others think all days are the same. But each of you should make up your own mind.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋ sʋ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ kakɛ kʋ ki tiri kɩ kyɔ nkɛ nkʋ, nɩɩ ɔkʋ mɔɔ ɩ kɩɩ fɛɛ nkɛ mʋ kpini ɩ gyɛ kyɛɛkyɛɛ. Fanɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ nfɛɛrɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ fɛ yɛ ɩ bʋrɔn mʋ, ɔ yɩlɛ ɩmʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Any followers who count one day more important than another day do it to honor their Lord. And any followers who eat meat give thanks to God, just like the ones who don't eat meat.
translation_verse: Ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kɩɩ fɛɛ kakɛ kʋ ki tiri mʋ, ɛɛ waa kanɩn ɛɛ sa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ. Nɩɩ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ee gyii kunun mʋ, ee gyii yɛgɛ ɛɛ taa bɛɛrɛɛ ɛɛ sa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ sʋ afwaala ɛɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ. Nɩɩ ɔmʋ nɩɩ o mee gyii mɔɔ mʋ, ɛɛ waa kanɩn ɔ sʋ bɛɛrɛɛ ɛɛ sa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ, kɛ mʋ gbaa mʋ ɔ taa afwaala sa Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: Whether we live or die, it must be for God, rather than for ourselves.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ anɛ ɔkʋ man bʋ tɔ nɩɩ ɔ tɛ sa mʋ n‐yɩɩ, nɩɩ kanɩn gbaa nɩɩ fu wu mʋ, fʋ man wu sa fʋ n‐yɩɩ.

english_verse: This is because Christ died and rose to life, so that he would be the Lord of the dead and of the living.
translation_verse: Krisito wu nɩɩ o bwii kyiŋi ba nkpa tɔ, lɩɩ falɛ sʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba tɛ nkpa tɔ yɛ alewupu.

english_verse: Why do you criticize other followers of the Lord? Why do you look down on them? The day is coming when God will judge all of us.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ mɩnɛ ɩ waa nɩɩ fii bun fʋ bɩrɩsa kʋpwɛ, abɛɛ nɩɩ fɩɩ kɩɩ fʋ bɩrɩsa kɩyan? Lɩɩ fɛɛ anɛ kpini an biti an naa yɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ansi tɔ, kɛ o gyii anɛ asɩn.

english_verse: In the Scriptures God says, “I swear by my very life that everyone will kneel down and praise my name!”
translation_verse: Kpalɩ fɛɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ Isaya Asɩnkyan yɩlasa ɔwʋlɛ mʋ tɔ yɛ, “N maa dan n bʋ tɔ falɛ, ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ii biti o muŋa mɛ, kɛ nyɩmɩsa kʋmaa nɩmʋ o bugi kɔnɔ tɔwɛ yɛ mɛ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ.”

english_verse: And so, each of us must give an account to God for what we do. Don't Cause Problems for Others
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ anɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ii biti ɔ ba lɛɛ kɔnɔ lɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa mʋ sa Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: We must stop judging others. We must also make up our minds not to upset anyone's faith.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ, fan yɛgɛ kɛ a yɛgɛ abaa kʋpwɛ kubun. Amaa fan man waa atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ii biti ɩ yɛgɛ fanɛ bɩrɩsa ana ba siti abɛɛ ba waa alibi.

english_verse: The Lord Jesus has made it clear to me that God considers all foods fit to eat. But if you think some foods are unfit to eat, then for you they are not fit.
translation_verse: Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu maa lɛɛ kaapʋ mɛ, nɩɩ n kɔɔlɛ gyii fɛɛ kʋtɔ kʋ kɩ man bʋ tɔ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ kʋtɔ kisisa kɩmʋ kɩbaa sʋ. Amaa nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan kɩɩ fɛɛ kʋtɔ kʋ kɩ gyɛ ikisii bɩrɛ, kɩ gyɛ ikisii sa mʋ.

english_verse: If you are hurting others by the foods you eat, you are not guided by love. Don't let your appetite destroy someone Christ died for.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nɩɩ ɩ kan ɩ gyɛ fu agyitɔ gyisa sʋ, nɩɩ fʋ bɩrɩsa kɔkɔlɔ ki nyita mʋ mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ fʋ awaasa ɩ mɛɛ kaapʋ kebiti. Man taa fu agyitɔ gyisa nyita fʋ bɩrɩsa mʋ nɩɩ Krisito wu sa mʋ mʋ

english_verse: Don't let your right to eat bring shame to Christ.
translation_verse: Man yɛgɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ fii nyi fɛɛ kɩ gyɛ kʋtɔ danbɩrasa mʋ, ki biliŋi kʋtɔ libi asa asɛ.

english_verse: God's kingdom isn't about eating and drinking. It is about pleasing God, about living in peace, and about true happiness. All this comes from the Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kuwura‐gyii tɔ kakyɩna mʋ tɔ mʋ, ɩ man gyɛ kegyi yɛ kunuu asɩn nɩn, amaa ɩ gyɛ awaasa danbɩrasa yɛ kayɩɩ yuuli yɛ kensi‐gyii mʋ nɩɩ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ kɩɩ sa mʋ.

english_verse: If you serve Christ in this way, you will please God and be respected by people.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee sun Krisito falɛ ɔkpa sʋ mʋ, ɩɩ bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ ansi, nɩɩ asa gbaa bee wu yɛ ɩ bʋrɔn.

english_verse: We should try to live at peace and help each other have a strong faith.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan yɛgɛ a kpan anɛ n‐yɩɩ waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ bɩya kayɩɩ yuuli, kɛ a kyɛ abaa tɔ kɛ a dan anɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ.

english_verse: Don't let your appetite destroy what God has done. All foods are fit to eat, but it is wrong to cause problems for others by what you eat.
translation_verse: Fan man kpalɩ agyitɔ sʋ nyita Ɩbwaarɛ kusun. Agyitɔ kpini ɩ bʋrɔn, amaa ɩ man dɛ ɔkpa fɛɛ fu gyii agyitɔ kʋ kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ fʋ bɩrɩsa ɔ waa alibi.

english_verse: It is best not to eat meat or drink wine or do anything else that causes problems for other followers of the Lord.
translation_verse: Ɩ bʋrɔn fɛɛ fu man gyii kunun kɛ fu man nuu nta abɛɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kii biti kɩ yɛgɛ fʋ bɩrɩsa ɔ tɩyɛ.

english_verse: But if you do have doubts about what you eat, you are going against your beliefs. And you know that is wrong, because anything you do against your beliefs is sin.
translation_verse: Amaa ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ mʋ nfɛɛrɛ i du sika‐sika lɩɩ kʋtɔ kigyii sʋ yɛgɛ nɩɩ ee gyii kɩmʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ wʋla bun mu kʋpwɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ mʋ kigyii mʋ man lɩɩ mʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ. Nɩɩ awaasa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man lɩɩ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ mʋ gyɛ alibi nɩn.

english_verse: If our faith is strong, we should be patient with the Lord's followers whose faith is weak. We should try to please them instead of ourselves.
translation_verse: Anɛ mʋ nɩɩ an yɩlɛ Yesu Krisito kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ yɛ ɔlʋn mʋ, ɩ dagaa fɛɛ an maa kyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bamʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kɩ man bʋlʋn mʋ tɔ, kɛ a man taa waa anɛ nkɔlɔ biti.

english_verse: We should think of their good and try to help them by doing what pleases them.
translation_verse: Fan yɛgɛ anɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ɔ waa kɩdanbɩrasa kyɛ mʋ bɩrɩsa tɔ, kɛ ɔ nyɛ ɔlʋn yɩlɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ.

english_verse: Even Christ did not try to please himself. But as the Scriptures say, “The people who insulted you also insulted me.”
translation_verse: Kpalɩ fɛɛ Krisito gbaa man waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bɔla mʋ nkʋn ansi, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Yesu tɔwɛ lɩɩ Asɩnkya yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, “Asebi kpini mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ saalɛ fʋ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, mɛ nɩɩ bɛɛ saalɛ.”

english_verse: God is the one who makes us patient and cheerful. I pray that he will help you live at peace with each other, as you follow Christ.
translation_verse: N kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ sa asa kenyiita nɩɩ ɛɛ waa bamʋ aniya tɔ mʋ, fɛɛ fan maa buu Yesu Krisito falɛ mʋ, ɔ sa fanɛ kɔnɔ kʋlʋn.

english_verse: Then all of you together will praise God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ. The Good News Is for Jews and Gentiles
translation_verse: Saamʋ lɩɩ fanɛ kɔkɔlɔ kʋlʋn yɛ kɔnɔ kʋlʋn sʋ mʋ, fen biti fan bʋga yɩn anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito Mʋ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: Honor God by accepting each other, as Christ has accepted you.
translation_verse: Fan taa kɔkɔlɔ fuuli kɔɔlɛ abaa fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Krisito kɔɔlɛ fanɛ mʋ, kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ ɩ bɩya ayɩn‐bi sa Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: I tell you that Christ came as a servant of the Jews to show that God has kept the promises he made to their famous ancestors. Christ also came,
translation_verse: N tɔwɛ fanɛ fɛɛ Krisito ɩ ba biliŋi Gyiwu abi kɩyaafɔlɛ, kɛ ɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ gyɛ kesintin wuya, nɩɩ ɔ yɛgɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ sa adɩdaapʋ mʋ ɩ ba tɔ.

english_verse: so that the Gentiles would praise God for being kind to them. It is just as the Scriptures say, “I will tell the nations about you, and I will sing praises to your name.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩ bɩla yɛgɛ nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ, ba taa bʋnyaa sa Ɩbwaarɛ lɩɩ mʋ kʋwɛɛ kuwu sʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Ɩmʋ sʋ n biti n yɩn fʋ, bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ tɔ, n biti n bɩɩ ɩlʋn yɩn fʋ kɩtɩɩ.”

english_verse: The Scriptures also say to the Gentiles, “Come and celebrate with God's people.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩ bɩla tɔwɛ yɛ, “Fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ fanaa Ɩbwaarɛ asa ansi i gyii.”

english_verse: Again the Scriptures say, “Praise the Lord, all you Gentiles. All you nations, come and worship him.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩ bɩla tɔwɛ yɛ, “Fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan man gyii Gyiwu abi mʋ kpini fan yɩn Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ, kɛ ndɛndɛmandɛ kpini fan bɩɩ ayɩn‐bi ɩlʋn sa mʋ.”

english_verse: Isaiah says, “Someone from David's family will come to power. He will rule the nations, and they will put their hope in him.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔtɔwɛpʋ Isaya bɩla tɔwɛ yɛ, “Gyeese kanan tɔ mʋ ɔkʋ ii biti ɔ kʋsʋ be gyii kuwura bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ kpini sʋ. Mʋ tɔ nɩɩ ba sʋ tamaa.”

english_verse: I pray that God, who gives hope, will bless you with complete happiness and peace because of your faith. And may the power of the Holy Spirit fill you with hope. Paul's Work as a Missionary
translation_verse: N kʋlɛ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ sa asa tamaa mʋ, fɛɛ fan maa kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii falɛ mʋ, ɔ sa fanɛ kensi‐gyii yɛ keyuula. Kɛ mʋ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ ɔlʋn mʋ ɩ yɛgɛ fanɛ tamaa ɔ nyɛ akyɔ. Pɔɔlɩ asɩn sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi

english_verse: My friends, I am sure that you are very good and that you have all the knowledge you need to teach each other.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ n kɔɔlɛ gyii fɛɛ kɩdanbɩrasa kɩ bʋ fanɛ tɔ, nɩɩ fan sʋ kinyi gaa nɩɩ fan taalɛ kaapʋ abaa.

english_verse: But I have spoken to you plainly and have tried to remind you of some things. God treated me with undeserved grace!
translation_verse: Lɩɩ mɛ ɔwʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ n kyʋrɔɔ fanɛ falɛ sʋ mʋ, n bugi mɛ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ n nyiŋi fanɛ asɩn akʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa sa mɛ mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: He chose me to be a servant of Christ Jesus for the Gentiles and to do the work of a priest in the service of his good news. God did this so that the Holy Spirit could make the Gentiles into a holy offering, pleasing to him.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mɛ waa Yesu Krisito osunpu sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ. Nɩɩ n sun fɛɛ mu‐seepu, kɛ n tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ, kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ, nɩɩ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ lɔŋɔ bamʋ yɩla mʋ, ba ba waa fɛɛ saraga mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ ansi.

english_verse: Because of Christ Jesus, I can take pride in my service for God.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ n taalɛ kaapʋ mɛ n‐yɩɩ Yesu Krisito sʋ lɩɩ kusun mʋ nɩɩ n sun sa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ sʋ.
