english_verse: In fact, all I will talk about is how Christ let me speak and work, so that the Gentiles would obey him.
translation_verse: N waa mɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ n mɛɛ yɛ n tɔwɛ kʋtɔ kʋ, amɔɔ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Krisito bɔla mɛ atɔwɛsa yɛ mɛ awaasa sʋ bɩya bamʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ ba be buu Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: Indeed, I will tell how Christ worked miracles and wonders by the power of the Holy Spirit. I have preached the good news about him all the way from Jerusalem to Illyricum.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sa mɛ ɩ gyɛ sɩnkaala yɛ adangana lɩɩ mʋ Kayaayu mʋ ɔlʋn tɔ sʋ, kanɩn sʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ Krisito asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa lɩɩ Gyerusalem, kyaabɔɔ ndɛ‐bii sʋ naa fʋʋ Ilirikum.

english_verse: But I have always tried to preach where people have never heard about Christ. I am like a builder who doesn't build on someone else's foundation.
translation_verse: Mi kebiti ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ n tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ ntɩn mʋ nɩɩ ba man pɩɩta nu Krisito sʋ, saamʋ kɛ n man kyaga ɔkʋ kusun piilisa sʋ.

english_verse: It is just as the Scriptures say, “All who haven't been told about him will see him, and those who haven't heard about him will understand.” Paul's Plan To Visit Rome
translation_verse: Amaa fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Asa mʋ nɩɩ ba man pɩɩta tɔwɛ bamʋ mʋ asɩn mʋ, bee biti ba wu mʋ. Kɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man pɩɩta nu mʋ, bee biti ba nu kasɛ.”

english_verse: Now there is nothing left for me to do in this part of the world, and for years I have wanted to visit you.
translation_verse: Amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ opula kʋ man bɩla ɔ bʋ kɩbaafʋn kɩnɩmʋ katɩn kʋ mʋ nɩɩ n maa waa kusun, nɩɩ n bɩla n kpan mɛ n‐yɩɩ nsu damantɛ fɛɛ n ba bɔɔ fanɛ sʋ

english_verse: So I plan to stop off on my way to Spain. Then after a short, but refreshing, visit with you, I hope you will quickly send me on.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ n waa nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ n kan kpee Sipen mʋ, n biti n bɔla fanɛ asɛ. N sʋ tamaa fɛɛ n ba bɔɔ fanɛ sʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n biti n bɔla kyʋn mʋ, kɛ maa fanɛ an bʋga gyii ansi, kɛ fan kyɛ mɛ tɔ kɛ n naa fʋʋ tʋtɔ.

english_verse: I am now on my way to Jerusalem to deliver the money that the Lord's followers in Macedonia and Achaia collected for God's needy people.
translation_verse: Masedoniya yɛ Akyɩya akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu bɩrɛ ba taa kensi‐gyii waa tʋʋtʋʋ sa Krisito abuupu mʋ tɔ atiripu mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ Gyerusalem mʋ.

english_verse: This is something they really wanted to do. But sharing their money with the Jews was also like paying back a debt, because the Jews had already shared their spiritual blessings with the Gentiles.
translation_verse: Masedoniya yɛ Akyɩya akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu bamʋ ansi i gyii fɛɛ ba maa waa kanɩn sa Gyiwu abi akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ. Nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ ba maa waa kanɩn kɛ ba taa ka bamʋ kʋkɔ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ, ba nyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ Kayaayu tɔ nkyɛtɔ atɔ, ɩmʋ sʋ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ ba baraga bamʋ kakyɩna tɔ atɔ sa Gyiwu abi mʋ.

english_verse: After I have safely delivered this money, I will visit you and then go on to Spain.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n kan taa tʋʋtʋʋ nɩmʋ waa bamʋ abaa tɔ lʋwɛ mʋ, n biti n bɔla fanɛ asɛ kpee Sipen kadɛ tɔ.

english_verse: And when I do arrive in Rome, I know it will be with the full blessings of Christ.
translation_verse: N nyi fɛɛ mɛ kɩba mʋ nɩɩ n ba fanɛ asɛ mʋ, n sʋ Krisito kabwaala lala mʋ n bɩya fanɛ.

english_verse: My friends, by the power of the Lord Jesus Christ and by the love that comes from the Holy Spirit, I beg you to pray sincerely with me and for me.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, n sʋ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito yɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ kɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu tɔ fɛɛ fan kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ ɔlʋn kyɛ mɛ tɔ.

english_verse: Pray that God will protect me from the unbelievers in Judea, and that his people in Jerusalem will be pleased with what I am doing.
translation_verse: Fan kʋlɛ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ lɛɛ mɛ lɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man kɔɔlɛ gyii Gyudeya ifuli sʋ mʋ abaa tɔ. Kɛ fan bɩla kʋlɛ fɛɛ Krisito abuupu mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ Gyerusalem mʋ ba kɔɔlɛ nkyɛtɔ mʋ abaa anyɔ.

english_verse: Ask God to let me come to you and have a pleasant and refreshing visit.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ kanɩn sʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kan kyula mʋ n biti n taa kensi‐gyii lala ba fanɛ asɛ, kɛ ɩ waa maa fanɛ aniya tɔ.

english_verse: I pray that God, who gives peace, will be with all of you. Amen.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ keyuula wuya ɔ baa ɔ bʋ fanɛ kpini asɛ. Amen!

english_verse: Welcome her in a way that is proper for someone who has faith in the Lord and is one of God's own people. Help her in any way you can. After all, she has proved to be a respected leader for many others, including me.
translation_verse: N kʋlɛ fanɛ, fan kɔɔlɛ mʋ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ kɩtɩɩ tɔ sʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ Krisito abuupu ba kɩtaa abaa mʋ, kɛ fan sa mʋ nkyɛtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ i tiri mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ kyɛ asa gaalaagaa tɔ nɩɩ ngbaa mɛ n tii sʋ.

english_verse: Give my greetings to Priscilla and Aquila. They have not only served Christ Jesus together with me,
translation_verse: Fan fwaala Prisila maa Akwila, mʋ nɩɩ n maa bamʋ an waa Yesu Krisito kusun mʋ.

english_verse: but they have even risked their lives for me. I am grateful for them and so are all the Gentile churches.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba taga apʋ lɩɩ mɛ sʋ. Ɩ man gyɛ mɛ nkʋn ɩ fwaala bamʋ, amaa yɛ Krisito abi kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ kpini bɛɛ fwaala bamʋ nsa yɛ kusun.

english_verse: Greet the church that meets in their home. Greet my dear friend Epaenetus, who was the first person in Asia to have faith in Christ.
translation_verse: Fan fwaala Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ gyaŋɛ Prisila ana kɩkpaara sʋ mʋ. Fan fwaala mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ danbɩrasa Epanetu. Mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ da kɩkɔɔlɛ Yesu Krisito gyii Asiya ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ kpini.

english_verse: Greet Mary, who has worked so hard for you.
translation_verse: Fan fwaala Mɛɛrɩ mʋ nɩɩ o sun kusun gaa sa fanɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Greet my relatives Andronicus and Junia, who were in jail with me. They are highly respected by the apostles and were followers of Christ before I was.
translation_verse: Fan fwaala Androniko maa Gyuniya, mɛ kʋʋpʋ ana mʋ nɩɩ ba tii maa bamʋ obu mʋ. Nɩɩ asa gaalaagaa be nyi bamʋ yɛ ɔdan Krisito asunpu mʋ tɔ, nɩɩ ba gyankpaa mɛ kɔɔlɛ Yesu Krisito gyii.

english_verse: Greet Ampliatus, my dear friend whose faith is in the Lord.
translation_verse: Fan fwaala Ampiliyatu mʋ nɩɩ n sʋ kebiti sa mʋ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ tɔ.

english_verse: Greet Urbanus, who serves Christ along with us. Greet my dear friend Stachys.
translation_verse: Fan fwaala Ubano, anɛ bɩrɩsa kusun ɔwaapʋ Krisito tɔ, yɛ mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ danbɩrasa Sitakusi.

english_verse: Greet Herodion, who is a relative of mine. Greet Narcissus and the others in his family, who have faith in the Lord.
translation_verse: Fan fwaala mɛ kʋʋpʋ Herodiyon. Fan fwaala Nasiso kɩkpaara sʋ abi kpini mʋ nɩɩ ba gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ lɛɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Greet Tryphaena and Tryphosa, who work hard for the Lord. Greet my dear friend Persis. She also works hard for the Lord.
translation_verse: Fan fwaala akyɩɩ nɩmʋ, Trifina maa Trifosa mʋ nɩɩ ba kpan bamʋ n‐yɩɩ sun Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ kusun mʋ. Fan fwaala mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ danbɩrasa Pesi, nɩɩ ngbaa mʋ ɔ gyɛ ɔkyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kpan mʋ n‐yɩɩ waa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ kusun mʋ.

english_verse: Greet Rufus, that special servant of the Lord, and greet his mother, who has been like a mother to me.
translation_verse: Fan fwaala Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ kɩyaafɔlɛ Rufusi, yɛ mu‐nyi, mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa mɛ waa mu‐bii kʋʋgɛsa.

english_verse: Greet Asyncritus, Phlegon, Hermes, Patrobas, and Hermas, as well as our friends who are with them.
translation_verse: Fan fwaala Asinkrito, yɛ Felegon yɛ Hemesi yɛ Patrobasi yɛ Hemesi yɛ Krisito abuupu mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ bamʋ asɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Greet Philologus, Julia, Nereus and his sister, and Olympas, and all of God's people who are with them.
translation_verse: Fan fwaala Filologo yɛ Gyuliya yɛ Neresu maa mʋ pɩɩkyɩɩ yɛ Olipasi yɛ Krisito abuupu mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ bamʋ asɛ mʋ kpini.

english_verse: Be sure to give each other a warm greeting. All of Christ's churches greet you.
translation_verse: Fan taa kinyi‐bii afwaala fwaala abaa. Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ kpini bɛɛ fwaala fanɛ.

english_verse: My friends, I beg you to watch out for anyone who causes trouble and divides the church by refusing to do what all of you were taught. Stay away from them!
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, n kʋlɛ fanɛ nɩn, kɛ fan kɩɩ danbɩrasa lɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ bee biti ba bɩya nbarɩgɛ fanɛ tɔ, nɩɩ bɛɛ kpakyarɛ kɩbɩɩla mʋ nɩɩ ba kaapʋ fanɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ɩ yɛgɛ asa bee tutu bamʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ. Fan lɛɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ bamʋ tɔ.

english_verse: They want to serve themselves and not Christ the Lord. Their flattery and fancy talk fool people who don't know any better.
translation_verse: Kpalɩ fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa kanɩn mʋ, be mee sun anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito, amaa bamʋ kɩpɩrɛ lɛɛ nɩɩ bee biti. Lɩɩ bamʋ ntɔwɛ danbɩrasa yɛ kɩgyaa‐bi sʋ mʋ, ba sʋ bɛɛ pɩna akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ nɩɩ ba man pɩɩ dan kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ.

english_verse: I am glad that everyone knows how well you obey the Lord. But still, I want you to understand what is good and not have anything to do with evil.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ nu kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan taa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ sa Krisito mʋ. Kanɩn sʋ mi ansi i gyii fanɛ sʋ gaa. Amaa n biti fɛɛ fan baa fan gyɛ anyaasɩnpʋ lɩɩ kɩdanbɩrasa kɩwaa sʋ, kɛ fan lɛɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ alibi kɩwaa tɔ.

english_verse: Then God, who gives peace, will soon crush Satan under your feet. I pray that our Lord Jesus will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Ɩ mɛɛ yɛ ɩ kyɛɛrɛɛ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ keyuula wuya mʋ, ii biti ɔ yɛgɛ kɛ fan gyii Sɩtaanɛ sʋ. Anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu kabwaala mʋ kɩ baa kɩ bʋ fanɛ sʋ.

english_verse: Timothy, who works with me, sends his greetings, and so do my relatives, Lucius, Jason, and Sosipater.
translation_verse: Mɛ bɩrɩsa osunsunpu Timoti ɩ fwaala fanɛ. Kanɩn maa nɩɩ mɛ kʋʋpʋ ana Lukiyo yɛ Gyason yɛ Sosipata gbaa bɛɛ fwaala fanɛ.

english_verse: I, Tertius, also send my greetings. I am a follower of the Lord, and I wrote this letter.
translation_verse: Mɛ Tetiyo mʋ nɩɩ n kyʋrɔɔ Pɔɔlɩ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ, n fwaala fanɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ kɩtɩɩ tɔ sʋ.

english_verse: Praise God! He can make you strong by means of my good news, which is the message about Jesus Christ. For ages and ages this message was kept secret,
translation_verse: Fan yɛgɛ a taa bʋnyaa sa Ɩbwaarɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ mʋ ɩ taalɛ yɛgɛ fan nyɛ ɔlʋn yɩlɛ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ Asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ lɩɩ Yesu Krisito sʋ mʋ. Kanɩn asɩn mʋ ɩ gyɛ kesintin asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ baala lɩɩ koo dɩdaa mʋ.

english_verse: but now at last it has been told. The eternal God commanded his prophets to write about the good news, so that all nations would obey and have faith.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ ɩ bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ atɔwɛpʋ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ sʋ lɛɛ kaapʋ. Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɛ kakpaa mʋ sa kɔnɔ, yɛ ba tɔwɛ kanɩn kesintin asɩn baalasa sa ndɛndɛmandɛ kpini, kɛ ba kɔɔlɛ Yesu Krisito gyii kɛ ba nu mʋ asɛ.

english_verse: And now, because of Jesus Christ, we can praise the only wise God forever! Amen.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ Yesu Krisito sʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ kanyaasɩn wuya mʋ nkʋn nɩɩ bʋnyaa gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ kakpaa. Amen!

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, and from Sosthenes, who is also a follower.
translation_verse: Ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ lɩɩ mɛ, Pɔɔlɩ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla mu kebiti sʋ tɩɩ mɛ, fɛɛ n ba waa Yesu Krisito osunpu, yɛ anɛ bɩrɩsa Sositini asɛ.

english_verse: To God's church in Corinth. Christ Jesus chose you to be his very own people, and you worship in his name, as we and all others do who call him Lord.
translation_verse: An kyʋrɔɔ kɩmʋ an sa fanɛ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ fan bʋ Korinto kadɛ tɔ, fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ Yesu tɩɩ ba waa mʋ lɛɛ, nɩɩ fan ba biliŋi Ɩbwaarɛ asa, taa bʋga yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ katɩn kʋmaa nɩmʋ bee sun anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito, mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ anaa bamʋ kpini Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ.

english_verse: My prayer is that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace!
translation_verse: Anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito ba bwaala fanɛ kɛ ba sa fanɛ kayɩɩ yuuli. Pɔɔlɩ ɩ fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ

english_verse: I never stop thanking my God for treating you with undeserved grace by giving you Christ Jesus,
translation_verse: Saŋa kʋmaa nɩmʋ n fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ n sa fanɛ lɩɩ kabwaala mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bɔla Yesu Krisito sʋ taa sa fanɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Now you are certain that everything we told you about our Lord Christ Jesus is true.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Yesu Krisito asɩn mʋ nɩɩ an lɛɛ tɔwɛ fanɛ mʋ ɩ kyɩna fanɛ tɔ danbɩrasa.

english_verse: You are not missing out on any blessings, as you wait for him to return.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan man pan Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu kakɛɛ mʋ kʋkʋ, fɛɛ fan maa tɛ fan gyoo saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ ba lɛɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kaapʋ mʋ.

english_verse: God can be trusted, and he chose you to be partners with his Son, our Lord Jesus Christ. Taking Sides
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ fanɛ yɛ fan naa mu‐bii Yesu Krisito mʋ fan ba waa kɩkyɛmɩnɛ ɔkɔn mʋ, mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ tɔwɛ nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ lɩɩ ɩmʋ kamaa. Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ tɔ nbarɩgɛ tɔ asɩn

english_verse: My dear friends, as a follower of our Lord Jesus Christ, I beg you to get along with each other. Don't take sides. Always try to agree in what you think.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, n sʋ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kɩtɩɩ, n kʋlɛ fanɛ fɛɛ, fanɛ kpini fan tɔwɛ kyula abaa, kɛ nbarɩgɛ tɔ kʋ ɩ man ba fanɛ tɔ. Kɛ fan waa kɔnɔ kʋlʋn fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ yɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Several people from Chloe's family have already reported to me that you keep arguing with each other.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, Kilowe kɩkpaara sʋ abi akʋ ba ba tɔwɛ mɛ yɛ, nluu ɩ bʋ fanɛ nsana.

english_verse: Has Christ been divided up? Was I nailed to a cross for you? Were you baptized in my name?
translation_verse: Ba barɩgɛ Krisito tɔ waa kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ nɩn abɛɛ? Pɔɔlɩ nɩɩ ba da oyu laasa sʋ sa fanɛ abɛɛ? Abɛɛ Pɔɔlɩ kɩtɩɩ tɔ nɩɩ ba gyee fanɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee?

english_verse: I thank God that I didn't baptize any of you except Crispus and Gaius.
translation_verse: N sʋ afwaala n sa Ɩbwaarɛ fɛɛ n maa man gyee fanɛ ɔkʋ Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee, amɔɔ Krisipu maa Gayusi nkʋn nɩɩ n gyee.

english_verse: Not one of you can say that you were baptized in my name.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ tɔwɛ yɛ mɛ kɩtɩɩ tɔ nɩɩ ba gyee mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee.

english_verse: I did baptize the family of Stephanas, but I don't remember if I baptized anyone else.
translation_verse: N bɩla n nyiŋi fɛɛ n maa gyee Sitefen maa mʋ kɩkpaara sʋ abi Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee. Ɩnɩmʋ kamaa mʋ, n mɛɛ bɩla nyiŋi fɛɛ n gyee ɔkʋ.

english_verse: Christ did not send me to baptize. He sent me to tell the good news without using words that sound wise and would make the cross of Christ lose its power. Christ Is God's Power and Wisdom
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Krisito man sun mɛ yɛ n ba gyee asa Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee. Amaa o sun mɛ nɩn yɛ n ba tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ sa asa, nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ nyɩmɩsa kanyaasɩn nɩɩ n sʋ n tɔwɛ, kɛ ɩ naa ba fɛɛ Krisito kelewu mʋ nɩɩ o wu oyu laasa sʋ asɩn mʋ ɩ pan ɩmʋ ɔlʋn. Krisito ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔlʋn yɛ kanyaasɩn

english_verse: The message about the cross doesn't make any sense to lost people. But for those of us who are being saved, it is God's power at work.
translation_verse: Krisito oyu laasa mʋ sʋ kelewu asɩn mʋ, ɩ gyɛ amelensi‐sɩn sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ kemuuri ɔkpa sʋ mʋ. Amaa anɛ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩɩ mɔlɩgɛ mʋ, asɩn maŋa ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔlʋn mʋ.

english_verse: As God says in the Scriptures, “I will destroy the wisdom of all who claim to be wise. I will confuse those who think they know so much.”
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, “N biti n nyita anyaasɩnpʋ kanyaasɩn, kɛ n yɛgɛ anyipu kinyi ɩ waa kɩyan.”

english_verse: What happened to those wise people? What happened to those experts in the Scriptures? What happened to the ones who think they have all the answers? Didn't God show that the wisdom of this world is foolish?
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ kanan bɩrɛ mʋ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ ɔnyaasɩnpʋ bʋ fɩnɛ? Nɩɩ ɔwʋlɛ‐nyipu bʋ fɩnɛ? Abɛɛ ɔkaapʋpʋ bɩlɩsa asɛ mʋ bʋ fɩnɛ? Ɩbwaarɛ man kaapʋ fɛɛ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ kanyaasɩn gyɛ amelensi‐sɩn mʋ asɛ nɩn abɛɛ?

english_verse: God was wise and decided not to let the people of this world use their wisdom to learn about him. Instead, God chose to save only those who believe the foolish message we preach.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ kanyaasɩn mʋ tɔ mʋ, o ŋmina yɩla fɛɛ, dulinyaa asa ba mɛɛ taalɛ bɔla bamʋ kanyaasɩn sʋ bɩɩ mʋ. Amaa ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩpɩrɛ sʋ fɛɛ, ɔ bɔla asɩn mʋ nɩɩ asa bɛɛ kɩɩ fɛɛ ɩ gyɛ amelensi‐sɩn mʋ nɩɩ an tɔwɛ falɛ mʋ sʋ mɔlɩgɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kɔɔlɛ bee gyii mʋ.

english_verse: But we preach that Christ was nailed to a cross. Most Jews have problems with this, and most Gentiles think it is foolish.
translation_verse: Amaa anɛɛnɛ bɩrɛ an tɔwɛ Yesu Krisito kelewu oyu laasa mʋ sʋ asɩn, nɩɩ ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ii tii Gyiwu abi ɔkpa, nɩɩ ba mɛɛ kɔɔlɛ bee gyii, nɩɩ ɩ bɩla ɩ gyɛ amelensi‐sɩn sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ.

english_verse: Even when God is foolish, he is wiser than everyone else, and even when God is weak, he is stronger than everyone else.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ amelensi‐sɩn mʋ ɩ kyɔ nyɩmɩsa kanyaasɩn, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kapɔɔsɛ ɩ sʋ ɔlʋn ɩ kyɔ nyɩmɩsa ɔlʋn.

english_verse: My dear friends, remember what you were when God chose you. The people of this world didn't think that many of you were wise. Only a few of you were in places of power, and not many of you came from important families.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, fan nyiŋi kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan daa fan du pɔyɩ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɩɩ fanɛ ba kamɔlɩgɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ. Kanan saŋa maŋa nyɩmɩsa ansi sʋ mʋ, fanɛ tɔ gbɛrɛɛ kʋ ɩ gyɛ anyaasɩnpʋ, nɩɩ gbɛrɛɛ kʋ ɩ gyɛ alʋnpʋ, nɩɩ gbɛrɛɛ kʋ ɩ lɩɩ kuwura‐gyii kebunɔ.

english_verse: But God chose the foolish things of this world to put the wise to shame. He chose the weak things of this world to put the powerful to shame.
translation_verse: Amaa atɔ mʋ nɩɩ dulinyaa asa bɛɛ kɩɩ yɛ ɩ gyɛ amelensi‐sɩn mʋ, ɩmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ taa gyila dulinyaa tɔ anyaasɩnpʋ ipeeli. Nɩɩ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man bʋlʋn dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ mʋ, ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɔ bɩla taa gyila ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋlʋn mʋ ipeeli.

english_verse: What the world thinks is worthless, useless, and nothing at all is what God has used to destroy what the world considers important.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ dulinyaa asa bɛɛ kɩɩ kɩyan, nɩɩ ba man taa tɩɩ sɛhn, nɩɩ bɛɛ kɩɩ yɛ ɩ man sʋ tɔnɔ mʋ, ɩmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa ŋaabaa atɔ mʋ nɩɩ dulinyaa asa bɛɛ kɩɩ fɛɛ ɩ gyɛ atɔ kparɛ mʋ,

english_verse: God did all this to keep anyone from bragging to him.
translation_verse: kɛ nyɩmɩsa kʋ ɔ man nyɛ kaapʋ mʋ n‐yɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ.

english_verse: Friends, when I came and told you the mystery that God had shared with us, I didn't use big words or try to sound wise.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, n maa ba fanɛ asɛ ba lɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kesintin asɩn mʋ tɔwɛ fanɛ mʋ, n man taa kɔnɔ tɔ ɔkɔn abɛɛ kanyaasɩn kɩbansa nɩn ba tɔwɛ fanɛ.

english_verse: In fact, while I was with you, I made up my mind to speak only about Jesus Christ, who had been nailed to a cross.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ n waa mɛ nfɛɛrɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n bʋ fanɛ asɛ mʋ fɛɛ, n mee biti n bɩla bɩɩ asɩn akʋ tɔwɛ tii Yesu Krisito, yɛ mʋ kelewu mʋ nɩɩ o wu oyu laasa sʋ mʋ nkʋn.

english_verse: At first, I was weak and trembling with fear.
translation_verse: N maa ba fanɛ asɛ mʋ, n taa kɩpɔɔsɛ yɛ kufuu yɛ kɩkyɩkya gaa nɩn ba.

english_verse: When I talked with you or preached, I didn't try to prove anything by sounding wise. I simply let God's Spirit show his power.
translation_verse: Mɛ asɩn tɔwɛsa yɛ mɛ abwaarɛsɩn kɩtɔwɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ, n man taa nyɩmɩsa kanyaasɩn pʋpɔlɛ fanɛ, amaa Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ ɩ lɛɛ mʋ ɔlʋn mʋ kaapʋ fanɛ.

english_verse: That way you would have faith because of God's power and not because of human wisdom.
translation_verse: Saamʋ, fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kɩ mɛɛ yɛ kɩ baa kɩ gyan nyɩmɩsa kanyaasɩn sʋ, amaa kɩ baa kɩ gyan Ɩbwaarɛ ɔlʋn sʋ. Ɩbwaarɛ kanyaasɩn

english_verse: We do use wisdom when speaking to people who are mature in their faith. But it isn't the wisdom of this world or of its rulers, who will soon disappear.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ kpini gbaa mʋ, an tɔwɛ kanyaasɩn asɩn an sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba tɛɛ dan kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ mʋ, man gyɛ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ kanyaasɩn, abɛɛ kɩmʋ alʋnpʋ kanyaasɩn mʋ nɩɩ bamʋ ɔlʋn mʋ ii biti ɩ ba fʋʋ ɔkaa mʋ.

english_verse: We speak of God's hidden and mysterious wisdom that God decided to use for our glory long before the world began.
translation_verse: Amaa kanyaasɩn asɩn mʋ nɩɩ an tɔwɛ fanɛ falɛ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kanyaasɩn baalasa, mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wʋla ŋmina yɩla yɛ ee biti ɔ taa kanyaasɩn maŋa bʋnyaa anɛ, pɔyɩ nɩɩ o piili dulinyaa mʋ.

english_verse: The rulers of this world didn't know anything about this wisdom. If they had known about it, they would not have nailed the glorious Lord to a cross.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ alʋnpʋ mʋ tɔ ɔkʋ man taalɛ bɩɩ kanɩn kanyaasɩn maŋa, nɩɩ ba daa bɩɩ nɩn, naafɔɔ ba man dɩn da Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ bʋnyaa wuya mʋ oyu laasa sʋ.

english_verse: But it is just as the Scriptures say, “What God has planned for people who love him is more than eyes have seen or ears have heard. It has never even entered our minds!”
translation_verse: Amaa i du nɩn fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ mʋ yɛ, “Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɔkʋ ansi ɩ man pɩɩ wu, nɩɩ asʋ ɩ man pɩɩ nu, nɩɩ ɔkʋ man pɩɩ fɛ ɩmʋ nfɛɛrɛ mʋ, ɩ gyɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɔŋɔ yɩla sa bamʋ nɩɩ bee biti mʋ mʋ.”

english_verse: God's Spirit has shown you everything. His Spirit finds out everything, even what is deep in the mind of God.
translation_verse: Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla mʋ Kayaayu sʋ lɛɛ mʋ kanyaasɩn baalasa mʋ kaapʋ anɛ. Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ ɩɩ mɛɛgɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ ɛɛ kɩɩ, halɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ mʋ ɔtɔ tɔ asɩn nɩɩ ɩ baala mʋ gbaa.

english_verse: You are the only one who knows what is in your own mind, and God's Spirit is the only one who knows what is in God's mind.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ bɩɩ nfɛɛrɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔkʋ ɩɩ fɛ, amɔɔ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ. Kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ bɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ nfɛɛrɛ, amɔɔ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ Kayaayu mʋ nkʋn.

english_verse: But God has given us his Spirit. This is why we don't think the same way that the people of this world think. This is also why we can recognize the blessings God has given us.
translation_verse: Man gyɛ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ kayaayu nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa sa anɛ, amaa Kayaayu mʋ nɩɩ kɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ mʋ, nɩɩ an nyɛ, kɛ a taalɛ nu atɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa kɛɛ anɛ mʋ kasɛ.

english_verse: Every word we speak was taught to us by God's Spirit, not by human wisdom. And this same Spirit helps us teach spiritual things to spiritual people.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ man gyɛ nyɩmɩsa kanyaasɩn asɩn kaapʋsa nɩɩ an sʋ an tɔwɛ fanɛ. Amaa ɩ gyɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Kayaayu mʋ kaapʋ anɛ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an lɛɛ Kayaayu tɔ asɩn mʋ kasɛ an kaapʋ bamʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ Kayaayu mʋ.

english_verse: People who are guided by the Spirit can make all kinds of judgments, but they cannot be judged by others.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ bɩrɛ, ɛɛ taalɛ mɛɛgɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa tɔ wu ɩmʋ tɔ, amaa mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ lɛɛ bɩrɛ, ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ mɛɛgɛ ɩmʋ tɔ wu sɛhn.

english_verse: The Scriptures ask, “Has anyone ever known the thoughts of the Lord or given him advice?” But we understand what Christ is thinking.
translation_verse: I du nɩn fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ mʋ yɛ, “Anɩmʋ ɩ taalɛ bɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nfɛɛrɛ? Nɩɩ anɩmʋ ɩ taalɛ tɔwɛ waa mʋ?” Amaa anɛɛnɛ bɩrɛ an fɛ nfɛɛrɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Krisito ɩɩ fɛ mʋ.

english_verse: My friends, you are acting like the people of this world. That's why I could not speak to you as spiritual people. You are like babies as far as your faith in Christ is concerned.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, n man taalɛ tɔwɛ fanɛ asɛ fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ. Amaa n tɔwɛ fanɛ fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ gyan dulinyaa atɔ sʋ, abɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man pɩɩta dan Krisito kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: because you are not yet spiritual. You are jealous and argue with each other. This proves you are not spiritual and you are acting like the people of this world.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ san ɩ gyan dulinyaa atɔ sʋ. Kayɩɩ‐basa kɩ maa bʋ fanɛ tɔ, nɩɩ fɛn kɔ yɛ abaa mʋ, ɩɩ mɛɛ kaapʋ nɩn fɛɛ fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ san ɩ gyan dulinyaa atɔ sʋ abɛɛ? Ɩnɩmʋ ɩɩ kaapʋ nɩn fɛɛ fɛn san fɛn waa fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ dulinyaa asa bɛɛ waa mʋ.

english_verse: Some of you say you follow me, and others claim to follow Apollos. Isn't this how ordinary people behave?
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ ɩɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, “N buu Pɔɔlɩ.” Nɩɩ ɔkʋ mɔɔ ɩɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, “N buu Apolosi nɩn.” Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ mɛɛ kaapʋ nɩn fɛɛ fɛn san fen du fɛɛ dulinyaa asa nɩn abɛɛ?

english_verse: I planted the seeds, Apollos watered them, but God made them sprout and grow.
translation_verse: Mɛ i duu, nɩɩ Apolosi mɔɔ ɩ wʋrɩgɛ sʋ nkyu, amaa Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ kɩ kɔyɩ dan.

english_verse: The one who plants is just as important as the one who waters. And each one will be paid for what they do.
translation_verse: Ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ee duu yɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ wʋrɩgɛ sʋ nkyu mʋ kpini bɛɛ waa kusun kʋlʋn nɩn. Nɩɩ bamʋ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ii biti ɔ nyɛ mʋ kʋkɔka, lɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa mu kusun mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: Apollos and I work together for God, and you are God's garden and God's building. Only One Foundation
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ anɛ kpini an bʋga nɩn an waa Ɩbwaarɛ kusun. Nɩɩ fen du nɩn fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kʋdɔɔ, nɩɩ fɛn bɩla fen du fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ obu.

english_verse: God treated me with undeserved grace and let me become an expert builder. I laid a foundation on which others have built. But we must each be careful how we build,
translation_verse: Lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa bwaala mɛ sʋ mʋ, n du nɩn fɛɛ ɔpɔyɩpʋ onyipu mʋ nɩɩ o yii obu kasɛ, nɩɩ ɔkʋ ɩɩ pɔyɩ ɛɛ gyaga kɩmʋ sʋ. Amaa ɔkʋmaa ɔ baa ɔ da sʋ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ pɔyɩ ɛɛ gyaga sʋ.

english_verse: Whatever we build on this foundation will be tested by fire on the day of judgment. Then everyone will find out if we have used gold, silver, and precious stones, or wood, hay, and straw.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ kusun mʋ nɩɩ o sun sa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, ii biti ɩ lɩɩ ifuli. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Krisito kakɛ lala mʋ nɩɩ ee biti o bwii ba mʋ, ii biti ɩ lɛɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ kusun kudubi kaapʋ. Fʋlɔn ii biti ɔ ba lɛɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ kusun kaapʋ, kɛ ɩ kaala kusun mʋ nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ waa sa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, ɔ dan kɩɩ.

english_verse: But if it is destroyed by the fire, we will lose everything. Yet we ourselves will be saved, like someone escaping from flames.
translation_verse: Amaa ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ fʋlɔn mʋ dɛɛ mu kusun mʋ bɩrɛ, o sun fɔyɩ nɩmʋ. Nɩɩ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ bɩrɛ ee biti ɔ nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ, amaa ii biti ɩ baa i du nɩn fɛɛ maa sɩlɛ lɩɩ fʋlɔn tɔ.

english_verse: All of you surely know you are God's temple and his Spirit lives in you.
translation_verse: Abɛɛ fan man nyi yɛ fanɛ gbaa‐gbaa fanɛ ɩ gyɛ Kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ mʋ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ tɛ fanɛ tɔ abɛɛ?

english_verse: Don't fool yourselves! If any of you think you are wise in the things of this world, you will have to become foolish before you can be truly wise.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔkʋ ɔ man pɩna mʋ n‐yɩɩ. Nɩɩ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ kan ɛɛ fɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ ɔ gyɛ ɔnyaasɩnpʋ dulinyaa asa ansi sʋ mʋ, ɩ dagaa maa waa mʋ n‐yɩɩ fɛɛ omelensipu, kɛ ɔ nyɛ biliŋi ɔnyaasɩnpʋ gbaa‐gbaa.

english_verse: This is because God considers the wisdom of this world to be foolish. It is just as the Scriptures say, “God catches the wise when they try to outsmart him.”
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ kanyaasɩn gyɛ amelensi‐sɩn Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ. I du nɩn fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, “Anyaasɩnpʋ mʋ, bamʋ kanyaasɩn awaasa mʋ tɔ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sʋ ɛɛ kɩtaa bamʋ.”

english_verse: The Scriptures also say, “The Lord knows that the plans made by wise people are useless.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba bɩla kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ ntɩn kʋ yɛ, “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ nyi fɛɛ anyaasɩnpʋ mʋ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ maa gyɛ kɩyan.”

english_verse: So stop bragging about what anyone has done. Paul and Apollos and Peter all belong to you. In fact, everything is yours, including the world, life, death, the present, and the future. Everything belongs to you,
translation_verse: Nɩɩ mɛ Pɔɔlɩ nɩn‐oo, abɛɛ Apolosi nɩn‐oo, abɛɛ Pita nɩn‐oo, abɛɛ dulinyaa nɩmʋ nɩn‐oo, abɛɛ nkpa nɩn‐oo, abɛɛ lewu nɩn‐oo, abɛɛ nbɩɩnbɩɩ nɩn‐oo, abɛɛ ɔkɛ asɩn nɩn‐oo, ɩmʋ kpini ɩ gyɛ fanɛ lɛɛ nɩn

english_verse: and you belong to Christ, and Christ belongs to God.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fan gyɛ Krisito lɛɛ nɩn, nɩɩ Krisito mɔɔ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ.

english_verse: Think of us as servants of Christ who have been given the work of explaining God's mysterious ways.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ ɩ dagaa fan maa kɩɩ anɛ fɛɛ an gyɛ Krisito ayaafɔlɛ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa mʋ kesintin asɩn baalasa mʋ waa anɛ abaa tɔ yɛ a lɛɛ ɩmʋ kaapʋ.

english_verse: And since our first duty is to be faithful to the one we work for,
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ dagaa sa ɔmʋ nɩɩ ba taa asɩn waa mʋ abaa mʋ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ, o buu mʋ‐nyɩrɩpɛ mʋ asɩn mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: it doesn't matter to me if I am judged by you or even by a court of law. In fact, I don't judge myself.
translation_verse: Amaa mɛɛmɛ asɛ bɩrɛ, nɩɩ fanɛ abɛɛ asɩn ogyipu kʋ gyii mɛ asɩn mʋ, ɩ man tiri mɛ, mɛ gbaa‐gbaa n mee gyii mɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ asɩn.

english_verse: I don't know of anything against me, but this doesn't prove I am right. The Lord is my judge.
translation_verse: Mɛ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ mʋ, n man wu asɩn pwɩɩsa kʋ mɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ, amaa ɩ mɛɛ kaapʋ fɛɛ n gyii asʋ. Amɔɔ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ nkʋn ɩ gyɛ mɛ asɩn ogyipu.

english_verse: So don't judge anyone until the Lord returns. He will show what is hidden in the dark and what is in everyone's heart. Then God will be the one who praises each of us.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan man kan gyii ɔkʋ asɩn, bun mʋ kʋpwɛ, pɔyɩ kɛ kakɛ mʋ ɔ fʋʋ. Fan gyoo Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ ɔ ba pɔyɩ. Ee biti ɔ ba lɛɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ baala kitentenbiri tɔ mʋ ba fɩtɩla tɔ, kɛ ɔ lɛɛ asa nkɔlɔ tɔ asɩn baalasa ifuli. Kanɩn saŋa maŋa nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa ii biti ɔ nyɛ kɩyɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa mʋ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ.

english_verse: Friends, I have used Apollos and myself as examples to teach you the meaning of the saying, “Follow the rules.” I want you to stop saying one of us is better than the other.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, lɩɩ fanɛ sʋ nɩɩ n taa n maa Apolosi waa sɩnkaala sa fanɛ, kɛ fan bɩɩla asɩn tɔwɛsa mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Fan man waa asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ yɩla mʋ kyʋn sʋ.” Ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, fan man kaapʋ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ naa yɩlɛ ɔkʋ kamaa kɛ fan kina ɔkʋ.

english_verse: What is so special about you? What do you have that you were not given? And if it was given to you, how can you brag?
translation_verse: Mɩnɛ nɩɩ fan sʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ fan kyɔ asansa? Mɩnɛ nɩɩ fan sʋ nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ sa fanɛ? Nɩɩ ɩ kan ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ sa fanɛ ɩmʋ mʋ, mɩnɛ ɩ waa sʋ nɩɩ fɛn kaapʋ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ, fɛɛ man gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ sa fanɛ?

english_verse: Are you already satisfied? Are you now rich? Have you become kings while we are still nobodies? I wish you were kings. Then we could have a share in your kingdom.
translation_verse: Fan tɛɛ nyɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ fen biti nɩn abɛɛ? Fan tɛɛ ba waa afulee wuya ana nɩn abɛɛ? Fan tɛɛ ba biliŋi awura yɛgɛ a man gyɛ nɩn abɛɛ? Nɩɩ fan daa fan gyɛ awura kesintin tɔ mʋ, naafɔɔ ɩ bʋrɔn gaa kɛ anaa fanɛ a ba bʋga gyii kuwura.

english_verse: It seems to me that God has put us apostles in the worst possible place. We are like prisoners on their way to death. Angels and the people of this world just laugh at us.
translation_verse: Mɛ asɛ mʋ, i du nɩn fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ maa taa anɛ mʋ nɩɩ an gyɛ Yesu asunpu mʋ, waa asii‐amaapʋ fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba bun bamʋ kʋpwɛ, nɩɩ bee biti ba naa mɔɔ bamʋ asa nsana mʋ. Nɩɩ i du fɛɛ an biliŋi sɩnkɩɩ sa kasɛ sʋ asa yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ yɛ dulinyaa kpini.

english_verse: Because of Christ we are thought of as fools, but Christ has made you wise. We are weak and hated, but you are powerful and respected.
translation_verse: Krisito sʋ an gyɛ amelensipu, amaa fanɛɛ fanɛ fan gyɛ anyaasɩnpʋ lɩɩ Krisito sʋ. Anɛɛnɛ bɩrɛ a man bʋlʋn, amaa fanɛɛ fanɛ bɩrɛ fan bʋlʋn. Asa bɛɛ sa fanɛ bɛɛrɛɛ, nɩɩ anɛɛnɛ bɩrɛ ba man taa anɛ tɩɩ sɛhn.

english_verse: Even today we go hungry and thirsty and don't have anything to wear except rags. We are mistreated and don't have a place to live.
translation_verse: Taa ba fʋʋ ndaga mʋ, an naa akʋn yɛ bʋlɩfɔ, nɩɩ an bun akyiibi, nɩɩ an nyɛ kɩdayɛ libi‐libi, nɩɩ an man sʋ anɛ gbaa‐gbaa kewu‐kyɩnasa.

english_verse: We work hard with our own hands, and when people abuse us, we wish them well. When we suffer, we are patient.
translation_verse: Anɛ gbaa‐gbaa anɛ abaa nɩɩ an sʋ an sun kusun. Nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan tɔwɛ anɛ nnɔ mʋ, an waa mʋ kusee. Nɩɩ ba kan nyanla anɛ mʋ, an nyɛ kenyiita an yɩlɛ tɔ.

english_verse: When someone curses us, we answer with kind words. Until now we are thought of as nothing more than the trash and garbage of this world.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba maa saalɛ anɛ mʋ, an nyɛ kenyiita an lɛɛ bamʋ kɔnɔ danbɩrasa. An biliŋi dulinyaa kpini akpaa nɩɩ asa bɛɛ kɩɩ anɛ fɛɛ kɩgyaakpa ba lɩɩ ndaga.

english_verse: I am not writing to embarrass you. I want to help you, just as parents help their own dear children.
translation_verse: N man kyʋrɔɔ ɩnɩmʋ n sa fanɛ n gyila fanɛ ipeeli. Amaa fan maa gyɛ mɛ nbii bitisa sʋ mʋ, nɩɩ n da fanɛ amu tɔ.

english_verse: Ten thousand people may teach you about Christ, but I am your only father. You became my children when I told you about Christ Jesus,
translation_verse: Halɩɩ nɩɩ fan kan fan sʋ asa fɛɛ ngbɩn kudu nɩɩ bɛɛ kaapʋ fanɛ Krisito asɩn mʋ gbaa mʋ, fanɛ‐sɛ ana ba man gyɛ adamantɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ, lɩɩ Yesu Krisito sʋ mʋ n ba biliŋi fanɛ‐sɛ, lɩɩ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ sa fanɛ mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: and I want you to be like me.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ n kʋlɛ fanɛ nɩn yɛ fan kasɛ mɛ tɔ.

english_verse: This is why I sent Timothy to you. I love him like a son, and he is a faithful servant of the Lord. Timothy will tell you what I do to follow Christ and how it agrees with what I always teach about Christ in every church.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ falɛ sʋ nɩɩ n sun Timoti fanɛ asɛ. Nɩɩ mʋ ɩ gyɛ mi‐bii mʋ nɩɩ n biti mʋ asɩn gaa, nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ kesintin ogyipu Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ tɔ. Nɩɩ mʋ ii biti o be nyiŋi fanɛ mɛ ɩkpa mʋ nɩɩ n taa n buu Krisito Yesu, nɩɩ ɩmaa ɩmʋ nɩɩ n kaapʋ Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ katɩn kʋmaa nɩmʋ mʋ, ɩ waa kʋkʋlʋn.

english_verse: Some of you think I am not coming for a visit, and so you are bragging.
translation_verse: Fanɛ akʋ fɛn kʋsaa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ fɛn fɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ, akʋtɔ n mɛɛ bɩla yɛ n ba bɔɔ fanɛ sʋ.

english_verse: But if the Lord lets me come, I will soon be there. Then I will find out if the ones who are doing all this bragging really have any power.
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ kan kyula bɩrɛ, ɩ mɛɛ yɛ ɩ kyɛɛrɛɛ n biti n ba fanɛ asɛ kɛ mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ n ba wu ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kaapʋ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ mʋ ba sʋ, man gyɛ bamʋ ntɔwɛ nkʋn.

english_verse: God's kingdom isn't just a lot of words. It is power.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kuwura‐gyii mʋ man gyɛ asɩn kɩtɔwɛ, amaa kɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔlʋn mʋ tɔ atɔ waasa nɩn.

english_verse: What do you want me to do when I arrive? Do you want me to be hard on you or to be kind and gentle?
translation_verse: Kɩmɔmɔ nɩɩ fen biti n taa ba fanɛ asɛ? Fen biti fɛɛ n taa kʋkyʋkyʋʋ nɩn n ba, abɛɛ n taa kebiti yɛ keyuula ba fanɛ asɛ?

english_verse: I have heard terrible things about some of you. In fact, you are behaving worse than Gentiles. A man is even sleeping with his own stepmother.
translation_verse: Kesintin tɔ, n nu asɩn lɩɩ fanɛ sʋ fɛɛ, kakyɩɩ abɛɛ kanyɩn biti agyaga‐sɩn kɩbansa ɩ maa bʋ fanɛ tɔ. Nɩɩ halɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ be mee sun Ɩbwaarɛ gbaa, ba mɛɛ waa kanɩn agyaga‐sɩn maŋa. Ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ ɩɩ dɛ yɛ mʋ‐sɛ mʋ‐ka.

english_verse: You are proud, when you ought to feel bad enough to chase away anyone who acts like this.
translation_verse: Mɩnɛ sʋ nɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ ɩ bʋ fanɛ tɔ, nɩɩ fɛn kʋsaa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ? Ɩ dagaa fan maa bɔɔta tɔ, kɛ fan lɛɛ ɔnyɩn mʋ nɩɩ o sun falɛ kusun mʋ lɩɩ fanɛ kʋbʋ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: I am with you only in my thoughts. But in the name of our Lord Jesus I have already judged this man, as though I were with you in person. So when you meet together and the power of the Lord Jesus is with you, I will be there too.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fan kan gyaŋɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kɩtɩɩ tɔ, nɩɩ n bʋ fanɛ asɛ kayaayu tɔ, nɩɩ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito ɔlʋn mʋ bʋ fanɛ asɛ mʋ,

english_verse: You must then hand that man over to Satan. His body will be destroyed, but his spirit will be saved when the Lord Jesus returns.
translation_verse: fan lɛɛ falɛ ɔnyɩn nɩmʋ lɩɩ fanɛ asɛ sa Sɩtaanɛ, o nyita mu alibi kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ, kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ mɔlɩgɛ mʋ kala kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu ii biti ɔ ba mʋ.

english_verse: Stop being proud! Don't you know how a little yeast can spread through the whole batch of dough?
translation_verse: Fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kɩkaapʋ kɩ man bʋrɔn. Fan man nyi fɛɛ kɩfɛ tinsa pii ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ bodobodo ii tin?

english_verse: Get rid of the old yeast! Then you will be like fresh bread made without yeast, and this is what you are. Our Passover lamb is Christ, who has already been sacrificed.
translation_verse: Fan lɛɛ kɩfɛ tinsa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ alibi mʋ lɩɩ fanɛ tɔ, yɛgɛ fan man sʋ ineesi ɩkʋ. Kɛ fan baa fan du fɛɛ bodobodo pʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ man sʋ kɩfɛ tinsa, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n nyi fan maa du mʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Yesu Krisito mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Kanyaŋɛ nbunɔ kabʋlʋpʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ tɛɛ taa mʋ waa kɔlɔŋɔ sa anɛ.

english_verse: So don't celebrate the festival by being evil and sinful, which is like serving bread made with yeast. Be pure and truthful and celebrate by using bread made without yeast.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan yɛgɛ a gyii Kanyaŋɛ nbunɔ kesu kɔnɔ, kɛ a lɛɛ alibi yɛ kumu tɔ ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ i du fɛɛ bodobodo mʋ nɩɩ kɩ sʋ kɩfɛ tinsa dɩdaa mʋ. Amaa fan yɛgɛ i gyii Kesu kɔnɔ mʋ, fɛɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ kɩdanbɩrasa yɛ kesintin mʋ fɛɛ bodobodo mʋ nɩɩ kɩ man sʋ kɩfɛ tinsa mʋ.

english_verse: In my other letter I told you not to have anything to do with immoral people.
translation_verse: N wʋla kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ sa fanɛ yɛ, fan man taa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ bʋga asa mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ kakyɩɩ abɛɛ kanyɩn biti kɩgyagaa mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: But I wasn't talking about the people of this world. You would have to leave this world to get away from everyone who is immoral or greedy or who cheats or worships idols.
translation_verse: N maa tɔwɛ kanɩn mʋ, man gyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ be mee sun Ɩbwaarɛ, nɩɩ bɛɛ waa kakyɩɩ abɛɛ kanyɩn biti kɩgyagaa, yɛ onsi‐payɩ libi abɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bee yuuri abɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ sun ɩdakpa, nɩɩ n dɩyɛ. Naafɔɔ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ yɛ fan man taa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ bʋga yɛ kanɩn asa maŋa bɩrɛ, amɔɔ fan lɩɩ dulinyaa tɔ kpini‐kpini.

english_verse: When one of you has a complaint against another, do you take your complaint to a court of sinners? Or do you take it to God's people?
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ maa mʋ bɩrɩsa, Krisito obuupu ba kan nyɛ asɩn mʋ, mɩnɛ ɩ waa sʋ nɩɩ ee kpee naa samaa mʋ asɩn agyipu mʋ nɩɩ ba man nyi Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ asɛ, nɩɩ ɔ man taa mʋ kpee Krisito abuupu mʋ asɛ kɛ ba lɔŋɔ bamʋ?

english_verse: Don't you know that God's people will judge the world? And if you are going to judge the world, can't you settle small problems?
translation_verse: Fan man nyi yɛ anɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ asa ii biti a talɛ dulinyaa abi? Nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ anɛ ii biti a talɛ dulinyaa abi asɩn bɩrɛ, mɩnɛ ɩ waa sʋ nɩɩ fɛn mɛɛ taalɛ lɔŋɔ fanɛ nsana tɔ asɩn wuribi?

english_verse: Don't you know we will judge angels? And if this is so, we can surely judge everyday matters.
translation_verse: Fan man nyi fɛɛ anɛ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ yɛgɛ a talɛ mʋ nbɔɔ mʋ? Ɩmʋ sʋ mɩnɛ ɩ waa nɩɩ fɛn mɛɛ taalɛ lɔŋɔ abaa ndaga kakyɩna nɩmʋ tɔ asɩn?

english_verse: I say this to your shame. Aren't any of you wise enough to act as a judge between one follower and another?
translation_verse: Ɩ man sʋ fanɛ ipeeli? Amɔɔ fan man sʋ ɔnyaasɩnpʋ kʋlʋn fanɛ tɔ, mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ taalɛ lɔŋɔ fanɛ wʋlɛ‐wʋlɛ nsana?

english_verse: Don't you know that evil people won't have a share in the blessings of God's kingdom? Don't fool yourselves! No one who is immoral or worships idols or is unfaithful in marriage or is a pervert or behaves like a homosexual
translation_verse: Fan man nyi yɛ alibi awaapʋ mʋ, ba mɛɛ yɛ ba nyɛ loo Ɩbwaarɛ kuwura‐gyii mʋ tɔ? Fan man yɛgɛ ɔkʋ ɔ pɩna fanɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa kakyɩɩ abɛɛ kanyɩn biti kɩgyagaa, yɛ ɩdakpa asunpu, abɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ lɩɩ bamʋ‐kuli ana abɛɛ bamʋ‐ka ana kamaa, yɛ anyɩn mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ dɛ yɛ bamʋ bɩrɩsa ana anyɩn,

english_verse: will share in God's kingdom. Neither will any thief or greedy person or drunkard or anyone who curses and cheats others.
translation_verse: yɛ ayuu, yɛ onsi‐payɩ libi wuya ana, yɛ atabʋʋpʋ, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bee nyita asa atɩɩ, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ pɩna asa bee gyii mʋ, falɛ asa anɩmʋ ɔkʋ mɛɛ yɛ ɔ nyɛ loo Ɩbwaarɛ kuwura‐gyii mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Some of you used to be like that. But now the name of our Lord Jesus Christ and the power of God's Spirit have washed you and made you holy and acceptable to God. Honor God with Your Body
translation_verse: Falɛ nɩɩ fanɛ akʋ fan kyɩna fan du, amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ Ɩbwaarɛ fwɩɩ fanɛ alibi, nɩɩ ɔ lɔŋɔ fanɛ yɩla sa mʋ n‐yɩɩ, nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ fanɛ kyula yɛ fanɛ ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ asɛ lɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito yɛ anɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ sʋ. Krisito abi kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ ɩ gyɛ Kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Some of you say, “We can do anything we want to.” But I tell you not everything is good for us. So I refuse to let anything have power over me.
translation_verse: Fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, “N sʋ ɔkpa fɛɛ n waa kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ.” Ɩ gyɛ kesintin, amaa man gyɛ ɩmʋ kpini ɩ bʋrɔn sa mʋ. Ngbaa mɛ n taalɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, n sʋ ɔkpa fɛɛ n waa kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ, amaa n mɛɛ yɛ n waa mɛ n‐yɩɩ kɩnyɛ sa kʋtɔ kʋ.

english_verse: You also say, “Food is meant for our bodies, and our bodies are meant for food.” But I tell you that God will destroy them both. We are not supposed to do indecent things with our bodies. We are to use them for the Lord who is in charge of our bodies.
translation_verse: Fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Agyitɔ ɩ bʋ tɔ sa ɔtɔ, nɩɩ ɔtɔ gbaa bʋ tɔ sa agyitɔ.” Ɩ gyɛ kesintin, amaa Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti o nyita ɩmʋ kpini. Nyɩmɩsa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kɩ man bʋ tɔ sa kakyɩɩ yɛ kanyɩn biti kɩgyagaa, amaa kɩ gyɛ sa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ nɩn, nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mɔɔ bʋ tɔ sa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ.

english_verse: God will raise us from death by the same power he used when he raised our Lord to life.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ taa mʋ ɔlʋn kyiŋi Yesu lɩɩ lewu tɔ, kanɩn nɩɩ ee biti o kyiŋi anɛ gbaa anɛ lɩɩ lewu tɔ.

english_verse: Don't you know that your bodies are part of the body of Christ? Is it right for me to join part of the body of Christ to a prostitute? No, it isn't!
translation_verse: Fan man nyi yɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ ɩ gyɛ Yesu kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ abaafʋn mʋ abɛɛ? Ɩmʋ sʋ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ n taa mɛ n‐yɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ Krisito kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kɩbaafʋn mʋ naa dɛ yɛ ɔbʋrʋkɔɔnɛ‐kyɩɩ abɛɛ? Afuloo! Ɩ mɛɛ yɛ ɩ ba kanɩn.

english_verse: Don't you know that a man who does that becomes part of her body? The Scriptures say, “The two of them will be like one person.”
translation_verse: Fan man nyi fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa mʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ naa bʋga yɛ ɔbʋrʋkɔɔnɛ‐kyɩɩ mʋ, maa mʋ ba biliŋi kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kʋlʋn nɩn? Lɩɩ fɛɛ ba kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, “Bamʋ anyɔ ba biliŋi kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kʋlʋn nɩn.”

english_verse: But anyone who is joined to the Lord is one in spirit with him.
translation_verse: Amaa ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ bʋga yɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ, maa mʋ ba biliŋi kʋkʋlʋn nɩn kayaayu tɔ.

english_verse: You surely know that your body is a temple where the Holy Spirit lives. The Spirit is in you and is a gift from God. You are no longer your own.
translation_verse: Fan man nyi yɛ fanɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ ɩ gyɛ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ mʋ? Fan man nyi yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ sa fanɛ Kayaayu maŋa, nɩɩ ɔ tɛ fanɛ tɔ? Fan man tɛ fanɛ kɩbaa sʋ,

english_verse: God paid a great price for you. So use your body to honor God.
translation_verse: lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ sɔɔ fanɛ ɔgyalɩn. Ɩmʋ sʋ fan taa fanɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ waa atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ sa Ɩbwaarɛ bʋnyaa.

english_verse: Now I will answer the questions you asked in your letter. You asked, “Is it best for people not to marry?”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ lɩɩ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ fan kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ bɩya mɛ mʋ sʋ mʋ, n biti n lɛɛ ɩmʋ kɔnɔ. Ɩ bʋrɔn fɛɛ ɔnyɩn maa kyɩna yɛgɛ ɔ man mata ɔkyɩɩ.

english_verse: Well, having your own husband or wife should keep you from doing something immoral.
translation_verse: Amaa lɩɩ kakyɩɩ abɛɛ kanyɩn biti kɩgyagaa sʋ mʋ, ɩ dagaa ɔnyɩn kʋmaa nɩmʋ maa nyɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ‐ka, kɛ ɔkyɩɩ kʋmaa gbaa ɔ nyɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mu‐kuli.

english_verse: Husbands and wives should be fair with each other about having sex.
translation_verse: Ɔnyɩn kilipu o kyula maa mʋ‐ka ba bʋga ɔdɛkpa, kɛ ɔkyɩɩ kilipu gbaa o kyula maa mu‐kuli ba bʋga ɔdɛkpa.

english_verse: A wife belongs to her husband instead of to herself, and a husband belongs to his wife instead of to himself.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔkyɩɩ kilipu kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ man bɩla kɩ gyɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ nkʋn lɛɛ nɩn, amaa kɩ gyɛ mu‐kuli gbaa lɛɛ nɩn. Kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ ɔnyɩn kilipu gbaa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ man gyɛ mʋ nkʋn lɛɛ, amaa kɩ gyɛ mʋ‐ka gbaa lɛɛ nɩn.

english_verse: So don't refuse sex to each other, unless you agree not to have sex for a little while, in order to spend time in prayer. Then Satan won't be able to tempt you because of your lack of self-control.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɔnyɩn maa mʋ‐ka ba man kina abaa asɛ kɩdɛ kɩnyɩn yɛ kɩkyɩɩ. Amɔɔ fan tɔwɛ kyula abaa yɛ fan mɛɛ yɛ fan dɛ yɛ abaa saŋa gbɛrɛɛ, kɛ fan nyɛ‐nyɛ saŋa sa kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ. Amaa ɩmʋ kamaa mʋ, fan bwii bʋga dɛ kɩnyɩn yɛ kɩkyɩɩ, saamʋ Sɩtaanɛ mɛɛ nyɛ tʋʋ fanɛ tɔ kɩɩ, lɩɩ fan maa mɛɛ taalɛ kɩtaa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ.

english_verse: In my opinion that is what should be done, though I don't know of anything the Lord said about this matter.
translation_verse: N maa tɔwɛ yɛ ɔkʋmaa ɔ nyɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ‐ka abɛɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mu‐kuli mʋ, man gyɛ yɛ n nyan fanɛ nɩn, nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ nbara nɩn yɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ o kili.

english_verse: My advice for the unmarried and for widows is that it is acceptable for them to remain single, just as I am.
translation_verse: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ lɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man pɩɩta kili yɛ akulapu‐kyɩɩ mʋ, n tɔwɛ bamʋ fɛɛ ɩ bʋrɔn sa bamʋ fɛɛ ba maa man kili fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n man kili mʋ.

english_verse: But if you don't have enough self-control, then go ahead and get married. After all, it is better to marry than to burn with desire.
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ ba mɛɛ yɛ ba kan taalɛ kɩtaa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ bɩrɛ, ɩ dagaa ba maa kili. Lɩɩ fɛɛ nɩɩ ba kili mʋ, ɩ bʋrɔn sa bamʋ ɩ kyɔ kakyɩɩ abɛɛ kanyɩn biti kayalaga kɩ maa bʋ bamʋ tɔ.

english_verse: I instruct married couples to stay together, and this is exactly what the Lord himself taught. A wife who leaves her husband
translation_verse: Lɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba kili mʋ mɔɔ, n sa fanɛ kɔnɔ, nɩɩ kanɩn kɔnɔsa maŋa man lɩɩ mɛ asɛ, ɩ lɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito asɛ nɩn. Ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ ɔkyɩɩ kilipu ɔ man kina mu‐kuli.

english_verse: should either stay single or go back to her husband. And a husband should not leave his wife.
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ ɔ kan kina mu‐kuli mʋ, ɔ man bɩla kili, amɔɔ o bwii kpee, kɛ maa mu‐kuli ba naa lɔŋɔ abaa. Nɩɩ ɔkpa kʋlʋn maŋa sʋ ɔnyɩn gbaa ɔ man kina mʋ‐ka.

english_verse: I don't know of anything else the Lord said about marriage. All I can do is to give you my own advice. If your wife isn't a follower of the Lord, but is willing to stay with you, don't divorce her.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ asansa mʋ mɔɔ mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ ɩ tɔwɛ ɩnɩmʋ, man gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ. Nɩɩ fanɛ Krisito abuupu ɔkʋ kan ɔ sʋ ɔkyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man gyɛ ɔkɔɔlɛ‐gyipu, nɩɩ ɔkyɩɩ mʋ kyula yɛ maa ɔnyɩn mʋ ba kyɩna mʋ, ɔnyɩn mʋ ɔ man kina mʋ.

english_verse: If your husband or wife isn't a follower of the Lord and decides to divorce you, then you should agree to it. You are no longer bound to that person. After all, God chose you and wants you to live at peace.
translation_verse: Amaa Krisito obuupu mʋ nɩɩ mʋ‐ka abɛɛ mu‐kuli mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man gyɛ Krisito obuupu, nɩɩ ee biti fɛɛ o kina mʋ bɩrɛ mʋ, ɔ yɛgɛ mʋ ɔ natɛ. Nɩɩ ɩ kan ba kanɩn mʋ, kekili nbara ɩ man ŋmina mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ tɩɩ anɛ nɩn yɛ a ba kyɩna kayɩɩ yuuli tɔ.

english_verse: And besides, how do you know if you will be able to save your husband or wife who isn't a follower? Obeying the Lord at All Times
translation_verse: Fʋ Krisito obuupu ɔkyɩɩ, akʋtɔ fʋ sʋ nɩɩ fu‐kuli ii biti ɔ bɔla nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ? Nɩɩ fʋ Krisito obuupu ɔnyɩn, akʋtɔ fɛɛ fʋ sʋ nɩɩ fʋ‐ka ii biti ɔ bɔla nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ? Fan kyɩna kakyɩna mʋ nɩɩ fan wʋla fan mʋ.

english_verse: In every church I tell the people to stay as they were when the Lord Jesus chose them and God called them to be his own. Now I say the same thing to you.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ɔ kyaga sʋ kyɩna kakyɩna mʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ taa sa mʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wʋla o du pɔyɩ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɩɩ mʋ yɛ o be sun mʋ mʋ. Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ kɔnɔsa mʋ nɩɩ n kaapʋ Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ kpini tɔ.

english_verse: God paid a great price for you. So don't become slaves of anyone else.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Krisito sɔɔ fanɛ kpini ɔgyalɩn, ɩmʋ sʋ fan man gyɛ anyɛ sa asa.

english_verse: I don't know of anything the Lord said about people who have never been married. But I will tell you what I think. And you can trust me, because the Lord has treated me with kindness.
translation_verse: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man pɩɩta kili mʋ bɩrɛ, n man nyɛ nbara kʋ lɩɩ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu asɛ lɩɩ bamʋ sʋ. Amaa mɛ Pɔɔlɩ gbaa‐gbaa n tɔwɛ n sa bamʋ lɩɩ mɛ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ, fɛɛ n maa gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ wu kʋwɛɛ sʋ mʋ, fɛn taalɛ kɔɔlɛ mɛ gyii fɛɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ fanɛ falɛ, n mɛɛ pɩna fanɛ nɩn.

english_verse: We are now going through hard times, and I think it is best for you to stay as you are.
translation_verse: Mɛ asɛ mʋ, ɩ bʋrɔn fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man pɩɩ kili mʋ, ba kyɩna kanɩn, lɩɩ fɛɛ nbɩɩnbɩɩ kakyɩna kanɩmʋ tɔ waa ɔlʋn.

english_verse: If you are married, stay married. If you are not married, don't try to get married.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔnyɩn mʋ nɩɩ o tee kili mʋ, ɔ man kina mʋ‐ka. Amaa ɔnyɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man pɩɩta kili mʋ, ɔ man mata ɔkyɩɩ.

english_verse: It isn't wrong to marry, even if you have never been married before. But those who marry will have a lot of trouble, and I want to protect you from this.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔnyɩn kan kili mʋ, ɔ man waa alibi. Nɩɩ ɔkyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man pɩɩta kili nɩɩ ɔ kan kili mʋ, ɔ man waa alibi. Amaa asa mʋ nɩɩ ba kili mʋ, awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ bee biti be wu kakyɩna kanɩmʋ tɔ mʋ, ɩmʋ nɩɩ n mee biti fan maa wu.

english_verse: It won't make any difference how much good you are getting from this world or how much you like it. This world as we know it is now passing away.
translation_verse: Bamʋ nɩɩ ba taa dulinyaa atɔ waasa bee sun kusun mʋ, ba waa fɛɛ ɩ man tiri bamʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ dulinyaa du nbɩɩnbɩɩ nɩmʋ mʋ, kɩɩ kyʋn nɩmʋ.

english_verse: But a married man has more worries. He must worry about the things of this world, because he wants to please his wife.
translation_verse: Amaa ɔnyɩn kilipu bɩrɛ, mʋ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ gyan dulinyaa asɩn sʋ nɩn, kanan mʋ nɩɩ ee biti o gyii mʋ‐ka ansi.

english_verse: So he is pulled in two directions. Unmarried women and women who have never been married worry only about pleasing the Lord, and they keep their bodies and minds pure. But a married woman worries about the things of this world, because she wants to please her husband.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ nfɛɛrɛ nnyɔ‐nnyɔ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ. Nɩɩ ɔkyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man kili mʋ mɔɔ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mu kusun i tiri mʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ ɔ taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ yɛ mʋ kala kpini sa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ. Amaa ɔkyɩɩ‐kilipu bɩrɛ mʋ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ gyan dulinyaa asɩn sʋ nɩn, yɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ee biti ɔ waa kɛ o gyii mu‐kuli ansi.

english_verse: What I am saying is for your own good—it isn't to limit your freedom. I want to help you to live right and to love the Lord above all else.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ kyɛ fanɛ tɔ sʋ, nɩɩ n tɔwɛ fanɛ ɩnɩmʋ n man gyɛ yɛ n nyan fanɛ nɩn. Amaa n biti fan waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ dɛ ɔkpa yɛgɛ kɩ bʋrɔn, kɛ fan nyɛ taa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kpini sa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ naa lʋwɛ.

english_verse: But suppose you are engaged to someone old enough to be married, and you want her so much that all you can think about is getting married. Then go ahead and marry. There is nothing wrong with that.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩ kan ba fɛɛ ɔnyɩn maa ɔkyɩɩ ba ŋmina fɛɛ ba kili, nɩɩ ɔnyɩn mʋ mɛɛ taalɛ kɩtaa mʋ n‐yɩɩ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔkyɩɩ mʋ mɔɔ dan fʋʋ kekili mʋ, ɔnyɩn mʋ ɔ waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ dagaa, kɛ ba kili abaa. Ɩ man gyɛ alibi nɩn.

english_verse: But it is better to have self-control and to make up your mind not to marry.
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ ɔnyɩn kan fɛ nfɛɛrɛ yɛ ɔ mɛɛ yɛ o kili, nɩɩ ɔ yɩlɛ sʋ kanɩn mʋ, ɔkʋ ɔ man nyan mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ taalɛ kɩtaa mʋ n‐yɩɩ mʋ ɩ bʋrɔn.

english_verse: It is perfectly all right to marry, but it is better not to get married at all.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɔnyɩn mʋ nɩɩ o kili ɔkyɩɩ mʋ ɩ bʋrɔn, nɩɩ ɔnyɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man kili ɔkyɩɩ mɔɔ mʋ ɩ bʋrɔn gaa.

english_verse: A wife should stay married to her husband until he dies. Then she is free to marry again, but only to a man who is a follower of the Lord.
translation_verse: Ɔkyɩɩ kilipu mʋ nɩɩ mu‐kuli san ɔ tɛ nkpa tɔ mʋ, ɔ mɛɛ taalɛ kina mu‐kuli kɛ ɔ naa kili ɔnyɩn pʋpwɛ. Amaa nɩɩ mu‐kuli mʋ wu bɩrɛ, ɔ sʋ ɔkpa ɔ taalɛ kili ɔnyɩn mʋ nɩɩ mʋ kɔkɔlɔ kii biti, amaa ɔ baa ɔ gyɛ Krisito obuupu.

english_verse: However, I think I am obeying God's Spirit when I say she would be happier to stay single.
translation_verse: Mɛ asɛ mʋ, ɔkyɩɩ kyɩna mʋ nkʋn mʋ, ii biti ɩ waa ɔdan sa mʋ, ɩ kyɔ maa kili. Nɩɩ n kɔɔlɛ gyii fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ kɩ tɛ mɛ tɔ.

english_verse: In your letter you asked me about food offered to idols. All of us know something about this subject. But knowledge makes us proud of ourselves, while love makes us helpful to others.
translation_verse: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ, taa lɩɩ agyitɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba taa lɔŋɔ sa ɩdakpa mʋ, an nyi fɛɛ anɛ kpini an sʋ kinyi fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fɛn taalɛ fɛn tɔwɛ mʋ. Kinyi ɩɩ bɩya n‐yɩɩ kɩkʋsaa, amaa kebiti kɩɩ kyɛ asa tɔ.

english_verse: But God has no doubts about who loves him.
translation_verse: Amaa ɔmʋ nɩɩ ee biti Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ nyi.

english_verse: Even though food is offered to idols, we know that none of the idols in this world are alive. After all, there is only one God.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ lɩɩ agyitɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba taa lɔŋɔ sa ɩdakpa mʋ kigyii mʋ, an nyi fɛɛ ɔdakpa kʋ man bʋ tɔ nɩɩ kɩ sʋ nkpa, nɩɩ an nyi fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kʋlʋn nkʋn ɩ bʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Many things in heaven and on earth are called gods and lords, but none of them really are gods or lords.
translation_verse: Halɩɩ ɩdakpa mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ bamʋ yɛ anyɩrɩpɛ nɩɩ ba bʋ sʋsʋ abɛɛ kasɛ sʋ, nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ kesintin fɛɛ ɩdakpa yɛ anyɩrɩpɛ gaalaagaa ba bʋ tɔ gbaa mʋ,

english_verse: We have only one God, and he is the Father. He created everything, and we live for him. Jesus Christ is our only Lord. Everything was made by him, and by him life was given to us.
translation_verse: anɛɛnɛ bɩrɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ kʋlʋn nɩɩ an nyi maa bʋ tɔ, nɩɩ mʋ ɩ gyɛ Ɔsɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tʋʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ, nɩɩ an bʋ tɔ sa mʋ, nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ kʋlʋn ɩ bʋ tɔ, mʋ ɩ gyɛ Yesu Krisito mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla mʋ sʋ tʋʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ, nɩɩ mʋ sʋ nɩɩ an bʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Not everyone knows these things. In fact, many people have grown up with the belief that idols have life in them. So when they eat meat offered to idols, they are bothered by a weak conscience.
translation_verse: Amaa man gyɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ i nyi falɛ asɩn nɩmʋ. Ɩdakpa asɩn mʋ ɩ wʋla dɩn akʋ, ɩmʋ sʋ ba lɩɩ ndaga nɩɩ ba kan gyii kanɩn agyitɔ mʋ, bɛɛ fɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ agyitɔ mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɩdakpa lɛɛ nɩn. Ba maa man pɩɩ bɩɩ abwaarɛsɩn mʋ tɔ gaa sʋ mʋ, nɩɩ ba kan gyii mʋ bɛɛ fɛ nfɛɛrɛ nɩn fɛɛ ba waa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ ineesi.

english_verse: But food doesn't bring us any closer to God. We are no worse off if we don't eat, and we are no better off if we do.
translation_verse: Amaa agyitɔ mɛɛ taalɛ kyɛ anɛ tɔ kɛ a nin tiri Ɩbwaarɛ. Nɩɩ a man kan gyii mʋ, a mɛɛ yɛ a pan sɛhn, nɩɩ an kan gyii mɔɔ mʋ, a mɛɛ yɛ a nyɛ sɛhn.

english_verse: Don't cause problems for someone with a weak conscience, just because you have the right to eat anything.
translation_verse: Amaa fan baa fan da sʋ lɩɩ ɔkpa mʋ nɩɩ fan nyɛ mʋ sʋ, kɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man pɩɩ bɩɩ abwaarɛsɩn mʋ tɔ gaa mʋ, ba man tɩyɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ.

english_verse: You know all this, and so it doesn't bother you to eat in the temple of an idol. But suppose a person with a weak conscience sees you and decides to eat food that has been offered to idols.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩ kan ba fɛɛ ɔkʋ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man pɩɩ bɩɩ abwaarɛsɩn mʋ tɔ gaa, nɩɩ o wu fʋ mʋ nɩɩ fu nyi abwaarɛsɩn mʋ tɔ gaa, fʋ maa tɛ ɔdakpa tɔ fii gyii mʋ, ɩnɩmʋ ɩ mɛɛ yɛgɛ, kɛ ngbaa mʋ ɔ naa gyii agyitɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba taa lɔŋɔ sa ɔdakpa mʋ abɛɛ?

english_verse: When you sin by hurting a follower with a weak conscience, you sin against Christ.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fʋ kan waa fʋ bɩrɩsa alibi falɛ ɔkpa sʋ mʋ, fɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ mʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kɩ lɛɛ sʋ, nɩɩ fʋ waa Krisito alibi.

english_verse: So if I hurt one of the Lord's followers by what I eat, I will never eat meat as long as I live.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ agyitɔ mʋ nɩɩ n gyii, ii biti ɩ yɛgɛ mɛ bɩrɩsa ɔ tɩyɛ alibi tɔ bɩrɛ, n mɛɛ bɩla yɛ n gyii kanɩn agyitɔ maŋa, kɛ n yɛgɛ ɔ lɩɩ tɩyɛ.

english_verse: I am free. I am an apostle. I have seen the Lord Jesus and have led you to have faith in him.
translation_verse: N man bʋ mɛ n‐yɩɩ nɩn abɛɛ? N man gyɛ Krisito osunpu nɩn abɛɛ? N man wu Yesu anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ nɩn abɛɛ? Man gyɛ fanɛ ɩ gyɛ kusun mʋ nɩɩ n waa sa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ tɔnɔ?

english_verse: that Barnabas and I have the right to our food and drink.
translation_verse: N maa Banabasi a man sʋ ɔkpa fɛɛ i gyii kɛ anuu lɩɩ kusun mʋ nɩɩ an sun mʋ sʋ abɛɛ?

english_verse: We each have the right to marry one of the Lord's followers and to take her along with us, just as the other apostles and the Lord's brothers and Peter do.
translation_verse: A man sʋ ɔkpa fɛɛ a kili Krisito abuupu akyɩɩ, kɛ a taa bamʋ buu anɛ n‐yɩɩ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Krisito asunpu akʋ, yɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu mu‐supu ana yɛ Pita bɛɛ waa mʋ abɛɛ?

english_verse: Are we the only ones who have to support ourselves by working at another job?
translation_verse: Abɛɛ anɛ nkʋn ɩ dagaa fɛɛ a taa anɛ abaa waa kusun biti anɛ agyitɔ‐gyisa?

english_verse: Do soldiers pay their own salaries? Don't people who raise grapes eat some of what they grow? Don't shepherds get milk from their own goats?
translation_verse: Ɔnaakɔpʋ mɔɔ ii sun kusun, nɩɩ ɛɛ ka mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ n‐yɩɩ kʋkɔ? Ɔdɔɔpʋ mɔɔ ɩ bʋ tɔ, nɩɩ o mee gyii mʋ ndɔɔ tɔ agyitɔ? Atɔbwaayaa ɔkpapʋ mɔɔ ɩ bʋ tɔ, nɩɩ o mee nuu mʋ atɔbwaaya mʋ kɩnyapʋ‐kyu.

english_verse: I am not saying this on my own authority. The Law of Moses tells us not to muzzle an ox when it is grinding grain. But was God concerned only about an ox?
translation_verse: Ba kyʋrɔɔ yɩla Mosesi Nbara mʋ tɔ yɛ, “Man ŋmina naatɛ‐nyɩnsa kɔnɔ, saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa agyitɔ tɔ kusun mʋ.” Amɔɔ fu nyi fɛɛ ɩnaatɛ‐nyɩnsa asɩn nkʋn nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ falɛ?

english_verse: No, he wasn't! He was talking about us. This was written in the Scriptures so that all who plow and all who grind the grain will look forward to sharing in the harvest.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ maa tɔwɛ kanɩn mʋ, man gyɛ anɛ nɩɩ ɛɛ tɔwɛ ɛɛ sa abɛɛ? Ɛɛhn! Kesintin, anɛ nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ ɩmʋ sa. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ baŋɛ ɩfɔlɛ, yɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ tɩŋɛ ayu mʋ, bamʋ kpini bɛɛ waa kanɩn yɛgɛ ba sʋ tamaa fɛɛ bɛɛ nyɛ bamʋ agyitɔ‐gyisa lɩɩ ɩmʋ tɔ.

english_verse: When we told the message to you, it was like planting spiritual seed. So we have the right to accept material things as our harvest from you.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ an maa duu kayaayu tɔ atɔ duusa fanɛ tɔ mʋ, nɩɩ a nyɛ kakyɩna nɩmʋ tɔ atɔ tirisa lɩɩ fanɛ asɛ mʋ, ii kisi nɩn?

english_verse: If others have the right to do this, we have an even greater right. But we haven't used this right of ours. We are willing to put up with anything to keep from causing trouble for the message about Christ.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ akʋ ba sʋ ɔkpa fɛɛ ba kɔɔlɛ falɛ atɔ tirisa lɩɩ fanɛ asɛ mʋ, a man sʋ ɔkpa an kyɔ bamʋ? Halɩɩ a maa sʋ kanɩn ɔkpa gbaa mʋ, a man taa ɩmʋ waa sɛhn. Amaa an nyɛ kenyiita yɩlɛ tɔ, kɛ ɩ man nyɛ tii Asɩn danbɩrasa lɩɩ Krisito sʋ mʋ kɩ yɛlɩgɛ.

english_verse: Don't you know that people who work in the temple make their living from what is brought to the temple? Don't you know that a person who serves at the altar is given part of what is offered?
translation_verse: Fan man nyi fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bee sun kusun kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ, bɛɛ nyɛ bamʋ agyitɔ bɛɛ lɩɩ tʋtɔ nɩn? Nɩɩ fan man nyi fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ lɛɛ saraga Ɩbwaarɛ kaswɩɩ mʋ sʋ gbaa, bɛɛ nyɛ bamʋ lɛɛ lɩɩ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba taa ba lɛɛ saraga sa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ.

english_verse: In the same way, the Lord wants everyone who preaches the good news to make a living from preaching this message.
translation_verse: Kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu sa kɔnɔ yɩla yɛ, bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ, bee biti ba nyɛ bamʋ agyitɔ gyisa lɩɩ bamʋ asɩn danbɩrasa kɩtɔwɛ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: But I have never used these privileges of mine, and I am not writing this because I want to start now. I would rather die than have someone rob me of the right to take pride in this.
translation_verse: Amaa n man taa falɛ ɩkpa ɩnɩmʋ tɔ ɔkʋ waa kusun. Nɩɩ n man kyʋrɔɔ ɩnɩmʋ nɩn kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ fan waa kanɩn atɔ sa mɛ. Nɩɩ n kan wu gbaa mʋ, ɩ bɔ fɛɛ ɔkʋ ɔ maa yɛgɛ nɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩmʋ sʋ n kaapʋ mɛ n‐yɩɩ mʋ ɩ maa waa kɩyan.

english_verse: I don't have any reason to brag about preaching the good news. Preaching is something God told me to do, and if I don't do it, I am doomed.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n kan tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ, n man sʋ ɔkpa fɛɛ n kaapʋ mɛ n‐yɩɩ. Ɩ dan ɩ gyɛ nɩn fɛɛ, n tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ. Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ n kan n man tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ, mɛ laakʋ.

english_verse: If I preach because I want to, I will be paid. But even if I don't want to, it is still something God has sent me to do.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n kan n waa kusun mʋ mɛ kɩpɩrɛ tɔ mʋ, n biti n nyɛ kʋkɔka lala. Nɩɩ n man kan sun kusun mʋ lɩɩ mɛ kɩpɩrɛ tɔ bɩrɛ, n dan waa kusun mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa sa mɛ yɛ n waa mʋ nɩn dee.

english_verse: What pay am I given? It is the chance to preach the good news free of charge and not to use the privileges that are mine because I am a preacher.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ mɩnɛ ɩ gyɛ mɛ kʋkɔka? Ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ n tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ yɛgɛ n man kɔɔlɛ ɩmʋ sɛhn, nɩɩ n mɛɛ taa ɩkpa mʋ nɩɩ n sʋ lɩɩ asɩn danbɩrasa kɩtɔwɛ mʋ sʋ taa nyɛ mɛ atɔ tirisa.

english_verse: I am not anyone's slave. But I have become a slave to everyone, so I can win as many people as possible.
translation_verse: N bʋ mɛ n‐yɩɩ nɩn, n man gyɛ ɔkʋ kɩnyɛ, amaa n waa mɛ n‐yɩɩ kɩnyɛ sa ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ, kɛ n nyɛ‐nyɛ asa kʋkyɔ ba be biliŋi Krisito lɛɛ.

english_verse: When I am with the Jews, I live like a Jew to win Jews. They are ruled by the Law of Moses, and I am not. But I live by the Law to win them.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n maa bʋ Gyiwu abi asɛ mʋ, n waa mɛ n‐yɩɩ nɩn fɛɛ Gyiwu obii, kɛ n nyɛ‐nyɛ bamʋ ba be biliŋi Krisito lɛɛ. Nɩɩ n maa bʋ bamʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ Mosesi nbara mʋ kasɛ mʋ, yɛgɛ mɛɛ mɛ n man bʋ nbara mʋ kasɛ mʋ, n waa mɛ n‐yɩɩ nɩn fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba du mʋ, kɛ n nyɛ‐nyɛ bamʋ ba ba biliŋi Krisito lɛɛ.

english_verse: And when I am with people who are not ruled by the Law, I forget about the Law to win them. Of course, I never really forget about the law of God. In fact, I am ruled by the law of Christ.
translation_verse: Kanɩn ɔkpa kʋlʋn sʋ nɩɩ n maa bʋ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man bʋ Mosesi nbara mʋ kasɛ mʋ, n waa mɛ n‐yɩɩ fɛɛ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man bʋ nbara mʋ kasɛ, kɛ n nyɛ‐nyɛ bamʋ kɛ ba be buu Krisito. Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ mɛɛ kaapʋ nɩn fɛɛ n mee buu Ɩbwaarɛ nbara mʋ, n buu Krisito nbara mʋ nɩn.

english_verse: I do all this for the good news, because I want to share in its blessings. A Race and a Fight
translation_verse: Asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ sʋ nɩɩ n waa ɩnɩmʋ kpini, kɛ n nyɛ‐nyɛ kusee mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ tɔ mʋ.

english_verse: I don't run without a goal. And I don't box by beating my fists in the air.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ n mɛɛ sɩlɛ fɛɛ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ sɩlɛ kɩyan, nɩɩ n mɛɛ kɔ kolu fɛɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ tʋʋ akɔtɔɔ afuu tɔ.

english_verse: I keep my body under control and make it my slave, so I won't lose out after telling the good news to others.
translation_verse: N nyan mɛ n‐yɩɩ, nɩɩ n yɛgɛ nɩɩ kii nu mɛ asɛ, kɛ ɩ man naa ba fɛɛ, nɩɩ n kan tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa sa asa mʋ, kɛ mɛɛmɛ n pan kakɛɛ mʋ.

english_verse: All of them also ate the same spiritual food
translation_verse: Bamʋ kpini ba gyii agyitɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ mʋ.

english_verse: and drank the same spiritual drink, which flowed from the spiritual rock that followed them. That rock was Christ.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ bamʋ kpini ba nuu nkyu mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛgɛ nɩɩ ɩ lɩɩ kɩfʋlɛ tɔ mʋ. Ba nuu lɩɩ kɩfʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ kɩmaa bamʋ ba naa mʋ, nɩɩ kanɩn kɩfʋlɛ maŋa ɩ gyɛ Krisito.

english_verse: But most of them did not please God. So they died, and their bodies were scattered all over the desert.
translation_verse: Amaa ɩmaa ɩmʋ kpini gbaa mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ansi ɩ man gyii bamʋ gaalaagaa sʋ, nɩɩ ba wu‐wu yaasɛ ba dɛ ofuli mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: What happened to them is a warning to keep us from wanting to do the same evil things.
translation_verse: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ asɩn nɩmʋ kpini ɩ waa nɩn kaapʋ ɩ da anɛ amu tɔ, kɛ ɩ man yɛgɛ anɛ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ gyaga alibi kɩwaa sʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ adɩdaapʋ mʋ ba waa mʋ.

english_verse: They worshiped idols, just as the Scriptures say, “The people sat down to eat and drink. Then they got up to dance around.” So don't worship idols.
translation_verse: Fan man sun ɩdakpa fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ bamʋ tɔ akʋ ba kyɩna waa mʋ. Ba kyʋrɔɔ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ lɩɩ bamʋ sʋ yɛ, “Asa mʋ ba kyɩna nɩɩ ba gyii, nɩɩ ba nuu, nɩɩ ba kʋsʋ yɩlɛ kyaa.”

english_verse: And don't try to test Christ, as some of them did and were later bitten by poisonous snakes.
translation_verse: Fan man yɛgɛ a tʋʋ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔ kɩɩ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ bamʋ akʋ ba daa kyɩna waa mʋ, nɩɩ anansɛ ba be duŋi bamʋ mɔɔ mʋ.

english_verse: Don't even grumble, as some of them did and were killed by the destroying angel.
translation_verse: Fan man kɔlɩtɛ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ bamʋ akʋ ba kyɩna kɔlɩtɛ mʋ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sun mʋ kabɔɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ mɔɔ asa, nɩɩ ɔ ba mɔɔ bamʋ mʋ.

english_verse: These things happened to them as a warning to us. All this was written in the Scriptures to teach us who live in these last days.
translation_verse: Asɩn nɩmʋ kpini i tu asa mʋ, nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ sɩnkaala sa asa. Ba kyʋrɔɔ ɩmʋ yɩla fɛɛ ɩ da anɛ amu tɔ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ an bʋ dulinyaa tɔ falɛ mʋ, ii kpee laalaalʋwɛ nɩmʋ.

english_verse: Even if you think you can stand up to temptation, be careful not to fall.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o nyi yɛ ɔ yɩlɛ mʋ ayaa sʋ kenken mʋ, ɔ baa ɔ da sʋ kɛ ɔ man lɩɩ tɩyɛ.

english_verse: You are tempted in the same way that everyone else is tempted. But God can be trusted not to let you be tempted too much, and he will show you how to escape from your temptations.
translation_verse: Kʋtʋʋ tɔ kɩɩ kʋ man ba fanɛ sʋ yɛgɛ kɩ man pɩɩta ba nyɩmɩsa sʋ. Ɩbwaarɛ gyɛ kesintin wuya, nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ yɛ ɔ yɛgɛ kʋtʋʋ tɔ kɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ fɛn mɛɛ yɛ fan taalɛ yɩlɛ tɔ mʋ kɩ ba fanɛ sʋ. Amaa nɩɩ kʋtʋʋ tɔ kɩɩ kan ba fanɛ sʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ kaapʋ fanɛ ɔkpa kɛ fan taa lɩɩ tɔ, kɛ fan taalɛ yɩlɛ tɔ.

english_verse: My friends, you must keep away from idols.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ mɛ bɩrɩsa ana danbɩrasa, fan lɛɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ ɩdakpa kusun tɔ.

english_verse: I am speaking to you as people who have enough sense to know what I am talking about.
translation_verse: N tɔwɛ fanɛ asɛ fɛɛ anyaasɩnpʋ, ɩmʋ sʋ fanɛ gbaa‐gbaa fanɛ fan fɛ nfɛɛrɛ lɩɩ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ falɛ tɔ kɩɩ.

english_verse: When we drink from the cup we ask God to bless, isn't that sharing in the blood of Christ? When we eat the bread we break, isn't that sharing in the body of Christ?
translation_verse: Anɛ Krisito abuupu a maa gyii Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ agyitɔ mʋ, kʋʋpʋ yɛ nta mʋ nɩɩ an taa afwaala an sa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, an kan nuu kɔɔpʋ mʋ tɔ mʋ, ɩ kaapʋ nɩn fɛɛ anaa Krisito an bʋga waa kʋkʋlʋn lɩɩ nkalan mʋ sʋ. Nɩɩ an kpɛɛ bodobodo tɔ mʋ, ɩɩ waa nɩn fɛɛ anaa Krisito an bʋga waa kʋkʋlʋn mʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ tɔ nɩn.

english_verse: By sharing in the same loaf of bread, we become one body, even though there are many of us.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ bodobodo kʋlʋn ɩ bʋ tɔ, halɩɩ a maa kyɔ falɛ gbaa mʋ, an gyɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kʋlʋn nɩn, lɩɩ fɛɛ anɛ kpini an gyii bodobodo kʋlʋn maŋa.

english_verse: Aren't the people of Israel sharing in the worship when they gather around the altar and eat the sacrifices offered there?
translation_verse: A taa Ɩsɩrayɩ abi asɩn kaala kɩɩ. Bamʋ nɩɩ ba taa kʋtɔbwaaya lɔŋɔ sa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ba gyii ɩmʋ mʋ, ɩ kaapʋ nɩn fɛɛ ba maa Ɩbwaarɛ ba waa kʋkʋlʋn mʋ kɔsɔrɩga kaswɩɩ mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: Am I saying that either the idols or the food sacrificed to them is anything at all?
translation_verse: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ mɩnɛ nɩɩ n biti n tɔwɛ? Ɩ kaapʋ nɩn fɛɛ atɔbwaaya mʋ nɩɩ ba taa lɔŋɔ sa mʋ ɩ gyɛ kʋtɔ kʋ, abɛɛ ɩdakpa mʋ ɩ gyɛ kʋtɔkʋ?

english_verse: No, I am not! This food is really sacrificed to demons and not to God. I don't want you to have anything to do with demons.
translation_verse: Ayee, amaa n biti n kaapʋ nɩn fɛɛ, ɩdakpa asunpu kɔlɔŋɔ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ lɔŋɔ mʋ, bɛɛ lɔŋɔ bɛɛ sa nbwɩɩ libi nɩn, man gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ. N mee biti fan naa nbwɩɩ libi fan maa bʋga.

english_verse: You cannot drink from the cup of demons and still drink from the Lord's cup. You cannot eat at the table of demons and still eat at the Lord's table.
translation_verse: Fan mɛɛ taalɛ nuu Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu kɔɔpʋ mʋ tɔ, kɛ fan bɩla naa nuu nbwɩɩ libi kɔɔpʋ tɔ. Fan mɛɛ taalɛ gyii Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu agyitɔ, kɛ fan bɩla naa gyii nbwɩɩ libi agyitɔ.

english_verse: We would make the Lord jealous if we did this. And we are not stronger than the Lord. Always Honor God
translation_verse: Nɩɩ an kan waa kanɩn mʋ, an biti Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ nyɛ agbʋ nɩn abɛɛ? An bʋlʋn an kyɔ Ɩbwaarɛ nɩn abɛɛ? Fan waa atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ bɩya Ɩbwaarɛ bʋnyaa

english_verse: However, when you buy meat in the market, go ahead and eat it. Keep your conscience clear by not asking where the meat came from.
translation_verse: Fɛn taalɛ gyii kunun kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ fɛ kunun ɔfɛkpa, amaa fan man taasɛ katɩn mʋ nɩɩ kɩ lɩɩ, kɛ i wuliti ɔkʋ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “The earth and everything in it belong to the Lord.”
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ba kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, “Kasɛ yɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ kɩmʋ sʋ mʋ kpini gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ nɩn.”

english_verse: If an unbeliever invites you to dinner, and you want to go, then go. Eat whatever you are served. Don't cause a problem for someone's conscience by asking where the food came from.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Krisito abuupu mʋ tɔ ɔkʋ kan da kɩbaa tɩɩ fanɛ yɛ, fan ba kɛ fan bʋga gyii, nɩɩ fan waa nfɛɛrɛ yɛ fen kpee mʋ, fen gyii agyitɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ba taa be yii fanɛ ansi tɔ, kɛ fan man taasɛ sɛhn, kɛ i wuliti ɔkʋ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ.

english_verse: But if you are told it has been sacrificed to idols, don't cause a problem by eating it. I don't mean a problem for yourself, but for the one who told you. Why should my freedom be limited by someone else's conscience?
translation_verse: Man gyɛ fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ sʋ nɩn n tɔwɛ kanɩn, amaa ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ fanɛ mʋ nfɛɛrɛ sʋ. Fanɛ ɔkʋ ii biti ɔ taasɛ yɛ, “Nɩɩ n kan sʋ ɔkpa n gyii atɔ nɩmʋ mʋ, mɩnɛ ɩɩ waa nɩɩ ɔkʋ nfɛɛrɛ sʋ mʋ, n mɛɛ taalɛ gyii?

english_verse: If I give thanks for what I eat, why should anyone accuse me of doing wrong?
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n kan taa afwaala sa Ɩbwaarɛ pɔyɩ nɩɩ n gyii agyitɔ mʋ, mɩnɛ ɩ waa nɩɩ ɔkʋ ɩ pwɩɩ mɛ yɛgɛ n taa afwaala sa Ɩbwaarɛ pɔyɩ nɩɩ n gyii?”

english_verse: When you eat or drink or do anything else, always do it to honor God.
translation_verse: To! Kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ fɛn waa nɩn‐oo, fen gyii nɩn‐oo, fen nuu nɩn‐oo, fan waa ɩmʋ kpini kanan mʋ nɩɩ ii biti ɩ taa bʋnyaa sa Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: You must follow my example, as I follow the example of Christ. Rules for Worship
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan kasɛ mɛ tɔ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n kasɛ Krisito tɔ mʋ. Kabwaarɛ‐sun tɔ nbara lɩɩ kumu sʋ kubun

english_verse: I am proud of you, because you always remember me and obey the teachings I gave you.
translation_verse: N yɩn fanɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fen nyiŋi mɛ sʋ lɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋmaa kɩnɩmʋ tɔ, nɩɩ fen buu kɩkaapʋ mʋ nɩɩ n taa waa fanɛ abaa tɔ mʋ.

english_verse: Now I want you to know that Christ is the head of all men, and a man is the head of a woman. But God is the head of Christ.
translation_verse: Amaa n biti fan bɩɩ fɛɛ ɔnyɩn kʋmaa kumu ɩ gyɛ Krisito, nɩɩ ɔkyɩɩ‐kilipu kumu ɩ gyɛ mu‐kuli, nɩɩ Krisito kumu ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: This means that any man who prays or prophesies with something on his head brings shame to his head.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɔnyɩn kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ, abɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩɩ bɔla mʋ sʋ ɛɛ tɔwɛ, yɛgɛ o bun mu kumu sʋ mʋ, ee gyila mu kumu mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ Krisito mʋ ipeeli nɩmʋ.

english_verse: But any woman who prays or prophesies without something on her head brings shame to her head. In fact, she may as well shave her head.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkyɩɩ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ abɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩɩ bɔla mʋ sʋ ɛɛ tɔwɛ, nɩɩ ɔ man bun mu kumu sʋ mʋ, ee gyila mu kumu mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ mu‐kuli ipeeli nɩmʋ, ɩ dan i du nɩn fɛɛ maa kpaatɛ mu kumu mʋ.

english_verse: A woman should wear something on her head. It is a disgrace for a woman to shave her head or cut her hair. But if she refuses to wear something on her head, let her cut off her hair.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man kan bun mu kumu sʋ bɩrɛ, ɩ dagaa maa kpaatɛ mu kumu. Nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ ipeeli‐sɩn sa ɔkyɩɩ maa kpaatɛ mu kumu, abɛɛ maa gyatɛ mu inyini sʋ mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ o bun mu kumu sʋ.

english_verse: Men were created to be like God and to bring honor to God. This means a man should not wear anything on his head. Women were created to bring honor to men.
translation_verse: Ɔnyɩn bɩrɛ man dagaa maa bun mu kumu sʋ, saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ, abɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩɩ bɔla mʋ sʋ ɛɛ tɔwɛ mʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔnyɩn mʋ tɔ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ keduli yɛ mʋ bʋnyaa ɩɩ lɛɛ ɩɩ kaapʋ. Amaa ɔkyɩɩ mʋ ɩɩ lɛɛ ɔnyɩn bʋnyaa ɩɩ kaapʋ.

english_verse: It was the woman who was made from a man, and not the man who was made from a woman.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ man tʋʋ ɔnyɩn lɩɩ ɔkyɩɩ tɔ, amaa ɔ tʋʋ ɔkyɩɩ nɩn lɩɩ ɔnyɩn tɔ.

english_verse: He wasn't created for her. She was created for him.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ man tʋʋ ɔnyɩn nɩn sa ɔkyɩɩ, amaa ɔ tʋʋ ɔkyɩɩ nɩn sa ɔnyɩn.

english_verse: And so, because of this, and also because of the angels, a woman ought to wear something on her head, as a sign of her authority.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ sʋ mʋ, ɩ dagaa ɔkyɩɩ maa bun mu kumu sʋ, kɛ ɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ ɔ bʋ mu‐kuli kasɛ.

english_verse: As far as the Lord is concerned, men and women need each other.
translation_verse: Amaa ɩnɩmʋ kpini, lɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ ɩkpa sʋ mʋ, ɔkyɩɩ tiri sa ɔnyɩn, nɩɩ ɔnyɩn gbaa tiri sa ɔkyɩɩ.

english_verse: It is true that the first woman came from a man, but all other men have been given birth by women. Yet God is the one who created everything.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔkyɩɩ lɩɩ ɔnyɩn tɔ nɩn, nɩɩ ɔkyɩɩ mɔɔ ɩ kʋʋgɛ ɔnyɩn. Amaa kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ nɩn.

english_verse: Ask yourselves if it is proper for a woman to pray without something on her head.
translation_verse: Fanɛ gbaa‐gbaa fanɛ fan kɩɩ, nɩɩ ɔkyɩɩ maa kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ, yɛgɛ ɔ man bun mu kumu sʋ mʋ, ɩ bʋrɔn kanɩn abɛɛ?

english_verse: This is how things are done in all of God's churches, and this is why none of you should argue about what I have said. Rules for the Lord's Supper
translation_verse: Amaa ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee biti o gyii ɩnɩmʋ ɩmɔɔrɛ mʋ, kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ n sʋ n tɔwɛ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, a man buu atɔ waasa kʋ Krisito tɔ tii ɩnɩmʋ sʋ. Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ gbaa kanɩn nɩɩ i du. Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ agyitɔ yɛ ɩmʋ ɔkpa sʋ kigyii

english_verse: Your worship services do you more harm than good. I am certainly not going to praise you for this.
translation_verse: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ n biti n ba tɔwɛ fanɛ falɛ bɩrɛ n mɛɛ yɩn fanɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fanɛ kɩgyaŋɛ kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ mʋ, ɩ mɛɛ bɩya adanbɩrasa, amɔɔ ii nyita nɩn ii tii sʋ.

english_verse: I am told you can't get along with each other when you worship, and I am sure that some of what I have heard is true.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyankpaa mʋ, n nu yɛ saŋa kʋmaa nɩɩ fanɛ kʋbʋ fɛn gyaŋɛ mʋ, nbarɩgɛ ɩ bʋ fanɛ tɔ, nɩɩ n kɔɔlɛ ɩmʋ ɩkʋ gyii.

english_verse: You are bound to argue with each other, but it is easy to see which of you have God's approval.
translation_verse: Kesintin tɔ, ɩ dagaa nbarɩgɛ ɩ maa bʋ fanɛ tɔ, saamʋ kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ɔ bɩɩ fanɛ tɔ bamʋ nɩɩ bee sun Ɩbwaarɛ kesintin tɔ.

english_verse: You even start eating before everyone gets to the meeting, and some of you go hungry, while others get drunk.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ fan maa gyii mʋ, ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ii gyii mʋ lɛɛ nɩn, nɩɩ fen mee gyoo abaa, kanɩn sʋ akʋn ɩɩ mɔɔ akʋ, yɛgɛ akʋ mɔɔ bɛɛ bʋʋ.

english_verse: The Lord meant that when you eat this bread and drink from this cup, you tell about his death until he comes.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ saŋa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ fen gyii bodobodo nɩmʋ, nɩɩ fen nuu lɩɩ kɔɔpʋ nɩmʋ tɔ mʋ, ɩ kaapʋ nɩn fɛɛ fɛn da Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu kelewu mʋ kibonbon naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ee biti o bwii ba mʋ.

english_verse: If you fail to understand that you are the body of the Lord, you will condemn yourselves by the way you eat and drink.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee gyii bodobodo mʋ, nɩɩ ee nuu lɩɩ kɔɔpʋ mʋ tɔ, nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ bɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ n‐yɩɩ mʋ kasɛ mʋ, o gyii kʋpwɛ.

english_verse: After the meal, Jesus took a cup of wine in his hands and said, “This is my blood, and with it God makes his new agreement with you. Drink this and remember me.”
translation_verse: Ba maa gyii lʋwɛ mʋ, ɔkpa kʋlʋn maŋa sʋ ɔ taa kɔɔpʋ yɛ nta mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Kɔɔpʋ nɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ mɛ nkalan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa waa katɔwɛ kyula pʋpwɛ maa asa nsana. Fan waa falɛ, saŋa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ fan nuu ɩmʋ mʋ, taa nyiŋi mʋ.”

english_verse: I have already told you what the Lord Jesus did on the night he was betrayed. And it came from the Lord himself. He took some bread in his hands.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ n nyɛ lɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu asɛ mʋ nɩɩ n taa kaapʋ fanɛ. Ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ, kagyanbwɛ, pɔyɩ kɛ ba lɛɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu sa mʋ, ɔ taa bodobodo,

english_verse: Then after he had given thanks, he broke it and said, “This is my body, which is given for you. Eat this and remember me.”
translation_verse: nɩɩ ɔ fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ, nɩɩ ɔ gya bodobodo mʋ tɔ, nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ mɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ, mʋ nɩɩ n taa sa fanɛ. Fan waa falɛ taa nyiŋi mɛ.”

english_verse: But if you eat the bread and drink the wine in a way that isn't worthy of the Lord, you sin against his body and blood.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee gyii Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu bodobodo abɛɛ ee nuu lɩɩ kɔɔpʋ mʋ tɔ, ɔkpa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man dagaa sʋ mʋ, o gyii kʋpwɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ man buu Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ n‐yɩɩ yɛ mʋ nkalan mʋ.

english_verse: This is why many of you are sick and weak and why a lot of others have died.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ falɛ sʋ nɩɩ fanɛ tɔ gaalaagaa n‐yɩɩ ɩ yɔlagɛ fanɛ, nɩɩ fɛn lɔ, nɩɩ akʋ mɔɔ ba wu.

english_verse: But when the Lord judges and punishes us, he does it to keep us from being condemned with the rest of the world.
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kan bun anɛ kʋpwɛ nɩɩ ɔ bɩɩtɛ anɛ kʋsʋ mʋ, ɛɛ waa kanɩn nɩn, kɛ ɔ man taa anɛ tii dulinyaa asa mʋ nɩɩ ee biti o muuri mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: My dear friends, you should wait until everyone gets there before you start eating.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, nɩɩ fan kan gyaŋɛ kɛ fan gyii Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ agyitɔ mʋ, fan gyoo abaa.

english_verse: If you really are hungry, you can eat at home. Then you won't condemn yourselves when you meet together. After I arrive, I will instruct you about the other matters.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ akʋn a kan a mɔɔ ɔkʋ mʋ, ɔ gyankpaa gyii mʋ kɩkpaara sʋ, saamʋ, nɩɩ fan gyaŋɛ mʋ ɩ mɛɛ yɛ ɩ bɩya Ɩbwaarɛ kʋpwɛ kubun. Nɩɩ lɩɩ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ san mʋ bɩrɛ, n kan ba mʋ, n biti n lɔŋɔ ɩmʋ sa fanɛ.
