english_verse: I want you to remember that before you became followers of the Lord, you were led in all the wrong ways by idols that cannot even talk.
translation_verse: Sɩtaanɛ pɩna fanɛ, nɩɩ fan fɔyɩ, nɩɩ fan naa sun ɩdakpa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ mɛɛ tɔwɛ.

english_verse: Now I want you to know that if you are led by God's Spirit, you will say that Jesus is Lord, and you will never curse Jesus.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ n biti fan bɩɩ fɛɛ, ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu bʋ mʋ tɔ mʋ, mɛɛ taalɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Nbusaa asɩn ɩ gyan Yesu sʋ.” Nɩɩ ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ lɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Yesu ɩ gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ,” amɔɔ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ bʋ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: There are different kinds of spiritual gifts, but they all come from the same Spirit.
translation_verse: Kayaayu tɔ nkɛɛ mʋ ɩ kwɩɩ ɩ kwɩɩ, amaa Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu kʋlʋn maŋa ɩɩ kɛɛ ɩmʋ kpini.

english_verse: There are different ways to serve the same Lord,
translation_verse: Kusun kʋkwɩɩ‐kʋkwɩɩ kɩ bʋ kabwaarɛ‐sun tɔ, amaa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ kʋlʋn maŋa nɩɩ an sun.

english_verse: and we can each do different things. Yet the same God works in all of us and helps us in everything we do.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Kusun sunsa gbaa bʋ tɔ kʋkwɩɩ‐kʋkwɩɩ, amaa Ɩbwaarɛ kʋlʋn maŋa ɩɩ sa ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ɔlʋn, nɩɩ ɔ sʋ ee sun kusun kʋmaa nɩmʋ.

english_verse: The Spirit has given each of us a special way of serving others.
translation_verse: Amaa Kayaayu mʋ lɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ kaapʋ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ, nɩɩ ɔ sa ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ nkyɛtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ nyɛ kyɛ kʋbʋ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Some of us can speak with wisdom, while others can speak with knowledge, but these gifts come from the same Spirit.
translation_verse: Kayaayu maŋa ɩɩ sa ɔkʋ kanyaasɩn katɔwɛ, nɩɩ ɛɛ sa ɔkʋ mɔɔ kinyi katɔwɛ.

english_verse: To others the Spirit has given great faith or the power to heal the sick
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Kayaayu kʋlʋn maŋa ɩɩ sa ɔkʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii lala, nɩɩ ɛɛ sa ɔkʋ mɔɔ ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa kyɛ alɔ.

english_verse: or the power to work mighty miracles. Some of us are prophets, and some of us recognize when God's Spirit is present. Others can speak different kinds of languages, and still others can tell what these languages mean.
translation_verse: Kayaayu mʋ ɩɩ sa ɔkʋ ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa asɩn kyinkyinsa, nɩɩ ɔkʋ mɔɔ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla mʋ sʋ ɛɛ tɔwɛ, nɩɩ ɔ sa ɔkʋ mɔɔ ɔ bɩɩ n‐yaayu danbɩrasa yɛ alibi. Nɩɩ ɔ sa ɔkʋ mɔɔ katɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ o mee nu kasɛ, nɩɩ ɔ sa ɔkʋ katɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ o mee nu mʋ kasɛ kɩlɛɛ.

english_verse: But it is the Spirit who does all this and decides which gifts to give to each of us. One Body with Many Parts
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ kpini ɩ gyɛ Kayaayu kʋlʋn maŋa kusun sunsa, nɩɩ ɔ sʋ ɩmʋ ɛɛ sa ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ee biti. Kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kʋlʋn yɛ kɩmʋ abaafʋn

english_verse: The body of Christ has many different parts, just as any other body does.
translation_verse: Nyɩmɩsa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ sʋ abaafʋn‐abaafʋn kʋkyɔ, halɩɩ ɩ maa kwɩɩ ɩ kwɩɩ gbaa mʋ, ɩ san ɩ gyɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kʋlʋn. Kanɩn nɩɩ Krisito kʋbʋ gbaa ki du nɩn.

english_verse: Some of us are Jews, and others are Gentiles. Some of us are slaves, and others are free. But God's Spirit baptized each of us and made us part of the body of Christ. Now we each drink from that same Spirit.
translation_verse: Kayaayu kʋlʋn maŋa ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ ba gyee anɛ kpini Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee, ba waa Krisito kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kʋlʋn. Halɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba gyɛ Gyiwu abi, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi, yɛ anyɛ, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ anyɛ gbaa mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ sa Kayaayu kʋlʋn maŋa nɩɩ kɩɩ waa kusun anɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ.

english_verse: Our bodies don't have just one part. They have many parts.
translation_verse: Nyɩmɩsa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ sʋ abaafʋn kʋkwɩɩ‐kʋkwɩɩ kʋkyɔ, man gyɛ kɩbaafʋn kʋlʋn.

english_verse: Suppose a foot says, “I'm not a hand, and so I'm not part of the body.” Wouldn't the foot still belong to the body?
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kɩyaa kan tɔwɛ yɛ, “N man gyɛ kɩbaa, ɩmʋ sʋ n man tii kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ sʋ” mʋ, halɩɩ nɩɩ kɩ kan tɔwɛ kanɩn gbaa mʋ, kɩ san ki tii n‐yɩɩ mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: Or suppose an ear says, “I'm not an eye, and so I'm not part of the body.” Wouldn't the ear still belong to the body?
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kʋsʋ kan tɔwɛ yɛ, “N man gyɛ kinsi, ɩmʋ sʋ n man tii kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ sʋ” mʋ, halɩɩ nɩɩ kɩ kan tɔwɛ kanɩn gbaa mʋ, kɩ san ki tii n‐yɩɩ mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: If our bodies were only an eye, we couldn't hear a thing. And if they were only an ear, we couldn't smell a thing.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kpini kɩ daa kɩ gyɛ kinsi nkʋn nɩn, nɛnɛ nɩɩ kii biti kɩ waa nu asɩn? Nɩɩ kɩ daa kɩ gyɛ kʋsʋ nkʋn nɩn, nɛnɛ nɩɩ kii biti kɩ waa nu ɔsɔn?

english_verse: But God has put all parts of our body together in the way that he decided is best.
translation_verse: Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ taa nyɩmɩsa abaafʋn mʋ kʋkʋmaa nɩmʋ yii kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ sʋ opula mʋ nɩɩ ee biti.

english_verse: A body isn't really a body, unless there is more than one part.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ abaafʋn mʋ kpini ɩ daa ɩ gyɛ kɩbaafʋn kʋlʋn mʋ, naafɔɔ nɛnɛ nɩɩ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ ii biti ɔ baa o du?

english_verse: It takes many parts to make a single body.
translation_verse: Amaa kanan mʋ nɩɩ i du mʋ, abaafʋn‐abaafʋn mʋ ɩ kyɔ, amaa ɩ gyɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kʋlʋn nɩn.

english_verse: That's why the eyes cannot say they don't need the hands. That's also why the head cannot say it doesn't need the feet.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ kinsi kɩ mɛɛ taalɛ tɔwɛ kɩbaa yɛ, “Fʋ nkyɛtɔ man tiri mɛ.” Nɩɩ kumu kɩ mɛɛ taalɛ tɔwɛ ayaa yɛ, “Fanɛ nkyɛtɔ man tiri mɛ.”

english_verse: In fact, we cannot get along without the parts of the body that seem to be the weakest.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fan kɩɩ mʋ, nyɩmɩsa kɩbaafʋn mʋ nɩɩ fan kɩɩ yɛ kɩ man bʋlʋn mʋ, kɩmʋ asɩn i tiri gaa.

english_verse: We take special care to dress up some parts of our bodies. We are modest about our personal parts,
translation_verse: Kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ abaafʋn‐abaafʋn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ bɛɛrɛɛ gaa mʋ, ɩmʋ maŋa nɩɩ an munkura. Nɩɩ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ man bʋrɔn ansi sʋ mʋ, ɩmʋ nɩɩ an kɩɩ sʋ danbɩrasa.

english_verse: but we don't have to be modest about other parts. God put our bodies together in such a way that even the parts that seem the least important are valuable.
translation_verse: Amaa anɛ abaafʋn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋrɔn ansi sʋ mʋ, ɩ man tiri fɛɛ a kɩɩ ɩmʋ sʋ yɛ ɔdan. Ɩbwaarɛ taa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ abaafʋn mʋ nɩn kyaga abaa sʋ, nɩɩ ɔ taa bʋnyaa sa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ bʋnyaa ɩmʋ gbaa‐gbaa ɩmʋ kɩbaa sʋ mʋ,

english_verse: He did this to make all parts of the body work together smoothly, with each part caring about the others.
translation_verse: kɛ nbarɩgɛ tɔ kʋ ɩ man ba kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ tɔ, amaa ɩmʋ kpini ɩɩ kɩɩ abaa sʋ kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

english_verse: If one part of our body hurts, we hurt all over. If one part of our body is honored, the whole body will be happy.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kɩbaafʋn kʋlʋn ii gyii awʋrʋfɔ mʋ abaafʋn mʋ kpini ii gyii awʋrʋfɔ, nɩɩ kɩbaafʋn kʋlʋn kan nyɛ bʋnyaa mʋ, abaafʋn mʋ kpini ii gyii ɔkɔn.

english_verse: Together you are the body of Christ. Each one of you is part of his body.
translation_verse: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ fanɛ kpini ɩ bʋga waa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ Krisito lɛɛ mʋ. Nɩɩ fanɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ gyɛ kɩmʋ kɩbaafʋn kʋ nɩn.

english_verse: First, God chose some people to be apostles and prophets and teachers for the church. But he also chose some to work miracles or heal the sick or help others or be leaders or speak different kinds of languages.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ lɩɩ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ tɔ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ akʋ, nɩɩ ɔ sa bamʋ asunsunsa. Kɩgyankpaasa mʋ ɩ gyɛ Krisito asunpu, nɩɩ kɩnyɔsapʋ mʋ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ atɔwɛpʋ, nɩɩ kɩsasapʋ mʋ ɩ gyɛ abwaarɛsɩn akaapʋpʋ. Nɩɩ ɔ bɩla lɛɛ adangana awaapʋ, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kyɛ alɔ, yɛ asa akyɛtɔpʋ, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kɩɩ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ asɩn tɔ, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɔwɛ ntɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ be mee nu ɩmʋ kasɛ.

english_verse: Not everyone is an apostle. Not everyone is a prophet. Not everyone is a teacher. Not everyone can work miracles.
translation_verse: Bamʋ kpini ba gyɛ Krisito asunpu nɩn abɛɛ? Bamʋ kpini ba gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ atɔwɛpʋ nɩn abɛɛ? Bamʋ kpini ba gyɛ abwaarɛsɩn akaapʋpʋ nɩn abɛɛ? Bamʋ kpini ba gyɛ adangana awaapʋ nɩn abɛɛ?

english_verse: I want you to desire the best gifts. So I will show you a much better way.
translation_verse: Amaa fan taa fanɛ nkɔlɔ kpini biti Kayaayu nkɛɛ mʋ nɩɩ i tiri gaa mʋ. Nɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ n biti n kaapʋ fanɛ ɔkpa mʋ nɩɩ ki tiri kɩ kyɔ ɩnɩmʋ kpini.

english_verse: What if I could speak all languages of humans and even of angels? If I did not love others, I would be nothing more than a noisy gong or a clanging cymbal.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n kan n taalɛ n tɔwɛ asa abɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ ndɛ tɔwɛsa, nɩɩ n man sʋ kebiti sa mɛ bɩrɩsa mʋ, i du nɩn fɛɛ agongon mʋ nɩɩ kɩ sʋ ɔlanba mʋ, abɛɛ kidulonbi mʋ nɩɩ kɩ sʋ ɩlawʋ mʋ.

english_verse: What if I could prophesy and understand all mysteries and all knowledge? And what if I had faith that moved mountains? I would be nothing, unless I loved others.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n kan n sʋ kakɛɛ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩɩ bɔla mɛ sʋ ɛɛ tɔwɛ, nɩɩ n nyi Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn baalasa kpini, nɩɩ n sʋ kinyi, nɩɩ n sʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ nɩɩ n taalɛ kʋsaa abɩɩ gbaa, nɩɩ n man sʋ kebiti bɩrɛ, n man gyɛ sɛhn.

english_verse: What if I gave away all that I owned and let myself be burned alive? I would gain nothing, unless I loved others.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n kan taa mɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ n sʋ kɛɛ atiripu, nɩɩ n kan taa mɛ n‐yɩɩ sa yɛ ba tuwa gbaa, nɩɩ n man sʋ kebiti mʋ, n mɛɛ yɛ n nyɛ tɔnɔ kʋ.

english_verse: rude. Love isn't selfish or quick tempered. It doesn't keep a record of wrongs that others do.
translation_verse: Ɔ mɛɛ waa kɩmʋ nɩɩ kɩ man dagaa, nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ kɩɩ ee biti mʋ nkʋn lɛɛ, nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ nyɛ agbʋ bilen‐bilen, nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ taa ɔkʋ asɩn ɛɛ waa mʋ ɔtɔ tɔ.

english_verse: Love never fails! Everyone who prophesies will stop, and unknown languages will no longer be spoken. All that we know will be forgotten.
translation_verse: Kebiti kɩ man sʋ ɔkaa. Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ kɩbɔla sʋ ɛɛ tɔwɛ, yɛ katɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ be mee nu kasɛ, yɛ kinyi, ɩmʋ kpini ii biti ɩ ba fʋʋ ɔkaa.

english_verse: But what is perfect will someday appear, and what isn't perfect will then disappear.
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ki du kyɛɛkyɛɛ lʋwɛ kan ba mʋ, kɩmʋ nɩɩ kɩ man du kyɛɛkyɛɛ mʋ ii biti ɩ kyʋn.

english_verse: When we were children, we thought and reasoned as children do. But when we grew up, we quit our childish ways.
translation_verse: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n gyɛ kebii mʋ, n tɔwɛ fɛɛ kebii, nɩɩ n fɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ kebii, nɩɩ n gyii ɩmɔɔrɛ fɛɛ kebii. Amaa n maa ba dan mʋ n yɛgɛ abii‐sɩn mʋ.

english_verse: Now all we can see of God is like a cloudy picture in a mirror. Later we will see him face to face. We don't know everything, but then we will, just as God completely understands us.
translation_verse: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ, an wu atɔ nɩn fuu anɛ ansi sʋ, fɛɛ a maa kɩɩ digi mʋ nɩɩ kɩ man kɩɩ tɔ mʋ tɔ, amaa saŋa kʋ an biti a wu kʋtɔ kʋmaa anɛ ansi sʋ danbɩrasa. Nbɩɩnbɩɩ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ n nyi mʋ ɩ gyɛ gbɛrɛɛ, amaa saŋa kʋ n biti n bɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋmaa tɔ lʋwɛ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ nyi mɛ mʋ.

english_verse: For now there are faith, hope, and love. But of these three, the greatest is love.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ i du mʋ, atɔ asá anɩmʋ ɩ bʋ tɔ. Ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii, yɛ tamaa yɛ kebiti. Amaa kebiti ɩ kyɔ ɩmʋ kpini.

english_verse: Love should be your guide. Be eager to have the gifts that come from the Holy Spirit, especially the gift of prophecy.
translation_verse: Fan payɩ ansi buu kebiti ɩkpa, kɛ fan taa fanɛ nkɔlɔ kpini biti Kayaayu tɔ nkɛɛ mʋ, fɔnfɔn Ɩbwaarɛ kɩbɔla nyɩmɩsa sʋ ɛɛ tɔwɛ kakɛɛ mʋ.

english_verse: If you speak languages that others don't know, God will understand what you are saying, though no one else will know what you mean. You will be talking about mysteries that only the Spirit understands.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ ɩɩ tɔwɛ katɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ asa be mee nu ɩmʋ kasɛ mʋ, ɔ mɛɛ tɔwɛ ɛɛ sa asa, amaa ɛɛ tɔwɛ ɛɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ nɩn, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔkʋ mee nu kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ tɔwɛ mʋ kasɛ. Lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ ɔlʋn tɔ mʋ, ɛɛ tɔwɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn baalasa.

english_verse: But when you prophesy, you will be understood, and others will be helped. They will be encouraged and made to feel better.
translation_verse: Amaa ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩɩ bɔla mʋ sʋ ɛɛ tɔwɛ mʋ, ɛɛ tɔwɛ ɛɛ waa asa ɔlʋn tɔ, yɛ aniya tɔ, nɩɩ ee yuula bamʋ nkɔlɔ.

english_verse: By speaking languages that others don't know, you help only yourself. But by prophesying you help everyone in the church.
translation_verse: Ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ tɔwɛ katɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ asa be mee nu kasɛ mʋ, ɩɩ kyɛ mʋ wʋlɛ nkʋn tɔ nɩn, amaa ɔmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩɩ bɔla mʋ sʋ ɛɛ tɔwɛ mʋ, ɩɩ kyɛ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ kpini tɔ nɩn.

english_verse: I am glad for you to speak unknown languages, although I prefer that you would prophesy. In fact, prophesying does much more good than speaking unknown languages, unless someone can help the church by explaining what you mean.
translation_verse: Naafɔɔ n biti fɛɛ fanɛ kpini fan tɔwɛ ntɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ fen mee nu ɩmʋ kasɛ mʋ, amaa kɩmʋ nɩɩ n biti ɩ gyɛ yɛ fan lɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn tɔwɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩɩ bɔla mʋ sʋ ɛɛ tɔwɛ mʋ, kyɔ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ tɔwɛ katɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ asa be mee nu ɩmʋ kasɛ mʋ, amɔɔ ɔkʋ bʋ tɔ nɩɩ ɛɛ taalɛ lɛɛ ɩmʋ kasɛ, kɛ ɩ nyɛ kyɛ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: My friends, what good would it do, if I came and spoke unknown languages to you and didn't explain what I meant? How would I help you, unless I told you what God had shown me or gave you some knowledge or prophecy or teaching?
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, nɩɩ n kan ba fanɛ asɛ n tɔwɛ katɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ fen mee nu ɩmʋ kasɛ mʋ, mɩnɛ tɔnɔ nɩɩ fen biti fan nyɛ lɩɩ ɩmʋ sʋ? Amaa nɩɩ n bɩya fanɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn kɩlɛɛkaapʋ, abɛɛ kanyaasɩn, abɛɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla mɛ sʋ tɔwɛ, abɛɛ asɩn kaapʋsa mʋ, ɩnɩmʋ ii biti ɩ kyɛ fanɛ tɔ.

english_verse: If a bugle call isn't clear, how would you know to get ready for battle?
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kɩnaa kabɩlɛ ɔfʋlɛpʋ mʋ man kan fʋlɛ kabɩlɛ tɩɩ kyɛɛkyɛɛ mʋ, nɛnɛ nɩɩ bee biti ba waa bɩɩ fɛɛ ba kʋʋla kpee kɩnaa?

english_verse: This is how it is when you speak unknown languages. If no one can understand what you are talking about, you will only be talking to the wind.
translation_verse: Kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ ɩ dɛ sa fanɛ. Nɩɩ fan kan fɛn tɔwɛ katɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ asa be mee nu ɩmʋ kasɛ mʋ, nɛnɛ nɩɩ ɔkʋ ii biti ɔ waa bɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ fɛn tɔwɛ? I du nɩn fɛɛ fɛn maa tɔwɛ fɛn sa afuu mʋ.

english_verse: But if I don't understand the language that someone is using, we will be like foreigners to each other.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n mɛɛ kan n nu katɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔkʋ ɩɩ tɔwɛ mɛ asɛ mʋ, ɔ gyɛ ɔfɔ kyilim mɛ asɛ, nɩɩ ngbaa mɛ n gyɛ ɔfɔ kyilim mʋ asɛ.

english_verse: When we speak languages that others don't know, we should pray for the power to explain what we mean.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ tɔwɛ katɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ be mee nu ɩmʋ kasɛ mʋ, ɩ dagaa maa kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɛ ɔ sa mʋ kakɛɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ taalɛ lɛɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ tɔwɛ mʋ kasɛ.

english_verse: For example, if I use an unknown language in my prayers, my spirit prays but my mind is useless.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ nɩɩ n kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ katɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ be mee nu ɩmʋ kasɛ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ mɛ tɔ mʋ ɩɩ kʋlɛ, amaa mɛ nfɛɛrɛ bɩrɛ ɩ man tii sʋ.

english_verse: Then what should I do? There are times when I should pray with my spirit, and times when I should pray with my mind. Sometimes I should sing with my spirit, and at other times I should sing with my mind.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ mɩnɛ nɩɩ n biti n waa? N biti n taa Kayaayu mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ mɛ tɔ mʋ kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ, nɩɩ n biti n taa mɛ nfɛɛrɛ gbaa kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ. N biti n taa Kayaayu mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ mɛ tɔ mʋ bɩɩ ɔlʋn, kɛ n taa mɛ nfɛɛrɛ gbaa bɩɩ ɔlʋn.

english_verse: Suppose some strangers are in your worship service, when you are praising God with your spirit. If they don't understand you, how will they know to say, “Amen”?
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan taa Kayaayu mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ mʋ tɔ ɛɛ fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ katɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ be mee nu ɩmʋ kasɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ, nɛnɛ nɩɩ asa pʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ bamʋ tɔ mʋ bɛɛ waa kyula sʋ yɛ, “Ɩ waa kanɩn”, yɛgɛ be mee nu asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ tɔwɛ mʋ kasɛ?

english_verse: You may be worshiping God in a wonderful way, but no one else will be helped.
translation_verse: Halɩɩ nɩɩ fʋ afwaala mʋ nɩɩ fʋ sʋ fɩɩ sa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ ɩ baa ɩ bʋrɔn nɛnɛ, ɩ mɛɛ yɛ ɩ kyɛ fʋ bɩrɩsa ana mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: I thank God that I speak unknown languages more than any of you.
translation_verse: N fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ fɛɛ n maa tɔwɛ ntɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ asa be mee nu ɩmʋ kasɛ mʋ n kyɔ fanɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ.

english_verse: But words that make sense can help the church. This is why in church I would rather speak five words that make sense than to speak
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ n biti n tɔwɛ Krisito kʋbʋ tɔ mʋ, n tɔwɛ ntɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ asa bee nu kasɛ n sʋ n kaapʋ bamʋ, ɩ kyɔ fɛɛ n maa tɔwɛ ntɔwɛ ngbɩn‐du mʋ nɩɩ asa be mee nu ɩmʋ kasɛ.

english_verse: My friends, stop thinking like children. Think like mature people and be as innocent as tiny babies.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, fan yɛgɛ nfɛɛrɛ kɩ fɛ fɛɛ nbii. Lɩɩ alibi ɩkpa kʋkwɩɩ‐kʋkwɩɩ sʋ mʋ, fan baa fan du fɛɛ nbii, amaa fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ mʋ, fan kaapʋ fɛɛ fan dan.

english_verse: In the Scriptures the Lord says, “I will use strangers who speak unknown languages to talk to my people. They will speak to them in foreign languages, but still my people won't listen to me.”
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ mʋ, Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, “N biti n bɔla asa mʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ ntɔwɛ kʋkwɩɩ‐kʋkwɩɩ mʋ sʋ, yɛ afɔ kyilim ntɔwɛ sʋ n tɔwɛ sa mɛ asa. Halɩɩ ɩmʋ kpini gbaa mʋ, ba mɛɛ yɛ be nu mɛ asɛ.”

english_verse: Languages others don't know may mean something to unbelievers, but not to the Lord's followers. Prophecy, on the other hand, is for followers, not for unbelievers.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ katɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ asa be mee nu ɩmʋ kasɛ mʋ, ɩ man gyɛ sɩnkaala sa akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu, amaa asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla nyɩmɩsa sʋ tɔwɛ mʋ, gyɛ sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba gyɛ akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu, man gyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man kɔɔlɛ gyii.

english_verse: But suppose all of you are prophesying when those unbelievers and outsiders come in. They will realize that they are sinners, and they will want to change their ways because of what you are saying.
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ ɩ kan ba fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩɩ bɔla fanɛ kpini sʋ ɛɛ tɔwɛ asɩn, nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man kɔɔlɛ gyii yɛ asa pʋpwɛ ba ba fanɛ ngyaŋɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ, ii biti ɩ yɛgɛ ba wu bamʋ alibi mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa. Kɛ fanɛ asɩn tɔwɛsa mʋ ii biti i bun bamʋ kʋpwɛ.

english_verse: They will tell what is hidden in their hearts. Then they will kneel down and say to God, “We are certain that you are with these people.” Worship Must Be Orderly
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ ii biti ɩ yɛgɛ bamʋ nkɔlɔ tɔ asiri asɩn libi mʋ ɩ lɩɩ ifuli, kɛ ba muŋa sun Ɩbwaarɛ, bugi bamʋ nnɔ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Ɩbwaarɛ bʋ fanɛ asɛ kesintin.” Krisito abi ngyaŋɛ nbara

english_verse: My friends, when you meet to worship, you must do everything for the good of everyone there. That's how it should be when someone sings or teaches or tells what God has said or speaks an unknown language or explains what the language means.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, mɩnɛ nɩɩ n biti n kaapʋ? Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ n kaapʋ mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, nɩɩ fan kan gyaŋɛ fen sun Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, fan waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kii biti kɩ kyɛ fanɛ kpini tɔ. Akʋtɔ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ sʋ kalʋnbɩɩ, ɔkʋ mɔɔ sʋ kɩkaapʋ, ɔkʋ mɔɔ sʋ kɩlɛɛkaapʋ, nɩɩ ɔkʋ sʋ katɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ asa be mee nu ɩmʋ kasɛ, nɩɩ ɔkʋ mɔɔ sʋ katɔwɛ mʋ kasɛ kɩlɛɛ. Ɩ dagaa fan waa nɩmʋ kpini kɛ ɩ nyɛ kyɛ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: No more than two or three of you should speak unknown languages during the meeting. You must take turns, and someone should always be there to explain what you mean.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan ɛɛ tɔwɛ katɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ asa be mee nu ɩmʋ kasɛ mʋ, ɩ dagaa ba maa gyɛ asa nyɔ abɛɛ asa asá, kɛ ba tɔwɛ kʋkʋlʋn‐kʋkʋlʋn, nɩɩ i tiri fɛɛ ɔkʋ maa lɛɛ asɩn mʋ kasɛ.

english_verse: If no one can explain, you must keep silent in church and speak only to yourself and to God.
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan ɔ man bʋ tɔ ɔ lɛɛ ɩmʋ kasɛ bɩrɛ, ɔtɔwɛpʋ mʋ, ɔ laatɔ ngyaŋɛ mʋ tɔ, kɛ ɔ tɔwɛ sa mʋ n‐yɩɩ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: If someone sitting there receives a message from God, the speaker must stop and let the other person speak.
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan ɔ tɛ ngyaŋɛ mʋ tɔ, nɩɩ ɔ nyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩlɛɛkaapʋ mʋ, ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ yɩlɛ ɛɛ tɔwɛ mʋ, ɔ laatɔ pɔyɩ.

english_verse: Let only one person speak at a time, then all of you will learn something and be encouraged.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ fanɛ kpini fɛn taalɛ tɔwɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩɩ bɔla fanɛ sʋ kɛ fan tɔwɛ mʋ, kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ fanɛ kpini fan bɩɩla kɛ ɩ kyɛ fanɛ tɔ.

english_verse: A prophet should be willing to stop and let someone else speak.
translation_verse: Ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla mʋ sʋ ɛɛ tɔwɛ mʋ, ɛɛ taalɛ kɩtaa mʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ mʋ katɔwɛ mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: God wants everything to be done peacefully and in order. When God's people meet in church,
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ mee biti atɔ i suguti tɔ, amaa ee biti kakyɩna tɔ ɩ baa ɩ sʋ kpee kyɛɛkyɛɛ kayɩɩ‐yuuli tɔ. Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ i du Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ tɔ mʋ,

english_verse: the women must not be allowed to speak. They must keep quiet and listen, as the Law of Moses teaches.
translation_verse: akyɩɩ ba bun bamʋ nnɔ sʋ kʋbʋ kʋmaa tɔ. Ɩ man dɛ ɔkpa fɛɛ ba tɔwɛ. Amaa ba bɩya bamʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ nbara mʋ ɩɩ kaapʋ mʋ.

english_verse: If there is something they want to know, they can ask their husbands when they get home. It is disgraceful for women to speak in church.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba kan ba sʋ asɩn taasɛsa ɩkʋ mʋ, ba tasɛ bamʋ‐kuli ana bamʋ akpaara sʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩ gyɛ ipeeli‐sɩn fɛɛ ɔkyɩɩ maa tɔwɛ Krisito kʋbʋ tɔ.

english_verse: God's message did not start with you people, and you are not the only ones it has reached.
translation_verse: Fanɛ Korinto abi, fen nyi fɛɛ fanɛ asɛ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn mʋ i piili abɛɛ? Abɛɛ fan nyi yɛ fanɛ wʋlɛ nkʋn asɛ nɩɩ ɩ ba?

english_verse: If you think of yourself as a prophet or a spiritual person, you will know I am writing only what the Lord has commanded.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan fɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ ɔ gyɛ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩɩ bɔla mʋ sʋ ɛɛ tɔwɛ, abɛɛ ɔ sʋ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu tɔ kakɛɛ mʋ, ɩ dagaa maa taalɛ bɩɩ fɛɛ, ɩmʋ nɩɩ n kyʋrɔɔ n sa fanɛ falɛ gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ kɔnɔsa.

english_verse: So don't pay attention to anyone who ignores what I am writing.
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ ɔsa maŋa kan kina yɛ o mee nu falɛ asɩn mʋ, fanɛ gbaa fan kina mʋ.

english_verse: But do everything properly and in order.
translation_verse: Amaa fan waa kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ kyɛɛkyɛɛ yɛ kɩmʋ ɔkpa sʋ.

english_verse: You will be saved by this message, if you hold firmly to it. But if you don't, your faith was all for nothing.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fan kan kɩtaa asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ sa fanɛ mʋ tɔ kenken mʋ, ɩɩ bɩya fanɛ kamɔlɩgɛ. Nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ kanɩn bɩrɛ, fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kɩ gyɛ kɩyan.

english_verse: I told you the most important part of the message exactly as it was told to me. This part is: Christ died for our sins, as the Scriptures say.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ n nyɛ, nɩɩ ngbaa mɛ n sʋ n sa fanɛ nɩɩ i tiri ɩ kyɔ ɩmʋ kpini mʋ, ɩ gyɛ yɛ Krisito ba wu lɩɩ anɛ alibi sʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ mʋ.

english_verse: He was buried, and three days later he was raised to life, as the Scriptures say.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba pula mʋ, nɩɩ ɩmʋ kakɛ sasapʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ kyiŋi mʋ ba nkpa tɔ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ mʋ.

english_verse: After this, he appeared to more than five hundred other followers. Most of them are still alive, but some have died.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ kamaa mʋ ɔ lɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ kaapʋ mu abuupu mʋ nɩɩ ba kyɔ alɩfa anuu saŋa kʋlʋn tɔ. Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n kyʋrɔɔ ɩnɩmʋ mʋ bamʋ gaalaagaa ba san ba tɛ nkpa tɔ, nɩɩ bamʋ akʋ mɔɔ ba wu.

english_verse: He also appeared to James, then to all of the apostles.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ kamaa mʋ ɔ lɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ kaapʋ mu‐supu Gyemisi, pɔyɩ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ kaapʋ mu asunpu mʋ kpini.

english_verse: Finally, he appeared to me, even though I am like someone who was born at the wrong time.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ kpini laalaalʋwɛ mʋ, ɔ lɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ kaapʋ ngbaa mɛ, mʋ nɩɩ n du fɛɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ man fʋʋ kɩkʋʋgɛ nɩɩ ba kʋʋgɛ mʋ mʋ.

english_verse: I am the least important of all the apostles. In fact, I caused so much trouble for God's church that I don't even deserve to be called an apostle.
translation_verse: Krisito asunpu mʋ kpini tɔ mʋ, mɛ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ man taa bamʋ tɔ, nɩɩ n man dagaa gbaa ba tɩɩ mɛ Krisito osunpu, lɩɩ fɛɛ n kyɩna nyanla Krisito abuupu mʋ.

english_verse: But God treated me with undeserved grace! He made me what I am, and his grace wasn't wasted. I worked much harder than any of the other apostles, although it was really God's grace at work and not me.
translation_verse: Amaa lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ n du fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n du falɛ, nɩɩ mʋ kabwaala mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ sa mɛ mʋ, man gyɛ kɩyan. Nɩɩ n ba payɩ ansi waa kusun gaa n kyɔ asunpu mʋ kpini, nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ mɛ ɔlʋn sʋ nɩɩ n taalɛ waa kusun mʋ, amaa Ɩbwaarɛ ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ mɛ tɔ mʋ ɩ waa.

english_verse: But it doesn't matter if I preached or if they preached. All of you believed the message just the same. God's People Will Be Raised to Life
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ, nɩɩ mɛ asɛ nɩɩ fan nu asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ nɩn‐oo, nɩɩ bamʋ asɛ nɩɩ fan nu nɩn‐oo, ɩmʋ kpini ɩ gyɛ asɩn kʋlʋn mʋ nɩɩ an tɔwɛ sa fanɛ, nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ ɩmʋ gyii mʋ. Alewupu kikyiŋi lɩɩ lewu tɔ

english_verse: If we preach that Christ was raised from death, how can some of you say the dead will not be raised to life?
translation_verse: Nɩɩ a maa tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ Krisito kyiŋi lɩɩ lewu tɔ mʋ, mɩnɛ ɩ waa sʋ nɩɩ fanɛ akʋ bee gyii ɩmɔɔrɛ, yɛ kelewu‐kyiŋi man bʋ tɔ?

english_verse: If they won't be raised to life, Christ himself wasn't raised to life.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kelewu kyiŋi daa man bʋ tɔ mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ Krisito gbaa man kyiŋi ba nkpa tɔ.

english_verse: And if Christ wasn't raised to life, our message is worthless, and so is your faith.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Krisito man dɩn kyiŋi ba nkpa tɔ mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ anɛ abwaarɛsɩn mʋ nɩɩ an tɔwɛ mʋ, man sʋ kyaarɛ, nɩɩ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ gbaa man sʋ kyaarɛ.

english_verse: If the dead won't be raised to life, we have told lies about God by saying he raised Christ to life, when he really did not.
translation_verse: Naafɔɔ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ kanɩn bɩrɛ mʋ, ii biti ɩ ba fɛɛ an tɩn antɩŋɛsa gyaga Ɩbwaarɛ sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ an tɔwɛ kaapʋ tɔ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kyiŋi Krisito lɩɩ lewu tɔ. Amaa nɩɩ kelewu kyiŋi man bʋ tɔ mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ Ɩbwaarɛ man kyiŋi Yesu lɩɩ lewu tɔ.

english_verse: So if the dead won't be raised to life, Christ wasn't raised to life.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ nɩɩ kelewu kyiŋi man bʋ tɔ mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ Krisito gbaa man dɩn kyiŋi ba nkpa tɔ.

english_verse: Unless Christ was raised to life, your faith is useless, and you are still living in your sins.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ man dɩn kyiŋi Krisito ba nkpa tɔ mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kɩ gyɛ kɩyan, nɩɩ fan san fan bʋ fanɛ alibi tɔ.

english_verse: And those people who died after putting their faith in him are completely lost.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ kanɩn mʋ, ɩɩ kaapʋ nɩn fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba kɔɔlɛ Krisito gyii nɩɩ ba wu mʋ, ba wu muuri.

english_verse: If our hope in Christ is good only for this life, we are worse off than anyone else.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩ kan ɩ gyɛ kasɛ sʋ nfɩɩ nkʋn nɩɩ an sʋ tamaa Krisito tɔ bɩrɛ, anɛ asɩn ɩ sʋ kʋwɛɛ gaa ɩ kyɔ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Just as we will die because of Adam, we will be raised to life because of Christ.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ lewu bɔla nyɩmɩsa kʋlʋn sʋ ba dulinyaa tɔ mʋ, kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ kelewu kyiŋi ba nkpa gbaa tɔ mʋ bɔla nyɩmɩsa kʋlʋn sʋ ba.

english_verse: But we must each wait our turn. Christ was the first to be raised to life, and his people will be raised to life when he returns.
translation_verse: Amaa falɛ nɩɩ kelewu kyiŋi mʋ ii biti ɩ waa. Krisito ɩ wʋla gyankpaa kyiŋi lɩɩ lewu tɔ ba nkpa tɔ. Nɩɩ ɔ kan bwii ba mʋ, ee biti o kyiŋi bamʋ nɩɩ ba gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Then after Christ has destroyed all powers and forces, the end will come, and he will give the kingdom to God the Father.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ kamaa mʋ, kɛ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ ɩ ba. Kanɩn saŋa mʋ, Krisito ii biti o nyita kɩbɩlɩsa‐kigyii kʋmaa nɩmʋ yɛ alʋlʋnpʋ kʋmaa nɩmʋ yɛ ɔlʋn kʋmaa nɩmʋ, kɛ ɔ taa kuwura‐gyii mʋ waa mʋ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩbaa tɔ.

english_verse: and the last enemy he destroys will be death.
translation_verse: Laalaalʋwɛ ɔdʋn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ nyita mʋ ɩ gyɛ lewu.

english_verse: After everything is under the power of God's Son, he will put himself under the power of God, who put everything under his Son's power. Then God will mean everything to everyone.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kan ba taa kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ waa Krisito kasɛ mʋ, Obii mʋ gbaa‐gbaa ii biti ɔ taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ waa mʋ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa kʋtɔ kʋmaa waa mʋ kasɛ mʋ, abaa tɔ. Kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ o be gyii kuwura kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ sʋ.

english_verse: If the dead are not going to be raised to life, what will people do who are being baptized for them? Why are they being baptized for those dead people?
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kelewu kyiŋi man bʋ tɔ mʋ, mɩnɛ ɩ waa sʋ nɩɩ akʋ bee biti fɛɛ be gyee bamʋ Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba tee wu mʋ? Nɩɩ alewupu ba mɛɛ yɛ be kyiŋi ba nkpa tɔ mʋ, ɩ waa nɛnɛ sʋ nɩɩ akʋ bee biti fɛɛ be gyee bamʋ Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba wu mʋ?

english_verse: And why do we always risk our lives
translation_verse: Nɩɩ anɛɛnɛ bɩrɛ, mɩnɛ ɩ waa sʋ nɩɩ an taga apʋ saŋa kʋmaa kanɩn?

english_verse: and face death every day? The pride that I have in you because of Christ Jesus our Lord is what makes me say this.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, n tɔwɛ fanɛ kesintin tɔ fɛɛ n gyaŋɛ lewu asɩn saŋa kʋmaa. Nɩɩ n kaapʋ mɛ n‐yɩɩ fanɛ sʋ, fɛɛ fan maa gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito abuupu mʋ sʋ mʋ, ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ kanɩn.

english_verse: Don't fool yourselves. Bad friends will destroy you.
translation_verse: Fan man kan yɛgɛ ba pɩna fanɛ. “Asa libi tɔ kɩbʋga, ii nyita nyɩmɩsa danbɩrasa nfɛɛrɛ.”

english_verse: Be sensible and stop sinning. You should be embarrassed that some people still don't know about God. What Our Bodies Will Be Like
translation_verse: Fan bwii fɛ nfɛɛrɛ danbɩrasa, kɛ fan yɛgɛ alibi kɩwaa. N tɔwɛ fanɛ ɩnɩmʋ nɩn n gyila fanɛ ipeeli fɛɛ, akʋ ba bʋ fanɛ tɔ yɛgɛ ba man nyi Ɩbwaarɛ. Kelewu‐kyiŋi kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ

english_verse: Some of you have asked, “How will the dead be raised to life? What kind of bodies will they have?”
translation_verse: Amaa ɔkʋ ii biti ɔ taasɛ yɛ, “Nɛnɛ nɩɩ alewupu bee biti ba kyiŋi ba nkpa tɔ? Nɩɩ mɩnɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ nɩɩ bee biti ba baa ba sʋ?”

english_verse: Don't be foolish. A seed must die before it can sprout from the ground.
translation_verse: Mɩnɛ kimelensi asɩn taasɛsa ndee? Fu mee nyi fɛɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ fu duu kasɛ tɔ mʋ, kɩ mɛɛ yɛ kɩ kɔyɩ, amɔɔ ki wu pɔyɩ.

english_verse: This is because God gives everything the kind of body he wants it to have.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ sa oyu kʋmaa nɩmʋ kɩmʋ n‐yɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ee biti. Nɩɩ ɔ sa kibi kʋmaa nɩmʋ kɩmʋ gbaa‐gbaa kɩmʋ n‐yɩɩ kudubi.

english_verse: People, animals, birds, and fish are each made of flesh, but none of them are alike.
translation_verse: N‐yɩɩ wʋlɛ kpini man gyɛ kʋkʋlʋn. Nyɩmɩsa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kwɩɩ nɩɩ atɔbwaaya lɛɛ gbaa kwɩɩ. Nbwiibi lɛɛ kwɩɩ nɩɩ ɩkɩn lɛɛ gbaa kwɩɩ.

english_verse: Everything in the heavens has a body, and so does everything on earth. But each one is very different from all the others.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ sʋsʋ n‐yɩɩ wʋlɛ atɔ ɩ bʋ tɔ, nɩɩ kasɛ sʋ n‐yɩɩ wʋlɛ atɔ gbaa bʋ tɔ. Nɩɩ sʋsʋ n‐yɩɩ wʋlɛ bʋnyaa mʋ kwɩɩ, nɩɩ kasɛ sʋ n‐yɩɩ wʋlɛ bʋnyaa gbaa kwɩɩ.

english_verse: The sun isn't like the moon, the moon isn't like the stars, and each star is different.
translation_verse: Kyɔwɛ kɩkɩɩ tɔ kwɩɩ, nɩɩ ɔbwaayɩ kɩkɩɩ tɔ kwɩɩ, nɩɩ akyikpebi gbaa kɩkɩɩ tɔ kwɩɩ. Nɩɩ kikyikpebi kʋmaa nɩmʋ sʋ kɩmʋ gbaa‐gbaa kɩkɩɩ tɔ.

english_verse: That's how it will be when our bodies are raised to life. These bodies will die, but the bodies that are raised will live forever.
translation_verse: Kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ kelewu kyiŋi mʋ ii biti ɩ ba waa. N‐yɩɩ wʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ bee pula mʋ ɩɩ gyɔɔ nɩn, amaa n‐yɩɩ pʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti o kyiŋi lɩɩ lewu tɔ mʋ bɩrɛ mɛɛ yɛ ɩ gyɔɔ.

english_verse: The first man was named Adam, and the Scriptures tell us that he was a living person. But Jesus, who may be called the last Adam, is a life-giving spirit.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Adam gyankpaasa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tʋʋ mʋ ba biliŋi nyɩmɩsa kɩɩsa.” Amaa Yesu Krisito mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ yɛ Adam laalaalʋwɛ mʋ, gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ sa nkpa.

english_verse: We see that the one with a spiritual body did not come first. He came after the one who had a physical body.
translation_verse: Man gyɛ kayaayu tɔ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ ɩ gyankpaa ba. Amaa dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ ɩ gyankpaa ba, pɔyɩ nɩɩ kayaayu tɔ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ ba.

english_verse: The first man was made from the dust of the earth, but the second man came from heaven.
translation_verse: Adam gyankpaasa mʋ lɩɩ kasɛ sʋ nɩn, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩsɛ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa pɔyɩ mʋ. Amaa Adam nyɔsapʋ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Krisito mʋ, lɩɩ sʋsʋ nɩn.

english_verse: Everyone on earth has a body like the body of the one who was made from the dust of the earth. And everyone in heaven has a body like the body of the one who came from heaven.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Adam mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɩɩ kasɛ sʋ du mʋ, kanɩn nɩɩ kasɛ sʋ asa gbaa ba du. Nɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Adam mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɩɩ sʋsʋ du mʋ, kanɩn nɩɩ mʋ asa gbaa ba du nɩn.

english_verse: Just as we are like the one who was made out of earth, we will be like the one who came from heaven.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an duli kasɛ sʋ nyɩmɩsa mʋ, kanɩn sʋ an biti an baa an duli nyɩmɩsa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɩɩ sʋsʋ mʋ gbaa.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to know that our bodies of flesh and blood will decay. This means they cannot share in God's kingdom, which lasts forever.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana asɩn mʋ nɩɩ n biti fɛn bɩɩ mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ sʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ yɛ nkalan mʋ, mɛɛ taalɛ nyɛ loo Ɩbwaarɛ kuwura‐gyii mʋ tɔ. Nɩɩ anɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ gyɔɔ mʋ, mɛɛ taalɛ kyɩna kakpaa.

english_verse: I will explain a mystery to you. Not every one of us will die, but we will all be changed.
translation_verse: Fan nu asɩn baalasa nɩmʋ danbɩrasa. Man gyɛ anɛ kpini ii biti a wu. Amaa saŋa kʋ tɔ mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ kyɛɛgɛ anɛ Krisito abuupu mʋ keduli yɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ.

english_verse: It will happen suddenly, quicker than the blink of an eye. At the sound of the last trumpet the dead will be raised. We will all be changed, so we will never die again.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ kpini ii biti ɩ waa opula tɔ fɛɛ ansi sʋ kɩŋabɛɛ, saŋa mʋ nɩɩ kabɩlɛ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ kan fʋlɛ mʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ kabɩlɛ mʋ ii biti o su, nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba wu mʋ, bee biti ba kyiŋi ba nkpa tɔ, nɩɩ ba mɛɛ yɛ ba bɩla wu. Nɩɩ anɛ mʋ nɩɩ an san an tɛ nkpa tɔ mʋ, an biti a kyɛɛgɛ.

english_verse: The bodies we now have are weak and can die. But they will be changed into bodies that are eternal. Then the Scriptures will come true, “Death has lost the battle!
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ ɩ kan ba fɛɛ, kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ gyɔɔ mʋ, kyɛɛgɛ waa kɩmʋ nɩɩ kɩ mɛɛ gyɔɔ, nɩɩ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ kii wu mʋ, kyɛɛgɛ waa kɩmʋ nɩɩ ki mee wu mʋ, tʋtɔ nɩɩ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ii biti ɩ ba kesintin tɔ. Ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, “Ba kɔ gyii lewu sʋ muuri mʋ.”

english_verse: Sin is what gives death its sting, and the Law is the power behind sin.
translation_verse: Ɔgyʋʋ mʋ nɩɩ lewu sʋ ee yii mʋ ɩ gyɛ alibi, nɩɩ alibi mɔɔ nyɛ ɩmʋ ɔlʋn lɩɩ nbara tɔ.

english_verse: But thank God for letting our Lord Jesus Christ give us the victory!
translation_verse: Amaa afwaala ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ, fɛɛ maa bɔla anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito sʋ nɩɩ ɔ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an kɔ lɩɩ lewu ɔlʋn tɔ.

english_verse: My dear friends, stand firm and don't be shaken. Always keep busy working for the Lord. You know that everything you do for him is worthwhile.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu, fan yɩla tɔ kenken, kɛ fan man yɛgɛ kʋtɔ kʋ ki gyingyen fanɛ. Fan payɩ ansi waa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ kusun mʋ saŋa kʋmaa. Lɩɩ fɛɛ fen nyi fɛɛ kusun mʋ nɩɩ fen sun Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ tɔ mʋ, ɩ mɛɛ yɛ ɩ waa kɩyan.

english_verse: When you collect money for God's people, I want you to do exactly what I told the churches in Galatia to do.
translation_verse: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ lɩɩ afulee mʋ nɩɩ fɛn tʋʋ fan naa sa Krisito abi mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ Gyerusalem mʋ, fan waa fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ Galati ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ mʋ.

english_verse: That is, each Sunday each of you must put aside part of what you have earned. If you do this, you won't have to take up a collection when I come.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, Gyiwu abi kakɛ gyankpaasa kʋmaa mʋ, fanɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ɔ lɛɛ mu afulee mʋ nɩɩ ɔ nyɛ mʋ tɔ ɩkʋ yɩla, fan man gyoo naa fʋʋ kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ n biti n ba pɔyɩ kɛ fan lan lɛɛ.

english_verse: Choose some followers to take the money to Jerusalem. I will send them on with the money and with letters which show that you approve of them.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n ba mʋ, kɛ fan taa tʋʋtʋʋ mʋ sa asa mʋ nɩɩ fan lɛɛ mʋ, kɛ n kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ kaapʋ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba gyɛ, kɛ n sun bamʋ, kɛ ba taa fanɛ tʋʋtʋʋ mʋ kpee Gyerusalem kadɛ tɔ.

english_verse: If you think I should go along, they can go with me. Paul's Travel Plans
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ ɩ kan ba fɛɛ ngbaa mɛ n kpee mʋ, kɛ ba buu mɛ kɛ a kpee. Atɔ mʋ nɩɩ Pɔɔlɩ ii biti ɔ waa

english_verse: and visit with you for a while. I may even stay all winter, so that you can help me on my way to wherever I will be going next.
translation_verse: Akʋtɔ n biti n kyɩna fanɛ asɛ gbɛrɛɛ, abɛɛ gbangban ii biti o tu mɛ fanɛ asɛ, kɛ fɛn taalɛ sun mɛ ɔkpa kpee katɩn kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ n biti n kpee.

english_verse: If the Lord lets me, I would rather come later for a longer visit than to stop off now for only a short visit.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ bɩrɛ, n mee biti fɛɛ n dan wu fanɛ kɛ n ŋmayɩ sʋ kyʋn. Nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kan kyula mʋ, n biti fɛɛ n gyii nkɛ gbɛrɛɛ kʋ fanɛ asɛ.

english_verse: because there is a wonderful opportunity for me to do some work here. But there are also many people who are against me.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ bugi ɔkpa lala kʋ sa mɛ, kɛ n nyɛ waa kusun mʋ, amaa bamʋ nɩɩ bee kisi mɛ mʋ ba kyɔ nfɩɩ.

english_verse: When Timothy arrives, give him a friendly welcome. He is doing the Lord's work, just as I am.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Timoti kan ba fanɛ asɛ mʋ, fan kɩtaa mʋ danbɩrasa kɛ mu ansi i gyii. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ee sun Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu kusun mʋ nɩn, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ngbaa mɛ n sun falɛ.

english_verse: Don't let anyone mistreat him. I am looking for him to return to me together with the other followers. So when he leaves, send him off with your blessings.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ ɔ man kan ŋmanyan mʋ, amaa fan sun mʋ ɔkpa kayɩɩ yuuli tɔ, kɛ o bwii ba tu mɛ nfɩɩ. N kɩɩ mʋ yɛ anɛ bɩrɩsa ana Krisito abuupu mʋ ɔkpa.

english_verse: I have tried hard to get our friend Apollos to visit you with the other followers. He doesn't want to come just now, but he will come when he can. Personal Concerns and Greetings
translation_verse: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ lɩɩ anɛ bɩrɩsa Apolosi sʋ mʋ, n payɩ ansi waa mʋ aniya tɔ fɛɛ, o tii anɛ bɩrɩsa ana Krisito abuupu mʋ sʋ, kɛ ba ba bɔɔ fanɛ sʋ. Ɔ man pɩɩ yɩlɛ kyula yɛ ee biti ɔ ba nbɩɩnbɩɩ, amaa nɩɩ ɔ kan nyɛ ɔkpa mʋ, ee biti ɔ ba.

english_verse: Keep alert. Be firm in your faith. Stay brave and strong.
translation_verse: Fan baa fan da sʋ, kɛ fan yɩlɛ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ kenken, kɛ fan yɩlɛ kɩnyɩn tɔ, kɛ fan nyɛ ɔlʋn.

english_verse: Show love in everything you do.
translation_verse: Fan taa kebiti sun fanɛ kusun kʋmaa nɩmʋ.

english_verse: You know that Stephanas and his family were the first in Achaia to have faith in the Lord. They have done all they can for God's people. My friends, I ask you
translation_verse: Fen nyi fɛɛ Sitefana maa mʋ kɩkpaara sʋ abi, ɩ gyɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba gyankpaa kɔɔlɛ Krisito gyii Akiya ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ, nɩɩ ba taa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ sa bɛɛ kyɛ abuupu mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: to obey leaders like them and to do the same for all others who work hard with you.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, n kʋlɛ fanɛ nɩn fɛɛ fan bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa kanɩn asa maŋa, yɛ ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa kanɩn kusun maŋa mʋ.

english_verse: They made me feel much better, just as they made you feel better. You should appreciate people like them.
translation_verse: Ba yɛgɛ nɩɩ mɛ kɔkɔlɔ ki yuuli mɛ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba waa sa fanɛ gbaa fanɛ mʋ. Falɛ asa ɩ dagaa fan maa lɛɛ bamʋ kɩtɩɩ. Laalaalʋwɛ fwaala

english_verse: Greetings from the churches in Asia. Aquila and Priscilla, together with the church that meets in their house, send greetings in the name of the Lord.
translation_verse: Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ Asiya ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ mʋ kpini bɛɛ fwaala fanɛ. Akwila maa Prisila yɛ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ gyaŋɛ bamʋ kɩkpaara sʋ mʋ, bɛɛ fwaala fanɛ gaa lɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ kɩtɩɩ tɔ sʋ.

english_verse: All the Lord's followers send their greetings. Give each other a warm greeting.
translation_verse: Anɛ bɩrɩsa ana akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ nfɩɩ mʋ kpini, bɛɛ fwaala fanɛ. Fan taa kibiri abaa tɔ fwaala abaa lɩɩ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ.

english_verse: I am signing this letter myself: PAUL.
translation_verse: Mɛ Pɔɔlɩ gbaa‐gbaa ɩ taa mɛ kɩbaa kyʋrɔɔ afwaala ɩnɩmʋ n sa fanɛ.

english_verse: I pray that God will put a curse on everyone who doesn't love the Lord. And may the Lord come soon.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o mee biti anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ tɔwɛ mʋ kɔnɔ. “Maranata” kɩmʋ kasɛ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, “Anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ, ba!”

english_verse: I pray the Lord Jesus will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito ɔ bwaala fanɛ.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Jesus Christ, and from Timothy, who is also a follower. To God's church in Corinth and to all of God's people in Achaia.
translation_verse: Ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ lɩɩ mɛ, Pɔɔlɩ mʋ nɩɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti sʋ nɩɩ n ba waa Krisito Yesu Osunpu mʋ, yɛ anɛ bɩrɩsa danbɩrasa Timoti asɛ. An kyʋrɔɔ an sʋ an sa fanɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ fan bʋ Korinto kadɛ tɔ, yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɔŋɔ bamʋ yɩla sa mʋ n‐yɩɩ, nɩɩ ba bʋ Akiya ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ mʋ kpini.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Paul Gives Thanks
translation_verse: Anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito ba bwaala fanɛ, kɛ ba sa fanɛ kayɩɩ yuuli. Ɩbwaarɛ sʋ kɔkɔlɔ yuuli sa anɛ

english_verse: Praise God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ! The Father is a merciful God, who always gives us comfort.
translation_verse: Fan yɛgɛ a fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ, anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito mʋ‐Sɛ. Nɩɩ mʋ ɩ gyɛ kʋwɛɛ kuwu kumu yɛ kɔkɔlɔ yuuli wuya.

english_verse: He comforts us when we are in trouble, so that we can share this same comfort with others in trouble.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ee yuula anɛ nkɔlɔ lɩɩ anɛ awʋrʋfɔ tɔ, kɛ anɛ gbaa anɛ a taalɛ taa kɔkɔlɔ yuuli mʋ nɩɩ an nyɛ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ mʋ yuula bamʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ awʋrʋfɔ kʋmaa tɔ mʋ nkɔlɔ.

english_verse: We share in the terrible sufferings of Christ, but also in the wonderful comfort he gives.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an gyii Yesu Krisito awʋrʋfɔ damantɛ gbaa mʋ, kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ kɔkɔlɔ yuuli damantɛ gbaa bɔla Krisito sʋ ba anɛ sʋ.

english_verse: We suffer in the hope that you will be comforted and saved. And because we are comforted, you will also be comforted, as you patiently endure suffering like ours.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ an kan gyii awʋrʋfɔ mʋ, ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ fan nyɛ nkɔlɔ yuuli yɛ kamɔlɩgɛ. Nɩɩ an kan nyɛ kɔkɔlɔ yuuli lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ mʋ, fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fɛn nyɛ kɔkɔlɔ yuuli mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ bɩya fanɛ ɔlʋn, yɛ kenyiita kɛ fan taalɛ yɩlɛ tɔ gyii awʋrʋfɔ kʋlʋn mʋ nɩɩ anɛ gbaa anɛ an gyii mʋ.

english_verse: You never disappoint us. You suffered as much as we did, and we know that you will be comforted as we were.
translation_verse: Anɛ tamaa mʋ nɩɩ an sʋ fanɛ sʋ mʋ bʋlʋn, nɩɩ an nyi fɛɛ fan maa gyii awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ an gyii mʋ, kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ fen biti fan nyɛ kɔkɔlɔ yuuli fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an nyɛ mʋ.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to know what a hard time we had in Asia. Our sufferings were so horrible and so unbearable that death seemed certain.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, an mɛɛ yɛ a taa awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ an gyii Asiya ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ baala fanɛ sʋ. Awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ an wu mʋ ɩ nyan anɛ naa ban sʋ halɩɩ an man bɩla an sʋ tamaa anɛ nkpa sʋ.

english_verse: In fact, we felt sure we were going to die. But this made us stop trusting in ourselves and start trusting God, who raises the dead to life.
translation_verse: Kesintin tɔ, anɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ mʋ, an nyi fɛɛ ba bun anɛ lewu kʋpwɛ. Amaa ɩnɩmʋ ɩ waa nɩn kɛ a man taa anɛ n‐yɩɩ tʋʋ anɛ gbaa‐gbaa anɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ, amɔɔ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ee kyiŋi alewupu mʋ.

english_verse: God saved us from the threat of death, and we are sure that he will do it again and again.
translation_verse: Mʋ ɩ lɛɛ anɛ lɩɩ falɛ alewu‐sɩn nɩmʋ tɔ, nɩɩ ɔ maa sʋ ɛɛ lɛɛ anɛ, nɩɩ an sʋ tamaa fɛɛ ee biti ɔ kyaga sʋ lɛɛ anɛ,

english_verse: Please help us by praying for us. Then many people will give thanks for the blessings we receive in answer to all these prayers. Paul's Change of Plans
translation_verse: fɛɛ fan maa kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ fɛn kyɛ anɛ tɔ falɛ. Kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ Ɩbwaarɛ o nu kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ asa gaalaagaa bɛɛ kʋlɛ bɛɛ sa anɛ mʋ, kɛ ɔ waa anɛ kusee, kɛ ba taa afwaala sa mʋ lɩɩ anɛ sʋ. Pɔɔlɩ kyɛɛgɛ mʋ nfɛɛrɛ mʋ nɩɩ o ŋmina yɩla mʋ

english_verse: We can be proud of our clear conscience. We have always lived honestly and sincerely, especially when we were with you. And we were guided by God's gift of undeserved grace instead of by the wisdom of this world.
translation_verse: Kʋtɔ kʋlʋn mʋ sʋ nɩɩ an kaapʋ anɛ n‐yɩɩ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, anɛ nfɛɛrɛ ɩɩ kaapʋ anɛ yɛ, kesintin yɛ kɔkɔlɔ fufuli mʋ nɩɩ ɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ, nɩɩ an taa kyɩna dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ, fɔnfɔn lɩɩ anaa fanɛ kakyɩna tɔ. Man gyɛ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ kanyaasɩn nɩɩ an taa waa ɩnɩmʋ, amaa Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ taa bwaala anɛ.

english_verse: I am not writing anything you cannot read and understand. I hope you will understand it completely,
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ n mɛɛ kyʋrɔɔ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ fɛn mɛɛ taalɛ karagɛ abɛɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ fɛn mɛɛ taalɛ nu kɩmʋ kasɛ. Nɩɩ n sʋ tamaa,

english_verse: I was so sure of your pride in us that I had planned to visit you first of all. In this way you would have the blessing of two visits from me—
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ n maa sʋ ɩnɩmʋ kpini tamaa sʋ mʋ, n ŋmina yɩla fɛɛ n biti n daa kɩba bɔɔ fanɛ sʋ, saamʋ kɛ fan nyɛ tɔnɔ ɩlɩɩ ɩnyɔ.

english_verse: Do you think I couldn't make up my mind about what to do? Or do I seem like someone who says “Yes” or “No” simply to please others?
translation_verse: N maa ŋmina yɩla yɛ n biti n ba fanɛ asɛ, nɩɩ n man taalɛ ba mʋ, ɩɩ kaapʋ nɩn fɛɛ n gyɛ dulinyaa tɔ nnɔ nnyɔ‐nnyɔ wuya ana mʋ nɩɩ bee kyula yɛ “Ɛɛhn”, kɛ opula maŋa tɔ ba bwii kyɛɛgɛ kɔnɔ tɔwɛ yɛ “ayee” abɛɛ?

english_verse: God can be trusted, and so can I, when I say our answer to you has always been “Yes” and never “No.”
translation_verse: Amaa fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ gyɛ kesintin wuya falɛ mʋ, kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ anɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ an tɔwɛ an sa fanɛ mʋ, man gyɛ nnɔ nnyɔ‐nnyɔ asɩn.

english_verse: This is because Jesus Christ the Son of God is always “Yes” and never “No.” And he is the one Silas, Timothy, and I told you about.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐Bii Yesu Krisito asɩn mʋ nɩɩ n maa Silasi yɛ Timoti an tɔwɛ sa fanɛ mʋ, asɩn mʋ ɩ man kyɩna ɩ gyɛ “nnɔ nnyɔ‐nnyɔ,” amaa mʋ asɩn kpini ɩ gyɛ “kʋkʋlʋn nɩn”.

english_verse: Christ says “Yes” to all God's promises. This is why we have Christ to say “Amen” for us to the glory of God.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ sa mʋ kpini ɩ ba tɔ lɩɩ Yesu Krisito sʋ. Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ an bʋnyaa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, an bɔla Yesu sʋ an kyula yɛ “Amen.”

english_verse: And so God makes it possible for you and us to stand firmly together with Christ. God is also the one who chose us
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ yɛgɛ nɩɩ anaa fanɛ kpini an nyɛ ɔlʋn yɩlɛ Krisito tɔ, nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ anɛ yɩla sa mʋ n‐yɩɩ,

english_verse: God is my witness that I stayed away from Corinth, just to keep from being hard on you.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ gyɛ mi kesintin ogyipu fɛɛ, n maa mee biti fɛɛ n ba bɩɩtɛ fanɛ asʋ sʋ mʋ, kanɩn sʋ nɩɩ n man bɩla ba fanɛ asɛ Korinto kadɛ tɔ.

english_verse: I have decided not to make my next visit with you so painful.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ n waa mɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ, n man bɩla yɛ n bwii ba fanɛ asɛ, kɛ n nyita fanɛ nkɔlɔ.

english_verse: If I make you feel bad, who would be left to cheer me up, except the people I had made to feel bad?
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n kan yɛgɛ nɩɩ fanɛ nkɔlɔ i nyita fanɛ mʋ, anɩmʋ ii biti ɔ yɛgɛ mi ansi i gyii? Amɔɔ man gyɛ fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ n nyita fanɛ nkɔlɔ mʋ abɛɛ?

english_verse: The reason I want to be happy is to make you happy. I wrote as I did because I didn't want to visit you and be made to feel bad, when you should make me feel happy.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ nɩɩ n daa kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ maŋa ba sa fanɛ. N mee biti n maa ba fanɛ asɛ, kɛ fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ naafɔɔ fen biti fan yɛgɛ mi ansi i gyii mʋ, fan nyita mɛ kɔkɔlɔ. Nɩɩ n kɔɔlɛ fanɛ kpini gyii mɛ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ fɛɛ, nɩɩ mi ansi i gyii mʋ, fanɛ gbaa fanɛ ansi ii biti i gyii.

english_verse: At the time I wrote, I was suffering terribly. My eyes were full of tears, and my heart was broken. But I didn't want to make you feel bad. I only wanted to let you know how much I cared for you. Forgiveness
translation_verse: Saŋa maŋa, tɔɔrɔɔ lala yɛ kɔkɔlɔ nyita yɛ ansikyu nɩɩ n taa kyʋrɔɔ fanɛ ɔwʋlɛ mʋ. Man gyɛ yɛ n biti fɛɛ n nyita fanɛ nkɔlɔ nɩn. Amaa n biti yɛ fan bɩɩ mi kebiti lala mʋ nɩɩ n sʋ sa fanɛ mʋ. Alibi kɩtaakɛɛ

english_verse: I don't want to be hard on you. But if one of you has made someone feel bad, I am not really the one who has been made to feel bad. Some of you are the ones.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan nyita ɔsa kʋ kɔkɔlɔ mʋ, man gyɛ mɛ kɔkɔlɔ nɩɩ o nyita, ɔkpa kʋ sʋ mʋ fanɛ kpini nkɔlɔ. Nɩɩ n mee biti n maa tɔwɛ asɩn mʋ kyʋn sʋ.

english_verse: Most of you have already pointed out the wrong that person did, and this is punishment enough for what was done.
translation_verse: Kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ lɩɩ fanɛ gaalaagaa asɛ ba mʋ sʋ mʋ, kʋkwɛ mʋ.

english_verse: When people sin, you should forgive and comfort them, so they won't give up in despair.
translation_verse: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ mʋ, fan taa mu alibi kɛɛ mʋ, kɛ fan tɔwɛ yuula mʋ kɔkɔlɔ, kɛ mʋ kɔkɔlɔ o man nyita mʋ kyʋn sʋ.

english_verse: You should make them sure of your love for them.
translation_verse: N kʋlɛ fanɛ nɩn, fan yɛgɛ ɔ bɩɩ fɛɛ fan san fan sʋ kebiti sa mʋ.

english_verse: I also wrote because I wanted to test you and find out if you would follow my instructions.
translation_verse: Kʋtɔ mʋ sʋ nɩɩ n daa kyʋrɔɔ fanɛ ɔwʋlɛ maŋa ɩ gyɛ yɛ, n waa fanɛ nɩn kɩɩ, kɛ n wu kanan mʋ nɩɩ fen nu fɛn sa mɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa tɔ.

english_verse: I will forgive anyone you forgive. Yes, for your sake and with Christ as my witness, I have forgiven whatever needed to be forgiven.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan waa alibi, nɩɩ fan taa kɛɛ mʋ mʋ, ngbaa mɛ n taa kɛɛ mʋ. Nɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋ kɩ kyɩna kɩ bʋ tɔ nɩɩ i tiri fɛɛ n taa kɛɛ gbaa mʋ, n waa kanɩn Krisito ansi tɔ lɩɩ fanɛ sʋ.

english_verse: I have done this to keep Satan from getting the better of us. We all know what goes on in his mind.
translation_verse: Saamʋ Sɩtaanɛ mɛɛ nyɛ ɔkpa taalɛ anɛ tɔ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ an nyi mʋ ɩkpa golon‐golon mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ ɔ naa mʋ. Katɔwɛ kyula pʋpwɛ mʋ kusun awaapʋ

english_verse: When I went to Troas to preach the good news about Christ, I found that the Lord had already prepared the way.
translation_verse: N maa kpee Trowa kadɛ tɔ, naa tɔwɛ Krisito asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ, n wu fɛɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ bugi ɔkpa sa mɛ.

english_verse: But I was worried when I didn't find my friend Titus there. So I left the other followers and went on to Macedonia.
translation_verse: Amaa mɛ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ man dɛ mɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ n man wu mɛ bɩrɩsa Titusi tʋtɔ. Ɩmʋ sʋ n kala bamʋ, nɩɩ n yii sʋ kpee Masedoniya ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ.

english_verse: I am grateful that God always makes it possible for Christ to lead us to victory. God also helps us spread the knowledge about Christ everywhere, and this knowledge is like the smell of perfume.
translation_verse: Amaa an fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ. Lɩɩ a maa waa kʋkʋlʋn yɛ Krisito sʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ gyankpaa anɛ saŋa kʋmaa fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba kɔ nyɛ sa Krisito. Nɩɩ ɔ bɔla anɛ sʋ yaasɛ Krisito kinyi mʋ kpee katɩn kʋmaa fɛɛ tuulaale liifensa.

english_verse: In fact, God thinks of us as a perfume that brings Christ to everyone. For people who are being saved, this perfume has a sweet smell and leads them to a better life. But for people who are lost, it has a bad smell and leads them to a horrible death. No one really has what it takes to do this work.
translation_verse: Bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ fɔyɩ asɛ mʋ, Krisito kinyi mʋ gyɛ ɔsɔn mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ bɩya lewu, nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ mʋ, kɩ gyɛ ofen mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ bɩya nkpa. Nɩɩ anɩmʋ ɩ dagaa kusun nɩmʋ kɩwaa?

english_verse: A lot of people try to get rich from preaching God's message. But we are God's sincere messengers, and by the power of Christ we speak our message with God as our witness.
translation_verse: A man du fɛɛ asa gaalaagaa mʋ nɩɩ ba man sʋ bɛɛrɛɛ sa asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ, nɩɩ bɛɛ sʋ bee gyii yawʋ bee biti tɔnɔ. Amaa lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ maa sun anɛ sʋ mʋ, an taa kɔkɔlɔ fuuli tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ fɛɛ Krisito ayaafɔlɛ.

english_verse: Are we once again bragging about ourselves? Do we need letters to you or from you to tell others about us? Some people do need letters telling about them.
translation_verse: An bɩla an biti a lɛɛ anɛ n‐yɩɩ kaapʋ fanɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an du nɩn abɛɛ? Abɛɛ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ anɛ gbaa anɛ, a nyɛ ɔwʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ lɛɛ anɛ ɩɩ kaapʋ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an du bɩya fanɛ, abɛɛ a nyɛ lɩɩ fanɛ asɛ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ asa akʋ bɛɛ waa mʋ?

english_verse: You are like a letter written by Christ and delivered by us. But you are not written with pen and ink or on tablets made of stone. You are written in our hearts by the Spirit of the living God.
translation_verse: Kesintin tɔ mʋ, fanɛ kɩbaabʋtɔ kɩɩ lɛɛ kɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ, lɩɩ anɛ kusun sʋ mʋ, fan gyɛ ɔwʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ Krisito kyʋrɔɔ. Nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ inki nɩɩ ba taa kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ mʋ, amaa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ nkpa wuya mʋ Kayaayu nɩɩ ba taa kyʋrɔɔ kɩmʋ. Nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ abuu patɩla‐patɩla sʋ nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ gyaga, amaa nyɩmɩsa kɔkɔlɔ sʋ nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ gyaga.

english_verse: We are sure about all this. Christ makes us sure in the very presence of God.
translation_verse: A maa taalɛ tɔwɛ ɩnɩmʋ bɔla Krisito sʋ mʋ, an taa anɛ n‐yɩɩ tʋʋ Ɩbwaarɛ sʋ.

english_verse: We don't have the right to claim that we have done anything on our own. God gives us what it takes to do all we do.
translation_verse: A mɛɛ tɔwɛ nɩn yɛ anɛ gbaa‐gbaa anɛ ɔlʋn nɩɩ an sʋ an waa kusun mʋ, amaa Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an taalɛ waa kusun mʋ.

english_verse: He makes us worthy to be the servants of his new agreement that comes from the Holy Spirit and not from a written Law. After all, the Law brings death, but the Spirit brings life.
translation_verse: Mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an dagaa mʋ katɔwɛ kyula pʋpwɛ mʋ kusun asunpu. Nɩɩ kɩ man gyɛ Nbara kyʋrɔɔsa lɛɛ, amaa kɩ gyɛ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ lɛɛ. Nbara kyʋrɔɔsa mʋ ɩɩ bɩya lewu nɩn, amaa Kayaayu mʋ kɩɩ sa nkpa nɩn. Katɔwɛ kyula pʋpwɛ mʋ bʋnyaa

english_verse: The Law of Moses brought only the promise of death, even though it was carved on stones and given in a wonderful way. Still the Law made Moses' face shine so brightly the people of Israel could not look at it, even though it was a fading glory.
translation_verse: Nbara mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ kyʋrɔɔ gyaga abuu patɩla‐patɩla sʋ sa Mosesi. Saŋa maa mʋ, Nbara mʋ ba yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ bʋnyaa ŋalɩgɛsa, nɩɩ Ɩsɩrayɩ abi ba man taalɛ kɩɩ mu ansi tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ mu ansi sʋ ɩɩ ŋalɩgɛ gaa, halɩɩ ɩ maa kpa sʋ gbaa mʋ. Nɩɩ Nbara mʋ nɩɩ ɩmʋ kusun bɩya lewu, nɩɩ kɩ sʋ falɛ bʋnyaa mʋ,

english_verse: So won't the agreement the Spirit brings to us be even more wonderful?
translation_verse: mɩnɛ ɩ waa sʋ nɩɩ Kayaayu mʋ kusun mɛɛ yɛ ɔ baa ɔ sʋ bʋnyaa kʋkyɔ?

english_verse: If something that brings the death sentence is glorious, won't something that makes us acceptable to God be even more glorious?
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kusun mʋ nɩɩ kii bun nyɩmɩsa kʋpwɛ, kɩ kan kɩ sʋ bʋnyaa mʋ, mɩnɛ ɩ waa sʋ nɩɩ kusun mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ bɩya ɩkpa kikyiigi sa asa mʋ mɛɛ yɛ ɔ bɩya bʋnyaa kʋkyɔ?

english_verse: In fact, the new agreement is so wonderful that the Law is no longer glorious at all.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ an taa nbɩɩnbɩɩ bʋnyaa kparɛ mʋ kaala yɛ bʋnyaa gyankpaasa mʋ, bʋnyaa gyankpaasa mʋ man gyɛ sɛhn.

english_verse: The Law was given with a glory that faded away. But the glory of the new agreement is much greater, because it will never fade away.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kɩmʋ nɩɩ kɩ ba nɩɩ kɩ man kyɛɛrɛɛ mʋ kɩ ba yɛ bʋnyaa mʋ, mɩnɛ ɩ waa sʋ nɩɩ kɩmʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ tɔ kakpaa mɛɛ yɛ kɩ baa kɩ sʋ bʋnyaa kɩkyɔ?

english_verse: This wonderful hope makes us feel like speaking freely.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ, a maa sʋ falɛ tamaa sʋ mʋ, an yɩlɛ kɩnyɩn tɔ anɛ atɔwɛsa tɔ.

english_verse: We are not like Moses. His face was shining, but he covered it to keep the people of Israel from seeing the brightness fade away.
translation_verse: A man du fɛɛ Mosesi mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa kɩtaa‐bi bun mu ansi sʋ, kɛ Ɩsɩrayɩ abi ba man nyɛ wu kanan mʋ nɩɩ bʋnyaa mʋ ɩɩ kpa sʋ mu ansi sʋ mʋ.

english_verse: The people were stubborn, and something still keeps them from seeing the truth when the Law is read. Only Christ can take away the covering that keeps them from seeing.
translation_verse: Amaa bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ man nu asɩn mʋ kasɛ. Ba lɩɩ halɩɩ ndaga nɩɩ bɛɛ kalɛ katɔwɛ kyula dɩdaa ɩwʋlɛ mʋ, i du nɩn fɛɛ kʋtɔ kʋ kɩ san ki bun bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ sʋ, amɔɔ nyɩmɩsa waa kʋkʋlʋn yɛ Krisito, pɔyɩ nɩɩ kii bugi mʋ nfɛɛrɛ sʋ.

english_verse: with a covering that is removed only for those who turn to the Lord.
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan biliŋi ba Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ asɛ mʋ, mʋ kʋtɔ bunsa mʋ kii bugi.

english_verse: The Lord and the Spirit are one and the same, and the Lord's Spirit sets us free.
translation_verse: Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ Kayaayu, nɩɩ katɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Kayaayu mʋ bʋ mʋ, n‐yɩɩ kɩnyɛ bʋ tʋtɔ.

english_verse: So our faces are not covered. They show the bright glory of the Lord, as the Lord's Spirit makes us more and more like our glorious Lord.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ anɛ kpini mʋ nɩɩ kɩtaa‐bi man bun anɛ nfɛɛrɛ sʋ mʋ, an lɛɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ bʋnyaa mʋ kaapʋ. Anɛ kɩbaabʋtɔ kii biliŋi waa fɛɛ mu keduli, nɩɩ saŋa kʋmaa an nyɛ mʋ bʋnyaa mʋ an tii sʋ, nɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ ɩ lɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Kayaayu mʋ asɛ.

english_verse: God has been kind enough to trust us with this work. This is why we never give up.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ Ɩbwaarɛ maa wu anɛ kʋwɛɛ sʋ mʋ, ɔ taa asɩn danbɩrasa kɩtɔwɛ kusun nɩmʋ waa anɛ abaa tɔ, nɩɩ anɛ abaa mɛɛ yɛ ɩ yɔɔ.

english_verse: We don't do shameful things that must be kept secret. And we don't try to fool anyone or twist God's message around. God is our witness that we speak only the truth, so others will be sure we can be trusted.
translation_verse: An kina ipeeli‐sɩn yɛ atɔ baala waasa, nɩɩ a mɛɛ taa kɔnɔ tɔ kɔn an pɩna asa, nɩɩ a mee biliŋaa Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn mʋ. Amaa anɛɛnɛ bɩrɛ, an tɔwɛ kesintin asɩn mʋ sakyɔ tɔ, kɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ɔ bɩɩ mʋ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an du Ɩbwaarɛ ansi tɔ.

english_verse: If there is anything hidden about our message, it is hidden only to someone who is lost.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋ kan ki bun anɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ an tɔwɛ falɛ gbaa mʋ, ii bun ɩɩ sa bamʋ nɩɩ bee muuri mʋ nkʋn nɩn.

english_verse: The god who rules this world has blinded the minds of unbelievers. They cannot see the light, which is the good news about our glorious Christ, who shows what God is like.
translation_verse: Bɛɛ mɛɛ kɔɔlɛ bee gyii lɩɩ fɛɛ Sɩtaanɛ mʋ nɩɩ ee gyii kuwura kasɛ sʋ mʋ, bun bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ sʋ, kɛ ba man taalɛ wu asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ fɩtɩla mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ Krisito bʋnyaa mʋ, nɩɩ mʋ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ keduli gbaa‐gbaa mʋ.

english_verse: We are not preaching about ourselves. Our message is that Jesus Christ is Lord. He also sent us to be your servants.
translation_verse: Man gyɛ anɛ gbaa‐gbaa anɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ asɩn nɩɩ an tɔwɛ, amaa Yesu Krisito n‐yɩɩ sʋ asɩn nɩɩ an tɔwɛ, mʋ ɩ gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, nɩɩ lɩɩ mʋ sʋ mʋ an gyɛ fanɛ ayaafɔlɛ.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “God commanded light to shine in the dark.” Now God is shining in our hearts to let you know that his glory is seen in Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, “Ɩ ŋmaŋɛ kitentenbiri tɔ” mʋ, mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ kʋlʋn maŋa ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ ɩ ŋmaŋɛ anɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ, kɛ a nyɛ bɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bʋnyaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ ŋalɩgɛ Krisito ansi tɔ mʋ.

english_verse: We often suffer, but we are never crushed. Even when we don't know what to do, we never give up.
translation_verse: Saŋa kʋmaa, ba nyan anɛ, amaa a man patɩyɛ, i wuliti anɛ tɔ, amaa anɛ abaa ɩ man yɔɔ,

english_verse: In times of trouble, God is with us, and when we are knocked down, we get up again.
translation_verse: ba nyanla anɛ, amaa Ɩbwaarɛ man yɛgɛ nɩɩ ba da anɛ tʋʋ lewu‐lewu, amaa a man wu.

english_verse: We face death every day because of Jesus. Our bodies show what his death was like, so his life can also be seen in us.
translation_verse: Kpalɩ fɛɛ anɛ mʋ nɩɩ an san an tɛ nkpa tɔ falɛ mʋ, lɩɩ Yesu sʋ mʋ saŋa kʋmaa an tɛ lewu kɔnɔ, kɛ mʋ nkpa mʋ ɩ nyɛ lɩɩ ifuli anɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ kii biti ki wu mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: This means that death is working in us, but life is working in you.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ ɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ an gyaŋa alewu‐sɩn, amaa ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ fen biti fɛn nyɛ nkpa kakpaa.

english_verse: In the Scriptures it says, “I spoke because I had faith.” We have this same kind of faith. So we speak
translation_verse: Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ mʋ, ɔkʋ tɔwɛ yɛ, “N kɔɔlɛ gyii, ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ.” Kanɩn kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kʋlʋn maŋa nɩɩ anɛ gbaa anɛ an sʋ, ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ an tɔwɛ kanɩn.

english_verse: because we know that God raised the Lord Jesus to life. And just as God raised Jesus, he will also raise us to life. Then he will bring us into his presence together with you.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ an nyi fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ o kyiŋi Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu lɩɩ lewu tɔ ba nkpa tɔ mʋ, nɩɩ lɩɩ anaa Yesu kɩwaa kʋkʋlʋn sʋ mʋ ee biti o kyiŋi anɛ, kɛ ɔ taa anaa fanɛ bʋga kpee mʋ asɛ.

english_verse: All of this has been done for you, so more and more people will know how kind God is and will praise and honor him. Faith in the Lord
translation_verse: Fanɛ sʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ waa ɩnɩmʋ kpini kanɩn, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ mʋ kabwaala mʋ kɩ kyɔ, nɩɩ asa gaalaagaa bɛɛ nyɛ kɩmʋ mʋ, ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ bɛɛ fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ nɩɩ bɛɛ bʋnyaa mʋ. Kakyɩna pʋpwɛ mʋ tamaa

english_verse: We never give up. Our bodies are gradually dying, but we ourselves are being made stronger each day.
translation_verse: Kpalɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ mʋ, anɛ abaa ɩ mɛɛ yɔɔ. Halɩɩ anɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kɩ maa pɔɔ kii tii sʋ gbaa mʋ, anɛ kakyɩna pʋpwɛ mʋ ɩɩ nyɛ ɔlʋn ii tii sʋ kakɛ kʋmaa.

english_verse: These little troubles are getting us ready for an eternal glory that will make all our troubles seem like nothing.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ anɛ awʋrʋfɔ wuribi mʋ nɩɩ an gyii nɩɩ ɩ mɛɛ kyɛɛrɛɛ falɛ mʋ, ɩɩ bɩya anɛ bʋnyaa lala mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ ɔkaa, nɩɩ ɩ kyɔ awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ an gyii falɛ gaa mʋ.

english_verse: Things that are seen don't last forever, but things that are not seen are eternal. This is why we keep our minds on the things that cannot be seen.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ a man sʋ anɛ ansi an gyaga atɔ mʋ nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa sʋ mu ansi ee wu mʋ sʋ, amaa ɩmʋ nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa mee wu yɛ ansi mʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa sʋ mu ansi ee wu mʋ mɛɛ kyɛɛrɛɛ, amaa ɩmʋ nɩɩ bee mɛɛ wu yɛ ansi mʋ bɩrɛ ɩ bʋ tɔ nɩn kakpaa.

english_verse: Our bodies are like tents that we live in here on earth. But when these tents are destroyed, we know that God will give each of us a place to live. These homes will not be buildings someone has made, but they are in heaven and will last forever.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ an dan an nyi fɛɛ anɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ ki du fɛɛ tɛntɩ abu mʋ nɩɩ anɛ kala ana ba tɛ ɩmʋ tɔ kasɛ sʋ nfɩɩ ɩ kan wu mʋ, an biti an nyɛ ibu kyɩna tɔ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ, ibu mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ tɔ kakpaa sʋsʋ, nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ nyɩmɩsa kɩbaa nɩɩ ba taa pɔyɩ.

english_verse: While we are here on earth, we sigh because we want to live in that heavenly home.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ falɛ sʋ an yɩyɛɛ nɩɩ an kpaala, an biti fɛɛ naafɔɔ Ɩbwaarɛ o bun anɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ sʋ fɛɛ ɩkaalɛ.

english_verse: We want to put it on like clothes and not be naked.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ nɩɩ ɩ kan bun anɛ sʋ mʋ, ɩ mɛɛ bɩla i du fɛɛ an naa kibulunkpan.

english_verse: These tents we now live in are like a heavy burden, and we groan. But we don't do this just because we want to leave these bodies that will die. It is because we want to change them for bodies that will never die.
translation_verse: A maa bʋ tɛntɩ kubuu mʋ tɔ kasɛ sʋ nfɩɩ mʋ, an yɩyɛɛ fɛɛ kasʋla maa nyɩyɛ anɛ, man gyɛ fɛɛ an biti nɩn fɛɛ a lɩɩ kasɛ sʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ tɔ, amaa an biti fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ o bun anɛ kɩmʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ sʋsʋ lɛɛ mʋ, kɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ii wu mʋ ɩ kyɛɛgɛ waa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ sʋ nkpa kakpaa.

english_verse: God is the one who makes all this possible. He has given us his Spirit to make us certain he will do it.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɔŋɔ anɛ yɩla sa falɛ kakyɛɛgɛ nɩmʋ, nɩɩ ɔ taa mʋ Kayaayu mʋ sa anɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa yɩla kasɛ sa atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa yɩla yɛ ee biti ɔ sa anɛ mʋ.

english_verse: So always be cheerful! As long as we are in these bodies, we are away from the Lord.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ an nyɛ nkɔlɔ yɩlɛ tɔ saŋa kʋmaa. Nɩɩ an nyi fɛɛ a maa san an tɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ tɔ nfɩɩ mʋ, ɩɩ kaapʋ nɩn fɛɛ an bʋ kata yɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu.

english_verse: We should be cheerful, because we would rather leave these bodies and be at home with the Lord.
translation_verse: An yɩlɛ tɔ yɛ tamaa. Nɩɩ an biti yɛ an lɩɩ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ nɩmʋ tɔ kɛ a naa kyɩna anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu mʋ asɛ.

english_verse: But whether we are at home with the Lord or away from him, we still try our best to please him.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ, nɩɩ an san an tɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ tɔ kasɛ sʋ nɩn‐oo, abɛɛ an lɩɩ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ tɔ nɩn‐oo, kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ anɛ ansi ɩ payɩ sʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ a waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ bɔla Yesu ansi.

english_verse: We know what it means to respect the Lord, and we encourage everyone to turn to him. God himself knows what we are like, and I hope you also know what kind of people we are.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ a maa nyi kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ yɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kasɩlɛ mʋ, an kpan anɛ n‐yɩɩ an tɔwɛ an pʋpɔlɛ asa kɛ baa kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii. Ɩbwaarɛ i nyi anɛ danbɩrasa, asa mʋ nɩɩ an gyɛ, nɩɩ n tamaa fɛɛ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fen nyi anɛ fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ.

english_verse: We are not trying once more to brag about ourselves. But we want you to be proud of us, when you are with those who are not sincere and brag about what others think of them.
translation_verse: Man gyɛ yɛ an bɩla an biti a kaapʋ fanɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an du, amaa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ an waa mʋ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ an sa fanɛ ɔkpa, kɛ fan nyɛ kaapʋ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ anɛ sʋ, kɛ fan taalɛ lɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kaapʋ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ mʋ kɔnɔ, lɩɩ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ bee wu yɛ ansi mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ lɩɩ asa nkɔlɔ tɔ.

english_verse: If we seem out of our minds, it is between God and us. But if we are in our right minds, it is for your good.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ anɛ katɔwɛ nɩmʋ ɩ kan ɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ anɛ amu ii nyita mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ sʋ nɩɩ an du kanɩn. Amaa nɩɩ anɛ amu tɔ ɩ kan i du kyɛɛkyɛɛ bɩrɛ, fanɛ sʋ nɩɩ i du kanɩn.

english_verse: We are ruled by Christ's love for us. We are certain that if one person died for everyone else, then all of us have died.
translation_verse: Krisito kebiti mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ sa anɛ mʋ, gyii anɛ amu. Lɩɩ fɛɛ an kɔɔlɛ gyii fɛɛ ɔsa kʋlʋn wu sa ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ, ɩmʋ sʋ i du nɩn fɛɛ anɛ gbaa anɛ an maa wu tii mʋ sʋ mʋ.

english_verse: And Christ did die for all of us. He died so we would no longer live for ourselves, but for the one who died and was raised to life for us.
translation_verse: O wu sa asa kpini, saamʋ bamʋ nɩɩ ba tɛ nkpa tɔ mʋ ba man bɩla ba tɛ sa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ, amaa ba tɛ sa ɔmʋ nɩɩ o wu, nɩɩ o bwii kyiŋi ba nkpa tɔ sa bamʋ mʋ.

english_verse: We are careful not to judge people by what they seem to be, though we once judged Christ in this way.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ nbɩɩnbɩɩ man gyɛ nyɩmɩsa ɩkpa sʋ nɩɩ an sʋ an kaala kanan mʋ nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa du. Saŋa kʋ tɔ mʋ kanɩn nɩɩ an daa kaala Krisito nɩn, amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ a man bɩla an kaala mʋ kanɩn.

english_verse: Anyone who belongs to Christ is a new person. The past is forgotten, and everything is new.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ, nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan ba ɔ gyɛ Krisito lɛɛ mʋ, o biliŋi nyɩmɩsa pʋpwɛ. Kakyɩna dɩdaa mʋ kɩ kyʋn, nɩɩ kakyɩna pʋpwɛ kɩ ba.

english_verse: God has done it all! He sent Christ to make peace between himself and us, and he has given us the work of making peace between himself and others.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ kpini ɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ nɩn, mʋ ɩ bɔla Krisito sʋ lɔŋɔ ana mʋ nsana, nɩɩ ɔ taa maa asa nsana kɔlɔŋɔ kusun mʋ waa anɛ abaa tɔ.

english_verse: What we mean is that God was in Christ, offering peace and forgiveness to the people of this world. And he has given us the work of sharing his message about peace.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla Krisito sʋ ɛɛ lɔŋɔ maa dulinyaa asa nsana, yɛgɛ ɔ mɛɛ kɩɩ asa alibi mʋ nɩɩ ba waa sʋ. Nɩɩ ɔ taa maa asa nsana kɔlɔŋɔ asɩn mʋ waa anɛ abaa tɔ yɛ an tɔwɛ.

english_verse: We were sent to speak for Christ, and God is begging you to listen to our message. We speak for Christ and sincerely ask you to make peace with God.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ an gyɛ Krisito ayaa tɔ ayɩlɛpʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba sun fanɛ asɛ, nɩɩ i du fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩɩ bɔla anɛ sʋ nɩn ɛɛ kʋlɛ fanɛ. Ɩmʋ sʋ an yɩlɛ Krisito ayaa tɔ an kʋlɛ fanɛ yɛ fanaa Ɩbwaarɛ nsana ɩ lɔŋɔ.

english_verse: Christ never sinned! But God treated him as a sinner, so Christ could make us acceptable to God.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ yɛgɛ Krisito mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man waa alibi kɩɩ mʋ, ba waa anɛ alibi ɔsʋlapʋ, nɩɩ lɩɩ mʋ sʋ mʋ kɛ anɛ ɩkpa i kyiigi Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ.

english_verse: We work together with God, and we beg you to make good use of God's gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ maa anɛ an sun mu kusun mʋ, an kʋlɛ fanɛ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ nɩɩ fan nyɛ mʋ, fan man yɛgɛ ɩ waa kɩyan.

english_verse: In the Scriptures God says, “When the time came, I listened to you, and when you needed help, I came to save you.” That time has come. This is the day for you to be saved.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Mɛ saŋa mʋ kyɛɛkyɛɛ tɔ maa fʋʋ mʋ, n nu fanɛ asɛ, nɩɩ mɛ kakɛ mɔlɩgɛsa maa fʋʋ mʋ, n kyɛ fanɛ tɔ.” Nɩɩ mɛ, Pɔɔlɩ n tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ, nbɩɩnbɩɩ saŋa nɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ saŋa kyɛɛkyɛɛ tɔ mʋ, nɩɩ ndaga kakɛ kanɩmʋ kɩ gyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ kakɛ mʋ. Pɔɔlɩ maa mʋ bɩrɩsa ana awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba gyii

english_verse: We don't want anyone to find fault with our work, and so we try hard not to cause problems.
translation_verse: A maa mee biti ɔkʋ o wu asɩn libi ɩkʋ anɛ kusun mʋ tɔ sʋ mʋ, a mee biti a maa waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kii biti ki tii ɔkʋ ɔkpa.

english_verse: But in everything and in every way we show we truly are God's servants. We have always been patient, though we have had a lot of trouble, suffering, and hard times.
translation_verse: Amaa kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ an waa mʋ, an waa nɩn an kaapʋ fɛɛ an gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ayaafɔlɛ. An nyɛ kenyiita yɩlɛ awʋrʋfɔ tɔ, yɛ kayɩɩ kɩtaa tɔ, yɛ tɔɔrɔɔ tɔ.

english_verse: We have been beaten, put in jail, and hurt in riots. We have worked hard and have gone without sleep or food.
translation_verse: Asa ba dayɩ anɛ, nɩɩ ba taa anɛ tii ibu, nɩɩ ba bɩɩtɛ nin anɛ sakyɔ tɔ. Nɩɩ an waa kusun ɔlʋn sʋ, nɩɩ a mɛɛ nyɛ an dɛ nsɩɩrɛ, nɩɩ an naa yɛ akʋn,

english_verse: But we have kept ourselves pure and have been understanding, patient, and kind. The Holy Spirit has been with us, and our love has been real.
translation_verse: yɛgɛ anɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ ɩ maa man sʋ ineesi ɩkʋ, nɩɩ an sʋ kanyaasɩn, yɛ kenyiita, yɛ kɩdanbɩrasa kɩwaa, yɛ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ ɔlʋn yɛ kebiti abaa gaa.

english_verse: We have spoken the truth, and God's power has worked in us. In all our struggles we have said and done only what is right.
translation_verse: An tɔwɛ kesintin asɩn mʋ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔlʋn mʋ waa kusun anɛ tɔ. An sʋ ɩkpa kyiigisa fɛɛ adʋntɔ, kɛ a taa kun kɛ a taa kɔ.

english_verse: Whether we were honored or dishonored or praised or cursed, we always told the truth about ourselves. But some people said we did not.
translation_verse: Asa akʋ ba sa anɛ bɛɛrɛɛ, nɩɩ akʋ mɔɔ ba ŋaabaa anɛ, akʋ ba saalɛ anɛ, nɩɩ akʋ ba yɩn anɛ. Ba kɩɩ anɛ fɛɛ asa apɩnapʋ, yɛgɛ anɛɛnɛ an gyɛ kesintin wuya ana.

english_verse: We are unknown to others, but well known to you. We seem to be dying, and yet we are still alive. We have been punished, but never killed,
translation_verse: Ba waa fɛɛ ba man bɩɩ anɛ, yɛgɛ katɩn kʋmaa asa be nyi anɛ, ba kɩɩ anɛ fɛɛ a maa yɛ a wu, amaa yɛgɛ an san an tɛ nkpa tɔ, ba bɩɩtɛ anɛ asʋ, yɛgɛ a man wu.

english_verse: and we are always happy, even in times of suffering. Although we are poor, we have made many people rich. And though we own nothing, everything is ours.
translation_verse: Ba kɩɩ anɛ fɛɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ bamʋ asɩn ɩ sʋ kʋwɛɛ, yɛgɛ saŋa kʋmaa anɛ ansi i gyii, ba kɩɩ anɛ atiripu, amaa yɛgɛ an waa asa gaalaagaa atɔ wuya ana, ba kɩɩ fɛɛ a man sʋ sɛhn yɛgɛ anɛ ɩ sʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa.

english_verse: Friends in Corinth, we are telling the truth when we say there is room in our hearts for you.
translation_verse: Oo Korinto abi, an tɔwɛ tigi fanɛ, nɩɩ an bugi anɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ sa fanɛ.

english_verse: We are not holding back on our love for you, but you are holding back on your love for us.
translation_verse: Anɛɛnɛ bɩrɛ, an man kɩtaa anɛ n‐yɩɩ yɛ fanɛ, amaa fanɛ ɩ kɩtaa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ yɛ anɛ.

english_verse: I speak to you as I would speak to my own children. Please make room in your hearts for us. The Temple of the Living God
translation_verse: Mɛ Pɔɔlɩ, n tɔwɛ n sa fanɛ fɛɛ mi‐bii ana. Fen bugi fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ sa anɛ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an bugi anɛ lɛɛ sa fanɛ mʋ. Fan man waa kʋkʋlʋn yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ

english_verse: Stay away from people who are not followers of the Lord! Can someone who is good get along with someone who is evil? Are light and darkness the same?
translation_verse: Fan man waa kʋkʋlʋn yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ. Kpalɩ fɛɛ, mɩnɛ ɩ bʋ ɩkpa kikyiigi yɛ nbara kikina nsana? Abɛɛ nɛnɛ nɩɩ kitentenbiri maa ɩŋmaŋɛsa ɩ nyɛ waa kʋlʋn?

english_verse: Is Christ a friend of Satan? Can people who follow the Lord have anything in common with those who don't?
translation_verse: Nɛnɛ sʋ nɩɩ Krisito maa Sɩtaanɛ ba taalɛ waa kɔnɔ kʋlʋn? Mɩnɛ ɩ bʋ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ gyii yɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ man kɔɔlɛ gyii nsana?

english_verse: Do idols belong in the temple of God? We are the temple of the living God, as God himself says, “I will live with these people and walk among them. I will be their God, and they will be my people.”
translation_verse: Mɩnɛ kɩtɔwɛ kyula ɩ bʋ kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ mʋ yɛ ɩdakpa nsana? Lɩɩ fɛɛ anɛ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɛ nkpa tɔ mʋ kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ mʋ. Mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, “N biti n kyɩna bamʋ tɔ, kɛ n natɛ bamʋ tɔ, n biti n baa n gyɛ bamʋ Ɩbwaarɛ, kɛ ba baa ba gyɛ mɛ asa.”

english_verse: The Lord also says, “Leave them and stay away! Don't touch anything that isn't clean. Then I will welcome you
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ sʋ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ bɩla tɔwɛ yɛ, “Fan tɩn fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ bamʋ asɛ, kɛ fan barɩgɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ bamʋ tɔ. Fan man taa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ mata ineesi kʋtɔ kʋ, saamʋ kɛ n kɔɔlɛ fanɛ.

english_verse: and be your Father. You will be my sons and my daughters, as surely as I am God, the All-Powerful.”
translation_verse: N biti n baa n gyɛ fanɛ‐Sɛ, nɩɩ fanɛ ii biti fan baa fan gyɛ mi‐bii ana anyɩnsa yɛ akyɩɩsa, mɛ, Ɔlʋnpʋ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, ɩ tɔwɛ kanɩn.”

english_verse: My friends, God has made us these promises. So we should stay away from everything that keeps our bodies and spirits from being clean. We should honor God and try to be completely like him. The Church Makes Paul Happy
translation_verse: Mɛ‐bɩrɩsa ana, Ɩbwaarɛ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ lɩɩ falɛ atɔ nɩmʋ kpini sʋ sa anɛ. Kanɩn sʋ fan yɛgɛ a fwɩɩ anɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ waa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ yɛ kayaayu ineesi mʋ fɔyɩ. Fan yɛgɛ a sɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɛ a payɩ ansi waa anɛ n‐yɩɩ kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ yɩla sa mʋ. Korinto kʋbʋ mʋ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ Pɔɔlɩ ansi i gyii

english_verse: Make a place for us in your hearts! We haven't mistreated or hurt anyone. We haven't cheated anyone.
translation_verse: Fan bugi fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ sa anɛ. Nɩɩ an man waa ɔkʋ kilibi, nɩɩ an man nyita ɔkʋ, a man sisii ɔkʋ.

english_verse: I am not saying this to be hard on you. But, as I have said before, you will always be in our thoughts, whether we live or die.
translation_verse: N mɛɛ tɔwɛ ɩnɩmʋ n bun fanɛ kʋpwɛ, n wʋla tɔwɛ fanɛ dɩdaa yɛ fan bʋ anɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ, ɩmʋ sʋ an tɛ nkpa tɔ nɩn oo, an wu nɩn oo, anaa fanɛ nɩn.

english_verse: I trust you completely. I am always proud of you, and I am greatly encouraged. In all my trouble I am still very happy.
translation_verse: N sʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii fanɛ tɔ, nɩɩ fanɛ sʋ mʋ n kaapʋ mɛ n‐yɩɩ, nɩɩ ɩ waa mɛ aniya anɛ tɔɔrɔɔ kpini tɔ, nɩɩ mi ansi i gyii naa kyʋn sʋ.

english_verse: After we came to Macedonia, we didn't have any chance to rest. We were faced with all kinds of problems. We were troubled by enemies and troubled by fears.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ a maa ba Masedoniya ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ mʋ, anɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kɩ man nyɛ ɔfʋʋtɛ. Asa ba tɔɔrɔɔ anɛ, nɩɩ ba gyii anɛ ɩmɔɔrɛ katɩn kʋmaa nɩmʋ, nɩɩ kufuu kɩ kɩtaa anɛ.

english_verse: But God cheers up people in need, and this is what he did when he sent Titus to us.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ee yuula asa mʋ nɩɩ bamʋ abaa ɩɩ yɔɔ nkɔlɔ mʋ, mʋ maŋa bɔla Titusi mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɩɩ fanɛ asɛ ba mʋ sʋ yuula anɛ nkɔlɔ.

english_verse: Of course, we were glad to see Titus, but what really made us glad is the way you cheered him up. He told how sorry you were and how concerned you were about me. And this made me even happier.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ mʋ kɩba mʋ nkʋn sʋ, amaa kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan yɛgɛ nɩɩ mʋ kɔkɔlɔ ki yuuli mʋ mʋ. Ɔ tɔwɛ anɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fɛn gyʋgyʋʋ fɛɛ fen nyɛ wu mɛ mʋ, yɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan nu fanɛ n‐yɩɩ, yɛ fanɛ kebiti kparɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan sʋ sa mɛ mʋ. Lɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ kpini sʋ mʋ, ɩ waa mɛ ɔkɔn naa kyʋn sʋ.

english_verse: I don't feel bad anymore, even though my letter hurt your feelings. I did feel bad at first, but I don't now. I know that the letter hurt you for a while.
translation_verse: Halɩɩ mɛ ɔwʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ n kyʋrɔɔ sa fanɛ mʋ nyita fanɛ nkɔlɔ gbaa mʋ, n man nu mɛ n‐yɩɩ. Nɩɩ n daa bɩɩ fɛɛ ii biti ɩ kɔ fanɛ halɩɩ ɩ maa man kyɛɛrɛɛ gbaa mʋ, naafɔɔ n dɛ nu mɛ n‐yɩɩ.

english_verse: Now I am happy, but not because I hurt your feelings. It is because God used your hurt feelings to make you turn back to him, and none of you were harmed by us.
translation_verse: Amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ ɩ waa mɛ ɔkɔn, nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ yɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ i nyita fanɛ nkɔlɔ sʋ nɩɩ ɩ waa mɛ ɔkɔn, amaa fanɛ nkɔlɔ kinyita mʋ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ fan nyɛ nfɛɛrɛ kɩkyɛɛgɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ fanɛ nkɔlɔ kinyita mʋ gyɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ yɩla kɩmʋ kanɩn. Ɩmʋ sʋ an nyi fɛɛ a man waa fanɛ alibi akʋ.

english_verse: When God makes you feel sorry enough to turn to him and be saved, you don't have anything to feel bad about. But when this world makes you feel sorry, it can cause your death.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ kɔkɔlɔ nyita mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ yɩla kɩmʋ mʋ, ɩɩ bɩya nfɛɛrɛ kɩkyɛɛgɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ mɔlɩgɛ asa, nɩɩ kunu n‐yɩɩ man bʋ ɩmʋ tɔ, amaa dulinyaa tɔ kɔkɔlɔ nyita bɩrɛ ɩɩ bɩya lewu nɩn.

english_verse: When I wrote you, it wasn't to accuse the one who was wrong or to take up for the one who was hurt. I wrote, so God would show you how much you do care for us.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ halɩɩ n maa kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ mʋ sa fanɛ gbaa mʋ, man gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa alibi mʋ sʋ, abɛɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ba waa mʋ alibi mʋ sʋ, amaa n kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ maa nɩn, kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ kɛ fanɛ gbaa‐gbaa fen wu kanan mʋ nɩɩ fanɛ nkɔlɔ ɩ gyan anɛ sʋ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ.

english_verse: And we were greatly encouraged. Although we were encouraged, we felt even better when we saw how happy Titus was, because you had shown he had nothing to worry about.
