translation_verse: Lɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ mʋ ɩ waa anɛ aniya tɔ. Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bɩla ki tii sʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, fan yɛgɛ nɩɩ anɛ ansi i gyii, lɩɩ Titusi kensi‐gyii mʋ sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fanɛ kpini fan yɛgɛ nɩɩ mʋ kɔkɔlɔ ki yuuli mʋ.

english_verse: We had told him how much we thought of you, and you did not disappoint us. Just as we have always told you the truth, so everything we told him about you has also proved to be true.
translation_verse: Pɔyɩ kɛ ɔ ba fanɛ asɛ mʋ, n kaapʋ mɛ n‐yɩɩ fanɛ sʋ sa mʋ, nɩɩ fan man gyila mɛ ipeeli mʋ asɛ. Fɛɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ an tɔwɛ sa fanɛ maa gyɛ kesintin mʋ, kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an kaapʋ anɛ n‐yɩɩ fanɛ sʋ sa Titusi mʋ, ɩ waa kesintin.

english_verse: Titus loves all of you very much, especially when he remembers how you obeyed him and how you trembled with fear when you welcomed him.
translation_verse: Mu kebiti mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ sa fanɛ mʋ lɔŋɔ tii sʋ, fɛɛ maa nyiŋi kanan mʋ nɩɩ fanɛ kpini fan nu mʋ asɛ, nɩɩ fan taa kufuu yɛ kɩkyɩkya kɔɔlɛ mʋ mʋ.

english_verse: It makes me really glad to know I can depend on you.
translation_verse: Mɛɛmɛ bɩrɛ, ɩ waa mɛ ɔkɔn fɛɛ n maa taalɛ taa mɛ n‐yɩɩ tʋʋ fanɛ sʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa tɔ.

english_verse: My friends, we want you to know that the churches in Macedonia have shown others God's gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, an biti fɛɛ fan bɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ waa Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ Masedoniya ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: They gave as much as they could afford and even more, simply because they wanted to.
translation_verse: N tɔwɛ fanɛ kesintin yɛ ba kɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ taalɛ kɛɛ, halɩɩ naa kyʋn bamʋ ɔlʋn sʋ. Nɩɩ lɩɩ bamʋ gbaa‐gbaa bamʋ kɩpɩrɛ sʋ mʋ,

english_verse: They even asked and begged us to let them have the joy of giving their money for God's people.
translation_verse: ba payɩ ansi kʋlɛ anɛ fɛɛ bamʋ gbaa bamʋ ba nyɛ ɔkpa mʋ nɩɩ ba taalɛ taa kyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ Gyudeya ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: And they did more than we had hoped. They gave themselves first to the Lord and then to us, just as God wanted them to do.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba waa kyʋn sʋ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an waa tamaa yɛ bɛ taalɛ mʋ, amaa ba gyankpaa taa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ naa sa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu, nɩɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti tɔ sʋ mʋ, ba taa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ sa anɛ gbaa anɛ.

english_verse: Titus was the one who got you started doing this good thing, so we begged him to help you finish what you had begun.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ an kʋlɛ Titusi mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wʋla piili kɛkɛɛ kusun kɩnɩmʋ kasɛ mʋ, fɛɛ ɔ kyaga sʋ waa fanɛ aniya tɔ, kɛ fan tiisi waa fanɛ kɛkɛɛ kusun mʋ naa lʋwɛ.

english_verse: You do everything better than anyone else. You have stronger faith. You speak better and know more. You are eager to give, and you love us better. Now you must give more generously than anyone else.
translation_verse: N man wu kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ fan man waa kyʋn sʋ. Lɩɩ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ nɩn oo, katɔwɛ tɔ nɩn oo, kinyi tɔ nɩn oo, kɩ payɩ ansi kyɛ tɔ nɩn oo, kebiti mʋ nɩɩ fan sʋ sa anɛ nɩn oo, fan waa ɩmʋ kpini naa kyʋn sʋ. Ɩmʋ sʋ an biti fɛɛ fan waa kyʋn sʋ lɩɩ fanɛ kɛkɛɛ kusun nɩmʋ gbaa tɔ.

english_verse: I am not ordering you to do this. I am simply testing how real your love is by comparing it with the concern that others have shown.
translation_verse: Man gyɛ yɛ n yɩla kɔnɔsa kʋ n sa fanɛ nɩn, amaa n biti fɛɛ n nyɛ taa fanɛ kebiti mʋ taa kaala yɛ akʋ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ payɩ ansi bɛɛ waa kanɩn kɩdanbɩrasa mʋ lɛɛ, saamʋ n nyɛ wu kanan mʋ nɩɩ fanɛ kebiti mʋ gyɛ kesintin.

english_verse: You know our Lord Jesus Christ treated us with undeserved grace by giving up all his riches, so you could become rich.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ fen nyi anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kabwaala mʋ, fɛɛ maa gyɛ atɔ wuya gbaa mʋ, kpalɩ fanɛ sʋ mʋ o be biliŋi otiripu, kɛ lɩɩ mʋ kitiri mʋ sʋ mʋ, fan ba biliŋi atɔ wuya ana.

english_verse: A year ago you were the first ones to give, and you gave because you wanted to. So listen to my advice.
translation_verse: Mɛ nfɛɛrɛ lɩɩ asɩn nɩmʋ sʋ sa fanɛ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, ɩ bʋrɔn fɛɛ fan maa lʋwɛ kusun mʋ nɩɩ fan piili sun‐tɔ mʋ. Fanɛ ɩ gyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba gyankpaa ba sa nkɛɛ mʋ, nɩɩ fɛn bɩla fɛn sa lɩɩ fanɛ kɩpɩrɛ tɔ.

english_verse: I think you should finish what you started. If you give according to what you have, you will prove you are as eager to give as you were to think about giving.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fen yii kusun mʋ kasɛ mʋ, fan lʋwɛ kɩmʋ. Fan payɩ ansi waa kusun mʋ naa lʋwɛ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan payɩ ansi ŋmina yɩla mʋ, kɛ fan waa fanɛ abaa ɔkaa.

english_verse: It doesn't matter how much you have. What matters is how much you are willing to give from what you have.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan ɛɛ kɛɛ mʋ kɩpɩrɛ sʋ lɩɩ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ mʋ sʋ mʋ, ɩmʋ ɩɩ bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ ansi, man gyɛ lɩɩ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man sʋ mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: I am not trying to make life easier for others by making life harder for you. But it is only fair
translation_verse: Man gyɛ yɛ an biti an taa akʋ kitiri ba sʋla fanɛ kɛ fɛn kɛɛ kyʋn sʋ, amaa an biti fɛɛ fanɛ kpini kakyɩna tɔ kɩ waa kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

english_verse: for you to share with them when you have so much, and they have so little. Later, when they have more than enough, and you are in need, they can share with you. Then everyone will have a fair share,
translation_verse: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ fanɛ ɩ sʋ gaa, nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ fɛn kyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ii tiri bamʋ mʋ tɔ. Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ kan ii tiri fanɛ mɔɔ mʋ, nɩɩ ba sʋ gaa mʋ, kɛ ba kyɛ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ tɔ. Saamʋ fanɛ kpini kakyɩna tɔ kɩ waa kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

english_verse: just as the Scriptures say, “Those who gathered too much had nothing left. Those who gathered only a little had all they needed.” Titus and His Friends
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, “Ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kʋʋla kʋkyɔ mʋ, man nyɛ naa ban sʋ, nɩɩ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kʋʋla pii mʋ gbaa, ɩ kʋkwɛ mʋ kyɛɛkyɛɛ.” Titusi maa bamʋ nɩɩ ba sun bamʋ Korinto kadɛ tɔ mʋ

english_verse: I am grateful that God made Titus care as much about you as we do.
translation_verse: N fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ gaa fɛɛ maa yɛgɛ nɩɩ Titusi payɩ ansi ɛɛ kyɛ fanɛ tɔ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ngbaa mɛ n kyɛ fanɛ tɔ mʋ.

english_verse: When we begged Titus to visit you, he said he would. He wanted to because he cared so much for you.
translation_verse: Man gyɛ yɛ a maa tɔwɛ an kʋlɛ mʋ sʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ ba fanɛ asɛ, amaa lɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fanɛ asɩn i tiri mʋ sʋ mʋ, ɔ taa mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ kɩpɩrɛ tɔ nɩn ɛɛ ba fanɛ asɛ.

english_verse: With Titus we are also sending one of the Lord's followers who is well known in every church for spreading the good news.
translation_verse: An sun anɛ bɩrɩsa kʋ fɛɛ o buu mʋ ba fanɛ asɛ. Mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ kpini bɛɛ yɩn mʋ, lɩɩ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ kɩtɔwɛ mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: The churches chose this follower to travel with us while we carry this gift that will bring praise to the Lord and show how much we hope to help.
translation_verse: Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bɩla ki tii sʋ mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ ɩ lɛɛ mʋ yɛ, a maa sʋ nkɛɛ nɩmʋ kusun mʋ, o tii anɛ sʋ. Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ kusun mʋ nɩɩ an waa an sʋ bɛɛrɛɛ an sa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu, kɛ ɩ kaapʋ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an payɩ ansi an kyɛ tɔ.

english_verse: We don't want anyone to find fault with the way we handle your generous gift.
translation_verse: An da anɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ kɛ ɔkʋ ɔ man pwɩɩ anɛ lɩɩ nkɛɛ damantɛ mʋ nɩɩ ba taa waa anɛ abaa tɔ yɛ a kɩɩ sʋ mʋ.

english_verse: But we want to do what pleases the Lord and what people think is right.
translation_verse: Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ an biti mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, a waa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ dɛ ɔkpa. Man gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ wʋlɛ ansi tɔ nkʋn, amaa asa gbaa ansi tɔ.

english_verse: We are also sending someone else with Titus and the other follower. We approve of this man. In fact, he has already shown us many times that he wants to help. And now he wants to help even more than ever, because he trusts you so much.
translation_verse: Kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ an bɩla sun anɛ bɩrɩsa kʋ tii bamʋ sʋ. Mʋ nɩɩ an wu fɛɛ ɩkpa gaalaagaa sʋ mʋ, ɔ sʋ kensi payɩ ɛɛ kyɛ tɔ. Nbɩɩnbɩɩ mʋ maa sʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii fanɛ tɔ sʋ mʋ, ɔ payɩ ansi gaa fɛɛ ɔ ba kyɛ tɔ.

english_verse: Titus is my partner, who works with me to serve you. The other two followers are sent by the churches, and they bring honor to Christ.
translation_verse: Titusi bɩrɛ, ɔ gyɛ mɛ bɩrɩsa kusun osunpu ɔmʋ nɩɩ n maa mʋ an kyɛ fanɛ tɔ. Nɩɩ anɛ bɩrɩsa ana asansa mʋ nɩɩ ba maa mʋ bee kpee mʋ bɩrɛ, ba yɩlɛ Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ ayaa tɔ nɩn kɛ ɩ taa bɛɛrɛɛ bɩya Krisito.

english_verse: Treat them in such a way that the churches will see your love and will know why we bragged about you.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan lɛɛ fanɛ kebiti mʋ kaapʋ bamʋ, kɛ Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ ba wu kɩmʋ kesintin, kɛ ba wu kʋtɔ mʋ sʋ nɩɩ an kaapʋ anɛ n‐yɩɩ fanɛ sʋ mʋ.

english_verse: I don't need to write you about the money you plan to give for God's people.
translation_verse: Kesintin sʋ, ɩ man tiri fɛɛ n bɩla kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ sa fanɛ, lɩɩ afulee kɛkɛɛ kusun sa Ɩbwaarɛ asa, mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ Gyudeya ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ mʋ.

english_verse: I know how eager you are to give. And I have proudly told the Lord's followers in Macedonia that you people in Achaia have been ready for a whole year. Now your desire to give has made them want to give.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ n nyi kanan mʋ nɩɩ fen biti fan kyɛ bamʋ tɔ. Nɩɩ n kaapʋ mɛ n‐yɩɩ fanɛ sʋ n sa Masedoniya abi. N tɔwɛ bamʋ yɛ lɩɩ koo sun‐tɔ nɩɩ fanɛ Akiya ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ abi fan kʋʋla n‐yɩɩ yɛ fan sa afulee. Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ kʋsaa asa gaalaagaa nɩɩ bamʋ gbaa bɛɛ kʋʋla bamʋ n‐yɩɩ kanɩn.

english_verse: This is why I am sending Titus and the two others to you. I want you to be ready, just as I promised. This will prove we were not wrong to brag about you.
translation_verse: Amaa n sun anɛ bɩrɩsa ana banɩmʋ fanɛ asɛ, saamʋ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n kaapʋ mɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ fanɛ sʋ n sa Masedoniya abi mʋ, ɩ man ba waa kɩyan. Amaa fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ bamʋ mʋ, n nyi fan maa kʋʋla fanɛ n‐yɩɩ fɛn waa kanɩn.

english_verse: Some followers from Macedonia may come with me, and I want them to find that you have the money ready. If you don't, I would be embarrassed for trusting you to do this. But you would be embarrassed even more.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ nɩɩ Masedoniya asa kʋ ba kan buu mɛ ba, nɩɩ ba be wu fɛɛ fan man kʋʋla fanɛ n‐yɩɩ mʋ, anɛ ipeeli ɩ gyɛ kawɛ bɔla, kɛ fanɔɔ fanɛ lɛɛ kɩlantan bɔla, fɛɛ a maa taa anɛ n‐yɩɩ tʋʋ fanɛ sʋ mʋ.

english_verse: So I have decided to ask Titus and the others to spend some time with you before I arrive. This way they can arrange to collect the money you have promised. Then you will have the chance to give because you want to, and not because you feel forced to.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ n wu yɛ i tiri fɛɛ n kʋlɛ mɛ bɩrɩsa ana yɛ ba gyankpaa mɛ ba fanɛ asɛ, kɛ ba ba kʋʋla afulee tʋʋtʋʋ mʋ nɩɩ fan da fanɛ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ fɛɛ fen biti fɛn sa mʋ. Amaa ɩ baa ɩ gyɛ tʋʋtʋʋ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ lɩɩ nkɔlɔ tɔ, man gyɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ nyan fanɛ.

english_verse: Remember this saying, “A few seeds make a small harvest, but a lot of seeds make a big harvest.”
translation_verse: Fan nyiŋi fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o duu atɔ duusa gbɛrɛɛ mʋ, ɛɛ nyɛ adɔɔ‐gyitɔ gbɛrɛɛ, nɩɩ ɔmʋ nɩɩ o duu atɔ duusa gaa mʋ, ɛɛ nyɛ adɔɔ‐gyitɔ gaa.

english_verse: Each of you must make up your own mind about how much to give. But don't feel sorry that you must give and don't feel you are forced to give. God loves people who love to give.
translation_verse: Fanɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ɔ sa kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ fɛ nfɛɛrɛ lɩɩ mʋ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ yɛ ee biti ɔ sa mʋ, kɛ ɩ man ba waa fɛɛ ɩɩ kɔ mʋ, abɛɛ ɔkʋ ɩɩ nyan mʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ sa kɔkɔlɔ fuuli tɔ.

english_verse: God can bless you with everything you need, and you will always have more than enough to do all kinds of good things for others.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ ɩɩ taalɛ yɛgɛ kɛ fan nyɛ kabwaala kyʋn sʋ, saamʋ fen biti fan nyɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kii tiri fanɛ, kɛ fan nyɛ kyʋn sʋ, kɛ fan kyɛ kusun danbɩrasa kʋmaa tɔ.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “God freely gives his gifts to the poor, and always does right.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, “Ɩbwaarɛ ii bugi mʋ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ, ɛɛ kɛɛ atiripu atɔ, nɩɩ mʋ kɩdanbɩrasa kɩ man sʋ ɔkaa.”

english_verse: God gives seed to farmers and provides everyone with food. He will increase what you have, so you can give even more to those in need.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ sa oduupu atɔ duusa yɛ agyitɔ‐gyisa mʋ, mʋ kʋlʋn maŋa ii biti ɔ sa fanɛ atɔ duusa mʋ, kɛ ɩ kɔyɩ, kɛ ɩ sɔyɩ, kɛ fan tɩŋɛ kʋkyɔ, kɩdanbɩrasa sʋ.

english_verse: You will be blessed in every way, and you will be able to keep on being generous. Then many people will thank God when we deliver your gift.
translation_verse: Ee biti ɔ yɛgɛ fan biliŋi atɔ wuya ana ɔkpa kʋmaa nɩmʋ sʋ, kɛ fan taalɛ waa kɩdanbɩrasa saŋa kʋmaa nɩmʋ. Kɛ lɩɩ afulee mʋ nɩɩ fan bɔla anɛ sʋ kɛɛ mʋ, ɩ yɛgɛ asa kpini ba taa afwaala sa Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: What you are doing is much more than a service that supplies God's people with what they need. It is something that will make many others thank God.
translation_verse: Kɛkɛɛ kusun mʋ nɩɩ fɛn waa falɛ, man gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asa wʋlɛ nkʋn tɔ nɩɩ ɩɩ kyɛ, amaa ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ asa gaalaagaa ba sʋ afwaala bɛɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: The way in which you have proved yourselves by this service will bring honor and praise to God. You believed the message about Christ, and you obeyed it by sharing generously with God's people and with everyone else.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ, fanɛ kusun danbɩrasa maa kaapʋ asa kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan du mʋ, bee biti ba taa bʋnyaa sa Ɩbwaarɛ, lɩɩ Krisito asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ gyii, yɛ kɩlɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ afulee kɛkɛɛ mʋ nɩɩ fɛn kyɛ bamʋ tɔ yɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ mʋ.

english_verse: Now they are praying for you and want to see you, because God used you to bless them so very much.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ bamʋ gbaa bamʋ nkɔlɔ ɩ gyan fanɛ sʋ, nɩɩ bee biti ba baa bɛɛ kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ bɛɛ sa fanɛ, lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala kʋkyɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sa fanɛ sʋ mʋ.

english_verse: Thank God for his gift that is too wonderful for words!
translation_verse: Fan yɛgɛ a taa afwaala sa Ɩbwaarɛ, lɩɩ kɛkɛɛ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ man sʋ kudubi mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: Do you think I am a coward when I am with you and brave when I am far away? Well, I ask you to listen, because Christ himself was humble and gentle.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ Krisito n‐yɩɩ kasɛ kɩbɩya yɛ mʋ kɩbwahn sʋ mʋ, n kʋlɛ fanɛ. Mɛ, Pɔɔlɩ mʋ nɩɩ fanɛ tɔ akʋ bɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, n kan n bʋ fanɛ asɛ mʋ, n bɩya mɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ katɔwɛ tɔ, amaa nɩɩ n man kan n bʋ fanɛ asɛ mʋ, n yɩlɛ kɩnyɩn tɔ n tɔwɛ mʋ,

english_verse: Some people have said we act like the people of this world. So when I arrive, I expect I will have to be firm and forceful in what I say to them. Please don't make me treat you that way.
translation_verse: n kʋlɛ fanɛ fɛɛ n kan ba fanɛ asɛ mʋ, fan man yɛgɛ n ba yɩlɛ kɩnyɩn tɔ tɔwɛ sa fanɛ. Amaa n kan ba mʋ, n biti n ba yɩlɛ kɩnyɩn tɔ tɔwɛ sa bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ fɛ nfɛɛrɛ yɛ dulinyaa atɔ danbɩrasa kebiti sʋ nɩɩ an waa Ɩbwaarɛ kusun mʋ.

english_verse: We live in this world, but we don't act like its people
translation_verse: Ɩ gyɛ kesintin fɛɛ an bʋ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ bɩrɛ, amaa man gyɛ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ kɩnaa nɩɩ an kɔ.

english_verse: or fight our battles with the weapons of this world. Instead, we use God's power that can destroy fortresses. We destroy arguments
translation_verse: Adʋntɔ mʋ nɩɩ an sʋ an kɔ mʋ, man gyɛ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ adʋntɔ kudubi, amaa ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ adʋntɔ bʋlʋnsa mʋ nɩɩ ii nyita ɔlʋn kumu kʋmaa nɩmʋ.

english_verse: and every bit of pride that keeps anyone from knowing God. We capture people's thoughts and make them obey Christ.
translation_verse: An sʋ ɩmʋ an nyita nfɛɛrɛ kʋmaa, yɛ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ alala‐sɩn kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ii tii nyɩmɩsa kɩnyɛ bɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ, nɩɩ an kɔ gyii nfɛɛrɛ kʋmaa nɩmʋ sʋ fɛɛ ɔdʋn, kɛ ɔ ba nyɛ kʋsʋ‐nu sa Krisito.

english_verse: And when you completely obey him, we will punish anyone who refuses to obey.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fan kan nyɛ kʋsʋ‐nu naa lʋwɛ mʋ, an biti a ba bɩɩtɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba waa kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn mʋ asʋ.

english_verse: You judge by appearances. If any of you think you are the only ones who belong to Christ, then think again. We belong to Christ as much as you do.
translation_verse: Fanɛ fanɛ bɩrɛ sʋsʋ‐sʋsʋ wʋlɛ nkʋn nɩɩ fɛn kɩɩ atɔ. Nɩɩ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ kan kɔɔlɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ gyii fɛɛ ɔ gyɛ Krisito lɛɛ mʋ, ɩ dagaa maa wu fɛɛ anɛ gbaa anɛ an gyɛ Krisito lɛɛ nɩn, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ mʋ gbaa mʋ gyɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Maybe I brag a little too much about the authority that the Lord gave me to help you and not to hurt you. Yet I am not embarrassed to brag.
translation_verse: Halɩɩ nɩɩ n kan n kaapʋ mɛ n‐yɩɩ kyʋn sʋ gbaa lɩɩ ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ sa anɛ yɛ a taa kyɛ fanɛ tɔ kɛ i kpiya fanɛ ansi tɔ, nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ yɛ an bɩɩtɛ fanɛ tʋʋ kasɛ sʋ mʋ, ipeeli ɩ mɛɛ yɛ i gyii mɛ lɩɩ ɩmʋ sʋ.

english_verse: And I am not trying to scare you with my letters.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n mee biti ɩ naa ba fɛɛ, n kyʋrɔɔ mɛ ɩwʋlɛ n sʋ n ŋaala fanɛ.

english_verse: Some of you are saying, “Paul's letters are harsh and powerful. But in person, he is a weakling and has nothing worth saying.”
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ akʋ bɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Pɔɔlɩ ɩwʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kyʋrɔɔ mʋ, sʋ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋlʋn nɩɩ i budu. Amaa nɩɩ ɔ bʋ anɛ asɛ bɩrɛ, ɔ pɔɔ nɩɩ mʋ asɩn tɔwɛsa ɩ mɛɛ kaapʋ sɛhn.”

english_verse: Those people had better understand that when I am with you, I will do exactly what I say in my letters.
translation_verse: Kanɩn asa mʋ ɩ dagaa ba maa bɩɩ fɛɛ, asɩn kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ an man bʋ fanɛ asɛ nɩɩ an kyʋrɔɔ anɛ ɩwʋlɛ tɔ sa fanɛ mʋ, ɩmʋ maŋa nɩɩ an bʋ fanɛ asɛ gbaa, an biti a tɔwɛ fanɛ.

english_verse: We won't brag about something we don't have a right to brag about. We will only brag about the work God has sent us to do, and you are part of that work.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ anɛɛnɛ bɩrɛ, a mɛɛ yɛ a kaapʋ anɛ n‐yɩɩ naa kyʋn anɛ ɩkaa sʋ. Amaa an biti a kaapʋ anɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ kusun mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa waa anɛ abaa tɔ, halɩɩ an waa kɩmʋ ba fʋʋ fanɛ asɛ mʋ.

english_verse: We are not bragging more than we should. After all, we did bring the message about Christ to you.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ a mɛɛ kaapʋ anɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ fanɛ sʋ an kyʋn sʋ, naafɔɔ a man dɩn fʋʋ fanɛ asɛ mʋ, amaa anɛ ɩ gyankpaa taa Krisito asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ kɩtɔwɛ ba fʋʋ fanɛ asɛ.

english_verse: We don't brag about what others have done, as if we had done those things ourselves. But I hope as you become stronger in your faith, we will be able to reach many more of the people around you. That has always been our goal.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ a mɛɛ kaapʋ anɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ kusun mʋ nɩɩ akʋ ba waa mʋ sʋ, fɛɛ anɛ ɩ waa ɩmʋ mʋ. Amaa anɛ tamaa ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ nɩɩ fan sʋ mʋ, kɩ nyɛ akyɔ tii sʋ, kɛ anɛ kusun mʋ nɩɩ an sun fanɛ asɛ mʋ, kɩ nyɛ yɛlɩgɛ tii sʋ naa fʋʋ katɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ yɩla mʋ ɔkaa.

english_verse: Then we will be able to preach the good news in other lands where we cannot take credit for work someone else has already done.
translation_verse: Kɛ a nyɛ tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ sa ɩsʋwʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ fanɛ ansi tɔ mʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ an mee biti a maa kaapʋ anɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ kusun mʋ nɩɩ ɔkʋ tɛɛ wʋla waa kasɛ kʋ sʋ.

english_verse: I am as concerned about you as God is. You were like a virgin bride I had chosen only for Christ.
translation_verse: Krisito ayaa tɔ nɩɩ n yɩlɛ n kɔ fanɛ sʋ kɔkʋrʋkɔ falɛ. Fen du nɩn fɛɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man nyi ɔnyɩn nɩɩ ɔ man sʋ ineesi ɩkʋ, nɩɩ n sʋ n sa ɔnyɩn kekili, nɩɩ ɔnyɩn maŋa ɩ gyɛ Krisito.

english_verse: But now I fear that you will be tricked, just as Eve was tricked by that lying snake. I am afraid that you might stop thinking about Christ in an honest and sincere way.
translation_verse: Amaa n sʋ kufuu fɛɛ ɔkʋ ii biti o be nyita fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ lɩɩ Krisito mʋ nɩɩ fan taa fanɛ nkɔlɔ kpini buu mʋ mʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ kɩnansɛ taa mʋ kɔnɔ ɔkɔn pɩna Hawa mʋ.

english_verse: We told you about Jesus, and you received the Holy Spirit and accepted our message. But you let some people tell you about another Jesus. Now you are ready to receive another spirit and accept a different message.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ ba tɔwɛ asɩn lɩɩ Yesu kʋ sʋ, nɩɩ ɔ kwɩɩ yɛ Yesu mʋ nɩɩ an tɔwɛ mʋ asɩn mʋ, abɛɛ nɩɩ fan kan nyɛ kayaayu kʋ, nɩɩ kɩ kwɩɩ yɛ kayaayu mʋ nɩɩ fan daa kɩnyɛ mʋ, abɛɛ nɩɩ fan nu asɩn danbɩrasa kʋ, nɩɩ ɩ kwɩɩ lɩɩ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ gyii mʋ, ɩɩ kaapʋ nɩn fɛɛ fɛn mɛɛ kɛrɛ kanɩn atɔ kɩkɔɔlɛ kyula.

english_verse: I think I am as good as any of those super apostles.
translation_verse: Amaa n mɛɛ fɛ nfɛɛrɛ yɛ n bʋ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ asunpu kparɛ mʋ kasɛ pii falɛ gbaa.

english_verse: I may not speak as well as they do, but I know as much. And this has already been made perfectly clear to you.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n kan n gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ man nyi katɔwɛ gbaa mʋ, n sʋ kinyi lɩɩ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ tɔ. Nɩɩ an kaapʋ fanɛ ɔkpa kʋmaa sʋ yɛ saŋa kʋmaa, nɩɩ kanɩn nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ.

english_verse: Was it wrong for me to lower myself and honor you by preaching God's message free of charge?
translation_verse: N maa tɔwɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn danbɩrasa sa fanɛ mʋ, n man kɔɔlɛ fanɛ sɛhn, nɩɩ bɩya mɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ, kɛ ɩ nyɛ waa fanɛ asa kparɛ mʋ, n waa alibi nɩn abɛɛ?

english_verse: I robbed other churches by taking money from them to serve you.
translation_verse: N taa kɩkpɩnɛ tʋʋ Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ ɩkʋ sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ n kɔɔlɛ nkyɛtɔ lɩɩ bamʋ asɛ, kɛ n nyɛ ba kyɛ fanɛ tɔ.

english_verse: Even when I was in need, I still didn't bother you. In fact, some of the Lord's followers from Macedonia brought me what I needed. I have not been a burden to you in the past, and I will never be a burden.
translation_verse: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n kyɩna n bʋ fanɛ asɛ nɩɩ i tiri mɛ mʋ, n man yɛgɛ nɩɩ ɩ waa kasʋla fanɛ sʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ mɛ bɩrɩsa ana mʋ nɩɩ ba lɩɩ Masedoniya mʋ ba bɩya mɛ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ii tiri mɛ. N kɩtaa mɛ n‐yɩɩ ɔkpa kʋmaa nɩmʋ sʋ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n man ba waa kasʋla fanɛ sʋ, nɩɩ n biti n kyaga sʋ waa kanɩn.

english_verse: As surely as I speak the truth about Christ, no one in Achaia can stop me from bragging about this.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Krisito kesintin mʋ maa bʋ mɛ tɔ falɛ mʋ, n tɔwɛ yɛ ɔkʋ man bʋ Akiya kɩbaafʋn nɩmʋ sʋ, nɩɩ ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ tii mɛ n‐yɩɩ kɩkaapʋ nɩmʋ sʋ.

english_verse: And it isn't because I don't love you. God himself knows how much I do love you.
translation_verse: N maa tɔwɛ falɛ mʋ, ɩ kaapʋ nɩn fɛɛ n mee biti fanɛ asɩn abɛɛ? Ayee! Ɩbwaarɛ nyi fɛɛ n biti fanɛ asɩn.

english_verse: I plan to go on doing just what I have always done. Then those people won't be able to brag about doing the same things we are doing.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩmʋ nɩɩ n waa mʋ n biti n kyaga sʋ n waa, kɛ ɩ nyɛ tii bamʋ nɩɩ bee biti ɩkpa ba kʋsaa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ mʋ ɔkpa. Lɩɩ fɛɛ bɛɛ kaapʋ yɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa kusun mʋ, anaa bamʋ lɛɛ gyɛ kʋlʋn nɩn.

english_verse: Anyway, they are no more than false apostles and dishonest workers. They only pretend to be apostles of Christ.
translation_verse: Kanɩn asa maŋa ba gyɛ antɩŋɛsa asunpu mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ pɩna asa lɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ bee sun kusun mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ ba baala bamʋ daa bɛɛ waa fɛɛ ba gyɛ Krisito asunpu.

english_verse: And it is no wonder. Even Satan tries to make himself look like an angel of light.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ man gyɛ asɩn kyinkyinsa, lɩɩ fɛɛ Sɩtaanɛ gbaa‐gbaa ɩɩ taalɛ baala mʋ daa ɛɛ ŋalɩgɛ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabɔɔ.

english_verse: So why does it seem strange for Satan's servants to pretend to do what is right? Someday they will get exactly what they deserve. Paul's Sufferings for Christ
translation_verse: Kanɩn gbaa nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ asɩn kyinkyinsa fɛɛ Sɩtaanɛ ayaafɔlɛ gbaa ba baala bamʋ daa, nɩɩ ba waa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ fɛɛ nbɔɔ mʋ nɩɩ bamʋ ɩkpa ii kyiigi mʋ. Laalaalʋwɛ mʋ bee biti ba nyɛ bamʋ asun libi kʋkɔka. Pɔɔlɩ awʋrʋfɔ kigyii fɛɛ maa gyɛ Krisito osunpu mʋ sʋ

english_verse: I don't want any of you to think I am a fool. But if you do, then let me be a fool and brag a little.
translation_verse: N pɩla tɔ n tɔwɛ yɛ, ɔkʋ ɔ man fɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ n gyɛ omelensipu. Amaa nɩɩ fɛn kan fɛ nfɛɛrɛ kanɩn mʋ, ɩmʋ bɩrɛ fɛn taa mɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fen biti fan taa omelensipu mʋ, kɛ n nyɛ kaapʋ mɛ n‐yɩɩ gbɛrɛɛ.

english_verse: When I do all this bragging, I do it as a fool and not for the Lord.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ falɛ, man gyɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ ii biti fɛɛ n tɔwɛ, amaa n‐yɩɩ kɩkaapʋ asɩn nɩmʋ tɔ mʋ, n tɔwɛ nɩn fɛɛ omelensipu.

english_verse: Yet if others want to brag about what they have done, so will I.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ asa gaalaagaa ba maa kaapʋ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ dulinyaa abi bɛɛ waa mʋ, ngbaa mɛ n biti n kaapʋ mɛ n‐yɩɩ.

english_verse: And since you are so smart, you will gladly put up with a fool.
translation_verse: Fan maa yɛ fan sʋ kanyaasɩn gaa sʋ mʋ, fɛn nyɛ kenyiita fen nu amelensipu asɛ.

english_verse: In fact, you let people make slaves of you and cheat you and steal from you. Why, you even let them strut around and slap you in the face.
translation_verse: Kesintin tɔ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa fanɛ fɛɛ anyɛ, abɛɛ ba sʋ fanɛ bee biliŋi sʋ, abɛɛ bee gyii fanɛ, abɛɛ bɛɛ kɩɩ fanɛ kɩyan, abɛɛ bɛɛ kpaalɛ fanɛ ɩtan gbaa mʋ, fɛn taalɛ fɛn nyɛ kenyiita fen sa bamʋ.

english_verse: Are they Hebrews? So am I. Are they Jews? So am I. Are they from the family of Abraham? Well, so am I.
translation_verse: Asa maŋa ba gyɛ Hibriwu abi nɩn abɛɛ? Kanɩn nɩɩ ngbaa mɛ n gyɛ. Ba gyɛ Ɩsɩrayɩ abi nɩn abɛɛ? Kanɩn nɩɩ ngbaa mɛ n gyɛ. Ba gyɛ Abraham anaana‐bii nɩn abɛɛ? Kanɩn nɩɩ ngbaa mɛ n gyɛ.

english_verse: Are they servants of Christ? I am a fool to talk this way, but I serve him better than they do. I have worked harder and have been put in jail more times. I have been beaten with whips more and have been in danger of death more often.
translation_verse: Ba gyɛ Krisito ayaafɔlɛ nɩn abɛɛ? N nyi mɛ katɔwɛ nɩmʋ maa duli ɩbʋn bɩrɛ, amaa n gyɛ kɩyaafɔlɛ kparɛ n kyɔ bamʋ. N sun kusun ɔlʋn sʋ n kyɔ bamʋ, nɩɩ ba tii mɛ ibu saŋa kʋmaa nɩmʋ ɩ kyɔ bamʋ, ba taa awulibi tɩŋɛ mɛ libi‐libi ɩ kyɔ bamʋ, nɩɩ n gyaŋa lewu saŋa kʋkyɔ.

english_verse: Five times my own people gave me
translation_verse: Gyiwu abi ba taa awulibi tɩŋɛ mɛ adɩsa yɛ akpanɔ kanɩn ɩlɩɩ inuu.

english_verse: Three times the Romans beat me with a big stick, and once my enemies stoned me. I have been shipwrecked three times, and I even had to spend a night and a day in the sea.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Roma abi gbaa ba taa abɩlɩtɔ kpekpesen da mɛ ɩlɩɩ ɩsa, nɩɩ saŋa kʋ asa ba twɩɩ mɛ abuu, nɩɩ ɔkʋlɩ lala taa mɛ naa watɛ ɩlɩɩ ɩsa, nɩɩ kakaakʋ n dɛ ɔpʋ sʋ kalayɩ tɩyɛ kyɔwɛ.

english_verse: During my many travels, I have been in danger from rivers, robbers, my own people, and foreigners. My life has been in danger in cities, in deserts, at sea, and with people who only pretended to be the Lord's followers.
translation_verse: Mɛ kɩnatɛ tɔ mʋ, n gyaŋa kinsi‐payɩ gaalaagaa. N nyɛ kinsi‐payɩ lɩɩ ɩbʋn kɩbɔla sʋ, yɛ ayu mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ nyan bɛɛ kɔɔlɛ atɔ abaa tɔ, yɛ mɛ asa Gyiwu abi, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ abaa tɔ. Nɩɩ n nyɛ kinsi‐payɩ ndɛ lala tɔ, yɛ ɩsʋwʋlɛ sʋ, yɛ ɔpʋ sʋ. Nɩɩ n nyɛ kinsi‐payɩ lɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ pɩna yɛ ba gyɛ anɛ Krisito abuupu mʋ asɛ.

english_verse: I have worked and struggled and spent many sleepless nights. I have gone hungry and thirsty and often had nothing to eat. I have been cold from not having enough clothes to keep me warm.
translation_verse: N sun kusun kenken nɩɩ n kpɩnɛ, halɩɩ nkɛ damantɛ n mɛɛ nyɛ nsɩɩrɛ n dɛ. Akʋn yɛ bʋlɩfɔ nɩɩ n naa, nɩɩ saŋa gaalaagaa sɛhn man loo mɛ kɔnɔ tɔ. Nɩɩ n pan atɔ bunsa nɩɩ n dɛ awɔɔ.

english_verse: Besides everything else, each day I am burdened down, worrying about all the churches.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ kpini ɩ naa dɛ, ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ nyan mɛ kakɛ kʋmaa mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ n fɛ Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: When others are weak, I am weak too. When others are tricked into sin, I get angry.
translation_verse: Anɩmʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii ɩɩ kɔɔgɛ sʋ, nɩɩ n mee su n sa mʋ? Anɩmʋ nɩɩ ba pɩna mʋ ba waa alibi tɔ, nɩɩ mɛ ɔtɔ tɔ mɛɛ fɔyɩ mɛ?

english_verse: If I have to brag, I will brag about how weak I am.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n kan i tiri fɛɛ n kaapʋ mɛ n‐yɩɩ mʋ, n biti n kaapʋ mɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ mɛ kɩpɔɔsɛ sʋ nɩn.

english_verse: God, the Father of our Lord Jesus, knows I am not lying. And God is to be praised forever!
translation_verse: Anɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Mʋ‐Sɛ, nɩɩ ayɩn‐bi ɩ gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ kakpaa mʋ, i nyi yɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ falɛ man gyɛ antɩŋɛsa.

english_verse: The governor of Damascus at the time of King Aretas had the city gates guarded, so he could capture me.
translation_verse: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n bʋ Damasiko kadɛ tɔ mʋ, Owura Aretasi mʋ ɔsʋwʋlɛ ɔkɩɩsʋpʋ mʋ lɛɛ akunpu yɛ ba kun nbunɔ mʋ nɩɩ ii loo Damasiko kadɛ mʋ nɩɩ kɩbandɩyɛ kɩ kyaabɔɔ kɩmʋ mʋ, kɛ ba nyɛ kɩtaa mɛ.

english_verse: But I escaped by being let down in a basket through a window in the city wall.
translation_verse: Amaa akʋ ba taa mɛ waa kɩlantan tɔ, bʋlɛ kɩbandɩyɛ mʋ ɔbɔ tɔ, kpɩlɩgaa mɛ yii, nɩɩ n nyɛ sɩlɛ lɩɩ mʋ abaa tɔ.

english_verse: I have to brag. There is nothing to be gained by it, but I must brag about the visions and other things that the Lord has shown me.
translation_verse: Ɩ dagaa n maa kyaga sʋ kaapʋ mɛ n‐yɩɩ. Halɩɩ ɩ maa man sʋ tɔnɔ gbaa mʋ, nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ n biti n tɔwɛ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛgɛ nɩɩ n wu fɛɛ idee, yɛ asɩnlɛɛ kaapʋsa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa sa mɛ.

english_verse: I am planning to visit you for the third time. But I still won't make a burden of myself. What I really want is you, and not what you have. Children are not supposed to save up for their parents, but parents are supposed to take care of their children.
translation_verse: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ n kʋʋla lʋwɛ n ba bɔɔ fanɛ sʋ ɩlɩɩ sasapʋ. Nɩɩ mee biti fɛɛ n maa biliŋi kasʋla sa fanɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ man gyɛ fanɛ atɔ nɩɩ n biti, fanɛ gbaa‐gbaa nɩɩ n biti. Nɩɩ man gyɛ nbii ii biti atɔ bɛɛ yɩla bamʋ akʋʋgɛpʋ, amɔɔ akʋʋgɛpʋ ii biti bɛɛ yɩla bamʋ‐bii ana.

english_verse: As I said, only God really knows if this man was in his body at the time.
translation_verse: N bwii n tɔwɛ yɛ, ɔnyɩn nɩmʋ mʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kpini nɩɩ ɩ taa kpee sʋsʋ nɩn o, mʋ kala nkʋn nɩɩ ɩ taa kpee nɩn o, n man nyi, amɔɔ Ɩbwaarɛ nkʋn i nyi.

english_verse: But he was taken up into paradise, where he heard things too wonderful to tell.
translation_verse: Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ maa taa mʋ kpee paradise mʋ, o nu asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ba mɛɛ taalɛ tɔwɛ, yɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa man sʋ ɔkpa yɛ ɔ tɔwɛ.

english_verse: Yet even if I did brag, I would not be foolish. I would simply be speaking the truth. But I will try not to say too much. That way, none of you will think more highly of me than you should because of what you have seen me do and say.
translation_verse: Halɩɩ nɩɩ n kan n kaapʋ mɛ n‐yɩɩ gbaa mʋ, n mɛɛ yɛ n waa omelensipu. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ kesintin. Amaa n lɛɛ mɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ n‐yɩɩ kɩkaapʋ tɔ, kɛ ɔkʋ ɔ man nyɛ kaala mɛ kyʋn kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ o wu mɛ maa waa sʋ, abɛɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ sʋ.

english_verse: Of course, I am now referring to the wonderful things I saw. One of Satan's angels was sent to make me suffer terribly, so that I would not feel too proud.
translation_verse: Kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ waa kɛ n man taa Ɩbwaarɛ kɩlɛɛkaapʋ damantɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa sa mɛ mʋ waa n‐yɩɩ alala‐sɩn sʋ mʋ, ɔ yɛgɛ nɩɩ Sɩtaanɛ sun kʋlɔ‐libi kʋ waa mɛ n‐yɩɩ tɔ fɛɛ owii, nɩɩ kii yii mɛ. Nɩɩ kʋlɔ kɩɩ nyanla mɛ, nɩɩ kii tii mɛ ɔkpa, kɛ n man nyɛ n waa mɛ n‐yɩɩ alala‐sɩn tɔ.

english_verse: Three times I begged the Lord to make this suffering go away.
translation_verse: N kʋlɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu ɩlɩɩ ɩsa fɛɛ ɔ lɛɛ ɩmʋ lɩɩ mɛ sʋ.

english_verse: But he replied, “My gift of undeserved grace is all you need. My power is strongest when you are weak.” So if Christ keeps giving me his power, I will gladly brag about how weak I am.
translation_verse: Amaa ɔ lɛɛ mɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Mɛ kabwaala mʋ nɩɩ n sʋ sa fʋ mʋ, ɩ kʋkwɛ fʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ fʋ kɩpɔɔsɛ mʋ tɔ nɩɩ mɛ ɔlʋn mʋ ɩɩ lɩɩ ifuli.” Ɩmʋ sʋ n biti n kaapʋ mɛ n‐yɩɩ kensi‐gyii tɔ gaa lɩɩ mɛ kɩpɔɔsɛ tɔ, kɛ Krisito ɔlʋn mʋ kɩ ba bun mɛ sʋ.

english_verse: Yes, I am glad to be weak or insulted or mistreated or to have troubles and sufferings, if it is for Christ. Because when I am weak, I am strong. Paul's Concern for the Lord's Followers at Corinth
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ lɩɩ Krisito sʋ mʋ, mi ansi i gyii lɩɩ mɛ kɩpɔɔsɛ tɔ, yɛ asebi tɔ, yɛ kayɩɩ kɩtaa tɔ, yɛ kanyanla tɔ, yɛ awʋrʋfɔ tɔ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n pɔɔ mʋ, saŋa maa nɩɩ n sʋ ɔlʋn. Pɔɔlɩ kayɩyɛɛ sa Korinto abi

english_verse: I have been making a fool of myself. But you forced me to do it, when you should have been speaking up for me. I may be nothing at all, but I am as good as those super apostles.
translation_verse: N waa fɛɛ omelensipu, amaa fanɛ i nin mɛ nɩɩ n waa kanɩn. Naafɔɔ fanɛ ɩ dagaa fan maa lɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n du mʋ kaapʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ halɩɩ n maa man gyɛ sɛhn gbaa mʋ, bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ yɛ ba gyɛ “Krisito asunpu kparɛ” ba man kyɔ mɛ pii falɛ gbaa.

english_verse: When I was with you, I was patient and worked all the powerful miracles and signs and wonders of a true apostle.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ lɛɛ ɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ n gyɛ Krisito osunpu mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, n nyɛ kɔkɔlɔ yɩlɛ tɔ, nɩɩ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ n waa ɩsɩnkaala yɛ adangana yɛ asɩn kyinkyinsa fanɛ asɛ.

english_verse: You missed out on only one blessing the other churches received. That is, you didn't have to support me. Forgive me for doing you wrong.
translation_verse: Mɩnɛ atɔ nɩɩ Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ asansa mʋ ba nyɛ nɩɩ fanɛ bɩrɛ fan man nyɛ? Amɔɔ afulee asɩn nɩɩ n man taa ba sʋla fanɛ. Nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ kanɩn bɩrɛ fan taa mɛ alibi kɛɛ mɛ.

english_verse: So I will gladly give all I have and all I am. Will you love me less for loving you too much?
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ n biti n kpɩnɛ kɛ n nyita mɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa fanɛ sʋ, kɛ n taa mɛ n‐yɩɩ gbaa tii sʋ. Fɛɛ n maa sʋ kebiti lala falɛ sa fanɛ mʋ, fen biti fan nyɛ kebiti pii sa mɛ nɩn?

english_verse: You agree that I wasn't a burden to you. Maybe that's because I was trying to catch you off guard and trick you.
translation_verse: N nyi fan maa kɔɔlɛ kyula fɛɛ n man biliŋi kasʋla fanɛ sʋ. Amaa akʋ bɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ n taa mɛ kanyaasɩn ɔkpa sʋ n nyɛ fanɛ.

english_verse: Were you cheated by any of those I sent to you?
translation_verse: Nɛnɛ sʋ? Asa mʋ nɩɩ n sun bamʋ fanɛ asɛ mʋ, n bɔla bamʋ sʋ gyii fanɛ nɩn abɛɛ?

english_verse: I urged Titus to visit you, and I sent another follower with him. But Titus didn't cheat you, and we felt and behaved the same way he did.
translation_verse: Mɛ ɩ kʋlɛ Titusi yɛ o kpee fanɛ asɛ, nɩɩ n sun anɛ bɩrɩsa kʋ yɛ o buu mʋ kpee. Abɛɛ fɛn fɛ nfɛɛrɛ yɛ Titusi ba pɩna fanɛ gyii nɩn? Man gyɛ nfɛɛrɛ kʋlʋn yɛ ɔkpa kʋlʋn sʋ nɩɩ anaa mʋ an naa?

english_verse: Have you been thinking all along that we have been defending ourselves to you? Actually, we have been speaking to God as followers of Christ. But, my friends, we did it all for your good.
translation_verse: Akʋtɔ fen fɛ nfɛɛrɛ nɩn fɛɛ an tɔwɛ an lɛɛ anɛ kɔnɔ nɩn. Ayee! Man gyɛ kanɩn nɩn. Amaa an tɔwɛ nɩn fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Krisito ii biti fɛɛ a tɔwɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ mʋ. Mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ ana danbɩrasa, kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ an waa mʋ, an waa nɩn kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ kyɛ fanɛ tɔ.

english_verse: I am afraid when I come, we won't be pleased with each other. I fear that some of you may be arguing or jealous or angry or selfish or gossiping or insulting each other. I even fear that you may be proud and acting like a mob.
translation_verse: Ɩ sʋ mɛ kufuu fɛɛ n kan ba fanɛ asɛ mʋ, n mɛɛ yɛ n ba wu fanɛ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n biti fɛɛ n ba wu fanɛ mʋ, nɩɩ fanɛ gbaa fɛn mɛɛ yɛ fen wu mɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fen biti fan wu mɛ mʋ. Ɩ sʋ mɛ kufuu fɛɛ n biti n ba wu nluu yɛ kayɩɩ‐basa yɛ agbʋ lala yɛ kigyi‐lɛɛ yɛ asa kɩsaalɛ yɛ asa asɩn kɩtɔwɛ yɛ alala‐sɩn yɛ nbarɩgɛ tɔ mʋ, ɩ maa bʋ fanɛ tɔ.

english_verse: I am afraid God will make me ashamed when I visit you again. I will feel like crying because many of you have never given up your old sins. You are still doing things that are immoral, indecent, and shameful.
translation_verse: Ɩ sʋ mɛ kufuu fɛɛ nɩɩ n kan bwii ba fanɛ asɛ mʋ, mɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ bɩya mɛ kasɛ fanɛ ansi tɔ, kɛ mɛ kɔkɔlɔ ki nyita mɛ lɩɩ asa gaalaagaa mʋ nɩɩ ba wʋla waa alibi, nɩɩ ba man kyɛɛgɛ bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ lɩɩ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ ineesi, yɛ kakyɩɩ yɛ kanyɩn biti kɩgyagaa, yɛ agyaga‐sɩn kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ i tii sʋ mʋ.

english_verse: I am on my way to visit you for the third time. And as the Scriptures say, “Any charges must be proved true by at least two or three witnesses.”
translation_verse: Kɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ mɛ ɩlɩɩ sasapʋ mʋ nɩɩ n biti n ba bɔɔ fanɛ sʋ. Ba kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, “Pɔyɩ kɛ ba kɔɔlɛ asɩn kʋ kyula mʋ, ɩ dagaa asa anyɔ abɛɛ asa asá ba maa gyii ɩmʋ kesintin.”

english_verse: During my second visit I warned you that I would punish you and anyone else who doesn't stop sinning. I am far away from you now, but I give you the same warning.
translation_verse: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n ba bɔɔ fanɛ sʋ kɩnyɔsapʋ mʋ, n da bamʋ nɩɩ ba wʋla waa alibi yɛ asansa mʋ amu tɔ. Nɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ n maa man bʋ fanɛ asɛ falɛ mʋ, n bɩla n nyiŋi fanɛ yɛ, nɩɩ n kan ba mʋ, n mɛɛ yɛ n yɛgɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba san bɛɛ waa alibi mʋ.

english_verse: This should prove to you that I am speaking for Christ. When he corrects you, he won't be weak. He will be powerful!
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fan maa biti fɛɛ n kaapʋ fanɛ fɛɛ Krisito ɩɩ bɔla mɛ sʋ ɛɛ tɔwɛ mʋ, fen biti fan wu. Lɩɩ fɛɛ man gyɛ yɛ o yuuli yɛ fanɛ nɩn, amaa ɔ gyɛ ɔlʋnpʋ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ fanɛ tɔ.

english_verse: Although he was weak when he was nailed to the cross, he now lives by the power of God. We are weak, just as Christ was. But you will see that we will live by the power of God, just as Christ does.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩ gyɛ kesintin fɛɛ mu keyuuli sʋ nɩɩ ba da mʋ mata oyu laasa sʋ, amaa lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔlʋn tɔ sʋ mʋ ɔ tɛ nkpa tɔ. Kanɩn nɩɩ anɛ gbaa anɛ an yuuli fɛɛ mʋ, amaa lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔlʋn tɔ sʋ mʋ, an tii Krisito sʋ kɛ a bʋga kyɩna sun fanɛ.

english_verse: Test yourselves and find out if you really are true to your faith. If you pass the test, you will discover that Christ is living in you. But if Christ isn't living in you, you have failed.
translation_verse: Fan kɩɩ fanɛ kakyɩna tɔ kɛ fan kɩɩ yɛ ɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ fan sʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii abɛɛ? Fan man nyi fɛɛ Krisito Yesu tɛ fanɛ tɔ? Ɔ tɛ fanɛ tɔ, amɔɔ kanɩn bɩrɛ fan tɩyɛ fanɛ kakyɩna tɔ nɩn.

english_verse: I hope you will discover we have not failed.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n sʋ tamaa fɛɛ fen biti fan bɩɩ yɛ anɛɛnɛ bɩrɛ a man tɩyɛ.

english_verse: We pray you will stop doing evil things. We don't pray like this to make ourselves look good, but to get you to do right, even if we are failures.
translation_verse: An kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ fɛɛ fan man kan waa alibi. Ɩ man gyɛ yɛ asa ba wu anɛ yɛ an waa atɔ, amaa fan waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ dɛ ɔkpa, halɩɩ nɩɩ i du fɛɛ an waa tɩyɛ gbaa.

english_verse: All we can do is to follow the truth and not fight against it.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ a mɛɛ taalɛ waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kii tii Krisito kesintin mʋ ɔkpa, amɔɔ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ kyɛ kesintin mʋ tɔ nkʋn.

english_verse: Even though we are weak, we are glad that you are strong, and we pray you will do even better.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fan kan fan bʋlʋn, nɩɩ anɛɛnɛ an pɔɔ mʋ, ɩɩ waa anɛ ɔkɔn. Nɩɩ anɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ fan dan fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ naa lʋwɛ kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

english_verse: I am writing these things to you before I arrive. This way I won't have to be hard on you when I use the authority the Lord has given me. I was given this authority, so I could help you and not destroy you.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ fan wu fɛɛ n maa man bʋ fanɛ asɛ falɛ mʋ, n kyʋrɔɔ fanɛ ɩnɩmʋ. Saamʋ nɩɩ n kan ba fanɛ asɛ mʋ, n mee biti fɛɛ n taa ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu taa sa mɛ mʋ tɔwɛ ŋmanyan fanɛ. Ɔlʋn maŋa nɩɩ ɔ taa sa mɛ yɛ n kyɛ fanɛ tɔ, kɛ fan dan fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ, man gyɛ yɛ a taa ɔlʋn mʋ nin fanɛ tʋʋ. Afwaala laalaalʋwɛ

english_verse: Goodbye, my friends. Do better and pay attention to what I have said. Try to get along and live peacefully with each other. Now I pray that God, who gives love and peace, will be with you.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, mɛ katɔwɛ mʋ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, fan kyɩna danbɩrasa, fan payɩ fanɛ anɛ ansi kɛ fanɛ kakyɩna tɔ kɩ waa ɔdan kyɛɛkyɛɛ, fan nu mɛ asɛ, fan tɔwɛ kyula abaa, kɛ fan kyɩna kayɩɩ‐yuuli tɔ. N kʋlɛ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ kebiti wuya yɛ kayɩɩ yuuli wuya mʋ, ɔ baa ɔ bʋ fanɛ asɛ.

english_verse: Give each other a warm greeting. All God's people send their greetings.
translation_verse: Fan taa kibiri abaa tɔ fwaala abaa.

english_verse: From the apostle Paul and from all the Lord's followers with me. I was chosen to be an apostle by Jesus Christ and by God the Father, who raised him from death. No mere human chose or appointed me to this work. To the churches in Galatia:
translation_verse: N kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ n kyʋŋɛ fanɛ Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ fan bʋ Galati ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ, nɩɩ akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ nfɩɩ mʋ kpini ba tii mɛ sʋ nɩɩ an fwaala fanɛ.

english_verse: I pray that God the Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace!
translation_verse: Anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ maa anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito ba bwaala fanɛ kɛ ba sa fanɛ kayɩɩ‐yuuli.

english_verse: Christ obeyed God our Father and gave himself as a sacrifice for our sins to rescue us from this evil world.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ anɛ alibi sʋ mʋ, Yesu kyula taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ lɛɛ saraga wu sa anɛ, kɛ ɔ nyɛ lɛɛ anɛ lɩɩ ndaga kakyɩna libi ɔlʋn mʋ tɔ. Anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti tɔ nɩɩ o kyula nɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ kpini ɩ waa kanɩn.

english_verse: God will be given glory forever and ever. Amen. The Only True Message
translation_verse: Bʋnyaa ɔ baa ɔ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ kakpaa! Amen. Asɩn Danbɩrasa kʋlʋn ɩ bʋ tɔ

english_verse: I am shocked that you have so quickly turned from God, who chose you with his gift of undeserved grace. You have believed another message,
translation_verse: I kyinkyin mɛ gaa fɛɛ fan maa tee biliŋi fanɛ kamaa sa Ɩbwaarɛ bilen, yɛgɛ mʋ ɩ bɔla Krisito kabwaala mʋ sʋ tɩɩ fanɛ. Nɩɩ fan biliŋi kpee fan buu asɩn kʋkwɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ akʋ bɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ.

english_verse: when there is really only one true message. But some people are causing you trouble and want to make you turn away from the good news about Christ.
translation_verse: Kesintin yɛgɛ asɩn danbɩrasa kʋ man bɩla ɩ bʋ tɔ. Amaa n tɔwɛ fanɛ ɩnɩmʋ nɩn, lɩɩ fɛɛ asa akʋ bɛɛ wuliti fanɛ tɔ, bee biti fɛɛ ba kyɛɛgɛ Krisito asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ.

english_verse: I pray that God will punish anyone who preaches anything different from our message to you! It doesn't matter if that person is one of us or an angel from heaven.
translation_verse: Amaa, halɩɩ anɛ abɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabɔɔ, kan lɩɩ sʋsʋ ba tɔwɛ fanɛ asɩn danbɩrasa kʋ, nɩɩ ɩ kwɩɩ yɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ an tɔwɛ sa fanɛ mʋ, mʋ laakʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ bɩɩtɛ mʋ kʋsʋ kakpaa.

english_verse: I have said it before, and I will say it again. I hope God will punish anyone who preaches anything different from what you have already believed.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an wʋla tɔwɛ mʋ, n bɩla n pɩla tɔ yɛ, nɩɩ ɔsa kʋ kan ɛɛ tɔwɛ fanɛ asɩn danbɩrasa kʋ, nɩɩ ɩ kwɩɩ yɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ waa fanɛ lɛɛ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ bɩɩtɛ mʋ kʋsʋ kakpaa.

english_verse: I am not trying to please people. I want to please God. Do you think I am trying to please people? If I were doing that, I would not be a servant of Christ. How Paul Became an Apostle
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩmʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ falɛ mʋ, ɩ kaapʋ nɩn fɛɛ n biti nyɩmɩsa ɔ kɔɔlɛ mɛ kyula nɩn abɛɛ? Ayee! N biti Ɩbwaarɛ nkʋn ɔ kɔɔlɛ mɛ kyula. N biti nyɩmɩsa ansi i gyii mɛ sʋ nɩn abɛɛ? Nɩɩ n kan n biti fɛɛ nyɩmɩsa ansi i gyii mɛ sʋ mʋ, naafɔɔ n mɛɛ yɛ n bɩla n gyɛ Krisito kɩyaafɔlɛ. Kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɩɩ Pɔɔlɩ ba waa Krisito osunpu

english_verse: My friends, I want you to know that no one made up the message I preach.
translation_verse: Mɛ bɩrɩsa ana akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu, n biti fan bɩɩ fɛɛ, asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ mʋ, ɩ man gyɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ lɩɩ daadimaadi asɛ.

english_verse: It wasn't given or taught to me by some mere human. My message came directly from Jesus Christ when he appeared to me.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ man gyɛ nyɩmɩsa kʋ asɛ nɩɩ n nyɛ ɩmʋ, abɛɛ ɔsa kʋ ɩ kaapʋ mɛ ɩmʋ. Amaa Yesu Krisito ɩ lɛɛ ɩmʋ kaapʋ mɛ.

english_verse: I was a much better Jew than anyone else my own age, and I obeyed every law our ancestors had given us.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ mɛ sara sʋ Gyiwu abi adamantɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ, n gyankpaa bamʋ anɛ Gyiwu abi kabwaarɛ‐sun mʋ tɔ. Nɩɩ anɛ anaana‐tɔ awaasa mʋ n yɛgɛ nɩɩ i gyii mi kumu, nɩɩ n kpan mɛ n‐yɩɩ yɛ ɩ yɩlɛ.

english_verse: to show me his Son, so I would announce his message to the Gentiles. I didn't talk this over with anyone.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩ bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ ansi fɛɛ ɔ lɛɛ Mu‐Bii mʋ kaapʋ mɛ, kɛ n tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ lɩɩ Mu‐Bii mʋ sʋ, sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ, nɩɩ n man taasɛ biti kɩkaapʋ lɩɩ ɔsa kʋ asɛ.

english_verse: I didn't say a word, not even to the men in Jerusalem who were apostles before I was. Instead, I went at once to Arabia, and afterwards I returned to Damascus.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n man kpee Gyerusalem naa wu bamʋ nɩɩ ba gyɛ Krisito asunpu mʋ pɔyɩ nɩɩ ngbaa mɛ n ba waa osunpu mʋ. Amaa n dan kʋsʋ opula maŋa tɔ nɩn, kpee Arabiya ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ, nɩɩ kamaa tɔ n lɩɩ tʋtɔ bwii ba Damasiko kadɛ tɔ.

english_verse: Three years later I went to visit Peter in Jerusalem and stayed with him for
translation_verse: Nsu nsa kamaa tɔ mʋ, nɩɩ n kpee Gyerusalem naa wu Pita. Nɩɩ n kyɩna mʋ asɛ nkɛ kudu anu.

english_verse: The only other apostle I saw was James, the Lord's brother.
translation_verse: N man wu Krisito asunpu mʋ ɔkʋ tii sʋ, amɔɔ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Krisito mu‐supu Gyemisi nkʋn.

english_verse: And in the presence of God I swear I am telling the truth.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ sʋ, kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ n kyʋrɔɔ n sa fanɛ falɛ gyɛ kesintin, n mɛɛ tɩn antɩŋɛsa.

english_verse: Later, I went to the regions of Syria and Cilicia.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ kamaa tɔ mʋ n kpee Siriya yɛ Kilisiya ɩsʋwʋlɛ sʋ.

english_verse: But no one who belonged to Christ's churches in Judea had ever seen me in person.
translation_verse: Kanɩn saŋa maŋa tɔ mʋ, Krisito abi kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ Gyudeya ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ mʋ, ba man pɩɩ wu mɛ yɛ ansi.

english_verse: They had only heard that the one who had been cruel to them was now preaching the message that he had once tried to destroy.
translation_verse: Amaa kʋtɔ kʋlʋn mʋ nɩɩ ba nu lɩɩ asa asɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, “Ɔnyɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ daa ɛɛ nyanla anɛ mʋ, nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ ɛɛ tɔwɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ Yesu gyii asɩn mʋ nɩɩ naafɔɔ ɔ daa kpan mʋ n‐yɩɩ fɛɛ o nyita mʋ.”

english_verse: And because of me, they praised God.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ ba yɩn Ɩbwaarɛ lɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba nu lɩɩ mɛ sʋ.

english_verse: Fourteen years later I went to Jerusalem with Barnabas. I also took along Titus.
translation_verse: Nsu kudu ana kamaa tɔ mʋ, n bwii kpee Gyerusalem. N maa Banabasi i kpee nɩɩ n taa Titusi tii sʋ kpee.

english_verse: But I went there because God had told me to go, and I explained the good news I had been preaching to the Gentiles. Then I met privately with the ones who seemed to be the most important leaders. I wanted to make sure my work in the past and my future work would not be for nothing.
translation_verse: N kpee tʋtɔ nɩn, lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ lɛɛ kaapʋ mɛ fɛɛ n kpee. N maa abɩlɩsa mʋ an gyaŋɛ anɛ nkʋn, nɩɩ n lɛɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ n sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ kasɛ kaapʋ bamʋ. N waa kanɩn nɩn kɛ ɩ man naa ba fɛɛ kusun mʋ nɩɩ n waa yɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ n san n waa falɛ mʋ, ɩ man ba biliŋi kɩyan.

english_verse: Titus went to Jerusalem with me. He was a Greek, but still he wasn't forced to be circumcised.
translation_verse: Amaa Titusi mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ mɛ asɛ, yɛgɛ be nyi maa gyɛ Giriki nyɩmɩsa gbaa mʋ, ɔkʋ man nyan mʋ yɛ ɔ tɩn mʋ oduu.

english_verse: We went there because of those who pretended to be followers and had sneaked in among us as spies. They had come to take away the freedom Christ Jesus had given us, and they were trying to make us their slaves.
translation_verse: Amaa falɛ asɩn nɩmʋ ɩ ba, lɩɩ fɛɛ asa kʋ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ pɩna yɛ ba gyɛ akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu fɛɛ anɛ mʋ ba be loo anɛ tɔ, kɛ ba ba kɩɩ anɛ n‐yɩɩ kɩnyɛ Krisito Yesu tɔ, kɛ ba nyɛ taa anɛ biliŋi Gyiwu nbara mʋ anyɛ.

english_verse: But we wanted you to have the true message. This is why we didn't give in to them, not even for a second.
translation_verse: Amaa a man daa yɛgɛ anɛ n‐yɩɩ sa bamʋ. An waa kanɩn nɩn kɛ kesintin asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ ɩ nyɛ sii fanɛ tɔ kanɩn.

english_verse: Some of them were supposed to be important leaders, but I didn't care who they were. God doesn't have any favorites! None of these so-called special leaders added anything to my message.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba daa ba gyɛ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ agyankpaapʋ mʋ, ba man taa sɛhn tii mɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ n kaapʋ mʋ sʋ. Halɩɩ ba maa gyɛ agyankpaapʋ gbaa mʋ, ɩ man tiri mɛ. Lɛɛ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ bɩrɛ mɛɛ kɩɩ nyɩmɩsa ansi sʋ.

english_verse: James, Peter, and John realized that God had given me the message about his gift of undeserved grace. And these men are supposed to be the backbone of the church. They even gave Barnabas and me a friendly handshake. This was to show that we would work with Gentiles and that they would work with Jews.
translation_verse: Gyemisi maa Pita yɛ Gyɔn nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ nyi ba maa gyɛ kʋbʋ mʋ abɩlɩsa gbaa‐gbaa mʋ, ba bɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ bwaala ngbaa mɛ. Ɩmʋ sʋ ba gyɔɔ n maa Banabasi abaa tɔ kaapʋ fɛɛ anaa bamʋ kpini an sun kusun kʋlʋn. Nɩɩ an kyula yɛ n maa Banabasi a waa kusun bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ tɔ, kɛ bamʋ mɔɔ ba waa kusun mʋ Gyiwu abi tɔ.

english_verse: When Peter came to Antioch, I told him face to face that he was wrong.
translation_verse: Saŋa kʋ Pita maa kyɩna ba Antiyoki mʋ, n tɔwɛ tigi mʋ yɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa mʋ man dɛ ɔkpa.

english_verse: But when I saw they were not really obeying the truth that is in the good news, I corrected Peter in front of everyone and said: Peter, you are a Jew, but you live like a Gentile. So how can you force Gentiles to live like Jews?
translation_verse: N maa wu fɛɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa mʋ, man buu asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ kesintin ɔkpa sʋ mʋ, n tɔwɛ Pita Krisito abuupu mʋ kpini ansi tɔ yɛ, “Gyiwu obii ɩ gyɛ fʋ, yɛgɛ fʋ kakyɩna tɔ du fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi. Mɩnɛ sʋ nɩɩ fɩɩ nyan Krisito abuupu mʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ yɛ ba kyɩna fɛɛ Gyiwu abi?”

english_verse: When we Jews started looking for a way to please God, we discovered that we are sinners too. Does this mean that Christ is the one who makes us sinners? No, it doesn't!
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩ kan ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ anɛ kɩbɔla Krisito sʋ mʋ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ i wu fɛɛ anɛ ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ asɛ, nɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an wu fɛɛ anɛ gbaa anɛ an gyɛ alibi awaapʋ fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ, ɩnɩmʋ ɩɩ kaapʋ nɩn fɛɛ Krisito sa alibi kɩwaa ɔlʋn tii sʋ nɩn abɛɛ? Ayee! Ɩ man gyɛ kanɩn!

english_verse: But if I tear down something and then build it again, I prove that I was wrong at first.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n kan kina nbara mʋ, nɩɩ n bwii n kyiŋi ɩmʋ mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ n tɩyɛ alibi tɔ.

english_verse: It was the Law itself that killed me and freed me from its power, so I could live for God. I have been nailed to the cross with Christ.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ n maa buu nbara mʋ, n wu fɛɛ ɩ mɛɛ sa nkpa. Ɩmʋ sʋ n wu sa nbara mʋ, kɛ n nyɛ kyɩna sa Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: I don't turn my back on God's gift of undeserved grace. If we can be acceptable to God by obeying the Law, it was useless for Christ to die.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n man taa Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ yɩla ɩkaa sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ nɩɩ ɩ kan ɩ gyɛ nbara mʋ kɩbɔla sʋ nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa ɩkpa ii biti i kyiigi Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ ɩ kaapʋ nɩn fɛɛ Krisito kelewu mʋ man tiri.

english_verse: You stupid Galatians! I told you exactly how Jesus Christ was nailed to a cross. Has someone now put an evil spell on you?
translation_verse: Fanɛ Galati abi nfɛɛrɛ ɩ man fʋʋ fanɛ! Anɩmʋ ɩ waa fanɛ biila kanɩn? Fanɛ gbaa‐gbaa fanɛ ansi tɔ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ bugi tɔ Yesu Krisito kelewu oyu laasa mʋ sʋ asɩn sa fanɛ.

english_verse: I want to know only one thing. How were you given God's Spirit? Was it by obeying the Law of Moses or by hearing about Christ and having faith in him?
translation_verse: Kʋtɔ kʋlʋn nɩɩ n biti n taasɛ fanɛ. Fan maa daa nyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ, Mosesi nbara kibuu mʋ sʋ nɩɩ fan nyɛ Kayaayu mʋ, abɛɛ fan maa nu asɩn danbɩrasa nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ gyii mʋ sʋ nɩɩ fan nyɛ kɩmʋ?

english_verse: How can you be so stupid? Do you think that by yourself you can complete what God's Spirit started in you?
translation_verse: Mɩnɛ nɩɩ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ man fʋʋ fanɛ kanɩn? Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu nɩɩ fan taa piili fanɛ Krisito kusun mʋ, amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ mɩnɛ sʋ nɩɩ fen biti fan taa fanɛ gbaa‐gbaa ɔlʋn taa lʋwɛ?

english_verse: Have you gone through all of this for nothing? Is it all really for nothing?
translation_verse: Awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ fan wu falɛ kpini mʋ ɩ waa kɩyan nɩn abɛɛ? N kɔɔlɛ gyii fɛɛ ɩ man waa kɩyan.

english_verse: God gives you his Spirit and works miracles in you. But does he do this because you obey the Law of Moses or because you have heard about Christ and have faith in him?
translation_verse: Fan nyi fɛɛ fan maa buu Mosesi nbara mʋ sʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sa fanɛ mʋ Kayaayu nɩɩ ɛɛ waa ɩsɩnkaala ɛɛ sa fanɛ mʋ, abɛɛ lɩɩ fan maa nu asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ, nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ gyii sʋ?

english_verse: And so, you should understand that everyone who has faith is a child of Abraham.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan bɩɩ fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba kɔɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ gyii mʋ, ɩ gyɛ Abraham anaana‐bii gbaa‐gbaa.

english_verse: Long ago the Scriptures said God would accept the Gentiles because of their faith. This is why God told Abraham the good news that all nations would be blessed because of him.
translation_verse: Ba gyankpaa kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ fɛɛ lɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ kɔɔlɛ bamʋ kyula fɛɛ bamʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi. Kanɩn sʋ ɔ wʋla tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ sa Abraham yɛ, “Fʋ sʋ nɩɩ n biti n bɔla waa dulinyaa asa kpini kusee.”

english_verse: This means everyone who has faith will share in the blessings given to Abraham because of his faith.
translation_verse: Abraham maa kɔɔlɛ gyii sʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ waa mʋ kusee. Ɩmʋ sʋ bamʋ nɩɩ ba kɔɔlɛ gyii mʋ kpini, Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ waa bamʋ kusee tii Abraham sʋ.

english_verse: But Christ rescued us from the Law's curse, when he became a curse in our place. This is because the Scriptures say that anyone who is nailed to a tree is under a curse.
translation_verse: Amaa nnɔ kɩtɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyan anɛ sʋ fɛɛ a maa man buu nbara mʋ, Krisito ka ɩmʋ kʋkɔ. Maa wu oyu laasa sʋ mʋ, ɔ kɔɔlɛ kɔnɔ tɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyan anɛ sʋ mʋ sʋla. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ba kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, “Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ nnɔ waa ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ saa oyu sʋ mʋ.”

english_verse: And because of what Jesus Christ has done, the blessing promised to Abraham was taken to the Gentiles. This happened so that by faith we would be given the promised Holy Spirit. The Law and the Promise
translation_verse: Krisito ka anɛ alibi kʋkɔ, kɛ kusee mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ waa Abraham mʋ, ɩ nyɛ bɔla Krisito Yesu sʋ taa ba sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ gbaa, taa lɩɩ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ mʋ, a nyɛ Kayaayu mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ yɛ ee biti ɔ sa mʋ. Mosesi Nbara mʋ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ kɩda sa Abraham

english_verse: My friends, I will use an everyday example to explain what I mean. Once someone agrees to something, no one else can change or cancel the agreement.
translation_verse: Mɛ bɩrɩsa ana Krisito abuupu, n biti n taa dulinyaa kakyɩna nɩmʋ tɔ asɩn kaala asɩn nɩmʋ. Nɩɩ asa kʋ ba kan bɔ ntan yɩla bamʋ nsana mʋ, ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ nyita ɩmʋ abɛɛ ɔ taa kʋtɔ kʋ tii sʋ.

english_verse: That is how it is with the promises God made to Abraham and his descendant. The promises were not made to many descendants, but only to one, and that one is Christ.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ maa da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ sa Abraham maa mʋ kanaana‐bii mʋ, ba man kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, “fʋ anaana‐bii,” nɩɩ ɩmʋ ii biti ɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ asa mʋ ba kyɔ. Amaa asɩn mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, “fʋ kanaana‐bii,” nɩɩ ɩmʋ kasɛ ɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ mʋ kanaana‐bii kʋlʋn, nɩɩ obii maŋa ɩ gyɛ Krisito.

english_verse: If we have to obey the Law in order to receive God's blessings, those blessings don't really come to us because of God's promise. But God was kind to Abraham and made him a promise.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ ɩ kan ɩ gyɛ nbara mʋ kibuu sʋ nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa ii biti ɔ nyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kusee mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ, ɩ man gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ kɩda mʋ sʋ nɩɩ ɩ bɩla ɩ gyan. Amaa lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ sʋ mʋ, ɔ bɔla mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ kɩda mʋ sʋ taa kusee sa Abraham.

english_verse: What is the use of the Law? It was given later to show that we sin. But it was only supposed to last until the coming of that descendant who was given the promise. In fact, angels gave the Law to Moses, and he gave it to the people.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ kanɩn bɩrɛ, mɩnɛ sʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sa nbara mʋ? Ɩbwaarɛ daa taa nbara mʋ nɩn tii sʋ kɛ ɩ kaapʋ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ alibi ɩ gyɛ. Ɩ dagaa nbara mʋ maa kyɩna naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Abraham kanaana‐bii mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ yɩla sa mʋ mʋ, ɔ ba. Ɩbwaarɛ taa nbara mʋ bɔla mʋ nbɔɔ sʋ taa sa Mosesi mʋ nɩɩ ɔ yɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ maa asa nsana mʋ abaa tɔ.

english_verse: There is only one God, and the Law did not come directly from him. Slaves and Children
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ ɩ dan ɩ gyɛ nyɩmɩsa kʋlʋn mʋ, nsana ɔyɩlɛpʋ man tiri. Ɩbwaarɛ bɩrɛ gyɛ ɔkʋlʋn nɩn.

english_verse: Does the Law disagree with God's promises? No, it doesn't! If any law could give life to us, we could become acceptable to God by obeying that law.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɩɩ kaapʋ nɩn fɛɛ, nbara mʋ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ kɩda mʋ, mɛɛ kyɩna abaa sʋ nɩn abɛɛ? Ayee, man gyɛ kanɩn nɩn kpini‐kpini! Lɩɩ fɛɛ nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa daa nyɛ nbara kʋ nɩɩ ɩ taalɛ sa nyɩmɩsa nkpa mʋ, naafɔɔ kanɩn nbara maŋa kibuu ɩ taalɛ yɛgɛ nyɩmɩsa ɩkpa i kyiigi Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ.

english_verse: The Law controlled us and kept us under its power until the time came when we would have faith.
translation_verse: Pɔyɩ kɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ kɩ ba mʋ, nbara mʋ ɩ dan nyan anɛ waa tɔ nɩn fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba tii bamʋ obu biri sʋ, naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ kɩ ba lɩɩ ifuli.

english_verse: In fact, the Law was to be our teacher until Christ came. Then we could have faith and be acceptable to God.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ nbara mʋ ɩ kyɩna ɩ gyɛ anɛ ɔkɩɩsʋpʋ naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Krisito ba. Saamʋ, bɔla lɩɩ anɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti o wu fɛɛ anɛ ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ asɛ.

english_verse: But once a person has learned to have faith, there is no more need to have the Law as a teacher.
translation_verse: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ kɩkɔɔlɛ Krisito gyii maa ba falɛ bɩrɛ, a man bɩla an bʋ nbara mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ anɛ ɔkɩɩsʋpʋ mʋ kasɛ. Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii ana

english_verse: All of you are God's children because of your faith in Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Kpalɩ fɛɛ fan maa kɔɔlɛ Krisito Yesu gyii sʋ mʋ, fanɛ kpini fan gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii ana.

english_verse: And when you were baptized, it was as though you had put on Christ in the same way you put on new clothes.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fanɛ kpini mʋ nɩɩ ba gyee fanɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee waa Krisito lɛɛ mʋ, ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ Krisito kudubi mʋ bʋ fanɛ tɔ.

english_verse: Faith in Christ Jesus is what makes each of you equal with each other, whether you are a Jew or a Greek, a slave or a free person, a man or a woman.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ bɩrɛ, ɩ man bɩla ɩ bʋ tɔ fɛɛ akʋ ba gyɛ Gyiwu abi abɛɛ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi, abɛɛ akʋ ba gyɛ anyɛ abɛɛ akʋ ba gyɛ ndɛ abi, abɛɛ akʋ ba gyɛ anyɩn abɛɛ ba gyɛ akyɩɩ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fanɛ kpini fan gyɛ kʋkʋlʋn Krisito Yesu tɔ.

english_verse: So if you belong to Christ, you are now part of Abraham's family, and you will be given what God has promised.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fan kan fan gyɛ Krisito lɛɛ mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ fan gyɛ Abraham anaana‐bii, nɩɩ fen biti fan nyɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ sa Abraham mʋ.

english_verse: This is because children are placed in the care of guardians and teachers until the time their parents have set.
translation_verse: Maa san ɔ gyɛ kebii‐pii mʋ, ɔ sʋ asa mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kɩɩ mʋ sʋ, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kɩɩ mʋ atɔ mʋ sʋ bɛɛ sa mʋ, naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ mʋ‐sɛ yɩla mʋ yɛ o gyii kapatɩyɛ mʋ.

english_verse: This is how it was with us. We were like children ruled by the powers of this world.
translation_verse: Kanɩn nɩɩ anɛ gbaa anɛ an daa an du fɛɛ nbii mʋ nɩɩ anɛ anaana‐tɔ yɛ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ atɔ kaapʋsa, ɩɩ nyan anɛ fɛɛ anyɛ.

english_verse: But when the time was right, God sent his Son, and a woman gave birth to him. His Son obeyed the Law,
translation_verse: Amaa saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ yɩla kyɛɛkyɛɛ maa fʋʋ mʋ, o sun mʋ gbaa‐gbaa Mu‐Bii dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ. Nɩɩ ɔ yɛgɛ nɩɩ ɔkyɩɩ kʋʋgɛ mʋ Gyiwu obii waa nbara mʋ tɔ,

english_verse: so he could set us free from the Law, and we could become God's children.
translation_verse: kɛ ɔ nyɛ kɔɔlɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ nbara mʋ kasɛ mʋ yɛgɛ, kɛ anɛ kpini an nyɛ ba biliŋi Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii ana.

english_verse: Now that we are his children, God has sent the Spirit of his Son into our hearts. And his Spirit tells us that God is our Father.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fan maa gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii ana sʋ mʋ, o sun Mu‐Bii Kayaayu mʋ ɔ ba kyɩna fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ. Kayaayu mʋ ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an taalɛ tɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ, “Aba abɛɛ Ɔsɛ.”

english_verse: You are no longer slaves. You are God's children, and you will be given what he has promised. Paul's Concern for the Galatians
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan man bɩla fan gyɛ anyɛ, amaa fan gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii ana nɩn. Nɩɩ fan maa gyɛ mu‐bii ana falɛ bɩrɛ, fan gyɛ mʋ kapatɩyɛ mʋ agyipu. Pɔɔlɩ kayɩyɛɛ lɩɩ Galati abi sʋ

english_verse: Before you knew God, you were slaves of gods that are not real.
translation_verse: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ fan man nyi Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, fan gyɛ anyɛ sa ɩdakpa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ anyɩrɩpɛ kʋ.

english_verse: You even celebrate certain days, months, seasons, and years.
translation_verse: Fan sʋ kensi‐gyii nkɛ sa Gyiwu abi nkɛ nkʋ, yɛ ɩbwaayɩ ɩkʋ, yɛ ɩsaŋa ɩkʋ, yɛ nsu nkʋ.

english_verse: My friends, I beg you to be like me, just as I once tried to be like you. Did you mistreat me
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, n kʋlɛ fanɛ nɩn fɛɛ fan baa fan du fɛɛ mɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ngbaa n maa gyɛ Gyiwu obii mʋ, n ba waa mɛ n‐yɩɩ fɛɛ fanɛ. Nɩɩ fan man waa mɛ alibi akʋ.

english_verse: when I first preached to you? No you didn't, even though you knew I had come there because I was sick.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan nyi mʋ, lɩɩ mɛ kʋlɔ sʋ nɩɩ n gyankpaa ba tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ sa fanɛ.

english_verse: My illness must have caused you some trouble, but you didn't hate me or turn me away because of it. You welcomed me as though I were one of God's angels or even Christ Jesus himself.
translation_verse: Halɩɩ mɛ kʋlɔ kɩ maa gyɛ kasʋla sa fanɛ gbaa mʋ, fan man lɛɛ fanɛ ansi yɛgɛ mɛ, nɩɩ fan man kina mɛ. Amaa fan kɔɔlɛ mɛ abaa anyɔ fɛɛ n maa gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabɔɔ, abɛɛ n maa gyɛ Krisito Yesu gbaa‐gbaa mʋ.

english_verse: Where is that good feeling now? I am sure if it had been possible, you would have taken out your own eyes and given them to me.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kanɩn saŋa maa mʋ, kensi‐gyii lala bʋ fanɛ tɔ lɩɩ mɛ sʋ. Nɩɩ n taalɛ n tɔwɛ gbaa yɛ, nɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ fɛn taalɛ nɩn, naafɔɔ fɛn kyɔlɛ fanɛ ansi gbaa fan sa mɛ. Nɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ, mɩnɛ ɩ waa?

english_verse: Am I now your enemy, just because I told you the truth?
translation_verse: N ba biliŋi fanɛ dʋn lɩɩ kesintin mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ n sa fanɛ mʋ sʋ nɩn abɛɛ?

english_verse: Those people may be paying you a lot of attention, but it isn't for your good. They only want to keep you away from me, so you will pay them a lot of attention.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kanɩn asa mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kaapʋ fanɛ asɩn kʋkwɩɩ mʋ bɩrɛ, bamʋ ansi ɩ payɩ fanɛ sʋ, amaa bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ man bʋrɔn. Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ bee biti mʋ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ, ba barɩgɛ fanɛ lɩɩ mɛ asɛ, kɛ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fan baa fen nu bamʋ asɛ.

english_verse: It is always good to give your attention to something worthwhile, even when I am not with you.
translation_verse: Ɩ bʋrɔn fɛɛ fanɛ ansi ɩ maa payɩ lɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋ sʋ, nɩɩ kʋtɔ maa gyɛ kʋtɔ danbɩrasa, kɛ ɩ man naa waa fɛɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n bʋ fanɛ asɛ mʋ nkʋn, amaa saŋa kʋmaa.

english_verse: I wish I were with you now. Then I would not have to talk this way. You really have me puzzled. Hagar and Sarah
translation_verse: N daa biti nɩn fɛɛ n san n bʋ fanɛ asɛ nbɩɩnbɩɩ, naafɔɔ n nyɛ kyɛɛgɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ ɔlʋn sʋ n sa fanɛ mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ mɛ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ tɔɔrɔɔ mɛ fanɛ sʋ. Kɩnyɛ‐kyɩɩ Haga mu‐bii yɛ odibii Sara mu‐bii

english_verse: Some of you would like to be under the rule of the Law of Moses. But do you know what the Law says?
translation_verse: Fan yɛgɛ n taasɛ fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fen biti fan buu nbara mʋ. Fan man nu kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ nbara mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ mʋ kasɛ nɩn abɛɛ?

english_verse: In the Scriptures we learn that Abraham had two sons. The mother of one of them was a slave, while the mother of the other one had always been free.
translation_verse: Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, Abraham sʋ nbii‐nyɩnsa anyɔ, kɩnyɛ Haga mu‐bii ɩ gyɛ ɔkʋ, nɩɩ odibii Sara mɔɔ mu‐bii gyɛ ɔkʋ.

english_verse: The son of the slave woman was born in the usual way. But the son of the free woman was born because of God's promise.
translation_verse: Obii mʋ nɩɩ kɩnyɛ‐kyɩɩ kʋʋgɛ mʋ, mʋ kakʋʋgɛ du nɩn fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ daadimaadi kʋʋgɛ obii mʋ, amaa odibii mu‐bii mʋ bɩrɛ, ba kʋʋgɛ mʋ bɔla asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ wʋla da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ tɔwɛ yɩla mʋ sʋ nɩn.

english_verse: All of this has another meaning as well. Each of the two women stands for one of the agreements God made with his people. Hagar, the slave woman, stands for the agreement that was made at Mount Sinai. Everyone born into her family is a slave.
translation_verse: Falɛ atɔ nɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ asɩn kaalasa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ sʋ kasɛ. Akyɩɩ anyɔ mʋ ba yɩlɛ sa ntɔwɛ‐kyula anyɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ waa maa asa nsana mʋ. Kɩnyɛ‐kyɩɩ Haga ɩ yɩlɛ sa katɔwɛ kyula mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ waa Sinayi kɩbɩɩ mʋ sʋ mʋ, nɩɩ nbii mʋ nɩɩ Haga kʋʋgɛ mʋ gyɛ anyɛ nɩn.

english_verse: Hagar also stands for Mount Sinai in Arabia and for the present city of Jerusalem. She and her children are slaves.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Haga ɩ yɩlɛ sa Sinayi kɩbɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ Arabiya ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ mʋ, nɩɩ kɩ bɩla yɩlɛ sa ndaga Gyerusalem kadɛ lala mʋ, nɩɩ kɩmaa kɩmʋ asa kpini ba gyɛ anyɛ nɩn.

english_verse: But our mother is the city of Jerusalem in heaven above, and she isn't a slave.
translation_verse: Amaa sʋsʋ Gyerusalem mʋ bɩrɛ gyɛ odibii‐kyɩɩ, nɩɩ mʋ ɩ gyɛ anɛ‐nyi.

english_verse: The Scriptures say about her, “You have never had children, but now you can be glad. You have never given birth, but now you can shout. Once you had no children, but now you will have more children than a woman who has been married for a long time.”
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ba kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, “O ogbentipu‐kyɩɩ, fʋ mʋ nɩɩ fʋ man kʋʋgɛ kɩɩ, yɛgɛ ɩ waa fʋ ɔkɔn, fʋ mʋ nɩɩ fʋ man pɩɩta duŋi kɩɩ mʋ, taa kensi‐gyii lala kuusi waa ɩlawʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔkyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ mu‐kuli sɩlɛ yɛgɛ mʋ mʋ, ii biti ɔ nyɛ nbii ɔ kyɔ ɔkyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ mu‐kuli man sɩlɛ yɛgɛ mʋ.”

english_verse: But the child who was born in the natural way made trouble for the child who was born because of the Spirit. The same thing is happening today.
translation_verse: Kanɩn saŋa maŋa mʋ, obii‐nyɩnsa mʋ nɩɩ ba kʋʋgɛ mʋ daadimaadi kakʋʋgɛ ɩkpa sʋ mʋ, nyanla obii‐nyɩnsa mʋ nɩɩ ba kʋʋgɛ mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ kayaayu ɔlʋn tɔ mʋ. Nɩɩ kanɩn nɩɩ i du nbɩɩnbɩɩ gbaa.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “Get rid of the slave woman and her son! He won't be given anything. The son of the free woman will receive everything.”
translation_verse: Amaa mɩnɛ asɩn nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ mʋ? Ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, “Gya kɩnyɛ‐kyɩɩ mʋ maa mu‐bii‐nyɩnsa mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ kɩnyɛ‐kyɩɩ mu‐bii maa odibii‐kyɩɩ mʋ mu‐bii ba mɛɛ bʋga bee gyii ɔsɛ mʋ kapatɩyɛ.”

english_verse: My friends, we are children of the free woman and not of the slave.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, an man gyɛ kɩnyɛ‐kyɩɩ mʋ mu‐bii ana nɩn, amaa an gyɛ odibii‐kyɩɩ mʋ mu‐bii ana nɩn.

english_verse: Christ has set us free! This means we are really free. Now hold on to your freedom and don't ever become slaves of the Law again.
translation_verse: Krisito kɔɔlɛ anɛ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an nyɛ anɛ n‐yɩɩ. Kanɩn sʋ fan yɩlɛ tɔ kenken, kɛ fan man bɩla yɛgɛ ba taa fanɛ waa nbara mʋ kibuu anyɛ.

english_verse: And if you try to please God by obeying the Law, you have cut yourself off from Christ and his gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fen biti fɛɛ fan buu nbara mʋ, kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ o wu fɛɛ fanɛ ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ asɛ mʋ, fan barɩgɛ lɩɩ Krisito asɛ, nɩɩ fan lɛɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: But the Spirit makes us sure God will accept us because of our faith in Christ.
translation_verse: Amaa anɛɛnɛ bɩrɛ, Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an sʋ tamaa an gyoo Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ kɔɔlɛ anɛ kyula fɛɛ, anɛ ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ asɛ lɩɩ anɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ.

english_verse: If you are a follower of Christ Jesus, it makes no difference whether you are circumcised or not. All that matters is your faith that makes you love others.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ, a maa buu Krisito Yesu falɛ mʋ, an tɩŋɛ iduu‐o, an man tɩŋɛ iduu‐o, man gyɛ ɩmʋ i tiri. Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ki tiri ɩ gyɛ yɛ Krisito kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an nyɛ kebiti sa abaa.

english_verse: You were doing so well until someone made you turn from the truth.
translation_verse: Naafɔɔ fan kyɩna fan yɩlɛ tɔ danbɩrasa. Anɩmʋ i fun waa fanɛ nɩɩ fan yɛgɛ kesintin ɔkpa mʋ kibuu?

english_verse: And that person was certainly not sent by the one who chose you.
translation_verse: N nyi fɛɛ man gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ fanɛ yɛ fan ba waa mʋ lɛɛ mʋ, ɩ waa kanɩn.

english_verse: A little yeast can change a whole batch of dough,
translation_verse: Fan nyiŋi fɛɛ, “Bodobodo inyifo kɩfa‐tinsa gbɛrɛɛ ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ bodobodo inyifo mʋ kpini i tin.”

english_verse: but you belong to the Lord. This makes me certain you will do what I say, instead of what someone else tells you to do. Whoever is causing trouble for you will be punished.
translation_verse: N kɔɔlɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ gyii fɛɛ, fan man yɛ fan kyɛɛgɛ naa buu ɔkpa pʋpwɛ kʋ. Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee nyita fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ maŋa mʋ, ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ bɩɩtɛ mʋ kʋsʋ.

english_verse: My friends, if I still preach that people need to be circumcised, why am I in so much trouble? The message about the cross would no longer be a problem, if I told people to be circumcised.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, nɩɩ n kan n kaapʋ yɛ iduu kɩtɩn ɩ gyɛ asɩn tirisa nɩn, naafɔɔ mɩnɛ ɩ waa sʋ nɩɩ Gyiwu abi ba san bɛɛ nyanla mɛ? Nɩɩ ɩ daa ɩ gyɛ kanɩn nɩn, naafɔɔ Krisito kiwu oyu laasa sʋ asɩn mʋ, man dɩn bɩya asɩn kʋ.

english_verse: I wish everyone who is upsetting you would not only get circumcised, but would cut off much more!
translation_verse: N biti fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɔɔrɔɔ fanɛ lɩɩ iduu kɩtɩn sʋ mʋ, naafɔɔ ba lɛɛ bamʋ awɛɛ tii bamʋ iduu kɩtɩn sʋ!

english_verse: My friends, you were chosen to be free. So don't use your freedom as an excuse to do anything you want. Use it as an opportunity to serve each other with love.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, fanɛ bɩrɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ kɔɔlɛ fanɛ yɛgɛ nɩɩ fan nyɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ kanɩn Mosesi nbara kibuu mʋ tɔ. Amaa fan man kan yɛgɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kɩnyɛ mʋ kɩ sa fanɛ ɔkpa, kɛ fanɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kayalaga mʋ ki gyii fanɛ sʋ. Amaa fan taa kebiti sun abaa.

english_verse: All the Law says can be summed up in the command to love others as much as you love yourself.
translation_verse: Mosesi nbara mʋ kpini ɩ lɩɩ kɔnɔsa kʋlʋn tɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Biti fʋ bɩrɩsa fɛɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ.”

english_verse: But if you keep attacking each other like wild animals, you had better watch out or you will destroy yourselves. God's Spirit and Our Own Desires
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fan kan fan du fɛɛ ndʋnbwɛ nɩɩ fen duŋi nɩɩ fɛn larɩgɛ abaa mʋ, fan baa fan da sʋ, man gyɛ kanɩn mʋ fen biti fan mɔɔ abaa. Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ yɛ anɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ

english_verse: If you are guided by the Spirit, you won't obey your selfish desires.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ n tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ, fan yɛgɛ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ ɔ kaapʋ fanɛ ɔkpa, kɛ fan man nyɛ buu fanɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kayalaga.

english_verse: But if you obey the Spirit, the Law of Moses has no control over you.
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ fan yɛgɛ nɩɩ Kayaayu mʋ kaapʋ fanɛ ɔkpa mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ fan man bʋ nbara mʋ kasɛ.

english_verse: People's desires make them give in to immoral ways, filthy thoughts, and shameful deeds.
translation_verse: Kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ asun libi ɩ mɛɛ baala. Ɩmʋ ɩkʋ ɩ gyɛ kɩlɩɩ okuli abɛɛ ɔkaa kamaa, yɛ kɩgyagaa ineesi, yɛ kabʋrʋkɔɔnɛ,

english_verse: They worship idols, practice witchcraft, hate others, and are hard to get along with. People become jealous, angry, and selfish. They not only argue and cause trouble, but they are
translation_verse: yɛ ɩdakpa kusun, yɛ akpa‐sɩn, yɛ kekisi, yɛ keluu, yɛ kayɩɩ‐basa, yɛ kɩnyɛ agbʋ, yɛ mɛ nkʋn n nyɛ, yɛ nbarɩgɛ tɔ, yɛ nfɛɛrɛ kɩfɛ fɛɛ mɛ nkʋn asɩn ɩ bʋrɔn.

english_verse: envious. They get drunk, carry on at wild parties, and do other evil things as well. I told you before, and I am telling you again: No one who does these things will share in the blessings of God's kingdom.
translation_verse: Ɩkʋ mɔɔ ɩ gyɛ yɛ kensi payɩ libi, yɛ kata‐bʋʋ, yɛ kensi‐gyii kɩbansa, yɛ alibi kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ i tii sʋ. N da fanɛ amu tɔ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n wʋla da fanɛ amu tɔ mʋ yɛ, ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɛ falɛ kakyɩna tɔ mʋ, mɛɛ yɛ ɔ nyɛ loo Ɩbwaarɛ kuwura‐gyii mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: gentle, and self-controlled. There is no law against behaving in any of these ways.
translation_verse: yɛ kɩbwahn kɩwaa, yɛ n‐yɩɩ kɩkɩta. Nbara kʋ man bʋ tɔ nɩɩ ɩɩ kɔ ii tii ɩnɩmʋ.

english_verse: And because we belong to Christ Jesus, we have killed our selfish feelings and desires.
translation_verse: Bamʋ nɩɩ ba gyɛ Krisito Yesu asa mʋ bɩrɛ, ba taa bamʋ alibi kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kayalaga yɛ kɩmʋ kɔkɔlɔ biti mʋ da mata oyu laasa mʋ sʋ mɔɔ ɩmʋ kpini.

english_verse: God's Spirit has given us life, and so we should follow the Spirit.
translation_verse: Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ maa sa anɛ kakyɩna pʋpwɛ falɛ bɩrɛ, fan yɛgɛ kɛ ɔ gyankpaa anɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ.

english_verse: But don't be conceited or make others jealous by claiming to be better than they are.
translation_verse: Fan man yɛgɛ kɛ a kaapʋ anɛ n‐yɩɩ, kɛ a man waa anɛ bɩrɩsa ana agbʋ‐sɩn, kɛ fan man kɔ abaa kɔkʋrʋkɔ.

english_verse: My friends, you are spiritual. So if someone is trapped in sin, you should gently lead that person back to the right path. But watch out, and don't be tempted yourself.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, nɩɩ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ kan tɩyɛ alibi tɔ mʋ, fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan buu Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ ɔkpa kyɛɛkyɛɛ sʋ mʋ, fan taa kebiti kyɛ mʋ tɔ, kɛ o bwii ba ɔkpa danbɩrasa mʋ sʋ. Amaa fan kɩɩ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ danbɩrasa, kɛ Sɩtaanɛ ɔ man nyɛ ɔkpa tʋʋ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ tɔ kɩɩ.

english_verse: You obey the law of Christ when you offer each other a helping hand.
translation_verse: Fan yɛgɛ fanɛ bɩrɩsa ana asɩn ɩ baa ɩ gyɛ fanɛ asɩn. Nɩɩ fan kan waa kanɩn mʋ, ɩmʋ ɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ fen gyii Krisito nbara nɩmʋ sʋ.

english_verse: If you think you are better than others, when you really aren't, you are wrong.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan fɛ nfɛɛrɛ yɛ ɔ gyɛ kʋtɔ kʋ, yɛgɛ ɔ man gyɛ sɛhn mʋ, ɛɛ pɩna mʋ n‐yɩɩ nɩn.

english_verse: Do your own work well, and then you will have something to be proud of. But don't compare yourself with others.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ɔ kɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ awaasa i du. Nɩɩ ɩ kan ɩ bʋrɔn mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ ɛɛ taalɛ kaapʋ mʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ mʋ awaasa mʋ sʋ, yɛgɛ ɔ man taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ kaala ɔkʋ lɛɛ.

english_verse: We each must carry our own load.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩ dagaa ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ maa sʋla mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ kasʋla.

english_verse: Share every good thing you have with anyone who teaches you what God has said.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kaapʋ mʋ abwaarɛsɩn mʋ, ɩ dagaa maa kyɛ mʋ ɔkaapʋpʋ mʋ tɔ, lɩɩ atɔ danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ mʋ.

english_verse: You cannot fool God, so don't make a fool of yourself! You will harvest what you plant.
translation_verse: Fan man pɩna fanɛ n‐yɩɩ. Ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ sisii Ɩbwaarɛ. Kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa duu mʋ, kɩmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ tɩŋɛ.

english_verse: Don't get tired of helping others. You will be rewarded when the time is right, if you don't give up.
translation_verse: A man yɛgɛ kɩdanbɩrasa kɩwaa o fii anɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ nɩɩ an man kan yɛgɛ ɩmʋ kɩwaa mʋ, kakaakʋ an biti a ba gyii ɩmʋ tɔnɔ.

english_verse: We should help people whenever we can, especially if they are followers of the Lord. Final Warnings
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an nyɛ ɩmʋ ɔkpa falɛ, fan yɛgɛ kɛ a waa kɩdanbɩrasa sa asa kpini, fɔnfɔn bamʋ nɩɩ ba gyɛ anɛ bɩrɩsa ana akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ. Laalaalʋwɛ kumu tɔ kɩda

english_verse: You can see what big letters I make when I write with my own hand.
translation_verse: Yɛ fan wu akyʋrɔɔ‐bi lala nɩmʋ? Mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ kɩbaa nɩɩ n taa kyʋrɔɔ ɩmʋ nfɩɩ bɩya fanɛ!

english_verse: Those people who are telling you to get circumcised are only trying to show how important they are. And they don't want to get into trouble for preaching about the cross of Christ.
translation_verse: Bamʋ nɩɩ bee biti yɛ asa ba wu bamʋ ifuli sʋ kɩdanbɩrasa mʋ, ɩɩ nyan fanɛ yɛ fan tɩŋɛ fanɛ iduu. Kʋtɔ mʋ sʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa kanɩn ɩ gyɛ yɛ, be mee biti ba tɔwɛ Krisito kelewu oyu laasa mʋ sʋ asɩn, kɛ ɔkʋ nyanla bamʋ.

english_verse: They are circumcised, but they don't obey the Law of Moses. All they want is to brag about having you circumcised.
translation_verse: Halɩɩ Gyiwu abi ba maa buu iduu kɩtɩn gbaa mʋ, be mee buu Gyiwu abi nbara mʋ. Amaa bee biti yɛ fan tɩŋɛ fanɛ iduu, kɛ ba nyɛ kaapʋ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ yɛ fan nu bamʋ katɔwɛ.

english_verse: But I will never brag about anything except the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ. Because of his cross, the world is dead as far as I am concerned, and I am dead as far as the world is concerned.
translation_verse: Amaa mɛ bɩrɛ, n mɛɛ kaapʋ mɛ n‐yɩɩ, amɔɔ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kelewu oyu laasa mʋ sʋ nkʋn, nɩɩ kɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ dulinyaa atɔ man gyɛ sɛhn mi ansi sʋ, nɩɩ ngbaa n man bɩla n gyɛ sɛhn dulinyaa tɔ.

english_verse: It doesn't matter if you are circumcised or not. All that matters is that you are a new person.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa tɩn oduu oo, ɔ man tɩn oduu nɩn oo, man gyɛ ɩmʋ i tiri. Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ki tiri mʋ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ Krisito sa anɛ kɩbaabʋtɔ pʋpwɛ.

english_verse: If you follow this rule, you will belong to God's true people. God will treat you with undeserved kindness and will bless you with peace.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ kɩbaabʋtɔ pʋpwɛ nɩɩ bee buu ɩmʋ asɩn mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ keyuula yɛ mʋ kʋwɛɛ kuwu i bun bamʋ sʋ, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ mʋ kpini sʋ.

english_verse: On my own body are scars that prove I belong to Christ Jesus. So I don't want anyone to bother me anymore.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ ndaga ɩɩ sʋ ii kpee mʋ, ɔkʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔkʋ ɔ man bɩla sa mɛ tɔɔrɔɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ alɔpanɛ mʋ nɩɩ n nyɛ lɩɩ Yesu sʋ mʋ, ɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ n gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ.

english_verse: My friends, I pray that the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you! Amen.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kabwaala mʋ kɩ baa kɩ bʋ fanɛ kpini asɛ. Amen.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus. To God's people who live in Ephesus and are faithful followers of Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Mɛ, Pɔɔlɩ mʋ nɩɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti sʋ nɩɩ n ba waa Krisito Yesu osunpu mʋ, ɩ kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ n bɩya fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asa, nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ Krisito Yesu gyii kesintin tɔ, nɩɩ fan bʋ Efeso kadɛ tɔ mʋ.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Christ Brings Spiritual Blessings
translation_verse: Anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito ba bwaala fanɛ kɛ ba sa fanɛ kayɩɩ‐yuuli. Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla Krisito sʋ waa anɛ kusee

english_verse: Praise the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ for the spiritual blessings that Christ has brought us from heaven!
translation_verse: Fan yɛgɛ a fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito Mʋ‐Sɛ. Kpalɩ fɛɛ a maa waa kʋkʋlʋn yɛ Krisito mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ taa kusee kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ mʋ ayɛ sʋsʋ mʋ bwaala anɛ.

english_verse: Before the world was created, God had Christ choose us to live with him and to be his holy and innocent and loving people.
