translation_verse: Pɔyɩ kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ tʋʋ dulinyaa mʋ, ɔ bɔla anaa Krisito kɩwaa kʋkʋlʋn mʋ sʋ lɛɛ anɛ waa mʋ lɛɛ, kɛ a ba waa asa mʋ nɩɩ a man sʋ alibi abɛɛ asɩn pwɩɩsa kʋ mʋ asɛ. Lɩɩ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ sa anɛ sʋ mʋ,

english_verse: God was kind and decided that Christ would choose us to be God's own adopted children.
translation_verse: o ŋmina yɩla yɛ, bɔla Yesu Krisito sʋ mʋ, ee biti ɔ taa anɛ biliŋi mu‐bii ana. Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ mʋ kɔkɔlɔ biti.

english_verse: God treated us with undeserved grace because of the Son he dearly loves, and so we should praise God.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan yɛgɛ an yɩn Ɩbwaarɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ mʋ kabwaala damantɛ mʋ sʋ mʋ, ɔ bɔla mu‐Bii bitisa mʋ sʋ bwaala anɛ atɔ kpini.

english_verse: Then when the time is right, God will do all he has planned, and Christ will bring together everything in heaven and on earth.
translation_verse: Asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ŋmina yɩla mʋ, nɩɩ ɩmʋ saŋa kyɛɛkyɛɛ kan fʋʋ mʋ, ee biti ɔ taa kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ sʋsʋ yɛ kasɛ sʋ bʋga tɔ, kɛ Krisito ɔ waa ɩmʋ kpini kumu.

english_verse: He did this so we Jews would bring honor to him and be the first ones to have hope because of him.
translation_verse: Saamʋ, anɛ mʋ nɩɩ an gyankpaa an sʋ tamaa Krisito tɔ mʋ, a yɩn Ɩbwaarɛ bʋnyaa mʋ.

english_verse: Christ also brought you the truth, which is the good news about how you can be saved. You put your faith in Christ and were given the promised Holy Spirit to show you belong to God.
translation_verse: Kanɩn nɩɩ i du sa fanɛ. Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ fan nu kesintin asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ asɩn danbɩrasa, nɩɩ ɩ bɩya fanɛ kamɔlɩgɛ mʋ, fan kɔɔlɛ Krisito gyii, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa mu keduligi gyaga fanɛ sʋ. Kɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wʋla da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ yɩla yɛ ee biti ɔ sa fanɛ mʋ.

english_verse: The Spirit also makes us sure we will be given what God has stored up for his people. Then we will be set free, and God will be honored and praised. Paul's Prayer
translation_verse: Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa yɩla kasɛ, fɛɛ an biti a nyɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ yɛ ee biti ɔ sa mʋ asa mʋ. Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ anɛ tamaa fɛɛ anɛ mʋ nɩɩ an gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ mʋ, an biti an nyɛ anɛ n‐yɩɩ. Fan yɛgɛ a yɩn Ɩbwaarɛ bʋnyaa mʋ. Pɔɔlɩ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ

english_verse: I have heard about your faith in the Lord Jesus and your love for all God's people.
translation_verse: Falɛ sʋ, lɩɩ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n nu fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu gyii, yɛ fanɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ fan sʋ sa Ɩbwaarɛ asa mʋ,

english_verse: So I never stop being grateful for you, as I mention you in my prayers.
translation_verse: n man yɛgɛ afwaala kɩtaa sa Ɩbwaarɛ mɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ tɔ lɩɩ fanɛ sʋ. Nɩɩ n nyiŋi fanɛ sʋ,

english_verse: I ask the glorious Father and God of our Lord Jesus Christ to give you his Spirit. The Spirit will make you wise and let you understand what it means to know God.
translation_verse: n kʋlɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ bʋnyaa wuya mʋ yɛ, ɔ sa fanɛ mʋ Kayaayu mʋ nɩɩ kii biti kɩ sa fanɛ kanyaasɩn, kɛ ɔ lɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kaapʋ fanɛ, kɛ fan nyɛ bɩɩ mʋ danbɩrasa.

english_verse: My prayer is that light will flood your hearts and you will understand the hope given to you when God chose you. Then you will discover the glorious blessings that will be yours together with all God's people.
translation_verse: N bɩla n kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ fɛɛ o bugi fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ, kɛ fan nyɛ bɩɩ tamaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ fanɛ kɩmʋ sʋ mʋ, yɛ bʋnyaa kapatɩyɛ kparɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ yɛ ee biti ɔ sa mʋ asa mʋ.

english_verse: I want you to know about the great and mighty power that God has for us followers. It is the same wonderful power he used
translation_verse: N kʋlɛ mʋ yɛ ɔ yɛgɛ fan bɩɩ mʋ ɔlɔn kparɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa waa anɛ mʋ nɩɩ an kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii mʋ tɔ. Ɔlʋn lala nɩmʋ man sʋ bɩrɩsa,

english_verse: when he raised Christ from death and let him sit at his right side in heaven.
translation_verse: nɩɩ ɔlʋn maŋa nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ kaapʋ Krisito tɔ fɛɛ maa kyiŋi mʋ lɩɩ lewu tɔ, nɩɩ ɔ taa mʋ kyɩna mʋ kɩbaa gyisa sʋ sʋsʋ.

english_verse: There Christ rules over all forces, authorities, powers, and rulers. He rules over all beings in this world and will rule in the future world as well.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Krisito ii gyii kuwura awura yɛ alʋnpʋ yɛ kɩnyɩn kigyii yɛ anyɩrɩpɛ kpini sʋ. Nɩɩ ɔ sʋ ɔlʋn kparɛ ɔ kyɔ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ sʋ kɩtɩɩ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ yɛ kɩmʋ nɩɩ kii biti kɩ ba ba mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: God has put all things under the power of Christ, and for the good of the church he has made him the head of everything.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ waa Krisito kasɛ, nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ mʋ ba waa kumu sa mʋ kʋbʋ mʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa tɔ.

english_verse: The church is the body of Christ and is filled with Christ who completely fills everything.
translation_verse: Kʋbʋ mʋ kpini ɩ gyɛ Krisito kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ, nɩɩ mʋ ɩ gyɛ kumu sa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ, nɩɩ mʋ ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ ɩɩ lʋwɛ kyɛɛkyɛɛ ɔkpa kʋmaa nɩmʋ sʋ.

english_verse: In the past you were dead because you sinned and fought against God.
translation_verse: Fanɛ fanɛ naafɔɔ fan kyɩna fan du nɩn fɛɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba wu mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fan waa Ɩbwaarɛ kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn yɛ alibi.

english_verse: You followed the ways of this world and obeyed the devil. He rules the world, and his spirit has power over everyone who doesn't obey God.
translation_verse: Kanɩn saŋa maŋa fanɛ kakyɩna tɔ mʋ, fan kyɩna fan buu dulinyaa nɩmʋ awaasa, nɩɩ fan buu n‐yaayu libi kpini owura mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ asa tɔ ee sun kusun nbɩɩnbɩɩ, nɩɩ be mee nu bɛɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Once we were also ruled by the selfish desires of our bodies and minds. We had made God angry, and we were going to be punished like everyone else.
translation_verse: Anɛ kpini an kyɩna an du fɛɛ bamʋ saŋa kʋ tɔ, yɛgɛ an bʋ anɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kɩpɩrɛ tɔ, nɩɩ an buu ɩmʋ kayalaga yɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ anɛ nkɔlɔ ii biti mʋ. Naafɔɔ anɛ kpini an tii bamʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ dɛ o gyoo bamʋ mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: But God was merciful! We were dead because of our sins, but God loved us so much he made us alive with Christ, and God's gift of undeserved grace is what saves you.
translation_verse: anɛ mʋ nɩɩ an kyɩna an du fɛɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba waa Ɩbwaarɛ kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn mʋ, ɔ bɔla Krisito sʋ sa anɛ nkpa. Lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ sʋ nɩɩ fan nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ.

english_verse: God raised us from death to life with Christ Jesus, and he has given us a place beside Christ in heaven.
translation_verse: Anaa Krisito Yesu kɩwaa kʋkʋlʋn sʋ mʋ, ɩ waa fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ bʋga kʋsaa anaa Yesu lɩɩ lewu tɔ. Nɩɩ ɔ sa anɛ ɔkyɩnakpa Yesu asɛ sʋsʋ,

english_verse: God did this so in the future world he could show how truly good and kind he is to us because of what Christ Jesus has done.
translation_verse: kɛ ɔ taa lɛɛ kaapʋ saŋa kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ fɛɛ mʋ kabwaala yɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ sa anɛ mʋ, ba mɛɛ taalɛ taa kaala sɛhn, lɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Yesu Krisito waa mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: You were saved by faith in God, who treats us much better than we deserve. This is God's gift to you, and not anything you have done on your own.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ sʋ nɩɩ ɔ mɔlɩgɛ fanɛ kpalɩ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ, nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ fanɛ gbaa‐gbaa fanɛ awaasa sʋ, ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kakɛɛ nɩn.

english_verse: It isn't something you have earned, so there is nothing you can brag about.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ ɔkʋ kusun sunsa sʋ nɩɩ ɔ nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ, kɛ ɔkʋ ɔ man nyɛ kaapʋ mʋ n‐yɩɩ.

english_verse: God planned for us to do good things and to live as he has always wanted us to live. This is why he sent Christ to make us what we are. United by Christ
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ waa anɛ asa pʋpwɛ, nɩɩ anaa Krisito Yesu kɩwaa kʋkʋlʋn sʋ mʋ, ɔ tʋʋ anɛ yɛ a waa atɔ danbɩrasa, mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wʋla lɔŋɔ yɩla anɛ yɛ an waa mʋ. Bamʋ nɩɩ ba kɔɔlɛ gyii mʋ kpini ba waa kʋkʋlʋn yɛ Krisito

english_verse: Don't forget that you are Gentiles. In fact, you used to be called “uncircumcised” by those who take pride in being circumcised.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan man gyɛ Gyiwu abi kakʋʋgɛ tɔ mʋ, Gyiwu abi mʋ bɛɛ tɩɩ fanɛ yɛ, “bamʋ nɩɩ ba man tɩŋɛ iduu,” nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ yɛ, “iduu atɩŋɛpʋ.” .

english_verse: At that time you did not know about Christ. You were foreigners to the people of Israel, and you had no part in the promises God had made to them. You were living in this world without hope and without God,
translation_verse: Fan nyiŋi fɛɛ kanɩn saŋa maŋa mʋ, fan man tii Krisito sʋ, fan kyɩna fan gyɛ afɔ kyilim nɩɩ fan man tii Ɩsɩrayɩ abi mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ fan man tii katɔwɛ kyula mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ yɩla mʋ sʋ, fan man nyi Ɩbwaarɛ nɩɩ fan man sʋ tamaa.

english_verse: and you were far from God. But Christ offered his life's blood as a sacrifice and brought you near God.
translation_verse: Amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ naafɔɔ fan kyɩna fan bʋ kata yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, fanaa Krisito fan waa kʋkʋlʋn, nɩɩ lɩɩ mʋ nkalan kɩkyɛɛgɛ mʋ sʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ bɩɩtɛ fanɛ tiri mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Christ has made peace between Jews and Gentiles, and he has united us by breaking down the wall of hatred that separated us. Christ gave his own body
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Yesu gbaa‐gbaa ɩ bɩya anɛ keyuula nɩɩ mʋ ɩ taa Gyiwu abi yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ bʋga waa asa kʋlʋn. Nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ kekisi mʋ nɩɩ kɩ barɩgɛ bamʋ nsana fɛɛ kɩbandɩyɛ mʋ tʋʋ.

english_verse: to destroy the Law of Moses with all its rules and commands. He even brought Jews and Gentiles together as though we were only one person, when he united us in peace.
translation_verse: Ɔ taa mʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ waa saraga tɩn Gyiwu abi nbara mʋ kibuu yɛ ɩmʋ kɩkaapʋ, kɛ ɔ nyɛ taa asa yiri ntun nnyɔ mʋ bʋga waa asa kʋlʋn yɛ mʋ Krisito. Ɔ waa kanɩn nɩn bɩya keyuula.

english_verse: On the cross Christ did away with our hatred for each other. He also made peace between us and God by uniting Jews and Gentiles in one body.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ lɩɩ mʋ kelewu oyu laasa mʋ sʋ mʋ, o nyita kekisi mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ bamʋ nsana mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ waa bamʋ kʋkʋlʋn. Nɩɩ lɩɩ mʋ kelewu mʋ sʋ mʋ, ɔ lɔŋɔ bamʋ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nsana.

english_verse: Christ came and preached peace to you Gentiles, who were far from God, and peace to us Jews, who were near God.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ Krisito ba, nɩɩ ɔ ba tɔwɛ keyuula asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ sa fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan kyɩna fan bʋ kata yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, yɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ tiri Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ.

english_verse: You Gentiles are no longer strangers and foreigners. You are citizens with everyone else who belongs to the family of God.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ, fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ, fan man bɩla fan gyɛ afɔ kyilim yɛ ndɛndɛmandɛ abi, amaa fanaa Ɩbwaarɛ asa fan gyɛ ndɛ‐bii yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩkpaara sʋ asa nɩn,

english_verse: You are like a building with the apostles and prophets as the foundation and with Christ as the most important stone.
translation_verse: nɩɩ fan du nɩn fɛɛ ɔpɔrɛ mʋ nɩɩ ba pɔyɩ gyaga kisibi mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ Krisito asunpu yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ atɔwɛpʋ mʋ sʋ mʋ, nɩɩ Krisito Yesu gbaa‐gbaa ɩ gyɛ kɩmʋ kɩbɔntɔnbʋlɔntɔ kubuu kparɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Christ is the one who holds the building together and makes it grow into a holy temple for the Lord.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ mʋ ɩɩ sʋ obu mʋ katɩn kʋmaa nɩmʋ bʋga tɔ, nɩɩ ɛɛ yɛgɛ nɩɩ kii dii sʋsʋ kɩ ba waa kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ sa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ.

english_verse: And you are part of that building Christ has built as a place for God's own Spirit to live.
translation_verse: Fanaa Krisito kɩwaa kʋkʋlʋn sʋ mʋ, fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan man gyɛ Gyiwu abi nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ gyii mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ taa fanɛ bʋga yɛ asansa mʋ, kɛ fan ba waa mʋ Kayaayu mʋ ɔkyɩnakpa.

english_verse: You have surely heard about God's gift of undeserved grace in choosing me to help you.
translation_verse: Kesintin tɔ fan nu yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ sʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa kusun nɩmʋ sa mɛ lɩɩ fanɛ sʋ.

english_verse: In fact, this letter tells you a little about how God has shown me his mysterious ways.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ asɩn baalasa, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ kaapʋ mɛ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n wʋla kyʋrɔɔ ɩmʋ gbɛrɛɛ yɩla mʋ.

english_verse: As you read the letter, you will also find out how well I really do understand the mystery about Christ.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fan kan kalɛ ɩmʋ mʋ, fen biti fan taalɛ wu fɛɛ n nu asɩn baalasa lɩɩ Krisito sʋ mʋ kasɛ.

english_verse: And the mystery is this: Because of Christ Jesus, the good news has given the Gentiles a share in the promises God gave to the Jews. God has also let the Gentiles be part of the same body.
translation_verse: Asɩn baalasa mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, lɩɩ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ sʋ mʋ, bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ bee biti ba ba nyɛ kusee damantɛ mʋ bʋga tii Gyiwu abi mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ bamʋ kpini bee biti ba baa ba gyɛ asa kʋlʋn, kɛ ba nyɛ kusee atɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla Krisito Yesu sʋ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ yɩla mʋ.

english_verse: God treated me with kindness. His power worked in me, and it became my job to spread the good news.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ bwaala mɛ, lɩɩ mʋ ɔlʋn kusun mʋ sʋ waa mɛ asɩn danbɩrasa nɩmʋ osunpu.

english_verse: I am the least important of all God's people. But God was kind and chose me to tell the Gentiles that because of Christ there are blessings that cannot be measured.
translation_verse: Halɩɩ n maa man fʋʋ Ɩbwaarɛ asa mʋ tɔ kalʋwɛ asɛ gbaa mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ taa asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ kɩtɔwɛ bwaala mɛ yɛ, n tɔwɛ Krisito kusee mʋ nɩɩ ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ taa kala sɛhn mʋ, sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ.

english_verse: God, who created everything, wanted me to help everyone understand the mysterious plan that had always been hidden in his mind.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa waa mɛ kabaa tɔ yɛ, n yɛgɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ o wu kanan mʋ nɩɩ asɩn baalasa nɩmʋ ii sun kusun. Saamʋ dɩdaa mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tʋʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ mʋ taa asɩn mʋ baala,

english_verse: Then God would use the church to show the powers and authorities in the spiritual world that he has many different kinds of wisdom.
translation_verse: kɛ nbɩɩnbɩɩ nɩmʋ ɔ nyɛ bɔla Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ sʋ lɛɛ mʋ kanyaasɩn damantɛ kʋkwɩɩ‐kʋkwɩɩ mʋ kaapʋ nbɔɔ yɛ awura yɛ alʋnpʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ sʋsʋ mʋ.

english_verse: God did this according to his eternal plan. And he was able to do what he had planned because of all Christ Jesus our Lord had done.
translation_verse: Ɔ waa ɩnɩmʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wʋla ŋmina yɩla lɩɩ npiili asɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ bɔla anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Krisito Yesu sʋ waa kanɩn.

english_verse: Christ now gives us courage and confidence, so we can come to God by faith.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ a maa waa kʋkʋlʋn yɛ Krisito, nɩɩ an kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii sʋ mʋ, an taalɛ yɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ansi tɔ kɩnyɩn tɔ yɛgɛ a man sʋ kufuu.

english_verse: This is why you should not be discouraged when I suffer for you. After all, it will bring honor to you. Christ's Love for Us
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ n tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ, fan man yɛgɛ fanɛ abaa ɩ yɔɔ, lɩɩ awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ n wu fanɛ sʋ falɛ. Ɩnɩmʋ ii biti ɩ bɩya fanɛ tɔnɔ. Pɔɔlɩ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ sa Krisito abi mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ Efeso

english_verse: All beings in heaven and on earth receive their life from him.
translation_verse: Mʋ tɔ nɩɩ yiri kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ kasɛ sʋ yɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ sʋsʋ mʋ kpini ɩ lɩɩ.

english_verse: God is wonderful and glorious. I pray that his Spirit will make you become strong followers
translation_verse: N kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ, lɩɩ mʋ bʋnyaa kparɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ, ɔ bɔla mʋ Kayaayu mʋ sʋ, waa fanɛ kala ana ɔlʋn gaa.

english_verse: and that Christ will live in your hearts because of your faith. Stand firm and be deeply rooted in his love.
translation_verse: Mɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, lɩɩ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ mʋ, Krisito ɔ ba kyɩna fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ. Nɩɩ n bɩla n kʋlɛ yɛ, fan nyɛ ilin kɛ fan yɩlɛ fanɛ kebiti tɔ kenken,

english_verse: I pray that you and all God's people will understand what is called wide or long or high or deep.
translation_verse: kɛ fan naa Ɩbwaarɛ asa mʋ kpini fan nyɛ ɔlʋn nu Krisito kebiti mʋ nɩɩ kɩ man sʋ ɔkaa nɩɩ kɩ man sʋ bɩrɩsa mʋ kasɛ.

english_verse: I want you to know all about Christ's love, although it is too wonderful to be measured. Then your lives will be filled with all that God is.
translation_verse: Halɩɩ ɩ maa bʋ tɔ fɛɛ ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ nu Krisito kebiti mʋ kasɛ lʋwɛ gbaa mʋ, n kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ fɛɛ ɔ yɛgɛ fan nu kebiti mʋ kasɛ, kɛ fanɛ kɩbaabʋtɔ kɩ baa ki du fɛɛ mʋ lɛɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa.

english_verse: I pray that Christ Jesus and the church will forever bring praise to God. His power at work in us can do far more than we dare ask or imagine. Amen.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ lɩɩ Krisito Yesu sʋ mʋ, mu abuupu mʋ kpini ba taa bʋnyaa bɛɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ lɩɩ ndaga ɩɩ sʋ ii kpee naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ ɔkaa. Amen!

english_verse: As a prisoner of the Lord, I beg you to live in a way that is worthy of the people God has chosen to be his own.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ, mɛ mʋ nɩɩ ba tii mɛ obu kpalɩ kusun mʋ nɩɩ n sun n sa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ sʋ mʋ, n kʋlɛ fanɛ yɛ, fan kyɩna kakyɩna mʋ nɩɩ kɩ dagaa yɛ kɩtɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ fanɛ ba waa mʋ lɛɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Try your best to let God's Spirit keep your hearts united. Do this by living at peace.
translation_verse: Fan bɔla fanɛ kayɩɩ yuuli mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋga fanɛ mʋ sʋ kpan fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kɩtaa kɔnɔ kʋlʋn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ sa fanɛ mʋ tɔ kenken.

english_verse: All of you are part of the same body. There is only one Spirit of God, just as you were given one hope when you were chosen to be God's people.
translation_verse: Anɛ kpini an gyɛ fɛɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kʋlʋn nɩn, nɩɩ Kayaayu kʋlʋn kpen nɩɩ an sʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɩɩ anɛ ba tamaa kʋlʋn tɔ mʋ.

english_verse: We have only one Lord, one faith, and one baptism.
translation_verse: An sʋ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ kʋlʋn nɩn, yɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kʋlʋn, yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee kʋlʋn.

english_verse: There is one God who is the Father of all people. Not only is God above all others, but he works by using all of us, and he lives in all of us.
translation_verse: An sʋ Ɩbwaarɛ kʋlʋn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ anɛ kpini Ɔsɛ. Mʋ ɩ gyɛ anɛ kpini Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, ɛɛ bɔla anɛ kpini sʋ ee sun kusun, nɩɩ ɔ bʋ anɛ kpini nkɔlɔ tɔ.

english_verse: As the Scriptures say, “When he went up to the highest place, he led away many prisoners and gave gifts to people.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, “Ɔ maa dii kpee sʋsʋ legelege mʋ, ɔ taa bamʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔ nyɛ mʋ kpee nɩɩ ɔ kɛɛ asa atɔ damantɛ.”

english_verse: This also means that the one who went deep into the earth is the same one who went into the highest heaven, so he would fill the whole universe.
translation_verse: Ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ kpɩlɩgɛ ba kasɛ sʋ mʋ, ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ o dii kpee sʋsʋ mʋ. O dii kpee sʋsʋ‐sʋsʋ abwaarɛ‐wʋlɛ kamaa, kɛ ɔ nyɛ ɔ bʋ kasɛ sʋ yɛ sʋsʋ katɩn kʋmaa.

english_verse: This will continue until we are united by our faith and by our understanding of the Son of God. Then we will be mature, just as Christ is, and we will be completely like him.
translation_verse: naa fʋʋ fɛɛ anɛ kpini an nyɛ kɔnɔ kʋlʋn kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ, kɛ a bɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐Bii mʋ, kɛ a dan danbɩrasa naa lʋwɛ fɛɛ Krisito kudubi mʋ.

english_verse: We must stop acting like children. We must not let deceitful people trick us by their false teachings, which are like winds that toss us around from place to place.
translation_verse: Saamʋ an man bɩla an gyɛ nbii kɛ asa ba nyɛ taa antɩŋɛsa kɩkaapʋ yɛ kigolongolon kɔnɔ tɔ kɔn pɩna anɛ kɛ anɛ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ baa i du fɛɛ afuu ɩmaa da nɩɩ apaa i kyenkpen tɔ mʋ.

english_verse: Love should always make us tell the truth. Then we will grow in every way and be more like Christ, the head
translation_verse: Amaa a taa kebiti tɔwɛ kesintin asɩn mʋ, kɛ a dan ba waa fɛɛ Krisito ɔkpa kʋmaa nɩmʋ sʋ, nɩɩ mʋ ɩ gyɛ kumu mʋ.

english_verse: of the body. Christ holds it together and makes all of its parts work perfectly, as it grows and becomes strong because of love. The Old Life and the New Life
translation_verse: Krisito sʋ nɩɩ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ abaafʋn‐abaafʋn mʋ ɩ kyaa abaa sʋ, nɩɩ ɩkyagakpa mʋ ɩɩ kɩtaa abaafʋn mʋ bʋga abaa tɔ. Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ kɩbaafʋn kʋmaa nɩmʋ waa kɩmʋ kusun yɛ ɔdan mʋ, kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ kpini ɩɩ dan nɩɩ ɩɩ nyɛ ɔlʋn kebiti tɔ. Fan lɩɩ fanɛ ɩkpa dɩdaa tɔ kɛ fan biliŋi asa pʋpwɛ

english_verse: Their minds are in the dark, and they are stubborn and ignorant and have missed out on the life that comes from God. They no longer have any feelings about what is right,
translation_verse: Kitentenbiri ki bun bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ sʋ, nɩɩ ba mɛɛ yɛ ba nyɛ nkpa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sʋ ɛɛ sa mʋ, lɩɩ bamʋ kɩman nyi yɛ bamʋ nkɔlɔ ɔsɩɩ mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: But this isn't what you were taught about Jesus Christ. He is the truth, and you heard about him and learned about him.
translation_verse: N nyi fan maa nu mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ ba kaapʋ fanɛ kesintin asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ Yesu tɔ mʋ.

english_verse: You were told that your foolish desires will destroy you and that you must give up your old way of life with all its bad habits.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan yɛgɛ fanɛ kakyɩna dɩdaa mʋ fɔyɩ. Kakyɩna dɩdaa mʋ kayalaga daa kyɩna ɩɩ pɩna fanɛ nɩn, nɩɩ ii nyita fanɛ.

english_verse: Let the Spirit change your way of thinking
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fanɛ nkɔlɔ yɛ fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ kpini i waa apʋpwɛ,

english_verse: and make you into a new person. You were created to be like God, and so you must please him and be truly holy. Rules for the New Life
translation_verse: kɛ fan kyɩna kakyɩna pʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tʋʋ kɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩmʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi, nɩɩ i du kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ, nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ keduli mʋ.

english_verse: We are part of the same body. Stop lying and start telling each other the truth.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fanɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ɔ yɛgɛ atɩŋɛsa, kɛ fan baa fen gyii kesintin fɛn sa fanɛ bɩrɩsa ana. Lɩɩ fɛɛ anɛ kpini an gyɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kʋlʋn asa nɩn.

english_verse: and don't give the devil a chance.
translation_verse: Kɛ ɔ man sa Sɩtaanɛ ɔkpa kpini‐kpini.

english_verse: If you are a thief, quit stealing. Be honest and work hard, so you will have something to give to people in need.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kyɩna ee yuuri mʋ, ɔ man bɩla yuuri, amaa ɔ taa mʋ abaa sun kusun mʋ nɩɩ kɩ sʋ tɔnɔ, kɛ ɔ nyɛ ɩkʋ kyɛ atiripu tɔ.

english_verse: Stop all your dirty talk. Say the right thing at the right time and help others by what you say.
translation_verse: Fan man yɛgɛ ntɔwɛ libi kʋ ɩ lɩɩ fanɛ nnɔ tɔ, amɔɔ nkyɛtɔ ntɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ ii kpiya asa ansi tɔ, nɩɩ bɛɛ nyɛ bamʋ atɔ tirisa mʋ. Saamʋ bamʋ nɩɩ bee nu mʋ, ba nyɛ‐nyɛ fanɛ katɔwɛ mʋ tɔnɔ.

english_verse: Stop being bitter and angry and mad at others. Don't yell at one another or curse each other or ever be rude.
translation_verse: Fan man bɩla yɛgɛ asɩn ɩ kɔ fanɛ, abɛɛ fan taa asɩn waa fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ, abɛɛ fan nyɛ agbʋ. Fan man pʋntɛ abaa sʋ, abɛɛ fan saalɛ abaa, abɛɛ fan kisi abaa ɩkpa kʋkwɩɩ‐kʋkwɩɩ sʋ.

english_verse: Do as God does. After all, you are his dear children.
translation_verse: Kpalɩ fan maa gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii ana mʋ nɩɩ ee biti fanɛ gaa sʋ mʋ, fan kasɛ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔ.

english_verse: You are God's people, so don't let it be said that any of you are immoral or indecent or greedy.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fan maa gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asa sʋ mʋ, ɩ man dagaa ɔkʋ maa nu fɛɛ kanyɩn abɛɛ kakyɩɩ biti kɩgyagaa, abɛɛ ineesi ɩkʋ, abɛɛ onsi‐payɩ libi kʋ ɩ baa ɩ bʋ fanɛ tɔ.

english_verse: Don't use dirty or foolish or filthy words. Instead, say how thankful you are.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩ man dagaa fan maa tɔwɛ ineesi asɩn, abɛɛ amelensi‐sɩn, abɛɛ agyaga‐sɩn, amaa fan taa afwaala sa Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: Being greedy, indecent, or immoral is just another way of worshiping idols. You can be sure people who behave in this way will never be part of the kingdom that belongs to Christ and to God. Living as People of Light
translation_verse: Fan dan fen nyi kesintin tɔ fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa kakyɩɩ abɛɛ kanyɩn biti kɩgyagaa, abɛɛ ineesi asɩn, abɛɛ onsi‐payɩ libi mʋ, ɔ mɛɛ yɛ ɔ nyɛ loo Krisito maa Ɩbwaarɛ kuwura‐gyii mʋ tɔ. Onsi‐payɩ libi du nɩn fɛɛ kusun ɩdakpa mʋ.

english_verse: Don't let anyone trick you with foolish talk. God punishes everyone who disobeys him and says foolish things.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ falɛ atɔ nɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ agbʋ ii biti ɩ ba bamʋ nɩɩ ba waa mʋ kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn mʋ sʋ. Ɩmʋ sʋ fan man yɛgɛ ɔkʋ ɔ taa ntɔwɛ kɩyan pɩna fanɛ,

english_verse: So don't have anything to do with anyone like that.
translation_verse: kanɩn sʋ faa naa kanɩn asa maŋa fan man bʋga waa sɛhn.

english_verse: You used to be like people living in the dark, but now you are people of the light because you belong to the Lord. So act like people of the light
translation_verse: Fanɛ gbaa fanɛ kitentenbiri kɩ kyɩna kɩ bʋ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ nɩn, amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ fan maa gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ asa sʋ mʋ, kaŋmaŋɛ bʋ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ nɩn. Ɩmʋ sʋ fan yɛgɛ fanɛ kakyɩna tɔ ɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ fan gyɛ ɩŋmaŋɛsa mʋ tɔ asa.

english_verse: and make your light shine. Be good and honest and truthful,
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩŋmaŋɛsa nɩmʋ ɩ bɩya kɩdanbɩrasa kɩwaa yɛ ɩkpa kikyiigi yɛ kesintin kigyii.

english_verse: as you try to please the Lord.
translation_verse: Kɛ fan waa aniya waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ ansi.

english_verse: Don't take part in doing those worthless things that are done in the dark. Instead, show how wrong they are.
translation_verse: Fan man taa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ naa tii kitentenbiri awaasa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ mɛɛ kʋʋgɛ obii danbɩrasa mʋ sʋ, amaa fan lɛɛ ɩmʋ kaapʋ yɛ ɩ gyɛ alibi.

english_verse: It is disgusting even to talk about what is done in the dark.
translation_verse: Ɩ gyɛ apeeli‐sɩn gbaa fɛɛ fan tɔwɛ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ asʋtɔ ɔlʋn wuya ana bɛɛ baala bɛɛ waa mʋ asɩn.

english_verse: But the light will show what these things are really like.
translation_verse: Amaa kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɩŋmaŋɛsa mʋ lɛɛ ifuli sʋ mʋ, ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ii wu kanan mʋ nɩɩ ki du.

english_verse: Light shows up everything, just as the Scriptures say, “Wake up from your sleep and rise from death. Then Christ will shine on you.”
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ nɩɩ ɩŋmaŋɛsa ɩ ba kʋtɔ kʋmaa sʋ mʋ, kanɩn kʋtɔ maŋa mɛɛ baala. Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ ba tɔwɛ yɩla yɛ, “Fʋ, nsɩɩrɛ ɔdɛpʋ, kyiŋi, kʋsʋ lɩɩ lewu tɔ, kɛ Krisito ɩŋmaŋɛsa mʋ ɩ ba fʋ sʋ.”

english_verse: Act like people with good sense and not like fools.
translation_verse: Fan kɩɩ danbɩrasa kɛ fan man kyɩna fɛɛ amelensipu, amaa fan kyɩna fɛɛ anyaasɩnpʋ.

english_verse: Don't be stupid. Instead, find out what the Lord wants you to do.
translation_verse: Fan man waa fɛɛ amelensipu, amaa fan kpan fanɛ n‐yɩɩ bɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu ii biti fɛɛ fan waa.

english_verse: Don't destroy yourself by getting drunk, but let the Spirit fill your life.
translation_verse: Fan man kan nuu nta bʋʋ, kɛ ɩ nyɛ nyita fanɛ amu. Amaa fan yɛgɛ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ o loo bɔla fanɛ tɔ gaa.

english_verse: When you meet together, sing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs, as you praise the Lord with all your heart.
translation_verse: Fan taa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩlʋn yɛ abwaarɛsɩn ɩlʋn yɛ Kayaayu kɩlɛɛkaapʋ ɩlʋn fɛn tɔwɛ fɛn waa abaa. Fan taa fanɛ nkɔlɔ kpini bɩɩ ɩlʋn sa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ.

english_verse: Always use the name of our Lord Jesus Christ to thank God the Father for everything. Wives and Husbands
translation_verse: Saŋa kʋmaa nɩmʋ fan taa afwaala sa Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ, lɩɩ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kɩtɩɩ tɔ sʋ. Akyɩɩ‐kilipu ba maa bamʋ‐kuli ana asɩn

english_verse: A wife should put her husband first, as she does the Lord.
translation_verse: Akyɩɩ‐kilipu, fan bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa fanɛ‐kuli ana fɛɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ nɩɩ fɛn waa fɛn sa mʋ.

english_verse: A husband is the head of his wife, as Christ is the head and the Savior of the church, which is his own body.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ okuli mʋ ɩ gyɛ kumu sa mʋ‐ka, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Krisito gyɛ kumu sa mu abuupu kʋbʋ, mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ mʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ, nɩɩ mʋ ɩ gyɛ kɩmʋ ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ mʋ.

english_verse: A husband should love his wife as much as Christ loved the church and gave his life for it.
translation_verse: Anyɩn‐kilipu, fan nyɛ kebiti sa fanɛ‐ka ana fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Krisito nyɛ kebiti sa mʋ kʋbʋ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ waa saraga wu sa bamʋ mʋ.

english_verse: He made the church holy by the power of his word, and he made it pure by washing it with water.
translation_verse: Kɛ ɔ nyɛ bɔla nkyu yɛ mʋ asɩn mʋ sʋ gyee bamʋ waa kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ sa mʋ n‐yɩɩ.

english_verse: Christ did this, so he would have a glorious and holy church, without faults or spots or wrinkles or any other flaws.
translation_verse: Ɔ waa kanɩn nɩn kɛ mʋ kʋbʋ mʋ ba baa ba gyɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ bɛɛrɛɛ, yɛgɛ ba man sʋ ineesi, abɛɛ alibi akʋ, abɛɛ awaasa libi, yɛgɛ ba du kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ, nɩɩ ba man sʋ asɩn pwɩɩsa akʋ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ.

english_verse: In the same way, a husband should love his wife as much as he loves himself. A husband who loves his wife shows he loves himself.
translation_verse: Ɔkpa kʋlʋn maŋa sʋ, ɩ dagaa fɛɛ anyɩn‐kilipu ba maa nyɛ kebiti sa bamʋ‐ka ana, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ kebiti sa bamʋ gbaa‐gbaa n‐yɩɩ mʋ. Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee biti mʋ‐ka mʋ, ii biti mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ n‐yɩɩ nɩn.

english_verse: None of us hate our own bodies. We provide for them and take good care of them, just as Christ does for the church,
translation_verse: Ɔsa kʋ man bʋ tɔ nɩɩ ee kisi mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ n‐yɩɩ, amaa ɛɛ bɩla kɩmʋ, yɛgɛ ɛɛ kɩɩ kɩmʋ sʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Krisito ɩɩ kɩɩ mʋ kʋbʋ mʋ sʋ mʋ.

english_verse: because we are each part of his body.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ anɛ ɩ gyɛ Krisito kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ yɛ ɩmʋ abaafʋn kʋkwɩɩ‐kʋkwɩɩ mʋ.

english_verse: As the Scriptures say, “A man leaves his father and mother to get married, and he becomes like one person with his wife.”
translation_verse: Ba kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, “Lɩɩ falɛ sʋ ɔnyɩn ii biti ɔ lɩɩ mu‐nyi yɛ mʋ‐sɛ asɛ, kɛ ɔ taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ naa bʋga mʋ‐ka tɔ, kɛ bamʋ asa anyɔ mʋ ba ba waa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kʋlʋn.”

english_verse: This is a great mystery, but I understand it to mean Christ and his church.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ asɩn baalasa mʋ nɩɩ i budu, amaa mɛɛ mɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ falɛ mʋ ɩ yɩlɛ sa Krisito maa mʋ kʋbʋ mʋ nɩn.

english_verse: So each husband should love his wife as much as he loves himself, and each wife should respect her husband.
translation_verse: Amaa n tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ, ɔnyɩn kʋmaa nɩmʋ ɔ nyɛ kebiti sa mʋ‐ka, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kebiti sa mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ n‐yɩɩ mʋ, nɩɩ ɩ dagaa ɔkyɩɩ‐kilipu kʋmaa nɩmʋ mɔɔ maa bɩya mʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa mu‐kuli.

english_verse: Children, you belong to the Lord, and you do the right thing when you obey your parents. The first commandment with a promise says,
translation_verse: Nbii, lɩɩ fan maa gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ lɛɛ sʋ mʋ, fan nu fanɛ akʋʋgɛpʋ asɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩmʋ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ fan waa.

english_verse: Parents, don't be hard on your children. Raise them properly. Teach them and instruct them about the Lord. Slaves and Masters
translation_verse: Akʋgɛpʋ, fan man waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kii biti kɩ yɛgɛ fanɛ nbii ba nyɛ agbʋ, amaa fan kɩɩ bamʋ sʋ, kɛ fan taa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ kɩkaapʋ mʋ bɩla bamʋ. Anyɛ yɛ bamʋ‐nyɩrɩpɛ ana

english_verse: Slaves, you must obey your earthly masters. Show them great respect and be as loyal to them as you are to Christ.
translation_verse: Anyɛ, fan nu sa fanɛ kasɛ sʋ anyɩrɩpɛ ana, kɛ fan sɩlɛ bamʋ lɩɩ fanɛ nkɔlɔ kpini tɔ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fen biti fan waa sa Krisito mʋ.

english_verse: Try to please them at all times, and not just when you think they are watching. You are slaves of Christ, so with your whole heart you must do what God wants you to do.
translation_verse: Fan man nu sa bamʋ ansi sʋ wʋlɛ kɛ fan nyɛ gyii bamʋ amu, amaa fan maa gyɛ Krisito anyɛ sʋ mʋ, fan waa kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ lɩɩ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩpɩrɛ sʋ.

english_verse: Gladly serve your masters, as though they were the Lord himself, and not simply people.
translation_verse: Fan sun bamʋ lɩɩ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ fɛɛ fan maa sun Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ, nɩɩ man gyɛ asa nɩɩ fen sun mʋ.

english_verse: You know that you will be rewarded for any good things you do, whether you are slaves or free.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ fan nyi fɛɛ, Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ ii biti ɔ ka ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ kʋkɔ lɩɩ kusun danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa mʋ sʋ. Ɩ man tiri fɛɛ ɔ gyɛ kɩnyɛ abɛɛ ee gyii mʋ kɩbaa sʋ.

english_verse: Slave owners, you must treat your slaves with this same respect. Don't threaten them. They have the same Master in heaven that you do, and he doesn't have favorites. The Fight against Evil
translation_verse: Anyɩrɩpɛ mɔɔ, kanɩn maŋa sʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ fan waa fanɛ anyɛ. Fan man ŋaala bamʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fu nyi fɛɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ fanaa bamʋ kpini Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ bʋ sʋsʋ nɩn, nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ mɛɛgɛ tɔ. Nyɩmɩsa maa n‐yaayu libi ɩɩ kɔ

english_verse: Finally, let the mighty strength of the Lord make you strong.
translation_verse: Mɛ asɩn laalaalʋwɛ mʋ gyɛ yɛ, fan nyɛ ɔlʋn lɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ yɛ mʋ ɔlʋn lala mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Put on all the armor that God gives, so you can defend yourself against the devil's tricks.
translation_verse: Fan taa adʋn tɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sa fanɛ mʋ kpini bun, kɛ fan nyɛ taalɛ kɔ yɛ Sɩtaanɛ kanyaasɩn ɩkpa libi mʋ.

english_verse: We are not fighting against humans. We are fighting against forces and authorities and against rulers of darkness and powers in the spiritual world.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ man gyɛ anaa anyɩmɩsa ɩɩ kɔ. Amaa an kɔ yɛ awuragyipu yɛ alʋlʋnpʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ afuu tɔ. An kɔ yɛ n‐yaayu libi mʋ nɩɩ ii gyii kuwura dulinyaa kitentenbiri nɩmʋ tɔ.

english_verse: So put on all the armor that God gives. Then when that evil day comes, you will be able to defend yourself. And when the battle is over, you will still be standing firm.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan taa adʋntɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sa fanɛ mʋ kpini bun. Saamʋ nɩɩ nkɛ libi kan ba mʋ, fɛn taalɛ nyɛ ɔlʋn kɔ tii Sɩtaanɛ ɩkpa libi mʋ. Nɩɩ fan kan kɔ lʋwɛ gbaa mʋ, fan yɩlɛ fanɛ ayaa sʋ.

english_verse: Be ready! Let the truth be like a belt around your waist, and let God's justice protect you like armor.
translation_verse: Fan yɩlɛ tɔ kenken, kɛ fan taa kesintin waa kɩrɩsʋ ŋmina fanɛ nsɛ tɔ. Kɛ fan taa ɩkpa kigyiigi waa fɛɛ kɩbɩlɛ tɔ panpasan kun fanɛ nkɔlɔ sʋ.

english_verse: Your desire to tell the good news about peace should be like shoes on your feet.
translation_verse: Fan kʋʋla fanɛ n‐yɩɩ biti asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ bɩya keyuula mʋ kɩtɔwɛ fɛɛ fanɛ ayaa sʋ asɩbɩta.

english_verse: Let your faith be like a shield, and you will be able to stop all the flaming arrows of the evil one.
translation_verse: Saŋa kʋmaa fan taa kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kɩtaa fɛɛ kɩbaa tɔ kʋtɔ kunsa. Kɩmʋ nɩɩ fɛn taalɛ taa dunla Olibilibi fʋlɔn anyenbi mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ tʋʋ fanɛ mʋ kɔnɔ.

english_verse: Let God's saving power be like a helmet, and for a sword use God's message that comes from the Spirit.
translation_verse: Fan taa kamɔlɩgɛ fɛɛ abɩlɩtɔ kʋwʋrʋ bun, kɛ fan taa abwaarɛsɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ kɩnaa tɔ sakunde, mʋ nɩɩ Kayaayu mʋ ɩɩ sa mʋ kɩtaa.

english_verse: Never stop praying, especially for others. Always pray by the power of the Spirit. Stay alert and keep praying for God's people.
translation_verse: Kɛ fan taa Kayaayu mʋ ɔlʋn kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa tɔ, kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ kyɛ fanɛ tɔ. Lɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ mʋ, fan baa fan da sʋ, kɛ fan waa aniya kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ saŋa kʋmaa fɛn sa Ɩbwaarɛ asa mʋ kpini.

english_verse: Pray that I will be given the message to speak and that I may fearlessly explain the mystery about the good news.
translation_verse: Fan kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ sa ngbaa mɛ fɛɛ saŋa kʋmaa nɩɩ n kan bugi mɛ kɔnɔ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ sa mɛ asɩn tɔwɛsa, kɛ n nyɛ yɩlɛ kɩnyɩn tɔ lɛɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ naafɔɔ ɩ baala mʋ kaapʋ.

english_verse: I was sent to do this work, and this is the reason I am in jail. So pray that I will be brave and will speak as I should. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Asɩn danbɩrasa nɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ Krisito sun mɛ, nɩɩ ba tii mɛ obu falɛ. Fan kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ fɛɛ n taalɛ tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ kɩnyɩn tɔ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa. Laalaalʋwɛ afwaala

english_verse: I pray that God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will give peace, love, and faith to every follower!
translation_verse: Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito ba sa fanɛ, anɛ‐daa ana yɛ anɛ‐supu ana keyuula yɛ kebiti yɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii.

english_verse: May God be kind to everyone who keeps on loving our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ bwaala bamʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ kɩ man sʋ ɔkaa sa anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito mʋ.

english_verse: From Paul and Timothy, servants of Christ Jesus. To all God's people who belong to Christ Jesus at Philippi and to all your bishops and deacons.
translation_verse: Ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ lɩɩ mɛ Pɔɔlɩ yɛ Timoti, mʋ nɩɩ an gyɛ Krisito Yesu ayaafɔlɛ mʋ asɛ. Nɩɩ an kyʋrɔɔ an sa fanɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asa kpini mʋ nɩɩ fanaa Krisito Yesu fan waa kʋkʋlʋn, yɛ fanɛ abɩlɩsa yɛ akyɛtɔpʋ mʋ nɩɩ fan bʋ Filipi kadɛ tɔ mʋ.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Paul's Prayer for the Church in Philippi
translation_verse: Anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito ba bwaala fanɛ kɛ ba sa fanɛ kayɩɩ yuuli. Pɔɔlɩ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ sa Krisito abuupu mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ Filipi

english_verse: Every time I think of you, I thank my God.
translation_verse: N fwaala mɛ Ɩbwaarɛ saŋa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ n nyiŋi fanɛ sʋ mʋ.

english_verse: And whenever I mention you in my prayers, it makes me happy.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ saŋa kʋmaa n maa kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ n sa fanɛ kpini mʋ, n kʋlɛ yɛ kɔkɔlɔ fuuli tɔ,

english_verse: This is because you have taken part with me in spreading the good news from the first day you heard about it.
translation_verse: lɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan ba tii mɛ sʋ nɩɩ an waa asɩn danbɩrasa kɩtɔwɛ kusun saŋa mʋ nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ gyii ba fʋʋ halɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ.

english_verse: God is the one who began this good work in you, and I am certain that he won't stop before it is complete on the day that Christ Jesus returns.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ n dan n nyi fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ o piili kusun danbɩrasa fanɛ tɔ mʋ, ee biti ɔ kɩɩ sʋ kɛ ii kpee sʋ naa lʋwɛ kyɛɛkyɛɛ kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ Krisito Yesu ii biti o bwii ba mʋ.

english_verse: You have a special place in my heart. So it is only natural for me to feel the way I do. All of you have helped in the work God has given me, as I defend the good news and tell about it here in jail.
translation_verse: Kpalɩ fɛɛ saŋa kʋmaa fan maa bʋ mɛ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ sʋ mʋ, ɩmʋ ɔkpa nɩn fɛɛ n fɛ falɛ nfɛɛrɛ nɩmʋ lɩɩ fanɛ sʋ. Halɩɩ n maa bʋ obu tiisa tɔ gbaa mʋ, abɛɛ n maa kɔ n kun asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ yɛ ɩ yɩlɛ mʋ, fanɛ kpini fan taa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ tii Ɩbwaarɛ kusun mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa bwaala mɛ mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: God himself knows how much I want to see you. He knows I care for you in the same way Christ Jesus does.
translation_verse: N sʋ Krisito Yesu kebiti mʋ n sa fanɛ kpini, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ nyi kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ yɩlɛ mɛ sʋ fɛɛ n wu fanɛ.

english_verse: I pray that your love will keep on growing and you will fully know and understand
translation_verse: Mɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ sa fanɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, fanɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ fan sʋ mʋ kɩ nyɛ akyɔ tii sʋ, kɛ fan dan fanɛ kinyi yɛ kasɛ kunu kʋtɔ kʋmaa tɔ,

english_verse: how to make the right choices. Then you will still be pure and innocent when Christ returns. And until that day,
translation_verse: saamʋ fɛn nyɛ taalɛ bɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋrɔn kyʋn sʋ yɛgɛ ineesi yɛ asɩn pwɩɩsa kʋ man bʋ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ naa fʋʋ Krisito kɩba mʋ.

english_verse: Jesus Christ will keep you busy doing good deeds that bring glory and praise to God. What Life Means to Paul
translation_verse: Kɛ fanɛ kakyɩna tɔ awaasa kpini i kyiigi lɩɩ Yesu Krisito sʋ waa ɔdan, kɛ ɩ taa bʋnyaa yɛ ayɩn‐bi sa Ɩbwaarɛ. Pɔɔlɩ kitii obu mʋ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ Asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ ɩ yɛlɩgɛ

english_verse: My dear friends, I want you to know that what has happened to me has helped to spread the good news.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, n biti fan bɩɩ fɛɛ, kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ki tu mɛ mʋ, ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ yɛlɩgɛ kpee ansi tɔ.

english_verse: The Roman guards and all the others know I am here in jail because I serve Christ.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ kanɩn sʋ mʋ, owura‐kpa akunpu mʋ kpini yɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ nfɩɩ mʋ, ba bɩɩ fɛɛ ba maa tii mɛ obu lɩɩ n maa gyɛ Krisito kɩnyɛ mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: Now most of the Lord's followers have become brave and are fearlessly telling the message.
translation_verse: Kpalɩ ba maa tii mɛ obu sʋ mʋ, ɩ yɛgɛ Krisito akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu gaalaagaa ba yɩlɛ kɩnyɩn tɔ bɛɛ tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ, yɛgɛ ba man sʋ kufuu.

english_verse: Some are preaching about Christ because they are jealous and envious of us. Others are preaching because they want to help.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ kesintin nɩn fɛɛ akʋ lɩɩ kayɩɩ basa yɛ kolu biti mʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ mɛ sʋ, nɩɩ ba sʋ bɛɛ tɔwɛ asɩn lɩɩ Krisito sʋ, amaa akʋ bɩrɛ ba taa nfɛɛrɛ danbɩrasa nɩn bɛɛ tɔwɛ Krisito asɩn mʋ.

english_verse: They love Christ and know I am here to defend the good news about him.
translation_verse: Ba mɛɛ bamʋ bɩrɛ, kebiti sʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa kanɩn, lɩɩ fɛɛ be nyi Ɩbwaarɛ maa taa asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ kukun waa mɛ abaa tɔ.

english_verse: But the ones who are jealous of us are not sincere. They just want to cause trouble for me while I am in jail.
translation_verse: Amaa akʋ bɩrɛ, bɛɛ kɩɩ bee biti bamʋ nkʋn lɛɛ sʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɔwɛ, man gyɛ nfɛɛrɛ danbɩrasa sʋ, be nyi fɛɛ bɛɛ waa kanɩn nɩn kɛ mɛ awʋrʋfɔ ɩ lɔŋɔ tii sʋ yɛgɛ n tii obu.

english_verse: But that doesn't matter. All that matters is that people are telling about Christ, whether they are sincere or not. This is what makes me glad. I will keep on being glad,
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ mɩnɛ i tiri? Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ki tiri ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ, nɩɩ nfɛɛrɛ libi nɩɩ ba sʋ oo, abɛɛ kesintin tɔ nɩn oo, ɔkpa kʋmaa anɩmʋ sʋ mʋ, ba tɔwɛ Krisito asɩn mʋ. Nɩɩ lɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ mi ansi i gyii. Nɩɩ n biti n kyaga sʋ gyii mi ansi,

english_verse: because I know that your prayers and the help that comes from the Spirit of Christ Jesus will keep me safe.
translation_verse: lɩɩ fɛɛ n nyi lɩɩ fanɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ tɔ yɛ Yesu Krisito Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ nkyɛtɔ sʋ mʋ, asɩn mʋ nɩɩ i tu mɛ mʋ, ii biti ɩ yɛgɛ n nyɛ mɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ ɩmʋ tɔ.

english_verse: I honestly expect and hope I will never do anything to be ashamed of. Whether I live or die, I always want to be as brave as I am now and bring honor to Christ.
translation_verse: Mɛ kɩpɩrɛ yɛ tamaa mʋ nɩɩ n sʋ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ, n mɛɛ yɛ n waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kii gyila mɛ ipeeli, amaa n yɩlɛ kɩnyɩn tɔ, saamʋ, lewu tɔ nɩn oo, nkpa tɔ nɩn oo, lɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ yɛ saŋa kʋmaa, asa ba bʋnyaa Krisito lɩɩ mɛ sʋ.

english_verse: If I live, it will be for Christ, and if I die, I will gain even more.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ mɛɛ mɛ bɩrɛ, n maa tɛ nkpa tɔ falɛ mʋ, n tɛ sa Krisito, nɩɩ n kan wu mɔɔ nɩn, ɩɩ gyɛ tɔnɔ sa mɛ.

english_verse: It is a hard choice to make. I want to die and be with Christ, because this would be much better.
translation_verse: N sii n kyɔlɛ ɩmʋ anyɔ nsana. Mɛ kɩpɩrɛ tɔ n gyɛ fɛɛ n lɩɩ kasɛ sʋ nfɩɩ, kɛ n naa kyɩna Krisito asɛ, ɩmʋ ɩ bɔ.

english_verse: But I know that all of you still need me. This is why I am sure I will stay on to help you grow and be happy in your faith.
translation_verse: N maa kɔɔlɛ ɩnɩmʋ gyii mʋ, n nyi fɛɛ n biti n baa n bʋ tɔ, kɛ n kyaga sʋ kyɩna yɛ fanɛ kpini, kɛ i kpiya fanɛ ansi tɔ, kɛ fanɛ nkɔlɔ i fuuli fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ.

english_verse: Then, when I visit you again, you will have good reason to take great pride in Christ Jesus because of me.
translation_verse: Saamʋ, mɛ kɩbɩla ba kyɩna fanɛ asɛ mʋ, bɔla mɛ sʋ mʋ, fanɛ ansi ii biti i gyii Krisito Yesu tɔ tii sʋ.

english_verse: Above all else, you must live in a way that brings honor to the good news about Christ. Then, whether I visit you or not, I will hear that all of you think alike. I will know that you are working together and are struggling side by side to get others to believe the good news.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ki tiri ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ, fan yɛgɛ fanɛ kakyɩna tɔ awaasa ɩmaa asɩn danbɩrasa lɩɩ Yesu Krisito sʋ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ kaapʋ mʋ, ɩ waa kʋkʋlʋn. Saamʋ n kan bʋ fanɛ asɛ oo, n man bʋ fanɛ asɛ oo, n biti n nu fɛɛ fan yɩlɛ tɔ kenken kɔnɔ kʋlʋn tɔ, nɩɩ fan sʋ nfɛɛrɛ kʋlʋn fɛn payɩ ansi lɩɩ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ.

english_verse: Be brave when you face your enemies. Your courage will show them that they are going to be destroyed, and it will show you that you will be saved. God will make all of this happen,
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n biti n bɩla nu yɛ fan man sɩlɛ fanɛ dʋn ana ɔkpa kʋmaa sʋ. Nɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ ii biti ɩɩ kaapʋ bamʋ fɛɛ bee biti ba wu muuri, kɛ fanɛ bɩrɛ fan nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ ɩ ba kanɩn.

english_verse: and he has blessed you. Not only do you have faith in Christ, but you suffer for him.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ man gyɛ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ sa fanɛ ɔkpa yɛ fan ba kɔɔlɛ Krisito gyii nkʋn, amaa awʋrʋfɔ kigyii lɩɩ mʋ sʋ gbaa tii sʋ.

english_verse: You saw me suffer, and you still hear about my troubles. Now you must suffer in the same way.
translation_verse: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ fan ba tii mɛ sʋ kolu mʋ tɔ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan daa kyɩna wu n maa kɔ mʋ, kanɩn kolu kʋlʋn maŋa nɩɩ n san n kɔ falɛ.

english_verse: Now make me completely happy! Live in harmony by showing love for each other. Be united in what you think, as if you were only one person.
translation_verse: kanɩn bɩrɛ fan yɛgɛ nɩɩ mi ansi i gyii naa lʋwɛ kyɛɛkyɛɛ, fɛɛ fan maa sʋ nfɛɛrɛ kʋlʋn yɛ kebiti kʋlʋn yɛ nɩɩ fan yɩlɛ kʋtɔ kʋlʋn sʋ.

english_verse: and think the same way that Christ Jesus thought:
translation_verse: Ɩ dagaa fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ ɩɩ baa i du fɛɛ Krisito Yesu lɛɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Christ was truly God. But he did not try to remain equal with God.
translation_verse: Krisito maa gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kedubi falɛ gbaa mʋ, ɔ man yɩlɛ kɩmʋ sʋ kɩtaa tɔ fɛɛ maa Ɩbwaarɛ ba gyɛ kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

english_verse: Instead he gave up everything and became a slave, when he became like one of us.
translation_verse: Amaa ɔ waa mʋ n‐yɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ man gyɛ sɛhn, nɩɩ ɔ waa mʋ n‐yɩɩ kɩnyɛ, nɩɩ o be biliŋi nyɩmɩsa, nɩɩ ba wu mʋ maa gyɛ nyɩmɩsa,

english_verse: Christ was humble. He obeyed God and even died on a cross.
translation_verse: ɔ bɩya mʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ nyɛ kʋsʋ‐nu sa Ɩbwaarɛ naa fʋʋ lewu tɔ, halɩɩ oyu laasa sʋ lewu.

english_verse: Then God gave Christ the highest place and honored his name above all others.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ kʋsaa mʋ naa kyɩna sʋsʋ opula kparɛ, nɩɩ ɔ sa mʋ kɩtɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ kyɔ atɩɩ kpini,

english_verse: So at the name of Jesus everyone will bow down, those in heaven, on earth, and under the earth.
translation_verse: kɛ nyɩmɩsa yɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ sʋsʋ yɛ kasɛ sʋ yɛ kamandɛ tɔ kpini, ba muŋa sun Yesu kɩtɩɩ,

english_verse: And to the glory of God the Father everyone will openly agree, “Jesus Christ is Lord!” Lights in the World
translation_verse: kɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ o bugi kɔnɔ lɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, Yesu Krisito ɩ gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ, kɛ bʋnyaa ɔ baa ɔ gyɛ Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ. Fan ŋalɩgɛ fɛɛ akyikpebi dulinyaa tɔ

english_verse: My dear friends, you always obeyed when I was with you. Now that I am away, you should obey even more. So work with fear and trembling to discover what it really means to be saved.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ ana danbɩrasa, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n bʋ fanɛ asɛ nɩɩ fan nu sa mɛ saŋa kʋmaa mʋ, halɩɩ nɩɩ n man bʋ fanɛ asɛ gbaa mʋ, fan waa kanɩn tii sʋ gaa. Fan taa bɛɛrɛɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ kɛ fan sɩlɛ mʋ kɛ fan sun kamɔlɩgɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan nyɛ mʋ kusun naa lʋwɛ.

english_verse: Then you will be the pure and innocent children of God. You live among people who are crooked and evil, but you must not do anything they can say is wrong. Try to shine as lights among the people of this world,
translation_verse: Saamʋ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ ɩ mɛɛ nyɛ asɩn pwɩɩsa yɛ ineesi ɩkʋ, yɛgɛ fan gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii ana mʋ nɩɩ fan man sʋ alibi kʋ, nɩɩ fan sʋ fan tɛ yɛ nfɛɛrɛ libi wuya ana yɛ asun libi awaapʋ. Nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fan maa ŋalɩgɛ sʋ bamʋ tɔ fɛɛ akyikpebi mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ sʋsʋ ɩɩ ŋalɩgɛ mʋ,

english_verse: as you hold firmly to the message that gives life. Then on the day when Christ returns, I can take pride in you. I can also know that my work and efforts were not useless.
translation_verse: fɛɛ fan maa sʋ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ sa nkpa fɛn sa bamʋ falɛ. Nɩɩ fan kan waa kanɩn mʋ, ii biti ɩ yɛgɛ kɛ n nyɛ kaapʋ mɛ n‐yɩɩ kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ Krisito ii biti o bwii ba mʋ, kɛ ɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ mɛ kɩkpan n‐yɩɩ yɛ kɩpayɩ ansi waa kusun fanɛ tɔ mʋ, ɩ man waa kɩyan.

english_verse: Your faith in the Lord and your service are like a sacrifice offered to him. And my own blood may have to be poured out with the sacrifice. If this happens, I will be glad and rejoice with you.
translation_verse: Fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ gyii yɛ kusun sa mʋ mʋ, du nɩn fɛɛ saraga sa mʋ, halɩɩ nɩɩ bee biti ba kyɛɛgɛ mɛ nkalan wʋrɩgɛ tii waa saraga mʋ sʋ, ii biti ɩ waa mɛ ɔkɔn gaa kɛ n maa fanɛ ansi i gyii.

english_verse: In the same way, you should be glad and rejoice with me. Timothy and Epaphroditus
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɩ dagaa fanɛ gbaa fanɛ ɩ waa fanɛ ɔkɔn, kɛ maa fanɛ ansi i gyii. Pɔɔlɩ sun Timoti maa Epafuroditu kpee Filipi abi asɛ

english_verse: I want to be encouraged by news about you. So I hope the Lord Jesus will soon let me send Timothy to you.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu kebiti tɔ mʋ, n sʋ tamaa fɛɛ ɩ mɛɛ yɛ ɩ kyɛɛrɛɛ n biti n sun Timoti fanɛ asɛ, kɛ n nyɛ nu fanɛ sʋ kɛ mɛ kɔkɔlɔ ɔ nyɛ dɛ mɛ.

english_verse: I don't have anyone else who cares about you as much as he does.
translation_verse: N man bɩla n sʋ ɔkʋ fɛɛ mʋ, nɩɩ fanɛ kɩbaabʋtɔ asɩn i tiri mʋ.

english_verse: The others think only about what interests them and not about what concerns Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ asansa mʋ kpini bamʋ lɛɛ nkʋn nɩɩ bee biti, man gyɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ Yesu Krisito lɛɛ.

english_verse: But you know what kind of person Timothy is. He has worked with me like a son in spreading the good news.
translation_verse: Amaa fanɛ gbaa‐gbaa fan nyi kanan mʋ nɩɩ Timoti lɛɛ mʋ daa kaapʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ o tii mɛ sʋ nɩɩ an sun asɩn danbɩrasa kusun mʋ, fɛɛ ɔsɛ yɛ obii.

english_verse: I hope to send him to you, as soon as I find out what is going to happen to me.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ, n sʋ tamaa fɛɛ nɩɩ n dan nyɛ wu kanan mʋ nɩɩ ii kpee sʋ ɩɩ sa mɛ mʋ, n biti n sun mʋ fanɛ asɛ.

english_verse: And I feel sure the Lord will also let me come soon.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n sʋ tamaa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ tɔ fɛɛ, ɩ mɛɛ yɛ ɩ kyɛɛrɛɛ n gbaa‐gbaa mɛ n biti n ba fanɛ asɛ.

english_verse: I think I ought to send my dear friend Epaphroditus back to you. He is a follower and a worker and a soldier of the Lord, just as I am. You sent him to look after me,
translation_verse: Amaa n fɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ ii tiri fɛɛ, n bwii sun anɛ bɩrɩsa Epafuroditu fanɛ asɛ. N maa mʋ an bʋga an waa kusun, nɩɩ an kɔ an kun asɩn danbɩrasa fanɛ asɛ. Nɩɩ mʋ ɩ bɩla ɔ gyɛ fanɛ kabɔɔ mʋ nɩɩ fan sun, nɩɩ ɔ ba kyɛ mɛ tɔ ɩmʋ nɩɩ i tiri mɛ mʋ.

english_verse: but now he is eager to see you. He is worried, because you heard he was sick.
translation_verse: Ɩ gyʋgyʋʋ mʋ yɛ o wu fanɛ kpini, nɩɩ mʋ kɔkɔlɔ ki nyita mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fan maa nu yɛ ɛɛ lɔ sʋ mʋ.

english_verse: In fact, he was very sick and almost died. But God was kind to him, and also to me, and he kept me from being burdened down with sorrow.
translation_verse: Ɩ gyɛ kesintin fɛɛ ɔ lɔ, halɩɩ ɩ san gbɛrɛɛ o wu. Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ wu mʋ kʋwɛɛ nɩɩ man gyɛ mʋ nkʋn, amaa yɛ ngbaa mɛ, nɩɩ ɔ yɛgɛ nɩɩ n man bɔɔta tɔ tii sʋ.

english_verse: Now I am more eager than ever to send Epaphroditus back again. You will be glad to see him, and I won't have to worry any longer.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɩ gyʋgyʋʋ mɛ gaa fɛɛ n sun mʋ fanɛ asɛ. Saamʋ, nɩɩ fan kan bɩla wu mʋ mʋ, kɛ ɩ waa fanɛ ɔkɔn tii sʋ, kɛ mɛ kɩbɔɔta tɔ mʋ ɩ lʋwɛ.

english_verse: Be sure to give him a cheerful welcome, just as people who serve the Lord deserve.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan taa kensi‐gyii kɔɔlɛ mʋ abaa anyɔ fɛɛ maa gyɛ fanɛ bɩrɩsa ɔkɔɔlɛ‐gyipu Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu tɔ mʋ. Fan taa bɛɛrɛɛ sa asa fɛɛ mu kudubi,

english_verse: He almost died working for Christ, and he risked his own life to do for me what you could not.
translation_verse: lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩ san gbɛrɛɛ o wu kpalɩ Krisito kusun mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ ɔ taa mʋ nkpa taga apʋ, kyɛ mɛ tɔ lɩɩ nkyɛtɔ mʋ nɩɩ fan man taalɛ kyɛ mɛ tɔ mʋ.

english_verse: Finally, my dear friends, be glad that you belong to the Lord. It doesn't bother me to write the same things to you that I have written before. In fact, it is for your own good.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ san mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, fanɛ ansi i gyii lɩɩ fan maa waa kʋkʋlʋn yɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu sʋ mʋ! Nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ asɩn tɔɔrɔɔsa sa mɛ fɛɛ n maa bɩla n kyʋrɔɔ atɔ kʋlʋn maŋa n sa fanɛ, amaa ɩ gyɛ nkyɛtɔ sa fanɛ nɩn.

english_verse: Watch out for those people who behave like dogs! They are evil and want to do more than just circumcise you.
translation_verse: Fan kɩɩ yɛ ɔdan lɩɩ asa mʋ nɩɩ be du fɛɛ igyoonɔ nɩɩ ba gyɛ alibi awaapʋ, nɩɩ ba yɩlɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kɩtɩn sʋ.

english_verse: But we are the ones who are truly circumcised, because we worship by the power of God's Spirit and take pride in Christ Jesus. We don't brag about what we have done,
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ anɛ mʋ nɩɩ an bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ sʋ an sun mʋ, nɩɩ an kaapʋ anɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ anɛ kɩwaa kʋkʋlʋn yɛ Krisito Yesu sʋ mʋ, anɛ nɩɩ ba tɩŋɛ iduu kesintin tɔ mʋ. Nɩɩ a man taa anɛ n‐yɩɩ tʋʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kɩtɩn sʋ.

english_verse: I was circumcised when I was eight days old, and I am from the nation of Israel and the tribe of Benjamin. I am a true Hebrew. As a Pharisee, I strictly obeyed the Law of Moses.
translation_verse: Ba tɩn mɛ oduu kakɛ buruwasapu, nɩɩ n gyɛ Ɩsɩrayɩ obii nɩn, nɩɩ n lɩɩ Bengyamin kebunɔ, nɩɩ n gyɛ Hibriwu obii gbaa‐gbaa, nɩɩ taa lɩɩ nbara mʋ kibuu sʋ mʋ, n kyɩna n gyɛ Farasii nɩn,

english_verse: And I was so eager I even made trouble for the church. I did everything the Law demands in order to please God.
translation_verse: nɩɩ lɩɩ mɛ n‐yɩɩ kɩkpan Gyiwu kabwaarɛ‐sun tɔ mʋ, n nyanla Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ, nɩɩ lɩɩ ɔkʋ kɩnyɛ ɩkpa kigyiigi lɩɩ Gyiwu nbara mʋ kibuu sʋ mʋ, n man sʋ kilibi ɩmʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Nothing is as wonderful as knowing Christ Jesus my Lord. I have given up everything else and count it all as garbage. All I want is Christ
translation_verse: Man gyɛ ɩmʋ nkʋn, kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ gyɛ mɛ asɛ fɛɛ atɔ fɔyɩsa, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ atɔ kparɛ sa mɛ mʋ, ɩ gyɛ n ba bɩɩ Mɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito. Lɩɩ Krisito sʋ mʋ n pan kʋtɔ kʋmaa, nɩɩ n kɩɩ ɩmʋ fɛɛ kɩgyaakpa sʋ atɔ, kɛ n nyɛ‐nyɛ Krisito.

english_verse: and to know that I belong to him. I could not make myself acceptable to God by obeying the Law of Moses. God accepted me simply because of my faith in Christ.
translation_verse: Saamʋ, n waa kʋkʋlʋn yɛ mʋ kakpaa, yɛgɛ n man bɩla n sʋ n gbaa‐gbaa mɛ ɩkpa kikyiigi lɩɩ nbara mʋ kibuu sʋ, amaa ɩkpa kikyiigi mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bɔla kɩkɔɔlɛ Krisito gyii sʋ. Nɩɩ ɩkpa kikyiigi nɩmʋ, mʋ nɩɩ ɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ mʋ, gyan kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ nɩn.

english_verse: All I want is to know Christ and the power that raised him to life. I want to suffer and die as he did,
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ n biti ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ, n baa n nyi Krisito yɛ mʋ kelewu kyiŋi ɔlʋn mʋ, kɛ n gyii mʋ awʋrʋfɔ mʋ ɩkʋ, kɛ n ba waa fɛɛ n wu bʋga yɛ mʋ,

english_verse: so that somehow I also may be raised to life. Running toward the Goal
translation_verse: saamʋ ɩ waa nɛnɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ nyɛ kyiŋi ngbaa mɛ lɩɩ alewupu tɔ, ba nkpa tɔ. Pɔɔlɩ kɩkpan n‐yɩɩ kabwaarɛ‐sun tɔ

english_verse: I have not yet reached my goal, and I am not perfect. But Christ has taken hold of me. So I keep on running and struggling to take hold of the prize.
translation_verse: N mɛɛ kaapʋ nɩn fɛɛ n tɛɛ nyɛ ɩmʋ abɛɛ n tɛɛ wʋla waa kyɛɛkyɛɛ naa lʋwɛ. Amaa n kpan mɛ n‐yɩɩ kɛ n kɩtaa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Krisito Yesu tɩɩ mɛ waa mʋ lɛɛ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: I run toward the goal, so I can win the prize of being called to heaven. This is the prize God offers because of what Christ Jesus has done.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ n kpan mɛ n‐yɩɩ nɩn n sɩlɛ ntintin naa lʋwɛ, kɛ n nyɛ‐nyɛ nkpa kakɛɛ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla Krisito Yesu sʋ tɩɩ asa mʋ.

english_verse: All of us who are mature should think in this same way. And if any of you think differently, God will make it clear to you.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ anɛ mʋ nɩɩ an dan kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ mʋ kpini, ɩ dagaa a maa sʋ nfɛɛrɛ kʋlʋn nɩmʋ. Amaa nɩɩ fanɛ akʋ bɛɛ kan bɛɛ fɛ nfɛɛrɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ kwɩɩ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ lɛɛ ɩmʋ gbaa kasɛ sa fanɛ.

english_verse: But we must keep going in the direction that we are now headed.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ki tiri ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ, fan yɛgɛ a kɩtaa kɩkaapʋ mʋ nɩɩ an wʋla nyɛ mʋ nkʋn.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to follow my example and learn from others who closely follow the example we set for you.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, fan kasɛ mɛ awaasa tɔ, kɛ fan pɛɛsɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba tɛ kakyɩna mʋ nɩɩ an kaapʋ tɔ yɩla sa fanɛ mʋ.

english_verse: I often warned you that many people are living as enemies of the cross of Christ. And now with tears in my eyes, I warn you again
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n wʋla tɔwɛ fanɛ, nɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ n bɩla n tɔwɛ ɩmʋ yɛ ansikyu gbaa, yɛ asa gaalaagaa bamʋ kakyɩna tɔ du nɩn fɛɛ ba maa kisi Krisito kelewu oyu laasa mʋ sʋ asɩn.

english_verse: that they are headed for hell! They worship their stomachs and brag about the disgusting things they do. All they can think about are the things of this world.
translation_verse: Asa anɩmʋ bɩrɛ, bamʋ kala ana bee biti ba muuri, nɩɩ bamʋ ɩtɔ nɩɩ bee sun, nɩɩ bamʋ ipeeli‐sɩn tɔ nɩɩ bɛɛ kʋsaa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ. Nɩɩ bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ gyan dulinyaa atɔ wʋlɛ nkʋn sʋ nɩn.

english_verse: But we are citizens of heaven and are eagerly waiting for our Savior to come from there. Our Lord Jesus Christ
translation_verse: Amaa anɛɛnɛ bɩrɛ, anɛ ayɛ bʋ sʋsʋ nɩn. Nɩɩ ɩ gyʋgyʋʋ anɛ an gyoo anɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ, Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito mʋ nɩɩ ee biti ɔ lɩɩ tʋtɔ ba mʋ.

english_verse: Dear friends, I love you and long to see you. Please keep on being faithful to the Lord. You are my pride and joy. Paul Encourages the Lord's Followers
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana mʋ nɩɩ n biti fanɛ asɩn gaa mʋ, n biti kuwu fanɛ. Fanɛ sʋ nɩɩ mi ansi i gyii nɩɩ n nyɛ kɩtɩɩ. Mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ ana danbɩrasa, fan yɩlɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ tɔ kenken kanɩn. Asɩn kaapʋsa laalaalʋwɛ

english_verse: Euodia and Syntyche, you belong to the Lord, so I beg you to stop arguing with each other.
translation_verse: N kʋlɛ Yuwodiya maa Sintike fɛɛ ba maa gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ asa falɛ sʋ mʋ, ba tɔwɛ kyula abaa.

english_verse: And, my true partner, I ask you to help them. These women have worked together with me and with Clement and with the others in spreading the good news. Their names are now written in the book of life.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n kʋlɛ ngbaa fʋ mɛ bɩrɩsa kusun ɔwaapʋ kesintin tɔ, fɛɛ fʋ kyɛ kanɩn akyɩɩ anyɔ mʋ tɔ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ba kyɛ mɛ tɔ asɩn danbɩrasa kusun mʋ kɩ yɛlɩgɛ tɔ. Akyɩɩ nɩmʋ maa Kelementi yɛ mɛ tɔmaa ana asunpu kpini mʋ nɩɩ bamʋ atɩɩ ɩ bʋ Ɩbwaarɛ nkpa ɔwʋlɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ, ba kyɔ mɛ tɔ gaa.

english_verse: Always be glad because of the Lord! I will say it again: Be glad.
translation_verse: Fan yɛgɛ fanɛ ansi i gyii saŋa kʋmaa, fɛɛ fan maa gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ lɛɛ mʋ, n bɩla n pɩla tɔ yɛ, fan yɛgɛ fanɛ ansi i gyii!

english_verse: Always be gentle with others. The Lord will soon be here.
translation_verse: Fan yɛgɛ ɔkʋmaa o wu fanɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fen du bwahn. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ kɩba mʋ ki tiri tɔ.

english_verse: Don't worry about anything, but pray about everything. With thankful hearts offer up your prayers and requests to God.
translation_verse: Fan man yɩyɛɛ lɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋ sʋ, amaa kʋtɔ kʋmaa tɔ mʋ, fɛn kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ kɛ fɛn taa fanɛ asɩn tirisa kpini tʋʋ mu ansi tɔ.

english_verse: Then, because you belong to Christ Jesus, God will bless you with peace that no one can completely understand. And this peace will control the way you think and feel.
translation_verse: Saamʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ sa fanɛ mʋ kayɩɩ yuuli gaa mʋ nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa mɛɛ taalɛ nu kasɛ, kɛ ki kun fanɛ nkɔlɔ yɛ fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ fan maa kɔɔlɛ Krisito Yesu gyii mʋ.

english_verse: You know the teachings I gave you, and you know what you heard me say and saw me do. So follow my example. And God, who gives peace, will be with you. Paul Gives Thanks for the Gifts He Was Given
translation_verse: Fan waa kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ fan bɩɩla abɛɛ fan nyɛ lɩɩ mɛ asɛ, abɛɛ fan nu abɛɛ fan wu n maa waa, kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kayɩɩ yuuli wuya mʋ ɔ baa ɔ bʋ fanɛ asɛ. Pɔɔlɩ afwaala lɩɩ nkɛɛ mʋ sʋ

english_verse: The Lord has made me very grateful that at last you have thought about me once again. Actually, you were thinking about me all along, but you didn't have any chance to show it.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ n maa gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ lɛɛ sʋ mʋ, mi ansi i gyii gaa, fɛɛ nbɩɩnbɩɩ nɩmʋ bɩrɛ fan bɩla kaapʋ fɛɛ mɛ asɩn i tiri fanɛ. Nɩɩ kesintin tɔ n nyi mɛ asɩn ɩ maa tiri fanɛ, amaa ɔkpa nɩɩ fan man nyɛ kɛ fan kaapʋ fɛɛ mɛ asɩn i tiri fanɛ.

english_verse: I am not complaining about having too little. I have learned to be satisfied with whatever I have.
translation_verse: Man gyɛ yɛ mɛ n‐yɩɩ ɩ kɩtaa mɛ sʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ kanɩn, lɩɩ fɛɛ n bɩɩla ɔkpa kʋmaa sʋ fɛɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ n sʋ mʋ ɩ kʋkwɛ mɛ.

english_verse: I know what it is to be poor or to have plenty, and I have lived under all kinds of conditions. I know what it means to be full or to be hungry, to have too much or too little.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n nyi kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ki tiri kakyɩna tɔ, nɩɩ n bɩla n nyi kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kanyɛ kʋkyɔ tɔ gbaa du. N bɩɩla ɩmʋ ɔkpa kʋmaa sʋ, ɩmʋ sʋ saŋa kʋmaa yɛ katɩn kʋmaa ɩmʋ nɩɩ n sʋ mʋ ɩ kʋkwɛ mɛ. Halɩɩ n nyɛ gyii ŋmɛ abɛɛ n naa akʋn, halɩɩ n sʋ naa bansʋ abɛɛ n man sʋ gbaa mʋ ɩ kʋkwɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Christ gives me the strength to face anything.
translation_verse: N taalɛ waa kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ lɩɩ ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ Krisito ɩɩ sa mɛ mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: It was good of you to help me when I was having such a hard time.
translation_verse: Amaa fan waa kusun gaa fɛɛ fan maa kyɛ mɛ tɔ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n bʋ awʋrʋfɔ tɔ mʋ.

english_verse: My friends at Philippi, you remember what it was like when I started preaching the good news in Macedonia. After I left there, you were the only church that became my partner by giving blessings and by receiving them in return.
translation_verse: Fanɛ Filipi abi gbaa fan nyi danbɩrasa fɛɛ, saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n piili asɩn danbɩrasa katɔwɛ Masedoniya ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ, nɩɩ n lɩɩ fanɛ asɛ tʋtɔ mʋ, Krisito kʋbʋ kʋ man kɛɛ mɛ afulee lɩɩ kusee mʋ nɩɩ ba nyɛ mʋ sʋ, amɔɔ fanɛ nkʋn.

english_verse: Even when I was in Thessalonica, you helped me more than once.
translation_verse: Halɩɩ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n bʋ Tesalonika kadɛ tɔ nɩɩ i tiri mɛ mʋ, fan kyɛ mɛ tɔ afulee ɩlɩɩ kanankʋ.

english_verse: I am not trying to get something from you, but I want you to receive the blessings that come from giving.
translation_verse: Man gyɛ fɛɛ nkɛɛ nɩɩ n dan n kɩɩ n biti lɩɩ fanɛ asɛ sʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ kanɩn, amaa n biti fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ taa agyaga tii fanɛ awaasa danbɩrasa kʋkɔka mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: I have been paid back everything, and with interest. I am completely satisfied with the gifts you sent with Epaphroditus. They are like a sweet-smelling offering or like the right kind of sacrifice that pleases God.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n tɛɛ nyɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ii tiri mɛ mʋ, halɩɩ naa ban kanan mʋ nɩɩ n biti mʋ gbaa sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ fan taa sa Epafuroditu yɛ ɔ bɩya mɛ mʋ i loo mɛ abaa tɔ. Atɔ mʋ i du fɛɛ saraga atɔ liifensa mʋ nɩɩ ba taa lɛɛ saraga sa Ɩbwaarɛ, nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ ɩmʋ, nɩɩ ɩ bɔla mu ansi.

english_verse: I pray that God will take care of all your needs with the wonderful blessings that come from Christ Jesus!
translation_verse: Mɛ Ɩbwaarɛ, lɩɩ mʋ atɔ kparɛ damantɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ, ee biti ɔ sa fanɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kii tiri fanɛ lɩɩ fan maa gyɛ Krisito Yesu lɛɛ sʋ.

english_verse: May God our Father be praised forever and ever. Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Bʋnyaa ɔ baa ɔ gyɛ anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ kakpaa‐kakpaa. Amen. Afwaala laalaalʋwɛ

english_verse: Give my greetings to all who are God's people because of Christ Jesus. The Lord's followers here with me send you their greetings.
translation_verse: N fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Krisito Yesu lɛɛ mʋ. Krisito abi mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ mɛ asɛ nfɩɩ gbaa bɛɛ fwaala fanɛ.

english_verse: All of God's people send their greetings, especially those in the service of the Emperor.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ asa kpini mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ nfɩɩ mʋ bɛɛ fwaala fanɛ, fɔnfɔn bamʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ Roma abi Owura lala kɩkpaara sʋ mʋ.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless your life!
translation_verse: Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kabwaala kɩ baa kɩ bʋ fanɛ kpini asɛ. Amen!

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, and from Timothy, who is also a follower.
translation_verse: Mɛ, Pɔɔlɩ mʋ nɩɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti sʋ nɩɩ n ba waa Krisito Yesu osunpu, yɛ anɛ bɩrɩsa Timoti ɩ kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ.

english_verse: To God's people who live in Colossae and are faithful followers of Christ. I pray that God our Father will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! A Prayer of Thanks
translation_verse: An kyʋrɔɔ an sa fanɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asa, mʋ nɩɩ fan gyɛ anɛ bɩrɩsa ana nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ Krisito gyii, nɩɩ fan bʋ Kolose kadɛ tɔ mʋ. An kʋlɛ anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ fɛɛ mʋ kabwaala yɛ keyuula ɩ baa ɩ bʋ fanɛ asɛ. Pɔɔlɩ afwaala yɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ

english_verse: Each time we pray for you, we thank God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Saŋa kʋmaa nɩɩ an kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ an sa fanɛ mʋ, an fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ, anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito Mʋ‐Sɛ.

english_verse: We have heard of your faith in Christ and of your love for all God's people,
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ an nu kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ Krisito Yesu gyii, yɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ fan sʋ sa Ɩbwaarɛ asa kpini mʋ.

english_verse: because what you hope for is kept safe for you in heaven. You first heard about this hope when you believed the true message, which is the good news.
translation_verse: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ kesintin asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ gyankpaa ba fanɛ asɛ mʋ, fan nu tamaa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ sʋ. Ɩmʋ sʋ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii yɛ kebiti mʋ gyan kanɩn tamaa, mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa yɩla sa fanɛ sʋsʋ.

english_verse: The good news is spreading all over the world with great success. It has spread in this same way among you, ever since the first day you learned the truth about God's wonderful kindness
translation_verse: Dulinya nɩmʋ kpini tɔ mʋ, asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ ɩɩ sɔyɩ abi, yɛgɛ ɩɩ yɛlɩgɛ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ waa fanɛ tɔ, lɩɩ kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan nu asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ, nɩɩ fan nu Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ kasɛ kesintin tɔ.

english_verse: from our good friend Epaphras. He works together with us for Christ and is a faithful worker for you.
translation_verse: Epafarasi, anɛ bɩrɩsa Krisito kɩyaafɔlɛ kesintin tɔ mʋ, ɩ ba yɩlɛ anɛ ayaa tɔ tɔwɛ fanɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ asɩn,

english_verse: He is also the one who told us about the love that God's Spirit has given you. The Person and Work of Christ
translation_verse: nɩɩ mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ anɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ sa fanɛ.

english_verse: We have not stopped praying for you since the first day we heard about you. In fact, we always pray that God will show you everything he wants you to do and that you may have all the wisdom and understanding his Spirit gives.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ, lɩɩ kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ an nu fanɛ sʋ mʋ, a man yɛgɛ kɩkʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ sa fanɛ. An kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ ɔ sa fanɛ kanyaasɩn yɛ kasɛ kunu bɔla Kayaayu mʋ sʋ, kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ fan taalɛ bɩɩ mu kebiti mʋ.

english_verse: Then you will live a life that honors the Lord, and you will always please him by doing good deeds. You will come to know God even better.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ an kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kanɩn nɩn kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ fan kyɩna kakyɩna mʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ ii biti, nɩɩ ii gyii mu ansi ɔkpa kʋmaa nɩmʋ sʋ, kɛ fanɛ kɩbaabʋtɔ ɩ bɩya adanbɩrasa kɛ fan dan Ɩbwaarɛ kinyi tɔ.

english_verse: His glorious power will make you patient and strong enough to endure anything, and you will be truly happy.
translation_verse: An kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ ɔ sa fanɛ ɔlʋn kparɛ lɩɩ mʋ bʋnyaa ɔlʋn mʋ tɔ, saamʋ fɛn nyɛ‐nyɛ kenyiita yɛ nkɔlɔ yɩlɛ tɔ. Fan yɛgɛ fanɛ ansi i gyii,

english_verse: I pray that you will be grateful to God for letting you have part in what he has promised his people in the kingdom of light.
translation_verse: kɛ fan taa afwaala sa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ yɛgɛ nɩɩ fan dagaa mu kuwura‐gyii kɩŋmaŋɛsa mʋ tɔ npatɩyɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ ɛɛ sa mʋ asa mʋ.

english_verse: God rescued us from the dark power of Satan and brought us into the kingdom of his dear Son,
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ mʋ ɩ mɔlɩgɛ anɛ lɩɩ kitentenbiri ɔlʋn mʋ tɔ, nɩɩ ɔ taa anɛ ba mu‐Bii bitisa mu kuwura‐gyii tɔ.

english_verse: who forgives our sins and sets us free.
translation_verse: Mʋ ɩ mɔlɩgɛ anɛ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa anɛ alibi kɛɛ anɛ. Krisito kyɔ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ

english_verse: Christ is exactly like God, who cannot be seen. He is the first-born Son, superior to all creation.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔkʋ man pɩɩta wu mʋ mʋ, mʋ kudubi ɩ gyɛ Krisito Yesu, Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ bʋ tɔ pɔyɩ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tʋʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa.

english_verse: Everything was created by him, everything in heaven and on earth, everything seen and unseen, including all forces and powers, and all rulers and authorities. All things were created by God's Son, and everything was made for him.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla mʋ sʋ nɩn tʋʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa, sʋsʋ atɔ yɛ kasɛ sʋ atɔ, ɩmʋ nɩɩ an wu yɛ ansi yɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ a mɛɛ wu yɛ ansi, awuragya, yɛ n‐yaayu libi, yɛ awuragyipu yɛ alʋlʋnpʋ. Mʋ sʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla tʋʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa, nɩɩ ɔ taa ɩmʋ kpini waa mʋ abaa tɔ.

english_verse: God's Son was before all else, and by him everything is held together.
translation_verse: Ɔ bʋ tɔ pɔyɩ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tʋʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ, nɩɩ mʋ kɩpɩrɛ sʋ nɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋmaa kɩ bʋ tɔ kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

english_verse: He is the head of his body, which is the church. He is the very beginning, the first to be raised from death, so that he would be above all others.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ mʋ ɩ gyɛ kumu sa mʋ kʋbʋ mʋ kpini, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ kumu gyɛ sa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ. Nɩɩ mʋ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ sʋ nkpa, yɛ ɔgyankpaapʋ mʋ nɩɩ o kyiŋi lɩɩ lewu tɔ, kɛ ɔ baa ɔ gyɛ ɔgyankpaapʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ.

english_verse: God himself was pleased to live fully in his Son.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩpɩrɛ nɩn fɛɛ mu kedubi mʋ kpini ɩ baa ɩ bʋ mu‐bii mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: And God was pleased for him to make peace by sacrificing his blood on the cross, so that all beings in heaven and on earth would be brought back to God.
translation_verse: Mu‐Bii Yesu kelewu oyu laasa mʋ sʋ, yɛ nkalan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kyɛɛgɛ mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla sʋ taa lɔŋɔ sʋsʋ yɛ kasɛ sʋ atɔ mʋ kpini yɛ mʋ nsana.

english_verse: You used to be far from God. Your thoughts made you his enemies, and you did evil things.
translation_verse: Saŋa kʋ tɔ mʋ, naafɔɔ fanɛ kamaa nɩɩ fan taa kaapʋ Ɩbwaarɛ, nɩɩ lɩɩ fanɛ alibi sʋ mʋ fan kisi mʋ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ.

english_verse: But his Son became a human and died. So God made peace with you, and now he lets you stand in his presence as people who are holy and faultless and innocent.
translation_verse: Amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla Krisito mʋ nɩɩ o be biliŋi nyɩmɩsa nɩɩ o wu mʋ sʋ, lɔŋɔ fanaa mʋ nsana. Ɔ waa ɩnɩmʋ kɛ fan ba waa asa kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ, yɛgɛ fan man sʋ ineesi yɛ asɩn pwɩɩsa kʋ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ,

english_verse: But you must stay deeply rooted and firm in your faith. You must not give up the hope you received when you heard the good news. It was preached to everyone on earth, and I myself have become a servant of this message. Paul's Service to the Church
translation_verse: nɩɩ fan kan kyaga sʋ kɔɔlɛ Krisito gyii, nɩɩ fan yɩlɛ tɔ kenken nɩɩ fan man kyɛɛgɛ lɩɩ tamaa mʋ nɩɩ fan sʋ lɩɩ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ tɔ mʋ. Asɩn danbɩrasa maŋa nɩɩ fan nu, nɩɩ ba tɔwɛ sa ɔsa kʋmaa nɩmʋ kasɛ sʋ, nɩɩ mɛ, Pɔɔlɩ n baa n gyɛ kusun mʋ osunpu falɛ. Pɔɔlɩ kusun sa Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ

english_verse: I am glad I can suffer for you. I am pleased also that in my own body I can continue the suffering of Christ for his body, the church.
translation_verse: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ mi ansi i gyii fɛɛ n man gyii awʋrʋfɔ sa fanɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ mɛ awʋrʋfɔ tɔ mʋ, ngbaa mɛ n wu Krisito awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ san mʋ sa mʋ asa, mʋ nɩɩ ba gyɛ mʋ kʋbʋ kpini mʋ.

english_verse: God's plan was to make me a servant of his church and to send me to preach his complete message to you.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ waa mɛ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ kɩyaafɔlɛ, nɩɩ o sun mɛ yɛ n ba waa mu kusun. Kusun mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ n lɛɛ mʋ asɩn mʋ kpini kasɛ sa fanɛ.

english_verse: For ages and ages this message was kept secret from everyone, but now it has been explained to God's people.
translation_verse: Asɩn baalasa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ man lɛɛ ɩmʋ ifuli sa dɩdaa abi, amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ ɔ lɛɛ ɩmʋ kaapʋ mʋ asa.

english_verse: God did this because he wanted you Gentiles to understand his wonderful and glorious mystery. And the mystery is that Christ lives in you, and he is your hope of sharing in God's glory.
translation_verse: Ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩpɩrɛ tɔ fɛɛ ɔ lɛɛ asɩn baalasa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ bʋnyaa asɩn mʋ kaapʋ ndɛndɛmandɛ asa kpini. Asɩn baalasa mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ Krisito maa bʋ fanɛ tɔ mʋ, fan sʋ tamaa yɛ bʋnyaa lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ.

english_verse: We announce the message about Christ, and we use all our wisdom to warn and teach everyone, so all of Christ's followers will grow and become mature.
translation_verse: An taa kanyaasɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sa anɛ mʋ an tɔwɛ abwaarɛsɩn, nɩɩ an da ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ kumu tɔ, yɛgɛ an kaapʋ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ kɛ a taa mʋ waa Ɩbwaarɛ abaa tɔ fɛɛ ɔ nyɛ dan kɩkɔɔlɛ Krisito gyii mʋ tɔ kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

english_verse: This is why I work so hard and use the mighty power he gives me.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ n taa ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ Krisito sa mɛ nɩɩ ii sun kusun mɛ tɔ mʋ, n kpan mɛ n‐yɩɩ n sun mʋ.

english_verse: I want you to know what a struggle I am going through for you, for God's people at Laodicea, and for all of those followers who have never met me.
translation_verse: N biti fan wu kanan mʋ nɩɩ n mɔɔ mɛ n‐yɩɩ gaa n sa fanɛ, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ Lawodisiya kadɛ tɔ yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man pɩɩta wu mɛ yɛ ansi mʋ.

english_verse: I do it to encourage them. Then as their hearts are joined together in love, they will be wonderfully blessed with complete understanding. And they will truly know Christ. Not only is he the key to God's mystery,
translation_verse: N waa ɩnɩmʋ kɛ ɩ waa fanɛ kpini ɔlʋn tɔ, kɛ fan taa kebiti waa kɔnɔ kʋlʋn. Falɛ sʋ mʋ, fen biti fan nu asɩn kʋmaa nɩmʋ kyɛɛkyɛɛ naa lʋwɛ, kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ fan bɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn baalasa mʋ, ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ Krisito gbaa‐gbaa mʋ.

english_verse: but all wisdom and knowledge are hidden away in him.
translation_verse: Mʋ nkʋn tɔ nɩɩ kanyaasɩn yɛ kinyi lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sʋ kpini baala.

english_verse: I tell you these things to keep you from being fooled by fancy talk.
translation_verse: N tɔwɛ fanɛ ɩnɩmʋ nɩn kɛ ɔkʋ ɔ man nyɛ taa kɔnɔ tɔ kɔn asɩn pʋpwɛ kʋ ba pɩna fanɛ.

english_verse: Even though I am not with you, I keep thinking about you. I am glad to know that you are living as you should and your faith in Christ is strong. Christ Brings Real Life
translation_verse: Halɩɩ n maa man bʋ fanɛ asɛ falɛ gbaa mʋ, mɛ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ gyan fanɛ sʋ, nɩɩ ɩ waa mɛ ɔkɔn n maa nu fɛɛ fɛn waa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa, nɩɩ fɛn sʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ Krisito gyii mʋ tɔ kenken. Krisito tɔ nɩɩ an nyɛ anɛ n‐yɩɩ

english_verse: You have accepted Christ Jesus as your Lord. Now keep on following him.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ, fɛɛ fan maa tɛɛ kɔɔlɛ Krisito Yesu fɛɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ fanɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ mʋ, fan kyɩna yɛ mʋ kanɩn.

english_verse: Plant your roots in Christ and let him be the foundation for your life. Be strong in your faith, just as you were taught. And be grateful.
translation_verse: Kɛ fan nyɛ ilin yɩlɛ mʋ tɔ kɛ fan dan, kɛ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii Krisito tɔ mʋ ɩ waa ɔlʋn tii sʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba kaapʋ fanɛ mʋ. Kɛ fan taa afwaala sa Ɩbwaarɛ gaa.

english_verse: Don't let anyone fool you by using senseless arguments. These arguments may sound wise, but they are only human teachings. They come from the powers of this world and not from Christ.
translation_verse: Fan baa fan da sʋ kɛ fan man yɛgɛ akʋ ba taa nyɩmɩsa kanyaasɩn yɛ antɩŋɛsa pɩna fanɛ biliŋi bamʋ anyɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ bamʋ kɩkaapʋ mʋ gyɛ anaana‐tɔ yɛ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ n‐yaayu libi lɛɛ nɩn, nɩɩ ɩ man lɩɩ Krisito asɛ.

english_verse: And you are fully grown because you belong to Christ, who is over every power and authority.
translation_verse: nɩɩ fan naa Krisito kɩwaa kʋkʋlʋn sʋ mʋ, fan nyɛ mʋ nkpa nɩmʋ lʋwɛ kyɛɛkyɛɛ. Mʋ ɩ gyɛ kumu sa awura yɛ alʋnpʋ kpini.

english_verse: And when you were baptized, it was the same as being buried with Christ. Then you were raised to life because you had faith in the power of God, who raised Christ from death.
translation_verse: Ba maa gyee fanɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee mʋ, i du nɩn fɛɛ ba maa pula fanɛ tii Krisito sʋ, nɩɩ ba bɩla kyiŋi fanɛ tii mʋ sʋ ba nkpa tɔ mʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ fan kɔɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa kyiŋi mʋ ba nkpa tɔ mʋ gyii.

english_verse: You were dead, because you were sinful and were not God's people. But God let Christ make you alive, when he forgave all our sins.
translation_verse: Fan kyɩna fan du nɩn fɛɛ alewupu mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ lɩɩ fanɛ alibi, yɛ fanɛ kɩman buu Ɩbwaarɛ nbara sʋ. Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ kyiŋi fanɛ tii Krisito sʋ ba nkpa tɔ. Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa anɛ alibi kpini kɛɛ anɛ,

english_verse: God wiped out the charges that were against us for disobeying the Law of Moses. He took them away and nailed them to the cross.
translation_verse: nɩɩ ɔ kpayɩ kʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ yɩla lɩɩ anɛ kɩman buu nbara mʋ sʋ mʋ. Ɔ lɛɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ i du nɩn fɛɛ ba da ɩmʋ tii Krisito sʋ mata oyu laasa mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: There Christ defeated all powers and forces. He let the whole world see them being led away as prisoners when he celebrated his victory.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla Krisito kelewu oyu laasa mʋ kɔɔlɛ n‐yaayu libi yɛ alʋnpʋ mʋ ɔlʋn kpini, nɩɩ ɔ ŋaabaa bamʋ sakyɔ tɔ kaapʋ fɛɛ o gyii bamʋ sʋ.

english_verse: Don't let anyone tell you what you must eat or drink. Don't let them say you must celebrate the New Moon festival, the Sabbath, or any other festival.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan man yɛgɛ ɔkʋ o bun fanɛ kʋpwɛ lɩɩ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ fen gyii abɛɛ fen nuu mʋ sʋ, abɛɛ fan maa mee gyii kesu kɔnɔ kʋ yɛ ɔbwaayɩ pʋpwɛ kakɛ gyankpaasa abɛɛ Gyiwu abi kakɛ fʋʋtɛsa akɛ kensi‐gyii.

english_verse: These things are only a shadow of what was to come. But Christ is real!
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ sɩnkaala sa atɔ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ nɩɩ ii biti ɩ ba mʋ. Nɩɩ atɔ gbaa‐gbaa maŋa ɩ gyɛ Krisito nɩn.

english_verse: Don't be cheated by people who make a show of acting humble and who worship angels. They brag about seeing visions. But it is all nonsense, because their minds are filled with selfish desires.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan man kan yɛgɛ ɔkʋ o bun fanɛ kʋpwɛ tɔwɛ yɛ fan man dagaa kʋkɔka mʋ, lɩɩ fan maa man bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ nɩɩ fan mee sun Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ fɛɛ mʋ mʋ. Kanɩn ɔsa maŋa ɩɩ tɔwɛ yɛ ɔ nyɛ ansi sʋ kɩlɛɛkaapʋ mʋ, amaa nyɩmɩsa nfɛɛrɛ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ ɛɛ waa alala‐sɩn kanɩn.

english_verse: They are no longer part of Christ, who is the head of the whole body. Christ gives the body its strength, and he uses its joints and muscles to hold it together, as it grows by the power of God. Christ Brings New Life
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔ man bɩla taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ tii Krisito mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ kumu mʋ sa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ kpini. Nɩɩ Krisito ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ kpini kɩɩ nyɛ ɔlʋn, ikyini yɛ ɩkyagakpa mʋ kpini bʋga kɩtaa abaa, nɩɩ ɩɩ dan kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti.

english_verse: You died with Christ. Now the forces of the universe don't have any power over you. Why do you live as if you had to obey such rules as,
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fan maa wu tii Krisito sʋ nɩɩ fan barɩgɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ dulinyaa nɩmʋ atɔ kaapʋsa tɔ falɛ mʋ, mɩnɛ ɩ waa sʋ nɩɩ fan san fan bʋ kakyɩna dɩdaa mʋ tɔ nɩɩ fan buu ɩmʋ ɩkpa?

english_verse: After these things are used, they are no longer good for anything. So why be bothered with the rules that humans have made up?
translation_verse: Atɔ kisisa mʋ kpini ii biti ɩ ba kyʋn. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩ gyɛ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ asa kɩkaapʋ nɩn.

english_verse: Obeying these rules may seem to be the smart thing to do. They appear to make you love God more and to be very humble and to have control over your body. But they don't really have any power over our desires.
translation_verse: Kanɩn nbara mʋ du nɩn fɛɛ kanyaasɩn maa bʋ ɩmʋ tɔ mʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kpan bamʋ n‐yɩɩ bɛɛ waa fɛɛ ba maa sun Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ gaa mʋ, nɩɩ bɛɛ pɩna yɛ bɛɛ bɩya bamʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ, nɩɩ bɛɛ waa bamʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ awʋrʋfɔ. Amaa ɩnɩmʋ kpini mɛɛ kyɛ bamʋ tɔ kɛ ba yɛgɛ alibi kɩwaa.

english_verse: You have been raised to life with Christ. Now set your heart on what is in heaven, where Christ rules at God's right side.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ maa kyiŋi fanɛ tii Krisito sʋ ba nkpa tɔ sʋ mʋ, fan taa fanɛ nkɔlɔ gyaga sʋsʋ atɔ sʋ, katɩn mʋ nɩɩ Krisito tɛ kuwura‐gya sʋ Ɩbwaarɛ gyisa sʋ mʋ.
