english_verse: Think about what is up there, not about what is here on earth.
translation_verse: Fan taa fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ gyaga sʋsʋ atɔ sʋ, man gyɛ kasɛ sʋ atɔ sʋ.

english_verse: You died, which means that your life is hidden with Christ, who sits beside God.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ fan wu sa fanɛ kakyɩna dɩdaa mʋ, nɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ fanɛ nkpa ɩ baala tii Krisito sʋ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ.

english_verse: Christ gives meaning to your life, and when he appears, you will also appear with him in glory.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Krisito mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ fanɛ nkpa kan lɩɩ ifuli mʋ, fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fen biti fan lɩɩ ifuli yɛ mʋ bʋnyaa mʋ.

english_verse: Don't be controlled by your body. Kill every desire for the wrong kind of sex. Don't be immoral or indecent or have evil thoughts. Don't be greedy, which is the same as worshiping idols.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan lɛɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ kasɛ sʋ kɩbaabʋtɔ libi kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ, fɛɛ abawʋlɛ kebiti, yɛ agyaga‐sɩn, yɛ kanyɩn yɛ kakyɩɩ biti kayɛlɩgɛ, yɛ onsi‐payɩ libi, yɛ mɛ nkʋn n nyɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ kusun ɩdakpa mʋ.

english_verse: God is angry with people who disobey him by doing these things.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ agbʋ lala mʋ ɩ bʋ ɔkpa ɩɩ ba.

english_verse: And this is exactly what you did, when you lived among people who behaved in this way.
translation_verse: Naafɔɔ kanɩn nɩɩ fan kyɩna fɛn waa, nɩɩ alibi mʋ ii gyii fanɛ sʋ.

english_verse: But now you must stop doing such things. You must quit being angry, hateful, and evil. You must no longer say insulting or cruel things about others.
translation_verse: Amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ, n tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ fan lɛɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ falɛ atɔ nɩmʋ kpini tɔ, fɛɛ agbʋ yɛ agbʋ libi, yɛ kekisi yɛ nyɩmɩsa kɩtɩɩ‐nyita yɛ ntɔwɛ gyaga mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ lɩɩ fanɛ nnɔ tɔ.

english_verse: And stop lying to each other. You have given up your old way of life with its habits.
translation_verse: Fan man tɩn antɩŋɛsa sa abaa, lɩɩ fan maa lɛɛ fanɛ kɩbaabʋtɔ dɩdaa yɛ ɩmʋ awaasa libi tʋʋ mʋ.

english_verse: Each of you is now a new person. You are becoming more and more like your Creator, and you will understand him better.
translation_verse: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ anɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ biliŋi nyɩmɩsa pʋpwɛ nɩn, nɩɩ fan baa fan du fɛɛ fanɛ ɔtʋʋpʋ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, kɛ fan ba bɩɩ mʋ danbɩrasa.

english_verse: It doesn't matter if you are a Greek or a Jew, or if you are circumcised or not. You may even be a barbarian or a Scythian, and you may be a slave or a free person. Yet Christ is all that matters, and he lives in all of us.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ kɩbaabʋtɔ pʋpwɛ nɩmʋ sʋ mʋ, ɩ man bɩla i tiri fɛɛ ɔkʋ gyɛ Giriki obii abɛɛ Gyiwu obii, abɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba tɩn iduu abɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man tɩn iduu. Ɩ man tiri fɛɛ ɔkʋ gyɛ ɔfɔ kyilim abɛɛ ɔkʋ ansi ɩ man bugi, abɛɛ ɔkʋ gyɛ kɩnyɛ abɛɛ ɔkʋ man gyɛ kɩnyɛ, amaa ɩmʋ nɩɩ i tiri mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ Krisito ɩ gyɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa, nɩɩ mʋ ɩ bʋ akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu kpini tɔ.

english_verse: God loves you and has chosen you as his own special people. So be gentle, kind, humble, meek, and patient.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ maa tɩɩ fanɛ ba waa mʋ asa kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ, nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kebiti sa fanɛ mʋ, fan taa kʋwɛɛ kuwu, yɛ kɩdanbɩrasa kɩwaa, yɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ kɩbɩya, yɛ bwahn kɩwaa yɛ kenyiita bun fɛɛ kaalɛ.

english_verse: Put up with each other, and forgive anyone who does you wrong, just as Christ has forgiven you.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fanɛ bɩrɩsa kan waa fanɛ alibi mʋ, fan kpala ɩmʋ sʋ, kɛ fan taa alibi kɛɛ abaa. Fan taa kɛɛ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ taa kɛɛ fanɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Love is more important than anything else. It is what ties everything completely together.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ kpini kumu ɩ gyɛ kɩnyɛ kebiti sa abaa, kɩmʋ ɩɩ bɩɩtɛ ɩmʋ kpini bʋga waa kɔnɔ kʋlʋn kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

english_verse: Each one of you is part of the body of Christ, and you were chosen to live together in peace. So let the peace that comes from Christ control your thoughts. And be grateful.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fan maa gyɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kʋlʋn abi sʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ tɩɩ fanɛ ba waa Krisito keyuula mʋ tɔ. Ɩmʋ sʋ fan yɛgɛ keyuula mʋ ki gyii kuwura fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ. Fan taa afwaala sa Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: Let the message about Christ completely fill your lives, while you use all your wisdom to teach and instruct each other. With thankful hearts, sing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs to God.
translation_verse: Fan yɛgɛ Krisito asɩn mʋ ɩ kyɩna fanɛ tɔ gaa. Fan taa kanyaasɩn kaapʋ abaa kɛ fan da abaa amu tɔ. Fan taa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩlʋn yɛ abwaarɛsɩn ɩlʋn yɛ Kayaayu kɩlɛɛkaapʋ ɩlʋn fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ lɩɩ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ.

english_verse: Whatever you say or do should be done in the name of the Lord Jesus, as you give thanks to God the Father because of him. Some Rules for Christian Living
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ fɛn waa abɛɛ fɛn tɔwɛ mʋ, fan waa ɩmʋ kpini Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu kɩtɩɩ tɔ sʋ, kɛ fan bɔla mʋ sʋ taa afwaala sa Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ. Krisito abuupu kɩkpaara sʋ nbara

english_verse: A wife must put her husband first. This is her duty as a follower of the Lord.
translation_verse: Akyɩɩ‐kilipu, fan bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa fanɛ‐kuli ana, kanɩn ɩ dagaa Krisito ɔkyɩɩ maa waa.

english_verse: A husband must love his wife and not abuse her.
translation_verse: Anyɩn‐kilipu, fan nyɛ kebiti sa fanɛ‐ka ana kɛ fan man ŋmanyan bamʋ.

english_verse: Children must always obey their parents. This pleases the Lord.
translation_verse: Nbii, fan nu sa fanɛ akʋʋgɛpʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩnɩmʋ ii gyii Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu mu ansi.

english_verse: Parents, don't be hard on your children. If you are, they might give up.
translation_verse: Akʋgɛpʋ fan man waa fanɛ‐bii ana agbʋ, man gyɛ kanɩn bamʋ abaa ii biti ɩ yɔɔ.

english_verse: Slaves, you must always obey your earthly masters. Try to please them at all times, and not just when you think they are watching. Honor the Lord and serve your masters with your whole heart.
translation_verse: Anyɛ, fan nu sa fanɛ‐nyɩrɩpɛ ana mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ kasɛ sʋ nfɩɩ mʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ. Man gyɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ bamʋ ansi ɩ gyan fanɛ sʋ mʋ nkʋn nɩɩ fan waa, kɛ fan nyɛ kʋwɛɛ kuwu lɩɩ bamʋ asɛ. Amaa fan nu sa bamʋ kesintin tɔ lɩɩ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ, lɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ bɛɛrɛɛ sʋ.

english_verse: Do your work willingly, as though you were serving the Lord himself, and not just your earthly master.
translation_verse: Kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ fɛn waa mʋ, fan taa fanɛ nkɔlɔ kpini waa ɩmʋ fɛɛ fan maa waa ɩmʋ fɛn sa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ, nɩɩ man gyɛ asa,

english_verse: In fact, the Lord Christ is the one you are really serving, and you know he will reward you.
translation_verse: fɛɛ fan nyi fan maa biti fan nyɛ kʋkɔka mʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ taa yɩla mʋ asa mʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Krisito ɩ gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ nɩɩ fen sun mʋ.

english_verse: But Christ has no favorites! He will punish evil people, just as they deserve.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa alibi mu alibi kʋkɔka nɩɩ ee biti ɔ nyɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ man sʋ nmɛɛgɛ tɔ.

english_verse: Slave owners, be fair and honest with your slaves. Don't forget that you have a Master in heaven.
translation_verse: Kasɛ sʋ anyɩrɩpɛ, fan kɩɩ fanɛ anyɛ sʋ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa nɩɩ ɩ bʋrɔn, lɩɩ fɛɛ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fan nyi fan maa sʋ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ sʋsʋ. Asɩn kaapʋsa mʋ nɩɩ i tii sʋ

english_verse: Never give up praying. And when you pray, keep alert and be thankful.
translation_verse: Fan nyɛ saŋa sa kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ saŋa kʋmaa, kɛ fan baa fan da sʋ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ tɔ, kɛ fan taa afwaala sa Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: Be sure to pray that God will make a way for us to spread his message and explain the mystery about Christ, even though I am in jail for doing this.
translation_verse: Kɛ fan kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ sa anɛ gbaa‐gbaa anɛ fɛɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ o bugi ɔkpa sa mʋ asɩn mʋ kɩtɔwɛ, kɛ a nyɛ ɔkpa tɔwɛ asɩn baalasa lɩɩ Krisito sʋ, ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ n tii obu falɛ.

english_verse: Please pray that I will make the message as clear as possible.
translation_verse: Fan kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ fɛɛ n taalɛ n bugi tɔ n tɔwɛ asɩn mʋ kyɛɛkyɛɛ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ n tɔwɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Be pleasant and hold their interest when you speak the message. Choose your words carefully and be ready to give answers to anyone who asks questions. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Fan yɛgɛ fanɛ ntɔwɛ ɩ baa ɩ bʋkɔn fɛɛ nfɔlɛ, kɛ fan bɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan lɛɛ kɔnɔ sa ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taasɛ fanɛ asɩn mʋ. Afwaala laalaalʋwɛ

english_verse: Tychicus is the dear friend, who faithfully works and serves the Lord with us, and he will give you the news about me.
translation_verse: Anɛ bɩrɩsa Tikiku danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ kesintin obuupu yɛ kɩyaafɔlɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ kusun tɔ mʋ, ii biti ɔ ba tɔwɛ fanɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n du nfɩɩ.

english_verse: I am sending him to cheer you up by telling you how we are getting along.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ n sun mʋ fanɛ asɛ, kɛ fan nyɛ bɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an du nfɩɩ, kɛ ɔ bɛ tɔwɛ saŋɛ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ.

english_verse: Onesimus, the dear and faithful follower from your own group, is coming with him. The two of them will tell you everything that has happened here.
translation_verse: Maa anɛ bɩrɩsa danbɩrasa Krisito ɔkɔɔlɛ‐gyipu Onesimu mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ fanɛ ayɛ obii mʋ, nɩɩ n sun mʋ fanɛ asɛ. Bamʋ ii biti ba tɔwɛ fanɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ii kpee sʋ nfɩɩ kpini.

english_verse: Aristarchus is in jail with me. He sends greetings to you, and so does Mark, the cousin of Barnabas. You have already been told to welcome Mark, if he visits you.
translation_verse: Mɛ bɩrɩsa Arisitako mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ mɛ asɛ obu tiisa tɔ mʋ ɩɩ fwaala fanɛ. Kanɩn nɩɩ Banabasi mu‐supu Maki gbaa ɩɩ fwaala fanɛ. N wʋla tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ nɩɩ ɔ kan ba fanɛ asɛ mʋ, fan kɩɩ mʋ sʋ danbɩrasa.

english_verse: Jesus, who is known as Justus, sends his greetings. These three men are the only Jewish followers who have worked with me for the kingdom of God. They have given me much comfort.
translation_verse: Gyosuwa mʋ nɩɩ ba bɩla bɛɛ tɩɩ mʋ yɛ Gyusitusi mʋ gbaa ɩ fwaala fanɛ. Bamʋ nkʋn ɩ gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ nɩɩ ba tii mɛ bɩrɩsa ana sʋ, nɩɩ ba gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kuwura‐gyii mʋ tɔ asunsunpu, nɩɩ ba kyɛ mɛ tɔ yɛ ɔdan.

english_verse: Your own Epaphras, who serves Christ Jesus, sends his greetings. He always prays hard that you may fully know what the Lord wants you to do and that you may do it completely.
translation_verse: Epafarasi mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ fanɛ ayɛ abi nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Yesu Krisito kɩyaafɔlɛ mʋ ɩɩ fwaala fanɛ. Saŋa kʋmaa nɩmʋ ɛɛ kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ gaa ɛɛ sa fanɛ fɛɛ, ɔ waa fanɛ kɛ fan yɩlɛ tɔ kenken, kɛ fan dan kɛ fanɛ Krisito kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii ɩ nyɛ ilin gaa, kɛ fan waa Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti sʋ.

english_verse: I have seen how much trouble he has gone through for you and for the followers in Laodicea and Hierapolis.
translation_verse: Ngbaagbaa mɛ n nyi kanan mʋ nɩɩ Epafarasi taa fanɛ asɩn yɛ Lawodisiya abi yɛ Hirapoli abi asɩn waa mʋ asɩn tirisa, nɩɩ ee wu fanɛ lewu.

english_verse: Our dear doctor Luke sends you his greetings, and so does Demas.
translation_verse: Anɛ kyɛmɩnɛ danbɩrasa Luka mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ ɔkyɛpʋ mʋ, yɛ Demasi bɛɛ fwaala fanɛ.

english_verse: Give my greetings to the followers at Laodicea, especially to Nympha and the church that meets in her home.
translation_verse: Ngbaa mɛ n fwaala anɛ bɩrɩsa ana mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ Lawodisiya mʋ, yɛ ɔkyɩɩ Nimfa yɛ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ gyaŋɛ mʋ ayɛ mʋ.

english_verse: After this letter has been read to your people, be sure to have it read in the church at Laodicea. And you should read the letter that I have sent to them.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba kan kalɛ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ sa fanɛ lʋwɛ mʋ, fan kɩɩ sʋ kɛ ba kalɛ ɔwʋlɛ maŋa sa Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ Lawodisiya kadɛ tɔ mʋ gbaa, kɛ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fan kalɛ ɔwʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ n kyʋrɔɔ naa sa Lawodisiya abi mʋ.

english_verse: Remind Archippus to do the work that the Lord has given him to do.
translation_verse: Fan tɔwɛ Akipusi yɛ, “Kɩɩ sʋ kɛ fʋ lʋwɛ kusun mʋ nɩɩ fʋ nyɛ lɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ asɛ mʋ.”

english_verse: I am signing this letter myself: PAUL. Don't forget that I am in jail. I pray that God will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Mɛ Pɔɔlɩ ɩ taa mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ kɩbaa kyʋrɔɔ afwaala nɩmʋ n sa fanɛ. Fan man tan sʋ fɛɛ n san n bʋ obu kitii tɔ. Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ bwaala fanɛ.

english_verse: From Paul, Silas, and Timothy. To the church in Thessalonica, the people of God the Father and of the Lord Jesus Christ. I pray that God will be kind to you and will bless you with peace!
translation_verse: Mɛ Pɔɔlɩ maa Silasi yɛ Timoti ɩ kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ an sa fanɛ Krisito abi kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ fan bʋ Tesalonika mʋ, nɩɩ fan gyɛ Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito asa mʋ. Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala yɛ kayɩɩ‐yuuli kɩ baa kɩ bʋ fanɛ asɛ. Tesalonika abi kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii yɛ bamʋ kusun danbɩrasa

english_verse: We thank God for you and always mention you in our prayers. Each time we pray,
translation_verse: Saŋa kʋmaa an fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ lɩɩ fanɛ sʋ, nɩɩ an nyiŋi fanɛ kpini sʋ anɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ tɔ.

english_verse: My dear friends, God loves you, and we know he has chosen you to be his people.
translation_verse: Anɛ‐daa ana yɛ anɛ‐supu ana, an nyi fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti sʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ fanɛ waa mʋ lɛɛ.

english_verse: When we told you the good news, it was with the power and assurance that come from the Holy Spirit, and not simply with words. You knew what kind of people we were and how we helped you.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ an man taa asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ ba tɔwɛ sa fanɛ kɔnɔ tɔ nkʋn nɩn. Amaa an ba tɔwɛ fanɛ asɩn mʋ yɛ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ ɔlʋn tɔ, nɩɩ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ asɩn mʋ gyii yɛ ɩ gyɛ kesintin. Nɩɩ fan wu kakyɩna danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ an kyɩna yɛ fanɛ, kɛ ɩ kyɛ fanɛ tɔ.

english_verse: So, when you accepted the message, you followed our example and the example of the Lord. You suffered, but the Holy Spirit made you glad.
translation_verse: Fan kasɛ anɛ yɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ awaasa tɔ, ɩmʋ sʋ halɩɩ awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ fan bʋ ɩmʋ tɔ gbaa mʋ, fan kɔɔlɛ asɩn mʋ yɛ kensi‐gyii mʋ nɩɩ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ sa fanɛ mʋ.

english_verse: You became an example for all the Lord's followers in Macedonia and Achaia.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ Masedoniya yɛ Akiya mʋ kpini bɛɛ kɩɩ fanɛ awaasa nɩɩ bɛɛ bɩɩla ɩmʋ.

english_verse: And because of you, the Lord's message has spread everywhere in those regions. Now the news of your faith in God is known all over the world, and we don't have to say a thing about it.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ asɩn mʋ ɩ man yalagɛ lɩɩ fanɛ asɛ kpee Masedoniya yɛ Akiya nkʋn, amaa fanɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii asɩn mʋ, ɩ yalagɛ kpee katɩn kʋmaa nɩmʋ. Kanɩn sʋ ɩ man daaga fɛɛ a bɩla tɔwɛ kʋtɔ kʋ lɩɩ ɩmʋ sʋ.

english_verse: Everyone is talking about how you welcomed us and how you turned away from idols to serve the true and living God.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ bamʋ gbaa‐gbaa bamʋ bɛɛ tɔwɛ kɩfɔ kɩtaa mʋ nɩɩ fan kɩtaa anɛ. Bɛɛ tɔwɛ asa kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan kyɛɛgɛ lɩɩ ɩdakpa kusun tɔ, ba sun Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ nkpa yɛ kesintin mʋ.

english_verse: They also tell how you are waiting for his Son Jesus to come from heaven. God raised him from death, and on the day of judgment Jesus will save us from God's anger.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ bɛɛ tɔwɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan gyoo Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii Yesu mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kusaa mʋ lɩɩ lewu tɔ, mʋ kibwii lɩɩ sʋsʋ ba mʋ asɩn. Nɩɩ mʋ ɩɩ kɔɔlɛ anɛ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ agbʋ lala mʋ nɩɩ kii biti kɩ ba asa sʋ mʋ.

english_verse: As you remember, we had been mistreated and insulted at Philippi. But God gave us the courage to tell you the good news about him, even though many people caused us trouble.
translation_verse: Pɔyɩ kɛ a ba fanɛ asɛ mʋ, fen nyi kanan mʋ Filipi abi ba saalɛ anɛ nɩɩ ba yɛgɛ nɩɩ an gyii awʋrʋfɔ. Amaa halɩɩ ba maa kʋsʋ yɩlɛ anɛ sʋ gbaa mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ kyɛ anɛ tɔ nɩɩ an nyɛ kɔkɔlɔ yɩlɛ tɔ, nɩɩ an taalɛ tɔwɛ fanɛ mʋ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ.

english_verse: We didn't have any hidden motives when we won you over, and we didn't try to fool or trick anyone.
translation_verse: Asɩn mʋ nɩɩ an tɔwɛ an kʋlɛ fanɛ falɛ mʋ, an man fɔyɩ ɔkpa, nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ nfɛɛrɛ libi kʋ sʋ, nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ npɩna asɩn.

english_verse: God was pleased to trust us with his message. We didn't speak to please people, but to please God who knows our motives.
translation_verse: Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ ɩɩ kɩɩ wu anɛ nɩɩ ɔ taa Asɩn danbɩrasa katɔwɛ waa anɛ abaa tɔ. Ɩmʋ sʋ man gyɛ nyɩmɩsa kebiti sʋ nɩɩ an waa, amaa kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ ansi mʋ. Mʋ ii nyi anɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ yɛ anɛ nfɛɛrɛ.

english_verse: You also know we didn't try to flatter anyone. God himself knows what we did wasn't a cover-up for greed.
translation_verse: Fanɛ gbaa‐gbaa fen nyi fɛɛ an man taa kɔnɔ tɔ kɔn asɩn tɔwɛ fanɛ. Nɩɩ an man taa sɛhn baala fanɛ sʋ kɛ a nyɛ kʋtɔ kʋ lɩɩ fanɛ asɛ. Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ gyɛ anɛ kesintin ogyipu.

english_verse: But as apostles, we could have demanded help from you. After all, Christ is the one who sent us. We chose to be like children or like a mother nursing her baby.
translation_verse: amaa an yɔɔ anɛ n‐yɩɩ kyɩna fanɛ asɛ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ talapʋ ɩɩ yɔɔ mʋ n‐yɩɩ ɛɛ kɩɩ mu‐bii ana sʋ mʋ.

english_verse: We cared so much for you, and you became so dear to us, that we were willing to give our lives for you when we gave you God's message.
translation_verse: A maa biti fanɛ asɩn gaa sʋ mʋ, man gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ nkʋn nɩɩ an taa bɩya fanɛ. Amaa an taa anɛ n‐yɩɩ gbaa sa fanɛ tii sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fan biliŋi anɛ abitipu.

english_verse: My dear friends, you surely haven't forgotten our hard work and hardships. You remember how night and day we struggled to make a living, so we could tell you God's message without being a burden to anyone.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, n kɔɔlɛ gyii fɛɛ fen nyiŋi kanan mʋ nɩɩ an waa kusun gaa saŋa mʋ nɩɩ an bʋ fanɛ asɛ mʋ. An waa kusun kakyʋwapɛ yɛ kagyanbwɛ an kɩɩ anɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ, saŋa mʋ nɩɩ an tɔwɛ fanɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ, kanan mʋ nɩɩ a man biliŋi kasʋla fanɛ ɔkʋ sʋ.

english_verse: Both you and God are witnesses that we were pure and honest and innocent in our dealings with you followers of the Lord.
translation_verse: Fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ Yesu gyii mʋ, fan naa Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ gyɛ anɛ kesintin agyipu lɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an kyɩna fanɛ tɔ, nɩɩ an man sʋ ineesi ɩkʋ, nɩɩ anɛ ɩkpa i kyiigi, nɩɩ alibi kʋ man bʋ anɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ.

english_verse: You also know we did everything for you that parents would do for their own children.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ fan nyi kanan mʋ nɩɩ an bɩla fanɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔsɛ ɩɩ bɩla mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mu‐bii ana mʋ.

english_verse: We begged, encouraged, and urged each of you to live in a way that would honor God. He is the one who chose you to share in his own kingdom and glory.
translation_verse: An waa fanɛ aniya tɔ, nɩɩ an tɔwɛ yuula fanɛ nkɔlɔ, nɩɩ an tɔwɛ waa fanɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan kyɩna kakyɩna danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ ansi. Mʋ ɩ tɩɩ fanɛ ba mu kuwura‐gyii yɛ mʋ bʋnyaa mʋ tɔ. Tesalonika abi mʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii yɛ kenyiita

english_verse: We always thank God that you believed the message we preached. It came from him, and it isn't something made up by humans. You accepted it as God's message, and now he is working in you.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ anɛ gbaa anɛ an bɩla an kyaga sʋ an fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fan maa kɔɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ fan nu lɩɩ anɛ asɛ mʋ, fan man kɔɔlɛ asɩn mʋ fɛɛ asa asɩn, amaa fan kɔɔlɛ ɩmʋ gyii fɛɛ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn mʋ gbaa‐gbaa, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ kesintin mʋ. Kanɩn Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn maŋa ii sun kusun fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ gyii mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: My friends, you did just like God's churches in Judea and like the other followers of Christ Jesus there. And so, you were mistreated by your own people, in the same way they were mistreated by their people.
translation_verse: Fanɛ, mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, an wu fɛɛ asɩn libi mʋ nɩɩ ɩ ba tu Ɩbwaarɛ kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ Krisito lɛɛ, nɩɩ ɩ bʋ Gyudeya mʋ, kanɩn asɩn libi kʋlʋn maŋa ɩ ba tu fanɛ gbaa. Lɩɩ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fan wu awʋrʋfɔ fanɛ gbaa‐gbaa asa abaa tɔ mʋ, kanɩn nɩɩ ba wu awʋrʋfɔ Gyiwu abi abaa tɔ.

english_verse: Those evil people killed the Lord Jesus and the prophets, and they even chased us away. God doesn't like what they do and neither does anyone else.
translation_verse: Bamʋ ɩ gyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba mɔɔ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu, nɩɩ dɩdaa mʋ bamʋ ɩ mɔɔ Ɩbwaarɛ atɔwɛpʋ mʋ, nɩɩ bamʋ akʋlʋn maŋa ɩ gya anɛ kyʋŋɛ mʋ. Bamʋ asɩn i mee gyii Ɩbwaarɛ ansi, nɩɩ ba kʋsʋ yɩlɛ asa kpini sʋ.

english_verse: They keep us from speaking his message to the Gentiles and from leading them to be saved. They have always gone too far with their sins. Now God has finally become angry and will punish them. Paul Wants To Visit the Church Again
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba kpan bamʋ n‐yɩɩ fɛɛ naafɔɔ bee tii anɛ ɔkpa, kɛ a man nyɛ tɔwɛ Asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ, kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ mɔlɩgɛ bamʋ. Lɩɩ falɛ ɔkpa sʋ mʋ, ba kʋʋla bamʋ alibi gyaga abaa sʋ naa fʋʋ ɩmʋ laalaalʋwɛ. Nbɩɩnbɩɩ mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ nyɛ agbʋ waa bamʋ, nɩɩ ee biti ɔ bɩɩtɛ bamʋ asʋ. Pɔɔlɩ ii biti fɛɛ ɔ bɩla naa bɔɔ Tesalonika abi sʋ

english_verse: My friends, we were kept from coming to you for a while, but we never stopped thinking about you. We were eager to see you and tried our best to visit you in person.
translation_verse: Amaa mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, saŋa dɛɛ kʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba barɩgɛ anaa fanɛ nsana mʋ, an lɩɩ fanɛ ansi sʋ bɩrɛ, amaa fanɛ asɩn ɩ san ɩ bʋ anɛ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ. Ɩmʋ sʋ ɩ yɩlɛ anɛ ansi sʋ gaa fɛɛ ɔkpa kʋmaa nɩmʋ sʋ mʋ a bwii ba wu fanɛ.

english_verse: We really wanted to come. I myself tried several times, but Satan always stopped us.
translation_verse: An biti gaa fɛɛ a ba fanɛ asɛ. Mɛ Pɔɔlɩ, n kpan mɛ n‐yɩɩ saŋa gaalaagaa sʋ fɛɛ a ba fanɛ asɛ, amaa Sɩtaanɛ tii anɛ ɔkpa.

english_verse: After all, when the Lord Jesus appears, who else but you will give us hope and joy and be like a glorious crown for us?
translation_verse: Anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kibwii ba mʋ, mɩnɛ ɩ gyɛ anɛ tamaa yɛ anɛ kensi‐gyii yɛ anɛ bʋnyaa kɩnyɛ mu ansi tɔ? Man gyɛ fanɛ?

english_verse: You alone are our glory and joy!
translation_verse: Kesintin mʋ, fanɛ ɩ gyɛ anɛ bʋnyaa yɛ kensi‐gyii.

english_verse: and send our friend Timothy to you. He works with us as God's servant and preaches the good news about Christ. We wanted him to make you strong in your faith and to encourage you.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ an sun anɛ‐supu Timoti mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ anɛ bɩrɩsa Ɩbwaarɛ kusun obuupu mʋ nɩɩ anaa mʋ an tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa lɩɩ Krisito sʋ. An sun mʋ yɛ ɔ ba waa fanɛ ɔlʋn tɔ yɛ aniya tɔ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ.

english_verse: We didn't want any of you to be discouraged by all these troubles. You knew we would have to suffer,
translation_verse: Kɛ kanyanla mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ ba fanɛ sʋ falɛ, ɩ man yɛgɛ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ o bwii kamaa. Fanɛ gbaa‐gbaa fanɛ fen nyi fɛɛ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti nɩɩ kanyanla nɩmʋ ɩ ba anɛ sʋ.

english_verse: because when we were with you, we told you this would happen. And we did suffer, as you well know.
translation_verse: Kesintin tɔ, saŋa mʋ nɩɩ an bʋ fanɛ asɛ mʋ, an taalɛ an tɔwɛ fanɛ fɛɛ an biti an nyɛ kanyanla. Nɩɩ ɩ ba kanɩn kesintin fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan nyi mʋ.

english_verse: Timothy has now come back from his visit with you and has told us about your faith and love. He also said that you always have happy memories of us and that you want to see us as much as we want to see you.
translation_verse: Amaa Timoti dan lɩɩ fanɛ asɛ ba nbɩɩnbɩɩ nɩmʋ nɩɩ ɔ bɩya asɩn bʋkɔnsa lɩɩ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii yɛ fanɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ fan sʋ. Nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ anɛ yɛ anɛ asɩn a bʋ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ nɩɩ fen nyiŋi anɛ sʋ gaa saŋa kʋmaa nɩmʋ, nɩɩ fen biti fɛɛ anaa fanɛ an wu abaa, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ anɛ gbaa anɛ an biti mʋ.

english_verse: My friends, even though we have a lot of trouble and suffering, your faith makes us feel better about you.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ, mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, anaa anɛ awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ an gyii yɛ kanyanla mʋ nɩɩ a wu mʋ kpini mʋ, lɩɩ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ mʋ ɩ waa anɛ ɔlʋn tɔ.

english_verse: Your strong faith in the Lord is like a breath of new life.
translation_verse: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ, anɛ nkɔlɔ ɩ tɩyɛ anɛ lɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan yɩlɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ tɔ kenken mʋ.

english_verse: How can we possibly thank God enough for all the happiness you have brought us?
translation_verse: Afwaala mɔɔ nɩɩ an biti a taa sa Ɩbwaarɛ lɩɩ fanɛ sʋ, lɩɩ kensi‐gyii mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an nyɛ lɩɩ fanɛ sʋ falɛ?

english_verse: Day and night we sincerely pray that we will see you again and help you to have an even stronger faith.
translation_verse: Kakyʋwapɛ yɛ kagyanbwɛ kpini an kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ gaa lɩɩ anɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ fɛɛ a bɩla nyɛ wu fanɛ, kɛ a sa fanɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ki tiri fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: We pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus will let us visit you.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ anɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ ɩ gyɛ yɛ anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ gbaa‐gbaa yɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu ba bugi ɔkpa sa anɛ kɛ a ba fanɛ asɛ.

english_verse: May the Lord make your love for each other and for everyone else grow by leaps and bounds. This is how our love for you has grown.
translation_verse: An kʋlɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu yɛ, ɔ yɛgɛ fanɛ kebiti kɩ nyɛ akyɔ tii sʋ, kɛ fan biti abaa yɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ gaa, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ anɛ gbaa an sʋ kebiti sa fanɛ mʋ.

english_verse: And when our Lord comes with all his people, I pray he will make your hearts pure and innocent in the sight of God the Father.
translation_verse: An kʋlɛ fɛɛ ɔ sa fanɛ kɔkɔlɔ ɔsɩɩ, kɛ alibi yɛ ineesi ɩkʋ ɩ man bʋ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ansi tɔ, saŋa mʋ nɩɩ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu ii biti ɔ ba maa Ɩbwaarɛ asa mʋ.

english_verse: Finally, my dear friends, since you belong to the Lord Jesus, we beg and urge you to live as we taught you. Then you will please God. You are already living that way, but try even harder.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, an sa fanɛ kɔnɔ yɛ fan kyɩna kakyɩna mʋ nɩɩ i gyii Ɩbwaarɛ ansi, nɩɩ fan nu sa anɛ. Anɛ laalaalʋwɛ asɩn mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ an sʋ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu an kʋlɛ fanɛ yɛ, fan kɩtaa tɔ kɛ fan waa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ kyɔ falɛ tii sʋ.

english_verse: Remember the instructions we gave you as followers of the Lord Jesus.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ fen nyi kɩkaapʋ mʋ nɩɩ an kaapʋ fanɛ lɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu ɔlʋn tɔ.

english_verse: God wants you to be holy, so don't be immoral in matters of sex.
translation_verse: Ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti nɩn fɛɛ fan man waa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ ineesi, kɛ fan lɛɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ abawʋlɛ‐sɩn tɔ.

english_verse: Don't be a slave of your desires or live like people who don't know God.
translation_verse: Kɛ mʋ awaasa ɩ man ba ɩ gyɛ kayalaga ɔkpa sʋ fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man nyi Ɩbwaarɛ maa mʋ ɩkpa mʋ.

english_verse: You must not cheat any of the Lord's followers in matters of sex. Remember, we warned you that he punishes everyone who does such things.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ ɔ man taa falɛ awaasa libi nɩmʋ waa mʋ bɩrɩsa, abɛɛ o sisii mʋ kayalaga asɩn kʋ tɔ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ ii biti ɔ bɩɩtɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa falɛ alibi asʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an wʋla tɔwɛ fanɛ nɩɩ an da fanɛ amu tɔ mʋ.

english_verse: God didn't choose you to be filthy, but to be pure.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ man tɩɩ anɛ yɛ an ba waa agyaga‐sɩn nɩn, amaa a ba kyɩna kakyɩna kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ tɔ.

english_verse: So if you don't obey these rules, you are not really disobeying us. Instead, you are disobeying God, who gives you his Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee kina kɩkaapʋ nɩmʋ mʋ, man gyɛ nyɩmɩsa nɩɩ ee kina, amaa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ sa anɛ mʋ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ee kina.

english_verse: We don't have to write you about the need to love each other. God has taught you to do this,
translation_verse: Nɩɩ lɩɩ kinyi‐bii kebiti bɩrɛ sʋ mʋ, ɩ man bɩla i tiri fɛɛ a kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ sa fanɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kaapʋ fanɛ gbaa‐gbaa fanɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan biti abaa.

english_verse: and you already have shown your love for all his people in Macedonia. But, my dear friends, we ask you to do even more.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kesintin tɔ mʋ, fen biti fanɛ bɩrɩsa ana mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ Masedoniya kasɛ sʋ kpini. Amaa anɛ bɩrɩsa ana, an tɔwɛ an waa fanɛ aniya tɔ fɛɛ fan kyaga sʋ waa kanɩn tii sʋ.

english_verse: Try your best to live quietly, to mind your own business, and to work hard, just as we taught you to do.
translation_verse: Fan kpan fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kɛ fan kyɩna kayɩɩ yuuli tɔ, kɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ɔ man taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ waa asa asɩn tɔ, kɛ fan taa fanɛ abaa sun kusun. An wʋla tɔwɛ fanɛ ɩnɩmʋ kpini.

english_verse: Then you will be respected by people who are not followers of the Lord, and you won't have to depend on anyone. The Lord's Coming
translation_verse: Lɩɩ kanɩn sʋ mʋ, fen biti fan nyɛ bɛɛrɛɛ lɩɩ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba man tii fanɛ sʋ mʋ asɛ, kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ kɛ fan man taa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ tʋʋ ɔkʋ sʋ. Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu kibwii ba mʋ

english_verse: My friends, we want you to understand how it will be for those followers who have already died. Then you won't grieve over them and be like people who don't have any hope.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, a mee biti fɛɛ fan baa fan bʋ kitentenbiri tɔ lɩɩ alewupu sʋ, abɛɛ fanɛ nkɔlɔ i nyita fanɛ fɛɛ asansa mʋ nɩɩ ba man sʋ tamaa mʋ.

english_verse: We believe Jesus died and was raised to life. We also believe that when God brings Jesus back again, he will bring with him all who had faith in Jesus before they died.
translation_verse: An kɔɔlɛ gyii fɛɛ Yesu wu nɩɩ o bwii kyiŋi ba nkpa tɔ, kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ an bɩla kɔɔlɛ gyii fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba kɔɔlɛ Yesu gyii nɩɩ ba wu mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ bwii kyiŋi bamʋ ba nkpa tɔ, kɛ ba maa Yesu ba bwii ba.

english_verse: Our Lord Jesus told us that when he comes, we won't go up to meet him ahead of his followers who have already died.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa kɔnɔ tɔ asɩn mʋ, nɩɩ an tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ anɛ mʋ nɩɩ an san an tɛ nkpa tɔ naa fʋʋ kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ ii biti ɔ ba mʋ, a mɛɛ yɛ a gyankpaa alewupu mʋ.

english_verse: With a loud command and with the shout of the chief angel and a blast of God's trumpet, the Lord will return from heaven. Then those who had faith in Christ before they died will be raised to life.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa ii biti ɔ kpɩlɩgɛ lɩɩ sʋsʋ ɛɛ ba kasɛ, yɛ ɩlawʋ lala kɔnɔsa yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabɔɔ bɩlɩsa ɔbʋlɛ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabɩlɛ, kɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba wu Krisito tɔ mʋ ba gyankpaa kyiŋi.

english_verse: Next, all of us who are still alive will be taken up into the clouds together with them to meet the Lord in the sky. From that time on we will all be with the Lord forever.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ kamaa mʋ, anɛ mʋ nɩɩ an sii nɩɩ an san an bʋ nkpa tɔ mʋ, ee biti ɔ kɩtaa anɛ bʋga bamʋ tɔ abwaarɛ‐wʋlɛ tɔ, kɛ a naa gyaŋa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ sʋsʋ. Kɛ a naa kyɩna yɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ kakpaa.

english_verse: Encourage each other with these words.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan taa falɛ asɩn nɩmʋ tɔwɛ waa abaa ɔlʋn tɔ.

english_verse: I don't need to write you about the time or date when all this will happen.
translation_verse: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, ɩ man bɩla i tiri fɛɛ a kyʋrɔɔ asɩn kʋ lɩɩ saŋa yɛ kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ ii biti i ba mʋ sa fanɛ.

english_verse: People will think they are safe and secure. But destruction will suddenly strike them like the pains of a woman about to give birth. And they won't escape.
translation_verse: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ asa bɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, “An sʋ kayɩɩ yuuli nɩɩ sɛhn man bɩla yɛ ɔ waa anɛ” mʋ, tʋtɔ nɩɩ kenyiita kii biti kɩ ba bamʋ sʋ opula tɔ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ keduŋidi kɩɩ kɩtaa ɔtɔ wuya mʋ. Nɩɩ bamʋ ɔkʋ mɛɛ yɛ ɔ taalɛ lɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ kanɩn awʋrʋfɔ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: My dear friends, you don't live in darkness, and so that day won't surprise you like a thief.
translation_verse: Amaa fanɛ akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu bɩrɛ, fan man bʋ kitentenbiri tɔ, kɛ kanɩn kakɛ maŋa kɩ ba purigi fanɛ fɛɛ oyu mʋ.

english_verse: You belong to the light and live in the day. We don't live in the night or belong to the dark.
translation_verse: Fanɛ kpini fɛn gyɛ fɩtɩla tɔ asa nɩɩ fɛn naa kayɩkɛ tɔ. Amaa a man gyɛ kagyanbwɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ an naa kitentenbiri tɔ.

english_verse: But we belong to the day. So we must stay sober and let our faith and love be like a suit of armor. Our firm hope that we will be saved is our helmet.
translation_verse: Amaa fɛɛ a maa gyɛ kayɩkɛ tɔ asa mʋ, fan yɛgɛ an kʋʋla anɛ n‐yɩɩ, kɛ a taa anɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii yɛ kebiti waa kʋtɔ kunsa kun anɛ nkɔlɔ sʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ anaakɔpʋ bɛɛ waa mʋ. Kɛ a taa kamɔlɩgɛ mʋ nɩɩ an sʋ tamaa mʋ waa kʋwʋrʋ bun anɛ amu sʋ fɛɛ anaakɔpʋ awʋrʋ.

english_verse: God doesn't intend to punish us, but wants us to be saved by our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ man tɩɩ anɛ yɛ a ba gyii awʋrʋfɔ lɩɩ mʋ agbʋ lala mʋ sʋ. Amaa ɔ tɩɩ anɛ yɛ lɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito sʋ kɛ a ba nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ.

english_verse: Christ died for us, so we could live with him, whether we are alive or dead when he comes.
translation_verse: Yesu Krisito wu sa anɛ nɩn, ɩmʋ sʋ an kan an tɛ nkpa tɔ nɩn oo, abɛɛ an wu nɩn oo, anaa mʋ a bʋga kyɩna.

english_verse: This is why you must encourage and help each other, just as you are already doing. Final Instructions and Greetings
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan tɔwɛ waa abaa ɔlʋn tɔ, kɛ fan kyɛ abaa tɔ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fɛn wʋla fɛn waa falɛ. Laalaalʋwɛ asɩn yɛ afwaala

english_verse: My friends, we ask you to be thoughtful of your leaders who work hard and tell you how to live for the Lord.
translation_verse: Anɛ‐daa ana yɛ anɛ‐supu ana, an kʋlɛ fanɛ fɛɛ fan taa bɛɛrɛɛ sa fanɛ agyankpaapʋ mʋ nɩɩ fanaa bamʋ fen sun Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito mʋ. Bɛɛ kpan bamʋ n‐yɩɩ bɛɛ waa kusun nɩɩ bɛɛ kaapʋ fanɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan kyɩna kakyɩna danbɩrasa tɔ.

english_verse: Show them great respect and love because of their work. Try to get along with each other.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ kusun mʋ nɩɩ bee sun sʋ mʋ, fan taa bɛɛrɛɛ lala sa bamʋ kɛ fan biti bamʋ asɩn gaa. Kɛ fan taa kayɩɩ‐yuuli kyɩna yɛ abaa.

english_verse: My friends, we beg you to warn anyone who isn't living right. Encourage anyone who feels left out, help all who are weak, and be patient with everyone.
translation_verse: Anɛ‐daa ana yɛ anɛ‐supu ana, an tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ, fan da awʋlɛgyɔpʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ fanɛ tɔ mʋ amu tɔ, kɛ fan tɔwɛ waa bamʋ nɩɩ ba man sʋ nkɔlɔ mʋ, kɛ fan kyɛ apɔɔsɩpʋ mʋ tɔ, kɛ fan nyɛ kenyiita sa ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ.

english_verse: Don't be hateful to people, just because they are hateful to you. Rather, be good to each other and to everyone else.
translation_verse: Fan kɩɩ sʋ yɛ ɔdan kɛ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ ɔ man taa alibi ka alibi kʋkɔ. Amaa saŋa kʋmaa fan kpan fanɛ n‐yɩɩ fan waa kɩdanbɩrasa fɛn sa abaa yɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ.

english_verse: and never stop praying.
translation_verse: Fan kyaga sʋ fɛn kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ saŋa kʋmaa.

english_verse: Whatever happens, keep thanking God because of Jesus Christ. This is what God wants you to do.
translation_verse: Fan taa afwaala sa Ɩbwaarɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa tɔ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩnɩmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti fɛɛ fan waa lɩɩ Yesu Krisito ɔlʋn tɔ sʋ.

english_verse: Don't turn away God's Spirit
translation_verse: Fan man dun Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ fʋlɔn mʋ kusun.

english_verse: Put everything to the test. Accept what is good
translation_verse: Amaa fan tʋʋ bamʋ asɩn tɔwɛsa yɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa tɔ kɩɩ, kɛ fan kɩtaa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋrɔn.

english_verse: and don't have anything to do with evil.
translation_verse: Kɛ fan lɛɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ alibi kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ.

english_verse: I pray that God, who gives peace, will make you completely holy. And may your spirit, soul, and body be kept healthy and faultless until our Lord Jesus Christ returns.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ keyuula wuya mʋ, ɔ lɔŋɔ fanɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ yɩla sa mʋ n‐yɩɩ. Kɛ ɔ kɩɩ fanɛ kayaayu yɛ fanɛ kala yɛ fanɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kpini sʋ, kɛ alibi akʋ ɩ man ba ɩ bʋ fanɛ sʋ kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito ii biti o bwii ba mʋ.

english_verse: The one who chose you can be trusted, and he will do this.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ fanɛ waa mʋ lɛɛ mʋ, mʋ ɩ gyɛ kesintin wuya nɩɩ ee biti ɔ waa kanɩn.

english_verse: Friends, please pray for us.
translation_verse: Anɛ‐daa ana yɛ anɛ‐supu ana, fan kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ sa anɛ.

english_verse: Give the Lord's followers a warm greeting.
translation_verse: Fan fwaala Krisito abi mʋ kpini kɛ fan taa kebiti baari abaa.

english_verse: In the name of the Lord I beg you to read this letter to all his followers.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kɩtɩɩ tɔ sʋ, n tɔwɛ fan yɛ fan kalɛ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ sa akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ kpini.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you!
translation_verse: Anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kabwaala kɩ baa kɩ bʋ fanɛ asɛ.

english_verse: From Paul, Silas, and Timothy. To the church in Thessalonica, the people of God our Father and of the Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Mɛ Pɔɔlɩ maa Silasi yɛ Timoti ɩ kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ an sa fanɛ Krisito abi kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ fan bʋ Tesalonika, nɩɩ fan gyɛ anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito asa mʋ.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! When Christ Returns
translation_verse: Anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito ba bwaala fanɛ kɛ ba sa fanɛ kayɩɩ yuuli. Yesu Krisito kibwii ba mʋ asɩn

english_verse: My dear friends, we always have good reason to thank God for you, because your faith in God and your love for each other keep growing all the time.
translation_verse: Anɛ‐daa yɛ anɛ‐supu ana, i tiri fɛɛ an fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ saŋa kʋmaa nɩmʋ lɩɩ fanɛ sʋ. Nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ a maa waa kanɩn. Lɩɩ fɛɛ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kɩɩ dan kii tii sʋ, nɩɩ fanɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ fan sʋ sa abaa mʋ kii tii sʋ.

english_verse: This is why we brag about you to all of God's churches. We tell them how patient you are and how you keep on having faith, even though you are going through a lot of trouble and suffering.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ anɛ gbaa‐gbaa anɛ an taalɛ da anɛ nkɔlɔ sʋ, an tɔwɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ asɩn an sa Ɩbwaarɛ kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ tɔ kpini, lɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fɛn nyɛ nkɔlɔ yɩlɛ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ, lɩɩ fanɛ kanyanla yɛ awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ fen gyii mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: All this shows that God judges fairly and is making you fit to share in his kingdom for which you are suffering.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ kpini ɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ katalɛ mʋ ki du kyɛɛkyɛɛ. Ɩmʋ ii biti ɩ yɛgɛ kɛ fan baa fan dagaa sa Ɩbwaarɛ kuwura‐gyii mʋ nɩɩ fen gyii kɩmʋ sʋ awʋrʋfɔ mʋ.

english_verse: It is only right for God to punish everyone who is causing you trouble,
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ gyɛ kesintin ogyipu nɩn. Mʋ ii biti ɔ taa awʋrʋfɔ tɛɛla bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ nyanla fanɛ mʋ.

english_verse: but he will give you relief from your troubles. God will do the same for us, when the Lord Jesus comes from heaven with his powerful angels
translation_verse: Ee biti ɔ sa fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fen gyii awʋrʋfɔ mʋ yɛ anɛ kpini ɔfʋʋtɛ, saŋa mʋ nɩɩ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu ee biti ɔ lɩɩ sʋsʋ ba maa mʋ nbɔɔ lʋlʋnpʋ yɛ fʋlɔn mʋ.

english_verse: and with a flaming fire. Our Lord Jesus will punish anyone who doesn't know God and won't obey his message.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fʋlɔn nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ taa bɩɩtɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bee kina mʋ mʋ, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba waa kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn sa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito Asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ.

english_verse: Their punishment will be eternal destruction, and they will be kept far from the presence of our Lord and his glorious strength.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ bɩɩtɛ bamʋ kʋsʋ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ kenyiita kakpaa, kɛ ɔ gya bamʋ lɩɩ mu ansi yɛ mʋ bʋnyaa mʋ ɔlʋn tɔ.

english_verse: This will happen on the day when the Lord returns to be praised and honored by all who have faith in him and belong to him. This includes you, because you believed what we said.
translation_verse: Kanɩn kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ Yesu ii biti ɔ ba mʋ, mʋ asa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɔŋɔ yɩla mʋ, bee biti ba kʋsaa mʋ kɩtɩɩ sʋsʋ, kɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba kɔɔlɛ gyii mʋ ba yɩn mʋ. Fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fan tii sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fan kɔɔlɛ mʋ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ an tɔwɛ fanɛ mʋ gyii.

english_verse: God chose you, and we keep praying that God will make you worthy of being his people. We pray for God's power to help you do all the good things you hope to do and your faith makes you want to do.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ kpini ɩ maa bʋ anɛ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ sʋ mʋ, an kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ an sa fanɛ saŋa kʋmaa nɩmʋ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ lɔŋɔ fanɛ, kɛ fan dagaa kɩtɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ fanɛ mʋ. Kɛ lɩɩ mʋ ɔlʋn tɔ sʋ mʋ ɔ yɛgɛ kʋtɔ danbɩrasa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ fan fɛ nfɛɛrɛ yɛ fen biti fan waa mʋ, ɩ waa ɔdan sa fanɛ, kɛ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kusun mʋ nɩɩ fɛn waa mʋ fan taalɛ waa kɩmʋ naa lʋwɛ.

english_verse: Then, because of the undeserved grace of God and our Lord Jesus Christ, you will bring honor to the name of our Lord Jesus, and he will bring honor to you.
translation_verse: An kʋlɛ ɩnɩmʋ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ fɛɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kɩtɩɩ ki dii sʋsʋ, kɛ asa ba wu mʋ bʋnyaa fanɛ tɔ, kɛ lɩɩ Yesu Krisito sʋ mʋ, fanɛ kɩtɩɩ ki dii sʋsʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ maa anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito ba bwaala fanɛ mʋ.

english_verse: When our Lord Jesus returns, we will be gathered up to meet him. So I ask you, my friends,
translation_verse: Anɛ‐daa ana yɛ anɛ‐supu ana, lɩɩ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kɩba mʋ sʋ yɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ a bʋga naa gyaŋa mʋ sʋ mʋ, an kʋlɛ fanɛ yɛ,

english_verse: not to be easily upset or disturbed by people who claim the Lord has already come. They may say they heard this directly from the Holy Spirit, or from someone else, or even that they read it in one of our letters.
translation_verse: nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan ba fanɛ asɛ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mʋ asɩn sa mʋ yɛ ɔ tɔwɛ fanɛ mʋ, abɛɛ ɔ nyɛ ɔkala kʋ abɛɛ ɔ nyɛ ɔwʋlɛ lɩɩ anɛ asɛ mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ tɔwɛ yɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu kakɛ lala mʋ kɩ tɛɛ ba mʋ, fan man yɛgɛ fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ i wuliti fanɛ tɔ abɛɛ ɩ ŋmaa fanɛ nkɔlɔ.

english_verse: Don't you remember I told you this while I was still with you?
translation_verse: Fen mee nyiŋi fɛɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n kyɩna n bʋ fanɛ asɛ mʋ n tɔwɛ fanɛ ɩnɩmʋ kpini?

english_verse: You already know what is holding this wicked one back until it is time for him to come.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ fan nyi kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kii tii ɔmʋ nɩɩ o mee buu sɛhn mʋ ɔkpa, lɩɩ fɛɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ii biti ɩ ba lɛɛ mʋ ifuli mʋ ɩ man pɩɩ fʋʋ.

english_verse: Then he will appear, but the Lord Jesus will kill him simply by breathing on him. He will be completely destroyed by the Lord's glorious return.
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ lɛɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ o mee buu sɛhn mʋ ifuli, nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu kan bwii ba mʋ, kɛ ɔ taa mʋ kɔnɔ tɔ afuu mʋ mɔɔ mʋ, kɛ ɔ taa mʋ bʋnyaa nyita mʋ kakpaa.

english_verse: When the wicked one appears, Satan will pretend to work all kinds of miracles, wonders, and signs.
translation_verse: Ɔmʋ nɩɩ o mee buu sɛhn mʋ kɩba mʋ, ee biti o sun Sɩtaanɛ kusun. Ee biti ɔ taa Sɩtaanɛ ɔlʋn waa adangana yɛ sɩnkaala yɛ asɩn kyinkyinsa pɩna asa.

english_verse: Lost people will be fooled by his evil deeds. They could be saved, but they will refuse to love the truth and accept it.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ee biti ɔ bɔla ɔkpa kʋmaa sʋ taa asɩn libi pɩna bamʋ nɩɩ bee biti ba nyita mʋ. Bee nyita, lɩɩ fɛɛ ba kina kesintin mʋ nɩɩ kii biti kɩ mɔlɩgɛ bamʋ mʋ.

english_verse: So God will make sure they are fooled into believing a lie.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ antɩŋɛsa lala ba bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ, kɛ ba lan bɛɛ kɔɔlɛ antɩŋɛsa mʋ bee gyii,

english_verse: All of them will be punished, because they would rather do evil than believe the truth. Be Faithful
translation_verse: kɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba kina kesintin kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ, nɩɩ bamʋ ansi i gyii alibi kɩwaa sʋ mʋ kpini bee biti ba gyii kʋpwɛ. Fan yɩlɛ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ kenken

english_verse: My friends, the Lord loves you, and it is only natural for us to thank God for you. God chose you to be the first ones to be saved. His Spirit made you holy, and you put your faith in the truth.
translation_verse: Anɛ‐daa ana yɛ anɛ‐supu ana mʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ ii biti fanɛ asɩn, ɩ dagaa saŋa kʋmaa nɩmʋ a maa fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ sa fanɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ wʋla lɛɛ fanɛ lɩɩ npiili asɛ mʋ yɛ ee biti ɔ mɔlɩgɛ fanɛ. Ɔ waa ɩnɩmʋ nɩn lɩɩ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ ɔlʋn tɔ yɛ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ kesintin mʋ gyii, kɛ fan baa fan gyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɔŋɔ yɩlɛ sa mʋ n‐yɩɩ.

english_verse: God used our preaching as his way of inviting you to share in the glory of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla mʋ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ an tɔwɛ mʋ sʋ tɩɩ fanɛ yɛ fan ba nyɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito bʋnyaa mʋ.

english_verse: My friends, this is why you must remain faithful and follow closely what we taught you in person and by our letters.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ, anɛ‐daa ana yɛ anɛ‐supu ana, anɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ an kaapʋ fanɛ yɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ an kyʋrɔɔ sa fanɛ mʋ, fan yɩlɛ tɔ kɛ fan kɩtaa ɩmʋ tɔ kenken.

english_verse: God our Father loves us. He treats us with undeserved grace and has given us eternal comfort and a wonderful hope. We pray that our Lord Jesus Christ and God our Father
translation_verse: Anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito gbaa‐gbaa yɛ anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ bee biti anɛ asɩn gaa mʋ, ba bɔla kabwaala mʋ sʋ tɔwɛ waa anɛ ɔlʋn tɔ kakpaa, nɩɩ ba sa anɛ tamaa danbɩrasa.

english_verse: Finally, our friends, please pray for us. This will help the message about the Lord to spread quickly, and others will respect it, just as you do.
translation_verse: Anɛ‐daa ana yɛ anɛ‐supu ana, anɛ laalaalʋwɛ asɩn mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, fan kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ sa anɛ kɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ asɩn mʋ ɩ nyɛ yalagɛ bilen‐bilen, kɛ ɩ nyɛ bɛɛrɛɛ lala fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ nyɛ fanɛ asɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Pray that we may be kept safe from worthless and evil people. After all, not everyone has faith.
translation_verse: Kɛ fan kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ lɛɛ anɛ lɩɩ amu tɔ ɔlʋn wuya ana yɛ asɩn libi wuya ana abaa tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ man gyɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ɩɩ kɔɔlɛ Yesu gyii.

english_verse: But the Lord can be trusted to make you strong and protect you from harm.
translation_verse: Amaa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ gyɛ kesintin wuya nɩn, nɩɩ mʋ ii biti ɔ sa fanɛ ɔlʋn kɛ o kun fanɛ lɩɩ Sɩtaanɛ kɩbaa tɔ.

english_verse: He has made us sure that you are obeying what we taught you and that you will keep on obeying.
translation_verse: An sʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ tɔ fɛɛ ɛɛ yɛgɛ nɩɩ fɛn waa, nɩɩ fen biti fan kyaga sʋ waa atɔ mʋ nɩɩ an sa fanɛ kɔnɔ yɛ fan waa mʋ.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will guide you to be as loving as God and as patient as Christ. Warnings against Laziness
translation_verse: An kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ yɛ, Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ o biliŋaa fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ kpee Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti mʋ tɔ yɛ Yesu Krisito kɔkɔlɔ kɩnyɛ yɩlɛ tɔ mʋ tɔ. Ɔkʋ ɔ man waa ɔwʋlɛgyɔpʋ

english_verse: My dear friends, in the name of the Lord Jesus, I beg you not to have anything to do with any of your people who loaf around and refuse to obey the instructions we gave you.
translation_verse: Anɛ‐daa ana yɛ anɛ‐supu ana, lɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kɩtɩɩ tɔ sʋ mʋ, an sa fanɛ kɔnɔ yɛ fanɛ bɩrɩsa mʋ nɩɩ o mee biti kusun kɩwaa, nɩɩ mʋ kɩbaabʋtɔ kɩ man naa yɛ kɩkaapʋ mʋ nɩɩ fan nyɛ lɩɩ anɛ asɛ mʋ, fan kɩtaa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: and we didn't accept food from anyone without paying for it. We didn't want to be a burden to any of you, so night and day we worked as hard as we could.
translation_verse: nɩɩ an man gyii ɔkʋ agyitɔ yɛgɛ a man ka ɩmʋ kʋkɔ. Amaa an payɩ ansi waa kusun yɛ kɩkpɩnɛ kakyʋwapɛ yɛ kagyanbwɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ anɛ kɩkyɩna fanɛ asɛ mʋ ɩ man waa kasʋla sa fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ.

english_verse: We also gave you this rule: If you don't work, you don't eat.
translation_verse: Halɩɩ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ an bʋ fanɛ asɛ mʋ an sa fanɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, “Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o mee biti kusun kɩwaa mʋ, ɔ man gyii.”

english_verse: Now we learn that some of you just loaf around and won't do any work, except the work of a busybody.
translation_verse: An nu yɛ akʋ ba bʋ fanɛ tɔ ba sʋ wʋlʋgyɔ. Be mee sun kusun kʋ, amɔɔ asa asɩn tɔ kɩnatɛ loo.

english_verse: So, for the sake of our Lord Jesus Christ, we ask and beg these people to settle down and start working for a living.
translation_verse: Bamʋ nɩɩ be du kanɩn mʋ, an sa bamʋ kɔnɔ nɩɩ an tɔwɛ an sa bamʋ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kɩtɩɩ tɔ sʋ yɛ ba biti kusun waa biti bamʋ agyitɔ gyisa.

english_verse: Dear friends, you must never become tired of doing right.
translation_verse: Amaa fanɛ, anɛ‐daa ana yɛ anɛ‐supu ana bɩrɛ, fan man yɛgɛ kɩdanbɩrasa kɩwaa i fii fanɛ.

english_verse: Be on your guard against any followers who refuse to obey what we have written in this letter. Put them to shame by not having anything to do with them.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ kan kina anɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ an kyʋrɔɔ waa ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ tɔ falɛ mʋ, fan baa fan da mʋ sʋ. Fanaa mʋ fan man bɩla bʋga waa sɛhn, kɛ ipeeli ɩ kɩtaa mʋ.

english_verse: Don't consider them your enemies. Instead, speak kindly to them as you would to any other follower. Final Prayer
translation_verse: Fan man taa mʋ waa fɛɛ fanɛ dʋn, amaa fan tɔwɛ waa mʋ fɛɛ fanɛ‐nyi mu‐bii ana tɔ ɔkʋ. Laalaalʋwɛ afwaala

english_verse: I pray that the Lord, who gives peace, will always bless you with peace. May the Lord be with all of you.
translation_verse: Anɛ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ ɩ gyɛ yɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito gbaa‐gbaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ kayɩɩ‐yuuli wuya mʋ, ɔ sa fanɛ kayɩɩ‐yuuli saŋa kʋmaa yɛ ɔkpa kʋmaa sʋ. Anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu ɔ baa ɔ bʋ fanɛ kpini asɛ.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to all of you.
translation_verse: Anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kabwaala kɩ baa kɩ bʋ fanɛ kpini asɛ.

english_verse: From Paul. God our Savior and Christ Jesus commanded me to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, who gives us hope.
translation_verse: Mɛ, Pɔɔlɩ ɩ kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ. Lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ anɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ yɛ Krisito Yesu mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ anɛ tamaa kɩpɩrɛ sʋ nɩɩ n ba waa Krisito Yesu Osunpu.

english_verse: Timothy, because of our faith, you are like a son to me. I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind and merciful to you. May they bless you with peace! Warning against False Teaching
translation_verse: N kyʋrɔɔ n sa fʋ Timoti mʋ nɩɩ lɩɩ Yesu kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ nɩɩ fʋ gyɛ mɛ kesintin tɔ kebii. Kabwaala yɛ kʋwɛɛ kuwu yɛ kayɩɩ yuuli mʋ nɩɩ ɩ lɩɩ Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Krisito Yesu asɛ mʋ kɩ ba fʋ sʋ. Kumu tɔ kɩda lɩɩ antɩŋɛsa kɩkaapʋ sʋ

english_verse: When I was leaving for Macedonia, I asked you to stay on in Ephesus and warn certain people there to stop spreading their false teachings.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ waa fʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n kpee Masedoniya mʋ, sii kyɩna Efeso tʋtɔ kɛ fʋ nyɛ tii antɩŋɛsa akaapʋpʋ mʋ kɩkaapʋ ɔkpa.

english_verse: You needed to warn them to stop wasting their time on senseless stories and endless lists of ancestors. Such things only cause arguments. They don't help anyone to do God's work that can only be done by faith.
translation_verse: Tɔwɛ sa bamʋ yɛ ba yɛgɛ asɩrɩkpan ikisii‐sɩn yɛ kakʋʋgɛ tɔ nkyaga sʋ asɩn. Lɩɩ fɛɛ falɛ atɔ nɩmʋ ɩɩ bɩya ɩmɔɔrɛ‐libi nɩn, nɩɩ ɩ mɛɛ kyɛ asa kabwaarɛ‐sun mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ bɔla kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: You must teach people to have genuine love, as well as a good conscience and true faith.
translation_verse: Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ mɛ kɔnɔsa nɩmʋ yɩlɛ sʋ mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, asa ba nyɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ kɩ lɩɩ kɔkɔlɔ fuuli tɔ, yɛ nfɛɛrɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋrɔn, yɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kesintin tɔ.

english_verse: There are some who have given up these for nothing but empty talk.
translation_verse: Akʋ ba man bɩla ba buu ɩnɩmʋ, amaa ba buu ntɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ kasɛ.

english_verse: They want to be teachers of the Law of Moses. But they don't know what they are talking about, even though they think they do.
translation_verse: Bee biti ba baa ba gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nbara akaapʋpʋ mʋ, amaa ba man nyi nɩɩ be mee nu asɩn mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ yɩlɛ ɩmʋ sʋ bɛɛ tɔwɛ mʋ kasɛ.

english_verse: We know the Law is good, if it is used in the right way.
translation_verse: An nyi fɛɛ nbara mʋ ɩ bʋrɔn, nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ kan buu ɩmʋ ɔkpa sʋ mʋ, ɩ bʋrɔn sa mʋ.

english_verse: We also understand it wasn't given to control people who please God, but to control lawbreakers, criminals, godless people, and sinners. It is for wicked and evil people, and for murderers, who would even kill their own parents.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ an bɩla an nyi yɛ nbara mʋ ɩ man dɛ sa ɩkpa kyiigisa wuya ana, amaa ɩ dɛ sa nbara anyitapu yɛ kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn wuya ana, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba mɛɛ bʋnyaa Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ alibi awaapʋ, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man du kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ be mee sun Ɩbwaarɛ, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ mɔɔ bamʋ‐sɛ ana abɛɛ bamʋ‐nyi ana, yɛ asa amɔɔpʋ.

english_verse: The Law was written for people who are sexual perverts or who live as homosexuals or are kidnappers or liars or won't tell the truth in court. It is for anything else that opposes the correct teaching
translation_verse: Nbara mʋ ɩ bʋ tɔ sa bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ lɩɩ bamʋ‐kuli ana abɛɛ bamʋ‐ka ana kamaa, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa agyaga‐sɩn, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba kɩtaa asa bɛɛ fɛ kɛ ba nyɛ afulee, yɛ antɩŋɛsa wuya ana, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩn antɩŋɛsa bɛɛ bɔ ntan, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa asɩn kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ i mee buu kesintin kɩkaapʋ mʋ.

english_verse: I thank Christ Jesus our Lord, who has given me the strength for my work because he knew he could trust me.
translation_verse: N sʋ afwaala n sa anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Krisito Yesu, mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sa mɛ ɔlʋn yɛ n waa kusun, nɩɩ o wu mɛ fɛɛ kesintin‐gyipu, nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ mɛ yɛ n ba waa mu kusun mʋ.

english_verse: I used to say terrible and insulting things about him, and I was cruel. But Christ had mercy on me because I didn't know what I was doing, and I had not yet put my faith in him.
translation_verse: Naafɔɔ saŋa kʋ tɔ mʋ, n kyɩna n tɔwɛ n nyita Krisito mʋ, yɛgɛ n nyanla mu abuupu, nɩɩ n biti bamʋ keluu. Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ wu mɛ kʋwɛɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ n man kyɩna n nyi nɩn, nɩɩ n man kyɩna kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii.

english_verse: Christ Jesus our Lord treated me with undeserved grace and has greatly blessed my life with faith and love just like his own.
translation_verse: Anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Krisito bwaala mɛ gaa, nɩɩ ɔ yɛgɛ nɩɩ n kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii, nɩɩ n nyɛ mu kebiti mʋ.

english_verse: “Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners.” This saying is true, and it can be trusted. I was the worst sinner of all!
translation_verse: Katɔwɛ nɩmʋ gyɛ kesintin nɩn, nɩɩ i tiri fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa ɔ kɔɔlɛ ɩmʋ gyii. Asɩn mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, Krisito Yesu ba dulinyaa tɔ nɩn yɛ ɔ ba mɔlɩgɛ alibi awaapʋ, nɩɩ bamʋ tɔ kpini mʋ, mɛ ɩ gyɛ olibilibi mʋ.

english_verse: But since I was worse than anyone else, God had mercy on me and let me be an example of the endless patience of Christ Jesus. He did this so that others would put their faith in Christ and have eternal life.
translation_verse: Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ wu mɛ kʋwɛɛ, saamʋ Krisito Yesu ɩ nyɛ lɛɛ mu kenyiita lala mʋ kaapʋ, kɛ ɩ ba waa sɩnkaala sa asa mʋ nɩɩ bee biti ba ba kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii mʋ kpini, kɛ ba nyɛ nkpa kakpaa.

english_verse: I pray that honor and glory will always be given to the only God, who lives forever and is the invisible and eternal King! Amen.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan yɛgɛ a taa bɛɛrɛɛ yɛ bʋnyaa sa Owura mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɛ kakpaa naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ ɔkaa. Nɩɩ mʋ nkʋn ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ, nɩɩ o mee wu, nɩɩ a mee wu mʋ yɛ ansi. Amen!

english_verse: Timothy, my son, the instructions I am giving you are based on what some prophets once said about you. If you follow these instructions, you will fight like a good soldier.
translation_verse: Mi‐bii Timoti, n sa fʋ falɛ kɔnɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ii buu asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔtɔwɛpʋ wʋla tɔwɛ yɩla lɩɩ fʋ sʋ mʋ. Nɩɩ fʋ kan taa ɩmʋ waa kusun mʋ, fii biti fʋ kɔ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ asɩn mʋ ɩkɔ,

english_verse: You will be faithful and have a clear conscience. Some people have made a mess of their faith because they didn't listen to their consciences.
translation_verse: yɛgɛ fʋ sʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ nɩɩ fʋ bɩɩ fʋ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ yɛ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ fɩɩ waa mʋ ɩ bʋrɔn. Akʋ ba kina ɩnɩmʋ nɩɩ bamʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii i muuri fɛɛ afuu maa muuri ɔkʋlɩ mʋ.

english_verse: Two of them are Hymenaeus and Alexander. I have given these men over to the power of Satan, so they will learn not to oppose God.
translation_verse: Bamʋ tɔ akʋ ɩ gyɛ Himenasu yɛ Alekisanda. N yɛgɛ bamʋ waa Sɩtaanɛ abaa tɔ, kɛ ɩ kaapʋ bamʋ yɛ ba man bɩla tɔwɛ yii Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: First of all, I ask you to pray for everyone. Ask God to help and bless them all, and tell God how thankful you are for each of them.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ, kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ki tiri nɩɩ n kʋlɛ yɛ fan waa mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, fan taa asa asɩn tirisa tʋʋ Ɩbwaarɛ ansi tɔ, kɛ fan kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ, kɛ fan yɩlɛ bamʋ ayaa tɔ kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ sa bamʋ, kɛ fan taa afwaala sa Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: Pray for kings and others in power, so we may live quiet and peaceful lives as we worship and honor God.
translation_verse: Fan kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ sa awura yɛ alʋlʋnpʋ kpini, kɛ a kyɩna keyuula yɛ kayɩɩ‐yuuli tɔ, kɛ a sun Ɩbwaarɛ danbɩrasa, kɛ a kyɩna kakyɩna mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa.

english_verse: This kind of prayer is good, and it pleases God our Savior.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ bʋrɔn, nɩɩ ɩmʋ ii gyii Ɩbwaarɛ anɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ mu ansi,

english_verse: God wants everyone to be saved and to know the whole truth, which is,
translation_verse: nɩɩ mʋ ii biti fɛɛ asa kpini ba nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ kɛ ba ba bɩɩ kesintin mʋ.

english_verse: There is only one God, and Christ Jesus is the only one who can bring us to God. Jesus was truly human, and he gave himself to rescue all of us.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kʋlʋn ɩ bʋ tɔ, nɩɩ ɔsa kʋlʋn ɩ yɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ maa asa nsana, nɩɩ Krisito Yesu ɩ gyɛ kanɩn nyɩmɩsa maŋa,

english_verse: This is why God chose me to be a preacher and an apostle of the good news. I am telling the truth. I am not lying. God sent me to teach the Gentiles about faith and truth.
translation_verse: Kanɩn maŋa sʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mɛ waa asɩn mʋ kabɔɔ yɛ Krisito osunpu. Nɩɩ n gyɛ kesintin yɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ ɔkaapʋpʋ sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ. N tɔwɛ kesintin nɩn, n mɛɛ tɩn antɩŋɛsa.

english_verse: I want everyone everywhere to lift innocent hands toward heaven and pray, without being angry or arguing with each other.
translation_verse: N biti fɛɛ Krisito kʋbʋ kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ mʋ, anyɩn ba kʋsaa bamʋ abaa kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ yɛgɛ agbʋ yɛ kamɔɔrɛ‐gyii man bʋ bamʋ tɔ.

english_verse: I would like for women to wear modest and sensible clothes. They should not have fancy hairdos, or wear expensive clothes, or put on jewelry made of gold or pearls.
translation_verse: N bɩla n biti fɛɛ akyɩɩ mʋ ba bun atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ kʋkwɛ bamʋ, nɩɩ ɩ dagaa, nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ agyaga‐sɩn. Ba man waa bamʋ inyini adawʋ‐adawʋ, nɩɩ ba man taa suwa atɔ abɛɛ agyibi yɛ ataa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ sʋ ɔgyalɩn mʋ bun.

english_verse: Women who claim to love God should do helpful things for others,
translation_verse: Amaa ba taa kɩbaabʋtɔ danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ dagaa fɛɛ akyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ bee sun Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: and they should learn by being quiet and paying attention.
translation_verse: Akyɩɩ ba bun bamʋ nnɔ sʋ bɩya bamʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ bɩɩla atɔ.

english_verse: They should be silent and not be allowed to teach or to tell men what to do.
translation_verse: N man sa ɔkpa yɛ ɔkyɩɩ ɔ kaapʋ abɛɛ ɔ baa ɔ sʋ ɔlʋn ɔnyɩn sʋ, i tiri fɛɛ ɔ waa surum.

english_verse: After all, Adam was created before Eve,
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Adam nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ gyankpaa tʋʋ pɔyɩ nɩɩ ɔ tʋʋ Hawa.

english_verse: and the man Adam wasn't the one who was fooled. It was the woman Eve who was completely fooled and sinned.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ man gyɛ Adam nɩɩ Sɩtaanɛ pɩna, amaa ɔkyɩɩ mʋ, nɩɩ Sɩtaanɛ pɩna nɩɩ o biliŋi alibi ɔwaapʋ.

english_verse: It is true that anyone who desires to be a church official wants to be something worthwhile.
translation_verse: Katɔwɛ nɩmʋ gyɛ kesintin nɩn, yɛ ɔkʋ kan ee biti Krisito kʋbʋ ɔbɩlɩsa kusun mʋ, ee biti kusun kparɛ nɩn.

english_verse: That's why officials must have a good reputation and be faithful in marriage. They must be self-controlled, sensible, well-behaved, friendly to strangers, and able to teach.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ Krisito kʋbʋ ɔbɩlɩsa maa gyɛ nyɩmɩsa mʋ nɩɩ mʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ man sʋ asɩn, nɩɩ o kili ɔkyɩɩ kʋlʋn kpen, nɩɩ mʋ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ dɛ, nɩɩ ɛɛ kɩtaa mʋ n‐yɩɩ, nɩɩ ɔ sʋ bɛɛrɛɛ, nɩɩ ɛɛ kɔɔlɛ afɔ, nɩɩ ɛɛ taalɛ kaapʋ,

english_verse: They must not be heavy drinkers or troublemakers. Instead, they must be kind and gentle and not love money.
translation_verse: nɩɩ ɔ man gyɛ ɔtabʋʋpʋ, abɛɛ o du kirikiri, amaa o du bwahn, yɛgɛ ɔ man gyɛ oluu bitipu abɛɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ mu ansi ɩ payɩ afulee sʋ.

english_verse: Church officials must be in control of their own families, and they must see that their children are obedient and always respectful.
translation_verse: Ɩ dagaa maa taalɛ kɩɩ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa kɩkpaara sʋ danbɩrasa, kɛ ɔ kɩɩ fɛɛ mu‐bii ana bee nu mʋ asɛ nɩɩ bee buu mʋ danbɩrasa.

english_verse: They must not be new followers of the Lord. If they are, they might become proud and be doomed along with the devil.
translation_verse: Ɩ man dagaa maa gyɛ nyɩmɩsa pʋpwɛ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ tɔ, kɛ ɔ ba kaapʋ mʋ n‐yɩɩ kɛ ɔ lɩɩ tɩyɛ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Sɩtaanɛ lɩɩ tɩyɛ nɩɩ ɔ nyɛ kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Finally, they must be well-respected by people who are not followers. Then they won't be trapped and disgraced by the devil. Church Officers
translation_verse: Ɩ dagaa maa gyɛ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Krisito akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu gbaa ba tɩɩ mʋ kɩtɩɩ danbɩrasa, kɛ ɔ man nyɛ tɩyɛ Sɩtaanɛ ɔdʋʋ tɔ kɛ o gyii ipeeli.

english_verse: And they must have a clear conscience and hold firmly to what God has shown us about our faith.
translation_verse: Ɩ dagaa ba maa bɩɩ bamʋ nkɔlɔ tɔ fɛɛ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa mʋ ɩ bʋrɔn Krisito tɔ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii, mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ kesintin asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ kaapʋ mʋ.

english_verse: They must first prove themselves. Then if no one has anything against them, they can serve as officers.
translation_verse: I tiri fɛɛ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ ɔ gyankpaa waa bamʋ kɩɩ, amaa nɩɩ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ kan man sʋ asɩn kʋ mʋ, ba nyɛ waa akyɛtɔpʋ kusun mʋ.

english_verse: Women must also be serious. They must not gossip or be heavy drinkers, and they must be faithful in everything they do.
translation_verse: Kanɩn ɔkpa maŋa sʋ, i tiri fɛɛ bamʋ akyɩɩ ana gbaa ba baa ba sʋ bɛɛrɛɛ, nɩɩ ba man gyɛ akyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ bee nyita asa atɩɩ, amaa bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ dɛ, nɩɩ asa ba kɔɔlɛ bamʋ gyii kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Church officers must be faithful in marriage. They must be in full control of their children and everyone else in their home.
translation_verse: Krisito kʋbʋ ɔkyɛtɔpʋ ɔ baa ɔ gyɛ ɔnyɩn mʋ nɩɩ o kili ɔkyɩɩ kʋlʋn kpen, nɩɩ ɛɛ taalɛ kɩɩ mu‐bii ana yɛ mʋ kɩkpaara sʋ danbɩrasa.

english_verse: Those who serve well as officers will earn a good reputation and will be highly respected for their faith in Christ Jesus. The Mystery of Our Religion
translation_verse: Bamʋ nɩɩ ba waa akyɛtɔpʋ kusun danbɩrasa mʋ, bɛɛ nyɛ bɛɛrɛɛ, nɩɩ bɛɛ taalɛ yɩlɛ kɩnyɩn tɔ tɔwɛ bamʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ Krisito Yesu gyii mʋ.

english_verse: so if I am delayed, you will know how everyone who belongs to God's family ought to behave. After all, the church of the living God is the strong foundation of truth.
translation_verse: saamʋ, nɩɩ n kan n man ba bilen mʋ, fii biti fʋ bɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ asa ba kyɩna Ɩbwaarɛ kɩkpaara sʋ, nɩɩ kɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɛ kakpaa mʋ kʋbʋ mʋ. Kʋbʋ mʋ ɩ sʋ kesintin kenken fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ sabarɛ sʋ lenbu tɔ mʋ.

english_verse: Here is the great mystery of our religion: Christ came as a human. The Spirit proved that he pleased God, and he was seen by angels. Christ was preached to the nations. People in this world put their faith in him, and he was taken up to glory.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ kamɔɔrɛ‐gyii fɛɛ anɛ Krisito kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ, ɩ gyɛ asɩn baalasa kparɛ. Ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, Ɔ lɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ nyɩmɩsa, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ kɔɔlɛ mʋ kyula kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ ba wu mʋ, nɩɩ ba tɔwɛ mʋ asɩn sa dulinyaa asa kpini, nɩɩ asa ba kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa mʋ kyʋn sʋsʋ.

english_verse: God's Spirit clearly says that in the last days many people will turn from their faith. They will be fooled by evil spirits and by teachings that come from demons.
translation_verse: Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ bugi tɔ tɔwɛ yɛ nkɛ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ, akʋ bee biti ba ba yɛgɛ bamʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ, kɛ ba buu n‐yaayu libi antɩŋɛsa mʋ yɛ nbwɩɩ libi kɩkaapʋ mʋ.

english_verse: They will also be fooled by the false claims of liars whose consciences have lost all feeling. These liars
translation_verse: Falɛ kɩkaapʋ mʋ lɩɩ antɩŋɛsa nnɔ nnyɔ‐nnyɔ wuya ana mʋ asɛ nɩn. Bɛɛ kɩɩ ansi bɛɛ tɩŋɛ antɩŋɛsa yɛgɛ bamʋ nkɔlɔ mɛɛ ŋmaa bamʋ.

english_verse: will forbid people to marry or to eat certain foods. But God created these foods to be eaten with thankful hearts by his followers who know the truth.
translation_verse: Ba bɩla bee tii asa ɔkpa fɛɛ ba man kili, kɛ ba man gyii agyitɔ kʋ. Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ tʋʋ falɛ agyitɔ nɩmʋ sa fɛɛ, mʋ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii, nɩɩ be nyi kesintin mʋ, ba kɔɔlɛ ɩmʋ abaa anyɔ kɛ ba taa afwaala sa Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: What God has said and your prayer will make it fit to eat. Paul's Advice to Timothy
translation_verse: Kpalɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn yɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ mʋ lɔŋɔ ɩmʋ sa kigyii. Krisito Yesu kɩyaafɔlɛ danbɩrasa

english_verse: If you teach these things to other followers, you will be a good servant of Christ Jesus. You will show you have grown up on the teachings about our faith and on the good instructions you have obeyed.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fɩɩ kan fɩɩ kaapʋ fʋ‐daa ana yɛ fu‐supu ana falɛ asɩn nɩmʋ mʋ, fii biti fʋ baa fʋ gyɛ Krisito Yesu kɩyaafɔlɛ danbɩrasa, fɛɛ fʋ maa dan kesintin asɩn danbɩrasa kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii yɛ kɩkaapʋ danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ fii buu mʋ.

english_verse: Don't have anything to do with worthless, senseless stories. Work hard to be truly religious.
translation_verse: Lɛɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ asɩrɩkpan ikisii‐sɩn yɛ adɩdaasɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ tɔnɔ, kɛ fʋ yɛgɛ kabwaarɛ‐sun danbɩrasa ɩ dɩn fʋ.

english_verse: We have put our hope in the living God, who is the Savior of everyone, but especially of those who have faith. This is why we work and struggle so hard.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ sʋ an payɩ ansi an sun kusun gaa, lɩɩ fɛɛ an taa anɛ tamaa gyaga Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɛ kakpaa, nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ sa asa kpini mʋ, fɔnfɔn bamʋ nɩɩ ba kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii mʋ.

english_verse: Teach these things and tell everyone to do what you say.
translation_verse: Kaapʋ bamʋ atɔ nɩmʋ, kɛ fʋ yɩlɛ bamʋ sʋ fɛɛ ba buu ɩmʋ.

english_verse: Don't let anyone make fun of you, just because you are young. Set an example for other followers by what you say and do, as well as by your love, faith, and purity.
translation_verse: Man yɛgɛ ɔkʋ ɔ kɩɩ fʋ fɛɛrɛ fɛɛ fʋ maa gyɛ kebii sʋ. Amaa yɛgɛ fʋ katɔwɛ, yɛ fʋ kɩbaabʋtɔ, yɛ fu kebiti, yɛ fʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii, yɛ fʋ kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ kakyɩna mʋ ɩ waa asɩn kaalasa sa akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ.

english_verse: Until I arrive, be sure to keep on reading the Scriptures in worship, and don't stop preaching and teaching.
translation_verse: Pɔyɩ kɛ n ba mʋ, taa fʋ n‐yɩɩ sa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ kɩkaragɛ sakyɔ tɔ, kɛ fʋ tɔwɛ abwaarɛsɩn, kɛ fʋ kaapʋ ɩmʋ.

english_verse: Use the gift you were given when the prophets spoke and the group of church leaders blessed you by placing their hands on you.
translation_verse: Man kan kina fʋ kakɛɛ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla kɩlɛɛkaapʋ asɩn mʋ sʋ sa fʋ, saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Krisito kʋbʋ abɩlɩsa ba taa abaa gyaga fʋ sʋ kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ sa fʋ mʋ.

english_verse: Remember these things and think about them, so everyone can see how well you are doing.
translation_verse: Kɩta ɩmʋ tɔ kɛ fʋ taa fʋ n‐yɩɩ kpini sa ɩmʋ kɩwaa tɔ, kɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ o wu kanan mʋ nɩɩ fii kpee ansi tɔ fʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ.

english_verse: Be careful about the way you live and about what you teach. Keep on doing this, and you will save not only yourself, but the people who hear you.
translation_verse: Baa fʋ da fʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ yɛ fʋ Abwaarɛsɩn kɩkaapʋ mʋ sʋ. Baa fʋ maa sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ nɩɩ fʋ kan waa kanɩn mʋ, fii biti fʋ mɔlɩgɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bee nu fʋ asɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Don't correct an older man. Encourage him, as you would your own father. Treat younger men as you would your own brother,
translation_verse: Man kan tɔwɛ yii kɩnyɩn‐bɩlɩsa, amaa tɔwɛ waa mʋ fɛɛ maa gyɛ fʋ‐sɛ. Tɔwɛ waa ayaafɔlɛ mʋ fɛɛ ba maa gyɛ fʋ‐daa ana yɛ fu‐supu ana.

english_verse: and treat older women as you would your own mother. Show the same respect to younger women that you would to your sister.
translation_verse: Kɛ fʋ tɔwɛ waa akyɩɩ‐nyi mʋ fɛɛ fu‐nyi ana, kɛ fʋ tɔwɛ waa nbitebii mʋ fɛɛ fʋ‐pɩɩkyɩɩ ana yɛgɛ agyaga‐sɩn nfɛɛrɛ kʋ man tii sʋ.

english_verse: Take care of any widow who is really in need.
translation_verse: Taa bɛɛrɛɛ sa akulapu‐kyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ba tɛ bamʋ abaa sʋ, kɛ fʋ kɩɩ bamʋ sʋ.

english_verse: But if a widow has children or grandchildren, they should learn to serve God by taking care of her, as she once took care of them. This is what God wants them to do.
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ okulapu‐kyɩɩ kan ɔ sʋ nbii abɛɛ anaana‐bii mʋ, i tiri fɛɛ nbii mʋ ba kaapʋ bamʋ kabwaarɛ‐sun mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ tɔwɛ yɛ ba kɩɩ bamʋ gbaa‐gbaa akpaara sʋ asa sʋ mʋ. Saamʋ, bamʋ awaasa mʋ, ɩɩ tɛɛla bamʋ akʋʋgɛpʋ yɛ bamʋ naana ana mʋ. Ɩnɩmʋ ɩɩ bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ ansi.

english_verse: A widow who is really in need is one who doesn't have any relatives. She has faith in God, and she keeps praying to him night and day, asking for his help.
translation_verse: Okulapu‐kyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɛ mʋ kɩbaa sʋ, nɩɩ ɔ man sʋ ɔkɩɩsʋpʋ mʋ, ɛɛ taa mʋ tamaa gyaga Ɩbwaarɛ sʋ nɩn, nɩɩ ɛɛ kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ kakyʋwapɛ yɛ kagyanbwɛ, ɛɛ kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ ɔ kyɛ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: A widow who thinks only about having a good time is already dead, even though she is still alive.
translation_verse: Amaa Okulapu‐kyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ sa kensi kigyii mʋ, ɔ tɛ nkpa tɔ bɩrɛ, yɛgɛ o du fɛɛ maa wu nɩn.

english_verse: Tell all this to everyone, so they will do the right thing.
translation_verse: Tɔwɛ falɛ asɩn nɩmʋ sa Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ, kɛ asa ba man nyɛ tɔwɛ asɩn akʋ yii bamʋ.

english_verse: People who don't take care of their relatives, and especially their own families, have given up their faith. They are worse than someone who doesn't have faith in the Lord.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man kan kɩɩ mʋ kʋʋpʋ ana sʋ, fɔnfɔn mʋ kɩkpaara sʋ asa sʋ mʋ, o kina kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ, nɩɩ mu alibi ɩ kyɔ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba man kɔɔlɛ Yesu Krisito gyii mʋ gbaa.

english_verse: She must also be well-known for doing all sorts of good things, such as raising children, giving food to strangers, welcoming God's people into her home, helping people in need, and always making herself useful.
translation_verse: nɩɩ asa be nyi mʋ adanbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa, fɛɛ ɛɛ bɩla mu‐bii ana danbɩrasa, nɩɩ ɛɛ kɩtaa afɔ, nɩɩ ɛɛ bɩya mʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ ɛɛ kyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asa tɔ, nɩɩ ɛɛ kyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bee wu awʋrʋfɔ mʋ tɔ, nɩɩ ɛɛ taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ sa adanbɩrasa kʋmaa nɩmʋ kɩwaa.

english_verse: Don't put young widows on the list. They may later have a strong desire to get married. Then they will turn away from Christ
translation_verse: Man kan taa akulapu‐kyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ba man pɩɩ bɩlɛ mʋ atɩɩ tii akulapu atɩɩ mʋ sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ nɩɩ ɩ kan ba fɛɛ bamʋ kayalaga gyan kekili sʋ ɩ kyɔ kɩyɛgɛ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ sa Krisito mʋ,

english_verse: and become guilty of breaking their promise to him.
translation_verse: bee biti ba gyii kʋpwɛ lɩɩ bamʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ kɩda gyankpaasa sa Krisito mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Besides, they will become lazy and get into the habit of going from house to house. Next, they will start gossiping and become busybodies, talking about things that are none of their business.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ kamaa mʋ bee biti ba biliŋi awʋlɛgyɔpʋ, yɛgɛ ba naa ba naa asa akpaara sʋ. Nɩɩ man gyɛ ɩmʋ nkʋn, ba naa bee kuli asa, yɛgɛ bee loo asa asɩn tɔ, nɩɩ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man dagaa nɩɩ bɛɛ tɔwɛ.

english_verse: I would prefer that young widows get married, have children, and look after their families. Then the enemy won't have any reason to say insulting things about us.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ n biti fɛɛ akulapu‐kyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ba man pɩɩ bɩlɛ mʋ ba kili, kɛ ba kʋʋgɛ nbii kɛ ba kɩɩ bamʋ akpaara sʋ, saamʋ, ɔdʋn mʋ mɛɛ nyɛ‐nyɛ ɔkpa tɔwɛ asɩn libi kʋ lɩɩ anɛ sʋ.

english_verse: Look what's already happened to some of the young widows! They have turned away to follow Satan.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ akulapu‐kyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ba man pɩɩ bɩlɛ mʋ, akʋ be tee bee buu Sɩtaanɛ ɩkpa.

english_verse: If a woman who is a follower has any widows in her family, she should help them. This will keep the church from having that burden, and then the church can help widows who are really in need. Church Leaders
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkyɩɩ‐kɔɔlɛ‐gyipu kʋ kan ɔ sʋ akulapu‐kyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ba gyɛ mʋ kʋʋpʋ ana mʋ, ɩ dagaa maa kyɛ bamʋ tɔ kɛ ɩ man waa kasʋla sa Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ, saamʋ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ ɩ nyɛ kyɛ akulapu‐kyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ i tiri bamʋ mʋ tɔ. Kɩtɔwɛ waa Krisito kʋbʋ abɩlɩsa mʋ

english_verse: Church leaders who do their job well deserve to be paid twice as much, especially if they work hard at preaching and teaching.
translation_verse: Krisito kʋbʋ abɩlɩsa mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kɩɩ kʋbʋ mʋ asɩn kyɛɛkyɛɛ sʋ mʋ, bɛɛrɛɛ yɛ kʋkɔka dagaa sa bamʋ ɩlɩɩ ɩnyɔ, fɔnfɔn bamʋ nɩɩ bee sun abwaarɛsɩn katɔwɛ yɛ ɩmʋ kɩkaapʋ mʋ.

english_verse: It is just as the Scriptures say, “Don't muzzle an ox when you are using it to grind grain.” You also know the saying, “Workers are worth their pay.”
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ba kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Ɩ man dagaa ba ŋmina naatɛ kɔnɔ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa kusun agyitɔ opula mʋ.” Nɩɩ ba bɩla kyʋrɔɔ katɩn kʋ yɛ, “Kusun ɔwaapʋ mʋ dagaa mʋ kʋkɔka.”

english_verse: Don't listen to any charge against a church leader, unless at least two or three people bring the same charges.
translation_verse: Man kan kɔɔlɛ alibi mʋ nɩɩ ɔkʋ ba tɔwɛ fʋ lɩɩ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ ɔbɩlɩsa kʋ sʋ gyii, amɔɔ ba waa asa anyɔ abɛɛ asa.

english_verse: But if any of the leaders should keep on sinning, they must be corrected in front of the whole group, as a warning to everyone else.
translation_verse: Bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa alibi mʋ, tɔwɛ yii bamʋ Krisito kʋbʋ mu ansi tɔ kɛ ɩ waa asansa mʋ kufuu.

english_verse: In the presence of God and Christ Jesus and their chosen angels, I order you to follow my instructions! Be fair with everyone, and don't have any favorites.
translation_verse: N yɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ Krisito Yesu, yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ mu ansi tɔ, n tɔwɛ fʋ yɛ, fu buu nnɔsa ɩnɩmʋ, yɛgɛ fʋ man yɩlɛ ɔkʋ kamaa abɛɛ fʋ sʋ nmɛɛgɛ tɔ lɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Don't be too quick to accept people into the service of the Lord by placing your hands on them. Don't sin because others do, but stay close to God.
translation_verse: Man kan kpaala taa fʋ abaa gyaga asa sʋ waa bamʋ abɩlɩsa kabwaarɛ‐sun mʋ tɔ, kɛ fʋ man kan taa fʋ n‐yɩɩ loo akʋ alibi tɔ. Kɩta fʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ ineesi sʋ.

english_verse: Stop drinking only water. Take a little wine to help your stomach trouble and the other illnesses you often have.
translation_verse: Man bɩla nuu nkyu nkʋn, baa fii nuu nta gbɛrɛɛ, kpalɩ fɛɛ fʋ ɔtɔ tɔ maa taalɛ ɩɩ kɔ fʋ yɛ fʋ alɔ wuribi mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: Some people get caught in their sins almost at once, even before the time of judgment. But other people's sins don't show up until later.
translation_verse: Asa akʋ alibi ɩ dan lɩɩ ifuli nɩn, nɩɩ ɩɩ gyankpaa bamʋ ii kpee Ɩbwaarɛ kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ mʋ tɔ. Akʋ lɛɛ mɔɔ kamaa tɔ nɩɩ ii biti ɩ ba lɩɩ ifuli.

english_verse: It is the same with good deeds. Some are easily seen, but none of them can be hidden.
translation_verse: Ɔkpa kʋlʋn maŋa sʋ, nɩɩ akʋ kɩdanbɩrasa kɩwaa ii biti ɩ lɩɩ ifuli. Nɩɩ halɩɩ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ mɛɛ lɩɩ ifuli gbaa mʋ ɩ mɛɛ taalɛ baala.

english_verse: If you are a slave, you should respect and honor your owner. This will keep people from saying bad things about God and about our teaching.
translation_verse: Anyɛ mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ bamʋ‐nyɩrɩpɛ ana kasɛ mʋ kpini, i tiri fɛɛ ba maa taa bɛɛrɛɛ sa bamʋ‐nyɩrɩpɛ ana, kɛ asa ba man nyɛ ɔkpa tɔwɛ asɩn libi kʋ yii Ɩbwaarɛ kɩtɩɩ abɛɛ anɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ an kaapʋ mʋ.

english_verse: If any of you slaves have owners who are followers, you should show them respect. After all, they are also followers of Christ, and he loves them. So you should serve and help them the best you can. False Teaching and True Wealth These are the things you must teach and tell the people to do.
translation_verse: Anyɛ mʋ nɩɩ bamʋ‐nyɩrɩpɛ ana ba gyɛ akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ, ba man kɔɔgɛ bɛɛrɛɛ mʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ sa bamʋ mʋ sʋ, fɛɛ ba maa bamʋ ba maa gyɛ kʋkʋlʋn Krisito tɔ mʋ sʋ. Amaa ɩ dagaa fɛɛ ba sun bamʋ kɔkɔlɔ fuuli tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ anyɩrɩpɛ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ nyɛ tɔnɔ bɛɛ lɩɩ anyɛ mʋ kusun tɔ mʋ, ba gyɛ akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu nɩɩ anyɛ mʋ ba sʋ kebiti sa bamʋ. Falɛ asɩn nɩmʋ i tiri fɛɛ fʋ kaapʋ bamʋ, kɛ fʋ waa bamʋ aniya tɔ kɛ ba buu ɩmʋ. Kefulee biti bansa

english_verse: Anyone who teaches something different disagrees with the correct and godly teaching of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kaapʋ asɩn pʋpwɛ, nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ kɔɔlɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kesintin asɩn mʋ, yɛ anɛ kabwaarɛ‐sun kɩkaapʋ ee gyii mʋ,

english_verse: Those people who disagree are proud of themselves, but they don't really know a thing. Their minds are sick, and they like to argue over words. They cause jealousy, disagreements, unkind words, evil suspicions,
translation_verse: ɔ gyɛ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kʋsaa mʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋsʋ yɛgɛ ɔ man nyi sɛhn. Kanɩn ɔsa maŋa sʋ ɩmɔɔrɛ‐libi yɛ nluu kʋkɔ lɩɩ asɩn sʋ, nɩɩ ɩmʋ ɩɩ bɩya kayɩɩ basa yɛ nbarɩgɛ tɔ yɛ asebi yɛ nfɛɛrɛ libi kɩfɛ.

english_verse: and nasty quarrels. They have wicked minds and have missed out on the truth. These people think religion is supposed to make you rich.
translation_verse: Ɔsa maŋa ii gyii ɩmɔɔrɛ nɩn fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ i nyita, nɩɩ ba man bɩla ba sʋ kesintin asɩn mʋ, bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ kabwaarɛ‐sun ɩ gyɛ ɔkpa mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ bɔla sʋ nyɛ afulee.

english_verse: And religion does make your life rich, by making you content with what you have.
translation_verse: Amaa kabwaarɛ‐sun danbɩrasa sʋ tɔnɔ gaa, nɩɩ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ an sʋ mʋ ɩ kan kʋkwɛ anɛ mʋ.

english_verse: We didn't bring anything into this world, and we won't take anything with us when we leave.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ a man bɩya sɛhn dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ, nɩɩ a mɛɛ taalɛ taa sɛhn lɩɩ kɩmʋ tɔ.

english_verse: So we should be satisfied just to have food and clothes.
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ an kan an sʋ agyitɔ yɛ atɔ bunsa mʋ, a yɛgɛ ɩ kʋkwɛ anɛ.

english_verse: People who want to be rich fall into all sorts of temptations and traps. They are caught by foolish and harmful desires that drag them down and destroy them.
translation_verse: Asa mʋ nɩɩ bee biti ba waa atɔ wuya ana mʋ, bɛɛ tɩyɛ kʋtʋʋ tɔ kɩɩ tɔ yɛ ɔdʋʋ tɔ, kɛ be loo kimelensi yɛ kayalaga libi‐libi gaalaagaa tɔ, kɛ ɩ bɩɩtɛ bamʋ muuri kɛ ba wu nyita.

english_verse: The love of money causes all kinds of trouble. Some people want money so much they have given up their faith and caused themselves a lot of pain. Fighting a Good Fight for the Faith
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ kefulee biti gaa gyɛ alibi kʋmaa nɩmʋ ɔlɩɩkpa nɩn. Akʋ ba maa biti afulee kɩbansa sʋ mʋ, ba fɔyɩ lɩɩ bamʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ, nɩɩ i yii bamʋ nkɔlɔ tɔ fɛɛ deebi. Pɔɔlɩ katɔwɛ laalaalʋwɛ sa Timoti

english_verse: Timothy, you belong to God, so keep away from all these evil things. Try your best to please God and to be like him. Be faithful, loving, dependable, and gentle.
translation_verse: Amaa fʋ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nyɩmɩsa nɩn, ɩmʋ sʋ lɛɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ falɛ atɔ nɩmʋ kpini tɔ, kɛ fʋ kɔ biti ɩkpa kikyiigi yɛ kabwaarɛ‐sun danbɩrasa yɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii yɛ kebiti yɛ kenyiita yɛ bwahn kɩwaa.

english_verse: Fight a good fight for the faith and claim eternal life. God offered it to you when you clearly told about your faith, while so many people listened.
translation_verse: Kɔ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii keluu danbɩrasa mʋ, kɛ fʋ nyɛ nkpa kakpaa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɩɩ fʋ ba waa kɩmʋ tɔ, saŋa mʋ nɩɩ fu bugi fʋ kɔnɔ tɔwɛ fʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sakyɔ tɔ, nɩɩ ba nu mʋ.

english_verse: Now I ask you to make a promise. Make it in the presence of God, who gives life to all, and in the presence of Christ Jesus, who openly told Pontius Pilate about his faith.
translation_verse: N yɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ sa kʋtɔ kʋmaa nkpa mʋ, maa Yesu Krisito mʋ nɩɩ o bugi mʋ kɔnɔ tɔwɛ kesintin asɩn mʋ sa Pontu Paleti mu ansi tɔ mʋ, n tɔwɛ fʋ yɛ,

english_verse: Promise to obey completely and fully all that you have been told until our Lord Jesus Christ returns.
translation_verse: fu buu nnɔsa nɩmʋ, kɛ fʋ kɩtaa ɩmʋ kyɛɛkyɛɛ, naa fʋʋ kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito ii biti ɔ ba mʋ.

english_verse: The glorious God is the only Ruler, the King of kings and Lord of lords. At the time that God has already decided, he will send Jesus Christ back again.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ayenbi ɩ gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ, nɩɩ mʋ nkʋn ɩ gyɛ Ɔlʋlʋnpʋ, yɛ awura tɔ Owura, yɛ anyɩrɩpɛ mʋ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, mʋ ii biti ɔ yɛgɛ Krisito Yesu kibwii ba mʋ kɩ ba tɔ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ saŋa mʋ.

english_verse: Only God lives forever! And he lives in light that no one can come near. No human has ever seen God or ever can see him. God will be honored, and his power will last forever. Amen.
