translation_verse: Mʋ nkʋn ɩ gyɛ Ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ tɔ kakpaa, nɩɩ ɔ man bʋ tɔ o wu kakaakʋ, nɩɩ mʋ ɔ tɛ ɩŋmaŋɛsa mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ ŋalɩgɛ nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa kʋ mɛɛ taalɛ tiri mʋ tɔ, nɩɩ ɔkʋ man pɩɩta wu mʋ, nɩɩ ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ wu mʋ. Bʋnyaa yɛ ɔlʋn ɩ gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ kakpaa Amen.

english_verse: Warn the rich people of this world not to be proud or to trust in wealth that is easily lost. Tell them to have faith in God, who is rich and blesses us with everything we need to enjoy life.
translation_verse: Tɔwɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ atɔ mʋ fɛɛ, ba man ba bɛɛ kɩɩ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ abɛɛ ba taa bamʋ tamaa gyaga bamʋ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ taalɛ fɔyɩ mʋ sʋ. Amaa ba taa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ tʋʋ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ sa anɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ an nyɛ falɛ, nɩɩ ɩɩ waa anɛ ɔkɔn mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: Instruct them to do as many good deeds as they can and to help everyone. Remind the rich to be generous and share what they have.
translation_verse: Tɔwɛ bamʋ fɛɛ ba waa kɩdanbɩrasa kɛ bamʋ awaasa ɩ baa ɩ bʋrɔn gaa, kɛ ba lɛɛ bamʋ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ mʋ tɔ kyɛ abaa tɔ.

english_verse: This will lay a solid foundation for the future, so they will know what true life is like.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba kan waa kanɩn mʋ, ii biti ɩ waa fɛɛ bɛɛ kʋʋla atɔ bɛɛ yɩla bɛɛ sa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋsʋ nɩn. Saamʋ, bee biti ba nyɛ nkpa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ kesintin nkpa mʋ.

english_verse: Timothy, guard what God has placed in your care! Don't pay any attention to godless and stupid talk that sounds smart but really isn't.
translation_verse: Timoti kɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa waa fʋ kɩbaa tɔ mʋ sʋ danbɩrasa. Lɛɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ ntɔwɛ kɩyan yɛ ɩmɔɔrɛ‐gyaga mʋ nɩɩ akʋ bɛɛ tɩɩ yɛ kinyi mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Some people have even lost their faith by believing this talk. I pray that the Lord will be kind to all of you!
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ nɩɩ akʋ bɛɛ kaapʋ fɛɛ ba sʋ, nɩɩ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ ba fɔyɩ bamʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ. Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala kɩ baa kɩ bʋ fanɛ asɛ.

english_verse: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus. God himself chose me to be an apostle, and he gave me the promised life that Jesus Christ makes possible.
translation_verse: Mɛ, Pɔɔlɩ mʋ nɩɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti sʋ nɩɩ n ba waa Krisito Yesu osunpu, nɩɩ o sun mɛ yɛ n tɔwɛ Nkpa asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ yɩla, nɩɩ an nyɛ lɩɩ kʋkʋlʋn kɩwaa yɛ Krisito Yesu mʋ.

english_verse: Timothy, you are like a dear child to me. I pray that God our Father and our Lord Christ Jesus will be kind and merciful to you and will bless you with peace! Do Not Be Ashamed of the Lord
translation_verse: N kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ n sa fʋ, mi‐bii bitisa Timoti. Anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Krisito Yesu kabwaala yɛ kʋwɛɛ kuwu yɛ keyuula ɩ baa ɩ bʋ fʋ asɛ. Pɔɔlɩ tɔwɛ waa Timoti

english_verse: Night and day I mention you in my prayers. I am always grateful for you, as I pray to the God my ancestors and I have served with a clear conscience.
translation_verse: N fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ n sun mʋ yɛgɛ n man sʋ alibi akʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ mɛ naana ana ba daa sun mʋ mʋ. Saŋa kʋmaa n nyiŋi fʋ sʋ mɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ tɔ kagyanbwɛ yɛ kakyʋwapɛ.

english_verse: I remember how you cried, and I want to see you, because this would make me truly happy.
translation_verse: N nyiŋi fʋ ansikyu mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ ɩ bʋ mɛ tɔ gaa fɛɛ n wu fʋ, saamʋ mɛ kɔkɔlɔ ɩ nyɛ fuuli mɛ.

english_verse: I also remember the genuine faith of your mother Eunice. Your grandmother Lois had the same sort of faith, and I am sure you have it as well.
translation_verse: N nyiŋi fʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kesintin mʋ nɩɩ fʋ sʋ, nɩɩ fʋ naana‐kyɩɩsa Lowisi yɛ fu‐nyi Yunisi gbaa ba nyɛ mʋ. Nɩɩ n nyi kesintin fɛɛ kanɩn nɩɩ ngbaa fʋ sʋ.

english_verse: So I ask you to make full use of the gift God gave you when I placed my hands on you. Use it well.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ falɛ sʋ mʋ, n nyiŋi fʋ fɛɛ, nin fʋlɔn waa Ɩbwaarɛ kakɛɛ, mʋ nɩɩ n kyɩna taa mɛ abaa gyaga fʋ sʋ, nɩɩ fʋ nyɛ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Don't be ashamed to speak for our Lord. And don't be ashamed of me, just because I am in jail for serving him. Use the power that comes from God and join with me in suffering for telling the good news.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɩ́ man waa fʋ ipeeli fɛɛ, fʋ maa tɔwɛ kesintin asɩn lɩɩ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ mʋ sʋ, abɛɛ ɩ́ waa fʋ ipeeli lɩɩ mɛ sʋ fɛɛ ba maa tii mɛ obu. Amaa fʋ gbaa fu gyii awʋrʋfɔ sa asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ, lɩɩ ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa sa fʋ mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: God saved us and chose us to be his holy people. We did nothing to deserve this, but God planned it because he is so kind. Even before time began God planned for Christ Jesus to show kindness to us.
translation_verse: Mʋ ɩ mɔlɩgɛ anɛ, nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ anɛ ba waa mʋ gbaa‐gbaa asa, nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ yɛ an waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋrɔn sʋ, amaa lɩɩ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mu kiŋmina yɩla yɛ mʋ kabwaala sʋ. Nɩɩ Krisito Yesu sʋ nɩɩ ɔ bɔla taa kabwaala nɩmʋ bwaala anɛ pɔyɩ nɩɩ ɔ tʋʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ.

english_verse: Now Christ Jesus has come to offer us God's gift of undeserved grace. Christ our Savior defeated death and brought us the good news. It shines like a light and offers life that never ends.
translation_verse: Amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ ɔ bɔla anɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ Krisito Yesu kɩba mʋ sʋ ba lɛɛ kabwaala nɩmʋ kaapʋ anɛ, nɩɩ ɔ bɔla asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ sʋ nyita lewu ɔlʋn mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ nkpa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ man sʋ ɔkaa mʋ ifuli.

english_verse: My work is to be a preacher, an apostle, and a teacher.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mɛ waa Krisito osunpu yɛ ɔkaapʋpʋ yɛ asɩn danbɩrasa nɩmʋ ɔtɔwɛpʋ.

english_verse: This is why I am suffering now. But I am not ashamed! I know the one I have faith in, and I am sure he can guard until the last day what he has trusted me with.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ nɩɩ n gyii ɩnɩmʋ awʋrʋfɔ falɛ. Amaa ɩ man sʋ mɛ ipeeli, lɩɩ fɛɛ n nyi ɔmʋ nɩɩ n kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii, nɩɩ n nyi kesintin tɔ fɛɛ ɛɛ taalɛ kun kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ n taa waa mʋ abaa tɔ naa fʋʋ mʋ kakɛ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Now follow the example of the correct teaching I gave you, and let the faith and love of Christ Jesus be your model.
translation_verse: Timoti, kɩtaa kesintin asɩn kaapʋsa mʋ nɩɩ fʋ nyɛ lɩɩ mɛ asɛ mʋ kenken, kɛ fu buu ɩmʋ, yɛgɛ fʋ sʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii yɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ lɩɩ Krisito Yesu sʋ an nyɛ mʋ.

english_verse: You have been trusted with a wonderful treasure. Guard it with the help of the Holy Spirit, who lives within us.
translation_verse: Bɔla Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ anɛ tɔ mʋ sʋ, kun asɩn kparɛ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa waa fʋ abaa tɔ mʋ.

english_verse: You know that everyone in Asia has turned against me, especially Phygelus and Hermogenes.
translation_verse: Fu nyi fɛɛ anɛ bɩrɩsa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ Asiya ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ mʋ kpini, ba sɩlɛ yɛgɛ mɛ, nɩɩ Figelusi maa Hemogene gbaa ba tii sʋ.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will be kind to the family of Onesiphorus. He often cheered me up and wasn't ashamed of me when I was put in jail.
translation_verse: N kʋlɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ fɛɛ o wu Onesiforu kɩkpaara sʋ abi kpini kʋwɛɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ saŋa kʋmaa ɛɛ yɛgɛ mɛ kɔkɔlɔ kii fuuli mɛ. Nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ mʋ ipeeli fɛɛ ba tii mɛ obu gbaa.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord Jesus will ask God to show mercy to Onesiphorus on the day of judgment. You know how much he helped me in Ephesus.
translation_verse: Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ o wu mʋ kʋwɛɛ mʋ kakɛ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ. Fu nyi danbɩrasa kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kyɛ mɛ tɔ ɩkpa gaalaagaa sʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n bʋ Efeso kadɛ tɔ mʋ.

english_verse: Timothy, my child, you must let Christ Jesus make you strong by his gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ mi‐bii, bɔla kabwaala mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ Krisito Yesu tɔ mʋ nyɛ ɔlʋn.

english_verse: You have often heard me teach. Now I want you to tell these same things to followers who can be trusted to tell others.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ asɩn kaapʋsa mʋ nɩɩ fu nu lɩɩ mɛ asɛ sakyɔ ansi tɔ mʋ, taa ɩmʋ waa asa mʋ nɩɩ fʋ kɔɔlɛ bamʋ gyii mʋ abaa tɔ, kɛ ngbaa bamʋ bɛ taalɛ taa kaapʋ akʋ gbaa.

english_verse: As a good soldier of Christ Jesus you must endure your share of suffering.
translation_verse: Yɩlɛ tɔ gyii awʋrʋfɔ yɛ anɛ, fɛɛ Krisito Yesu ɔnaakɔpʋ danbɩrasa.

english_verse: And farmers who work hard are the first to eat what grows in their field.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ onsi‐payɩ ɔdɔɔpʋ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa kusun mʋ, ɩ dagaa maa gyankpaa gyii lɩɩ kʋdɔɔ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: If you keep in mind what I have told you, the Lord will help you understand completely.
translation_verse: Fɛ nfɛɛrɛ lɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ falɛ sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ ii biti ɔ yɛgɛ fʋ taalɛ nu atɔ nɩmʋ kpini kasɛ.

english_verse: Keep your mind on Jesus Christ! He was from the family of David and was raised from death, just as my good news says.
translation_verse: Nyiŋi Yesu Krisito mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɩɩ owura Dawidi kanan tɔ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kyiŋi mʋ lɩɩ lewu tɔ mʋ. Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ mʋ,

english_verse: And because of this message, I am locked up in jail and treated like a criminal. But God's good news isn't locked in jail,
translation_verse: nɩɩ n gyii ɩmʋ awʋrʋfɔ falɛ, halɩɩ ba taa agbeeleebi ŋmina mɛ fɛɛ maa gyɛ alibi ɔwaapʋ. Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn mʋ bɩrɛ, ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ taa agbeeleebi ŋmina ɩmʋ.

english_verse: and so I am willing to put up with anything. Then God's special people will be saved and given eternal glory because they belong to Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ n yɩlɛ tɔ gyii awʋrʋfɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ, lɩɩ asa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ yɩla mʋ sʋ, kɛ ngbaa bamʋ ba bɔla Krisito Yesu sʋ nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ yɛ bʋnyaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ man sʋ ɔkaa mʋ.

english_verse: Here is a true message: “If we died with Christ, we will live with him.
translation_verse: Katɔwɛ nɩmʋ gyɛ kesintin nɩn, nɩɩ an kan wu yɛ mʋ bɩrɛ, an biti a kyɩna nkpa tɔ yɛ mʋ.

english_verse: If we don't give up, we will rule with him. If we deny that we know him, he will deny that he knows us.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ an kan yɩlɛ tɔ gyii awʋrʋfɔ bɩrɛ, an biti i gyii kuwura yɛ mʋ. Nɩɩ an kan kina mʋ bɩrɛ, ngbaa mʋ ii biti o kina anɛ.

english_verse: If we are not faithful, he will still be faithful. Christ cannot deny who he is.” An Approved Worker
translation_verse: Nɩɩ an man kan kɔɔlɛ gyii mʋ, mɛɛ mʋ bɩrɛ ɔ san ee gyii mʋ asɩn sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ mɛɛ tɔwɛ asɩn, nɩɩ ɛɛ lɩɩ ɩmʋ kamaa. Osunsunpu mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ ansi

english_verse: Don't let anyone forget these things. And with God as your witness, you must warn them not to argue about words. These arguments don't help anyone. In fact, they ruin everyone who listens to them.
translation_verse: Kyaga sʋ nyiŋi bamʋ falɛ atɔ nɩmʋ sʋ. Yɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩtɩɩ tɔ da bamʋ amu tɔ lɩɩ ntɔwɛ sʋ kamɔɔrɛ‐gyii, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩ man sʋ kyaarɛ, amɔɔ ii nyita bamʋ nɩɩ bee nu ɩmʋ mʋ nɩn.

english_verse: Do your best to win God's approval as a worker who doesn't need to be ashamed and who teaches only the true message.
translation_verse: Kpan fʋ n‐yɩɩ kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ o wu fʋ fɛɛ fʋ dagaa, nɩɩ fʋ gyɛ kusun osunpu mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man dagaa maa sʋ ipeeli mu kusun mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ o nyi Ɩbwaarɛ kesintin asɩn mʋ kɩkaapʋ kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

english_verse: Keep away from worthless and useless talk. It only leads people farther away from God.
translation_verse: Lɛɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ aligyima mʋ nɩɩ ɩ mɛɛ bʋnyaa Ɩbwaarɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa ɩmʋ mʋ, ɩɩ bɩɩtɛ bamʋ ɩɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ gaa.

english_verse: That sort of talk is like a sore that won't heal. And Hymenaeus and Philetus have been talking this way
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kanɩn asa mʋ kɩkaapʋ ɩɩ yɛlɩgɛ fɛɛ kɩtamɛɛ. Anyɩn anyɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba tii bamʋ sʋ ɩ gyɛ Himenasu maa Filetusi.

english_verse: by teaching that the dead have already been raised to life. This is far from the truth, and it is destroying the faith of some people.
translation_verse: Ba fɔyɩ kesintin asɩn mʋ ɔkpa, nɩɩ bɛɛ kaapʋ yɛ, asa kikyiŋi lɩɩ lewu tɔ mʋ tɛɛ wʋla ba kyʋn, nɩɩ kɩkaapʋ nɩmʋ ii nyita akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ akʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii.

english_verse: But the foundation God has laid is solid. On it is written, “The Lord knows who his people are. So everyone who worships the Lord must turn away from evil.”
translation_verse: Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn du nɩn fɛɛ ɔpɔrɛ gyankpaasa mʋ nɩɩ o yii mʋ, nɩɩ ɩ yɩlɛ gin, nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ asɩn nɩmʋ ba gyaga kɩmʋ sʋ yɛ, “Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nyi bamʋ nɩɩ ba gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ,” nɩɩ ba bɩla kyʋrɔɔ yɛ, “Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ ɔ gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ lɛɛ mʋ, dagaa maa yɛgɛ alibi kɩwaa.”

english_verse: In a large house some dishes are made of gold or silver, while others are made of wood or clay. Some of these are special, and others are not.
translation_verse: Kɩkpaara lala sʋ mʋ, atɔ mʋ nɩɩ bee gyii bee nu ɩmʋ tɔ kʋkwɩɩ‐kʋkwɩɩ ɩ bʋ tɔ. Ba taa suwa abɛɛ gbiti waa ɩkʋ, nɩɩ ba taa iyu abɛɛ kabɔlɛ waa ɩmʋ ɩkʋ mɔɔ. Ɩmʋ ɩkʋ ɩ dɛ sa nkɛ kparɛ kigyii, nɩɩ ɩkʋ mɔɔ ɩ man dɛ sa nkɛ kparɛ kʋ.

english_verse: This is also how it is with people. The ones who stop doing evil and make themselves pure will become special. Their lives will be holy and pleasing to their Master, and they will be able to do all kinds of good deeds.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan lɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ alibi kɩwaa tɔ mʋ, ee biti ɔ baa ɔ dɛ sa nkɛ kparɛ kigyii mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ ba waa kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ, nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kyaarɛ sa mʋ ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ kʋʋla mʋ n‐yɩɩ yɩla sa kusun danbɩrasa kʋmaa nɩmʋ.

english_verse: Run from temptations that capture young people. Always do the right thing. Be faithful, loving, and easy to get along with. Worship with people whose hearts are pure.
translation_verse: Amaa lɛɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ ayaafɔlɛ‐sɩn kayalaga libi tɔ, kɛ fʋ taa fu ansi gyaga ɩkpa kikyiigi yɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii yɛ kebiti yɛ kayɩɩ yuuli sʋ, bʋga yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba taa kɔkɔlɔ fuuli sʋ bee sun Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: Stay away from stupid and senseless arguments. These only lead to trouble,
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ lɛɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ kimelensi ɩmɔɔrɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ kasɛ mʋ tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fu nyi ɩ maa bɩya nluu.

english_verse: and God's servants must not be troublemakers. They must be kind to everyone, and they must be good teachers and very patient.
translation_verse: Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ kɩyaafɔlɛ man dagaa maa kɔ keluu, amaa ɔ dagaa maa waa kɩdanbɩrasa ɛɛ sa ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ, kɛ ɔ taalɛ kaapʋ, kɛ ɔ nyɛ kenyiita kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Be humble when you correct people who oppose you. Maybe God will lead them to turn to him and learn the truth.
translation_verse: Bamʋ nɩɩ bee gyii mʋ ɩmɔɔrɛ mʋ, ɩ dagaa maa lɛɛ asɩn mʋ kaapʋ bamʋ laakalɛ sʋ, akʋtɔ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti o bugi ɔkpa sa bamʋ, kɛ ba yɛgɛ alibi kɩwaa, kɛ ba ba bɩɩ kesintin asɩn mʋ.

english_verse: They have been trapped by the devil, and he makes them obey him, but God may help them escape.
translation_verse: Kɛ ba nyɛ nfɛɛrɛ danbɩrasa, kɛ ba sɩlɛ lɩɩ ɔdʋʋ mʋ nɩɩ Sɩtaanɛ sʋʋ kɩtaa bamʋ, nɩɩ bee nu mʋ asɛ bɛɛ waa atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ee biti mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: You can be certain that in the last days there will be some very hard times.
translation_verse: Amaa baa fʋ nyi ɩnɩmʋ fɛɛ, nkɛ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ, awʋrʋfɔ damantɛ ii biti ɩ ba asa sʋ.

english_verse: heartless, and hateful. Their words will be cruel, and they will have no self-control or pity. These people will hate everything good.
translation_verse: nɩɩ ba mɛɛ yɛ bɛ nyɛ kebiti sa ɔkʋ, nɩɩ be mee wu ɔkʋ kʋwɛɛ, nɩɩ bee biti ba nyita asa kɩtɩɩ, nɩɩ ba mɛɛ taalɛ kɩtaa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ, nɩɩ asa bee biti ba sɩlɛ bamʋ, nɩɩ bee biti ba kisi kɩdanbɩrasa,

english_verse: They will be sneaky, reckless, and puffed up with pride. Instead of loving God, they will love pleasure.
translation_verse: nɩɩ bee biti ba waa adiboyipu, nɩɩ ba mɛɛ fɛ nfɛɛrɛ pɔyɩ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa kʋtɔ kʋ, nɩɩ bɛɛ kaapʋ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ, nɩɩ bee biti dulinyaa tɔ ɔkɔn ba kyɔ Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: Even though they will make a show of being religious, their religion won't be real. Don't have anything to do with such people.
translation_verse: Bee biti ba sun Ɩbwaarɛ ansi sʋ, amaa ba kina mʋ ɔlʋn mʋ. Man bʋga yɛ kanɩn asa.

english_verse: Some men fool whole families, just to get power over those women who are slaves of sin and are controlled by all sorts of desires.
translation_verse: Bamʋ tɔ akʋ bɛɛ taa kanyaasɩn libi bee loo akpaara sʋ, nɩɩ bɛɛ taa kɔnɔ tɔ kɔn bɛɛ pɩna akyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ba mɛɛ taalɛ kɩtaa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ, nɩɩ bamʋ alibi i du fɛɛ kasʋla ɩ gyan bamʋ sʋ, nɩɩ kayalaga libi kʋkwɩɩ‐kʋkwɩɩ bʋ bamʋ tɔ.

english_verse: These women always want to learn something new, but they never can discover the truth.
translation_verse: Kanɩn akyɩɩ mʋ bɛɛ kpan n‐yɩɩ saŋa kʋmaa bɛɛ bɩɩla, amaa ba mɛɛ taalɛ ba bɩɩ kesintin mʋ.

english_verse: Just as Jannes and Jambres opposed Moses, these people are enemies of the truth. Their minds are sick, and their faith isn't real.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Gyanise maa Gyanberesi ba daa kyɩna kʋsʋ yɩlɛ Mosesi sʋ mʋ, kanɩn nɩɩ falɛ anyɩn anɩmʋ gbaa bɛɛ kɔ bee tii kesintin mʋ ɔkpa. Bamʋ amu i nyita, nɩɩ ba man sʋ ɔyɩlɛkpa kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: But they won't get very far with their foolishness. Soon everyone will know the truth about them, just as Jannes and Jambres were found out. Paul's Last Instructions to Timothy
translation_verse: Bamʋ awaasa nɩmʋ mee kpiya bamʋ ansi tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ii biti o wu kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba melensi, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Gyanise maa Gyanberesi kimelensi ɩ daa lɩɩ ifuli mʋ. Pɔɔlɩ kɔnɔsa sa Timoti

english_verse: Timothy, you know what I teach and how I live. You know what I want to do and what I believe. You have seen how patient and loving I am, and how in the past I put up with
translation_verse: Amaa fɛɛ fʋ bɩrɛ, fu nyi asɩn mʋ nɩɩ n kaapʋ mʋ kpini, yɛ mɛ kakyɩna tɔ, yɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ mi ansi ɩ gyan sʋ, yɛ mɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii, yɛ mɛ kenyiita, yɛ mi kebiti, yɛ mɛ kɩyɩlɛ tɔ gyii awʋrʋfɔ.

english_verse: trouble and suffering in the cities of Antioch, Iconium, and Lystra. Yet the Lord rescued me from all those terrible troubles.
translation_verse: Fu nyi kanan mʋ nɩɩ asa ba nyanla mɛ, yɛ awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ n gyii Antiyoki yɛ Ikoniyum yɛ Lisitira ndɛ tɔ, nɩɩ n nyɛ kenyiita yɩlɛ kanyanla mʋ kpini tɔ, nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito lɛɛ mɛ lɩɩ ɩmʋ kpini tɔ.

english_verse: In fact, anyone who belongs to Christ Jesus and wants to live right will have trouble from others.
translation_verse: Ɩ gyɛ kesintin fɛɛ, ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee biti o buu Krisito Yesu, kɛ ɔ waa Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti mʋ, ee biti ɔ nyɛ kanyanla.

english_verse: But evil people who pretend to be what they are not will become worse than ever, as they fool others and are fooled themselves.
translation_verse: Alibi awaapʋ yɛ apɩnapʋ bɩrɛ bamʋ alibi ii biti ɩ lɔŋɔ tii sʋ nɩn, kanan mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ pɩna asa mʋ, kanɩn gbaa nɩɩ ii biti ɩ pɩna bamʋ.

english_verse: Keep on being faithful to what you were taught and to what you believed. After all, you know who taught you these things.
translation_verse: Amaa fɛɛ fʋ bɩrɛ, kyaga sʋ kɩtaa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ fʋ bɩɩla nɩɩ fʋ kɔɔlɛ gyii mʋ tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fu nyi bamʋ nɩɩ fʋ bɩɩla lɩɩ bamʋ asɛ,

english_verse: Since childhood, you have known the Holy Scriptures that are able to make you wise enough to have faith in Christ Jesus and be saved.
translation_verse: nɩɩ lɩɩ fʋ kibii tɔ mʋ, fu nyi Asɩnkyan yɩlasa kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ɩmʋ ɩ taalɛ sa fʋ kanyaasɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bɩya kamɔlɩgɛ bɔla kɩkɔɔlɛ Krisito Yesu gyii sʋ.

english_verse: Everything in the Scriptures is God's Word. All of it is useful for teaching and helping people and for correcting them and showing them how to live.
translation_verse: Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ kpini ɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ nɩn, nɩɩ ɩ bʋrɔn sa kɩkaapʋ, yɛ katɔwɛ yii, yɛ kɩtɔwɛ kyiigi, yɛ kɩbɩla ɩkpa kikyiigi tɔ,

english_verse: The Scriptures train God's servants to do all kinds of good deeds.
translation_verse: saamʋ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔsa ɩ nyɛ dan tɔ sa kusun danbɩrasa kʋmaa kɩwaa.

english_verse: When Christ Jesus comes as king, he will be the judge of everyone, whether they are living or dead. So with God and Christ as witnesses, I command you
translation_verse: Krisito Yesu ii biti ɔ ba yɛ mu kuwura‐gyii ba talɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba tɛ nkpa tɔ, yɛ alewupu. N yɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ maa Yesu Krisito ansi tɔ n sa fʋ kɔnɔ yɛ,

english_verse: to preach God's message. Do it willingly, even if it isn't the popular thing to do. You must correct people and point out their sins. But also cheer them up, and when you instruct them, always be patient.
translation_verse: tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ. Kʋʋla fʋ n‐yɩɩ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa yɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man dagaa, taa kenyiita kpini tɔwɛ kyiigi asa ɩkpa, kɛ fʋ tɔwɛ yii asa, kɛ fʋ tɔwɛ waa asa ɔlʋn tɔ.

english_verse: The time is coming when people won't listen to good teaching. Instead, they will look for teachers who will please them by telling them only what they are itching to hear.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ saŋa kʋ ii biti ɔ ba nɩɩ asa ba mɛɛ yɛ be buu kesintin kɩkaapʋ mʋ. Amɔɔ be buu bamʋ kayalaga tɔ asɩn. Bee biti ba kɩɩ biti akaapʋpʋ damantɛ kyaabɔɔ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ, kɛ bɛ kaapʋ bamʋ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋkɔn bamʋ asʋ tɔ kɛ be nu.

english_verse: They will turn from the truth and eagerly listen to senseless stories.
translation_verse: Ba man bɩla yɛ be nu kesintin mʋ, bee biti ba biliŋi ba buu asɩrɩkpan ikisii‐sɩn.

english_verse: But you must stay calm and be willing to suffer. You must work hard, telling the good news and to do your job well.
translation_verse: Amaa fɛɛ fʋ bɩrɛ, baa fʋ da fu kumu sʋ asɩn kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ, nyɛ kɔkɔlɔ yɩlɛ awʋrʋfɔ tɔ, waa asɩn danbɩrasa kusun mʋ ɔtɔwɛpʋ, sun fʋ kusun kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa naa lʋwɛ.

english_verse: Now the time has come for me to die. My life is like a drink offering being poured out on the altar.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ mɛ bɩrɛ mɛ saŋa fʋ fɛɛ n wu, nɩɩ i du nɩn fɛɛ mɛ nkpa ɩɩ kyɛɛgɛ ɩɩ wʋrɩgɛ fɛɛ saraga sa Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: I have fought well. I have finished the race, and I have been faithful.
translation_verse: N kɔ keluu danbɩrasa mʋ, nɩɩ n sɩlɛ kɩsɩlɛ mʋ naa fʋʋ ɔkaa, nɩɩ n kɩtaa kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: So a crown will be given to me for pleasing the Lord. He judges fairly, and on the day of judgment he will give a crown to me and to everyone else who wants him to appear with power. Personal Instructions
translation_verse: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kii gyoo mɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ kigyii sʋ kakɛɛ, mʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, ɩkpa kyiigisa ɔtalɛpʋ mʋ ii biti ɔ taa sa mɛ kanɩn kakɛ maŋa, nɩɩ man gyɛ mɛ nkʋn, amaa yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ gyʋgyʋʋ bamʋ yɛ be wu Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu kɩba mʋ. Pɔɔlɩ laalaalʋwɛ asɩn

english_verse: Come to see me as soon as you can.
translation_verse: Kpan fʋ n‐yɩɩ kɛ fʋ ba mɛ asɛ bilen,

english_verse: Demas loves the things of this world so much that he left me and went to Thessalonica. Crescens has gone to Galatia, and Titus has gone to Dalmatia.
translation_verse: lɩɩ fɛɛ Demasi sʋ kebiti sa dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ atɔ, nɩɩ ɔ sɩlɛ yɛgɛ mɛ kpee Tesalonika kadɛ tɔ. Kresensi kyʋn Galati kadɛ tɔ, nɩɩ Titusi mɔɔ kyʋn Dalimatiya kadɛ tɔ.

english_verse: Only Luke has stayed with me. Mark can be very helpful to me, so please find him and bring him with you.
translation_verse: Luka nkʋn ɩ bʋ mɛ asɛ. Biti Maki kɛ fʋ taa mʋ bɩya mɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ mʋ ɩ taalɛ kyɛ mɛ tɔ, mi kusun mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: I sent Tychicus to Ephesus.
translation_verse: N sun Takikusi yɛ o kpee Efeso kadɛ tɔ.

english_verse: When you come, bring the coat I left at Troas with Carpus. Don't forget to bring the scrolls, especially the ones made of leather.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fʋ kan fɩɩ ba mʋ, fʋ taa mɛ balɩmaasʋ mʋ nɩɩ n yɛgɛ yɩla Kapusi asɛ Trowa kadɛ tɔ, yɛ mɛ ɩwʋlɛ, fɔnfɔn ɩmʋ nɩɩ ba taa atɔbwaaya ɩwʋlɛ waa mʋ bɩya mɛ.

english_verse: Alexander, the metalworker, has hurt me in many ways. But the Lord will pay him back for what he has done.
translation_verse: Alekisanda mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ bayɩpʋ mʋ waa mɛ alibi gaa. Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa mɛ mʋ, Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ ii biti ɔ ka mʋ kʋkɔ.

english_verse: Alexander opposes what we preach, so you had better watch out for him.
translation_verse: Fʋ gbaa fʋ, baa fʋ da mʋ sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ yɩlɛ sʋ kenken ee tii anɛ asɩn tɔwɛsa mʋ ɔkpa.

english_verse: When I was first put on trial, no one helped me. In fact, everyone deserted me. I hope it won't be held against them.
translation_verse: Kakɛ gyankpaasa mʋ nɩɩ n yɩlɛ n lɛɛ kɔnɔ mɛ asɩn kigyii tɔ mʋ, ɔkʋ man ba yɩlɛ mɛ kamaa, ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ palɛ mʋ kamaa sa mɛ. N kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ fɛɛ ɔ man ka bamʋ kʋkɔ lɩɩ ɩmʋ sʋ.

english_verse: But the Lord stood beside me. He gave me the strength to tell his full message, so that all Gentiles would hear it. And I was kept safe from hungry lions.
translation_verse: Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ yɩlɛ mɛ kamaa nɩɩ ɔ sa mɛ ɔlʋn, nɩɩ n nyɛ tɔwɛ asɩn mʋ lʋwɛ, nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ gbaa ba nu ɩmʋ. Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mɛ lɩɩ bɩranɛ kɔnɔ tɔ.

english_verse: The Lord will always keep me from being harmed by evil, and he will bring me safely into his heavenly kingdom. Praise him forever and ever! Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu mʋ ii biti ɔ lɛɛ mɛ lɩɩ alibi kʋmaa mʋ tɔ, kɛ ɔ bɩya mɛ sʋsʋ kuwura‐gyii mʋ tɔ yɛ alanfɩya. Mʋ nɩɩ bʋnyaa gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ kakpaa. Amen. Afwaala laalaalʋwɛ

english_verse: Give my greetings to Priscilla and Aquila and to the family of Onesiphorus.
translation_verse: Fwaala Prisila maa Akwila yɛ Onesiforu kɩkpaara sʋ asa kpini.

english_verse: Erastus stayed at Corinth. Trophimus was sick when I left him at Miletus.
translation_verse: Erasitu sii ɔ tɛ Korinto kadɛ tɔ, nɩɩ n yɛgɛ Trofimu mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ lɔɔ mʋ, Miletu kadɛ tɔ.

english_verse: Do your best to come before winter. Eubulus, Pudens, Linus, and Claudia send you their greetings, and so do the rest of the Lord's followers.
translation_verse: Kpan fʋ n‐yɩɩ kɛ fʋ fʋʋ nfɩɩ pɔyɩ kɛ gbangban ɔ fʋʋ. Ebulusi yɛ Pudensi yɛ Linusi yɛ Kilodiya yɛ bamʋ bɩrɩsa ana kpini bɛɛ fwaala fʋ.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will bless your life and will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ yɛ fʋ kayaayu fan kyɩna. Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ bwaala fanɛ.

english_verse: From Paul, a servant of God and an apostle of Jesus Christ. I encourage God's own people to have more faith and to understand the truth about religion.
translation_verse: Ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ lɩɩ mɛ Pɔɔlɩ, Ɩbwaarɛ kɩyaafɔlɛ yɛ Yesu Krisito osunpu mʋ asɛ. O sun mɛ yɛ n ba kyɛ mʋ asa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ mʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ, kɛ n kaapʋ bamʋ kɛ ba bɩɩ kesintin mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ asa bee buu kabwaarɛ‐sun danbɩrasa,

english_verse: Then they will have the hope of eternal life God promised long ago. And God never tells a lie!
translation_verse: mʋ nɩɩ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii yɛ kinyi ɩ gyan nkpa kakpaa tamaa mʋ sʋ. Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ tɩn antɩŋɛsa mʋ, da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ sa anɛ nkpa nɩmʋ lɩɩ koo npiili asɛ,

english_verse: So, at the proper time, God our Savior gave this message and told me to announce what he had said.
translation_verse: nɩɩ saŋa kyɛɛkyɛɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ anɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ mʋ lɛɛ mʋ asɩn kaapʋ, fɛɛ maa taa waa mɛ abaa tɔ, nɩɩ ɔ sa mɛ kɔnɔ yɛ n tɔwɛ asɩn mʋ sa asa.

english_verse: Titus, because of our faith, you are like a son to me. I pray that God our Father and Christ Jesus our Savior will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! What Titus Was To Do in Crete
translation_verse: N kyʋrɔɔ n sa fʋ Titusi, mʋ nɩɩ n taa fʋ fɛɛ mi‐bii gbaa‐gbaa anɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kʋlʋn mʋ tɔ mʋ. Kabwaala yɛ kayɩɩ yuuli mʋ nɩɩ kɩ lɩɩ anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ anɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ, Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito asɛ mʋ yɛ fʋ fan kyɩna. Titusi kusun Kereti ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ

english_verse: I left you in Crete to do what had been left undone and to appoint leaders for the churches in each town. As I told you,
translation_verse: Kʋtɔ mʋ sʋ nɩɩ n yɛgɛ fʋ Kereti ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ mʋ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ, fʋ nyɛ lɔŋɔ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ san mʋ lʋwɛ, kɛ fʋ yii abɩlɩsa kadɛ kʋmaa nɩmʋ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ tɔ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n kaapʋ fʋ mʋ.

english_verse: they must have a good reputation and be faithful in marriage. Their children must be followers of the Lord and not have a reputation for being wild and disobedient.
translation_verse: Ɩ dagaa ɔbɩlɩsa maa gyɛ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ mʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ man sʋ asɩn pwɩɩsa, nɩɩ o kili ɔkyɩɩ kʋlʋn kpen, nɩɩ mu‐bii ana bɛ gyɛ akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu, mʋ nɩɩ ba man sʋ kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn abɛɛ kibii libi.

english_verse: Church officials are in charge of God's work, and so they must also have a good reputation. They must not be bossy, quick-tempered, heavy drinkers, bullies, or dishonest in business.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ ɔbɩlɩsa maa gyɛ Krisito kʋbʋ ɔkɩɩsʋpʋ mʋ, ɩ dagaa maa gyɛ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ mʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ man sʋ asɩn pwɩɩsa, nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ kʋsaa mʋ n‐yɩɩ, nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ nyɛ agbʋ benbilen, nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ bʋʋ nta, nɩɩ ɔ man gyɛ oluu bitipu, nɩɩ ɔ man sʋ onsi‐payɩ libi afulee sʋ.

english_verse: Instead, they must be friendly to strangers and enjoy doing good things. They must also be sensible, fair, pure, and self-controlled.
translation_verse: Amaa ɔ dagaa maa gyɛ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kɔɔlɛ afɔ, nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kebiti sa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋrɔn, nɩɩ ɛɛ kɩtaa mʋ n‐yɩɩ, nɩɩ mʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi, nɩɩ ɔ sɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nɩɩ mʋ awaasa du kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

english_verse: They must stick to the true message they were taught, so their good teaching can help others and correct everyone who opposes it.
translation_verse: Ɔ dagaa maa taalɛ kɩtaa kesintin asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ kenken, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba kaapʋ ɩmʋ mʋ, kɛ ngbaa mʋ ɔ taalɛ taa kesintin kɩkaapʋ mʋ tɔwɛ waa asa, kɛ ɔ taa ɩmʋ tii bamʋ nɩɩ bee gyii ɩmʋ ɩmɔɔrɛ mʋ ɔkpa.

english_verse: There are many who don't respect authority, and they fool others by talking nonsense. This is especially true of some Jewish followers.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ asa gaalaagaa bɛɛ kʋsʋ bɛɛ yɩlɛ asɩn mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ bɛ sʋ bamʋ ntɔwɛ kɩyan bɛɛ pɩna asa, fɔnfɔn Gyiwu abi akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu.

english_verse: But you must make them be quiet. They are after money, and they upset whole families by teaching what they should not.
translation_verse: Ɩ dagaa fʋ tii bamʋ ntɔwɛ mʋ ɔkpa, lɩɩ fɛɛ bɛ sʋ bamʋ npɩna kɩkaapʋ mʋ bee nyita akpaara sʋ abi lɩɩ kɩkaapʋ danbɩrasa mʋ sʋ. Bɛɛ waa ipeeli‐sɩn nɩmʋ bee biti afulee.

english_verse: It is like one of their own prophets once said, “The people of Crete always tell lies. They are greedy and lazy like wild animals.”
translation_verse: Halɩɩ Kereti abi atɔwɛpʋ mʋ tɔ ɔkʋ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Kereti abi bɛ gyɛ antɩŋɛsa wuya ana nɩn saŋa kʋmaa, nɩɩ be du fɛɛ ndʋnbwɛ libi, nɩɩ bɛ gyɛ awʋlɛgyɔpʋ agyipu lala.”

english_verse: This surely is a true saying. And you should be hard on such people, so you can help them grow stronger in their faith.
translation_verse: Asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ kesintin. Ɩmʋ sʋ taa kensi payɩ tɔwɛ yii bamʋ, kɛ bamʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii ɩ nyɛ yɩlɛ kinkin,

english_verse: Don't pay any attention to any of those senseless Jewish stories and human commands. These are made up by people who won't obey the truth.
translation_verse: kɛ ba man nu Gyiwu abi asɩrɩkpan ikisii‐sɩn mʋ, abɛɛ be nu sa bamʋ nɩɩ bee kina kesintin asɩn mʋ.

english_verse: Everything is pure for someone whose heart is pure. But nothing is pure for an unbeliever with a dirty mind. That person's mind and conscience are destroyed.
translation_verse: Bamʋ nɩɩ ba man sʋ ineesi mʋ, kʋtɔ kʋ man gyɛ ineesi bamʋ asɛ, amaa bamʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ ineesi nɩɩ ba mɛɛ kɔɔlɛ bee gyii mʋ, sɛhn man gyɛ kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ bamʋ asɛ, amaa alibi ɩ bɔla bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ yɛ bamʋ nkɔlɔ tɔ kpini.

english_verse: Such people claim to know God, but their actions prove they really don't. They are disgusting. They won't obey God, and they are too worthless to do anything good.
translation_verse: Bɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ be nyi Ɩbwaarɛ, amaa bamʋ awaasa tɔ mʋ bee kina mʋ. Ɩbwaarɛ ii kisi bamʋ awaasa kpini, nɩɩ bɛ gyɛ kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn wuya ana, nɩɩ ba mɛɛ taalɛ waa kɩdanbɩrasa kakaakʋ.

english_verse: Titus, you must teach only what is correct.
translation_verse: Amaa fɛɛ fʋ bɩrɛ, ɩ dagaa fʋ kaapʋ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ii buu kesintin kɩkaapʋ mʋ.

english_verse: Tell the older men to have self-control and to be serious and sensible. Their faith, love, and patience must never fail.
translation_verse: Tɔwɛ anyɩn abɩlɩsa fɛɛ bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ baa ɩ dɛ, kɛ ba baa bɛ sʋ bɛɛrɛɛ, kɛ ba kɩtaa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ, kɛ ba kɩtaa kesintin kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ, kɛ ba nyɛ kebiti sa abaa, kɛ ba nyɛ nkɔlɔ yɩlɛ tɔ.

english_verse: Tell the older women to behave as those who love the Lord should. They must not gossip about others or be slaves of wine. They must teach what is proper,
translation_verse: Kanɩn maa nɩɩ fʋ tɔwɛ akyɩɩ‐nyi mʋ fɛɛ ba kyɩna kakyɩna mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ Krisito abuupu ba kyɩna mʋ. Ba man natɛ nyita asa atɩɩ abɛɛ ba baa bɛ gyɛ atabʋʋpʋ, amaa ba kaapʋ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋrɔn.

english_verse: so the younger women will be loving wives and mothers.
translation_verse: Kanɩn gbaa nɩɩ ba kaapʋ abite mʋ kanan mʋ nɩɩ bee biti bamʋ‐kuli ana yɛ bamʋ‐bii ana,

english_verse: Each of the younger women must be sensible and kind, as well as a good homemaker, who puts her own husband first. Then no one can say insulting things about God's message.
translation_verse: kɛ ba kɩtaa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ kɛ ba man waa kɩgyagaa, kɛ ba waa bamʋ akpaara sʋ asun, kɛ ba waa adanbɩrasa, kɛ ba bɩya bamʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa bamʋ‐kuli ana, kɛ ɔkʋ ɔ man nyɛ tɔwɛ asɩn libi nyita Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn mʋ.

english_verse: Tell the young men to have self-control in everything.
translation_verse: Kanɩn maa nɩɩ fʋ tɔwɛ waa ayaafɔlɛ gbaa fɛɛ ba kɩtaa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ.

english_verse: Use clean language that no one can criticize. Do this, and your enemies will be too ashamed to say anything against you.
translation_verse: Yɛgɛ fʋ katɔwɛ kɩ baa kɩ dɛ ɔkpa, yɛgɛ ɩ man sʋ asɩn pwɩɩsa kʋ, kɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛ kʋsʋ yɩlɛ fʋ sʋ mʋ be gyii ipeeli, lɩɩ fɛɛ ba mɛɛ yɛ bɛ nyɛ alibi kʋ tɔwɛ lɩɩ anɛ sʋ.

english_verse: Tell slaves always to please their owners by obeying them in everything. Slaves must not talk back to their owners
translation_verse: Kaapʋ anyɛ mʋ fɛɛ bɛ bɩya bamʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa bamʋ‐nyɩrɩpɛ ana kʋtɔ kʋmaa tɔ, kɛ ɩ bɔla bamʋ ansi. Amaa ba man kan tɔwɛ gyaŋa bamʋ‐nyɩrɩpɛ ana,

english_verse: or steal from them. They must be completely honest and trustworthy. Then everyone will show great respect for what is taught about God our Savior. God's Kindness and the New Life
translation_verse: abɛɛ ba yuuri bamʋ. Amaa ba waa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋrɔn kɛ bamʋ‐nyɩrɩpɛ ana bɛ kɔɔlɛ bamʋ gyii, kɛ bamʋ awaasa ɩ yɛgɛ Ɩbwaarɛ, anɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ asɩn kaapʋsa mʋ, ɩ baa ɩ bʋ ɔbʋlɛ.

english_verse: God has shown us undeserved grace by coming to save all people.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mʋ kabwaala mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ bɩya kamɔlɩgɛ ifuli sa asa kpini.

english_verse: He taught us to give up our wicked ways and our worldly desires and to live decent and honest lives in this world.
translation_verse: Kabwaala mʋ kaapʋ anɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ a lɛɛ anɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ ɩkpa libi yɛ dulinyaa tɔ atɔ kayalaga sʋ, kɛ a taalɛ kɩtaa anɛ n‐yɩɩ, kɛ a waa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ dɛ ɔkpa, yɛ kabwaarɛ‐sun danbɩrasa kakyɩna nɩmʋ tɔ,

english_verse: We are filled with hope, as we wait for the glorious return of our great God and Savior Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: fɛɛ a maa gyoo tamaa kparɛ kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ anɛ Ɩbwaarɛ lala, yɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ Yesu Krisito ii biti o bwii ba yɛ mʋ bʋnyaa mʋ.

english_verse: He gave himself to rescue us from everything evil and to make our hearts pure. He wanted us to be his own people and to be eager to do right.
translation_verse: Mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ kyula wu ka anɛ kʋkɔ, lɛɛ anɛ lɩɩ alibi kpini tɔ, nɩɩ ɔ waa anɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba man sʋ ineesi, nɩɩ ɩɩ gyʋgyʋʋ bamʋ fɛɛ ba waa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋrɔn.

english_verse: Teach these things, as you use your full authority to encourage and correct people. Make sure you earn everyone's respect.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fʋ kaapʋ. Tɔwɛ waa bamʋ kɛ fʋ tɔwɛ yii bamʋ ɔlʋn tɔ. Man yɛgɛ ɔkʋ ɔ fɛɛrɛ fʋ.

english_verse: Remind your people to obey the rulers and authorities and not to be rebellious. They must always be ready to do something helpful
translation_verse: Nyiŋi Krisito abuupu mʋ fɛɛ ba bɩya bamʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa awuragyipu yɛ kɩbanɛ alʋnpʋ kɛ ba nu sa bamʋ, kɛ ba baa bee biti kɩdanbɩrasa kʋmaa kɩwaa,

english_verse: We used to be stupid, disobedient, and foolish, as well as slaves of all sorts of desires and pleasures. We were evil and jealous. Everyone hated us, and we hated everyone.
translation_verse: Saŋa kʋ tɔ mʋ, anɛ gbaa anɛ an daa melensi, nɩɩ an waa kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn, an fɔyɩ ɔkpa, nɩɩ an gyɛ anyɛ sa kɩgyagaa yɛ kayalaga kʋmaa nɩmʋ. Nɩɩ an sʋ kumu tɔ ɔlʋn yɛ kayɩɩ basa, nɩɩ bee kisi anɛ nɩɩ anɛ gbaa anɛ an kisi bamʋ.

english_verse: God our Savior showed us how good and kind he is.
translation_verse: Amaa saŋa mʋ nɩɩ anɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ Ɩbwaarɛ mu kebiti yɛ mʋ kʋwɛɛ kuwu lɩɩ ifuli mʋ,

english_verse: He saved us because of his mercy, and not because of any good things we have done. God washed us by the power of the Holy Spirit. He gave us new birth and a fresh beginning.
translation_verse: ɔ mɔlɩgɛ anɛ. Man gyɛ anɛ adanbɩrasa kɩwaa sʋ nɩɩ ɔ mɔlɩgɛ anɛ, amaa lɩɩ mʋ kʋwɛɛ kuwu sʋ nɩɩ ɔ bɔla mʋ Kayaayu mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ fwɩɩ anɛ mʋ sʋ, sa anɛ kakʋʋgɛ pʋpwɛ yɛ nkpa pʋpwɛ mɔlɩgɛ anɛ.

english_verse: God sent Jesus Christ our Savior to give us his Spirit.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla anɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ Yesu Krisito sʋ sa anɛ mʋ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ gaa.

english_verse: Jesus treated us much better than we deserve. He made us acceptable to God and gave us the hope of eternal life.
translation_verse: Saamʋ, lɩɩ mʋ kabwaala mʋ sʋ mʋ, anɛ ɩkpa i kyiigi mu ansi tɔ, kɛ a ba waa mʋ nkpa kakpaa mʋ nɩɩ an sʋ ɩmʋ tamaa mʋ agyipu.

english_verse: This message is certainly true. These teachings are useful and helpful for everyone. I want you to insist that the people follow them, so that all who have faith in God will be sure to do good deeds.
translation_verse: Katɔwɛ nɩmʋ gyɛ kesintin nɩn. Nɩɩ n biti fɛɛ fu bwii pɩla asɩn nɩmʋ tɔ, kɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba kɔɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ gyii mʋ, ba taa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ sa kɩdanbɩrasa kɩwaa. Falɛ atɔ nɩmʋ ɩ bʋrɔn gaa nɩɩ ɩ sʋ tɔnɔ sa ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ.

english_verse: But don't have anything to do with stupid arguments about ancestors. And stay away from disagreements and quarrels about the Law of Moses. Such arguments are useless and senseless.
translation_verse: Amaa lɛɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ kimelensi ɩmɔɔrɛ‐libi tɔ yɛ kakʋʋgɛ tɔ nkyaga sʋ yɛ kamɔɔrɛ‐gyii yɛ nluu kʋkɔ lɩɩ nbara sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ kɩyan nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ tɔnɔ kpini‐kpini.

english_verse: You know their minds are twisted, and their own sins show how guilty they are. Personal Instructions and Greetings
translation_verse: Baa fii nyi fɛɛ kanɩn ɔsa maŋa alibi i gyii mʋ nfɛɛrɛ yɛ mu kumu, yɛgɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa nyi fɛɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa mʋ gyɛ alibi. Laalaalʋwɛ asɩn

english_verse: I plan to send Artemas or Tychicus to you. After he arrives, please try your best to meet me at Nicopolis. I have decided to spend the winter there.
translation_verse: N dan kan sun Atemasi abɛɛ Tikiku fʋ asɛ mʋ, waa aniya kɛ fʋ ba gyaŋa mɛ Nikopoli kadɛ tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ n waa mɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ n kpee tʋtɔ awɔɔ saŋa.

english_verse: When Zenas the lawyer and Apollos get ready to leave, help them as much as you can, so they won't have need of anything.
translation_verse: Waa kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ fɩɩ taalɛ, kɛ fʋ kyɛ Senasi mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ lɔya mʋ yɛ Apolosi tɔ, kɛ ba nyɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ki tiri bamʋ lɩɩ ɔkpa mʋ nɩɩ bee biti ba kpee mʋ.

english_verse: Greetings to you from everyone here. Greet all of our friends who share in our faith. I pray that the Lord will be kind to all of you!
translation_verse: Bamʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ mɛ asɛ nfɩɩ mʋ kpini bɛɛ fwaala fʋ. Fwaala ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee biti anɛ asɩn, nɩɩ ana bamʋ an bʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ mʋ kpini. Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala kɩ baa kɩ bʋ fanɛ asɛ.

english_verse: From Paul, who is in jail for serving Christ Jesus, and from Timothy, who is like a brother because of our faith. Philemon, you work with us and are very dear to us. This letter is to you
translation_verse: Ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ lɩɩ mɛ Pɔɔlɩ mʋ nɩɩ lɩɩ Krisito Yesu kusun sʋ nɩɩ ba tii mɛ obu mʋ, yɛ anɛ bɩrɩsa Timoti asɛ. An kyʋrɔɔ an sa fʋ Filemon, anɛ kyɛmɩnɛ danbɩrasa yɛ anɛ bɩrɩsa osunpu,

english_verse: and to the church that meets in your home. It is also to our dear friend Apphia and to Archippus, who serves the Lord as we do.
translation_verse: yɛ anɛ‐pɩɩkyɩɩ Afiiya yɛ anɛ bɩrɩsa Krisito tɔ ɔnaakɔpʋ Akyipusi, yɛ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ gyaŋɛ fʋ kɩkpaara sʋ mʋ.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Philemon's Love and Faith
translation_verse: Anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kabwaala yɛ keyuula kɩ baa kɩ bʋ fanɛ asɛ. Pɔɔlɩ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ

english_verse: Philemon, each time I mention you in my prayers, I thank God.
translation_verse: Mi‐supu Filemon, saŋa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ n kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ mʋ, n nyiŋi fʋ sʋ nɩɩ n fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ lɩɩ fʋ sʋ.

english_verse: I hear about your faith in our Lord Jesus and about your love for all God's people.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ, n nu kanan mʋ nɩɩ fʋ kɔɔlɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu gyii yɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ fʋ sʋ sa Ɩbwaarɛ asa mʋ kpini.

english_verse: As you share your faith with others, I pray they may come to know all the blessings Christ has given us.
translation_verse: Mɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ, payɩ ansi kyaga sʋ tɔwɛ fʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ kaapʋ asa. Saamʋ, fʋ ɩ nyɛ bɩɩ atɔ danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ an sʋ lɩɩ Yesu Krisito sʋ mʋ kpini lʋwɛ.

english_verse: My friend, your love has made me happy and has greatly encouraged me. It has also cheered the hearts of God's people. Paul Speaks to Philemon about Onesimus
translation_verse: Mi‐supu Filemon, fu kebiti mʋ nɩɩ fʋ sʋ mʋ yɛgɛ nɩɩ mi ansi i gyii gaa nɩɩ ɩ waa mɛ aniya tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fʋ yɛgɛ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asa nkɔlɔ ɩ dɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba nyɛ ɔlʋn. Pɔɔlɩ kɩkʋlɛ sa Onesimu

english_verse: But I would rather ask you to do it simply because of love. Yes, as someone in jail for Christ,
translation_verse: amaa n kʋlɛ fʋ lɩɩ kebiti ɩkpa sʋ. Nɩɩ mɛ, Pɔɔlɩ mʋ nɩɩ n bɩlɛ, nɩɩ lɩɩ Yesu Krisito kusun sʋ mʋ, nbɩɩnbɩɩ n tii obu falɛ mʋ,

english_verse: I beg you to help Onesimus! He is like a son to me because I led him to Christ here in jail.
translation_verse: n kʋlɛ fʋ lɩɩ mi‐bii Onesimu, mʋ nɩɩ ɔ ba biliŋi mi‐bii Krisito tɔ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n bʋ obu kitii tɔ falɛ.

english_verse: Before this, he was useless to you, but now he is useful both to you and to me.
translation_verse: Naafɔɔ saamʋ, ɔ daa ɔ man sʋ kyaarɛ sa fʋ, amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ ɔ sʋ kyaarɛ sa n maa fʋ kpini.

english_verse: Sending Onesimus back to you makes me very sad.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ, n bwiiyaa mʋ n bɩya fʋ, nɩɩ n biti mʋ asɩn gaa, kɔɔlɛ mʋ sa mɛ.

english_verse: I would like to keep him here with me, where he could take your place in helping me while I am here in prison for preaching the good news.
translation_verse: Naafɔɔ n daa n biti fɛɛ ɔ baa ɔ bʋ mɛ asɛ, kɛ o yii fʋ ayaa tɔ ɛɛ kyɛ mɛ tɔ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n tii obu falɛ lɩɩ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ katɔwɛ sʋ.

english_verse: But I won't do anything unless you agree to it first. I want your act of kindness to come from your heart, and not be something you feel forced to do.
translation_verse: Amaa n mee biti fɛɛ n waa kʋtɔ kʋ yɛgɛ n man nyi fʋ nfɛɛrɛ, kɛ ɩ man naa ba fɛɛ n nyan fʋ nɩn, amaa ɩ baa ɩ gyɛ fʋ kebiti.

english_verse: Perhaps Onesimus was taken from you for a little while so you could have him back for good,
translation_verse: Akʋtɔ Onesimu barɩgɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ fʋ asɛ nkɛ gbɛrɛɛ kʋ nɩn, saamʋ nɩɩ ɔ kan bwii ba mʋ fii biti fʋ nyɛ mʋ kakpaa,

english_verse: but not as a slave. Onesimus is much more than a slave. To me he is a dear friend, but to you he is even more, both as a person and as a follower of the Lord.
translation_verse: yɛgɛ ɔ man bɩla ɔ gyɛ kɩnyɛ nkʋn, amaa ɔ kyɔ kɩnyɛ lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ gyɛ fʋ bɩrɩsa bitisa Krisito tɔ. Nɩɩ n biti mʋ mɛ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ gaa, kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ ngbaa fʋ fii biti fʋ ba biti mʋ fʋ kyɔ mɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ gyɛ fʋ kɩnyɛ, nɩɩ ɔ bɩla ɔ gyɛ fʋ bɩrɩsa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: If you consider me a friend because of Christ, then welcome Onesimus as you would welcome me.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fʋ kan fu nyi fɛɛ fʋ bɩrɩsa ɩ gyɛ mɛ mʋ, fu bwii kɔɔlɛ mʋ yɛ ɔdan fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fii biti fʋ kɔɔlɛ mɛ mʋ.

english_verse: If he has cheated you or owes you anything, charge it to my account.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔ kan waa fʋ alibi akʋ abɛɛ ɔ sʋ fʋ kʋkɔ mʋ, taa ɩmʋ kpini sʋla mɛ.

english_verse: With my own hand I write: I, PAUL, WILL PAY YOU BACK. But don't forget you owe me your life.
translation_verse: Mɛ Pɔɔlɩ, n sʋ mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ kɩbaa n kyʋrɔɔ ɩnɩmʋ yɛ n biti n ka fʋ kʋkɔ maŋa. Ngbaagbaa fʋ, fʋ sʋ mɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ kʋkɔ lɩɩ nkpa mʋ nɩɩ n yɛgɛ nɩɩ fʋ nyɛ mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: My dear friend and follower of Christ our Lord, please cheer me up by doing this for me.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ mi‐supu Filemon, n biti fɛɛ fʋ kɩɩ Krisito Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ sʋ kɛ fʋ waa ɩnɩmʋ sa mɛ, kɛ mɛ kɔkɔlɔ kɩ dɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Epaphras is also here in jail for being a follower of Christ Jesus. He sends his greetings,
translation_verse: Mɛ bɩrɩsa Epafarasi mʋ nɩɩ maa mʋ an tii obu lɩɩ Krisito Yesu sʋ mʋ, ɩɩ fwaala fʋ.

english_verse: and so do Mark, Aristarchus, Demas, and Luke, who work together with me.
translation_verse: Kanɩn nɩɩ Maki maa Arisitako yɛ Demasi yɛ Luka mʋ nɩɩ bɛ gyɛ mɛ bɩrɩsa ana asunpu mʋ bɛɛ fwaala fʋ.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you!
translation_verse: Anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kabwaala kɩ baa kɩ bʋ fanɛ asɛ.

english_verse: Long ago in many ways and at many times God's prophets spoke his message to our ancestors.
translation_verse: Saŋa mʋ dɩdaa mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla mʋ atɔwɛpʋ sʋ nɩn tɔwɛ mʋ asɩn sa anɛ naana ana saŋa gaalaagaa yɛ ɩkpa kʋkwɩɩ‐kʋkwɩɩ sʋ.

english_verse: But now at last, God sent his Son to bring his message to us. God created the universe by his Son, and everything will someday belong to the Son.
translation_verse: Amaa nkɛ laalaalʋwɛ nɩmʋ tɔ mʋ, ɔ bɔla Mu‐Bii Yesu sʋ nɩn tɔwɛ mʋ asɩn sa anɛ. Mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla mʋ sʋ tʋʋ sʋsʋ yɛ kasɛ yɛ ɩmʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ, nɩɩ ɔ wʋla lɛɛ mʋ fɛɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa ii biti ɩ baa ɩ gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ.

english_verse: God's Son has all the brightness of God's own glory and is like him in every way. By his own mighty word, he holds the universe together. After the Son had washed away our sins, he sat down at the right side of the glorious God in heaven.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ mʋ ɩ lɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ bʋnyaa ŋalɩgɛsa kparɛ mʋ ifuli kaapʋ, nɩɩ mʋ tɔ nɩɩ an wu kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ gbaa‐gbaa du. Nɩɩ mʋ kɔnɔ tɔ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋgya nɩɩ ɔ sʋ ɛɛ kɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ sʋ. Nɩɩ maa fwɩɩ nyɩmɩsa alibi kamaa mʋ, ɔ naa kyɩna Ɔlʋnpʋ Owura lala Ɩbwaarɛ gyisa sʋ sʋsʋ.

english_verse: He had become much greater than the angels, and the name he was given is far greater than any of theirs. God's Son Is Greater than Angels
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɔ kyɔ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ mʋ kʋkyɔ, nɩɩ kɩtɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sa mʋ mʋ, bɩla kɩ kyɔ bamʋ lɛɛ gaa.

english_verse: God has never said to any of the angels, “You are my Son, because today I have become your Father!” Neither has God said to any of them, “I will be his Father, and he will be my Son!”
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ tɔ ɔmɔmɔ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ mʋ kakaakʋ yɛ, “Fʋ gyɛ Mi‐Bii, Lɩɩ ndaga n gyɛ Fʋ‐Sɛ?” Abɛɛ, “N biti n baa n gyɛ Mʋ‐Sɛ, kɛ mɔɔ mʋ ɔ baa ɔ gyɛ Mi‐Bii?”

english_verse: When God brings his first-born Son into the world, he commands all of his angels to worship him.
translation_verse: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɩya Mu‐Bii gyankpaasa dulinyaa tɔ mʋ, ɔ bɩla tɔwɛ mʋ nbɔɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ sʋsʋ mʋ yɛ, “Fanɛ mɛ nbɔɔ kpini fan muŋa sun mʋ.”

english_verse: And when God speaks about the angels, he says, “I change my angels into wind and my servants into flaming fire.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ maa tɔwɛ lɩɩ mʋ nbɔɔ mʋ sʋ mʋ, ɔ tɔwɛ yɛ, “N waa mɛ nbɔɔ fɛɛ afuu, nɩɩ n bɩla waa bamʋ fɛɛ fʋlɔn anobi.”

english_verse: But God says about his Son, “You are God, and you will rule as King forever! Your royal power brings about justice.
translation_verse: Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ sa mu‐Bii mʋ bɩrɛ yɛ, “Fʋ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ, nɩɩ fu kuwura‐gyii kii biti kɩ baa kɩ bʋ tɔ kakpaa, nɩɩ fii biti fʋ taa kesintin gyii fu kuwura mʋ kɩmʋ ɔkpa sʋ.

english_verse: You loved justice and hated evil, and so I, your God, have chosen you. I appointed you and made you happier than any of your friends.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kesintin kigyii nɩɩ fii biti, nɩɩ fii kisi alibi. Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ mɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ n diyaa fʋ n kyɔ fʋ tɔmaa ana ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ, nɩɩ n yɛgɛ fʋ kɔkɔlɔ ki fuuli fʋ.”

english_verse: The Scriptures also say, “In the beginning, Lord, you were the one who laid the foundation of the earth and created the heavens.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɩla tɔwɛ mu‐Bii mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ mʋ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ yɛ, “Lɩɩ npiili asɛ mʋ fʋ ii yii dulinyaa kasɛ, nɩɩ fʋ ɩ waa atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ sʋsʋ mʋ.

english_verse: They will all disappear and wear out like clothes, but you will last forever.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ kpini ii biti i nyita, amaa fɛɛ fʋ bɩrɛ fʋ bʋ tɔ kakpaa. Ɩnɩmʋ ii biti ɩ kyatɛ fɛɛ atɔ bunsa.

english_verse: You will roll them up like a robe and change them like a garment. But you are always the same, and you will live forever.”
translation_verse: Fii biti fʋ bɔɔ ɩmʋ fɛɛ ɩkaalɛ bunsa, kɛ fʋ kyɛɛgɛ ɩmʋ fɛɛ atɔ bunsa. Amaa fɛɛ fʋ, fʋ mɛɛ yɛ fʋ kyɛɛgɛ nɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fu du mʋ, kanɩn nɩɩ fii biti fʋ baa fu du, nɩɩ fu nsu ɩ man sʋ ɔkaa.”

english_verse: God never said to any of the angels, “Sit at my right side until I make your enemies into a footstool for you!”
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ mu‐Bii yɛ, “Kyɩna mɛ kɩbaa gyisa sʋ naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n biti n taa fu akisipu waa fʋ ayaa kasɛ.” Amaa ɔ man tɔwɛ falɛ asɩn nɩmʋ sa mʋ kabɔɔ kʋkʋ.

english_verse: We must give our full attention to what we were told, so we won't drift away.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ mʋ ɩ dagaa a maa bɩya asʋ kasɛ, kɛ a kɩtaa asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ an nu mʋ tɔ yɛ ɔdan, kɛ a man kyɛɛgɛ gbɛrɛɛ‐gbɛrɛɛ lɩɩ ɩmʋ tɔ.

english_verse: So if we refuse this great way of being saved, how can we hope to escape? The Lord himself was the first to tell about it, and people who heard the message proved to us that it was true.
translation_verse: Kanɩn bɩrɛ, fɛɛ nɩɩ an kan kina kamɔlɩgɛ lala asɩn nɩmʋ mʋ, nɛnɛ nɩɩ an taalɛ sɩlɛ lɩɩ kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ mʋ tɔ? Falɛ asɩn nɩmʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu gyankpaa tɔwɛ mʋ, nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba nu ɩmʋ mʋ, ba gyii ɩmʋ kesintin sa anɛ.

english_verse: God himself showed that his message was true by working all kinds of powerful miracles and wonders. He also gave his Holy Spirit to anyone he chose to. The One Who Leads Us To Be Saved
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ gbaa gyii ɩmʋ kesintin lɩɩ mʋ ɩsɩnkaala yɛ adangana yɛ asɩn kyinkyinsa yɛ mʋ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ kakɛɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa sa mʋ asa lɩɩ mʋ kɔkɔlɔ biti sʋ. Yesu biliŋi daadimaadi fɛɛ anɛ

english_verse: We know that God did not put the future world under the power of angels.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ man gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ mʋ ɩ gyɛ akɩɩsʋpʋ sa dulinyaa pʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ ee biti ɔ waa, nɩɩ an tɔwɛ ɩmʋ asɩn falɛ.

english_verse: Somewhere in the Scriptures someone says to God, “What makes you care about us humans? Why are you concerned for weaklings such as we?
translation_verse: Amaa ɩ sʋ opula kʋ nɩɩ ɔsa kʋ gyii ɩmʋ kesintin lɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Mɩnɛ nɩɩ anyɩmɩsa ba dan ba gyɛ nɩɩ fɩɩ fɛ bamʋ sʋ nfɛɛrɛ, nɩɩ mɩnɛ nɩɩ daadimaadi nbii‐nyɩnsa ba dan ba gyɛ nɩɩ fii wu bamʋ sʋ kanɩn?

english_verse: You made us lower than the angels for a while. Yet you have crowned us with glory and honor.
translation_verse: Fʋ waa bamʋ pii fʋ nbɔɔ mʋ asɛ saŋa gbɛrɛɛ, amaa fʋ taa bʋnyaa yɛ bɛɛrɛɛ sa bamʋ,

english_verse: And you have put everything under our power!” God has put everything under our power and has not left anything out of our power. But we still don't see it all under our control.
translation_verse: nɩɩ fʋ taa kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ waa bamʋ kasɛ.” Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ maa tɔwɛ yɛ ɔ taa kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ waa nyɩmɩsa kasɛ mʋ, nɩɩ sɛhn man bʋ tɔ yɛ ɔ man taa waa mʋ kasɛ. Nɩɩ halɩɩ ndaga gbaa, a man pɩɩta wu fɛɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ kɩ bʋ nyɩmɩsa kasɛ.

english_verse: What we do see is Jesus, who for a little while was made lower than the angels. Because of God's gift of undeserved grace, Jesus died for everyone. And now that Jesus has suffered and died, he is crowned with glory and honor!
translation_verse: Amaa an wu Yesu mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ waa mʋ pii mʋ nbɔɔ asɛ saŋa gbɛrɛɛ kʋ, nɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ, ɔ taa bʋnyaa yɛ bɛɛrɛɛ sa mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ o gyii lewu awʋrʋfɔ, nɩɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ sʋ mʋ, o wu sa ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ.

english_verse: Everything belongs to God, and all things were created by his power. So God did the right thing when he made Jesus perfect by suffering, as Jesus led many of God's children to be saved and to share in his glory.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tʋʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa, nɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ kɩ bʋ tɔ sa mʋ mʋ, ɩ dagaa sa mʋ fɛɛ ɔ bɩya mu‐bii ana gaalaagaa mʋ bʋnyaa mʋ tɔ. Kɛ ɩnɩmʋ ɩ taalɛ waa mʋ, o ŋmina yɛ Yesu o gyii awʋrʋfɔ, kɛ ɔ ba waa ɔgyankpaapʋ danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ taalɛ mɔlɩgɛ bamʋ naa lʋwɛ.

english_verse: Jesus and the people he makes holy all belong to the same family. This is why he isn't ashamed to call them his brothers and sisters.
translation_verse: Mʋ ɩ lɛɛ bamʋ lɩɩ bamʋ alibi tɔ. Ɩmʋ sʋ mʋ yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ bamʋ lɩɩ alibi tɔ mʋ kpini ba gyɛ Ɔsɛ kʋlʋn. Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ mʋ ipeeli fɛɛ maa tɩɩ bamʋ mu‐supu ana.

english_verse: He even said to God, “I will tell them your name and sing your praises when they come together to worship.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ, “N biti n tɩɩ fʋ kɩtɩɩ sa mi‐supu ana, kɛ n bɩɩ ɩlʋn yɩn fʋ asa nsana tɔ.”

english_verse: He also said, “I will trust God.” Then he said, “Here I am with the children God has given me.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔ bɩla tɔwɛ yɛ, “Ɩbwaarɛ, n biti n taa mɛ n‐yɩɩ tʋʋ fʋ sʋ.” Nɩɩ o bwii kyaga sʋ yɛ, “Kɩɩ mɛ ndee yɛ nbii mʋ nɩɩ fʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ fʋ taa sa mɛ mʋ.”

english_verse: We are people of flesh and blood. This is why Jesus became one of us. He died to destroy the devil, who had power over death.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ nbii mʋ ba maa gyɛ anyɩmɩsa nɩɩ ba sʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ yɛ nkalan mʋ, kanɩn sʋ nɩɩ Yesu gbaa ba biliŋi nyɩmɩsa fɛɛ bamʋ, kɛ ɔ taalɛ wu. Lɩɩ mu kelewu mʋ sʋ mʋ, o nyita Sɩtaanɛ ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ lɩɩ lewu sʋ.

english_verse: But he also died to rescue all of us who live each day in fear of dying.
translation_verse: Kɛ ɔ kɔɔlɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba sɩlɛ lewu, nɩɩ lewu kufuu ki gyii bamʋ amu kakyɩna tɔ mʋ, lɩɩ Sɩtaanɛ abaa tɔ.

english_verse: Jesus clearly did not come to help angels, but he did come to help Abraham's descendants.
translation_verse: Ɩ gyɛ kesintin fɛɛ, Abraham kɩnaana nɩɩ ɔ kyɛ tɔ, amaa ɩ man gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ nɩɩ ɔ kyɛ tɔ.

english_verse: And now that Jesus has suffered and was tempted, he can help anyone else who is tempted.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ wu awʋrʋfɔ nɩɩ ɔ nyɛ kʋtʋʋ tɔ kɩɩ mʋ, ɩmʋ sʋ ɛɛ taalɛ kyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba nyɛ kʋtʋʋ tɔ kɩɩ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: My friends, God has chosen you to be his holy people. So think about Jesus, the one we call our apostle and high priest!
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, Ɩbwaarɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ fanɛ mʋ, fan yɛgɛ fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ baa ɩ gyan Yesu sʋ. Mʋ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ osunpu yɛ oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ mʋ nɩɩ an kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii nɩɩ an lɛɛ an tɔwɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Jesus was faithful to God, who appointed him, just as Moses was faithful in serving all God's people.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ee nu Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ mʋ mʋ asɛ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Mosesi nu Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa tɔ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ayɛ asa kɩkɩɩ sʋ mʋ.

english_verse: But Jesus deserves more honor than Moses, just as the builder of a house deserves more honor than the house.
translation_verse: Yesu gyɛ nyɩmɩsa kparɛ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ bɛɛrɛɛ lala ɔ kyɔ Mosesi, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ kɩkpaara ɔpɔyɩpʋ sʋ bɛɛrɛɛ lala ɔ kyɔ kɩkpaara mʋ gbaa‐gbaa.

english_verse: Of course, every house is built by someone, and God is really the one who built everything.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ kɩkpaara kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ba pɔyɩ mʋ, ɔkʋ ɩ pɔyɩ kɩmʋ, amaa Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ gyɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ ɔpɔyɩpʋ.

english_verse: Moses was a faithful servant and told God's people what would be said in the future.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Mosesi gyɛ kɩyaafɔlɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩkpaara mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ ee gyii kesintin kʋtɔ kʋmaa tɔ. Nɩɩ ɛɛ tɔwɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ tɔwɛ kakaakʋ.

english_verse: But Christ is the Son in charge of God's people. And we are those people, if we keep on being brave and don't lose hope. A Rest for God's People
translation_verse: Amaa Krisito ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii nɩɩ ɛɛ kɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩkpaara asa sʋ yɛ kesintin. Nɩɩ an kan taa kɔkɔlɔ ɔsɩɩ, yɩlɛ tamaa mʋ tɔ kɩnyɩn tɔ mʋ, ɩmʋ ɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ anɛ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩkpaara mʋ sʋ asa. Fan man waa kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn sa Ɩbwaarɛ

english_verse: It is just as the Holy Spirit says, “If you hear God's voice today,
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Nɩɩ fan kan nu mʋ kɔnɔ tɔ asɩn ndaga mʋ,

english_verse: “Then God got tired of them and said, ‘You people never show good sense, and you don't understand what I want you to do.’
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ nɩɩ ɩ waa mʋ agbʋ sa kanɩn kanaana maŋa asa, nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ yɛ, ‘Saŋa kʋmaa bamʋ nkɔlɔ ɩ man gyan mi kebiti sʋ, nɩɩ ii be kina mɛ nbara kibuu.

english_verse: God became angry and told the people, ‘You will never enter my place of rest!’ ”
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ n nyɛ agbʋ bɔ ntan yɛ, N mɛɛ yɛ n bɩla sa bamʋ opula fʋʋtɛkpa mʋ nɩɩ n daa n biti n sa bamʋ mʋ.’ ”

english_verse: You must encourage one another each day. And you must keep on while there is still a time that can be called “today.” If you don't, then sin may fool some of you and make you stubborn.
translation_verse: Amaa kakɛ kʋmaa fan waa abaa aniya tɔ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan san fan tɛ nkpa tɔ ndaga falɛ, kɛ alibi ɩ man pɩna fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ kɛ ɔ waa kɔkɔlɔ ɔsɩɩ.

english_verse: We were sure about Christ when we first became his people. So let's hold tightly to our faith until the end.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ an kan yɩlɛ tɔ kinkin naa fʋʋ laalaalʋwɛ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an kɔɔlɛ gyii npiili asɛ mʋ, anaa Krisito an biti a bʋga barɩgɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Who were those people that heard God's voice and rebelled? Weren't they the same ones that came out of Egypt with Moses?
translation_verse: Anɩmʋ ana ɩ gyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba nu Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn nɩɩ ba kʋsʋ yɩlɛ tɔ mʋ? Man gyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ Mosesi lɛɛ lɩɩ Egyipiti mʋ kpini?

english_verse: And who did God say would never enter his place of rest? Weren't they the ones that disobeyed him?
translation_verse: Anɩmʋ ana nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔ ntan yɛ, ba mɛɛ yɛ ba nyɛ loo mu opula fʋʋtɛkpa tɔ mʋ? Man gyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba waa kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn mʋ?

english_verse: We see that those people did not enter the place of rest because they did not have faith.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ an wu fɛɛ, lɩɩ bamʋ kɩman‐kɔɔlɛ‐gyi sʋ mʋ, ba man taalɛ loo mu opula fʋʋtɛkpa mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Only people who have faith will enter the place of rest. It is just as the Scriptures say, “God became angry and told the people, ‘You will never enter my place of rest!’ ” God said this, even though everything has been ready from the time of creation.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ nbɩɩnbɩɩ anɛ mʋ nɩɩ an kɔɔlɛ gyii mʋ, anɛ ii biti a loo mu opula fʋʋtɛkpa mʋ tɔ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, “N nyɛ agbʋ bɔ ntan yɛ, ‘Ba mɛɛ yɛ ba nyɛ loo mi opula fʋʋtɛkpa mʋ tɔ.’ ” Halɩɩ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ kanɩn mʋ, ɔ tɛɛ wʋla lʋwɛ dulinyaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tʋʋ mʋ kusun.

english_verse: In fact, somewhere the Scriptures say that by the seventh day, God had finished his work, and so he rested.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ katɩn kʋ lɩɩ kakɛ fʋʋtɛsa mʋ sʋ yɛ, “Kakɛ sunɔsapʋ mʋ tɔ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ fʋʋtɛ lɩɩ kusun mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa mʋ kpini tɔ.”

english_verse: We also read that he later said, “You people will never enter my place of rest!”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩ bɩla tɔwɛ lɩɩ asɩn nɩmʋ sʋ yɛ, “Ba mɛɛ yɛ ba nyɛ loo mi opula fʋʋtɛkpa mʋ tɔ.”

english_verse: This means that the promise to enter is still good, because those who first heard about it disobeyed and did not enter.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ mʋ kɩ san kɩ dɛ fɛɛ akʋ bee biti ba nyɛ loo opula fʋʋtɛkpa mʋ tɔ. Amaa bamʋ nɩɩ ba gyankpaa nu asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ, ba waa kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn, nɩɩ ba man nyɛ loo kɩmʋ tɔ.

english_verse: If Joshua had really given the people rest, there would not be any need for God to talk about another day of rest.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nɩɩ Gyosuwa dɩn sa bamʋ ɔfʋʋtɛ nɩn, naafɔɔ kamaa tɔ Ɩbwaarɛ man dɩn bɩla tɔwɛ kakɛ pʋpwɛ kʋ asɩn.

english_verse: But God has promised us a Sabbath when we will rest, even though it has not yet come.
translation_verse: Kanɩn bɩrɛ ɔfʋʋtɛ fɛɛ kakɛ fʋʋtɛsa mʋ kɩ san kɩ dɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ asa, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ fʋʋtɛ kakɛ fʋʋtɛsa akɛ mʋ.

english_verse: We should do our best to enter the place of rest, so none of us will disobey and miss going there, as they did.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan yɛgɛ a kpan anɛ n‐yɩɩ ɔkpa kʋmaa sʋ, kɛ a loo kanɩn opula fʋʋtɛkpa mʋ tɔ, kɛ ɩ man nyɛ ba fɛɛ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ ɔ waa kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn, kɛ ɔ fɔyɩ ɔkpa naa lɩɩ tɩyɛ fɛɛ bamʋ mʋ.

english_verse: God's word is alive and powerful! It is sharper than any double-edged sword. His word can cut through our spirits and souls and through our joints and marrow, until it discovers the desires and thoughts of our hearts.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn mʋ ɩ sʋ nkpa, nɩɩ ii sun kusun. Nɩɩ asɩn mʋ ɩ bʋyɛ ɩ kyɔ sakunde gyimba anyɔ, nɩɩ ɩ taalɛ nyɛ loo nyɩmɩsa kɔkɔlɔ tɔ yɛ mʋ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ, nɩɩ ɩɩ barɩgɛ nyɩmɩsa ɩkyagakpa yɛ awiya tɔ npu. Nɩɩ kɩ bɩla kɩ talɛ nyɩmɩsa kɔkɔlɔ yɛ mʋ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ.

english_verse: We have a great high priest, who has gone into heaven, and he is Jesus the Son of God. This is why we must hold on to what we have said about him.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ kanɩn sʋ fan yɛgɛ a yɩlɛ anɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ nɩɩ an sʋ mʋ tɔ kenken, lɩɩ fɛɛ an sʋ Ɩbwaarɛ oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ kparɛ. Mʋ ɩ gyɛ Yesu, Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kyʋn sʋsʋ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ mʋ.

english_verse: So whenever we are in need, we should come bravely before the throne of our merciful God. There we will be treated with undeserved grace, and we will find help.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan yɛgɛ a nyɛ kɔkɔlɔ yɩlɛ tɔ, ba Ɩbwaarɛ ansi tɔ mu kuwura‐gya mʋ asɛ katɩn mʋ nɩɩ kabwaala kɩ bʋ, kɛ o wu anɛ kʋwɛɛ kɛ a nyɛ kabwaala mʋ nkyɛtɔ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ i tiri san anɛ mʋ.

english_verse: A high priest has weaknesses of his own, and he feels sorry for foolish and sinful people.
translation_verse: Kanɩn ɔsa maŋa ɩɩ nyɛ kenyiita ee wu asa mʋ nɩɩ ba man nyi nɩɩ ba fɔyɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔkpa mʋ kʋwɛɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ngbaa mʋ gyɛ nyɩmɩsa nɩn, nɩɩ ɛɛ taalɛ waa alibi.

english_verse: This is why he must offer sacrifices for his own sins and for the sins of others.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa maa lɛɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa n‐yɩɩ sʋ alibi saraga fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ lɛɛ asa mʋ alibi saraga mʋ.

english_verse: But no one can have the honor of being a high priest simply by wanting to be one. Only God can choose a priest, and God is the one who chose Aaron.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ taa bɛɛrɛɛ sa mʋ n‐yɩɩ fɛɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ, amɔɔ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ lɛɛ mʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kyɩna lɛɛ Aron mʋ.

english_verse: This is how it was with Christ. He became a high priest, but not just because he wanted the honor of being one. It was God who told him, “You are my Son, because today I have become your Father!”
translation_verse: Kanɩn ɔkpa maŋa sʋ nɩɩ Krisito gbaa man sa mʋ n‐yɩɩ bɛɛrɛɛ fɛɛ ɔ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ. Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mʋ nɩn tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Fʋ ɩ gyɛ Mi‐bii, Lɩɩ ndaga n gyɛ Fʋ‐Sɛ.”

english_verse: In another place, God says, “You are a priest forever just like Melchizedek.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔ bɩla tɔwɛ katɩn kʋ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, “Fʋ gyɛ oseepu kakpaa fɛɛ ɔkpa kʋlʋn mʋ nɩɩ Mekisedeki kyɩna ɔ gyɛ mʋ.”

english_verse: God had the power to save Jesus from death. And while Jesus was on earth, he begged God with loud crying and tears to save him. He truly worshiped God, and God listened to his prayers.
translation_verse: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Yesu tɛ nkpa tɔ kasɛ sʋ mʋ, ɔ sawʋ kenken yɛ ansikyu kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ taalɛ lɛɛ mʋ lɩɩ lewu tɔ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ maa bɩya mʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, o nu Yesu asɛ.

english_verse: Jesus is God's own Son, but still he had to suffer before he could learn what it really means to obey God.
translation_verse: Halɩɩ maa gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐Bii gbaa mʋ, ɔ bɩɩla fɛɛ kunu Ɩbwaarɛ kadɛ ɩ bɩya awʋrʋfɔ kigyii.

english_verse: This is because God chose him to be a high priest like Melchizedek. Warning against Turning Away
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ lɛɛ mʋ waa mu oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Mekisedeki kyɩna ɔ gyɛ mʋ. Fan man kan bwii kamaa

english_verse: Much more could be said about this subject. But it is hard to explain, and all of you are slow to understand.
translation_verse: Naafɔɔ n sʋ asɩn damantɛ n tɔwɛ fanɛ lɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ, amaa fan maa mɛɛ nu asɩn kasɛ bilen sʋ mʋ, ɩ bʋlʋn gaa sa fɛɛ n lɛɛ ɩmʋ kasɛ sa fanɛ.

english_verse: By now you should have been teachers, but once again you need to be taught the simplest things about what God has said. You need milk instead of solid food.
translation_verse: Naafɔɔ halɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ nɩmʋ gbaa, ɩ dagaa fɛɛ fan maa tɛɛ fan gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn mʋ akaapʋpʋ. Amaa ɩ maa san i tiri sa fanɛ fɛɛ fan nyɛ ɔsa kʋ, kɛ ɔ bɩla lɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn gyankpaasa mʋ kaapʋ fanɛ mʋ, fan du nɩn fɛɛ nbii pʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ kɩnyapʋ tiri sa bamʋ, nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ agyitɔ budusa.

english_verse: Solid food is for mature people who have been trained to know right from wrong.
translation_verse: Amaa agyitɔ budusa ɩ gyɛ sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba bɩɩla nɩɩ ba dan nɩɩ ba nu Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn, nɩɩ ba bɩɩ adanbɩrasa yɛ alibi mʋ.

english_verse: We must try to become mature and start thinking about more than just the basic things we were taught about Christ. We shouldn't need to keep talking about why we ought to turn from deeds that bring death and why we ought to have faith in God.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan yɛgɛ a yɛgɛ Krisito kusun asɩn gyankpaasa mʋ nɩɩ an bɩɩla mʋ kanɩn, kɛ a dan kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ kpee anɛ ansi tɔ. Ɩ man dagaa a maa bɩla bwii naa bɩɩla npiili asɛ asɩn mʋ, fɛɛ nfɛɛrɛ kɩkyɛɛgɛ lɩɩ atɔ gyaga tɔ, yɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ gyii,

english_verse: And we shouldn't need to keep teaching about baptisms or about the laying on of hands or about people being raised from death and the future judgment.
translation_verse: yɛ kɩkaapʋ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee sʋ, yɛ abaa kɩtaa gyaga asa sʋ kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ, yɛ alewupu kikyiŋi, yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ katalɛ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ dɛ kakpaa.

english_verse: Let's grow up, if God is willing.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kan kyula mʋ, falɛ nɩɩ an biti a waa kɛ a dan.

english_verse: But what about people who turn away after they have already seen the light and have received the gift from heaven and have shared in the Holy Spirit? What about those who turn away after they have received the good message of God and the powers of the future world? There is no way to bring them back. What they are doing is the same as nailing the Son of God to a cross and insulting him in public!
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ ba kan fɔyɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔkpa mʋ sʋ mʋ, ii biti ɩ baa ɩ bʋlʋn sa bamʋ yɛ ba bɩla bwii kyɛɛgɛ bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ lɩɩ bamʋ ɩkpa tɔ ba Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ i du nɩn fɛɛ ba maa bɩla bɛ da Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐Bii mʋ oyu laasa sʋ bee gyila mʋ ipeeli sakyɔ tɔ.

english_verse: A field is useful to farmers, if there is enough rain to make good crops grow. In fact, God will bless such a field.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ kasɛ mʋ nɩɩ bʋlayɩ ɩ da kɩmʋ sʋ saŋa kʋmaa, nɩɩ kɩ sʋ kii nuu mʋ, ɩ waa adɔɔ‐gyitɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋrɔn ɩ sa bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ dɔɔ kɩmʋ sʋ mʋ, kasɛ mʋ ɩ nyɛ kusee Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ.

english_verse: But land that produces only thornbushes is worthless. It is likely to fall under God's curse, and in the end it will be set on fire.
translation_verse: Amaa kasɛ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ kɔyɩ iwii yɛ afitiri mʋ bɩrɛ man sʋ kyaarɛ, nɩɩ kɩ man bʋ kata yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ tɔwɛ kɩmʋ nnɔ. Nɩɩ ɩmʋ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ fʋlɔn ii biti ɔ dɛɛ kɩmʋ.

english_verse: My friends, we are talking this way. But we are sure that you are doing those really good things people do when they are being saved.
translation_verse: Mɛ tɔmaa ana kinyi‐bii ɔkɔn, halɩɩ a maa tɔwɛ falɛ gbaa mʋ, fanɛ bɩrɛ a man sʋ kufuu sa fanɛ, an nyi fan maa sʋ atɔ danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ lɩɩ fanɛ kamɔlɩgɛ mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: God is always fair. He will remember how you helped his people in the past and how you are still helping them. You belong to God, and he won't forget the love you have shown his people.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ gyɛ kesintin ogyipu. Ɔ mɛɛ yɛ ɔ tan fanɛ kusun mʋ nɩɩ fan waa yɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ fan sʋ sa mʋ mʋ sʋ. Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ fan kyɛ mʋ asa tɔ, nɩɩ fɛn san kyaga sʋ fɛn kyɛ bamʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Then you would never be lazy. You would be following the example of those who had faith and were patient until God kept his promise to them. God's Promise Is Sure
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ a mee biti fɛɛ fan ba biliŋi awʋlɛgyɔpʋ kabwaarɛ‐sun tɔ, amaa fan kasɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii yɛ kenyiita mʋ tɔ, nɩɩ bee biti ba nyɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ sa bamʋ mʋ. An sʋ tamaa sa Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ tɔwɛ mʋ

english_verse: No one is greater than God. So he made a promise in his own name when he said to Abraham,
translation_verse: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ sa Abraham mʋ, ɔ taa mʋ gbaa‐gbaa kɩtɩɩ bɔ ntan, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔkʋ man bʋ tɔ ɔ kyɔ mʋ,

english_verse: Then after Abraham had been very patient, he was given what God had promised.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ Abraham nyɛ kenyiita gyoo nɩɩ ɔ nyɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ sa mʋ mʋ.

english_verse: When anyone wants to settle an argument, they make a vow by using the name of someone or something greater than themselves.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ asa bɛ kan bee biti ba bɔ ntan mʋ, bɛɛ taa ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kyɔ bamʋ gbaa‐gbaa bamʋ kɩtɩɩ bɔ ntan. Ntan kɩbɔ mʋ ɩɩ kaapʋ kesintin, nɩɩ ɩ yɛgɛ ntan mʋ nɩɩ ba bɔ mʋ ɩ tɩn kamɔɔrɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: So when God wanted to prove for certain his promise to his people could not be broken, he made a vow.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ kanɩn maŋa sʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ maa biti fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ɔ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ sa bamʋ ba wu fɛɛ ɔ mɛɛ yɛ ɔ kyɛɛgɛ mʋ nfɛɛrɛ mʋ, ɔ yɩlɛ ɩmʋ sʋ bɔ ntan.

english_verse: God cannot tell lies! And so his promises and vows are two things that can never be changed. We have run to God for safety. Now his promises should greatly encourage us to take hold of the hope that is right in front of us.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ waa falɛ atɔ anyɔ anɩmʋ. Ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ kɩda yɛ mʋ ntan kɩbɔ, mʋ nɩɩ ɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mɛɛ kyɛɛgɛ, abɛɛ ɔ mɛɛ taalɛ tɩn antɩŋɛsa. Kanɩn sʋ anɛ mʋ nɩɩ an sɩlɛ naa loo mʋ mʋ, a kpan anɛ n‐yɩɩ gaa kɛ a kɩtaa tamaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ dɛ anɛ ansi tɔ mʋ kenken.

english_verse: This hope is like a firm and steady anchor for our souls. In fact, hope reaches behind the curtain and into the most holy place.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ kɩbɩlɩtɔ kparɛ mʋ nɩɩ ki budu nɩɩ kɩtaa ɔkʋlɩ lala kɩ yɩlɛ katɩn kʋlʋn mʋ, kanɩn nɩɩ anɛ tamaa ɩ kɩtaa anɛ yɩlɛ katɩn kʋlʋn anɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ. Kanɩn tamaa nɩmʋ ɩ bɔla loo Ɩbwaarɛ osunkpa opula kyɩrɛkyɩrɛkpa kɩkyɩrɛkyɩrɛ sʋsʋ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Jesus has gone there ahead of us, and he is our high priest forever, just like Melchizedek.
translation_verse: Tʋtɔ ɩ gyɛ katɩn mʋ nɩɩ Yesu yɩlɛ anɛ ayaa tɔ gyankpaa anɛ naa loo. Mʋ ɩ ba waa Ɩbwaarɛ oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ kakpaa fɛɛ ɔkpa kʋlʋn mʋ nɩɩ Mekisedeki kyɩna ɔ gyɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Melchizedek was both king of Salem and priest of God Most High. He was the one who went out and gave Abraham his blessing, when Abraham returned from killing the kings.
translation_verse: Mekisedeki nɩmʋ kyɩna gyii Salem kadɛ kuwura, nɩɩ ɔ bɩla ɔ gyɛ Ɔlʋnpʋ Ɩbwaarɛ Owura lala mʋ Oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ. Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Abraham naa kɔ taalɛ awura akʋ, nɩɩ o bwii ɛɛ ba mʋ, Mekisedeki gyaŋa mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ waa Abraham kusee.

english_verse: Then Abraham gave him a tenth of everything he had. The meaning of the name Melchizedek is “King of Justice.” But since Salem means “peace,” he is also “King of Peace.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ Abraham naa nyɛ ɩkɔ mʋ tɔ mʋ, ɔ barɩgɛ ɩmʋ tɔ ntun kudu, nɩɩ ɔ taa ketun kʋlʋn sa Mekisedeki. Mekisedeki kɩtɩɩ mʋ kasɛ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, “Ɩkpa‐kyiigisa Owura.” Nɩɩ ɔ bɩla ɔ gyɛ Salem owura, nɩɩ Salem kasɛ ɩ gyɛ yɛ “Kayɩɩ yuuli.”

english_verse: We are not told he had a father or mother or ancestors or beginning or end. He is like the Son of God and will be a priest forever.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ man nyi sɛhn lɩɩ mʋ‐sɛ abɛɛ mu‐nyi sʋ, nɩɩ ɔ man lɩɩ kɩnaana kʋ tɔ. Nɩɩ ɔkʋ man nyi mʋ kɩkʋʋgɛ abɛɛ mu lewu asɩn. Nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ kakpaa fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐Bii mʋ.

english_verse: The Law teaches that even Abraham's descendants must give a tenth of what they possess. And they are to give this to their own relatives, who are the descendants of Levi and are priests.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Mosesi nbara mʋ ɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ bamʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba gyɛ Lewi kɩnaana mʋ, nɩɩ bee gyii Ɩbwaarɛ kiseepu mʋ ɩ sʋ ɔkpa ba kɔɔlɛ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba barɩgɛ tɔ ntun kudu tɔ mʋ ketun kʋlʋn bamʋ asa asɛ, yɛgɛ bamʋ asa gbaa ba gyɛ Abraham kɩnaana tɔ.

english_verse: Although Melchizedek wasn't a descendant of Levi, Abraham gave him a tenth of what he had. Then Melchizedek blessed Abraham, who had been given God's promise.
translation_verse: Mekisedeki man gyɛ Lewi kanan tɔ mʋ nɩɩ bee gyii Ɩbwaarɛ kiseepu mʋ tɔ ɔkʋ, amaa ɔ kɔɔlɛ nbarɩgɛ tɔ ntun kudu mʋ tɔ ketun kʋlʋn lɩɩ Abraham asɛ nɩɩ ɔ waa mʋ kusee, nɩɩ Abraham mɔɔ ɩ gyɛ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ wʋla da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ sa mʋ.

english_verse: Everyone agrees a person who gives a blessing is greater than the one who receives the blessing.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ kamɔɔrɛ‐gyii fɛɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa kusee mʋ, mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔbɩlɩsa ɔ kyɔ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kɔɔlɛ kusee mʋ.

english_verse: Priests are given a tenth of what people earn. But all priests die, except Melchizedek, and the Scriptures teach that he is alive.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kiseepu mʋ asɩn tɔ mʋ, aseepu mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kɔɔlɛ nbarɩgɛ tɔ atɔ ntun kudu tɔ ketun kʋlʋn mʋ bee wu. Amaa lɩɩ Mekisedeki mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ ntun kudu tɔ ketun kʋlʋn mʋ bɩrɛ, ba lɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ ɔ tɛ nkpa tɔ.

english_verse: Levi's descendants are now the ones who receive a tenth from people. We could even say that when Abraham gave Melchizedek a tenth, Levi also gave him a tenth.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ gbaa ɩ taalɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, Lewi kebunɔ abii tɔ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kɔɔlɛ ntun kudu tɔ ketun kʋlʋn gbaa mʋ ba gyɛ Abraham anaana‐bii nɩn. Ɩmʋ ɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ Abraham maa ka ntun kudu tɔ ketun kʋlʋn mʋ, bamʋ gbaa ba ka kanɩn.

english_verse: This is because Levi was born later into the family of Abraham, who gave a tenth to Melchizedek.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Mekisedeki gyaŋa Abraham mʋ, ba man pɩɩta kʋʋgɛ Lewi kebunɔ abii mʋ. Yesu du nɩn fɛɛ Mekisedeki

english_verse: Even though the Law of Moses says the priests must be descendants of Levi, those priests cannot make anyone perfect. So there needs to be a priest like Melchizedek, rather than one from the priestly family of Aaron.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Lewi kɩnaana kiseepu kigyii mʋ nɩɩ ki buu Mosesi Nbara mʋ, kɩ daa taalɛ waa nyɩmɩsa kyɛɛkyɛɛ nɩn, naafɔɔ mɩnɛ waa sʋ nɩɩ ɩ san i tiri fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ oseepu pʋpwɛ kʋ ɔ bɩla be gyii kiseepu fɛɛ ɔkpa kʋlʋn mʋ nɩɩ Mekisedeki kyɩna ɔ gyɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ Lewi kɩnaana‐bii Aron lɛɛ mʋ?

english_verse: And when the rules for selecting a priest are changed, the Law must also be changed.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kiseepu kigyii ɩ maa kyɛɛgɛ mʋ, kanɩn gbaa nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ Nbara mʋ gbaa ɩ maa kyɛɛgɛ.

english_verse: The person we are talking about is our Lord, who came from a tribe that had never had anyone to serve as a priest at the altar.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu mʋ nɩɩ asɩn nɩmʋ ɩ tɔwɛ ɩ lɩɩ mʋ sʋ falɛ mʋ, lɩɩ kebunɔ kʋ tɔ nɩn. Nɩɩ kebunɔ maŋa tɔ ɔkʋ man pɩɩta gyii Ɩbwaarɛ kiseepu kɛ o sun kiseepu kusun.

english_verse: Everyone knows he came from the tribe of Judah, and Moses never said priests would come from that tribe.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩ gyɛ kesintin fɛɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu mʋ lɩɩ Gyuda kebunɔ tɔ nɩn, amaa kanɩn kebunɔ maŋa bɩrɛ, Mosesi man tɔwɛ yɛ bee biti ba be gyii Ɩbwaarɛ kiseepu.

english_verse: All of this becomes clearer, when someone who is like Melchizedek is appointed to be a priest.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ asɩn mʋ ɩ lɛɛ kaapʋ tɔ danbɩrasa. Ɩbwaarɛ oseepu pʋpwɛ kʋ ba, nɩɩ o du fɛɛ Mekisedeki.

english_verse: because the Law cannot make anything perfect. At the same time, we are given a much better hope, and it can bring us close to God.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Mosesi nbara man taalɛ waa kʋtɔ kʋmaa lʋwɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti sʋ kyɛɛkyɛɛ. Amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ an sʋ tamaa danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ an bɔla sʋ an nin an tiri Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: God himself made a promise when this priest was appointed. But he did not make a promise like this when the other priests were appointed. The promise he made is, “I, the Lord, promise that you will be a priest forever! And I will never change my mind!”
translation_verse: Amaa Yesu bɩrɛ maa ba waa Ɩbwaarɛ oseepu mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ bɔ ntan tii sʋ, nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Mɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ n bɔ ntan, nɩɩ n mɛɛ yɛ n kyɛɛgɛ mɛ nfɛɛrɛ, fʋ ɩ gyɛ oseepu kakpaa.”

english_verse: But Jesus will never die, and so he will be a priest forever!
translation_verse: Amaa lɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Yesu maa tɛ nkpa tɔ kakpaa sʋ mʋ, ee gyii Ɩbwaarɛ kiseepu mʋ nɩɩ kɩ man sʋ ɔkaa.

english_verse: He is forever able to save the people he leads to God, because he always lives to speak to God for them.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ Yesu ɩ taalɛ mɔlɩgɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba bɔla mʋ sʋ ba Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ mʋ kakpaa, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ tɛ nkpa tɔ kakpaa nɩɩ ɔ yɩlɛ tɔ ɛɛ kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɛɛ sa bamʋ.

english_verse: Jesus is the high priest we need. He is holy and innocent and faultless, and not at all like us sinners. Jesus is honored above all beings in heaven,
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ dagaa sa anɛ a maa nyɛ. Nɩɩ mʋ ɩ bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ ansi, nɩɩ mʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ man sʋ alibi kʋ, nɩɩ ɔ man sʋ ineesi kʋ, nɩɩ ɔ man du fɛɛ alibi awaapʋ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ diyaa mʋ sʋsʋ ɔ kyɔ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ mʋ ayɛ.

english_verse: and he is better than any other high priest. Jesus doesn't need to offer sacrifices each day for his own sins and then for the sins of the people. He offered a sacrifice once for all, when he gave himself.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Yesu man du fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Aseepu abɩlɩsa banban mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ gyankpaa bɛɛ lɛɛ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ alibi saraga kakɛ kʋmaa, pɔyɩ nɩɩ bɛɛ lɛɛ asa n‐yɩɩ sʋ alibi saraga mʋ. Amaa Yesu bɩrɛ man waa kanɩn, ɔ taa mʋ mʋ n‐yɩɩ lɛɛ saraga sa alibi awaapʋ kɩlɩɩ kʋlʋn.

english_verse: The Law appoints priests who have weaknesses. But God's promise, which came later than the Law, appoints his Son. And he is the perfect high priest forever.
translation_verse: Mosesi nbara kɩkaapʋ mʋ sʋ mʋ, asa mʋ nɩɩ ba be gyii Ɩbwaarɛ kiseepu bɩlɩsa mʋ kpini ba gyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man taalɛ kɩtaa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ kyɛɛkyɛɛ. Amaa Mosesi nbara mʋ kamaa mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ bɔ ntan lɛɛ mu‐Bii ba waa Oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ mʋ nɩɩ o du kyɛɛkyɛɛ naa fʋʋ ɔkaa.

english_verse: What I mean is we have a high priest who sits at the right side of God's great throne in heaven.
translation_verse: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ an tɔwɛ falɛ kpini mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, an sʋ Ɩbwaarɛ oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kuwura‐gya lala mʋ gyisa sʋ sʋsʋ.

english_verse: He also serves as the priest in the most holy place inside the real tent there in heaven. This tent of worship was set up by the Lord, not by humans.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ee sun kiseepu kusun opula kyɩrɛkyɩrɛkpa kɩkyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ tɔ, nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ tantɩ kubuu gbaa‐gbaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ sʋsʋ mʋ. Nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ gbaa‐gbaa i yii kɩmʋ, man gyɛ nyɩmɩsa.

english_verse: If he were here on earth, he would not be a priest at all, because here the Law appoints other priests to offer sacrifices.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔ dɩn ɔ bʋ kasɛ sʋ nɩn, naafɔɔ ɔ mɛɛ yɛ ɔ baa ɔ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ oseepu kpini‐kpini. Lɩɩ fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bee gyii Ɩbwaarɛ aseepu mʋ, ba wʋla ba bʋ tɔ bɛɛ lɛɛ saraga fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Mosesi nbara mʋ ɩ kaapʋ mʋ.

english_verse: But the tent where they serve is just a copy and a shadow of the real one in heaven. Before Moses made the tent, he was told, “Be sure to make it exactly like the pattern you were shown on the mountain!”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kasɛ sʋ Ɩbwaarɛ aseepu kusun mʋ gyɛ sʋsʋ lɛɛ mʋ keduli nɩn, man gyɛ kɩmʋ gbaa‐gbaa nɩn. Kanɩn sʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Mosesi ii biti o yii Ɩbwaarɛ tantɩ kubuu mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ da mu kumu tɔ tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, “Kɩɩ sʋ, kɛ fu yii mi osunkpa tantɩ kubuu mʋ kyɛɛkyɛɛ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n kaapʋ fʋ kɩbɩɩ mʋ sʋ mʋ.”

english_verse: Now Christ has been appointed to serve as a priest in a much better way, and he has given us much assurance of a better agreement.
