english_verse: But they were told that they were serving you and not themselves. They preached to you by the power of the Holy Spirit, who was sent from heaven. And their message was only for you, even though angels would like to know more about it. Chosen To Live a Holy Life
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ kaapʋ bamʋ fɛɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ba tɔwɛ mʋ ɩ man gyɛ bamʋ gbaa‐gbaa bamʋ lɛɛ, amaa asa mʋ nɩɩ bee biti ba ba kamaa tɔ mʋ lɛɛ. Fanɛ ɩ gyɛ kamaa tɔ abi mʋ nɩɩ fan nu asɩn nɩmʋ lɩɩ ndaga atɔwɛpʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa ba sa fanɛ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ nɩɩ kɩ lɩɩ sʋsʋ ɔlɔn tɔ mʋ. Halɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ gbaa bee biti ba nu asɩn mʋ kasɛ. Fan baa fan du kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ

english_verse: Behave like obedient children. Don't let your lives be controlled by your desires, as they used to be.
translation_verse: Fan waa nbii mʋ nɩɩ bee nu Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ, kɛ fan man taa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ waa atɔ gyaga mʋ nɩɩ fan daa kyɩna fan man nyi nɩɩ fan waa mʋ.

english_verse: Always live as God's holy people should, because God is the one who chose you, and he is holy.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ fanɛ mʋ maa du kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ sʋ mʋ, fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fan baa fan du kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ fanɛ awaasa kpini tɔ.

english_verse: That's why the Scriptures say, “I am the holy God, and you must be holy too.”
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ tɔwɛ mʋ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, “Fan baa fan du kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ, kpalɩ fɛɛ n du kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ nɩn.”

english_verse: You say that God is your Father, but God doesn't have favorites! He judges all people by what they do. So you must honor God while you live as strangers here on earth.
translation_verse: Ɩ gyɛ kesintin fɛɛ fan tɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ anɛ‐Sɛ. Mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ kɩɩ ansi tɔ pɔyɩ nɩɩ ɛɛ talɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ maa mʋ awaasa. Kanan sʋ fan taa kakyɩna mʋ nɩɩ kɩ sʋ bɛɛrɛɛ kyɩna dulinyaa tɔ fɛɛ afɔ.

english_verse: You were rescued from the useless way of life you learned from your ancestors. But you know you were not rescued by such things as silver or gold that don't last forever.
translation_verse: Yɛ fen nyi fɛɛ man gyɛ atɔ nyitasa fɛɛ gbiti abɛɛ suwa, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa ka fanɛ kʋkɔ lɩɩ fanɛ kakyɩna gyaga mʋ nɩɩ fan bɩɩla lɩɩ fanɛ naana ana asɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Christ was chosen even before the world was created, but because of you, he did not come until these last days.
translation_verse: Pɔyɩ kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ tʋʋ dulinyaa mʋ, ɔ wʋla lɛɛ Yesu yɩla fɛɛ o be wu mɔlɩgɛ fanɛ, nɩɩ fanɛ sʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ mʋ kaapʋ saŋa laalaalʋwɛ nɩmʋ tɔ.

english_verse: And when he did come, it was to lead you to have faith in God, who raised him from death and honored him in a glorious way. This is why you have put your faith and hope in God.
translation_verse: Fan bɔla Yesu sʋ nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ o kyiŋi mʋ lɩɩ lewu tɔ, nɩɩ ɔ bʋnyaa mʋ mʋ gyii. Ɩmʋ sʋ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii yɛ fanɛ tamaa ɩ bʋ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔ.

english_verse: You obeyed the truth, and your souls were made pure. Now you sincerely love each other. But you must keep on loving with all your heart.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ fan maa bɩya fanɛ asʋ kasɛ sa kesintin asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ fwɩɩ fanɛ sʋ, nɩɩ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ fan nyɛ kebiti sa fanɛ bɩrɩsa ana akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ, fan taa kebiti mʋ nɩɩ kɩ lɩɩ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ mʋ biti abaa.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “Humans wither like grass, and their glory fades like wild flowers. Grass dries up, and flowers fall to the ground.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Asɩn kyanyɩlasa mʋ ɩɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, Asa kpini be du nɩn fɛɛ afitiri, nɩɩ bamʋ bʋnyaa kpini du nɩn fɛɛ afitiri ntʋtʋlɛ. Afitiri ii wu kɛ ɩmʋ ntʋtʋlɛ mʋ gbaa ɩɩ kpɩkpaa tɩyɛ,

english_verse: But what the Lord has said will stand forever.” Our good news to you is what the Lord has said.
translation_verse: amaa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ asɩn mʋ bɩrɛ ɩ bʋ tɔ kakpaa. Kanɩn asɩn maŋa ɩ gyɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ ba tɔwɛ sa fanɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Stop being hateful! Quit trying to fool people, and start being sincere. Don't be jealous or say cruel things about others.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan lɛɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ alibi ɩkpa kʋmaa nɩmʋ sʋ yɛ npɩna yɛ kebunbun ansi yɛ kayɩɩ basa yɛ kɩtɩɩ kinyita tɔ.

english_verse: Be like newborn babies who are thirsty for the pure spiritual milk that will help you grow and be saved.
translation_verse: Fan biti asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ fɛɛ nbii pʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kɩɩ bee biti kɩnyapʋ‐kyu mʋ, kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ fan dan fanɛ kamɔlɩgɛ mʋ tɔ naa lʋwɛ.

english_verse: Come to Jesus Christ. He is the living stone people have rejected, but which God has chosen and highly honored.
translation_verse: Fan ba Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu mʋ asɛ. Mʋ ɩ gyɛ kubuu mʋ nɩɩ kɩ sʋ nkpa, nɩɩ asa ba kina mʋ, amaa Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mʋ fɛɛ mʋ ɩ bɔla mu ansi.

english_verse: And now you are living stones being used to build a spiritual house. You are also a group of holy priests, and with the help of Jesus Christ you will offer sacrifices that please God.
translation_verse: Fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fan gyɛ abuu mʋ nɩɩ ɩ sʋ nkpa, kɛ fan yɛgɛ ɔ taa fanɛ pɔyɩ kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ. Kɛ fan bɔla Yesu Krisito sʋ fan ba waa Ɩbwaarɛ aseepu kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ, kɛ fan lɛɛ kayaayu tɔ saraga mʋ nɩɩ ki gyii Ɩbwaarɛ ansi mʋ sa mʋ.

english_verse: It is just as God says in the Scriptures, “Look! I am placing in Zion a choice and precious cornerstone. No one who has faith in this one will be disappointed.”
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ mʋ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, “Fan kɩɩ, n sʋ kɩbɔntɔnbʋlɔntɔ kubuu kparɛ mʋ nɩɩ n lɛɛ n yii Siyon kɩbɩɩ sʋ Gyerusalem kadɛ tɔ. Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii mʋ, man bʋ tɔ o gyii ipeeli.”

english_verse: You are followers of the Lord, and this stone is precious to you. But it isn't precious to those who refuse to follow him. They are the builders who tossed aside the stone that turned out to be the most important one of all.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kubuu mʋ kɩ dagaa sa fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii mʋ, amaa kɩ man dagaa sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba man kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii mʋ. “Kubuu mʋ nɩɩ apɔyɩpʋ ba kina mʋ, kɩmʋ ɩ ba biliŋi kɩbɔntɔnbʋlɔntɔ kubuu tirisa.”

english_verse: But you are God's chosen and special people. You are a group of royal priests and a holy nation. God has brought you out of darkness into his marvelous light. Now you must tell all the wonderful things he has done. The Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Amaa fanɛɛ fanɛ bɩrɛ fan gyɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ, nɩɩ fan gyɛ mu aseepu mʋ nɩɩ bee gyii kuwura, nɩɩ fan gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ asa, nɩɩ fan bɩla fan gyɛ mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ gbaa‐gbaa asa. Mʋ ɩ lɛɛ fanɛ lɩɩ kitentenbiri tɔ ba mʋ fɩtɩla kparɛ mʋ tɔ fɛɛ fan ba lɛɛ mʋ awaasa lala mʋ kaapʋ.

english_verse: “Once you were nobody. Now you are God's people. At one time no one had mercy on you. Now God has treated you with kindness.” Live as God's Servants Should
translation_verse: Saŋa kʋ tɔ mʋ fan man gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asa, amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ fan gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asa. Saŋa kʋ tɔ mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ man kyɩna ee wu fanɛ kʋwɛɛ, amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ o wu fanɛ kʋwɛɛ.

english_verse: Dear friends, you are foreigners and strangers on this earth. So I beg you not to surrender to those desires that fight against you.
translation_verse: Mi‐nyi mu‐bii ana Krisito tɔ, fan gyɛ afɔ mʋ nɩɩ fan yaasɛ tɔ loo ndɛndɛmandɛ tɔ, n tɔwɛ n waa fanɛ fɛɛ fan lɛɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kebiti tɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ kɔ yɛ ɔkala mʋ.

english_verse: Always let others see you behaving properly, even though they may still accuse you of doing wrong. Then on the day of judgment, they will honor God by telling the good things they saw you do.
translation_verse: Fan taa kakyɩna danbɩrasa kyɩna yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man kɔɔlɛ Yesu gyii mʋ, halɩɩ nɩɩ bɛɛ pwɩɩ fanɛ yɛ fan gyɛ alibi awaapʋ gbaa mʋ, bee biti ba baa bee wu fanɛ awaasa danbɩrasa, kɛ ba bʋnyaa Ɩbwaarɛ kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ ee biti ɔ ba talɛ asa awaasa mʋ. Fan bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa alʋlʋnpʋ yɛ fanɛ‐nyɩrɩpɛ ana

english_verse: The Lord wants you to obey all human authorities, especially the Emperor, who rules over everyone.
translation_verse: Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ sʋ mʋ, fan bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa anyɩmɩsa alʋlʋnpʋ kʋmaa nɩmʋ. Fan bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa owura lala mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ kumu wuya,

english_verse: You must also obey governors, because they are sent by the Emperor to punish criminals and to praise good citizens.
translation_verse: yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ o sun fɛɛ ba ba bɩɩtɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba waa alibi mʋ asʋ, kɛ ba yɩn bamʋ nɩɩ ba waa adanbɩrasa mʋ.

english_verse: You are free, but still you are God's servants, and you must not use your freedom as an excuse for doing wrong.
translation_verse: Fan kyɩna fɛɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba gyii bamʋ n‐yɩɩ, amaa fan man taa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kigyii mʋ baala waa alibi. Amaa fan kyɩna fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ayaafɔlɛ.

english_verse: Respect everyone and show special love for God's people. Honor God and respect the Emperor. The Example of Christ's Suffering
translation_verse: Fan taa bɛɛrɛɛ sa ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ. Fen biti abaa, fanɛ akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu. Fan sɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ. Fan taa bɛɛrɛɛ sa Owura lala mʋ.

english_verse: Servants, you must obey your masters and always show respect to them. Do this, not only to those who are kind and thoughtful, but also to those who are cruel.
translation_verse: Kɩkpaara sʋ ayaafɔlɛ, fan bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa fanɛ‐nyɩrɩpɛ ana kɛ fan nu bamʋ asɛ. Nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba bʋrɔn nɩɩ ba bʋpɔɔ mʋ nkʋn, amaa yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bamʋ amu tɔ ɩ bʋlʋn mʋ gbaa.

english_verse: After all, God chose you to suffer as you follow in the footsteps of Christ, who set an example by suffering for you.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɩɩ fanɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ Krisito gbaa gyii awʋrʋfɔ sa fanɛ kɛ fan waa fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa yɩla anɛ mʋ, kanɩn sʋ mʋ fan buu mʋ ayaa tɔ.

english_verse: Christ did not sin or ever tell a lie.
translation_verse: “Ɔ man waa kilibi kʋ, nɩɩ npɩna ɩ man bʋ mʋ kɔnɔ tɔ.”

english_verse: Although he was abused, he never tried to get even. And when he suffered, he made no threats. Instead, he had faith in God, who judges fairly.
translation_verse: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ba saalɛ mʋ mʋ, ɔ man bwiiyaa asebi mʋ sa. Nɩɩ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ o gyii awʋrʋfɔ mʋ, ɔ man ŋaala bamʋ amaa ɔ taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ waa ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ talɛ kesintin ɔkpa sʋ mʋ abaa tɔ.

english_verse: Christ carried the burden of our sins. He was nailed to the cross, so we would stop sinning and start living right. By his cuts and bruises you are healed.
translation_verse: Krisito gbaa‐gbaa ɛɛ kɔɔlɛ anɛ alibi sʋla nɩɩ ba mɔɔ mʋ oyu laasa mʋ sʋ, kɛ ɩ waa fɛɛ anɛ n‐yɩɩ i wu sa alibi kɩwaa, kɛ a kyɩna kakyɩna mʋ nɩɩ anɛ ɩkpa i kyiigi. Lɩɩ Krisito akyʋʋkyʋʋ ɩlɔ mʋ sʋ mʋ fan nyɛ kɩkyɛ.

english_verse: You had wandered away like sheep. Now you have returned to the one who is your shepherd and protector.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ fan daa fen du fɛɛ nbʋlʋpʋ fɔyɩsa, amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ fan bwii ba fanɛ Ɔkpapʋ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kun fanɛ kala ana sʋ mʋ asɛ.

english_verse: If you are a wife, you must put your husband first. Even if he opposes our message, you will win him over by what you do. No one else will have to say anything to him,
translation_verse: Kanɩn ɔkpa kʋlʋn maŋa sʋ mʋ, akyɩɩ‐kilipu fan bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa fanɛ‐kuli ana. Nɩɩ fan waa kanɩn mʋ fanɛ kɩbaabʋtɔ danbɩrasa mʋ kii biti yɛgɛ bamʋ tɔ akʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba man kɔɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn mʋ gyii mʋ, ba kyɛɛgɛ bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ kɛ ba kɔɔlɛ asɩn mʋ gyii. Nɩɩ ɩ man bɩla i tiri fɛɛ fan tɔwɛ asɩn mʋ sa bamʋ.

english_verse: because he will see how you honor God and live a pure life.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ fanɛ‐kuli ana mʋ, bee biti ba wu fanɛ kakyɩna danbɩrasa mʋ yɛ bɛɛrɛɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan sʋ sa abwaarɛsɩn mʋ.

english_verse: Don't depend on things like fancy hairdos or gold jewelry or expensive clothes to make you look beautiful.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ kɩlɔŋɔ fɛɛ inyini kiŋmina yɛ suwa atɔ suusa fɛɛ ɩkyalagasʋ yɛ agbeeleebi abɛɛ ataa danbɩrasa nɩɩ fen biti fan taa waa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ ɔdan.

english_verse: Be beautiful in your heart by being gentle and quiet. This kind of beauty will last, and God considers it very special.
translation_verse: Amaa fan yɛgɛ fanɛ kɩbaabʋtɔ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ n‐yɩɩ kɩbɩya kasɛ, yɛ nfɛɛrɛ kasɛ kɩdɛ mʋ, ɔ lɛɛ fanɛ ɔdan mʋ nɩɩ i mee nyita kakaakʋ mʋ kaapʋ. Kanɩn ɔdan nɩmʋ ɩ bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ ansi.

english_verse: Long ago those women who worshiped God and put their hope in him made themselves beautiful by putting their husbands first.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ dɩdaa akyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ bee sun Ɩbwaarɛ nɩɩ ba sʋ tamaa mʋ tɔ mʋ, kanɩn ɔkpa nɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ ba taa waa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ ɔdan. Ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ ba maa bɩya bamʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa bamʋ‐kuli ana.

english_verse: For example, Sarah obeyed Abraham and called him her master. You are her true children, if you do right and don't let anything frighten you.
translation_verse: Kanan nɩɩ anɛ naana‐kyɩɩsa Sara gbaa waa. O nu mu‐kuli Abraham asɛ nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ mʋ yɛ, “mɛ‐nyɩrɩpɛ!” Nɩɩ fan kan waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋrɔn nɩɩ fan man sʋ kufuu mʋ, fan gyɛ Sara anaana‐bii.

english_verse: If you are a husband, you should be thoughtful of your wife. Treat her with honor, because she isn't as strong as you are, and she shares with you in the gift of life. Then nothing will stand in the way of your prayers. Suffering for Doing Right
translation_verse: Kanɩn ɔkpa kʋlʋn maŋa sʋ nɩɩ fanɛ anyɩn gbaa, fan su fanɛ‐ka ana sʋ fanɛ kekili tɔ, yɛgɛ fan da sʋ fɛɛ akyɩɩ mʋ ba man bʋlʋn fɛɛ fanɛ anyɩn. Kanɩn sʋ fan taa bɛɛrɛɛ sa bamʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fanaa akyɩɩ mʋ kpini fen biti fan nyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala nkpa atɔ mʋ kpini kyɛɛkyɛɛ. Nɩɩ fan waa kanɩn mʋ, sɛhn mɛɛ yɛ o tii fanɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ ɔkpa. Kɩdanbɩrasa kɩwaa yɛ kɩmʋ Awʋrʋfɔ kigyii

english_verse: Finally, all of you should agree and have concern and love for each other. You should also be kind and humble.
translation_verse: Mɛ asɩn mʋ kpini ɩ gyɛ yɛ, fanɛ akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ kpini fan waa kɔnɔ kʋlʋn kɛ fan wu abaa kʋwɛɛ, kɛ fan biti abaa fɛɛ kenyibi, kɛ fan waa kɩdanbɩrasa sa abaa kɛ fan bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa abaa.

english_verse: Don't be hateful and insult people just because they are hateful and insult you. Instead, treat everyone with kindness. You are God's chosen ones, and he will bless you. The Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Fan man taa alibi ka alibi kʋkɔ, kɛ fan man taa asebi ka tɛɛla asebi kʋkɔ. Amaa fan kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ fɛɛ ɔ taa kusee ka bamʋ kʋkɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɩɩ fanɛ yɛ fan ba waa, kɛ fan ba nyɛ mʋ kusee mʋ.

english_verse: “Do you really love life? Do you want to be happy? Then stop saying cruel things and quit telling lies.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee biti kakyɩna danbɩrasa yɛ kensi‐gyii, kɛ ɔ kyɩna nkpa tɔ kyɛɛrɛɛ mʋ, ɔ man yɛgɛ ntɔwɛ libi yɛ atɩntɩnsa ɩ ba ɩ lɩɩ mʋ kɔnɔ tɔ.

english_verse: Give up your evil ways and do right, as you find and follow the road to peace.
translation_verse: Kanɩn ɔsa maŋa ɔ yɛgɛ alibi kɩwaa kɛ ɔ waa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋrɔn. Ɔ kpan mʋ n‐yɩɩ waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ii biti ɩ bɩya kayɩɩ yuuli, kɛ ɔ kɩtaa tɔ danbɩrasa.

english_verse: The Lord watches over everyone who obeys him, and he listens to their prayers. But he opposes everyone who does evil.”
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɛɛ kɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ bamʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ ee nu bamʋ kɩkʋlɛ saŋa kʋmaa. Amaa bamʋ nɩɩ bɛ waa alibi mʋ bɩrɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ biliŋaa mʋ kamaa sa bamʋ.”

english_verse: Can anyone really harm you for being eager to do good deeds?
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nɩɩ fanɛ ansi ɩ payɩ adanbɩrasa kɩwaa sʋ mʋ, anɩmʋ ii biti ɔ waa fanɛ alibi abɛɛ?

english_verse: Even if you have to suffer for doing good things, God will bless you. So stop being afraid and don't worry about what people might do.
translation_verse: Halɩɩ nɩɩ fan kan gyii awʋrʋfɔ gbaa lɩɩ kɩdanbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ fan waa sʋ mʋ, fanaa kumu ɔkɔn. Fan man sɩlɛ bamʋ kɛ fan man yɛgɛ fanɛ nkɔlɔ n nyita fanɛ.

english_verse: Give a kind and respectful answer and keep your conscience clear. This way you will make people ashamed for saying bad things about your good conduct as a follower of Christ.
translation_verse: Amaa fan taa bwahn kɩwaa yɛ bɛɛrɛɛ lɛɛ bamʋ nnɔ, kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ fanɛ amu tɔ ɛɛ saaŋɛ fanɛ. Ɩnɩmʋ ii biti ɩ yɛgɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɔwɛ bɛɛ pwɩɩ fanɛ lɩɩ Krisito tɔ kakyɩna danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ fan bʋ kɩmʋ tɔ mʋ, be gyii ipeeli.

english_verse: You are better off to obey God and suffer for doing right than to suffer for doing wrong.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti fɛɛ fen gyii awʋrʋfɔ kɩdanbɩrasa sʋ mʋ, ɩ bʋrɔn ɩ kyɔ fan maa gyii awʋrʋfɔ alibi sʋ.

english_verse: Christ died once for our sins. An innocent person died for those who are guilty. Christ did this to bring you to God, when his body was put to death and his spirit was made alive.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Krisito gbaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ maa waa alibi kʋ mʋ, wu sa alibi wuya ana. O wu kɩlɩɩ kʋlʋn kakpaa sa alibi, kɛ ɩ lɔŋɔ anaa Ɩbwaarɛ nsana. Ba mɔɔ mʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ tɔ, amaa o bwii kyiŋi kayaayu tɔ ba nkpa tɔ.

english_verse: Christ then preached to the spirits that were being kept in prison.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ o kpee kayaayu tɔ naa tɔwɛ asɩn sa n‐yaayu mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩtaa bamʋ tii yɩla mʋ.

english_verse: They had disobeyed God while Noah was building the boat, but God had been patient with them. Eight people went into that boat and were brought safely through the flood.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ falɛ n‐yaayu nɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ dɩdaa ba kyɩna waa kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn sa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ. Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ nyɛ kenyiita kyɛɛrɛɛ sa bamʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Nowa salɛ ɔkʋlɩ lala mʋ. Ɩnɩmʋ kpini tɔ mʋ, asa kalɩsa fɛɛ asa aburuwa nkʋn i loo ɔkʋlɩ mʋ tɔ nɩɩ ba nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ lɩɩ nkyu mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Those flood waters were like baptism that now saves you. But baptism is more than just washing your body. It means turning to God with a clear conscience, because Jesus Christ was raised from death.
translation_verse: Nowa saŋa nkyu mʋ ɩ yɩlɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee mʋ nɩɩ ɩ mɔlɩgɛ fanɛ. Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ man gyɛ kekyugyee mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ fwɩɩ nyɩmɩsa n‐yɩɩ sʋ ineesi. Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee ɩ gyɛ nfɛɛrɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an nyɛ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ kɩda sa Ɩbwaarɛ. Nɩɩ ɩɩ mɔlɩgɛ anɛ lɩɩ Yesu Krisito kelewu kyiŋi mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: Christ is now in heaven, where he sits at the right side of God. All angels, authorities, and powers are under his control.
translation_verse: Yesu bwii kyʋn sʋsʋ naa kyɩna Ɩbwaarɛ gyisa sʋ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ yɛ sʋsʋ awuragyi yɛ alʋlʋnpʋ kpini ba bʋ mʋ kasɛ.

english_verse: Christ suffered here on earth. Now you must be ready to suffer as he did, because suffering shows that you have stopped sinning.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Yesu maa gyii awʋrʋfɔ mʋ n‐yɩɩ tɔ sʋ mʋ, ɩmʋ sʋ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fan taa kanɩn nfɛɛrɛ mʋ waa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ ɔlʋn. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ sa awʋrʋfɔ mʋ, alibi ɩ man bɩla ɩ sʋ ɔlʋn mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: It means you have turned from your own desires and want to obey God for the rest of your life.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ lɩɩ ndaga ɩɩ sʋ ii kpee mʋ, fan man bɩla taa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ waa fanɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kebiti, amaa fan waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti.

english_verse: You have already lived long enough like people who don't know God. You were immoral and followed your evil desires. You went around drinking and partying and carrying on. In fact, you even worshiped disgusting idols.
translation_verse: Dɩdaa mʋ fan nyita saŋa waa atɔ mʋ nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man nyi Ɩbwaarɛ ba waa mʋ. Fan taa ineesi waa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ, fan waa kɩbʋrʋkɔɔnɛ, yɛ kata‐bʋʋ, yɛ kɩgyaŋɛ‐gyii yɛ kɩbʋʋ libi, yɛ kɩbaabʋtɔ gyaga yɛ ɩdakpa kusun.

english_verse: Now your former friends wonder why you have stopped running around with them, and they curse you for it.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ i kyinkyin bamʋ nɩɩ ba man nyi Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ fɛɛ fan man bɩla fan tii bamʋ sʋ fɛn waa kanɩn kɩbaabʋtɔ gyaga mʋ. Kanan sʋ ba saalɛ fanɛ.

english_verse: The good news has even been preached to the dead, so that after they have been judged for what they have done in this life, their spirits will live with God.
translation_verse: Kpalɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ Yesu Krisito naa tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ sa alewupu mʋ. Lewu mʋ nɩɩ ba wu mʋ, ɩ gyɛ kʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bun bamʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ, amaa Yesu asɩn mʋ ii biti ɩ yɛgɛ bamʋ kala ana ba kyɩna nkpa tɔ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bʋ tɔ mʋ.

english_verse: Everything will soon come to an end. So be serious and be sensible enough to pray.
translation_verse: Atɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ laalaalʋwɛ i tiri tɔ. Ɩmʋ sʋ fan baa fan da sʋ, kɛ fan kɩtaa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ, kɛ fan taalɛ kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ.

english_verse: Most important of all, you must sincerely love each other, because love wipes away many sins.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ kpini tɔ mʋ, fan biti abaa fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ kebiti kɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ bee bun ansi bɛɛ lɩɩ alibi kpini sʋ.

english_verse: Welcome people into your home and don't grumble about it.
translation_verse: Kɛ fan taa kɔkɔlɔ fuuli kɔɔlɛ abaa kɩfɔ fanɛ akpaara sʋ, yɛgɛ fan man kɔlɩtɛ.

english_verse: Each of you has been blessed with one of God's many wonderful gifts to be used in the service of others. So use your gift well.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ sa ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ kabwaarɛ‐sun tɔ kakɛɛ kʋkwɩɩ‐kʋkwɩɩ. Nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ maa kɩɩ kakɛɛ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa sa mʋ mʋ sʋ, kɛ ɔ taa kyɛ mʋ bɩrɩsa ana tɔ.

english_verse: If you have the gift of speaking, preach God's message. If you have the gift of helping others, do it with the strength that God supplies. Everything should be done in a way that will bring honor to God because of Jesus Christ, who is glorious and powerful forever. Amen. Suffering for Being a Christian
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nɩɩ ɔkʋ lɛɛ ɩ gyɛ asɩn kɩtɔwɛ mʋ, ɔ tɔwɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn. Fɛɛ nɩɩ ɔkʋ lɛɛ ɩ gyɛ o sun asa mʋ, ɩ dagaa fɛɛ ɔ taa ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa sa mʋ mʋ kpini kyɛ tɔ, kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ asa ba bɔla Yesu Krisito sʋ yɩn Ɩbwaarɛ atɔ kpini tɔ. Mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ maŋa nkʋn ɩ dagaa ayɩn‐bi yɛ ɔlʋn lɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ nɩmʋ naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ ɔkaa. Amen! Awʋrʋfɔ kigyii lɩɩ Krisito kibuu sʋ

english_verse: Dear friends, don't be surprised or shocked that you are going through testing that is like walking through fire.
translation_verse: Mi‐nyi mu‐bii ana Krisito tɔ, fan man yɛgɛ i kyinkyin fanɛ fɛɛ awʋrʋfɔ kʋtʋʋ tɔ kɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ fen wu falɛ mʋ, ɩ gyɛ kʋtɔ pʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ ba fanɛ sʋ.

english_verse: Be glad for the chance to suffer as Christ suffered. It will prepare you for even greater happiness when he makes his glorious return.
translation_verse: Amaa fan yɛgɛ fanɛ ansi i gyii fɛɛ fan maa gyii Yesu Krisito awʋrʋfɔ mʋ ɩkʋ. Ɩnɩmʋ ii biti ɩ yɛgɛ fan nyɛ kensi‐gyii tii sʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Yesu ii biti ɔ ba yɛ mʋ bʋnyaa mʋ.

english_verse: Count it a blessing when you suffer for being a Christian. This shows that God's glorious Spirit is with you.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ asa bɛ kan bɛɛ saalɛ fanɛ fɛɛ fan maa gyɛ Krisito abuupu sʋ mʋ, kumu ɔkɔn ɩ gyɛ fanɛ lɛɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu yɛ mʋ bʋnyaa mʋ ɩ gyan fanɛ sʋ.

english_verse: But you deserve to suffer if you are a murderer, a thief, a crook, or a busybody.
translation_verse: Amaa fan man yɛgɛ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ o gyii awʋrʋfɔ fɛɛ ɔ gyɛ asa ɔmɔɔpʋ abɛɛ oyu abɛɛ asɩn libi ɔwaapʋ abɛɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ taa mʋ kɔnɔ ɛɛ waa asa asɩn tɔ.

english_verse: God has already begun judging his own people. And if his judgment begins with us, imagine how terrible it will be for those who refuse to obey his message. The Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti o gyii asa asɩn mʋ ɩɩ fʋʋ. Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti o piili katalɛ mʋ lɩɩ mʋ asa sʋ. Nɩɩ ɔ kan ee biti o piili lɩɩ mʋ asa sʋ falɛ mʋ, bamʋ nɩɩ bee kina abwaarɛsɩn mʋ kunu mʋ, nɛnɛ nɩɩ ii biti ɩ baa i du sa bamʋ?

english_verse: Church leaders, I am writing to encourage you. I too am a leader, as well as a witness to Christ's suffering, and I will share in his glory when it is shown to us.
translation_verse: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ mʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ mɛ, Pita gbaa n gyɛ Krisito akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu ɔbɩlɩsa mʋ, nɩɩ mi ansi i wu kanan mʋ nɩɩ Yesu Krisito wu awʋrʋfɔ, nɩɩ n biti n nyɛ mʋ bʋnyaa mʋ nɩɩ ki biti kɩ ba lɛɛ kaapʋ mʋ, n tɔwɛ n sa fanɛ abɩlɩsa mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ fanɛ tɔ mʋ yɛ,

english_verse: Just as shepherds watch over their sheep, you must watch over everyone God has placed in your care. Do it willingly in order to please God, and not simply because you think you must. Let it be something you want to do, instead of something you do merely to make money.
translation_verse: n kʋlɛ fanɛ gaa fɛɛ, fan kɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa waa fanɛ abaa tɔ mʋ sʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ atɔbwaaya ɔkpapʋ ɩɩ kɩɩ atɔbwaaya sʋ mʋ. Nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ yɛ ba nyan fanɛ, amaa fan kɩɩ bamʋ sʋ lɩɩ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti mʋ. Fan man waa fɛɛ fan sʋ fen biti afulee, amaa fan waa kanɩn taa sun Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: Don't be bossy to those people who are in your care, but set an example for them.
translation_verse: Fan man gyii kuwura bamʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa ba waa fanɛ abaa tɔ mʋ sʋ, amaa fan yɛgɛ fanɛ awaasa ɩ baa ɩ gyɛ bamʋ atɔ bɩɩlasa.

english_verse: Then when Christ the Chief Shepherd returns, you will be given a crown that will never lose its glory.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ fɛɛ Ɔkpapʋ Ɔbɩlɩsa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Yesu Krisito mʋ kan paatɛ lɩɩ ba mʋ, fen biti fan nyɛ mʋ bʋnyaa kuwura‐wʋrʋ mʋ nɩɩ ki mee nyita mʋ. Kɩkaapʋ sa ayaafɔlɛ

english_verse: All of you young people should obey your elders. In fact, everyone should be humble toward everyone else. The Scriptures say, “God opposes proud people, but he helps everyone who is humble.”
translation_verse: Fɔɔ fanɛ ayaafɔlɛ yɛ abite, kanɩn maŋa sʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ fan bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa abɩlɩsa mʋ. Kɛ fanɛ kpini fan bɩya fan n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa abaa, lɩɩ fɛɛ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Ɩbwaarɛ ii tii bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kaapʋ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ mʋ ɔkpa, amaa ɛɛ taa bɛɛrɛɛ ɛɛ sa bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ bɩya bamʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ mʋ.”

english_verse: Be humble in the presence of God's mighty power, and he will honor you when the time comes.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa Ɔlʋnpʋ Ɩbwaarɛ, kɛ ɔ kʋsaa fanɛ sʋsʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: God cares for you, so turn all your worries over to him.
translation_verse: Fan taa fanɛ asɩn tirisa kpini naa tʋʋ mu ansi tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fanɛ asɩn i tiri mʋ.

english_verse: Be on your guard and stay awake. Your enemy, the devil, is like a roaring lion, sneaking around to find someone to attack.
translation_verse: Fan kɩtaa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ, yɛgɛ fan da sʋ. Fanɛ okisipu, Sɩtaanɛ mʋ, ɔ naa ɛɛ kyaabɔɔ fɛɛ kuntun mʋ nɩɩ ee biti ɔkʋ ɔ kɩtaa wɛ.

english_verse: But you must resist the devil and stay strong in your faith. You know that all over the world the Lord's followers are suffering just as you are.
translation_verse: Fan tii mʋ ɔkpa, kɛ fan yɩlɛ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ kenken. Lɩɩ fɛɛ fen nyi fɛɛ fanɛ bɩrɩsa ana akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ dulinyaa tɔ katɩn kʋmaa mʋ gbaa bee wu awʋrʋfɔ kʋlʋn mʋ nɩɩ fen wu falɛ.

english_verse: But God shows undeserved kindness to everyone. That's why he appointed Christ Jesus to choose you to share in his eternal glory. You will suffer for a while, but God will make you complete, steady, strong, and firm.
translation_verse: Amaa fan kan gyii awʋrʋfɔ saŋa gbɛrɛɛ kamaa mʋ, nɩɩ fan naa Yesu Krisito fan maa gyɛ kʋkʋlʋn sʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala wuya mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ fanɛ fɛɛ fan ba nyɛ mʋ bʋnyaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ tɔ kakpaa mʋ, ee biti ɔ kʋsaa fanɛ yɩlɛ, kɛ ɔ waa fanɛ gin, kɛ ɔ waa fanɛ ɔlʋn tɔ, kɛ fan nyɛ ɔyɩlɛkpa.

english_verse: Silvanus helped me write this short letter, and I consider him a faithful follower of the Lord. I wanted to encourage you and tell you how kind God really is, so you will keep on having faith in him.
translation_verse: Anɛ bɩrɩsa Silifanu ɩ kyɛ mɛ tɔ nɩɩ n kyʋrɔɔ fanɛ ɔwʋlɛ dɛɛ nɩɩ mʋ. Ɔ gyɛ kesintin ɔkɔɔlɛ‐gyipu. N kyʋrɔɔ n waa fanɛ aniya tɔ, nɩɩ n tɔwɛ n kaapʋ tɔ fɛɛ ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ kesintin. Kanɩn sʋ fan yɩlɛ tɔ kenken.

english_verse: Greetings from the Lord's followers in Babylon. They are God's chosen ones. Mark, who is like a son to me, sends his greetings too.
translation_verse: Akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ Babilon fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ fanɛ mʋ, bɛɛ fwaala fanɛ. Nɩɩ mɛ kɩyaafɔlɛ Maki gbaa ɩɩ fwaala fanɛ.

english_verse: Give each other a warm greeting. I pray that God will give peace to everyone who belongs to Christ.
translation_verse: Fan taa kebiti lala fwaala abaa. Fanɛ kpini mʋ nɩɩ fan naa Krisito fan gyɛ kʋkʋlʋn mʋ, fan kyɩna yɛ kayɩɩ yuuli tɔ.

english_verse: From Simon Peter, a servant and an apostle of Jesus Christ. To everyone who shares with us in the privilege of believing that our God and Savior Jesus Christ will do what is just and fair.
translation_verse: Ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ lɩɩ mɛ Simon Pita, mʋ nɩɩ n gyɛ Yesu Krisito kɩyaafɔlɛ yɛ osunpu mʋ asɛ. N kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ n sʋ n sa fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ Yesu Krisito gyii, nɩɩ fan nyɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kparɛ fɛɛ anɛ lɛɛ mʋ. Kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kɩnɩmʋ kɩ lɩɩ anɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ Yesu Krisito mʋ nɩɩ mʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi.

english_verse: I pray that God will be kind to you and will let you live in perfect peace! May you keep learning more and more about God and our Lord Jesus. Living as the Lord's Followers
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ fan maa nyi Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu sʋ mʋ, n kʋlɛ fɛɛ fan nyɛ kakyɩna danbɩrasa yɛ kɔkɔlɔ yuuli kʋkyɔ tii sʋ. Fan dan fanɛ kabwaarɛ‐sun tɔ

english_verse: We have everything we need to live a life that pleases God. It was all given to us by God's own power, when we learned he had invited us to share in his wonderful goodness.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ ɔlʋn kparɛ sʋ mʋ, ɔ sa anɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ki tiri anɛ kɛ a taalɛ kyɩna kakyɩna danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ i gyii Ɩbwaarɛ ansi lɩɩ anɛ kinyi mʋ nɩɩ an nyi Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ sʋ. Mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ bɔla mʋ bʋnyaa yɛ mu keduli danbɩrasa sʋ tɩɩ anɛ.

english_verse: God made great and marvelous promises, so his nature would become part of us. Then we could escape our evil desires and the corrupt influences of this world.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ falɛ sʋ mʋ ɔ sa anɛ kakɛɛ kparɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ fɛɛ ee biti ɔ sa anɛ mʋ. Lɩɩ kakɛɛ nɩmʋ sʋ mʋ, an nyɛ taa anɛ n‐yɩɩ waa mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ keduli mʋ tɔ, kɛ a lɛɛ anɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ nkɔlɔ biti mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ atɔ gyɔɔsa dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Do your best to improve your faith by adding goodness, understanding,
translation_verse: Lɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ mʋ fan kpan fanɛ n‐yɩɩ nyɛ kɩdanbɩrasa tii fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ, kɛ fan taa kinyi tii kɩdanbɩrasa mʋ sʋ,

english_verse: If you keep growing in this way, it will show that what you know about our Lord Jesus Christ has made your lives useful and meaningful.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nɩɩ atɔ nɩmʋ kpini ɩ bʋ fanɛ kakyɩna tɔ kʋkyɔ mʋ, ɩɩ kyɛ fanɛ tɔ. Nɩɩ lɩɩ fanɛ kinyi anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito sʋ mʋ, ɩɩ yɛgɛ fan baa fan gyɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ fan sʋ kyaarɛ yɛgɛ fɛn waa atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa.

english_verse: But if you don't grow, you are like someone who is nearsighted or blind, and you have forgotten that your past sins are forgiven.
translation_verse: Amaa ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man nyɛ falɛ atɔ nɩmʋ mʋ gyɛ gyaatanapʋ nɩɩ mu ansi ɩ man kɩɩ kata‐kata. Nɩɩ ɔ tan sʋ fɛɛ Yesu Krisito fwɩɩ mʋ dɩdaa alibi mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kyɩna waa mʋ.

english_verse: My friends, you must do all you can to show God has really chosen and selected you. If you keep on doing this, you won't stumble and fall.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ mʋ, mɛ bɩrɩsa ana akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu fan kpan fanɛ n‐yɩɩ waa atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ fanɛ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɩɩ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ. Nɩɩ fan kan waa kanɩn mʋ, fan mɛɛ yɛ fan siti kɛ fan lɩɩ tɩyɛ.

english_verse: Then our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ will give you a glorious welcome into his kingdom that will last forever.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ falɛ ɔkpa nɩmʋ sʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ kɔɔlɛ fanɛ abaa anyɔ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ yɛ anɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ Yesu Krisito sʋsʋ kuwura‐gyii mʋ nɩɩ kɩ man sʋ ɔkaa mʋ tɔ. Pita tɔwɛ mu kelewu asɩn

english_verse: You are holding firmly to the truth you were given. But I am still going to remind you of these things.
translation_verse: N nyi fɛɛ fan wʋla fan nyi ɩmʋ kpini, nɩɩ fan yɩlɛ kesintin asɩn mʋ nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ gyii mʋ tɔ kenken. Amaa i tiri fɛɛ n bɩla nyiŋi fanɛ falɛ atɔ nɩmʋ saŋa kʋmaa.

english_verse: In fact, I think I should keep on reminding you until I leave this body.
translation_verse: N maa san n tɛ nkpa tɔ falɛ mʋ, ɩ dagaa n maa nyiŋi fanɛ asɩn nɩmʋ n sʋ n da fanɛ n kyiŋi.

english_verse: And our Lord Jesus Christ has already told me that I will soon leave it behind.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ n nyi mɛ nkɛ ɩ man bɩla ɛɛ kyɔ kasɛ sʋ nfɩɩ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito lɛɛ kaapʋ mɛ mʋ.

english_verse: This is why I am doing my best to make sure that each of you remembers all of this after I am gone. The Message about the Glory of Christ
translation_verse: Nɩɩ n biti n kpan mɛ n‐yɩɩ ɔkpa kʋmaa sʋ kɛ mi lewu kamaa mʋ, fan taalɛ nyiŋi atɔ nɩmʋ saŋa kʋmaa.

english_verse: When we told you about the power and the return of our Lord Jesus Christ, we were not telling clever stories someone had made up. But with our own eyes we saw his true greatness.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ a maa tɔwɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito ɔlʋn yɛ mu kibwii‐ba mʋ asɩn mʋ, ɩ man gyɛ atɩntɩnsa asɩrɩkpan nɩɩ an taa tɔwɛ fanɛ asɩn mʋ. Amaa anɛ gbaa‐gbaa anɛ ansi i wu mʋ bʋnyaa kparɛ mʋ.

english_verse: God, our great and wonderful Father, truly honored him by saying, “This is my own dear Son, and I am pleased with him.”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ nyɛ bɛɛrɛɛ yɛ bʋnyaa lɩɩ Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ mʋ an bʋ tʋtɔ. Saŋa maa nɩɩ an nu Ɔlʋnpʋ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔbʋlɛ maa tɔwɛ yɛ “Ɔnɩmʋ nkʋn ɩ gyɛ mɛ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ obii bitisa, mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bɔla mi ansi.”

english_verse: We were there with Jesus on the holy mountain and heard this voice speak from heaven.
translation_verse: Anɛ gbaa‐gbaa anɛ a nu falɛ ɔbʋlɛ maŋa maa lɩɩ sʋsʋ, saŋa mʋ nɩɩ an bʋ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu asɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ kɩbɩɩ mʋ sʋ mʋ.

english_verse: All of this makes us even more certain that what the prophets said is true. So you should pay close attention to their message, as you would to a lamp shining in some dark place. You must keep on paying attention until daylight comes and the morning star rises in your hearts.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ anɛ akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ an wu fɛɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ atɔwɛpʋ ba tɔwɛ yɩla mʋ, an kɔɔlɛ ɩmʋ gyii kesintin. Kɛ fan kpan fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kɩtaa ɩmʋ tɔ yɛ ɔdan. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ki du nɩn fɛɛ fɩtɩla mʋ nɩɩ kɩ kɩɩ kitentenbiri tɔ, taa naa fʋʋ fɛɛ kɩbwayɩkɛ asɛ, saŋa mʋ nɩɩ nyenyenfuu kikyikpebi kii biti kɩ ŋalɩgɛ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ mʋ.

english_verse: But you need to realize that no one alone can understand any of the prophecies in the Scriptures.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ kpini kamaa mʋ, ɩ dagaa fan maa nu kasɛ fɛɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn tɔwɛ yɩla sa mʋ, ɩ man gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ atɔwɛpʋ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa nfɛɛrɛ tɔ asɩn.

english_verse: The prophets did not think these things up on their own, but they were guided by the Spirit of God.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩnlɛɛ tɔwɛsa mʋ, ɩ man lɩɩ nyɩmɩsa kebiti tɔ nɩn, amaa Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ i sa bamʋ, nɩɩ ba tɔwɛ abwaarɛsɩn mʋ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ.

english_verse: Sometimes false prophets spoke to the people of Israel. False teachers will also sneak in and speak harmful lies to you. But these teachers don't really belong to the Master who paid a great price for them, and they will quickly destroy themselves.
translation_verse: Amaa dɩdaa mʋ antɩŋɛsa wuya ana ba kyɩna ba bʋ Ɩsɩrayɩ asa tɔ, nɩɩ kanɩn gbaa nɩɩ atɩntɩnsa akaapʋpʋ bee biti ba baa ba bʋ fanɛ tɔ. Nɩɩ bee biti ba ba kaapʋ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ kesintin yɛgɛ ii nyita asa mʋ nɩɩ bee buu kanɩn kɩkaapʋ mʋ. Kɛ ba kina Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ mɔlɩgɛ bamʋ, kɛ bamʋ kinyita mʋ ki bwii ba bamʋ sʋ opula tɔ.

english_verse: God did not have pity on the angels that sinned. He had them tied up and thrown into the dark pits of hell until the time of judgment.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ maa man yɛgɛ nbɔɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba waa alibi mʋ kʋsʋ kɩbɩɩtɛ, amaa nɩɩ ɔ taa bamʋ tʋʋ waa awʋrʋfɔ kamandɛ, katɩn mʋ nɩɩ o ŋmina bamʋ waa kitentenbiri ɔbɔ bunkyinsa tɔ, ba dɛ ba gyoo Kakɛ talɛsa lala mʋ.

english_verse: And during Noah's time, God did not have pity on the ungodly people of the world. He destroyed them with a flood, though he did save eight people, including Noah, who preached the truth.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ maa man yɛgɛ dɩdaa abi mʋ nɩɩ ba waa alibi mʋ kʋsʋ kɩbɩɩtɛ, amaa nɩɩ ɔ yɛgɛ nɩɩ nkyu n bɔla gyii kasɛ yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man nu Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ mʋ. Asa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ mɔlɩgɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ Nowa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ ɩkpa kyiigisa mʋ asɩn, yɛ asa asunɔ akʋ.

english_verse: God punished the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah by burning them to ashes, and this is a warning to anyone else who wants to sin.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ maa man yɛgɛ alibi awaapʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ Sodom yɛ Gomora ndɛ lala mʋ tɔ kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ, amaa ɔ yɛgɛ fʋlɔn dɛɛ bamʋ biliŋi ndaara, kɛ ɩ waa sɩnkaala sa kamaa tɔ alibi awaapʋ.

english_verse: This shows that the Lord knows how to rescue godly people from their sufferings and to punish evil people while they wait for the day of judgment.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ kpini ɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nyi kanan mʋ nɩɩ ee biti ɔ mɔlɩgɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ bee nu mʋ asɛ lɩɩ bamʋ kʋtʋʋ tɔ kɩɩ tɔ, kɛ ɔ yɛgɛ alibi awaapʋ mʋ kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ yɩla naa fʋʋ Kakɛ talɛsa mʋ akɛ.

english_verse: The Lord is especially hard on people who disobey him and don't think of anything except their own filthy desires. They are reckless and proud and are not afraid of cursing the glorious beings in heaven.
translation_verse: Fɔnfɔn bamʋ nɩɩ ba taa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ sa kɩgyagaa abɛɛ kɔkɔlɔ biti nɩɩ ba man taa Ɩbwaarɛ ɔlʋn tɩɩ sɛhn mʋ. Falɛ atɩntɩnsa akaapʋpʋ banɩmʋ ba man sʋ kufuu, nɩɩ ba yɩlɛ tɔ bɛɛ saalɛ bamʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sa bamʋ bʋnyaa mʋ.

english_verse: Although angels are more powerful than these evil beings, even the angels don't dare to accuse them to the Lord.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ halɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ ɔlʋn gaa ba kyɔ atɩntɩnsa akaapʋpʋ anɩmʋ gbaa ba mɛɛ pwɩɩ bʋnyaa wuya ana mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ ansi tɔ.

english_verse: These people are no better than senseless animals that live by their feelings and are born to be caught and killed. They speak evil of things they don't know anything about. But their own corrupt deeds will destroy them.
translation_verse: Amaa falɛ atɩntɩnsa akaapʋpʋ anɩmʋ awaasa a du nɩn fɛɛ atɔbwaaya kpensa mʋ nɩɩ ba kʋʋgɛ bamʋ fɛɛ asa ba kɩtaa kɛ ba mɔɔ. Ba sʋ asebi bɛɛ sa kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ be mee nu kasɛ. Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ mɔɔ bamʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ asa bɛɛ mɔɔ atɔbwaaya kpensa mʋ.

english_verse: They have done evil, and they will be rewarded with evil. They think it is fun to have wild parties during the day. They are immoral, and the meals they eat with you are spoiled by the shameful and selfish way they carry on.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ taa bamʋ alibi bwii ka bamʋ akɔ. Bamʋ asɛ mʋ kɩlandɛ sʋ alibi kɩwaa ɩ gyɛ bamʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kensi‐gyii. Halɩɩ ba maa san ba bʋ bamʋ npɩna yɛ kɩgyagaa kigyii ɩkpa sʋ mʋ, ɩ gyɛ ipeeli yɛ ŋaabaa sa bamʋ fɛɛ ba maa ba tii fanɛ sʋ bee gyii mʋ.

english_verse: All they think about is having sex with someone else's husband or wife. There is no end to their wicked deeds. They trick people who are easily fooled, and their minds are filled with greedy thoughts. But they are headed for trouble!
translation_verse: Nɩɩ be mee wu ɔkyɩɩ bɛɛ kyʋn, nɩɩ kɩbʋrʋkɔɔnɛ kɩwaa ii gyii bamʋ ansi. Bɛ yɛgɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bamʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kɩ man bʋlʋn mʋ bɛɛ waa alibi. Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bɔla bamʋ nkɔlɔ tɔ ɩ gyɛ kensi payɩ libi. Ɩnɩmʋ sʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ bɩɩtɛ bamʋ asʋ.

english_verse: They have left the true road and have gone down the wrong path by following the example of the prophet Balaam. He was the son of Beor and loved what he got from being a crook.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ba yɛgɛ ɔkpa kyiigisa mʋ, nɩɩ ba fɔyɩ naa taa Bewo mu‐bii Balaam ɔkpa sʋ. Balaam kyɩna ɔ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔtɔwɛpʋ, nɩɩ mu kebiti ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ ɔ nyɛ afulee lɩɩ alibi kɩwaa tɔ.

english_verse: But a donkey corrected him for this evil deed. It spoke to him with a human voice and made him stop his foolishness.
translation_verse: Amaa mu kuruma mʋ gya mʋ. Mu kuruma mʋ tɔwɛ mʋ asɛ fɛɛ nyɩmɩsa, nɩɩ i tii Ɩbwaarɛ ɔtɔwɛpʋ Balaam abʋnpʋ‐sɩn mʋ ɔkpa.

english_verse: These people are like dried up water holes and clouds blown by a windstorm. The darkest part of hell is waiting for them.
translation_verse: Falɛ atɩntɩnsa akaapʋpʋ anɩmʋ ba du nɩn fɛɛ atiribo mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ nkyu yɛ abwaarɛ‐wʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ afuu a sʋ ɩmʋ a naa. Bamʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɔŋɔ kitentenbiri ɔbɔ bunkyinsa yɩla.

english_verse: They brag out loud about their stupid nonsense. And by being vulgar and crude, they trap people who have barely escaped from living the wrong kind of life.
translation_verse: Ba sʋ alala‐sɩn ntɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ sɛhn man bʋ ɩmʋ tɔ bɛɛ kaapʋ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ. Nɩɩ ba sʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ kɩgyagaa bɛɛ tʋʋ bamʋ tɔ bɛɛ kɩɩ, kɛ ba nyɛ waa alibi mʋ nɩɩ ba daa kyɩna bɛɛ waa nɩɩ ba sɩlɛ lɩɩ ɩmʋ tɔ mʋ.

english_verse: When they learned about our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ, they escaped from the filthy things of this world. But they are again caught up and controlled by these filthy things, and now they are in worse shape than they were at first.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ ba maa ba bɩɩ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ yɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ Yesu Krisito, nɩɩ ba yɛgɛ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa ɛɛ waa alibi kɩwaa dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ, nɩɩ ba kan bɩla bwii naa loo ɩmʋ tɔ mʋ, ɩɩ nyɛ bamʋ sʋ ɔlʋn ɩ kyɔ kakyɩna dɩdaa mʋ nɩɩ ba daa ba bʋ kɩmʋ tɔ mʋ.

english_verse: They would have been better off if they had never known about the right way. Even after they knew what was right, they turned their backs on the holy commandments they were given.
translation_verse: Naafɔɔ ii biti ɩ baa ɩ bʋrɔn sa bamʋ gaa fɛɛ ba maa man bɩɩ ɔkpa kyiigisa mʋ, ɩ kyɔ fɛɛ ba maa bɩɩ kɩmʋ, nɩɩ ba bɩla bwii kamaa lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ nbara kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ nɩɩ ba taa sa bamʋ mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: What happened to them is just like the true saying, “A dog will come back to lick up its own vomit. A pig that has been washed will roll in the mud.”
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɩ ba kanɩn sa bamʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ aŋasan mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, “Gyoonɔ bwii naa taa mʋ ɩkpalagɛ gyii” nɩɩ “Kuuri mʋ nɩɩ ba gyee mʋ mʋ, bwii naa dɛ biliŋi kɩdɩpɔɔ tɔ” mʋ, ɩ gyɛ kesintin.

english_verse: what God's prophets said would happen. You must never forget what the holy prophets taught in the past. And you must remember what the apostles told you our Lord and Savior has commanded us to do.
translation_verse: N biti fɛɛ fan nyiŋi asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ atɔwɛpʋ kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ ba tɔwɛ yɩla lɩɩ koo dɩdaa, yɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ yɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ mʋ kɔnɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa bɔla asunpu mʋ sʋ sa fanɛ mʋ.

english_verse: But first you must realize that in the last days some people won't think about anything except their own selfish desires. They will make fun of you
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyankpaa ɩmʋ kpini tɔ mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, fan baa fan nyi fɛɛ nkɛ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ aŋmasɛpʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba buu bamʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kebiti mʋ bee biti ba ba ŋmasɛ fanɛ.

english_verse: They will say this because they want to forget that long ago the heavens and the earth were made at God's command. The earth came out of water and was made from water.
translation_verse: Amaa ba kɩɩ ansi nɩn kina kesintin maŋa lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɔnɔ tɔ asɩn sʋ nɩɩ sʋsʋ yɛ kasɛ ba, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛgɛ kasɛ lɩɩ nkyu tɔ, nɩɩ nkyu sʋ nɩɩ ɔ bɔla waa kasɛ.

english_verse: Later it was destroyed by the waters of a mighty flood.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kanɩn nkyu kʋlʋn maŋa nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa muuri nyita dɩdaa dulinyaa mʋ.

english_verse: But God has commanded the present heavens and earth to remain until the day of judgment. Then they will be set on fire, and ungodly people will be destroyed.
translation_verse: Amaa kanɩn Ɩbwaarɛ kɔnɔ tɔ asɩn kʋlʋn maŋa nɩɩ ɔ taa kʋʋla nbɩɩnbɩɩ sʋsʋ yɛ kasɛ yɩla, nɩɩ ɩ dɛ i gyoo fʋlɔn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ dɛɛla sa Kakɛ talɛsa ɔ taa nyita asa mʋ nɩɩ be mee nu mʋ asɛ mʋ.

english_verse: The Lord isn't slow about keeping his promises, as some people think he is. In fact, God is patient, because he wants everyone to turn from sin and no one to be lost.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ man sʋ mʋ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ tɔwɛ yɩla mʋ ɛɛ kpɩɩ kasɛ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ akʋ bɛ fɛ ɩmʋ nfɛɛrɛ mʋ. Amaa ɔ sʋ kenyiita sa fanɛ, nɩɩ ee biti fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ɔ kyɛɛgɛ mʋ nfɛɛrɛ lɩɩ mu alibi tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ o mee biti ɔkʋ maa nyita.

english_verse: The day of the Lord's return will surprise us like a thief. The heavens will disappear with a loud noise, and the heat will melt the whole universe. Then the earth and everything on it will be seen for what they are.
translation_verse: Amaa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ Yesu Krisito ii biti ɔ ba mʋ ii biti i purigi asa fɛɛ oyu maa ba mʋ. Kɛ sʋsʋ ɔ nyaa yɛ ɔlanba, kɛ fʋlɔn ɔ dɛɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ sʋsʋ kpini, kɛ kasɛ yɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ kɩmʋ sʋ mʋ ɩ ba ɩ dɛ kɩkpan yɛgɛ sɛhn man bʋ kɩmʋ sʋ.

english_verse: Everything will be destroyed. So you should serve and honor God by the way you live.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ falɛ ɔkpa nɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ atɔ kpini ii biti i nyita mʋ, nɛnɛ asa nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fan bɩla fan du? Ɩ dagaa fan kyɩna kakyɩna kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ yɛ kabwaarɛ‐sun tɔ.

english_verse: You should look forward to the day when God judges everyone, and you should try to make it come soon. On that day the heavens will be destroyed by fire, and everything else will melt in the heat.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ fan maa kɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩba mʋ ɔkpa yɛ kɩ ba bilen falɛ. Kanɩn kakɛ maŋa nɩɩ fʋlɔn ii biti o nyita sʋsʋ atɔ, kɛ fʋlɔn mʋ awulawula ɩ ŋalɩgɛ kanɩn atɔ maŋa.

english_verse: But God has promised us a new heaven and a new earth, where justice will rule. We are really looking forward to this!
translation_verse: Amaa fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ nɩɩ ɔ yɩlɛ tɔ mʋ an kɩɩ sʋsʋ pʋpwɛ yɛ kasɛ pʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ ɔkpa.

english_verse: Don't forget that the Lord is patient because he wants people to be saved. This is also what our dear friend Paul said when he wrote you with the wisdom God had given him.
translation_verse: Fan baa fan nyi fɛɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kenyiita mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ mʋ, ɩ gyɛ ɔkpa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sa fanɛ kɛ fan nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ anɛ bɩrɩsa ɔkɔɔlɛ‐gyipu Pɔɔlɩ kyʋrɔɔ sa fanɛ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sa mʋ kanyaasɩn mʋ.

english_verse: Paul talks about these same things in all his letters, but part of what he says is hard to understand. Some ignorant and unsteady people even destroy themselves by twisting what he said. They do the same thing with other Scriptures too.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkpa kʋlʋn maŋa sʋ nɩɩ Pɔɔlɩ kyʋrɔɔ waa mʋ ɩwʋlɛ kpini tɔ, ɩɩ tɔwɛ asɩn kʋlʋn maŋa. Asɩn akʋ ɩ bʋ mʋ ɩwʋlɛ mʋ tɔ nɩɩ ɛɛ bʋlʋn sa kasɛ kunu. Nɩɩ ɛɛ yɛgɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man nyi abwaarɛsɩn yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man yɩlɛ kɩyaa kʋlʋn sʋ bee biliŋaa Pɔɔlɩ asɩn mʋ, nɩɩ kanɩn nɩɩ bee biliŋaa Ɩbwaarɛ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ gbaa. Nɩɩ bɛɛ waa kanɩn mʋ, bee biti kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ ba sa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ. Laalaalʋwɛ asɩn

english_verse: My dear friends, you have been warned ahead of time! So don't let the errors of evil people lead you down the wrong path and make you lose your balance.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ mi‐nyi mu‐bii ana Krisito tɔ, fan maa wʋla fan nyi falɛ sʋ mʋ, fan baa fan da sʋ, kɛ fan man yɛgɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man buu Ɩbwaarɛ nbara mʋ ba pɩna fanɛ kɛ fan lɩɩ tɩyɛ lɩɩ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Let the gift of undeserved grace and the understanding that come from our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ help you keep on growing. Praise Jesus now and forever! Amen.
translation_verse: Amaa fan kyaga sʋ fen dan anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ yɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ Yesu Krisito kabwaala mʋ tɔ kɛ fan bɩɩ mʋ danbɩrasa. Mʋ nɩɩ bʋnyaa gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ ndaga yɛ saŋa kʋmaa nɩmʋ. Amen!

english_verse: The Word that gives life was from the beginning, and this is the one our message is about. Our ears have heard, our eyes have seen, and our hands have touched this Word.
translation_verse: An kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ lɩɩ Yesu Krisito mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wʋla ɔ bʋ tɔ lɩɩ npiili asɛ mʋ asɩn, an sa fanɛ. An nu mʋ asɩn tɔwɛsa, nɩɩ an wu mʋ, nɩɩ an taa anɛ ansi kɩɩ mʋ, nɩɩ an taa anɛ abaa mata mʋ. Mʋ ɩ gyɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ sa nkpa mʋ.

english_verse: The one who gives life appeared! We saw it happen, and we are witnesses to what we have seen. Now we are telling you about this eternal life that was with the Father and appeared to us.
translation_verse: Yesu mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ nkpa mʋ, lɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ ifuli nɩɩ an wu mʋ. Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ an gyii ɩmʋ kesintin, nɩɩ an tɔwɛ fanɛ lɩɩ nkpa kakpaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wʋla ɔ bʋ Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ asɛ, nɩɩ ɔ ba lɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ ifuli kaapʋ anɛ.

english_verse: We are telling you what we have seen and heard, so you may share in this life with us. And we share in it with the Father and with his Son Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Asɩn mʋ nɩɩ anɛ ansi i wu nɩɩ an taa anɛ asʋ nu mʋ, ɩmʋ kibonbon nɩɩ an da an sa fanɛ, kɛ fan ba tii anɛ sʋ lɩɩ kɩkyɛmɩnɛ ɔkɔn mʋ nɩɩ an sʋ anaa Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ Mu‐Bii Yesu Krisito mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: We are writing to tell you these things, because this makes us truly happy. God Is Light
translation_verse: An kyʋrɔɔ ɩnɩmʋ an sa fanɛ nɩn, kɛ anɛ ansi i gyii gaa. Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ gyɛ fɩtɩla

english_verse: Jesus told us God is light and doesn't have any darkness in him. Now we are telling you.
translation_verse: Asɩn mʋ nɩɩ an nu lɩɩ Yesu asɛ mʋ, ɩmʋ nɩɩ an sʋ an tɔwɛ fanɛ falɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ gyɛ fɩtɩla nɩɩ kitentenbiri kɩ man bʋ mʋ tɔ kpini‐kpini.

english_verse: If we say we share in life with God and keep on living in the dark, we are lying and are not living by the truth.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ an kan tɔwɛ yɛ anaa mʋ an sʋ kɩkyɛmɩnɛ ɔkɔn, yɛgɛ an san an naa kitentenbiri tɔ bɩrɛ, an pɩna nɩn lɩɩ anɛ atɔwɛsa yɛ anɛ awaasa sʋ.

english_verse: But if we live in the light, as God does, we share in life with each other. And the blood of his Son Jesus washes all our sins away.
translation_verse: Amaa nɩɩ an kan an naa fɩtɩla mʋ tɔ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ fɩtɩla mʋ tɔ bɩrɛ, ɩmɛɛ ɩmʋ an sʋ kɩkyɛmɩnɛ ɔkɔn yɛ abaa, kɛ Mu‐Bii Yesu Krisito nkalan mʋ ɛɛ fwɩɩ anɛ lɩɩ alibi kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ.

english_verse: If we say we have not sinned, we are fooling ourselves, and the truth isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ an kan tɔwɛ yɛ a man sʋ alibi bɩrɛ, an pɩna anɛ n‐yɩɩ nɩn, nɩɩ kesintin kɩ man bʋ anɛ tɔ.

english_verse: But if we confess our sins to God, he can always be trusted to forgive us and take our sins away.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ an kan lɛɛ anɛ alibi tɔwɛ Ɩbwaarɛ bɩrɛ, ee biti ɔ taa anɛ alibi kɛɛ anɛ kɛ ɔ lɔŋɔ anɛ lɩɩ ɩkpa libi kʋmaa nɩmʋ sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ sʋ kesintin, nɩɩ mʋ asɩn ii du kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

english_verse: If we say we have not sinned, we make God a liar, and his message isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ an kan tɔwɛ yɛ an man waa alibi mʋ, ɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ an tɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ atɩŋɛsa wuya, nɩɩ mʋ asɩn ɩ man bʋ anɛ tɔ.

english_verse: My children, I am writing this so you won't sin. But if you do sin, Jesus Christ always does the right thing, and he will speak to the Father for us.
translation_verse: Mi‐bii ana danbɩrasa, n kyʋrɔɔ ɩnɩmʋ n sa fanɛ kɛ fan man nyɛ waa alibi. Amaa nɩɩ anɛ tɔ ɔkʋ kan waa alibi mʋ, an sʋ ɔmaatapʋ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kʋlɛ Ɔsɛ mʋ ɛɛ sa anɛ. Nɩɩ mʋ ɩ gyɛ Yesu Krisito, nɩɩ mʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi.

english_verse: Christ is the sacrifice that takes away our sins and the sins of all the world's people.
translation_verse: Mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ waa kɔlɔŋɔ ka anɛ alibi kʋkɔ, nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ anɛ nkʋn alibi, amaa ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ dulinyaa tɔ kpini.

english_verse: But if we claim to know him and don't obey him, we are lying and the truth isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan tɔwɛ yɛ, “N nyi mʋ,” yɛgɛ ɔ man buu mʋ nbara mʋ, ɔ gyɛ antɩŋɛsa wuya, nɩɩ kesintin kɩ man bʋ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: We truly love God only when we obey him as we should, and then we know we belong to him.
translation_verse: Amaa ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o buu mʋ asɩn tɔwɛsa mʋ, mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ee biti Ɩbwaarɛ kesintin tɔ kyɛɛkyɛɛ. Ɩnɩmʋ falɛ ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an bɩɩ fɛɛ an bʋ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ.

english_verse: If we say we are his, we must follow the example of Christ. The New Commandment
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ ɔ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nyɩmɩsa mʋ, dagaa maa kyɩna fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Yesu kyɩna mʋ. Nbara pʋpwɛ

english_verse: My dear friends, I am not writing to give you a new commandment. It is the same one you were first given, and it is the message you heard.
translation_verse: Mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ ana danbɩrasa, man gyɛ nbara pʋpwɛ nɩɩ n kyʋrɔɔ n sʋ n bɩya fanɛ, amaa ɩ gyɛ nbara dɩdaa mʋ nɩɩ fan wʋla nyɛ lɩɩ npiili asɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ fan kɔlɛ gyii mʋ. Nbara dɩdaa nɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ fan wʋla nu mʋ.

english_verse: But it really is a new commandment, and you know its true meaning, just as Christ does. You can see the darkness fading away and the true light already shining.
translation_verse: Amaa ɔkpa kʋ sʋ mʋ, nbara mʋ nɩɩ n kyʋrɔɔ n sa fanɛ falɛ bɩrɛ gyɛ kɩpʋpwɛ nɩn, nɩɩ fanaa Krisito fan lɛɛ kaapʋ fɛɛ ɩ gyɛ nbara pʋpwɛ kesintin. Lɩɩ fɛɛ kitentenbiri mʋ kɩ tɛɛ kɩɩ kyʋn, nɩɩ kesintin fɩtɩla mʋ tɛɛ wʋla kɩɩ ŋalɩgɛ tɔ.

english_verse: If we claim to be in the light and hate someone, we are still in the dark.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, ɔ bʋ fɩtɩla tɔ, yɛgɛ ee kisi mʋ tɔmaa Krisito osunpu bɩrɛ, ɔ san ɔ bʋ kitentenbiri tɔ, ba fʋʋ halɩɩ saŋa nɩmʋ.

english_verse: But if we love others, we are in the light, and we don't cause problems for them.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee biti mʋ tɔmaa Krisito osunpu mʋ bʋ fɩtɩla mʋ tɔ. Nɩɩ sɛhn man bʋ mʋ tɔ nɩɩ ii biti ɩ yɛgɛ o siti tɩyɛ alibi tɔ.

english_verse: If we hate others, we are living and walking in the dark. We don't know where we are going, because we can't see in the dark.
translation_verse: Amaa ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee kisi mʋ tɔmaa Krisito osunpu mʋ bʋ kitentenbiri tɔ. Nɩɩ ɔ naa kitentenbiri tɔ yɛgɛ o mee nyi katɩn mʋ nɩɩ ee kpee, lɩɩ fɛɛ kitentenbiri mʋ kɩ waa mʋ gyaatanapʋ. N kyʋrɔɔ n sa Asɛ yɛ Ayaafɔlɛ yɛ Nbii

english_verse: Children, I am writing you, because your sins have been forgiven in the name of Christ.
translation_verse: Mi‐bii ana danbɩrasa, n kyʋrɔɔ ɩnɩmʋ n sʋ n sa fanɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ taa fanɛ alibi kɛɛ fanɛ lɩɩ Yesu sʋ.

english_verse: Parents, I am writing you, because you have known the one who was there from the beginning. Young people, I am writing you, because you have defeated the evil one.
translation_verse: Asɛ ana, n kyʋrɔɔ ɩnɩmʋ n sa fanɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fan wʋla fan nyi Yesu Krisito mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wʋla ɔ bʋ tɔ lɩɩ npiili asɛ mʋ. Ayaafɔlɛ, n kyʋrɔɔ ɩnɩmʋ n sa fanɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fan taalɛ gyii Sɩtaanɛ alibi wuya mʋ sʋ. Nbii, n kyʋrɔɔ n sa fanɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fan bɩɩ Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ.

english_verse: Children, I am writing you, because you have known the Father. Parents, I am writing you, because you have known the one who was there from the beginning. Young people, I am writing you, because you are strong. God's message is firm in your hearts, and you have defeated the evil one.
translation_verse: Asɛ ana, n kyʋrɔɔ ɩnɩmʋ n sa fanɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fan wʋla fan nyi Yesu Krisito mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wʋla ɔ bʋ tɔ lɩɩ npiili asɛ mʋ. Ayaafɔlɛ, n kyʋrɔɔ ɩnɩmʋ n sa fanɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fan bʋlʋn nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn mʋ a bʋ fanɛ tɔ nɩɩ fan gyii Sɩtaanɛ alibi wuya mʋ sʋ. Fan man biti Dulinya tɔ atɔ

english_verse: Don't love the world or anything that belongs to the world. If you love the world, you cannot love the Father.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan man biti dulinyaa abɛɛ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ a bʋ dulinyaa tɔ. Nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan ee biti dulinyaa mʋ, ɔ man sʋ kebiti sa Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: Our foolish pride comes from this world, and so do our selfish desires and our desire to have everything we see. None of this comes from the Father.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ dulinyaa tɔ fɛɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kɔkɔlɔ biti, atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ansi i wu nɩɩ ɛɛ yalaga, yɛ n‐yɩɩ kɩkaapʋ lɩɩ kasɛ sʋ atɔ. Ɩnɩmʋ kpini ɩ man lɩɩ Ɔsɛ mʋ asɛ amaa ɩ lɩɩ dulinyaa tɔ nɩn.

english_verse: The world and the desires it causes are disappearing. But if we obey God, we will live forever. The Enemy of Christ
translation_verse: Dulinya yɛ kɩmaa kɩmʋ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ i gyii asa amu kpini ii biti ɛɛ kyʋn, amaa ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa Ɩbwaarɛ kɔkɔlɔ biti bɩrɛ ee biti ɔ kyɩna kakpaa. Krisito Okisipu

english_verse: Children, this is the last hour. You heard that the enemy of Christ would appear at this time, and many of Christ's enemies have already appeared. So we know the last hour is here.
translation_verse: Mi‐bii ana, anɛ dulinyaa tɔ kakyɩna laalaalʋwɛ mʋ kɩ fʋʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan wʋla nu yɛ Krisito okisipu mʋ ii biti ɔ ba mʋ. Halɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ gbaa Krisito akisipu gaalaagaa ba tɛɛ ba. Ɩnɩmʋ ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an bɩɩ fɛɛ saŋa mʋ laalaalʋwɛ ndee.

english_verse: These people came from our own group, yet they were not really part of us. If they had been part of us, they would have stayed with us. But they left, which proves they did not belong to our group.
translation_verse: Krisito akisipu banɩmʋ ba lɩɩ anɛ tɔ kyʋn, lɩɩ fɛɛ ba man gyɛ anɛ asa gbaa‐gbaa. Nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ ba daa ba gyɛ anɛ asa mʋ, naafɔɔ ba san ba bʋ anɛ tɔ. Amaa ba lɩɩ anɛ tɔ nɩn kɛ ɩ nyɛ lɛɛ kaapʋ fɛɛ bamʋ ɔkʋ man tii anɛ sʋ.

english_verse: Christ, the Holy One, has blessed you, and now all of you understand.
translation_verse: Amaa fanɛɛ fanɛ bɩrɛ Krisito sa fanɛ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ, nɩɩ fanɛ kpini fan nyi Ɩbwaarɛ kesintin asɩn mʋ.

english_verse: I did not need to write you about the truth, since you already know it. You also know that liars do not belong to the truth.
translation_verse: Man gyɛ yɛ fan maa man nyi kesintin mʋ sʋ nɩɩ n kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ n sa fanɛ, amaa fan nyi kɩmʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ antɩŋɛsa akʋ a man bʋ kesintin mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: And a liar is anyone who says Jesus isn't truly Christ. Anyone who says this is an enemy of Christ and rejects both the Father and the Son.
translation_verse: Anɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ antɩŋɛsa wuya mʋ? Mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ee kina yɛ Yesu man gyɛ Krisito mʋ. Kanɩn nyɩmɩsa maŋa ɩ gyɛ Krisito okisipu, nɩɩ mʋ ii kina Ɔsɛ yɛ Obii mʋ.

english_verse: If we reject the Son, we reject the Father. But if we say we accept the Son, we have the Father.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee kina Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii mʋ, ee kina Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ gbaa, amaa ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kɔɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii mʋ gyii mʋ, ɛɛ kɔɔlɛ Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ gbaa ee gyii.

english_verse: Keep thinking about the message you first heard, and you will always be one in your heart with the Son and with the Father.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ fan yɛgɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ fan wʋla nu lɩɩ npiili asɛ mʋ ɩ kyɩna fanɛ tɔ. Nɩɩ ɩ kan ɩ tɛ fanɛ tɔ mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fɛn bʋ Ɔsɛ yɛ Obii mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: I am writing to warn you about those people who are misleading you.
translation_verse: N kyʋrɔɔ ɩnɩmʋ n sʋ n sa fanɛ lɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ bee biti ba pɩna fanɛ mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: But Christ has blessed you with the Holy Spirit. Now the Spirit stays in you, and you don't need any teachers. The Spirit is truthful and teaches you everything. So stay one in your heart with Christ, just as the Spirit has taught you to do. Children of God
translation_verse: Amaa fanɛɛ fanɛ bɩrɛ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan nyɛ lɩɩ Krisito asɛ mʋ kɩ bʋ fanɛ tɔ, nɩɩ ɩ man tiri fɛɛ ɔkʋ ɔ bɩla ba kaapʋ fanɛ. Kanɩn Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan nyɛ mʋ ɩɩ kaapʋ fanɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa, nɩɩ kanɩn kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ kaapʋ fanɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ kesintin, nɩɩ npɩna man bʋ kɩmʋ tɔ. Nɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kaapʋ fanɛ mʋ, fanaa Krisito fan kyɩna kanɩn. An gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii ana

english_verse: Children, stay one in your hearts with Christ. Then when he returns, we will have confidence and won't have to hide in shame.
translation_verse: Kanɩn sʋ mi‐bii ana, fanaa Krisito fan kyɩna. Kɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ee biti o bwii ba mʋ, kɛ a taalɛ yɩlɛ tɔ, yɛgɛ a man sʋ ipeeli mu ansi tɔ.

english_verse: You know Christ always does right and everyone who does right is a child of God.
translation_verse: Kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan nyi fɛɛ mʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ, fan bɩɩ fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa atɔ kyiigisa mʋ, mʋ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii.

english_verse: Think how much the Father loves us. He loves us so much that he lets us be called his children, as we truly are. But since the people of this world did not know who Christ is, they don't know who we are.
translation_verse: Fan kɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sʋ kebiti lala sa anɛ, fɛɛ ba tɩɩ anɛ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii ana. Nɩɩ kanɩn nɩɩ an gyɛ falɛ. Kanɩn sʋ nɩɩ dulinyaa tɔ abi ba man nyi anɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ba man nyi Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: My dear friends, we are already God's children, though what we will be hasn't yet been seen. But we do know when Christ returns, we will be like him, because we will see him as he truly is.
translation_verse: Mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ ana danbɩrasa, nbɩɩnbɩɩ an gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii ana nɩn. Nɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ an biti an baa an gyɛ mʋ ɩ man pɩɩta lɩɩ ifuli. Amaa an nyi fɛɛ nɩɩ ɔ kan ba lɩɩ ofuli mʋ, an biti an baa an du fɛɛ mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ an biti an wu mʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ o du mʋ.

english_verse: Everyone who sins breaks God's law, because sin is the same as breaking God's law.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa alibi mʋ, o mee man buu nbara mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ alibi kɩwaa ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ ɔkʋ maa mee buu nbara mʋ.

english_verse: and people who stay one in their hearts with him won't keep on sinning. If they do keep on sinning, they don't know Christ, and they have never seen him.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋ man bʋ Yesu tɔ nɩɩ ɛɛ kyaga sʋ ɛɛ waa alibi, nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan kyaga sʋ ɛɛ waa alibi mʋ, ɔ man pɩɩta wu mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ man nyi mʋ.

english_verse: Anyone who keeps on sinning belongs to the devil. He has sinned from the beginning, but the Son of God came to destroy all that he has done.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa alibi mʋ, gyɛ Sɩtaanɛ lɛɛ nɩn. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Sɩtaanɛ wʋla ɛɛ waa alibi lɩɩ koo npiili asɛ. Kʋtɔ mʋ sʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii mʋ ba mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, ɔ baa o be nyita Sɩtaanɛ kusun nɩn.

english_verse: God's children cannot keep on being sinful. His life-giving power lives in them and makes them his children, so they cannot keep on sinning.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ waa mʋ Mu‐Bii mʋ, mɛɛ kyaga sʋ ɛɛ waa alibi, lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ awaasa ɩ bʋ mʋ tɔ. Ɩmʋ sʋ ɔ mɛɛ taalɛ kyaga sʋ ɛɛ waa alibi, lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ taa mʋ waa Mu‐bii.

english_verse: You can tell God's children from the devil's children, because those who belong to the devil refuse to do right or to love each other. Love Each Other
translation_verse: Falɛ nɩɩ an sʋ an bɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐bii ana yɛ Sɩtaanɛ mu‐bii ana. Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ mʋ ɩkpa ɩ man kyiigi abɛɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o mee biti mʋ tɔɔmaa mʋ, ɔ man gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐bii. Fan biti abaa

english_verse: From the beginning you were told we must love each other.
translation_verse: Asɩn mʋ nɩɩ fan nu lɩɩ npiili asɛ mʋ, ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ a biti abaa.

english_verse: Don't be like Cain, who belonged to the devil and murdered his own brother. Why did he murder him? He did it because his brother was good, and he was evil.
translation_verse: A man waa fɛɛ Ken mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Sɩtaanɛ lɛɛ nɩɩ ɔ mɔɔ mu‐supu mʋ. Mɩnɛ ɩ waa sʋ nɩɩ ɔ mɔɔ mu‐supu? Lɩɩ fɛɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ awaasa ɩ gyɛ alibi, nɩɩ mu‐supu ɩkpa i kyiigi.

english_verse: My friends, don't be surprised if the people of this world hate you.
translation_verse: Mɛ bɩrɩsa ana, nɩɩ dulinyaa asa ba kan bee kisi fanɛ mʋ, fan man yɛgɛ i kyinkyin fanɛ.

english_verse: Our love for each other proves we have gone from death to life. But if you don't love each other, you are still under the power of death.
translation_verse: An nyi fɛɛ an lɩɩ lewu tɔ ba nkpa tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ an biti anɛ tɔɔmaa ana. Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o mee biti mʋ bɩrɩsa mʋ, ɔ san ɔ bʋ lewu tɔ.

english_verse: If you hate each other, you are murderers, and we know murderers do not have eternal life.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee kisi mʋ bɩrɩsa mʋ gyɛ ɔmɔɔpʋ nɩn, nɩɩ fan nyi yɛ amɔɔpʋ maa man sʋ nkpa kakpaa.

english_verse: We know what love is because Jesus gave his life for us. This is why we must give our lives for each other.
translation_verse: Lewu mʋ nɩɩ Krisito wu sa anɛ mʋ kaapʋ anɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti ki du. Ɩmʋ sʋ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ a maa wu sa anɛ bɩrɩsa ana.

english_verse: If we have all we need and see one of our own people in need, we must have pity on that person, or else we cannot say we love God.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan ɔ sʋ atɔ gaa nɩɩ o wu fɛɛ i tiri mʋ tɔɔmaa, amaa nɩɩ ɔ man wu mʋ kʋwɛɛ mʋ, mɩnɛ ɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ ɔ sʋ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti mʋ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ?

english_verse: Children, you show love for others by truly helping them, and not merely by talking about it.
translation_verse: Mi‐bii ana danbɩrasa, an man taa ntɔwɛ abɛɛ kɔnɔ tɔ kɩyan biti abaa, amaa a taa anɛ awaasa kaapʋ fɛɛ an biti abaa kesintin tɔ.

english_verse: When we love others, we know we belong to the truth, and we feel at ease in the presence of God.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ nɩɩ an biti a bɩɩ fɛɛ an buu kesintin ɔkpa mʋ sʋ. Ɩmʋ ii biti ɩ yɛgɛ kɛ a taalɛ taa kɔkɔlɔ fuuli a yɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ansi tɔ.

english_verse: But even if we don't feel at ease, God is greater than our feelings, and he knows everything.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ anɛ nkɔlɔ ɩ kan bun anɛ kʋpwɛ mʋ, an nyi fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ kyɔ anɛ nkɔlɔ, nɩɩ o nyi anɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ ɔ kyɔ anɛ gbaa‐gbaa, nɩɩ mʋ i nyi kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ.

english_verse: Dear friends, if we feel at ease in the presence of God, we will have the courage to come near him.
translation_verse: Mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ ana danbɩrasa, nɩɩ anɛ nkɔlɔ ɩ man kan bun anɛ kʋpwɛ mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ an taalɛ yɩlɛ tɔ Ɩbwaarɛ ansi tɔ.

english_verse: He will give us whatever we ask, because we obey him and do what pleases him.
translation_verse: Kɛ a nyɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ an taasɛ mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ an buu mʋ nbara, nɩɩ an waa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ bɔla mu ansi.

english_verse: God wants us to have faith in his Son Jesus Christ and to love each other. This is also what Jesus taught us to do.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ mʋ nbara mʋ, fɛɛ a kɔɔlɛ Mu‐Bii Yesu Krisito kɩtɩɩ mʋ gyii, kɛ a biti abaa fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sa anɛ kɔnɔ mʋ.

english_verse: If we obey God's commandments, we will stay one in our hearts with him, and he will stay one with us. The Spirit he has given us is proof that we are one with him.
translation_verse: Bamʋ nɩɩ bee nu mʋ nbara mʋ, ba maa Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ sʋ kɔnɔ kʋlʋn, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bʋ bamʋ nkɔlɔ tɔ. Mʋ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa sa anɛ mʋ ɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ, ɔ bʋ anɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ.

english_verse: Dear friends, don't believe everyone who claims to have the Spirit of God. Test them all to find out if they really do come from God. Many false prophets have already gone out into the world,
translation_verse: Mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ ana, fan man kɔɔlɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ yɛ ɔ sʋ Kayaayu mʋ gyii, amaa fan tʋʋ n‐yaayu mʋ tɔ kɩɩ fɛɛ ba lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ nɩn, abɛɛ ba man lɩɩ mʋ asɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ antɩŋɛsa atɔwɛpʋ gaalaagaa ba ba dulinyaa tɔ katɩn kʋmaa.

english_verse: and you can know which ones come from God. His Spirit says that Jesus Christ had a truly human body.
translation_verse: Falɛ nɩɩ fen biti fan bɩɩ kayaayu mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mʋ. Kayaayu kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ tɔwɛ yɛ Yesu Krisito ba biliŋi nyɩmɩsa ba dulinyaa tɔ mʋ, kɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ.

english_verse: But when someone doesn't say this about Jesus, you know this person has a spirit that doesn't come from God and is the enemy of Christ. You knew this enemy was coming into the world and now is already here.
translation_verse: Amaa kayaayu kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kii kina yɛ Yesu Krisito man ba biliŋi nyɩmɩsa mʋ, kɩ man lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ. Kanɩn kayaayu nɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ Krisito okisipu mʋ nɩɩ fan nu yɛ ɛɛ ba mʋ, nɩɩ halɩɩ ɔ tɛɛ wʋla ɔ bʋ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ gbaa.

english_verse: Children, you belong to God, and you have defeated these enemies. God's Spirit is in you and is more powerful than the one who is in the world.
translation_verse: Amaa fanɛ, mi‐bii ana bɩrɛ fan gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asa, nɩɩ fan tee gyii bamʋ sʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ fanɛ tɔ mʋ, kyɔ Sɩtaanɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ mʋ

english_verse: These enemies belong to this world, and the world listens to them, because they speak its language.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ kanɩn asa maŋa ba gyɛ dulinyaa nɩmʋ lɛɛ nɩn, ɩmʋ sʋ bɛɛ tɔwɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ dulinyaa tɔ asɩn mʋ nɩn, kanɩn sʋ dulinyaa asa bee nu bamʋ asɛ.

english_verse: We belong to God, and everyone who knows God will listen to us. But the people who don't know God won't listen to us. This is how we can tell the Spirit that speaks the truth from the one that tells lies.
translation_verse: Anɛɛnɛ bɩrɛ, an gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asa nɩn, nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o nyi Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, ee nu anɛ asɛ. Amaa ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nyɩmɩsa mʋ, o mee nu anɛ asɛ. Ɩmʋ sʋ falɛ asɩn nɩmʋ nɩɩ an sʋ an bɩɩ kesintin Kayaayu yɛ antɩŋɛsa kayaayu.

english_verse: My dear friends, we must love each other. Love comes from God, and when we love each other, it shows we have been given new life. We are now God's children, and we know him.
translation_verse: Mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ ana danbɩrasa, fan yɛgɛ a biti abaa, kpalɩ fɛɛ kebiti kɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ nɩn. Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kebiti mʋ, ɔ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐bii, nɩɩ o nyi Ɩbwaarɛ.

english_verse: God is love, and anyone who doesn't love others has never known him.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man sʋ kebiti bɩrɛ, ɔ man nyi Ɩbwaarɛ kpini‐kpini, lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ gyɛ obitipu.

english_verse: God showed his love for us when he sent his only Son into the world to give us life.
translation_verse: Falɛ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mu kebiti mʋ kaapʋ anɛ tɔ, fɛɛ maa sun Mu‐Bii kʋlʋn kpen ba dulinyaa tɔ, kɛ a ba bɔla mʋ sʋ nyɛ nkpa.

english_verse: Real love isn't our love for God, but his love for us. God sent his Son to be the sacrifice by which our sins are forgiven.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ kebiti mʋ, man gyɛ anɛ ii biti Ɩbwaarɛ, amaa Ɩbwaarɛ bɩrɛ ɩ sʋ kebiti sa anɛ, nɩɩ o sun Mu‐Bii kʋlʋn yɛ, ɔ ba taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ waa ɩmata saraga sa anɛ alibi.

english_verse: Dear friends, since God loved us this much, we must love each other.
translation_verse: Mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ ana, fan kɩɩ kebiti lala mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sʋ sa anɛ, kanɩn sʋ ɩ dagaa anɛ gbaa a maa biti abaa.

english_verse: No one has ever seen God. But if we love each other, God lives in us, and his love is truly in our hearts.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔkʋ man pɩɩ wu Ɩbwaarɛ, amaa nɩɩ an kan an biti abaa bɩrɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ bʋ anɛ tɔ, nɩɩ mu kebiti mʋ kɩ bʋ anɛ asɛ kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

english_verse: God has given us his Spirit. This is how we know we are one with him, just as he is one with us.
translation_verse: Ɩbwaarɛ maa sa anɛ mʋ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ sʋ, nɩɩ an nyi fɛɛ an bʋ mʋ tɔ nɩɩ ngbaa mʋ bʋ anɛ tɔ.

english_verse: God sent his Son to be the Savior of the world. We saw his Son and are now telling others about him.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ an wu yɛ anɛ ansi, nɩɩ ana gyii ɩmʋ kesintin fɛɛ Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ sun Mu‐Bii Yesu Krisito yɛ ɔ ba waa dulinyaa tɔ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ.

english_verse: God stays one with everyone who openly says Jesus is the Son of God. This is how we stay one with God
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kan bɩɩ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, Yesu ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐bii mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ bʋ mʋ tɔ nɩɩ ngbaa mʋ bʋ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔ.

english_verse: and are sure God loves us. God is love. If we keep on loving others, we will stay one in our hearts with God, and he will stay one with us.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ anɛ bɩrɛ an nyi Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ sa anɛ, nɩɩ an taa anɛ n‐yɩɩ tʋʋ kɩmʋ sʋ mʋ. Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ gyɛ kebiti. Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kebiti mʋ, ɔ bʋ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ gbaa bʋ mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: A real love for others will chase those worries away. The thought of being punished is what makes us afraid. It shows we have not really learned to love.
translation_verse: Kufuu kɩ man bʋ kebiti tɔ, amaa kebiti mʋ nɩɩ ki du kyɛɛkyɛɛ, kɩɩ gya kufuu kɩɩ lɩɩ tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ kufuu maa kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ ɛɛ naa, amaa ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kufuu mʋ man du kyɛɛkyɛɛ kebiti mʋ tɔ.

english_verse: But if we say we love God and don't love each other, we are liars. We cannot see God. So how can we love God, if we don't love the people we can see?
translation_verse: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan tɔwɛ yɛ, ee biti Ɩbwaarɛ yɛgɛ ee kisi mʋ tɔɔmaa bɩrɛ, ɔ gyɛ antɩŋɛsa wuya. Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ biti mʋ tɔɔmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee wu mʋ, ɔ mɛɛ taalɛ biti Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ o mee wu mʋ mʋ.

english_verse: The commandment that God has given us is: “Love God and love each other!”
translation_verse: Nɩɩ nbara nɩmʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa sa anɛ yɛ, Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee biti Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, ɩ dagaa maa biti mʋ tɔɔmaa gbaa.

english_verse: If we believe Jesus is truly Christ, we are God's children. Everyone who loves the Father will also love his children.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ gyii fɛɛ Yesu ɩ gyɛ Krisito mʋ, ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐bii nɩn. Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kebiti sa ɔsɛ mʋ, sʋ kebiti sa kebii mʋ gbaa.

english_verse: If we love and obey God, we know we will love his children.
translation_verse: Falɛ nɩɩ an bɩɩ fɛɛ an biti Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii ana, fɛɛ a maa biti Ɩbwaarɛ nɩɩ an buu mʋ nnɔsa mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: We show our love for God by obeying his commandments, and they are not hard to follow.
translation_verse: Mʋ nnɔsa kibuu sʋ, ɩ gyɛ nyɩmɩsa maa biti Ɩbwaarɛ, nɩɩ mʋ nnɔsa mʋ ɩ man bʋsɩn.

english_verse: Every child of God can defeat the world, and our faith is what gives us this victory.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐bii mʋ, i gyii dulinyaa sʋ. Lɩɩ anɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii nɩmʋ sʋ mʋ, an gyii dulinyaa sʋ.

english_verse: No one can defeat the world without having faith in Jesus as the Son of God. Who Jesus Is
translation_verse: Anɩmʋ i gyii dulinyaa sʋ? Amɔɔ bamʋ nɩɩ ba kɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii Yesu gyii mʋ.

english_verse: Water and blood came out from the side of Jesus Christ. It wasn't just water, but water and blood. The Spirit tells about this, because the Spirit is truthful.
translation_verse: Yesu ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ ba, nɩɩ o gyee Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee nɩɩ ɔ kyɛɛgɛ mʋ nkalan wʋrɩgɛ, man gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee mʋ nkʋn sʋ nɩɩ ɔ ba, amaa Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee mʋ yɛ nkalan kɩkyɛɛgɛ wʋrɩgɛ mʋ sʋ. Nɩɩ Kayaayu mʋ ɩ lɛɛ kaapʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ Kayaayu mʋ gyɛ kesintin.

english_verse: In fact, there are three who tell about it.
translation_verse: Ɩ sʋ atɔ asa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ lɛɛ Yesu keduli ɩɩ kaapʋ anɛ.

english_verse: They are the Spirit, the water, and the blood, and they all agree.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ, yɛ nkyu, yɛ nkalan. Falɛ atɔ asa anɩmʋ ɩɩ waa atɔ kʋlʋn

english_verse: We believe what people tell us. But we can trust what God says even more, and God is the one who has spoken about his Son.
translation_verse: An kɔɔlɛ nyɩmɩsa asɩn tɔwɛsa an gyii, amaa Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mʋ gyɛ kɩkparɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩ gyɛ adansɛ mʋ nɩɩ o gyii lɩɩ Mu‐Bii mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: If we have faith in God's Son, we have believed what God has said. But if we don't believe what God has said about his Son, it is the same as calling God a liar.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ Obii mʋ gyii mʋ, kɔɔlɛ asɩn nɩmʋ waa mʋ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ. Amaa ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man kɔɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ gyii mʋ, kanɩn nyɩmɩsa maŋa kaapʋ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ gyɛ antɩŋɛsa wuya, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ man kɔɔlɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ lɩɩ Mu‐Bii mʋ sʋ mʋ gyii.

english_verse: God has also said he gave us eternal life and this life comes to us from his Son.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ asɩn mʋ yɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ sa anɛ nkpa kakpaa, nɩɩ kanɩn nkpa kakpaa nɩmʋ bʋ Mu‐Bii tɔ nɩn.

english_verse: And so, if we have God's Son, we have this life. But if we don't have the Son, we don't have this life. Knowing about Eternal Life
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ Obii mʋ gyii mʋ sʋ nkpa, amaa ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man kɔɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii mʋ gyii mʋ man sʋ nkpa kakpaa nɩmʋ. Laalaalʋwɛ asɩn kaapʋsa

english_verse: All of you have faith in the Son of God, and I have written to let you know you have eternal life.
translation_verse: N kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ sa fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ Yesu gyii fɛɛ ɔ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii mʋ, kɛ fan nyɛ bɩɩ fɛɛ fan sʋ nkpa kakpaa

english_verse: And if we know God listens when we pray, we are sure our prayers have already been answered.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ an nyɛ nɩɩ an nyi fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ i nu kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ an kʋlɛ mʋ mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ an kʋlɛ mʋ mʋ, ɛɛ waa ɛɛ sa anɛ.

english_verse: Everything that is wrong is sin, but not all sins are deadly.
translation_verse: Asɩn kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man bʋrɔn sa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ gyɛ alibi nɩn. Amaa alibi akʋ ɩɩ barɩgɛ nyɩmɩsa maa Ɩbwaarɛ nsana kakpaa nɩn.

english_verse: We are certain we come from God and the rest of the world is under the power of the devil.
translation_verse: An nyi fɛɛ an gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐bii ana, nɩɩ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ kpini ba bʋ alibi awaapʋ mʋ abaa tɔ.

english_verse: We know that Jesus Christ the Son of God has come and has shown us the true God. And because of Jesus, we now belong to the true God who gives eternal life.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ an bɩla an nyi fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii mʋ ba kasɛ sʋ, nɩɩ ɔ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an nu kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ kasɛ, kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ a bɩɩ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kesintin mʋ. Anaa Ɩbwaarɛ kesintin wuya mʋ an waa kʋkʋlʋn, lɩɩ fɛɛ an waa kʋkʋlʋn maa Mu‐Bii Yesu Krisito mʋ. Mʋ ɩ gyɛ Kesintin Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ nkpa kakpaa mʋ.

english_verse: Children, you must stay away from idols.
translation_verse: Mi‐bii ana, fan kɩtaa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ ɩdakpa mʋ sʋ.

english_verse: From the church leader. To a very special woman and her children. I truly love all of you, and so does everyone else who knows the truth.
translation_verse: Ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ ɩ lɩɩ mɛ, ɔbɩlɩsa asɛ. N kyʋrɔɔ naa sa kibite danbɩrasa maa mu‐bii ana, mʋ nɩɩ n sʋ kebiti kesintin tɔ n sa bamʋ. Nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ mɛ wʋlɛ nkʋn, amaa bʋga yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ be nyi kesintin mʋ kpini, ba sʋ kebiti sa faa fu‐bii ana.

english_verse: We love you because the truth is now in our hearts, and it will be there forever.
translation_verse: Kpalɩ fɛɛ kesintin mʋ kɩ maa bʋ anɛ asɛ mʋ, kii biti ki sii anɛ asɛ kakpaa.

english_verse: I pray that God the Father and Jesus Christ his Son will be kind and merciful to us! May they give us peace and truth and love. Truth and Love
translation_verse: Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ maa Yesu Krisito, Ɔsɛ mʋ Mu‐Bii mʋ ba bwaala anɛ, kɛ ba wu anɛ kʋwɛɛ, kɛ ba sa anɛ kayɩɩ yuuli lɩɩ kesintin yɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ anɛ tɔ mʋ sʋ. Kesintin yɛ kebiti asɩn

english_verse: I was very glad to learn that some of your children are obeying the truth, as the Father told us to do.
translation_verse: Ɩ waa mɛ ɔkɔn gaa fɛɛ n maa wu fu‐bii ana mʋ tɔ akʋ ba maa naa kesintin ɔkpa sʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ sa anɛ nnɔsa mʋ.

english_verse: Dear friend, I am not writing to tell you and your children to do something you have not done before. I am writing to tell you to love each other, which is the first thing you were told to do.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ kibite danbɩrasa, n tɔwɛ fʋ fɛɛ fan biti abaa. Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ man gyɛ kɔnɔsa pʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ n kyʋrɔɔ n kyʋŋɛ n sa fanɛ, amaa ɩ gyɛ kɔnɔsa mʋ nɩɩ an wʋla nu lɩɩ koo asɩn mʋ npiili asɛ yɛ, an biti anɛ abaa.

english_verse: Love means we do what God tells us. And from the beginning, he told you to love him.
translation_verse: Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ kebiti mʋ fɛɛ, an maa buu Ɩbwaarɛ kɔnɔsa mʋ. Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan wʋla nu lii npiili asɛ mʋ, ɔ sa anɛ kɔnɔ yɛ an biti abaa anɛ kakyɩna tɔ.

english_verse: Many liars have gone out into the world. These deceitful liars are saying Jesus Christ did not have a truly human body. But they are liars and the enemies of Christ.
translation_verse: Asa pɩnapʋ damantɛ akʋ ba wʋla natɛ dulinyaa tɔ katɩn kʋmaa nɩmʋ, nɩɩ ba man kɔɔlɛ gyii fɛɛ Yesu Krisito ba dulinyaa tɔ fɛɛ nyɩmɩsa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ tɔ. Kanɩn asa nɩmʋ tɔ ɔkʋmaa gyɛ ɔpɩnapʋ yɛ Krisito okisipu nɩn.

english_verse: So be sure not to lose what we have worked for. If you do, you won't be given your full reward.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan baa fan da sʋ kɛ fan man pan kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ fan sun nyɛ mʋ, kɛ fan nyɛ fanɛ kʋkɔka bɔla abaa.

english_verse: Don't keep changing what you were taught about Christ, or else God will no longer be with you. But if you hold firmly to what you were taught, both the Father and the Son will be with you.
translation_verse: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kan taa ɔ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ nfɛɛrɛ tii kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Yesu kaapʋ mʋ sʋ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ man kɔɔlɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Krisito kaapʋ mʋ gyii mʋ, ɔ man nyi Ɩbwaarɛ. Amaa ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kan kɔɔlɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Krisito kaapʋ mʋ gyii mʋ, o nyi Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ Mu‐Bii Yesu Krisito mʋ.

english_verse: If people won't agree to this teaching, don't welcome them into your home or even greet them.
translation_verse: Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan ba fanɛ asɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ man sʋ falɛ akaapʋ‐bi anɩmʋ mʋ, fan man kɔɔlɛ mʋ ba fan akpaara sʋ abɛɛ fan waa mʋ nsa‐nsa.

english_verse: Greeting them is the same as taking part in their evil deeds. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ kanɩn nyɩmɩsa maŋa mʋ, ngbaa mʋ tii mʋ asun libi mʋ sʋ. Laalaalʋwɛ asɩn

english_verse: I have much more to tell you, but I don't want to write it with pen and ink. I want to come and talk to you in person, because this will make us really happy.
